medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Aceclofenac (as Sustained released pellets) 200 mg & Rabeprazole Sodium (As enteric coated pellets) 20 mg
medicines.description: Alcinac-RB capsules contain Aceclofenac (NSAID) in sustained release form and Rabeprazole (Proton Pump Inhibitor). Alcinac-RB is indicated for relief of pain and inflammation in chronic conditions like osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, back pain, post-surgical pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, epigastric pain, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, diarrhoea, constipation and stomach pain.

medicines.name: ACIMOL
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Acimol Tablet contains Aceclofenac a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) and Paracetamol a time tested analgesic and antipyretic drug. Acimol tablet is used to reduce pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and osteoarthricareitis. It is also be used to relieve back pain, toothache, or pain in the ear and throat.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ACIMOL-FORTE (10's/15's)
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Serratiopeptidase 15 mg eq. to enzyme activity 30000 Units as enteric coated granules
medicines.description: Acimol-Forte tablets is a combination of Aceclofenac a NSAID, Serratiopeptidase a proteolytic enzyme and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It also alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, Indigestion, heartburn, loss of appetite and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ACIMOL-MR
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Chlorzoxazone 250 mg
medicines.description: Acimol-MR Tablet contains Aceclofenac a NSAID, Chlorzoxazone a muscle relaxant and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic that is used to relieve pain and inflammation in conditions that affect muscles. Acimol-MR effectively relieves muscle stiffness or spasm, thereby improving muscle movement. It is indicated in Low back pain, acute muscle spasms, muscle spasms associated with spondylosis, muscular cramping & traumatic injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, heartburn, stomach pain, Diarrhea, loss of appetite, tiredness and sleepiness.

medicines.name: ACIMOL-SP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg & Serratiopeptidase 15 mg eq. to enzyme activity 30000 Units as enteric coated granules
medicines.description: Acimol-SP Tablet is a combination of Aceclofenac a NSAID and Serratiopeptidase a Proteolytic enzyme. It is used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions. Acimol-SP effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, osteoarthritis and post-operative pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, indigestion, heartburn, loss of appetite and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ACIMOL-SR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac SR 200 mg
medicines.description: Acimol-SR contains Aceclofenac a NSAID which is a pain relieving medicine. It effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis. It's Sustained release form provides round the clock effective pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are vomiting, stomach pain, nausea, Indigestion, diarrhea, heartburn and loss of appetite.

medicines.name: CHYMOMERG-A
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Trypsin 48 mg, Rutoside Trihydrate 100 mg, Bromelain 90 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg
medicines.description: Chymomerg-A Tablets contains Aceclofenac, a NSAID in addition to Trypsin & Bromelain, proteolytic enzymes that clears dead cells to reduce pain and inflammation and Rutoside, a herbal analgesic for effective pain relief and is used to treat pain and inflammation related to osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and tendonitis. It is also used to treat conditions such as edema and inflammation following surgeries of cellulitis, sports injuries, tooth extractions, and sprains.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects of are temporary stinging sensation, nausea, hives, difficulty in breathing, burning sensations, Indigestion and loss of balance.

medicines.name: DIECOLD PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg, Caffeine 25 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg & Cetirizine 10 mg
medicines.description: Diecold Plus is a combination of five medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Diecold plus helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, Bloating, Stomach pain, Indigestion, Loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: LEECRIN-A
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diacerein 50 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg
medicines.description: Leecrin-A tablets contain Diacerein (Pain Killer specifically for joints) and Aceclofenac (NSAID). Leecrin-A reduces pain and inflammation in joints and improves their flexibility. Leecrin-A tablets are indicated for Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis and chronic inflammatory disorders of the joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhea, Indigestion, heartburn, abdominal pain, nausea, rash, redness, hives, headache, dizziness and drowsiness

medicines.name: SPASTONE-RM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg & Drotaverine Hydrochloride 80 mg
medicines.description: Spastone tablet contains Aceclofenac which is a Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) & Drotaverine which is a antispasmodic drug which relieves muscle spasms. Spastone-RM tablet is indicated for the treatment of menstrual pain (dysmenorrhea), abdominal pain and cramps.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, dryness of mouth, nausea, sleepiness, blurred vision & weakness

medicines.name: THIOFORD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiocolchicoside 4 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg
medicines.description: Thioford Tablet is a combination of skeletal muscle-relaxant drug Thiocolchicoside & NSAID Aceclofenac used in the treatment of orthopedic, traumatic and rheumatologic disorders. It is indicated for painful muscle spasms, Neck & Shoulder Pain, Sciatica, Degenerative vertebral disorders, Ankylosing spondylitis for adults and adolescents 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects of are Somnolence, diarrhoea, heartburn, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain and flatulence.

medicines.name: WINTY DIVINE TULSI
medicines.composition: Green Tea, Natural Basil Flavour & Dry Tulsi Leaves
medicines.description: A rich & vintage charm of Kangra brings you the goodness of Tulsi, infused in Leeford's Winty Divine Tulsi Green Tea, that is highly rich in anti-oxidants, detoxifies body by flushing out toxins, boosts metabolism that helps in encouraging fat loss & also helps in relaxing your body & mind. The zero calorie green tea not just intensifies metabolism but also provides energy.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects are observed if consumed within the recommended limits.
medicines.dosage: Prepare with 1 tea bag in 100 ml of freshly boiled hot water. For best results, do not add milk or sugar to it. One can safely consume up to 2 cups of Leeford Green Tea in a day.

medicines.name: SUNSHADE-SPF 30 GEL
medicines.composition: Ultra Block SPF-30 Transparent Sunscreen Gel-Non Greasy Water Resistant
medicines.description: Leeford's SunShade SPF-30 Ultra Block Transparent Sunscreen Gel offers prolonged and consistent broad spectrum sun protection against the harmful UV-A and UV-B radiations. It provides complete sun protection, offers intense hydration with its broad spectrum water resistant formulation. It helps fight skin ageing caused due to free radicals induced by sun's radiation. SunShade is a non greasy formula that leaves no white residue, spreads easily over the skin thus also offering blue light protection. SunShade SPF-30 Ultra Block Transparent Sunscreen Gel helps avoid sun burns, sun tan & skin darkening in case of prolonged sun exposure. SunShade Gel also provides intense moisturization, nourishment & an even, non-shiny finish.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects are observed if used within the prescribed limits.
medicines.dosage: Squeeze appropriate quantity of SunShade SPF-30 Transparent Sunscreen Gel on fingertips and apply on freshly cleaned face, neck and arms at least 15 to 30 minutes prior to going out. Re-apply the gel after swimming, sweating, physical activity or after a prolonged exposure of more than 4-6 hours.

medicines.name: WINTY LEMON & HONEY
medicines.composition: Green Tea, Natural Lemon Flavour & Natural Honey Flavour
medicines.description: Leeford's Winty Green Tea brings you the authentic & rich charm of Kangra with the goodness of Lemon & Honey, infused in Winty Lemon & Honey Green Tea. Highly rich in anti-oxidants, Winty Green Tea detoxifies body by flushing out toxins, boosts metabolism that helps in encouraging fat loss & also helps in relaxing your body & mind. medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects are observed if consumed within the recommended limits.
medicines.dosage: Prepare with 1 tea bag in 100 ml of freshly boiled hot water. For best results, do not add milk or sugar to it. One can safely consume up to 2 cups of Leeford Green Tea in a day.

medicines.composition: Green Tea, Garcinia Cambogia, Sea Buckthorn Berry & Leaves, Hibiscus Flower & Nettle Leaves.
medicines.description: Leeford's Winty Aqua Slim Green Tea brings you the rich & authentic taste of Kangra. The zero calorie green tea intensifies metabolism & also provides energy.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects are observed if consumed within the recommended limits.

medicines.name: KIDOGEM WIPES (25 Pcs)
medicines.composition: Baby wet wipes for smooth, clean & tender baby skin.
medicines.description: Leeford's Kidogem Baby wipes are moistened wet wipes with nourishing & cleansing solutions that gently cleanses delicate baby skin, prevents microbial growth and heals irritated & chapped skin. Also, it provides a mild fragrance to cleansed, nourished skin of the baby. Kidogem wipes also gives a subtle touch to the tender baby skin with their soft material.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Pull back the cover and take out the desired number of wipes. Close the cover tightly after using so as to avoid wipes from drying out. Keep away from direct sunlight. Discard the used wipes in the bin after use.

medicines.name: CAVMOX-250
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Amoxycillin Trihydrate eq. to Amoxycillin 250 mg
medicines.description: Cavmox contains Amoxycillin, a Penicillin group antibiotic that acts by damaging the cell wall of the disease causing bacteria and hence killing them. It is mainly used in cases of Respiratory tract infections, ENT Infections, Skin & soft tissue infection, Urinary tract infection and for eradication of bacteria from stomach ulcer.
medicines.sideEffects: Cavmox Capsules & Dispersible tablets are well tolerated, however the main side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea & skin rashes.

medicines.name: THYROACTIV-12.5
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Thyroxine Sodium eq. to Thyroxine 12.5 mcg
medicines.description: Thyroactiv tablets contain Thyroxine sodium (synthetic form of Thyroxine hormone secreted by Thyroid gland).Thyroxine controls entire metabolic activity of the body and is very important for the proper functioning of our body. It is indicated for the treatment of hypothyroidism in adults and also in congenital hypothyroidism.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are increased appetite, weight variations, headache, vomiting, diarrhoea, changes in menstrual cycle, fever, sensitivity to heat, cramps and mood swings

Alfuzosin is in a class of medications called alpha blockers. It works by relaxing the muscles in the prostate and bladder to allow urine to flow more easily.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are tiredness, headache, runny or stuffy nose, pain, stomach pain, heartburn, constipation, nausea and decrease in sexual ability, sore throat, fever, chills, cough and other signs of infection.

Alfuzosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Dutasteride prevents Testosterone from converting to Dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are tiredness, headache, runny or stuffy nose, pain, stomach pain, heartburn, constipation, nausea and decrease in sexual ability, sore throat, fever, chills, cough and other signs of infection.

medicines.description: Walcobal Plus is a nutraceutical formulation designed to support nerve health and metabolic function. It is used as an adjunct in the management of diabetic neuropathy and related nerve disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well-tolerated. Mild gastrointestinal discomfort or allergic reactions may occur in sensitive individuals.

medicines.sideEffects: The side effects are decreased appetite, confusions, disorientation, anxiety, insomnia, nervousness, nausea & sexual dysfunction.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, stomach pain, constipation, drowsiness, dizziness, rash or redness of the skin, swelling on eyes, lips and tongue.

medicines.name: DYNACID (SAUNF)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Dried Aluminium Hydroxide eq. Aluminium Hydroxide 200 mg, Magnesium Hydroxide 200 mg & Simethicone 25 mg Sugar Free (Saunf Flavour)
medicines.description: Dynacid Suspension contains a balanced mix of ingredients that are widely used as an antacid, providing quick relief from acidity, heartburn and gas. Its Aluminium hydroxide is an antacid, which neutralises increased stomach acid, Dimethicone is an antiflatulent which helps in releasing the gas and Magnesium hydroxide is a laxative that increases water in the intestine and reduces stomach acid. It is also sugar-free and is generally well tolerated.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, constipation, diarrhea, or headache.

medicines.name: NEBULIZER
medicines.composition: Premium quality low noise piston nebulizer
medicines.description: Leeford Nebulizer is formulated for delivery of medication directly to the lungs in the form of fine particles/mist. It is meant for efficient respiratory therapy, effective medication delivery. Leeford Nebulizer is low noise, durable device & a complete kit ideal for all age groups. It is used for respiratory conditions like asthma, COPD, sinus and other respiratory disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Wash your hands properly, put the medication into medication chamber of the inhalational attachment of nebulizer. Attach the mouthpiece and turn on the air compressor. Continue to inhale normally till the entire medication is consumed; this will take 5-20 minutes. After that wash the medication chamber of nebulizer.

medicines.description: Tinfal-M tablet contains Minoxidil, a vasodilator that helps hair growth by increasing hair shaft diameter and by inducing its growth. Tinfal-M also prevents further hair loss & help hair to regrow. It is prescribed in the treatment of male pattern baldness (from centre of head). It is not used for baldness at the front of the scalp or receding hairline in men.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach discomfort, pain and bloating are the few observed side effects.

medicines.name: COZYRICH-Q10 PLUS SG
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains Coenzyme Q 10 100 mg, Levocarnitine 250 mg, EPA 90 mg, DHA 60 mg, Vitamin D3 400 IU, Vitamin K27 30 mcg, Thiamine 1.4 mg, Riboflavin 1.9 mg, Niacinamide 14 mg, Pantothenic acid 5 mg, Pyridoxine 1 mg, Biotin 40 mcg, Folic acid 150 mcg, Methylcobalamin 2 mcg, Vitamin C 80 mg, Vitamin A 850 mcg, Vitamin E 10 mg, Lycopene (10%) 5 mg, Lutein 2 mg, Grape seed extract (Proanthocyanidin) 45 mg, el. Zinc 5 mg, el. Chromium 30 mcg & el. Selenium 20 mcg
medicines.description: Cozyrich Q10 Plus softgels contain Coenzyme Q10 (energy producing natural compound), Omega 3 fatty acids and complete Vitamin B complex with Vitamin D. Cozyrich Q-10 Plus is indicated for cardiovascular, diabetics, neurovascular disorders in addition to prolonged statin therapy for more than 3 months. It is also indicated for idiopathic male infertility, Oligozoospermia (low sperm count), Asthenozoospermia (reduced sperm movement), Teratozoospermia (abnormal sperms). It is also used before reproductive techniques for optimizing DNA quality and testis surgery to increase sperm count, movement and quality.
medicines.sideEffects: Cozyrich Q10 Plus softgels generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: DEBIGLIP-100 M SR
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Vildagliptin 100 mg & Metformin (SR) 500 mg
medicines.description: Debiglip-100 M SR / 100 M SR Forte tablet contains Vildagliptin, a new class of anti-diabetics that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control Diabetes & Metformin that acts by increases absorption of sugar from blood to muscles. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, tremor, rash and oedema.

medicines.name: VIDADEB-100 M SR FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Vildagliptin (SR) 100 mg & Metformin (SR) 1000 mg
medicines.description: Vidadeb-100 M SR/ 100 M SR FORTE tablet contains Vildagliptin, a new class of anti-diabetics that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control diabetes & Metformin that acts by increases absorption of sugar from blood to muscles. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, tremor, rash and oedema.

medicines.name: LEECET-AM SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Cetirizine 5 mg & Ambroxol 30 mg
medicines.description: Leecet-AM syrup contains Cetirizine & Ambroxol, a combination medication used in relieving symptoms of allergies and respiratory conditions. Cetirizine, an antihistamine, reduces allergy symptoms like sneezing and itching & Ambroxol acts as an expectorant thus helping in clearing mucus from the airways. Leecet-AM syrup provides dual action for effective relief from cough and congestion, making it suitable for patients suffering from colds, bronchitis, asthma or allergies.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects include dizziness, drowsiness, nausea, vomiting, headache, nervousness, fatigue, increased sleepiness & increased appetite.

medicines.name: MIKIN-100

medicines.description: Mikin injections contain Amikacin, a aminoglycoside antibiotic that acts by inhibiting growth of the bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of blood infections, intra-abdominal infections, skin and soft tissue infections, burn infections, post-operative infections, respiratory tract infections & urinary tract infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are pain, irritation and redness at the injection site. Besides Headache, Rash, Nausea, Vomiting, Numbness, Tremor, Joint pains, Weakness & Allergic reactions may occur.

medicines.name: MIKIN-250

medicines.composition: Each g contains Aminacrine 0.1% w/w & Cetrimide Hydrochloride 0.05% w/w
medicines.description: Burnosept cream contains Aminacrine and Cetrimide, both of which are anti-septic that kills virus, bacteria and fungi. Burnosept cream is used for minor cuts, wounds, sores, insect bites, rashes, abrasions & first degree burns i.e. superficial burns.

medicines.name: PACEBEAT-100
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Amiodarone Hydrochloride 100 mg
medicines.description: Pacebeat tablets contain Amiodarone, an antiarrhythmic drug that controls the irregularly increased beating of heart, known as Arrhythmia. It is prescribed for treatment & prevention of increased (>150 beats/minute) heart beats of upper or lower chambers of the heart so as to restore normal heart rhythm.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, constipation, loss of appetite, shaking & tiredness may occur.

medicines.name: PACEBEAT-200
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Amiodarone Hydrochloride 200 mg

It is prescribed for treatment & prevention of increased (>150 beats/minute) heart beats of upper or lower chambers of the heart so as to restore normal heart rhythm.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, constipation, loss of appetite, shaking & tiredness may occur.

It is indicated for cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema, Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, dizziness, abdominal discomfort, diarrhea, constipation, heartburn, loss of appetite, rashes, urticaria, drowsiness and nervousness.

medicines.name: TRYPTOFORD-10

It is prescribed to improve mood and feelings of well-being, relieve anxiety and tension, helps sleep better, helps in bed wetting and increase energy level.
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, dry mouth, blurred vision, constipation, weight gain & trouble urinating are the main side effects.

medicines.name: TRYPTOFORD-25

medicines.sideEffects: The commonly reported side effects during treatment with combination are somnolence, dizziness, headache, palpitations, flushing, abdominal pain, nausea, ankle swelling, oedema and fatigue.

medicines.name: METAPOL- 25 AM

medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, headache, difficulty in breathing, slow heart rate, Nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain & constipation are the main side effects of the combination.

medicines.name: OMNIPRES-20 AMH

medicines.name: VENPRES-40 AMT
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Amlodipine 5 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Metoprolol (ER) 50 mg
medicines.description: Venpres-40 AMT tablets is a combination medicine used to manage high blood pressure and reduce the risk of heart-related complications. Venpres-40 AMT tablets contains Amlodipine, Telmisartan and Metoprolol. Amlodipine is a calcium channel blocker that relaxes blood vessels, Telmisartan is an angiotensin receptor blocker that helps lower blood pressure, and Metoprolol is a beta-blocker that reduces heart rate. Together, they improve heart health and help maintain stable blood pressure levels.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, dizziness, nausea, weakness, stomach pain, constipation, swelling in the hands or feet, fast or pounding heartbeats, flushing are some side effects that may occur

medicines.description: Omnipres-20 AM tablets contain Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart works. It is prescribed for high blood pressure in patients whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled by either drug.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are peripheral edema, headache and dizziness.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL- AM 2.5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 2.5 mg & Amlodipine 5 mg
medicines.description: Bisotril-AM 2.5 tablets contain Bisoprolol and Amlodipine, two antihypertensive agents. Bisoprolol, a beta-blocker, lowers heart rate and cardiac workload, while Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker, relaxes and widens blood vessels. The combination helps effectively control high blood pressure, improve heart function, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include dizziness, fatigue, headache, slow heart rate, swelling of ankles, or flushing.

Leekuf Syrup is used in relief from dry cough, throat irritation, sneezing, watery eyes & stuffed nose due to an allergy or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

It contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide to suppress cough, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride to reduce nasal congestion, and Chlorpheniramine Maleate to alleviate allergic reactions like sneezing and runny nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

It is used in the treatment of common cold. It provides relief from symptoms such as fever, headache, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies, viral fevers & common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, throat, headache, loss of appetite, feeling sleepy, stomach upset and nausea.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD-DS SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Paracetamol 250 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 2 mg, Ammonium Chloride 120 mg, Sodium Citrate 60 mg & Menthol 1 mg
medicines.description: Criticold-DS suspension is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a nasal decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic, Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Ammonium Chloride an expectorant & Menthol for soothing properties. It is used in the treatment of common cold. It provides relief from symptoms such as fever, headache, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, throat, headache, loss of appetite, feeling sleepy, stomach upset and nausea.

medicines.name: AMRODERM CREAM
medicines.composition: Each g contains Amorolfine 0.25% w/w
medicines.description: Amroderm cream contains Amorolfine, an antifungal that works by killing the fungus responsible for causing infections. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin, skin folds. It is also prescribed for fungal infection of skin that causes a lightening or darkening of the skin of the neck, chest, arms or legs.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are burning, itching, erythema, skin dryness and scaling.

medicines.name: AMRODERM NAIL LACQUER
medicines.composition: Amorolfine Hydrochloride 5% w/v
medicines.description: Amroderm Nail Lacquer is a topical antifungal formulation containing Amorolfine Hydrochloride 5% w/v, a broad-spectrum antifungal agent effective against dermatophytes, yeasts, and molds. It penetrates the nail plate and acts directly at the site of infection, making it ideal for the treatment of onychomycosis (fungal infections of the nails). The lacquer forms a protective film over the nail, allowing sustained drug release and deep penetration for enhanced efficacy.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated

medicines.name: EVOXIL CV 625 (10's)
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Amoxycillin Trihydrate eq. to Amoxycillin 500 mg & Potassium Clavulanate diluted eq. to Clavulanic acid 125 mg
medicines.description: EVOXIL-CV tablet, dispersible tablet, injection & dry syrup are combination of Amoxycillin, a Penicillin antibiotic with Clavulanic acid, a beta-lactam inhibitor. EVOXIL-CV is a broad spectrum antibiotic having extensive usage, but used in cases of difficult infections of kids, adolescents & adults.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of this combination are Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain. Otherwise it is well tolerated.

medicines.sideEffects: EVOXIL capsules & Dispersible tablets are well tolerated, however the main side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea & skin rashes.

medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Amoxycillin Sodium eq. to Amoxycillin 1 g & sterile Potassium Clavulanate eq. to Clavulanic acid 200 mg with WFI

It is used to treat moderate to severe bacterial infections of the respiratory tract, urinary tract, skin, soft tissues, bones, and joints. This injectable form ensures rapid action, especially in hospitalized patients or when oral therapy is not suitable.

medicines.name: LEEGLYS GLYCERIN (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Glycerine with rose water
medicines.description: Leeglys contains a mixture of Rose water with pure Glycerine that helps your skin as a protector. Rose water & Glycerine provides nourishment, cleansing, protecting & healing the skin. Leeglys helps to treat sunburn, rashes & dryness. Rose water & Glycerine protects the skin barrier by locking the moisturization deep down into the skin. Leeglys provides timeless glow & hydration to the skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Take an optimum amount of Leeglys and gently apply on the affected area.

medicines.name: CABERFORD-0.25
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Cabergoline 0.25 mg
medicines.description: Caberford 0.25 tablets contain Cabergoline, a Dopaminergic receptor agonist that exerts direct inhibitory effect on Prolactin secretion. Caberford inhibits excessive secretion of Prolactin and thus improves associated complications of Infertility, menstrual irregularity, breast enlargement. Caberford is indicated in the treatment of abnormal secretion of breast milk, Hyperprolactinemia and its complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, bloating, cold sweats & tingling on the hands & feet

medicines.name: CAVMOX-HP KIT
medicines.composition: Each kit contains Amoxycillin Trihydrate eq. to Amoxycillin 750 mg (2 film coated tablets), Clarithromycin 500 mg (2 film coated tablets) & Pantoprazole Sodium eq. to Pantoprazole 40 mg (as enteric coated pellets, 2 hard gelatin capsule) [ANTIULCER KIT of 6]
medicines.description: Cavmox-HP Kit contains 2 tablets of Amoxycillin 750 mg, a Penicillin antibiotic; 2 tablets of Clarithromycin, a Macrolide antibiotic & 2 capsules of Pantoprazole, an acid inhibitor. This kit is used for the prevention & cure stomach and duodenal (small intestine) ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Cavmox-HP Kit occasionally has minor side effects such as Diarrhea, headache, nausea, vomiting and abnormal taste.

medicines.name: EVOXIL-CV 600 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Amoxycillin (Sterile) 500 mg & Potassium Clavulanate (Sterile) 100 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Evoxil–CV 600 Injection combines Amoxicillin, a broad-spectrum penicillin antibiotic, with Potassium Clavulanate, a β-lactamase inhibitor. Together, they treat a wide range of bacterial infections that are resistant to amoxicillin alone. This combination is effective against respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and intra-abdominal infections which are caused by β-lactamase-producing bacteria.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects of this combination are Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain that may occur, otherwise it is well tolerated.

medicines.name: CAVMOX-CV 600 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Amoxycillin (Sterile) 500 mg & Potassium Clavulanate (Sterile) 100 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cavmox–CV 600 Injection combines Amoxicillin, a broad-spectrum penicillin antibiotic, with Potassium Clavulanate, a β-lactamase inhibitor. medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects of this combination are Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain that may occur, otherwise it is well tolerated.

medicines.name: EVOXIL-CV ES DRY SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of reconstituted suspension contains Amoxycillin 600 mg & Clavulanic Acid 42.9 mg
medicines.description: Evoxil-CV ES dry syrup is a combination containing Amoxycillin and Potassium Clavulanate & is used in the treatment of bacterial infections. Amoxycillin is a penicillin-type antibiotic that kills bacteria while Potassium Clavulanate inhibits bacterial resistance by tackling beta lactamases enzymes. Evoxil-CV ES is effective against a wide range of infections, including respiratory, ear, and urinary tract infections, improving overall treatment outcomes.
medicines.sideEffects: Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: CAVMOX-CV ES DRY SYRUP

medicines.name: CAVMOX-CL
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Amoxycillin 250 mg & Cloxacillin 250 mg
medicines.description: CAVMOX-CL Capsule is a combination medicine containing amoxycillin and cloxacillin as active ingredients. It belongs to a class of medicines called antibiotics. It is used for the treatment of various types of bacterial infections like respiratory tract infection like asthma, COPD or sinusitis, urinary tract infection, ENT (ear, nose, throat) infection, skin infections, bone and joint infection
medicines.sideEffects: Allergic reactions like skin rash, urge to scratch, Nausea, Vomiting, Stomach pain, Diarrhoea

medicines.name: EVOXIL – CL
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Amoxycillin 250 mg & Cloxacillin 50 mg
medicines.description: Evoxil-CL contains Amoxicillin which is a broad-spectrum penicillin that inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis & Cloxacillin, a penicillinase-resistant penicillin effective against beta-lactamase-producing staphylococci. Together, they provide enhanced coverage against a range of pathogens & used to treat various bacterial infections, including respiratory tract infections, skin infections, urinary tract infections, and osteomyelitis.
medicines.sideEffects: This combination is generally well-tolerated, but potential side effects include nausea, diarrhea, allergic reactions & abdominal discomfort

medicines.name: KUFTIVE LOZENGES (ORANGE)
medicines.composition: Each lozenges conatins 2,4-Dichlorobenzyl alcohol 1.2 mg & Amylmetacresol 0.6 mg
medicines.description: Kuftive lozenges provides fast acting relief that helps prevent sore throat pain from getting worse as it contains two effective antiseptics. Kuftive is proven to work for up to 2 hours & is indicated for sore throat to prevent pain, discomfort & infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: In adults & children over 6 years of age, one Kuftive lozenge to be dissolved in mouth slowly every 2-3 hours & not exceeding 12 lozenges per day.

medicines.name: KUFTIVE LOZENGES (HONEY-LEMON)
medicines.composition: Each lozenges conatins 2,4-Dichlorobenzyl alcohol 1.2 mg & Amylmetacresol 0.6 mg
medicines.description: Kuftive lozenges provides fast acting relief that helps prevent sore throat pain from getting worse as it contains two effective antiseptics. Kuftive is proven to work for up to 2 hours & is indicated for sore throat to prevent pain, discomfort & infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: In adults & children over 6 years of age, one Kuftive lozenge to be dissolved in mouth slowly every 2-3 hours & not exceeding 12 lozenges per day.

medicines.name: ARTINOVA INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Alpha-Beta Arteether 75 mg i.e. 150 mg in 2 ml Ampoule
medicines.description: Artinova injection contains Alpha-Beta Arteether, an injectable anti-malarial which is prescribed for the treatment of Malaria when other drugs have fail even in complicated cases and in those patients where Malaria has affected brain.
medicines.sideEffects: The drug is well tolerated and the side effect are decreased heart rate & ECG disturbances.

medicines.name: ENSHINER
medicines.composition: Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Kojic Acid, Betaine, D-Panthenol & Glycerin
medicines.description: Enshiner Cream is a skin-brightening and hydrating formulation with Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, a stable Vitamin C derivative that brightens skin and reduces pigmentation; Kojic Acid, which helps lighten dark spots by inhibiting melanin production; Betaine, a gentle hydrator that protects the skin barrier; D-Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5), known for its soothing and repairing properties; and Glycerin, a powerful humectant that maintains skin moisture.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. In rare cases, mild irritation, redness, or tingling may occur, especially on sensitive skin. Discontinue use if irritation persists.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount of Enshiner Cream to cleansed skin on the affected areas or entire face, depending on the extent of pigmentation. Use twice daily for visible results. Once improvement is noted, reduce to once daily for maintenance. Avoid using with other strong exfoliants or pigmentation treatments unless advised by a healthcare professional.

medicines.name: ENSHINER PRO
medicines.composition: Arbutin, Grape seed ext., Kojic acid, Lecithin, Vit. E, Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Glutathione, Glycerin & Tranexamic acid
medicines.description: Enshiner Pro cream is a multifunctional cream that acts on skin lightening by reducing melanin, treats melasma & other pigmentations, reduces wrinkles and offers uniform skin tone. If applied on the body elsewhere acts as a anti-ageing & anti-wrinkle cream and thus can be used on neck & Upper chest areas as well as on arms and abdomen.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerated, mild irritation or sensation may occur.
medicines.dosage: Use Enshiner Pro Cream twice daily on the desired area after thoroughly washing and pat drying the area or after sponging the surface for other than facial application.

medicines.name: DUTEX-20
medicines.composition: Each Gastro-resistant tablet contains Duloxetine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Dutex-20 tablets contain Duloxetine, an antidepressants that acts by modulating brain chemicals. It is prescribed for generalized anxiety disorder, depressive disorders, nerve pain & other pain of central origin.
medicines.sideEffects: Prominent ones are nausea, headache, dry mouth, excessive sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: COCCYX SEAT
medicines.composition: N.A.

(SIZES AVAILABLE :Universal Size)
medicines.sideEffects: N.A.

medicines.description: Lumifen is a combination of Artemether & Lumefantrine, two anti-malarial drugs for the treatment of Malaria and Malaria caused by mixed pathogens.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, dizziness, decreased appetite, sleep disorder, vomiting, nausea, diarrhoea, abdominal pain, rash, pruritus, muscle and joint pains.

medicines.name: LUMIFEN TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Artemether 80 mg & Lumefantrine 480 mg
medicines.description: Lumifen is a combination of Artemether & Lumefantrine, two anti-malarial drugs for the treatment of Malaria and Malaria caused by mixed pathogens.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, dizziness, decreased appetite, sleep disorder, vomiting, nausea, diarrhoea, abdominal pain, rash, pruritus, muscle and joint pains.

medicines.name: GLIMFAL-2M FORTE
medicines.composition: Each bilayered uncoated tablet contains Glimepiride 2 mg & Metformin Hydrochloride (SR) 1000 mg
medicines.description: Glimfal-2M Forte tablet contains Glimepiride 2 mg & Metformin 1000 mg in sustain release form. Both these are anti-diabetic drug that acts synergistically to offer better diabetic control based on the requirement. It is prescribed for type II diabetes patients.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, nausea, dizziness, weakness, unexplained weight gain & low sugar levels.

medicines.name: EMINATE
medicines.composition: Each pack contains one vial of Artesunate 60 mg, an ampoule of Sodium Bicarbonate 5% w/v & 5 ml FFS of Sodium Chloride 0.9% w/v with WFI
medicines.description: Eminate injection contains Artesunate, an anti-malarial drug prescribed for the treatment of severe form of Malaria.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Anemia, raised liver enzymes & bilirubin levels, decreased platelets, increases white blood cells, elevated creatinine, pulmonary edema, diarrhea & Jaundice.

medicines.name: ATORNIZ-10 GOLD
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Atorvastatin calcium (as Film Coated tablet form) equivalent to Atorvastatin 10 mg, Clopidogrel bisulphate (as Film Coated tablet form ) eq. to Clopidogrel 75 mg & Aspirin (as Enteric Coated tablet form) 75 mg Capsules (as Tablet in Capsule formulation)
medicines.description: Atorniz-10 Gold tablet contains Atorvastatin, a statin that lowers the blood fat levels; Clopidogrel & Aspirin, both are blood thinner that avoids blood coagulation. It is prescribed in established heart, brain & blood vessels diseases. Besides it is also used after stenting and to reduce the risk of heart, brain & blood vessels diseases in diabetes & other high risk individuals.
medicines.sideEffects: The side effects of the combination are bleeding disorders, abdominal pain, dyspepsia, allergic reactions, hyperglycaemia, constipation, muscle & joint pain in extremity, liver function test abnormality, gastrointestinal irritation & anaemia.

medicines.name: ATORNIZ-A
medicines.composition: Each hard geletin capsule contains Aspirin (as an orange coloured gastro resistant tablet) 75 mg & Atorvastatin calcium (as Film Coated tablet) equivalent to Atorvastatin 10 mg Capsules (as Tablet in Capsule formulation)
medicines.description: Atorniz-A tablet contains Atorvastatin, a statin that lowers the blood fat levels & Aspirin, a blood thinner that avoids blood coagulation. It is prescribed to all diabetics, patients of cardiovascular neurovascular diseases to prevent heart pain, heart attack, stroke & other cardiovascular risk in patients.
medicines.sideEffects: The combination is well tolerated, but the main side-effects are muscle pain, diarrhoea, nausea, joint pain, minor bleedings & allergic reactions.

medicines.name: CARDIOROSTIN 10 ASP
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Rosuvastatin Calcium eq. to Rosuvastatin (as FC tablet) 10 mg & Aspirin (as EC tablet) 75 mg (Tablet in Capsule formulation)
medicines.description: Cardiorostin-ASP capsules contains Rosuvastatin, a statin that lowers the blood level of fats & Aspirin, a blood thinner. It is prescribed to patients of cardiovascular & neurovascular diseases as well as all diabetics to prevent heart pain, heart attack, stroke & other cardiovascular risk.

medicines.composition: Azelastine Hydrochloride 140 mcg (0.1% w/v) (Nasal Spray)

It is prescribed to relieve symptoms of seasonal & annual nasal allergies such as runny, itchy, stuffy nose, sneezing, and post-nasal drip caused by allergies or other conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Bitter taste in the mouth, drowsiness, a burning feeling inside the nose, cough, nose bleeds, nausea, dry mouth, headache, weight gain, muscle aches & red eyes may occur.

It is prescribed to relieve severe symptoms of seasonal & annual nasal allergies such as runny, itchy, stuffy nose, sneezing, and post-nasal drip caused by allergies or other conditions.

It is prescribed for ear nose and throat infections, respiratory tract infections, skin & soft tissue infections as well as gynaecological infections.

medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Azithromycin Dihydrate eq. to Anhydrous Azithromycin 100 mg

medicines.sideEffects: Headache, Vomiting, Abdominal pain, Nausea & Increase in white blood cells count are the main side effects.

medicines.name: AZIFORD-200 (15 & 30 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Azithromycin Dihydrate eq. to Anhydrous Azithromycin 200 mg
medicines.description: Aziford suspension contain Azithromycin, a macrolide antibiotic that inhibits the growth of the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed for ear nose and throat infections, respiratory tract infections, skin & soft tissue infections as well as gynaecological infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, Vomiting, Abdominal pain, Nausea & Increase in white blood cells count are the main side effects.

medicines.name: AZROLID-100 (15 & 30 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml suspension contains Azithromycin 100 mg
medicines.description: Azrolid suspensions contain Azithromycin, a macrolide antibiotic that inhibits the growth of the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed for ear nose and throat infections, respiratory tract infections, skin & soft tissue infections as well as gynaecological infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, Vomiting, Abdominal pain, Nausea & Increase in white blood cells count are the main side effects.

medicines.name: AZROLID-200 (15 & 30 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml suspension contains Azithromycin 200 mg
medicines.description: Azrolid suspensions contain Azithromycin, a macrolide antibiotic that inhibits the growth of the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed for ear nose and throat infections, respiratory tract infections, skin & soft tissue infections as well as gynaecological infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, Vomiting, Abdominal pain, Nausea & Increase in white blood cells count are the main side effects.

medicines.name: AZIFORD INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Azithromycin 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Aziford injection contains Azithromycin, a macrolide antibiotic used in the treatment of a variety of bacterial infections, including respiratory tract infections, skin infections and sexually transmitted diseases. It works by inhibiting bacterial protein synthesis, effectively stopping the growth of susceptible bacteria. Aziford injection is particularly useful for patients who cannot take oral medications and is often used in the treatment of pneumonia, pelvic inflammatory disease and other serious infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, chills, dark urine, bleeding in gums, skin peeling, bloating & chest pain are some of the side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: AZIFORD EYE OINTMENT (5g)
medicines.composition: Azithromycin 1% w/w
medicines.description: Aziford Eye Ointment contains Azithromycin, a broad-spectrum macrolide antibiotic effective against various bacterial eye infections. It helps treat conjunctivitis and other ocular infections by inhibiting bacterial growth and promoting quick recovery.
medicines.sideEffects: May cause mild eye irritation or temporary blurred vision.

medicines.name: DIAPERGUARD
medicines.composition: Each g contains Aloevera 12.0% w/w, Zinc Oxide 7.0% w/w, Vitamin A 0.0118% w/w, Vitamin E 2% w/w, Nicotinamide 1% w/w, D-Panthenol 1% w/w & Magnesium Sulphate Heptahydrate 2% w/w
medicines.description: Diapergard cream contains Aloevera, a skin nourisher & soother; Zinc Oxide, an antibacterial; Vitamin A & Vitamin E, are skin nourisher; Nicotinamide, reduces redness, swelling & thus heals skin; D-Panthenol, improved hydration, elasticity and texture & Magnesium Sulphate soothes irritated skin. It is used for the treatment of all types of Rashes, Inflammation & Erythema associated with diaper use in adults, children and neonates & with tight clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Change wet and soiled diapers promptly, clean the diaper area with warm water, dry the area completely. Apply gently on the affected area as often as necessary with each diaper change especially at night time when exposure to wet diaper is prolonged. At the surfaces with marks of tight clothing, gently apply the cream and wear loose clothing.

medicines.name: ELOSONE-HT SOAP
medicines.composition: Each soap contains Curcumin, Aloe vera, Vit C, Vit. E, Papain, Glycerin & Liquorice extract
medicines.description: Elosone-HT soap contains Curcumin that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Aloe Vera & Vit. E, nourishes skin and revitalize it; Vit C, Papain & Liquorice extract stops melanin production, removes blemishes and brightens skin & Glycerin moisturizes it for overall glow and shine. It is used for having lighten, brighten & spotless glowing skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use it as a regular soap for washing face; use it twice a day for best result. It can be used as a regular bathing soap for nourishing, revitalising & glowing body skin that radiates. Safe for regular usage in long term, as contains all natural ingredients.

medicines.name: SILVACURE+ (15 g/25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Silver Nitrate 0.2% w/w, Chlorhexidine Gluconate solution 0.2% w/w, Aloevera extract 15% w/w & Allantoin 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Silvacure+ (15 g/25 g) cream contains Silver Nitrate, Chlorhexidine Gluconate, Aloevera & Allantoin. Silver Nitrate & Chlorhexidine acts as antibacterial drugs; Aloevera acts as a skin nourisher & healer & Allantoin act as skin soother & healer. Silvacure+ is used for the treatment of surgical cuts, leg ulcers, pressure sores, abrasions, blisters, cracked skin, minor skin cuts, wounds, burns & for prophylaxis of infection at skin graft donor site.
medicines.sideEffects: Silvacure+ cream is very well tolerated and no side effects are noted.
medicines.dosage: Apply sufficient quantity of Silvacure+ cream after clean the infected surface two to three times daily for 7 to 10 days or even longer as per the requirement of the condition. Ideally it should not be covered after application.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC FOAMING FACE WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Salicylic acid 2% w/v, Glycolic acid 3% w/v & Aloevera 10% w/v
medicines.description: Keracylic Foaming Facewash contains Salicylic acid & Glycolic acid which acts together to remove dead skin & Aloevera that nourishes, repairs & renews the texture of the skin. Keracylic Foaming Facewash is a pH balanced face wash for healthy skin that is used for the treatment and prevention of acne, can be used in combination with other acne treatments; for reducing the marks on face, helps to unclog and cleanse the skin pores & for lightening the complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated product, no know side effects except irritation on cracked or sensitive skin.
medicines.dosage: Take approximately 1-2 ml of Keracylic Foaming face wash and gently massage on the face avoiding eyes and surrounding areas for 20-30 seconds so as to act effectively & for a gentle wash, then rinse thoroughly and pat dry. For best results use twice daily & for oily skin leave it for 45 to 50 seconds instead of 20 - 30. For optimal results, keep Keracylic Foaming Facewash in a cool dry place away from sunlight.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC FACE WASH
medicines.composition: Each g contains Salicylic acid, Glycolic acid, Vit. E & Aloevera
medicines.description: Keracylic Facewash contains Salicylic acid & Glycolic acid which acts together to remove dead skin & Aloevera with Vitamin E nourish, repairs & renews the texture of the skin. Keracylic Facewash is used for fighting acne, facilitates lightening of skin marks, helps to counter infections and microbial attacks, helps to unclog and cleanse the skin pores & helps to maintain the moisture level of the skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated product, no know side effects except irritation on cracked or sensitive skin.
medicines.dosage: Take approximately 1-2 ml of face wash and gently massage on the face to produce foam all over avoiding eyes and surrounding areas for 20-30 seconds so as to act effectively & for a gentle wash, then rinse thoroughly and pat dry. For best results use twice daily & for oily skin leave it for 45 to 50 seconds instead of 20 - 30. For optimal results, keep Keracylic Facewash in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight.

medicines.name: ULTRABRITE SOAP
medicines.composition: Each Soap contains Curcumin, Aloe vera, Vit C, Papain, Vit E,Glycerin & Liquorice extract
medicines.description: Ultrabrite soap contains Curcumin, that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Aloe Vera & Vit. E, nourishes skin and revitalize it; Vit C, Papain & Liquorice extract stops melanin production, removes blemishes and brightens skin & Glycerin moisturizes it for overall glow and shine. Ultrabrite soap is used for having lighten, brighten & spotless glowing skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use Ultrabrite as a regular soap for washing face; use it twice a day for best result. It can be used as a regular bathing soap for nourishing, revitalising & glowing body skin that radiates. Safe for regular usage in long term, as contains all natural ingredients.

medicines.name: ELOWAY SOAP
medicines.composition: Aloevera extract 4% w/w, Vitamin E 0.5% w/w & Glycerin 10% w/w (Transparent Soap)
medicines.description: Eloway soap is a pure translucent soap that contains Aloevera with goodness of Vit. E & Glycerin for excellent skin soothing and moistening properties. Eloway soap can be used regularly by people of all skin types. It is also effective in cases of acne and for those people who have dry to very dry skin type.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: For acne treatment wash the face 3 to 4 times a day with the Eloway soap. For general usage, use Eloway as a routine soap for washing hands and bathing.

medicines.name: BURNOSEPT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Silver Nitrate 0.2%, Chlorhexidine Gluconate 0.2%, Aloevera Extract 15% & Allantoin 0.1%
medicines.description: Burnosept Plus cream contains Silver nitrate & Chlorhexidine are antibacterial and antiseptic that kills germs whereas Aloevera & Allantoin are nourshing and soothing agent that heals and protects skin. Burnosept Plus cream is used for minor cuts, wounds, sores, insect bites, rashes, abrasions & first degree burns i.e. superficial burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, itching & redness are only noted side effects.

medicines.name: WARTSRUB-S
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Podophyllum Resin 25% w/v, Benzoin 10% w/v, Aloes 2% w/v & Salicylic acid 5% w/v
medicines.description: Wartsrub Lotion is for the removal of genital warts and common warts of the hands and feet in both men and women caused by HPV or Human Papilloma Virus, besides it is also indicated for removal of skin tags & moles.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, only observed side effect is that on wrong application it may corrode the normal skin.

medicines.name: CLINSOL PLUS SOAP
medicines.composition: Triclosan, Ethyl Lactate, Zinc PCA, Salicylic Acid, Manuka Concentrate, Willow Extract, Tea Tree Oil, Olive Extract, Aloe Vera Extract & Glycerin
medicines.description: Clinsol Plus Soap is a dermatologically formulated cleansing bar enriched with Triclosan and Ethyl Lactate provide broad-spectrum antimicrobial action, while Salicylic Acid and Willow Extract help exfoliate and unclog pores. Zinc PCA controls excess oil and sebum production. Manuka Concentrate, Tea Tree Oil, Olive Extract, Aloe Vera, and Glycerin offer moisturization, anti-inflammatory action, and skin barrier support. Ideal for oily, acne-prone, and sensitive skin, it helps prevent breakouts while maintaining skin hydration and balance.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet skin, lather gently, and rinse thoroughly. Suitable for daily use.

medicines.name: CLINSOL ANTI ACNE FW
medicines.composition: Charcoal, Glycolic Acid, Aloevera, Vit E & Triclosan Gel Base Face Wash
medicines.description: Clinsol Anti Acne FW is a gel-based face wash formulated with charcoal, glycolic acid, aloe vera, vitamin E, and triclosan. It deeply cleanses pores, exfoliates dead skin cells, reduces acne-causing bacteria, and soothes irritation, leaving the skin clear, refreshed, and balanced without over-drying.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet face, gently massage in circular motions, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily

medicines.name: LEE-NEEM SOAP (neem & aloevera)
medicines.composition: Neem & Aloevera Soap for Acne And Skin Care
medicines.description: Lee-Neem Soap combines the antibacterial properties of Neem with the soothing and moisturizing benefits of Aloe Vera. It effectively combats acne-causing bacteria, helps reduce inflammation, and promotes healthy, clear skin, making it ideal for daily acne and skin care.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wet skin, lather soap, gently massage on face and body, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for best results.

medicines.name: LEE-NEEM FW
medicines.composition: Neem & Aloevera Facewash for Acne Prone Skin
medicines.description: Lee-Neem Facewash combines Neem’s antibacterial properties with Aloe Vera’s soothing effects to gently cleanse acne-prone skin. It helps reduce acne-causing bacteria, control oil, soothe irritation, and promote a clear, healthy complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet face, massage gently, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily for best results.

medicines.name: ATAZIS CREAM
medicines.composition: Pramoxine HCl, Zinc Oxide & Aloevera Cream
medicines.description: Atazis is a topical formulation combining a local anesthetic (pramoxine), a skin protectant (zinc oxide), and a soothing agent (aloe vera). Pramoxine provides temporary relief from itching and pain due to minor skin irritations such as insect bites, sunburn, and rashes from poison ivy or poison oak.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include mild skin irritation, redness, or stinging at the application site. In rare cases, allergic reactions such as rash, itching, swelling, or difficulty breathing may occur.
medicines.dosage: Apply a thin layer of the cream to the affected area 3 to 4 times daily, or as directed by a healthcare provider. Avoid applying to broken or irritated skin.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN NEEM & ALOEVERA SOAP
medicines.composition: Neem & Aloe Vera Soap
medicines.description: Acnetoin Neem & Aloe Vera Soap is a gentle herbal formulation designed to cleanse, soothe, and protect acne-prone skin. Neem acts as a powerful antibacterial agent that helps combat acne-causing bacteria, while Aloe Vera soothes irritated skin, provides deep hydration, and promotes healing. This soap helps reduce pimples, inflammation, and skin dryness, making it suitable for daily use. It is prescribed for mild to moderate acne and helps maintain a clear, healthy complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wash face 2 to 3 times a day with Acnetoin Neem & Aloe Vera Soap and pat dry face for better result. Can be used for long time and is safe.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN NEEM & ALOEVERA FW
medicines.composition: Neem & aloevera facewash for acne prone skin
medicines.description: Acnetoin Neem & Aloe Vera Facewash is a gentle, soap-free formula specially developed for acne-prone and oily skin. Neem provides strong antibacterial action to combat acne-causing bacteria, while Aloe Vera soothes irritated skin, reduces inflammation, and maintains moisture balance. Regular use helps cleanse impurities, unclog pores, and prevent breakouts without over-drying the skin. It is prescribed for daily use to support clear, healthy, and refreshed skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount to wet face, gently massage in a circular motion, and rinse thoroughly. Use 2 to 3 times daily for best results. Safe for long-term use.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN ANTI ACNE FW
medicines.composition: Glycolic Acid, Aloevera, Vitamin E & Triclosan (Gel based Facewash)
medicines.description: Acnetoin Anti Acne Facewash is a gel-based formulation specially designed for oily and acne-prone skin. Glycolic Acid gently exfoliates dead skin cells and helps unclog pores, while Aloe Vera soothes and hydrates the skin. Vitamin E provides antioxidant protection and aids in skin repair. Triclosan acts as a powerful antibacterial agent to reduce acne-causing bacteria. This facewash helps clear existing acne, prevents new breakouts, and improves skin texture, leaving it fresh and healthy.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated. Mild dryness or tingling may occur initially due to exfoliating action.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount to wet face, gently massage into skin, and rinse thoroughly. Use 2 to 3 times daily for best results. Safe for regular use.

medicines.name: UTROJOY
medicines.composition: Ayurvedic Gynaecological tonic & Menstrual regulator
medicines.description: Utrojoy syrup regulated & restores hormonal balance in women with fluctuating hormonal levels in cases of menstruation and menopause, regulates estrogen levels and helps heal endometrium during menstruation, enhances fertility and regulates the menstrual cycle, relieves symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS) & relives dysmenorrhoea.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effect.
medicines.dosage: Two table spoon twice daily with or without meals.

medicines.name: LACTOBUILD
medicines.composition: Each 100 g contains aqeous dry extracts derived from Shatavari (Asparagus Racemosus) Root Extract (dry) 15 g, Calcium (Khatika churna) Powder (dry) 2.5 g, Palak (Spinacia Oleracea) Seed/Leaf Powder (dry) 2.5 g, Shigru (Moringa oleifera) Leaf extract (dry) 2.5 g,?Panchatrina mool?(Roots of five herbs) Kusha (Eragrostis cynosuroides), Kasa (Saccharum bengalense), Darbha (Imperata cylindrica), Ikshu (Saccharum officinarum) Root Extract (dry) 1 g, Sowa (Anethum sowa) Fruit Extract (dry) 1 g, Vidaaree Kanda (Ipomoea digitata) Root Extract (dry) 1 g & Safed Jeera (Cuminum cyminum) 0.5 g
medicines.description: Lactobuild Granules are enriched with the goodness of Satavari, Safed Jeera, Vidaree & other herbs that have established action in production of mother?s breast milk and fortifies nutrition to the mother, tones digestive system & mother?s body by its nutrients as well as is passed on to the baby for better health. Lactobuild Granules increases the milk production in mother?s after delivery and so that their babies can be feed sufficiently for good health & wellbeing.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects
medicines.dosage: Take 1 heaped table spoons (approximately 20 to 25 g) of Lactobuild Granules in 150 ml of lukewarm milk or water or juice and drink it after mixing it thoroughly, add sugar if necessary. During first week drink twice daily and then once daily for as long as one is lactating or there is decreased production of breast milk.

medicines.name: LACTOBUILD
medicines.composition: Each 100 g contains aqeous dry extracts derived from Shatavari (Asparagus Racemosus) Root Extract (dry) 15 g, Calcium (Khatika churna) Powder (dry) 2.5 g, Palak (Spinacia Oleracea) Seed/Leaf Powder (dry) 2.5 g, Shigru (Moringa oleifera) Leaf extract (dry) 2.5 g,?Panchatrina mool?(Roots of five herbs) Kusha (Eragrostis cynosuroides), Kasa (Saccharum bengalense), Darbha (Imperata cylindrica), Ikshu (Saccharum officinarum) Root Extract (dry) 1 g, Sowa (Anethum sowa) Fruit Extract (dry) 1 g, Vidaaree Kanda (Ipomoea digitata) Root Extract (dry) 1 g & Safed Jeera (Cuminum cyminum) 0.5 g
medicines.description: Lactobuild Granules are enriched with the goodness of Satavari, Safed Jeera, Vidaree & other herbs that have established action in production of mother?s breast milk and fortifies nutrition to the mother, tones digestive system & mother?s body by its nutrients as well as is passed on to the baby for better health. Lactobuild Granules increases the milk production in mother?s after delivery and so that their babies can be feed sufficiently for good health & wellbeing.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects
medicines.dosage: Take 1 heaped table spoons (approximately 20 to 25 g) of Lactobuild Granules in 150 ml of lukewarm milk or water or juice and drink it after mixing it thoroughly, add sugar if necessary. During first week drink twice daily and then once daily for as long as one is lactating or there is decreased production of breast milk.

medicines.name: PUDINA.COM
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains Peppermint Oil (Mentha Piperita) 0.174 ml & Pudina Oil (Mentha Spicata) 0.034 ml
medicines.description: Pudina.com is natural, safe and fast remedy that contains Pudina satva i.e. mint oils which is useful in quick action relief in indigestion, stomachache and gastric discomfort, Relieves acidity (acid reflux), flatulence & bloating, Gastroenteritis, Proven effect for heartburn relief, Helps GI system as it posses carminative and digestion promoting properties & Helps reduce gastritis and GERD symptoms.
medicines.sideEffects: Pudina.com is totally safe and effective medicine which is very well tolerated. Only side effects that are reported are burps & minty smell.
medicines.dosage: General dosage in adults is 1 to 2 Pearls 2-3 times daily & 1 pearl 1 to 2 times daily in children above 12 years.

medicines.name: LEEKUF LOZENGES (LEMON)
medicines.composition: Herbal Cough Lozenges (Lemon Flavour)
medicines.description: Leekuf lozenge is a multi-ingredient formulation fortified with honey, which is beneficial in managing cough of varied etiologies. Leekuf lozenge offers multiple actions to alleviate cough, sore throat and quickly relieves throat irritation. It primarily possesses antitussive (cough relieving), antiseptic and anti-inflammatory actions. In addition, it also offers beneficial antimicrobial, local analgesic, and antihistaminic actions.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects are observed of Leekuf herbal lozenges.
medicines.dosage: One lozenge three-four times a day, or as directed by the physician.

medicines.name: LEEKUF LOZENGES (ORANGE)
medicines.composition: Herbal Cough Lozenges (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Leekuf lozenge is a multi-ingredient formulation fortified with honey, which is beneficial in managing cough of varied etiologies. Leekuf lozenge offers multiple actions to alleviate cough, sore throat and quickly relieves throat irritation. It primarily possesses antitussive (cough relieving), antiseptic and anti-inflammatory actions. In addition, it also offers beneficial antimicrobial, local analgesic, and antihistaminic actions.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects are observed of Leekuf herbal lozenges.
medicines.dosage: One lozenge three-four times a day, or as directed by the physician.

medicines.name: LEEKUF LOZENGES (ORANGE)
medicines.composition: Each lozenge contains 2, 4-Dichlorobenzyl alcohol 1.2 mg & Amylmetacresol 0.6 mg
medicines.description: Leekuf lozenges provide fast acting relief that helps prevent sore throat pain from getting worse as it contains two effective antiseptics. Leekuf is proven to work for up to 2 hours & is indicated for sore throat to prevent pain, discomfort & infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: In adults & children over 6 years of age, one Leekuf lozenge to be dissolved in mouth slowly every 2-3 hours & not exceeding 12 lozenges per day.

medicines.name: LEEKUF LOZENGES (GINGER-LEMON)
medicines.composition: Each lozenge contains 2, 4-Dichlorobenzyl alcohol 1.2 mg & Amylmetacresol 0.6 mg
medicines.description: Leekuf lozenges provide fast acting relief that helps prevent sore throat pain from getting worse as it contains two effective antiseptics. Leekuf is proven to work for up to 2 hours & is indicated for sore throat to prevent pain, discomfort & infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: In adults & children over 6 years of age, one Leekuf lozenge to be dissolved in mouth slowly every 2-3 hours & not exceeding 12 lozenges per day.

medicines.name: ORTHO-AID OINTMENT
medicines.composition: % w/w- Gandhapura 25%, Kapur 5%, Sarala 3%, Pudina 20%, Lavang 3% & Nilgiri 10%.
medicines.description: Ortho-Aid ointment is a powerful topical pain management therapy which is safe & highly effective in providing relief from pain, swelling, muscle spasm and soreness. A balanced combination of herbs such as Gandhapura, Kapur, Sarala, Pudina, Lavang & Nilgiri, it helps in relieving joint pains, muscular pain & lower back pains. The deep penetrating & quick acting formula of Ortho-Aid Ointment improves micro-circulation, relieves pain & helps treat affected muscles & tissues for an all round protection.
medicines.sideEffects: Ortho-Aid Ointment must not be applied on eroded skin. No other side effects are observed otherwise.
medicines.dosage: For best results, apply Ortho-Aid Ointment after hot water fomentation with light hands and rub gently to make it absorb. Apply on the affected area 3 times a day or as directed by the physician. Ortho-Aid Ointment should not be applied on eroded skin.

medicines.name: ALICTOZYME
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Alpha Galactosidase 150 mg, Lipase Enzyme 3 mg, Alpha Amylase Enzyme (1:800) 50 mg, Protease Enzyme 25 mg & Lactase Enzyme 7 mg
medicines.description: Alictozyme Capsules contain a combination of digestive enzymes. It is contains Galactosidase, Lactase & Amylase (these digest carbohydrates), Protease (digests protein), and Lipase (digests fats). Alictozyme is indicated for indigestion, flatulence, bloating, burping and feeling of fullness, abdominal discomfort, heart burn and loss of appetite.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated only observed side effects are diarrhea, abdominal pain or cramps and nausea.
medicines.dosage: About 2-3 Capsules in a day after taking food.

medicines.name: ALICTOZYME DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Alpha Amylase 20 mg, Papain 10 mg, Dill oil 2 mg, Anise oil 2 mg & Caraway Oil 2 mg
medicines.description: Alictozyme is a carminative mixture with digestive enzymes, primarily used to treat digestive disorders. Alpha Amylase works by digesting starch, carbohydrates, fats, and Papain is responsible for breakdown of proteins. Seed oils helps in digestion & relief from stomach pain. Alictozyme effectively treats dyspepsia (indigestion), flatulence (gas), and colic pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are acute toxicity, skin rashes, nausea, diarrhea, constipation, abdominal pain, severe dizziness and Joint pain.
medicines.dosage: 5–10 drops to infants and 10–15 drops to children after meals, 2–3 times daily. Shake well before use and administer with the provided dropper. Use only as advised by a physician.

medicines.name: ALICTOZYME
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Alpha Galactosidase 150 mg, Lipase Enzyme 3 mg, Alpha Amylase Enzyme (1:800) 50 mg, Protease Enzyme 25 mg & Lactase Enzyme 7 mg
medicines.description: Alictozyme Capsules contain a combination of digestive enzymes. It is contains Galactosidase, Lactase & Amylase (these digest carbohydrates), Protease (digests protein), and Lipase (digests fats). Alictozyme is indicated for indigestion, flatulence, bloating, burping and feeling of fullness, abdominal discomfort, heart burn and loss of appetite.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated only observed side effects are diarrhea, abdominal pain or cramps and nausea.
medicines.dosage: About 2-3 Capsules in a day after taking food.

medicines.name: ALICTOZYME SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Alpha Galactosidase 25 mg, Diastase (1:1200) 50 mg, Pepsin (1:3000) 10 mg & Lipase 10 mg
medicines.description: Alictozyme Syrup contains Alpha Galactosidase which helps in breakdown of complex sugar, Fungal diastase which is a potent enzyme complex, used as effective digestive aid, and digests (or breakdown) carbohydrates, Pepsin helps in protein digestion by breaking larger molecules into smaller one & Lipase helps in fats digestion. Alictozyme syrup is used for the treatment of indigestion, flatulence, hyperacidity, bloating, stomach cramps and various other types of digestion related problems. It also increases appetite of body and maintains the metabolic activities of body.
medicines.sideEffects: It is well tolerated. Only observed side effects are diarrhea, abdominal pain or cramps and nausea.
medicines.dosage: Take one teaspoon full after meals twice daily.

medicines.name: GROCHAMP SYRUP
medicines.composition: L- Lysine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Vit. A 375 mcg, Vit. E 2.5 mg, Vit. B1 0.75 mg, Vit. B2 0.75 mg, Vit. B5 1.25 mg, Vit. B6 0.5 mg, Niacin 7.5 mg, Vit. B12 0.5 mcg, Copper 25 mcg, Selenium 10 mcg, Iodine 38 mcg & Vit. D2 2.5 mcg/5 ml
medicines.description: Gro Champ Syrup contains L-Lysine Hydrochloride, essential vitamins (A, E, B1, B2, B5, B6, B12, and D2), along with trace minerals like Copper, Selenium, and Iodine. Designed to support immune function, growth, and overall health, it provides a balanced blend of nutrients for optimal well-being. Copy message
medicines.sideEffects: Grochamp Syrup generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

Lignocaine or Lidocaine works by blocking the nerve signals thus providing pain relief while Adrenaline constricts blood vessels, prolonging the anaesthetic effect and reducing bleeding. The combination is commonly used in dentistry, minor surgeries, and other interventions, ensuring patient comfort and minimizing discomfort during procedures.

It works by stimulating the heart, increasing blood flow, and relaxing airway muscles thus improving breathing. Adropace injection is administered intramuscularly as it acts rapidly to counter life-threatening symptoms. This emergency treatment is essential for individuals with known allergies or those experiencing acute respiratory distress.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects including headache, nausea & vomiting, hypertension, arrhythmias, anxiety &/or tremors may occur.

It is also indicated for the treatment of persistent hiccups.

medicines.description: Simbiotic lotion contains Beclomethasone, a topical preparation that is used to treat inflammatory skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Simbiotic lotion belongs to the corticosteroid class of medications, i.e. it works by reducing inflammation, itching, and redness of the skin. Simbiotic lotion may be applied directly to affected areas to alleviate symptoms and promote healing.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation or itching at the application site, burning sensation, dryness, redness, folliculitis & hypersensitivity reactions may occur.

medicines.name: DIPROBAY-B LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v & Beclomethasone 0.025% w/v
medicines.description: Diprobay-B lotion contains Clotrimazole, an anti-fungal drug that inhibits the growth of fungus to treat infections & Beclomethasone, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness, irritation & swelling. It is prescribed to treat skin infections such as athlete's foot, jock itch, ringworm and other fungal skin infections. Diprobay-B lotion is also prescribed to eradicate fungal infection that causes a lightening or darkening of the skin at the neck, chest, arms or legs.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning sensation, itching, irritation, redness, pimple-like bumps, tenderness, or flaking of the treated skin may occur.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT TOTAL MOUTH PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v, Beclomethasone 0.01% w/v & Benzocaine 1% w/v.
medicines.description: Ultradent Total Mouth Paint contains Beclomethasone, Clotrimazole, and Benzocaine, a combination used in treating oral infections and inflammation. Beclomethasone is a corticosteroid that reduces swelling, Clotrimazole is an antifungal that treats fungal infections, and Benzocaine is a local anaesthetic that numbs the area in order to relieve pain. Ultradent Total mouth paint helps manage conditions like oral candidiasis, ulcers, and other mouth sores.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, mild itching or an unpleasant sensation in the mouth may occur.

medicines.name: DANTOX TOTAL MOUTH PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v, Beclomethasone 0.01% w/v & Benzocaine 1% w/v.
