medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, mild itching or an unpleasant sensation in the mouth may occur.

medicines.name: CEODERM PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g of cream contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate IP 0.25 mg, Econazole Nitrate IP 10 mg, Neomycin Sulphate IP 5 mg & Chlorocresol IP 1 mg
medicines.description: Ceoderm Plus is a topical cream that combines Beclomethasone Dipropionate, a potent corticosteroid for reducing inflammation; Econazole Nitrate, an antifungal agent for treating fungal infections; Neomycin Sulphate, an antibiotic for bacterial infections; and Chlorocresol, an antiseptic for preventing microbial growth. This combination is used to treat inflammatory skin conditions complicated by fungal and bacterial infections, such as eczema, dermatitis, and psoriasis.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects may include skin irritation, burning sensation, and allergic reactions. Prolonged use may lead to skin thinning.

medicines.name: EARWEL ULTRA
medicines.composition: Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/v, Neomycin 0.5% w/v & Clotrimazole 1% w/v
medicines.description: Earwel Ultra combines Beclomethasone Dipropionate, a potent corticosteroid to reduce inflammation and itching, with Neomycin, an antibiotic effective against bacterial infections, and Clotrimazole, an antifungal agent. This combination effectively treats mixed bacterial and fungal ear infections while soothing irritation and swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness. flaking of skin, stinging sensation, burning sensation. itching sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: AQUAEAR ULTRA
medicines.composition: Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/v, Neomycin 0.5% w/v & Clotrimazole 1% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Ear Ultra formulation contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate, Neomycin and Clotrimazole. Beclomethasone is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation, Neomycin is an antibiotic that treats bacterial infections, and Clotrimazole is an antifungal that targets fungal infections. This combination is used to treat mixed ear infections involving bacteria, fungi, and inflammation, such as otitis externa.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild ear irritation, burning, itching, or redness. Rarely, allergic reactions like rash, swelling, or hearing changes may occur.

medicines.name: COBAFAST FORTE CAPSULE
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Benfotiamine 100 mg, Mecobalamin 1000 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 200 mg, Inositol 100 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 3 mg & Folic acid 1.5 mg
medicines.description: Cobafast forte capsule contain Benfotiamine (fat soluble for of Vitamin B1), Alpha Lipoic acid (Powerful anti-oxidant), Folic acid (Vitamin B9), Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12), and Pyridoxine(Vitamin B6).It is used as co-prescription in the management of Diabetic neuropathy, Alcohol induced neuropathy, Post herpetic neuropathy, Vitamin deficiency related neuropathy and drug induced neuropathy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: MEDOC-AT FORTE
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Benfotiamine 100 mg, Mecobalamin 1000 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 200 mg, Inositol 100 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 3 mg & Folic acid 1.5 mg
medicines.description: Medoc-AT Forte contains Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12), Alpha Lipoic acid an antioxidant along with other B vitamins. Medoc-AT Forte are useful in the management of Diabetic neuropathy, Alcohol induced neuropathy, Vitamin B12 deficiency, Postherpetic neuropathy and drug induced neuropathy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache

medicines.name: COBAFAST PLUS SG
medicines.composition: Each Softgelatin capsule contains Benfotiamine 150 mg, Mecobalamin 1500 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 100 mg, Inositol 100 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, El. Chromium 200 mcg & El. Selenium 55 mcg
medicines.description: Cobafast-Plus softgel contains Methylcobalamin (bioactive form of Vitamin B12), Alpha Lipoic Acid (a potent antioxidant), Inositol (a sugar-like compound for nerve function), Folic Acid (Vitamin B9), Chromium polynicotinate (for glucose metabolism), Selenium dioxide (an antioxidant mineral), and Benfotiamine (lipid-soluble Vitamin B1 derivative). This combination synergistically supports nerve health, manages symptoms of diabetic and peripheral neuropathy, and aids in blood sugar control.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include gastrointestinal upset (nausea, diarrhea, stomach upset), headache, or dizziness.

medicines.name: TRYLIV BOOST
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Silymarin 35 mg, Benfotiamine 5 mg, Vit. B6 1.5 mg, Niacinamide 20 mg, Vit. B 12 1 mcg & Lecithin 262.5 mg
medicines.description: Tryliv Boost Suspension contains Silymarin, Lecithin & Vitamin-B complex. Silymarin & Lecithin improves hepatic cell structure & function, corrects fatty liver, enhances the antioxidant capacity of the liver and maintain liver health; whereas B-Complex vitamin regulates metabolism of liver & body as a whole. It is used as an adjunctive therapy in chronic hepatitis and cirrhosis. Tryliv Boost promotes liver health, contributes to liver protection and detoxification, helps maintain liver function and digestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are abdominal bloating or pain, allergic reactions, diarrhoea, gas, indigestion, itching, loss of appetite, nausea and rash.

medicines.name: WALCOBAL PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Softgelatin capsule contains Benfotiamine 150 mg, Mecobalamin 1500 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 100 mg, Inositol 100 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, El. Chromium 200 mcg & El. Selenium 55 mcg
medicines.description: Walcobal Plus is a nutraceutical formulation designed to support nerve health and metabolic function. It contains Benfotiamine and Mecobalamin for nerve regeneration, Alpha Lipoic Acid as a potent antioxidant, and essential micronutrients like Inositol, Folic Acid, Chromium, and Selenium to support glucose metabolism and cellular repair. It is used as an adjunct in the management of diabetic neuropathy and related nerve disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well-tolerated. Mild gastrointestinal discomfort or allergic reactions may occur in sensitive individuals.

medicines.name: BENISURE-4
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Benidipine 4 mg
medicines.description: Benisure tablets contain Benidipine, a new class of calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood. It is prescribed for high blood pressure & heart pain besides other conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are palpitation, flushing, headache, rash, itch, light sensitivity & female like breast in male.

medicines.name: BENISURE-8
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Benidipine 8 mg
medicines.description: Benisure tablets contain Benidipine, a new class of calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood. It is prescribed for high blood pressure & heart pain besides other conditions.

medicines.name: CALALAYER LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Calamine 15% w/v, Zinc Oxide 5% w/v, Bentonite 3% w/v, Sodium Citrate 0.5% w/v, Liquefied Phenol 0.5% v/v & Glycerin 5% w/v
medicines.description: Calalayer lotion contains Calamine & Zinc mild antibacterial and soothing agent that relieves redness & itching; Bentonite, Sodium Citrate & liquefied Phenol these acts by stoping skin itching, irritation & detoxifying skin; Glycerin, has skin nourishing benefits. It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effect.

medicines.name: CUREWAX
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Paradichlorobenzene 2% w/v, Benzocaine 2.7% w/v, Chlorobutol 5% w/v & Turpentine oil 15% v/v
medicines.description: Curewax ear drops contain Paradichlorobenzene, Benzocaine, Chlorobutanol & Turpentine oil which together acts synergistically in all-purpose ear drops that eliminates bacterial and fungal infections, eliminates pain & dissolves wax to remove it. It is prescribed for removal of excessive wax from ear canal, to treat milder infections and to stop pain due to any reason within the ear.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, dizziness & earache may occur while using Curewax ear drops.

medicines.name: LEEZOLE PLUS MOUTH PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v, Beclomethasone 0.01% w/v & Benzocaine 1% w/v.
medicines.description: Leezole Plus mouth paint contains Clotrimazole, an antifungal drug that acts by killing the fungus involved in causing infection; Beclomethasone, a steroid that reduces redness, swelling and itching & Benzocaine, an anaesthetic that relieves pain. Leezole Plus mouth paint is prescribed for fungal infections of oral cavity in newly born, children & adults. It is also prescribed in oral fungal infections in adults using dentures, mouth, gum and cheek ulcers & blistering & also in immuno-compromised conditions such as AIDS, cancer, diabetes, TB & on broad spectrum antibacterial therapy.

medicines.composition: Chloramphenicol 5% w/v , Benzocaine 1% w/v & Propylene Glycol (as base)

medicines.name: AQUAEAR-AC
medicines.composition: Chloramphenicol 5% w/v , Benzocaine 1% w/v & Propylene Glycol (as base)
medicines.description: This ear drop formulation contains Chloramphenicol, a broad-spectrum antibiotic, and Benzocaine, a local anesthetic. medicines.name: ULTRADENT DENTAL PAIN EXPERT GEL
medicines.composition: Benzocaine 20% w/w in Pleasant Flavoured Base

medicines.composition: Each ml contains Podophyllum Resin 25% w/v, Benzoin 10% w/v, Aloes 2% w/v & Salicylic acid 5% w/v

medicines.composition: Each g contains Benzoyl Peroxide 2.5% w/w

medicines.sideEffects: Painful irritation of skin, including burning sensation, blistering, crusting, itching, severe redness & skin rash may be observed

medicines.name: DERPALIN-B
medicines.composition: Each g contains Adapalene 0.1% w/w & Benzoyl Peroxide 2.5% w/w
medicines.description: Derpalin-B gel contains Adapalene, a Vitamin A derivative that reduces redness, swelling, itching and removes the black and white heads in acne & Benzoyl Peroxide, an anti-acne agent that works by reducing acne causing bacteria and reduces oil production in skin. It is prescribed for mild to moderate red, swollen acne & normal Acne, either alone or in combination with other anti-acne products. It is also used for treatment of acne with comedones, papules and pustules.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin redness, dryness, peeling, mild burning & swelling may occur on usage.

medicines.name: APARIN
medicines.composition: Each g contains Heparin Sodium 0.042% w/w & Benzyl Nicotinate 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Aparin ointment contains Heparin, an anticoagulant that dissolves subcutaneous blood clots & Benzyl Nicotinate that cause dilation of the blood vessels underneath the skin to increase microcirculation and thus helps in faster healing. It is prescribed to treat redness, swelling and blood clots that cause blockage in veins and disrupts blood circulation after using an improperly placed IV Line; subcutaneous blood deposition due to various reasons; skin ulcers & Bruising and internal clotting of blood due to an injury.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are skin rashes, redness, itching and burning sensation on the skin & rough patches on the skin.

medicines.name: GEOFIT MASS GAINER (MANGO)

medicines.description: Geofit Mass Gainer is an ideal way to gain weight & muscle mass for a healthy build up up by an individual or a bodybuilder. Geofit Mass Gainer contains a rich blend of carbohydrates; Whey protein & BCAA for the right build-up of body. It strengthens the body & fastens the building of muscle mass and fulfils the nutritional requirement of body. Geofit Mass gainer is available in three different flavors i.e. Banana, Mango & Chocolate.
medicines.sideEffects: Excessive weight gain & Indigestion
medicines.dosage: Add 3.33 large scoops of Geofit Mass Gainer (100 g) to 500 ml of water or full fat milk & shake for 30 seconds and consume 30 minutes pre or post workout. Else can be consumed as first thing in the day on empty stomach also.

medicines.name: WELBIHIST-DX
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 10 mg, Bilastine 3.3 mg and Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg. (Sugar Free)
medicines.description: Welbihist-DX Syrup (Sugar Free) is a combination medicine used to treat cold symptoms and cough. It suppresses cough, helping to reduce the urge to cough by affecting the signals in the brain. It also relieves allergy symptoms like watery eyes, sneezing, runny nose, and throat irritation associated with the common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include Dizziness, Nausea, Dryness in the mouth.

medicines.name: BILAFORD-DX SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Bilastine 3.3 mg, Dextromethorphan 10 mg and Phenylephrine 5 mg (SUGAR FREE SYRUP)
medicines.description: Bilaford-DX Syrup (Sugar Free) is a combination medicine used to treat cold symptoms and cough. It suppresses cough, helping to reduce the urge to cough by affecting the signals in the brain. It also relieves allergy symptoms like watery eyes, sneezing, runny nose, and throat irritation associated with the common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, Nausea, Dryness in the mouth

medicines.name: BILAFORD-M SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of Syrup contains Bilastine 10 mg & Montelukast 4 mg
medicines.description: Bilaford M is a combination of Bilastine and Montelukast used for the management of allergic conditions. Bilastine, a non-sedating H₁ antihistamine, blocks histamine receptors to relieve symptoms such as sneezing, itching, and nasal congestion. Montelukast, a leukotriene receptor antagonist, prevents leukotriene-induced airway inflammation and bronchoconstriction. This combination is indicated for the treatment of allergic rhinitis and as supportive therapy in asthma.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include headache, drowsiness, abdominal pain, and dizziness.

medicines.name: TINFAL TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 5 mg & Folic Acid 5 mg
medicines.description: Tinfal tablet contains Biotin, a B Vitamin that maintains healthy hair, skin & muscle tissue as well as regulate metabolism & Folic Acid, Vitamin B9 that helps in amino acids & DNA synthesis, regulates metabolism & helps in cell generation. It is prescribed for pregnancy, Cardio-vascular diseases, diabetes, maintenance of healthy hair, skin, nail and muscle tissues as well as for general debility and weakness.
medicines.sideEffects: Constipation, diarrhea, or upset stomach may occur.

medicines.name: TINFAL FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 10 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 50 mg, Calcium Pantothenate 100 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to elemental Selenium 65 mcg , Cupric Oxide eq. to elemental Copper 3 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg
medicines.description: Tinfal Forte tablet contains Biotin & Calcium Pantothenate, both are B group vitamins to regulate metabolism and aid in growth of hair; N-Acetyl Cysteine, an antioxidant that prevents damage to hair follicle & Selenium, Copper & Zinc, three antioxidant elements that stops free radical damage to hair and aid in their growth. It is prescribed for general growth & well-being, chronic diseases & for maintenance of healthy hair, skin and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach discomfort, pain and bloating are the few observed side effects.

medicines.name: TINFAL PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Biotin 5 mg & Finasteride 1 mg
medicines.description: Tinfal Plus tablet contains Biotin, a B Vitamin that maintains healthy hair, skin & muscle tissue as well as regulate metabolism & Finasteride, stops the shortening of hair follicle and thus supports hair growth. It is prescribed to treat male pattern baldness at the crown and in the middle of the scalp in adult males.
medicines.sideEffects: Decrease in libido is the only observed side effect.

medicines.name: ACTIHAIR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 5 mg & Folic Acid 5 mg
medicines.description: Actihair tablet contains Biotin, a B Vitamin that maintains healthy hair, skin & muscle tissue as well as regulate metabolism & Folic Acid is vitamin B9 that helps in amino acids & DNA synthesis, regulates metabolism & helps in cell generation. It is prescribed for pregnancy, cardio-vascular diseases, diabetes, maintenance of healthy hair, skin, nail and muscle tissues as well as for general debility and weakness.
medicines.sideEffects: Constipation, diarrhea, or upset stomach may occur.

medicines.name: ACTIHAIR PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 10 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 50 mg, Calcium Pantothenate 100 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to elemental Selenium 65 mcg , Cupric Oxide eq. to elemental Copper 3 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg
medicines.description: Actihair Plus tablet contains Biotin & Calcium Pantothenate, both are B group vitamins to regulate metabolism and aid in growth of hair; N-Acetyl Cysteine, an antioxidant that prevents damage to hair follicle & Selenium, Copper & Zinc, three antioxidant elements that stops free radical damage to hair and aid in their growth. It is prescribed for general growth & well-being, chronic diseases & for maintenance of healthy hair, skin and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach discomfort, pain and bloating are the few observed side effects.

medicines.name: FREELEX TABLET
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Bisacodyl 5 mg
medicines.description: Freelex tablet is used on a short-term basis to treat constipation. It also is used to empty the bowels before surgery and certain medical procedures. Freelex contains Bisacodyl which is in a class of medications called stimulant laxatives. It works by increasing activity of the intestines to cause a bowel movement.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are stomach cramps, faintness and stomach discomfort.

medicines.name: LACMOLAX TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Bisacodyl 5 mg
medicines.description: Lacmolax tablet is used on a short-term basis to treat constipation. It also is used to empty the bowels before surgery and certain medical procedures. Lacmolax contains Bisacodyl which is in a class of medications called stimulant laxatives. It works by increasing activity of the intestines to cause a bowel movement.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach cramps, faintness and stomach discomfort.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL 2.5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 2.5 mg
medicines.description: Bisotril tablets contain Bisoprolol, a highly selective beta blocker that acts by reducing the rate of heart beat and thus reducing BP. It is prescribed for high blood pressure, heart pain (Angina) & stable chronic heart failure where lower left chamber of heart do not function properly on beating.
medicines.sideEffects: Tiredness, slow heartbeat, diarrhea and dizziness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL 5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 5 mg
medicines.description: Bisotril tablets contain Bisoprolol, a highly selective beta blocker that acts by reducing the rate of heart beat and thus reducing BP. It is prescribed for high blood pressure, heart pain (Angina) & stable chronic heart failure where lower left chamber of heart do not function properly on beating.
medicines.sideEffects: Tiredness, slow heartbeat, diarrhea and dizziness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL-5 T TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 5 mg & Telmisartan 40 mg
medicines.description: Bisotril-5 T tablets contains Bisoprolol & Telmisartan, two antihypertensive agents. Bisoprolol, a beta-blocker helps in reducing the heart rate and Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker helps relax blood vessels. The combination is effective in managing high blood pressure and reducing the risk of cardiovascular events. Bisotril-5 T is commonly prescribed in patients with hypertension or certain heart conditions to improve overall heart health and prevent complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Tiredness, slow heartbeat, diarrhea and dizziness are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL-2.5 T TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 2.5 mg & Telmisartan 40 mg.
medicines.description: Bisotril-2.5 T tablets contains Bisoprolol & Telmisartan, two antihypertensive agents. Bisoprolol, a beta-blocker helps in reducing the heart rate and Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker helps relax blood vessels. The combination is effective in managing high blood pressure and reducing the risk of cardiovascular events. Bisotril-2.5 T is commonly prescribed in patients with hypertension or certain heart conditions to improve overall heart health and prevent complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Tiredness, slow heartbeat, diarrhea and dizziness are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL- AM 2.5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 2.5 mg & Amlodipine 5 mg
medicines.description: Bisotril-AM 2.5 tablets contain Bisoprolol and Amlodipine, two antihypertensive agents. Bisoprolol, a beta-blocker, lowers heart rate and cardiac workload, while Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker, relaxes and widens blood vessels. The combination helps effectively control high blood pressure, improve heart function, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include dizziness, fatigue, headache, slow heart rate, swelling of ankles, or flushing.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL- AM 5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 5 mg & Amlodipine 5 mg
medicines.description: Bisotril-AM 5 tablets contain Bisoprolol and Amlodipine, two antihypertensive agents. Bisoprolol, a beta-blocker, lowers heart rate and cardiac workload, while Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker, relaxes and widens blood vessels. The combination helps effectively control high blood pressure, improve heart function, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include dizziness, fatigue, headache, slow heart rate, swelling of ankles, or flushing.

medicines.name: BRIVETAM-100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Brivaracetam 100 mg
medicines.description: Brivetam tablets contain Brivaracetam, an anti-epileptic drug that acts by stopping the excessive firing of neuron and thus tops fits or epilepsy. It is indicated for partial onset seizures with or without secondary generalization (a form of fits or seizures) in adolescents, adults & elderly as an add on drug i.e. in combination with other prescribed drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: Somnolence, dizziness, loss of appetite, vertigo, fatigue, Depression, anxiety, insomnia, irritability & nausea.

medicines.name: BRIVETAM-50
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Brivaracetam 50 mg
medicines.description: Brivetam tablets contain Brivaracetam, an anti-epileptic drug that acts by stopping the excessive firing of neuron and thus tops fits or epilepsy. It is indicated for partial onset seizures with or without secondary generalization (a form of fits or seizures) in adolescents, adults & elderly as an add on drug i.e. in combination with other prescribed drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: Somnolence, dizziness, loss of appetite, vertigo, fatigue, Depression, anxiety, insomnia, irritability & nausea.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD-B
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v & Bromfenac Sodium eq. to Bromfenac 0.09 % w/v
medicines.description: Moxiford eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria & Bromfenac, a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug that relieves redness, pain and swelling in eye. It is prescribed in cases of post-surgical infections & other infections where there is associated pain, redness & swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation, pain, severe eye redness & dry eyes.

medicines.name: FENABROM EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Bromfenac Sodium eq. to Bromfenac 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Fenabrom eye drops contain Bromfenac, a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug that relieves redness, pain and swelling in eye. It is prescribed to relieve eye pain, irritation and redness after replacing lens in cataract eye surgery, other eye surgeries & in other eye conditions such as conjunctivitis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye irritation, temporary blurred vision, watery eyes & headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: FLOXIMOX-B EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v & Bromfenac 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Floximox-B Eye Drops is a combination ophthalmic preparation used to treat bacterial eye infections and reduce inflammation, redness, and pain associated with such infections or post-surgical conditions. Moxifloxacin is a broad-spectrum antibiotic that stops bacterial growth, while Bromfenac is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) that relieves pain and swelling. Floximox-B Eye Drops help restore eye comfort and promote faster healing
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild eye irritation, burning, or temporary blurred vision.

medicines.name: AROXYL (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Terbutaline Sulphate 1.25 mg, Bromhexine Hydrochloride 4.0 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Menthol 2.5 mg
medicines.description: Aroxyl Syrup contains Bromhexine(mucolytic), Guaifenesin(expectorant),Terbutaline (bronchodilator) and Menthol(Cooling agent). Aroxyl syrup is indicated in productive cough, bronchitis, asthma, emphysema, smoker's cough and bronchospasm.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Indigestion, Bloating, Vomiting, Diarrhea, Stomach pain, Dizziness, Headache, Sweating, Skin rash, Hives, Tremor, Increased heart rate and Palpitations.

medicines.name: LEEKUF SYRUP (60 ml &100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 15 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2mg
medicines.description: Leekuf Syrup is a combination of three medicine namely Chlorpheniramine (Anti-histaminic), Dextromethorphan (Anti-tussive) and Phenylephrine (Decongestant). Leekuf Syrup is used in relief from dry cough, throat irritation, sneezing, watery eyes & stuffed nose due to an allergy or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: LEEKUF JUNIOR (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 5 mg, Bromhexine Hydrochloride 4 mg & Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Leekuf Junior is a combination of Dextromethorphan a antitussive, Bromhexine a mucolytic and Phenylephrine a decongestant. Leekuf Junior is used to relieve dry cough, stuffy nose, sinus congestion caused by the common cold, hay fever, flu, or other allergic conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, constipation, drowsiness, dizziness, sedation, confusion, nervousness, bloating, diarrhea, headache, indigestion, sweating and skin rashes.

medicines.name: KUFSTIL KID
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 5 mg, Bromhexine Hydrochloride 4 mg & Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Kufstil kid syrup contains Dextromethorphan an anti-tussive (cough suppressant), Bromhexine an mucolytic (thins and loosens mucus) and Phenylephrine an decongestant drug. It is a combination medicine used to treat cough, runny or stuffy nose, sinus congestion, sneezing, itching and watery caused by allergies, common cold and flu.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, drowsiness, nausea, headache, constipation, upset stomach, loss of appetite, blurred vision, double vision, dry mouth, nose or throat.

medicines.name: COLDMINE PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 325 mg, Phenylephrine 10 mg & Fexofenadine 60 mg.
medicines.description: Coldmine Plus is a combination of three medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Coldmine plus helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: KUFSTIL (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 15 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg
medicines.description: Kufstil Syrup is a combination medication for the relief of dry cough, cold, and allergic symptoms. It contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide to suppress cough, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride to reduce nasal congestion, and Chlorpheniramine Maleate to alleviate allergic reactions like sneezing and runny nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: WELBUSOL-B 0.5 RESPULE
medicines.composition: Each respule contains Levosalbutamol 1.25 mg & Budesonide 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Welbusol-B respule contains Levosalbutamol, a bronchodilator drug that acts by dilating the airways of the respiratory tract & Budesonide, corticosteroid that reduces inflammation and has anti allergic & immuno-modulatory effect. It is prescribed for inhalation i.e. for breathing with the help of Nebulizer to manage asthma, COPD & other chronic lung disease conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Hoarseness, cough, throat irritation, allergic reaction, fast heart rate, migraine, dyspepsia, leg cramps, dizziness, nervousness, tremor, anxiety & dry mouth.

medicines.name: WELDINIDE 0.5 RESPULE
medicines.composition: Each respule contains Budesonide 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Weldinide respule contains Budesonide, a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation and has anti allergic & immuno-modulatory effect. It is prescribed for inhalation i.e. for breathing with the help of Nebulizer to manage asthma, COPD & other chronic lung diseases requiring a steroid.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Hoarseness, cough, throat irritation & oral and throat fungal infection.

medicines.name: WELDINIDE- 0.5 F RESPULE
medicines.composition: Each respule contains Budesonide 0.5 mg & Formoterol Fumarate eq. to Formoterol Fumarate 20 mcg
medicines.description: Weldinide- 0.5 F respule contains Budesonide, a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation and has anti allergic & immuno-modulatory effect with Formoterol, a long-acting bronchodilator that dilates respiratory airways. It is prescribed for inhalation i.e. for breathing with the help of Nebulizer for maintenance treatment to prevent or decrease wheezing and troubled breathing caused by asthma or ongoing lung disease such as chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) along with other lung conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Shakiness (tremor), nausea, headache, dizziness, nervousness, dry mouth, tiredness, hoarseness, cough, throat irritation & oral and throat fungal infection.

medicines.name: WELDINIDE-200 INHALER
medicines.composition: Each Weldinide Inhaler contains pressurised inhalation suspensions, delivering 200 micrograms of Budesonide per actuation (pressing) in 12 g canister containing 200 metered doses.
medicines.description: Weldinide-200 inhaler contains Budesonide, a corticosteroid medication used in the management of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Weldinide-200 works by reducing inflammation in the airways thus making breathing easier. This inhaler helps prevent asthma attacks and improve lung function when used as prescribed.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Hoarseness of voice, cough, throat irritation & oral as well as throat fungal infection.

medicines.name: WELDINIDE-200 F INHALER
medicines.composition: Each Inhaler contains pressurised inhalation suspensions, delivering 200 micrograms of Budesonide & 6 micrograms of Formoterol per actuation (pressing) in 7.2 g canister containing 120 metered doses.
medicines.description: Weldinide-200 F inhaler contains combination medication Budesonide and Formoterol, which is used to manage asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Budesonide is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation, while Formoterol is a long-acting bronchodilator that relaxes airway muscles. Together, they help prevent asthma attacks, improve lung function and control symptoms. This inhaler is used regularly for long-term management, but not for immediate relief of acute breathing difficulties.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Shakiness (tremor), nausea, headache, dizziness, nervousness, dry mouth, tiredness, hoarseness, cough, throat irritation & oral and throat fungal infection.

medicines.name: WELDINIDE-1 RESPULE
medicines.composition: Each 2 ml respule contains Budesonide 1 mg
medicines.description: Weldinide respule contains Budesonide, a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation and has anti allergic & immuno-modulatory effect. It is prescribed for inhalation i.e. for breathing with the help of Nebulizer to manage asthma, COPD & other chronic lung diseases requiring a steroid.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Hoarseness, cough, throat irritation & oral and throat fungal infection.

medicines.name: WELDINIDE-1 F
medicines.composition: Each 2 ml contains Budesonide 1 mg & Formoterol Fumarate Dihydrate eq to Formoterol Fumarate 20 mcg
medicines.description: Weldinide-F respule contains Budesonide, a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation and has anti allergic & immuno-modulatory effect with Formoterol, a long-acting bronchodilator that dilates respiratory airways. It is prescribed for inhalation i.e. for breathing with the help of Nebulizer for maintenance treatment to prevent or decrease wheezing and troubled breathing caused by asthma or ongoing lung disease such as chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) along with other lung conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Shakiness (tremor), nausea, headache, dizziness, nervousness, dry mouth, tiredness, hoarseness, cough, throat irritation & oral and throat fungal infection.

medicines.name: PREGABANYL PLUS
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Pregabalin 75 mg, Mecobalamin 750 mcg, Alpha Lipoic Acid 100 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg & Vit. B6 3 mg
medicines.description: Pregabanyl Plus Capsule is used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia & fibromyalgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain, swelling of your hands or feet

medicines.name: SILLIUM CAPSULE
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Silymarin extract (80%) 250 mg, Vit B1 1 mg, Vit B2 1.1 mg, Vit B3 11mg, Vit. B5 5 mg, Vit B6 1.5 mg, Vit B12 2.20 mcg
medicines.description: Sillium Capsule is used as adjunctive therapy in chronic hepatitis and cirrhosis. It promotes liver health, contributes to liver protection and liver detoxification, helps maintain liver function, contributes to body detoxification and digestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are abdominal bloating or pain, allergic reactions, diarrhea, gas, indigestion, itching, loss of appetite, nausea and rash.

medicines.name: VITAPLUS
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Ascorbic acid 65 mg, Nicotinamide 11 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 1.9 mg , Riboflavin 1.1 mg, Thiamine Mononitrate 1 mg, Folic acid 129.41 mcg, Cyanocobalamin 2.2 mcg, Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate 61.8 mg eq. to elemental Zinc 12 mg, Cupric Sulphate eq. to elemental Copper 1.35 mg & Sodium Selenate eq. to elemental Selenium 40 mcg
medicines.description: Vitaplus Capsule contains Vitamin B complex, Vitamin C and Zinc. Vitaplus capsules helps in reducing tiredness and fatigue, protects cells from oxidative stress, keeps your skin, hair and nails healthy, helps in the prevention of anaemia, improves metabolism and overall health.
medicines.sideEffects: Vitaplus capsule generally has no side effects when used within recommended doses. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: VITAPLUS-Z
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 3 mg, Nicotinamide 100 mg, Cyanocobalamin 15 mcg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, Chromium Picolinate 250 mcg eq. to elemental Chromium 31.1 mcg, Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate 61.8 mg eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg & Selenous acid eq. to elemental Selenium 100 mcg
medicines.description: Vitaplus-Z tablet contains Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6), Selenium, Chromium, Nicotinamide (Vitamin B3), Zinc, Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Folic Acid (Vitamin B9).Vitaplus-Z helps maintain healthy nervous system, immune system, protects against oxidative damage caused due to stress and helps in maintaining healthy sugar levels in diabetes. It is also used as supplement when mineral & vitamin requirements of the body are high such as in nutrient malabsorption, after surgery, during pregnancy and lactation.
medicines.sideEffects: Vitaplus-Z tablets generally works well when used within recommended dose.Still, you may sometimes experience side effects such as headache, dizziness, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain or discomfort, irritation, sleepiness, skin rash and itching.

medicines.name: COBAFAST
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 100 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 3 mg & Folic acid 1.5 mg
medicines.description: Cobafast capsule contains Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12), Alpha Lipoic acid an antioxidant along with other B vitamins. Medoc-AT tablets are useful in the management of Diabetic neuropathy, Alcohol induced neuropathy, Vitamin B12 deficiency, postherpetic neuropathy and drug induced neuropathy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache

medicines.name: COBAFAST FORTE CAPSULE
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Benfotiamine 100 mg, Mecobalamin 1000 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 200 mg, Inositol 100 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 3 mg & Folic acid 1.5 mg
medicines.description: Cobafast forte capsule contain Benfotiamine (fat soluble for of Vitamin B1), Alpha Lipoic acid (Powerful anti-oxidant), Folic acid (Vitamin B9), Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12), and Pyridoxine(Vitamin B6).It is used as co-prescription in the management of Diabetic neuropathy, Alcohol induced neuropathy, Post herpetic neuropathy, Vitamin deficiency related neuropathy and drug induced neuropathy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: COBAFAST FORTE INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Methylcobalamin 2500 mcg, Niacinamide 100 mg & Pyridoxine 100 mg
medicines.description: Cobafast Plus/Forte injection contains Methylcobalamin (bioactive form of Vitamin B12), Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) and Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6). This combination has synergestic effect on damaged nerves in diabetic neuropathy and peripheral neuropathy. It is indicated to reduce the risk of hyperhomocysteinemia and resulting risks of atherosclerosis, cardiovascular and diabetic disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: COBAFAST KIT
medicines.composition: Part I - Each 1.5 ml ampoule contains Ascorbic acid 150 mg & Part II - Each 1 ml ampoule contains Cyanocobalamin 2500 mcg, Folic acid 0.7 mg & Nicotinamide 12 mg
medicines.description: Cobafast Kit is a combipack in which one ampoule contains Ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) and another ampoule contains Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12), Folic acid (Vitamin B9) and Nicotinamide (Vitamin B3). It is indicated in megabolastic anaemia, hyperhomocystenemia, diabetic neuropathies, alcohol induced neuropathy, prevention of neural tube defect and adjunct in the management of liver disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite, headache and pain at the site of injection.

medicines.name: COBAFAST PLUS
medicines.composition: Each ampoule contains Methylcobalamin 1000 mcg, Niacinamide 100 mg & Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 100 mg
medicines.description: Cobafast Plus/Forte injection contains Methylcobalamin (bioactive form of Vitamin B12), Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) and Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6). This combination has synergestic effect on damaged nerves in diabetic neuropathy and peripheral neuropathy. It is indicated to reduce the risk of hyperhomocysteinemia and resulting risks of atherosclerosis, cardiovascular and diabetic disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: SILLIUM SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 15 ml of suspension contains Silymarin (silybin 35%) 250 mg, Vit. B1 1.4 mg, Vit. B2 1.9 mg, Vit. B3 11 mg, Vit. B5 5 mg, Vit. B6 1.9 mg & Vit. B12 2.2 mcg
medicines.description: Sillium Suspension is used as adjunctive therapy in chronic hepatitis and cirrhosis. It promotes liver health, contributes to liver protection and liver detoxification, helps maintain liver function, contributes to body detoxification and digestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are abdominal bloating or pain, allergic reactions, diarrhea, gas, indigestion, itching, loss of appetite, nausea and rash.

medicines.name: VOLYVIT SYRUP (100 ml & 200 ml)

It helps to improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), prevents and treats diarrhea, helps maintain and restores the normal balance of intestinal flora thus beneficial for digestion and immunity. It is also effective to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Some people experience gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Vebiotic.

medicines.name: BURNOSEPT SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each g contains Benzethonium Chloride 0.2% w/w & Lidocaine 3.0% w/w
medicines.description: Burnosept Spray is a topical anaesthetic & antiseptic spray intended to use in first degree burn, sun burns, scalds as a leave on product to relieve pain & itching as well as protecting from infections. Burnosept Spray is used to clean skin wounds as a clean off product & also can be used as a leave-on product. Burnosept relieves pain & itching from insect bites & helps control superficial bleeding and provides instant antiseptic protection from minor cuts, grazes, scrapes & abrasions.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild irritation may happen otherwise the product is highly tolerated

medicines.name: SEPTIPLAST BELLADONNA PLASTER
medicines.composition: Pain reliving Belladona plaster for multipurpose use 10x16 cm (It is used as transdermal patch for pain relief, to be applied at the site of pain)
medicines.description: Septiplast Belladonna Plaster contains 0.25% of Belladonna alkaloid & consists of non woven cloth, evenly coated with adhesive mass containing Belladonna. Septiplast Belladonna Plaster is made by ultramodern technique and thus is highly thin & non-perforated & the adhesive surface is protected with printed plain silicon paper. Septiplast Belladonna Plaster is specially designed to relive pain & spasm such as muscular tension and strain, stiff neck and aching shoulders, sciatica, lumbago, rheumatism, backache etc. Septiplast Belladonna Plaster is also used for boils, furuncles & carbuncles etc as from ancient times.
medicines.sideEffects: Septiplast Belladonna plaster is very well tolerated & only observed side effects are mild itching or irritation.
medicines.dosage: Ensure that affected area is clean and dry; Septiplast Belladonna Plaster can be cut to size if required. Remove the backing paper from the plaster and apply to affected area i.e. at the pain site.

medicines.name: SEPTIPLAST BANDAGE
medicines.composition: First Aid Multipurpose Adhesive bandage (Washproof & Hypoallergenic) (19x72 mm)
medicines.description: Septiplast Bandage is an antiseptic ready-to-use first aid strip that is water proof, stretch able & easy tear with skin friendly hypoallergenic adhesive. Septiplast Strips contains Benzalkonium Chloride 0.5% w/w to provide continuous superior protection with a complete safety. Septiplast Strips are ideal for use at hard to bandage areas like elbows, knees and fingers, & helps injury or cut to heal 50% faster as compared to open wounds.
medicines.sideEffects: Totally safe with no side effects
medicines.dosage: Gently wash the site of injury if soiled. To remove the strip, open from the end where two lips are present, remove the covering from one side of the strip and stick it to one side of the injury in such a way that medicated pad should come on the injury, finally remove the second half of the covering and complete the sticking of strip so as to secure the injury.

medicines.name: NOZCALM ISOTONIC NASAL SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each spray delivers Sodium Chloride 0.9% w/v (Isotonic nasal spray)
medicines.description: Nozcalm Isotonic Nasal Spray contains Sodium Chloride, a gentle solution designed to cleanse and moisturize nasal passages. Nozcalm helps relieve nasal congestion, dryness and irritation caused by colds, allergies or dry air. It is highly suitable for all ages & is safe for daily use.
medicines.sideEffects: Temporary burning & stinging sensation are the main side effects Allergic reactions in the nose, eyes, ears and lungs may exacerbate.

medicines.name: CHYMOMERG
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Trypsin 48 mg, Bromelain 90 mg & Rutoside Trihydrate 100 mg
medicines.description: Chymomerg Tablets contains Trypsin & Bromelain, proteolytic enzymes that clears dead cells to reduces pain and inflammation and Rutoside, a herbal analgesic for effective pain relief. Chymomerg tablets are used to treat pain and inflammation related to osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and tendonitis. It is also used to treat conditions such as edema and inflammation following surgeries of cellulitis, sports injuries, tooth extractions, and sprains.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are temporary stinging sensation, nausea, hives, difficulty in breathing, burning sensations, Indigestion and loss of balance.

medicines.name: CHYMOMERG FORTE
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Trypsin 96 mg, Bromelain 180 mg & Rutoside Trihydrate 200 mg
medicines.description: Chymomerg Forte Tablets contains Trypsin & Bromelain, proteolytic enzymes that clears dead cells to reduce pain and inflammation and Rutoside, a herbal analgesic for effective pain relief. Chymomerg Forte tablets are used to treat pain and inflammation related to osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and tendonitis. It is also used to treat conditions such as edema and inflammation following surgeries of cellulitis, sports injuries, tooth extractions, and sprains.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are temporary stinging sensation, nausea, hives, difficulty in breathing, burning sensations, Indigestion and loss of balance.

medicines.name: CHYMOMERG-A
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Trypsin 48 mg, Rutoside Trihydrate 100 mg, Bromelain 90 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg
medicines.description: Chymomerg-A Tablets contains Aceclofenac, a NSAID in addition to Trypsin & Bromelain, proteolytic enzymes that clears dead cells to reduce pain and inflammation and Rutoside, a herbal analgesic for effective pain relief and is used to treat pain and inflammation related to osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and tendonitis. It is also used to treat conditions such as edema and inflammation following surgeries of cellulitis, sports injuries, tooth extractions, and sprains.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects of are temporary stinging sensation, nausea, hives, difficulty in breathing, burning sensations, Indigestion and loss of balance.

medicines.name: CHYMOMERG-D
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Trypsin 48 mg, Rutoside Trihydrate 100 mg, Bromelain 90 mg & Diclofenac 50 mg
medicines.description: Chymomerg-D Tablets contains Diclofenac, a NSAID in addition to Trypsin & Bromelain, proteolytic enzymes that clears dead cells to reduce pain and inflammation and Rutoside, a herbal analgesic for effective pain relief and is used to treat pain and inflammation related to osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and tendonitis. It is also used to treat conditions such as edema and inflammation following surgeries of cellulitis, sports injuries, tooth extractions, and sprains.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are temporary stinging sensation, nausea, hives, difficulty in breathing, burning sensations, Indigestion and loss of balance.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE C2 PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Soft gelatin capsule contains Rosehip Oil 400 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate 250 mg, Curcuminoid 100 mg, Chondroitin Sulphate 50 mg, Boswellia Serrata 50 mg, Undenatured Type-II Collagen 40 mg & Hyaluronic Acid 20 mg
medicines.description: Glucozone C2 Plus softgel contain Undenatured Collagen Type II for reformation of cartilage with Glucosamine, Methylsuphonyl methane, Sodium hyaluronate, for the formation of cartilage & tendon as well as Curcumin & Rosehip extract for pain and inflammation. Thus Glucozone C2 Plus softgel offers a complete package for joint health. It helps in formation of tendons and cartilage in the joints. Glucozone C2 Plus softgel are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis associated with marked inflammation. Glucozone C2 Plus improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One softgel of Glucozone-C2 Plus to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. Once started it should be given for at least one month to have an effective result.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-C2 PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Soft gelatin capsule contains Rosehip Oil 400 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate 250 mg, Curcuminoid 100 mg, Chondroitin Sulphate 50 mg, Boswellia Serrata 50 mg, Undenatured Type-II Collagen 40 mg & Hyaluronic Acid 20 mg
medicines.description: Dincerin C2 Plus softgel combines a powerful blend of ingredients to support joint health and mobility. It features Rosehip Oil, Glucosamine, and Chondroitin Sulphate for cartilage support, along with anti-inflammatory powerhouses like Curcuminoids and Boswellia serrata. UC Type-II collagen and Hyaluronic Acid further contribute to joint lubrication and overall connective tissue health. This formulation aims to reduce discomfort and improve joint function
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One softgel of Dincerin-C2 Plus to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. Once started it should be given for at least one month to have an effective result.

medicines.name: CARTNIREST-C2 PLUS CAPSULES
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatine capsule contains Boswellia Serrata Ext. 125 mg, Undenatured Type II collagen 40 mg, Hyaluronic acid 50 mg, Curcuma longa ext. 75 mg, Piperine 2.5 mg & Cissus Quadrangularis 75 mg
medicines.description: Cartnirest-C2 Plus capsules is a potent combination of Boswellia serrata ext., Cissus quadrangularis ext., Hyaluronic acid and Piperine which assists in supporting joint health and flexibility. The ingredients Boswellia serrata and Cissus quadrangularis are known for their anti-inflammatory attributes and their ability to promote joint comfort. Hyaluronic acid aids in joint lubrication, while piperine enhances nutrient absorption for maximum effectiveness. Cartnirest-C2 Plus capsules are ideal for those seeking a comprehensive approach to joint support and overall wellness.
medicines.sideEffects: Cartnirest C2 Plus capsules at recommended dose has no side effects usually. If you have any unusual effects, contact your Doctor or Pharmacist promptly.
medicines.dosage: One capsule a day after meal or as directed by the physician

medicines.name: DIPLOMAX POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g of powder contains Salicylic acid 3%, Benzoic acid 6%, Menthol 0.08% & Starch 31% w/w
medicines.description: Diplomax Dusting Powder is an antiseptic, antifungal & keratolytic powder used in cases of skin irritation and inflammation (such as prickly heat), insect bites, fungal infections & eczema. It should not be applied on exudative lesions.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation & redness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: VENACAINE 0.25% INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Bupivacaine Hydrochloride IP 2.5 mg in 20 ml vial
medicines.description: Venacaine 0.25% injection contains Bupivacaine, a local anaesthetic used to numb specific areas of the body during surgeries, procedures, or labour. It works by blocking nerve signals, preventing pain sensations. Venacaine injection is commonly used for epidural anaesthesia, local infiltration, nerve blocks and spinal anaesthesia. The after effects can last for several hours thus providing effective pain relief during and after medical procedures.
medicines.sideEffects: Numbness, prickling, tingling feeling, ringing/buzzing of ears, chest discomfort, painful urination, headache are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: VENACAINE 0.5% INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Bupivacaine Hydrochloride IP 5 mg in 20 ml vial
medicines.description: Venacaine 0.5% injection contains Bupivacaine, a local anaesthetic used to numb specific areas of the body during surgeries, procedures, or labour. It works by blocking nerve signals, preventing pain sensations. Venacaine injection is commonly used for epidural anaesthesia, local infiltration, nerve blocks and spinal anaesthesia. The after effects can last for several hours thus providing effective pain relief during and after medical procedures.
medicines.sideEffects: Numbness, prickling, tingling feeling, ringing/buzzing of ears, chest discomfort, painful urination, headache are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: VENACAINE HEAVY
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Bupivacaine hydrochloride IP 5 mg & Dextrose 80 mg in 4 ml Ampoule
medicines.description: Venacaine Heavy injection contains Bupivacaine in dextrose injection, a local anaesthetic combined with sugar solution used for spinal anaesthesia or epidural procedures. Bupivacaine blocks nerve signals, providing pain relief while dextrose helps the solution to remain in the desired area and can enhance the block's effectiveness. This injection is commonly used during surgeries or labour, offering extended pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Numbness, prickling, tingling feeling, ringing/buzzing of ears, chest discomfort, painful urination, headache are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: VEBIOTIC PLUS CAPSULES
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Streptococcus faecalis 30 million CFU, Clostridium butyricum 2 million CFU, Bacillus mesentericus 1 million CFU & Lactic acid bacillus 50 million CFU
medicines.description: Vebiotic Capsule is a combination of Probiotics and Prebiotic. It helps to improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), prevents and treats diarrhea, helps maintain and restores the normal balance of intestinal flora thus beneficial for digestion and immunity. It is also effective to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Some people experience gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Vebiotic Plus

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN EYE OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g of eye ointment contains Neomycin Sulphate 3400 IU, Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU & Bacitracin Zinc 400 IU
medicines.description: Nosramycin eye ointment contains Neomycin, Polymyxin & Bacitracin three antibiotics which together offers broad spectrum of anti-bacterial activity. It is prescribed for almost all types of superficial infections of external eye/s.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are allergic reactions, eye irritation, itching & swelling.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Neomycin Sulphate 5 g, Bacitracin 250 units & Sulphacetamide Sodium 60 mg
medicines.description: Nosramycin powder contains Neomycin, Bacitracin & Sulphacetamide, combinations of antibiotic to provide effective eradication of disease causing bacteria from skin infections. It is prescribed for wound infections, burns, corroded skin, gangrene and in dusting of wounds after ear and nose surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: It is very well tolerated the side effects are allergic reactions & rashes.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN-H EYE OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g of eye ointment contains Neomycin Sulphate 3400 IU, Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU, Bacitracin Zinc 400 IU & Hydrocortisone 10 mg
medicines.description: Nosramycin-H eye ointment contains Neomycin, Polymyxin & Bacitracin three antibiotics which together offers broad spectrum of anti-bacterial activity & Hydrocortisone, a mild steroid that relieves redness, allergy & swelling in the eyes. It is prescribed for almost all types of superficial infections of external eye/s, where inflammation is present markedly.
medicines.sideEffects: Allergic reactions, eye irritation, itching & swelling are the main side effects.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN (5g/10g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Neomycin 3400 U, Polymyxin B 5000 U & Bacitracin 400 U.
medicines.description: Nosramycin Ointment is a combination of three antibiotics: Bacitracin, Neomycin and Polymyxin B, which works by stopping the growth of infection-causing bacteria on your skin. It is used to treat various types of bacterial skin infections. It minimizes symptoms of skin infection such as redness, swelling, itching, etc., by acting against the infection-causing microorganisms.
medicines.sideEffects: The combination is safe to use with no side effects.

medicines.name: BETHNOHEAL-25
medicines.composition: Each Tablet contains Bethanechol 25 mg
medicines.description: Bethnoheal-25 contains Bethanechol Chloride, a parasympathomimetic agent that stimulates the muscarinic receptors, particularly in the gastrointestinal and urinary tracts. It is primarily used to restore normal bladder function and improve bowel motility. It enhances the tone of the detrusor muscle of the bladder, facilitating urination and is helpful in managing urinary retention (particularly non-obstructive), and certain cases of gastroparesis or hypotonic bladder.
medicines.sideEffects: May include abdominal cramps, increased salivation, sweating, nausea, diarrhea, flushing, or urinary urgency. Rarely, hypotension or bronchospasm may occur. Use under medical supervision.

medicines.name: DANTOX DENTAL PAIN EXPERT MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Benzydamine Hydrochloride 0.15% w/v
medicines.description: DANTOX DENTAL PAIN EXPERT Mouth Wash contains Benzydamine Hydrochloride, a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory agent with local analgesic and antimicrobial properties. It is indicated for the relief of pain and inflammation associated with oral mucosal conditions such as stomatitis, gingivitis, pharyngitis, and after dental procedures. The mouthwash helps reduce swelling, soothe irritation, and provides symptomatic relief from oral discomfort.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. Possible side effects include transient stinging or burning sensation in the mouth, altered taste sensation, and rarely, hypersensitivity reactions.
medicines.dosage: Use 15 ml as a mouth rinse, swish for 30 seconds to 1 minute, and then spit out. Use 2-3 times daily or as directed by the physician.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT DENTAL PAIN EXPERT MOUTHWASH
medicines.composition: Benzydamine Hydrochloride 0.15% w/v
medicines.description: Ultradent Dental Pain Expert Mouthwash is an anti-inflammatory and analgesic mouthwash used to relieve pain, swelling, and irritation in the mouth and throat caused by conditions such as mouth ulcers, sore throat, gingivitis, or after dental procedures. Ultradent Mouthwash works by reducing inflammation and providing a soothing, numbing effect for lasting comfort.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects are rare but may include mild mouth irritation or a temporary burning sensation.
medicines.dosage: Use 10–15 ml of Ultradent Dental Pain Expert Mouthwash undiluted, rinse thoroughly for 30 seconds, and spit out. Use twice daily after brushing. Do not swallow.

medicines.name: MIGRANECK
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Ergotamine 1 mg & Caffeine 100 mg
medicines.description: Migraneck tablet contains Ergotamine & Caffeine, a combination medication that acts variedly to relieve Migraine headache. It is prescribed to treat Migraine (a special kind of headache).
medicines.sideEffects: Cold extremities, vasospasm, ECG changes, blood pressure fluctuations, numbness, dizziness, muscle pain, irregular heartbeats, nausea, vomiting, local edema & itching are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ROCK ON MAX SACHET
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet of Rock On Max contains Taurine 1 g, Ginseng (Panax Ginseng) Extract 90 mg, Caffeine 50 mg, Vitamin C 65 mg, Myo-Inositol 50 mg, Vit. B1 1.7 mg, Vit. B2 2.4 mg, Vit. B3 14 mg & Vit. B6 1.9 mg & Zinc 3.4 mg.
medicines.description: Leeford's Rock On Max is a sugar free energy drink that comes in effervescent powder form & gets dissolved automatically without the requirement of stirring. It can be added to simple water or Citrus juices for instant boost of energy & stamina. Rock On Max is a dietary supplement and a method for increasing energy and mental alertness of an individual. It helps to stay awake, increase energy levels, boost performance during physical exercise & helps remain concentrated while studying. Rock On Max is an ideal energy drink for young, middle aged & elderly population that has perfect balance of safe and effective ingredients that gives you a physical & psychological boost devoid of any adverse effects if consumed within the safe limits as prescribed in dosage.
medicines.sideEffects: Rock On Max is a safe energy drink when used as directed, but if it is abused alone or in combination with other substances, then it can lead to irritability, anxiety, restlessness, insomnia, gastrointestinal upsets, tremors, tachycardia & psycho-motor agitation.
medicines.dosage: One to two sachet of Rock On Max should be used 30 minutes to an hour before going to Gym or for a walk to have a burst of energy or stamina. One or two sachet of Rock On Max should be taken an hour before sitting for a long study to increase alertness and concentration. Do not take more than two sachets simultaneously regularly and should avoid using more than 4 sachets per day to avoid its adverse effects.

medicines.name: COLDFIZ
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Phenylephrine 10 mg & Chlorpheniramine 2 mg
medicines.description: Coldfiz tablet is a combination medicine that effectively relieves symptoms of common cold such as blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, and congestion or stuffiness, fever and headache. It reduces congestion and helps in easy breathing.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: COLDMINE
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Phenylephrine 12.5 mg , Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg & Caffeine 30 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine is a combination of four medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Coldmine helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: DIECOLD
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Caffeine 30 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg & Diphenhydramine 25 mg
medicines.description: Diecold tablet is a combination of medicines which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Caffeine an CNS stimulant, Phenylephrine an decongestant and Diphenhydramine an anti-allergic. It is used for the relief of cold and flu including headache, fever, nasal and sinus congestion, runny or stuffy nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping), restlessness and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: DIECOLD PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg, Caffeine 25 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg & Cetirizine 10 mg
medicines.description: Diecold Plus is a combination of five medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Diecold plus helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, Bloating, Stomach pain, Indigestion, Loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: MIGRAFEN TABLETS (10s & 15s)
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Ergotamine 1 mg & Caffeine 100 mg.
medicines.description: Migrafen tablet contains Ergotamine & Caffeine, a combination that acts variedly to relieve Migraine headache. It is prescribed to treat Migraine (a special kind of headache).
medicines.sideEffects: Cold extremities, vasospasm, ECG changes, blood pressure fluctuations, numbness, dizziness, muscle pain, irregular heartbeats, nausea, vomiting, local edema & itching are the main side effects.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD-PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Phenylephrine 12.5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 2 mg & Caffeine 30 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Plus tablet is a combination medicine which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Phenylephrine a decongestant, Chlorpheniramine a Anti-allergic and Caffeine a CNS stimulant.It is indicated for relief of nasal and sinus congestion, allergic symptoms of the nose or throat due to upper respiratory tract allergies, sinus pain and headache, adjunct with antibacterials in sinusitis, tonsillitis and otitis media.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, headache, restlessness, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness

medicines.name: LEEMOL ACTIV
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Paracetamol 650 mg & Caffeine 50 mg
medicines.description: Leemol Activ tablets contain Paracetamol an analgesic and anti-pyretic and Caffeine a stimulant and analgesic. It is indicated in mild to modertate pain, headache, migraine, toothache, painful periods, fever, backache and rheumatic pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are hypersensitivity reactions, dizziness, restlessness, Insomnia, rapid or abnormal heart rhythm, dehydration and anxiety.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD ADVANCE
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg, Caffeine 25 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg & Cetirizine 10 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Advance is a combination of five medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Criticold Advance helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: MELAMINE LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Calamine 8% w/v, Diphenhydramine Hydrochloride 1% w/v & Camphor 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Melamine lotion contains Calamine, mild antibacterial and soothing agent that relieves redness & itching Diphenhydramine, an anti-allergic that stops skin itching and irritation & Camphor, has antibacterial, antifungal and anti-inflammatory benefits. It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effect.
medicines.dosage: Before using, shake the bottle well. Thoroughly wash the affected area with water. Gently dab Melamine on the skin using cotton or your fingers. Ensure that it dries on the skin while covering the affected area. Do not rub or massage Melamine into the skin or apply on an open wound. Melamine can be applied 3 to 4 times a day, continuously for 2 weeks or even more.

medicines.name: CALALAYER LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Calamine 15% w/v, Zinc Oxide 5% w/v, Bentonite 3% w/v, Sodium Citrate 0.5% w/v, Liquefied Phenol 0.5% v/v & Glycerin 5% w/v
medicines.description: Calalayer lotion contains Calamine & Zinc mild antibacterial and soothing agent that relieves redness & itching; Bentonite, Sodium Citrate & liquefied Phenol these acts by stoping skin itching, irritation & detoxifying skin; Glycerin, has skin nourishing benefits. It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effect.

medicines.name: CALALAYER SPRAY
medicines.composition: Calamine 8% w/v, Light Liquid Paraffin 10% v/v with Pramoxine
medicines.description: Calalayer Spray combines Calamine’s soothing and anti-itch properties with Light Liquid Paraffin’s moisturizing effect. This easy-to-apply spray provides quick relief from itching, dryness, and minor skin irritations while keeping the skin hydrated and calm.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated; rare cases of mild irritation may occur.

medicines.name: CALCIJOINT-XT
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Calcium Citrate 1000 mg, Tribasic Calcium Phosphate 150 mg, Calcium Ascorbate 75 mg, Vit. D3 400 IU, Magnesium Hydroxide 100 mg & Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate eq. to elemental Zinc 4 mg
medicines.description: Calcijoint-XT tablets contain combination of Calcium Citrate, Tribasic calcium Phosphate with Calcium ascorbate (a form of vitamin C) with Vitamin D3 and minerals. This medication is used to prevent or treat low blood calcium levels in people who do not get enough calcium from their diets. It may be used to treat conditions caused by low calcium levels such as bone loss (osteoporosis), weak bones (osteomalacia/rickets), decreased activity of the parathyroid gland (hypoparathyroidism), and a certain muscle disease (latent tetany). It may also be used in certain patients to make sure they are getting enough calcium (e.g., women who are pregnant, nursing, or postmenopausal, people taking certain medications such as phenytoin, phenobarbital, or prednisone).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are diarrhea, constipation, upset stomach and abdominal pain.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE-CT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine sulphate potassium chloride 750 mg, Chondroitin sulphate sodium 200 mg, Methylsulfonylmethane 250 mg, Cholecalciferol 200 IU, Calcium ascorbate 50 mg, Elemental Selenium 70 mcg, Elemental Zinc 4 mg, Elemental Manganese 3 mg, Elemental Chromium 50 mcg, Elemental Copper 0.5 mg, Elemental Boron 0.5 mg & Elemental Silicon 2 mg
medicines.description: Glucozone-CT plus tablets contain Glucosamine, Chondroitin, and Methysulphonyl methane along with various minerals and Vitamin D. It helps in joint restoration, cartilage & synovial fluid formation and improves overall physiology of joints. Glucozone CT plus tablets are indicated for prevention of Rheumatoid arthritis and for cartilage damage in cases of trauma and injury. It decreases pain and inflammation associated with arthritis, improves mobility and flexibility of involved joints, helps in lubrication of stiff joints and rebuilds worn joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of Glucozone CT Plus to be taken twice or thrice daily. Maximum dose is 4 tablets per day.

medicines.description: Calzowel-XT tablets contain combination of Calcium Citrate, Tribasic calcium Phosphate with Calcium ascorbate (a form of vitamin C) with Vitamin D3 and minerals. medicines.description: This combination supports joint and bone health by reducing inflammation, promoting cartilage repair, and enhancing mobility. Glucosamine, chondroitin, and MSM help maintain joint structure, while cholecalciferol, calcium ascorbate, and multiminerals support bone strength, calcium absorption, and collagen synthesis for overall musculoskeletal health
medicines.sideEffects: This combination may cause mild side effects such as nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or headache. High doses can lead to allergic reactions, kidney issues, or interfere with blood sugar and mineral balance.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet per day, preferably with food to improve absorption and minimize gastrointestinal discomfort.

It is indicated in Osteomalacia, Pregnancy and lactation, rickets and in children to maintain healthy bones. Calcijoint is also used in elderly people to keep bones healthy and strong, and is even effective in Chronic arthritis and Osteoporosis.

medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Calcium Citrate 1000 mg, Tribasic Calcium Phosphate 150 mg, Calcium Ascorbate 75 mg, Vit. D3 400 IU, Magnesium Hydroxide 100 mg & Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate eq. to elemental Zinc 4 mg
medicines.description: Calcijoint-XT tablets contain combination of Calcium Citrate, Tribasic calcium Phosphate with Calcium ascorbate (a form of vitamin C) with Vitamin D3 and minerals. This medication is used to prevent or treat low blood calcium levels in people who do not get enough calcium from their diets. It may be used to treat conditions caused by low calcium levels such as bone loss (osteoporosis), weak bones (osteomalacia/rickets), decreased activity of the parathyroid gland (hypoparathyroidism), and a certain muscle disease (latent tetany). It may also be used in certain patients to make sure they are getting enough calcium (e.g., women who are pregnant, nursing, or postmenopausal, people taking certain medications such as phenytoin, phenobarbital, or prednisone).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are diarrhea, constipation, upset stomach and abdominal pain.

medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Cefoperazone Sodium eq. to Cefoperazone 1 g & sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq. to Sulbactam 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cefaprex-S injection contains Cefoperazone, a third generation cephalosporin with Sulbactam, a betalactamase inhibitor and together they act by inhibiting the growth of bacteria. It is prescribed for gynaecological infection, intra-abdominal infection, soft tissue infection, respiratory tract infection, blood infection & skin and soft tissue infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Cefoperazone & Sulbactam combination is generally well-tolerated; most frequent side effects are allergic skin reactions, headache, injection pain, chills and serious allergic reactions.

medicines.name: CEKOZEF-1 g
