medicines.name: CEFAPREX-S 375
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Sterile Cefoperazone Sodium eq to Cefoperazone 250 mg & Sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq to Sulbactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cefaprex-S 375 combines Cefoperazone, a broad-spectrum third-generation cephalosporin, with Sulbactam, a beta-lactamase inhibitor. This synergistic formulation enhances bacterial coverage, especially against beta-lactamase producing organisms. Effective in treating respiratory, urinary, intra-abdominal, and skin infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Possible side effects include pain at the injection site, diarrhea, rash, or allergic reactions.

medicines.name: CEFAPREX-S 1 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Sterile Cefoperazone Sodium Eq. to Cefoperazone 500 mg & Sulbactam Sodium 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cefaprex-S 1 g is a powerful combination of Cefoperazone, a third-generation cephalosporin, and Sulbactam, a beta-lactamase inhibitor. This dual-action antibiotic is effective against a wide range of gram-positive and gram-negative bacterial infections, including resistant strains.
medicines.sideEffects: May cause mild injection site pain, nausea, diarrhea, or allergic reactions.

medicines.name: CEKOZEF-S 1g
medicines.composition: Cefoperazone 500 mg & Sulbactam 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cekozef-S 1 g is a potent combination of Cefoperazone, a third-generation cephalosporin antibiotic, and Sulbactam, a β-lactamase inhibitor. This formulation offers enhanced efficacy against β-lactamase-producing organisms and provides a broad-spectrum antibacterial effect. It is used in the treatment of serious bacterial infections, including respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, intra-abdominal infections, skin and soft tissue infections, gynecological infections, and septicemia.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Possible adverse effects include gastrointestinal disturbances, hypersensitivity reactions, rash, or local injection site discomfort. Rarely, hepatic enzyme alterations may occur.

medicines.name: CEKOZEF-S 375
medicines.composition: Cefoperazone 250 mg & Sulbactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cekozef-S 375 is a broad-spectrum antibiotic composed of Cefoperazone and Sulbactam. Cefoperazone is a third-generation cephalosporin effective against a wide range of Gram-positive and Gram-negative organisms, while Sulbactam is a β-lactamase inhibitor that enhances the efficacy of Cefoperazone by inhibiting bacterial resistance mechanisms. This combination is used in the treatment of moderate to severe infections including respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, intra-abdominal infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and septicemia.
medicines.sideEffects: Well tolerated in most patients. May cause gastrointestinal disturbances, mild skin rash, or local reactions at the injection site. Hypersensitivity reactions are rare but possible.

medicines.sideEffects: Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vaginal fungal infections, Vulvovaginal infections, abdominal pain & Headache are the main side effects experienced by the patients taking it.

medicines.name: UNICEF 1 g

medicines.description: Unicef injection contains Ceftazidime, a third generation cephalosporin that act by inhibiting the growth of bacteria. It is prescribed for respiratory tract infection, skin & soft tissue infections, blood infections, bone & joint infections, brain infections and Gynaecological infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common adverse reactions are inflammation of vein, diarrhoea, transient increases in hepatic enzymes & rash.

medicines.name: UNICEF-T 1.125 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Ceftazidime 1000 mg & Tazobactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Unicef-T 1.125 injection contains Ceftazidime and Tazobactam, a broad-spectrum antibiotic used in the treatment of various bacterial infections, particularly those caused by Gram-negative bacteria. Ceftazidime, a cephalosporin, targets bacterial cell wall synthesis, while Tazobactam, a β-lactamase inhibitor, enhances the effectiveness of Ceftazidime by preventing the breakdown of the drug. This combination is effective in treating severe infections, including pneumonia, urinary tract infections and intra-abdominal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Common adverse reactions may include inflammation of vein, diarrhoea, transient increases in hepatic enzymes & rash.

medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects with Ceftriaxone are pain, indurations and tenderness at the site of injection; others are rash, disturbances in white blood cell count, diarrhea & liver enzyme elevations.

It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Diecold plus helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.

medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Cetirizine 5 mg & Ambroxol 30 mg
medicines.description: Leecet-AM syrup contains Cetirizine & Ambroxol, a combination medication used in relieving symptoms of allergies and respiratory conditions. Cetirizine, an antihistamine, reduces allergy symptoms like sneezing and itching & Ambroxol acts as an expectorant thus helping in clearing mucus from the airways. Leecet-AM syrup provides dual action for effective relief from cough and congestion, making it suitable for patients suffering from colds, bronchitis, asthma or allergies.

medicines.name: LEE-BIOTIC MAX
medicines.composition: Pre-Probiotic for Gut Health (20 Billion Spores)
medicines.description: LEE-BIOTIC MAX is a potent pre-probiotic supplement containing 20 billion spores per capsule. It promotes gut health, supports digestive balance, and enhances immunity by introducing beneficial bacteria. Ideal for maintaining a healthy microbiome, improving digestion, and relieving bloating and discomfort.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Mild digestive changes may occur initially.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 capsule daily with water, preferably before meals

medicines.name: LESEPTIC ANTISEPTIC LIQUID (125 ml & 500 ml)
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate solution 1.5% w/v & Cetrimide solution 3% w/v
medicines.description: Leseptic is a broad spectrum Bactericidal, Fungicidal & Virucidal liquid that has a rapid action, non stinging & skin friendly formula. Leseptic can be used for general purposes as a first aid measure for cuts, wounds, bruises & abrasions; for medical purposes in aseptic management of contaminated wound, gynaecological applications & as a First Aid measure & finally for Industrial purpose in Pharmaceutical, Food & Dairy industry for surface and general purpose disinfection.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerated, mild irritation may occur on concentrated use.
medicines.dosage: Medical Uses - Dilute Leseptic in 1:15 ratio with distill or clean water (warm is better) and apply on wound or required surface with cotton swabs. Industrial Uses - Dilute Leseptic in 1:4 ratio for floor mopping or surface disinfection.

medicines.name: SEPTIPLAST SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each g contains Lidocaine 1.0% w/w, Cetrimide 0.1% w/w & Polyvinyl Polymer 2.8% w/w
medicines.description: Septiplast Spray is a topical anaesthetic & antiseptic spray intended to use as a first aid product to relieve pain, irritation & protect from infections. Septiplast spray is used as a leave-on product that quickly seals minor cuts, grazes, scrapes & abrasions to provide a water resistant, breathable film shield that stretches too, like original skin. Septiplast Spray is a flagship product in Indian market that Leeford Healthacre Limited had launched for the first time to provide you completes protection with total comfort and safety.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly safe to use

medicines.name: NEOSCAB LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Gamma Benzene Hexachloride 1% w/v & Cetrimide 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Neoscab lotion contains Gamma Benzene Hexachloride, an insecticide that acts by damaging the brain of mites to kill them & Cetrimide, an antibacterial to kill the bacteria. It is prescribed for treatment of Head lice, pubic lice & Scabies.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects such as stinging, burning & redness of the skin may occur.

medicines.name: BURNOSEPT CREAM

medicines.description: Burnosept cream contains Aminacrine and Cetrimide, both of which are anti-septic that kills virus, bacteria and fungi. Burnosept cream is used for minor cuts, wounds, sores, insect bites, rashes, abrasions & first degree burns i.e. superficial burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, itching, redness & burning sensation are few side effects.

medicines.name: NEXOSCAB LOTION
medicines.composition: Gamma Benzene Hexachloride 1% w/v & Cetrimide 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Nexoscab lotion effectively treat skin conditions like scabies and lice infestations. Gamma Benzene Hexachloride works by killing mites and lice, while Cetrimide provides antiseptic and antibacterial properties to protect against secondary infections and aid in wound healing. It helps relieve itching, swelling, and redness associated with these parasitic infestations and minor skin irritations.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects such as stinging, burning & redness of the skin may occur.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT EXPERT GUM PAINT

medicines.description: Ultradent expert gum paint contains Tannic acid Glycerin, Iodine, Potassium Iodide, Thymol, Menthol & Glycerin. Tannic acid glycerin acts by healing sores and treating bleeding gums; Iodine, Potassium iodide & Thymol acts as antibacterial; Iodine & Menthol together act as counterirritant to relieve irritation and offer a soothing effect. This product is prescribed for spongy gums, bleeding gums, sores on gums & pus coming out of gums.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.

medicines.name: LESEPTIC ANTISEPTIC SOAP

medicines.description: Leseptic Soap combines Chlorhexidine Gluconate and Cetrimide to provide powerful antiseptic cleansing. It effectively eliminates bacteria and helps prevent infections, making it ideal for daily hygiene and pre-operative skin preparation.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet skin, lather thoroughly, then rinse. Use as needed or advised by a healthcare professional.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Tannic Acid 2% w/v, Zinc Chloride 1% w/v & Cetrimide 0.1 % w/v
medicines.description: Tannic Acid acts as an astringent to tighten gums and reduce bleeding, Zinc Chloride promotes healing and reduces inflammation, while Cetrimide serves as an antiseptic to prevent bacterial growth. It is used for managing gingivitis, bleeding gums, and oral inflammation, helping to maintain overall gum health.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include a temporary burning sensation, irritation, or dryness of the gums. Rarely, allergic reactions like swelling, redness, or rash may occur. Discontinue use if severe irritation or sensitivity develops.

medicines.name: CHLORODEX-D
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chloramphenicol 1.0% w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Chlorodex-D eye/ear drop contains Chloramphenicol, an antibiotic that acts by stopping the growth of the disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that acts by reducing redness, swelling & pain. It is prescribed for bacterial eye & ear infection with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye - Burning or stinging sensations & hypersensitivity reactions. Ear - Dizziness, headache & earache may happen.

medicines.name: AQUA EAR-PLUS EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Prednisolone 0.5% w/v Chloramphenicol 5% w/v, Acetic acid 2% w/v & Benzocaine 3% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Ear-Plus ear drops contains Prednisolone, Chloramphenicol, Acetic Acid, and Benzocaine. This combination combines anti-inflammatory, antibiotic, antiseptic, and pain-relieving properties. Prednisolone reduces inflammation, Chloramphenicol fights bacterial infections, Acetic Acid prevents fungal growth, and Benzocaine provides quick pain relief. Aqua Ear-Plus ear drops helps treat ear infections and associated symptoms effectively.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness. flaking of skin, stinging sensation, burning sensation. itching sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: EARWEL-PLUS EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Prednisolone 0.5% w/v Chloramphenicol 5% w/v, Acetic acid 2% w/v & Benzocaine 3% w/v
medicines.description: Earwel-Plus ear drops contains Prednisolone, Chloramphenicol, Acetic Acid, and Benzocaine. This combination combines anti-inflammatory, antibiotic, antiseptic, and pain-relieving properties. Prednisolone reduces inflammation, Chloramphenicol fights bacterial infections, Acetic Acid prevents fungal growth, and Benzocaine provides quick pain relief. Earwel-Plus ear drops helps treat ear infections and associated symptoms effectively.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness. flaking of skin, stinging sensation, burning sensation. itching sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: CHLORODEX-P
medicines.composition: Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU & Chloramphenicol 1.0% w/v, Phenylmercuric Nitrate 0.001%w/v
medicines.description: This triple combination is used in the treatment of bacterial eye infections. It works by killing the bacteria or stopping their growth in the affected area. Chloramphenicol is an antibiotic that inhibits bacterial growth by preventing the synthesis of proteins required by bacteria to carry out their vital functions. Phenyl Mercuric Nitrate is an antimicrobial preservative. Polymyxin B is an antibiotic that disrupts the outer cell membrane of certain (gram negative bacteria), and inhibits respiration of bacterial cells.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye irritation, Irritation of ear, Watery eyes, Burning sensation

medicines.name: CHLORODEX-DX
medicines.composition: Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU, Chloramphenicol 4 mg & Dexamethasone 1 mg
medicines.description: Chlorodex-DX is a combination of two antibiotics (Chloramphenicol , Polymyxin B) and a steroid ( Dexamethasone ). The antibiotics work by killing the bacteria or stopping their growth. Together, they treat your infection effectively. The steroid blocks the production of certain chemical messengers (prostaglandins) that make the affected area red, swollen and itchy.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common side effects include burning sensation, irritation, itching, and redness at the application site.

medicines.name: EARWEL-AC
medicines.composition: Chloramphenicol 5% w/v , Benzocaine 1% w/v & Propylene Glycol (as base)
medicines.description: Earwel-AC combines Chloramphenicol’s broad-spectrum antibacterial effect with Benzocaine’s local anesthetic action. Formulated in a propylene glycol base, it provides effective relief from ear infections and associated pain or discomfort.
medicines.sideEffects: May cause mild local irritation, itching, or allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.

medicines.name: AQUAEAR-AC
medicines.composition: Chloramphenicol 5% w/v , Benzocaine 1% w/v & Propylene Glycol (as base)
medicines.description: This ear drop formulation contains Chloramphenicol, a broad-spectrum antibiotic, and Benzocaine, a local anesthetic. It is used to treat bacterial ear infections such as otitis externa (swimmer’s ear), while Benzocaine helps relieve ear pain and discomfort. This combination reduces infection, inflammation, and pain, promoting quicker healing and symptom relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild ear irritation, burning, or stinging sensation. Rarely, allergic reactions such as itching, rash, or swelling may occur. Prolonged use can lead to fungal overgrowth or antibiotic resistance. Discontinue use if severe discomfort or allergic symptoms develop.

medicines.name: CROMIDE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Clidinium Bromide 2.5 mg & Chlordiazepoxide 5 mg
medicines.description: Cromide contains Clidinium, an anti-cholinergic that inhibits acid production in stomach and spasm in intestine and Chlordiazepoxide, an anxiolytic, sedative and appetite stimulating drug.Cromide tablets are indicated in psychological and extra-intestinal disturbances in gastrointestinal disorders. It is used with other medicines for treatment of peptic ulcers, irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and enterocolitis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are weakness or tiredness, excitement, anger, dry mouth, blurred vision or vision changes, constipation, nausea, changes in sex drive or ability, irregular menstrual cycles, coordination problems and confusion.

medicines.name: CROMIDE FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Clidinium Bromide 2.5 mg, Chlordiazepoxide 5 mg & Dicyclomine Hydrochloride 10 mg
medicines.description: Cromide Forte contains Clidinium, Chlordiazepoxide & Dicyclomine, an antispasmodic drug that reduces the spasm in GI tract. Cromide Forte is used in pain associated with spasm as in cases of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).It is also used in psychosomatic disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are weakness or tiredness, excitement, anger, dry mouth, blurred vision or vision changes, constipation, nausea, changes in sex drive or ability, irregular menstrual cycles, coordination problems and confusion.

medicines.name: MEBIZID-C
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Mebeverine Hydrochloride 135 mg & Chlordiazepoxide 5 mg
medicines.description: Mebizid Spas tablets contain Mebeverine (anti-spasmodic) and chlordiazepoxide (anxiolytic & sedative). Mebizid Spas is indicated in irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), digestive problems due to stress, gastrointestinal spasms due to gastric and duodenal ulcers, Crohn?s disease, dysentery, biliary colic and other problems of digestive tract.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are sleepiness, drowsiness, fatigue, confusion, uncoordinated body movements, abnormality of voluntary movements, skin rash and slurred speech.

medicines.name: AQUA JOY MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate solution eq. to Chlorhexidine Gluconate 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc Chloride 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Joy mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate, an antibacterial agent; Sodium Fluoride, an anti-cavity agent & Zinc Chloride, to stop odour in mouth. Aqua Joy mouthwash is used for prevention of plaque in absence of brushing, prevention and treatment of swollen gums, treatment of minor oral infections, controlling secondary bacterial infections for mouth & gum ulcers besides aiding in treatment of mouth and throat infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effect observed.
medicines.dosage: Take a measure full or 15 ml of Aqua Joy mouthwash in your mouth & swish for one minute thoroughly. Do not rinse, eat or drink thereafter for 20 minutes. It is to be used under adult supervision for kids under 5 years of age. Do not swallow it, after swishing thoroughly spit out. Can be used twice daily once in the morning and then before retiring to bed.

medicines.name: DERMIFORD (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin 0.5% w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution eq. to Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiford cream contains Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness and swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic that relieves bacterial infections; Miconazole, an antifungal that treats fungal infections; and Chlorhexidine, an antiseptic that helps prevent or control skin infections caused by bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of resistant and secondary infections of skin caused by various different kinds of disease-causing germs.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effect.

medicines.name: LESEPTIC ANTISEPTIC LIQUID (125 ml & 500 ml)
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate solution 1.5% w/v & Cetrimide solution 3% w/v
medicines.description: Leseptic is a broad spectrum Bactericidal, Fungicidal & Virucidal liquid that has a rapid action, non stinging & skin friendly formula. Leseptic can be used for general purposes as a first aid measure for cuts, wounds, bruises & abrasions; for medical purposes in aseptic management of contaminated wound, gynaecological applications & as a First Aid measure & finally for Industrial purpose in Pharmaceutical, Food & Dairy industry for surface and general purpose disinfection.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerated, mild irritation may occur on concentrated use.
medicines.dosage: Medical Uses - Dilute Leseptic in 1:15 ratio with distill or clean water (warm is better) and apply on wound or required surface with cotton swabs. Industrial Uses - Dilute Leseptic in 1:4 ratio for floor mopping or surface disinfection.

medicines.name: TERABET-GM POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Miconazole Nitrate 2% w/w, Chlorhexidine Gluconate (20% sol.) 0.5% w/w, Allantoin 0.5% w/w & Zinc Oxide 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Terabet-GM powder contains Miconazole, an antifungal to treat fungal infections; Chlorhexidine, an antibacterial to cure bacterial infection; Allantoin a soothing agent & Zinc Oxide, a barrier forming antibacterial & soothing agent. It is prescribed for mixed skin infection or to prevent form mixed pathogens in cases of diaper rash, bed sores and other skin irritations such as burns, cuts & scrapes etc.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is very well tolerated, no known side effects.

medicines.name: SILVACURE+ (15 g/25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Silver Nitrate 0.2% w/w, Chlorhexidine Gluconate solution 0.2% w/w, Aloevera extract 15% w/w & Allantoin 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Silvacure+ (15 g/25 g) cream contains Silver Nitrate, Chlorhexidine Gluconate, Aloevera & Allantoin. Silver Nitrate & Chlorhexidine acts as antibacterial drugs; Aloevera acts as a skin nourisher & healer & Allantoin act as skin soother & healer. Silvacure+ is used for the treatment of surgical cuts, leg ulcers, pressure sores, abrasions, blisters, cracked skin, minor skin cuts, wounds, burns & for prophylaxis of infection at skin graft donor site.
medicines.sideEffects: Silvacure+ cream is very well tolerated and no side effects are noted.
medicines.dosage: Apply sufficient quantity of Silvacure+ cream after clean the infected surface two to three times daily for 7 to 10 days or even longer as per the requirement of the condition. Ideally it should not be covered after application.

medicines.name: BURNOSEPT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Silver Nitrate 0.2%, Chlorhexidine Gluconate 0.2%, Aloevera Extract 15% & Allantoin 0.1%
medicines.description: Burnosept Plus cream contains Silver nitrate & Chlorhexidine are antibacterial and antiseptic that kills germs whereas Aloevera & Allantoin are nourshing and soothing agent that heals and protects skin. Burnosept Plus cream is used for minor cuts, wounds, sores, insect bites, rashes, abrasions & first degree burns i.e. superficial burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, itching & redness are only noted side effects.

medicines.name: METNIZID-DG
medicines.composition: Each g contains Metronidazole 1% w/w, Chlorhexidine Gluconate Sol 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Metnizid DG gel is indicated for the infectious inflammatory diseases of paradontium and mucous membrane of the mouth cavity such as Chronic gingivitis, Acute gingivitis, Acute ulcerative gingivitis, Chronic Periodontitis, to prevent post extraction infections (Dry Sockets), recurrent Aphthous Stomatitis (Ulcer) & Dental pain due to infection.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects

medicines.name: DERMIFLEX (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin 0.5% w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution eq. to Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiflex cream contains Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness and swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic that relieves bacterial infections; Miconazole, an antifungal that treats fungal infections; and Chlorhexidine, an antiseptic that helps prevent or control skin infections caused by bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of resistant and secondary infections of skin caused by various different kinds of disease-causing germs.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effects.

medicines.name: DERMIFLOX (15 g & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin 0.5%w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiflox cream combines Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation, redness, and itching by blocking inflammatory chemicals. Neomycin is an antibiotic that stops bacterial growth by inhibiting protein synthesis. Miconazole Nitrate is an antifungal that kills fungi by damaging their cell membranes. Chlorhexidine is an antiseptic that kills microorganisms by disrupting the cell surface. It is used in the treatment of mixed skin infections involving both bacteria and fungi, especially those accompanied by inflammation, itching, and redness, such as infected eczema, dermatitis, and ringworm.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effect.

medicines.name: DANTOX MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Dantox Mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine, Sodium Fluoride, and Zinc, used to promote oral hygiene. Chlorhexidine helps reduce bacteria, while Sodium Fluoride strengthens tooth enamel and prevents cavities. Zinc helps reduce bad breath and plaque buildup. Together, they support healthy gums, freshen breath, and protect teeth from decay and gum disease, providing an effective addition to daily oral care.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects are tooth staining, change in taste, and hard dental plaque.
medicines.dosage: 10 ml twice a day after equally mixing with water or as prescribed by physician

medicines.name: ULTRADENT MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Ultradent Mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine, Sodium Fluoride, and Zinc, used to promote oral hygiene. Chlorhexidine helps reduce bacteria, while Sodium Fluoride strengthens tooth enamel and prevents cavities. Zinc helps reduce bad breath and plaque buildup. Together, they support healthy gums, freshen breath, and protect teeth from decay and gum disease, providing an effective addition to daily oral care.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects are tooth staining, change in taste, and hard dental plaque.
medicines.dosage: 10 ml twice a day after equally mixing with water or as prescribed by physician

medicines.name: LESEPTIC ANTISEPTIC SOAP
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution 2% w/w & Cetrimide 1% w/w
medicines.description: Leseptic Soap combines Chlorhexidine Gluconate and Cetrimide to provide powerful antiseptic cleansing. It effectively eliminates bacteria and helps prevent infections, making it ideal for daily hygiene and pre-operative skin preparation.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet skin, lather thoroughly, then rinse. Use as needed or advised by a healthcare professional.

medicines.name: LESEPTIC HANDRUB (100 ml & 500 ml)
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution 2.5% v/v eq. to Chlorhexidine Gluconate 0.5% w/v & Absolute Alcohol 70% v/v
medicines.description: Leseptic Handrub is an alcohol-based, broad-spectrum antimicrobial hand sanitizer designed for rapid and effective disinfection of hands. It effectively kills bacteria, fungi, and viruses without the need for water.Ideal for use when soap and water are not readily available.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. May cause mild dryness or irritation with frequent use in sensitive individuals.
medicines.dosage: Apply a sufficient amount of Leseptic Handrub (approx. 3–5 ml) onto palms. Rub hands together, covering all surfaces, including between fingers and around nails, until dry. Do not rinse. For external use only.

medicines.name: DANTOX MOUTH ULCER GEL
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine Gluconate 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w & Lignocaine 2% w/w
medicines.description: Dantox Mouth Ulcer Gel combines Chlorhexidine for antiseptic action, Metronidazole to combat anaerobic bacteria, and Lignocaine for local pain relief. It provides effective treatment for mouth ulcers, reducing infection, inflammation, and discomfort for faster healing.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated; may cause mild local irritation.

medicines.name: ORAFAST PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Chlorhexidine gluconate Solution Eq. to Chlorhexidine Guconate 1% w/w, Metronidazole Benzoate Eq. to Metronidazole 1% w/w & Lignocaine Hydrochloride 2% w/w
medicines.description: Orafast Plus is an oral gel that combines Chlorhexidine, an antiseptic; Metronidazole, an antimicrobial agent effective against anaerobic bacteria; and Lignocaine, a local anesthetic. This triple-action formulation is used for the treatment of oral infections, gingivitis, periodontitis, mouth ulcers, and pain relief associated with inflammatory oral conditions. It helps reduce bacterial load, promotes healing, and provides fast pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects may include temporary numbness, bitter taste, and mild irritation at the application site.

medicines.name: DERMIFRESH EXTRA COOL SOAP
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine, Vit.E, Glycerin, Menthol & Jojoba Ester
medicines.description: Dermifresh Extra Cool Soap combines Chlorhexidine’s antibacterial action with soothing Vitamin E, hydrating Glycerin, cooling Menthol, and nourishing Jojoba Ester. It cleanses thoroughly, refreshes skin, and helps maintain moisture balance while providing a cooling sensation.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use daily by applying to wet skin, lather, and rinse thoroughly. Suitable for all skin types.

medicines.name: OLERGEL PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Chlorhexidine Guconate 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w & Lignocaine 2% w/w
medicines.description: Olergel Plus contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate, an antiseptic; Metronidazole, an antibacterial agent; and Lignocaine, a local anesthetic. It is prescribed for the treatment of infected oral or skin wounds, ulcers, and painful inflammatory lesions by reducing infection, inflammation, and pain.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause mild burning, irritation, dryness, or redness at the application site; rarely, allergic reactions or numbness may occur

medicines.name: ULTRADENT MOUTH ULCER GEL
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine Gluconate 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w & Lignocaine 2% w/w
medicines.description: Chlorhexidine is an antiseptic that reduces bacterial load, Metronidazole is an antibiotic effective against anaerobic bacteria, and Lignocaine is a local anesthetic that relieves pain. This combination is used to treat mouth ulcers, gingivitis, and painful oral lesions by reducing infection, inflammation, and discomfort.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include a temporary burning or tingling sensation, altered taste, dryness, or irritation at the application site. Rarely, allergic reactions such as swelling, rash, or increased sensitivity may occur.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD DROPS
medicines.composition: Each 1 ml contains Phenylephrine 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine 2 mg
medicines.description: Criticold drops is a combination of Phenylephrine a decongestant and Chlorpheniramine a anti-allergic drug. It is used to treat symptoms of an allergy, cold, or sinus inflammation. It also helps to relieve runny nose, sneezing and congestion in the nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, throat, headache, loss of appetite, sleepy, stomach upset and nausea.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD KID DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine Maleate 1 mg & Paracetamol 125 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Kid drops is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a decongestant, Chlorpheniramine a anti-allergic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness

medicines.name: NEFCOZ EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorpheniramine maleate 0.2% w/v, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 0.12% w/v & Methylcellulose 0.02% w/v
medicines.description: Nefcoz eye drops contain actives that constricts eye's blood vessels, soothes & cools eye so as to decongests them, relives pain, redness, irritation, watery eyes besides soothing and clearing them (if something gets into eyes). It is prescribed for relief of the minor eye symptoms of itching and redness caused by dust, smoke, sun glare, ragweed, pollen, grass, animal hair and dander & controlling severe redness of eyes resulting from bacterial & allergic conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, blurred vision & increase in pressure of the eyes are the few side effects observed.

medicines.name: COLDMINE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Paracetamol 125 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 1 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine drops is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine an decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: COLDMINE SYRUP (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Paracetamol 125 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 1 mg & Sodium Citrate 60 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine an decongestant, Chlorpheniramine, Sodium Citrate and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: COLDMINE PLUS (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of Syrup contains Paracetamol 250 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine Plus syrup is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: KUFSHINA (60 ml & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg, Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 10 mg & Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Kufshina syrup contains a combination of three medicines namely Chlorpheniramine (Anti-histaminic), Dextromethorphan (Anti-tussive) and Phenylephrine (Decongestant). Kufshina is used in relief from dry cough, throat irritation, sneezing, watery eyes & stuffed nose due to an allergy or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: GALIREX JUNIOR (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg
medicines.description: Galirex Junior contains combination of two drugs namely Dextromethorphan (Anti-tussive) and Chlorpheniramine (Anti-histaminic). Galirex Junior is used in kids for relief of dry cough, sneezing, watery eyes and runny nose that is caused by certain infections of air passages (e.g. sinusitis, common cold).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: LEEKUF-SF
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 15 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2mg (SUGAR FREE)
medicines.description: Leekuf SF Syrup is a combination of three medicine namely Chlorpheniramine (Anti-histaminic), Dextromethorphan (Anti-tussive) and Phenylephrine (Decongestant). Leekuf SF Syrup is used in relief from dry cough, throat irritation, sneezing, watery eyes & stuffed nose due to an allergy or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: LEEREX-DX SYRUP (60 ml & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan 10 mg & Chlorpheniramine 4 mg
medicines.description: Leerex-DX Syrup contains combination of two drugs namely Dextromethorphan (Anti-tussive) and Chlorpheniramine (Anti-histaminic). Leerex-DX is used for relief of cough without phlegm (dry cough), sneezing, watery eyes, runny nose that is caused by certain infections of air passages (e.g. sinusitis, common cold).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Phenylephrine 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine 2 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Syrup is a combination of Phenylephrine a decongestant and Chlorpheniramine a anti-allergic drug. It is used to treat symptoms of an allergy, cold, or sinus inflammation. It also helps to relieve runny nose, sneezing and congestion in the nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, throat, headache, loss of appetite, sleepy, stomach upset and nausea.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD KID
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Paracetamol 125 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 1 mg & Sodium Citrate 60 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Kid syrup is a combination medicine which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Phenylephrine a decongestant and Chlorpheniramine & Sodium Citrate that effectively relieves symptoms of common cold such as blocked nose, runny nose, fever, watery eyes and sneezing, allergic rhinitis and nasal congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness

medicines.name: CRITICOLD PLUS
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorphenamine Maleate 2 mg & Paracetamol 250 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Plus syrup is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: DELODRYL JUNIOR
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg
medicines.description: Delodryl Junior syrup is a combination of two drugs namely Dextromethorphan (Anti-tussive) and Chlorpheniramine (Anti-histaminic). Delodryl Junior is used in kids for relief of dry cough, sneezing, watery eyes and runny nose that is caused by certain infections of air passages (e.g. sinusitis, common cold).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

Kufstil-SF Syrup is used to relieve cough caused by the common cold, smokers cough, Post-surgical cough and bronchitis. It is also used for chest congestion associated with Emphysema, Chronic Pulmonary obstructive disease (COPD) and other breathing illnesses.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Phenylephrine 12.5 mg , Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg & Caffeine 30 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine is a combination of four medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Coldmine helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: LEEFORD DIGITAL BLOOD PRESSURE MONITOR
medicines.composition: Digital Blood Pressure Monitor with Deflation Technology & Irregular Heart Beat Detection (Large Cuff Size-22-42 cm)
medicines.description: Leeford Digital Blood Pressure Monitor offers precise, easy-to-use monitoring at home or on-the-go. The irregular heartbeat detection feature alerts users to abnormal rhythms, helping with early awareness. Its large cuff ensures fit and accuracy for most adults.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Turn on Leeford Digital Blood Pressure Monitor Wrap cuff around upper arm, start the monitor, and get quick, reliable readings. Follow user manual for best results.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE-C2 TABLET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Sulphate 750 mg, Methylsulfonymethane 500 mg, Collagen Peptides Type-II 40 mg, Sodium Hyaluronate 30 mg, Vitamin C 35 mg & Vitamin D3 10 mcg (400 IU)
medicines.description: Glucozone C2 tablets contain Undenatured Collagen Type II for reformation of cartilage with Glucosamine, Methylsuphonyl methane, Sodium hyaluronate, Vitamin C and Vitamin D3.It helps in formation of tendons and cartilage in the joints. Glucozone C2 tablets are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis. Glucozone C2 improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of Glucozone-C2 to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated.

medicines.description: Omnipres-20 CH tablets contain Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Chlorthalidone, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The side effects of the combination are diarrhea, headache, increased sugar, hypertriglyceridemia, influenza-like symptoms & pharyngitis.

medicines.description: Venpres-40 AMC tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps blood & Chlorthalidone, a diuretic that acts by reducing blood volume. This combination is prescribed when single drug or dual drug combination alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are increased uric acid and fat in blood, dizziness, fatigue, coughing, nausea, fatigue, weakness, edema, face edema, lower limb edema, angioneurotic oedema, urticaria & hypersensitivity.

medicines.description: CILNIFORD TRIO tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker; Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB); and Chlorthalidone, a thiazide-like diuretic. This combination works by relaxing blood vessels and removing excess fluid from the body to effectively lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the treatment of hypertension, especially in patients requiring combination therapy for better blood pressure control.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, headache, fatigue, increased urination, electrolyte imbalance, muscle cramps, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.description: Acimol-MR Tablet contains Aceclofenac a NSAID, Chlorzoxazone a muscle relaxant and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic that is used to relieve pain and inflammation in conditions that affect muscles. Acimol-MR effectively relieves muscle stiffness or spasm, thereby improving muscle movement. It is indicated in Low back pain, acute muscle spasms, muscle spasms associated with spondylosis, muscular cramping & traumatic injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, heartburn, stomach pain, Diarrhea, loss of appetite, tiredness and sleepiness.

medicines.name: SUNSHADE-SPF 30 GEL
medicines.composition: Ultra Block SPF-30 Transparent Sunscreen Gel-Non Greasy Water Resistant
medicines.description: Leeford's SunShade SPF-30 Ultra Block Transparent Sunscreen Gel offers prolonged and consistent broad spectrum sun protection against the harmful UV-A and UV-B radiations. It provides complete sun protection, offers intense hydration with its broad spectrum water resistant formulation. It helps fight skin ageing caused due to free radicals induced by sun's radiation. SunShade is a non greasy formula that leaves no white residue, spreads easily over the skin thus also offering blue light protection. SunShade SPF-30 Ultra Block Transparent Sunscreen Gel helps avoid sun burns, sun tan & skin darkening in case of prolonged sun exposure. SunShade Gel also provides intense moisturization, nourishment & an even, non-shiny finish.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects are observed if used within the prescribed limits.
medicines.dosage: Squeeze appropriate quantity of SunShade SPF-30 Transparent Sunscreen Gel on fingertips and apply on freshly cleaned face, neck and arms at least 15 to 30 minutes prior to going out. Re-apply the gel after swimming, sweating, physical activity or after a prolonged exposure of more than 4-6 hours.

medicines.name: RECALMIN D3 DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contians Cholecalciferol 400 IU
medicines.description: Recalmin D3 drops contain Cholecalciferol which is the best form of Vitamin D. Recalmin D3 drops treats Vitamin D deficiency in children caused by inadequate exposure to sunlight and deficiency of Vitamin D in breast feeding mothers. It is effective in Calcium and Phosphorus absorption, building bones and strong teeth, increasing strength and functioning of muscles, enhancing immune system, promoting overall growth and development of kids.
medicines.sideEffects: Calcijoint D3 drops at normal doses usually has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

Recalmin D3 are indicated in the prevention and treatment of Vitamin D deficiency. It is also used in Ostomalacia, Rickets, Cardiovascular risk reduction, Diabetes, Osteoporosis, Pregnancy and Cancer prevention.

medicines.name: RECALMIN SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Calcium Carbonate 250 mg, Magnesium Hydroxide 75 mg, Zinc Gluconate 2 mg, Vitamin D3 200 I.U.
medicines.description: Recalmin Suspension provides Calcium, Magnesium, Zinc and Vitamin D3 which is used as supplement for various nutritional deficiencies. Recalmin is used to prevent and treat low blood calcium levels in people who do not get enough calcium from their diet. It is indicated in Osteomalacia, Pregnancy and lactation, rickets and in children to maintain healthy bones. Recalmin is also used in elderly people to keep bones healthy and strong, and is even effective in Chronic arthritis and Osteoporosis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may are diarrhea, constipation, upset stomach and abdominal pain.

medicines.name: RECALMIN PLUS
medicines.composition: Each 10 ml of suspension contains Calcium Phosphate eq to elemental Calcium 300 mg & elemental Phosphorus 150 mg, Magnesium Hydroxide eq. to elemental Magnesium 75 mg, Zinc Gluconate eq. to elemental Zinc 4 mg & Vit. D3 200 IU
medicines.description: Recalmin plus suspension contains Calcium Phosphate (calcium salt of phosphoric acid) which provides both Calcium and Phosphorus with Magnesium, Zinc and Vitamin D3.Recalmin Plus is used to prevent and treat low blood Calcium and Phosphorus levels in people who do not get enough from their diet. It is indicated in Osteomalacia, Pregnancy and lactation, rickets and in children to maintain healthy bones and teeth. It is an ideal Calcium and Phosphorus supplement for infants and growing children. medicines.name: CALZOWEL-XT

This medication is used to prevent or treat low blood calcium levels in people who do not get enough calcium from their diets. It may be used to treat conditions caused by low calcium levels such as bone loss (osteoporosis), weak bones (osteomalacia/rickets), decreased activity of the parathyroid gland (hypoparathyroidism), and a certain muscle disease (latent tetany). It may also be used in certain patients to make sure they are getting enough calcium (e.g., women who are pregnant, nursing, or postmenopausal, people taking certain medications such as phenytoin, phenobarbital, or prednisone).

medicines.sideEffects: This combination may cause mild side effects such as nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or headache. High doses can lead to allergic reactions, kidney issues, or interfere with blood sugar and mineral balance.

medicines.name: CILNEP TRIO
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-Trio tablet contains Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood; Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Chlorthalidone, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high blood pressure, when two drug combinations fail to exert its effect or are not adequate as in cases of refractory blood pressure.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, nasal congestion, flu, diarrhoea, throat infection, dizziness, nausea, electrolyte imbalance & back pain.

medicines.name: CILNEP-10
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood. It is prescribed for high blood pressure & heart pain besides other conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, nasal congestion, dyspepsia, sinusitis, flu syndrome, dizziness, increased creatine kinase enzyme, nausea & back pain.

medicines.name: CILNEP-CH
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-CH tablet contains Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood & Chlorthalidone, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high blood pressure besides other conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, nasal congestion, dyspepsia, sinusitis, flu syndrome, dizziness, electrolyte imbalance, nausea & back pain.

medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, nasal congestion, diarrhoea, throat infection, dizziness, nausea & back pain.

medicines.name: CILNEP-5

medicines.name: CILNEP-TM
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg, Cilnidipine 10 mg & Metopolol succinate (as extended release) 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 50 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-TM tablet contains Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood; Telmisartan, an Angiotensin receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Metoprolol, a beta blocker that act by reducing the number of times heart beats. It is prescribed for high blood pressure when single or double combination is not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, nasal congestion, diarrhoea, throat infection, dizziness, nausea & back pain.

medicines.name: CILNEP-M 50
medicines.composition: Each bilayered film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg & Metoprolol (ER) 50 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-M 50 tablets contains Cilnidipine and Metoprolol, which is used in managing hypertension and cardiovascular conditions. Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker helps relax blood vessels, improving blood flow while Metoprolol, a beta-blocker, reduces heart rate and lowers blood pressure. Together, they help control blood pressure and lowers the risk of heart-related complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, nausea, fatigue, dizziness, blurred vision, weakness, palpitations are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: CILNEP-N5 TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Nebivolol 5 mg & Cilnidipine 10 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-N5 tablets is a combination medicine consisting Cilnidipine and Nebivolol. Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker and Nebivolol a beta-blocker helps in managing hypertension. Cilnidipine relaxes blood vessels thus reducing blood pressure while Nebivolol slows heart rate and improves cardiac efficiency. The combination is highly effective in managing blood pressure levels and protects against heart-related complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include headache, slow heart rate, constipation, cold extremities, nausea, sleepiness, tiredness & palpitations.

medicines.name: CILNIFORD-5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 5 mg
medicines.description: CILNIFORD-5 tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that helps to relax blood vessels and lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the management of hypertension to reduce the risk of cardiovascular complications like stroke and heart attack.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, headache, flushing, palpitations, swelling of ankles or feet, and fatigue.

medicines.name: CILNIFORD-10
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg
medicines.description: CILNIFORD-10 tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that helps to relax blood vessels and lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the management of hypertension to reduce the risk of cardiovascular complications like stroke and heart attack.

This combination works by relaxing blood vessels to lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the effective management of hypertension and to reduce the risk of heart attack, stroke, and other cardiovascular complications.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, headache, fatigue, swelling of ankles, back pain, hypotension, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: CILNIFORD-TM

medicines.description: CILNIFORD-TM tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker; Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB); and Metoprolol Tartrate (ER), a beta-blocker. This triple combination works synergistically to relax blood vessels, reduce heart rate, and lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the effective management of moderate to severe hypertension and to reduce the risk of cardiovascular events.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, fatigue, slow heart rate, swelling of ankles, headache, cold extremities, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: CILNIFORD TRIO
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5 mg
medicines.description: CILNIFORD TRIO tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker; Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB); and Chlorthalidone, a thiazide-like diuretic. This combination works by relaxing blood vessels and removing excess fluid from the body to effectively lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the treatment of hypertension, especially in patients requiring combination therapy for better blood pressure control.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, headache, fatigue, increased urination, electrolyte imbalance, muscle cramps, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: STALOEASE-100 TABLET

It helps prevent the formation of blood clots, improves blood flow, and maintains the free-flowing of blood in your body.

medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of reconstituted suspension contains Amoxycillin 600 mg & Clavulanic Acid 42.9 mg
medicines.description: Evoxil-CV ES dry syrup is a combination containing Amoxycillin and Potassium Clavulanate & is used in the treatment of bacterial infections. Amoxycillin is a penicillin-type antibiotic that kills bacteria while Potassium Clavulanate inhibits bacterial resistance by tackling beta lactamases enzymes. Evoxil-CV ES is effective against a wide range of infections, including respiratory, ear, and urinary tract infections, improving overall treatment outcomes.
medicines.sideEffects: Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: CAVMOX-CV ES DRY SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of reconstituted suspension contains Amoxycillin 600 mg & Clavulanic Acid 42.9 mg

medicines.name: FRAPETERM-CV
medicines.composition: Each Film coated tablet contains Faropenem 200 mg & Clavulanic acid 125 mg
medicines.description: FRAPETERM-CV tablets contain Faropenem, a broad-spectrum oral beta-lactam antibiotic from the penem group, and Clavulanic Acid, a beta-lactamase inhibitor. This combination enhances antibacterial efficacy by inhibiting beta-lactamase enzymes, making it effective against a wide range of Gram-positive and Gram-negative bacteria. It is indicated for the treatment of respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and other bacterial infections resistant to conventional antibiotics.
medicines.sideEffects: FRAPETERM-CV is generally well tolerated. Common side effects may include nausea, diarrhea, abdominal pain, headache, and skin rash. In rare cases, allergic reactions or liver enzyme elevations may occur.

medicines.name: CROMIDE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Clidinium Bromide 2.5 mg & Chlordiazepoxide 5 mg
medicines.description: Cromide contains Clidinium, an anti-cholinergic that inhibits acid production in stomach and spasm in intestine and Chlordiazepoxide, an anxiolytic, sedative and appetite stimulating drug.Cromide tablets are indicated in psychological and extra-intestinal disturbances in gastrointestinal disorders. It is used with other medicines for treatment of peptic ulcers, irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and enterocolitis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are weakness or tiredness, excitement, anger, dry mouth, blurred vision or vision changes, constipation, nausea, changes in sex drive or ability, irregular menstrual cycles, coordination problems and confusion.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are weakness or tiredness, excitement, anger, dry mouth, blurred vision or vision changes, constipation, nausea, changes in sex drive or ability, irregular menstrual cycles, coordination problems and confusion.

medicines.name: CLINSOL-300 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each 2 ml ampoule contains Clindamycin Phosphate eq. to Clindamycin 300 mg i.e. 150 mg/ml
medicines.description: Clinsol-300 injection contains Clindamycin, a lincosamide antibiotic active against Gram-positive aerobes and a wide range of anaerobic bacteria. It binds to the 50S subunit of the bacterial ribosome to stop the early stages of protein synthesis. Clinsol-300 helps treat infections caused by susceptible Gram-positive & for the treatment of severe infections caused by susceptible anaerobic pathogens.
medicines.sideEffects: Pseudomembranous colitis, thrombophlebitis, rash & liver function test abnormality may occur.

medicines.name: CLINSOL-600 INJECTION

Chlorhexidine is an antiseptic that kills microorganisms by disrupting the cell surface. It is used in the treatment of mixed skin infections involving both bacteria and fungi, especially those accompanied by inflammation, itching, and redness, such as infected eczema, dermatitis, and ringworm.

It is also prescribed to eradicate fungal infection that causes a lightening or darkening of the skin at the neck, chest, arms or legs.

medicines.name: LEEZOLE POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clotrimazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Leezole powder contains Clotrimazole, an anti-fungal drug that inhibits the growth of fungus to treat infections. It is prescribed to treat skin infections such as athlete's foot, jock itch, ringworm and other fungal skin infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are stinging sensation, swelling, irritation, redness, pimple-like bumps, tenderness & flaking of the treated skin.
medicines.dosage: Clean the skin surface where you want to spray or dust the powder. Try to keep the area as much dry as possible after applying the powder or spray. Apply sufficient powder or spray to the area so as to cover the skin properly. Apply two to three times a day depending upon the place and severity of infection. Continue applying till there is complete remission of symptoms or there is no sign of infection, additionally apply at least two weeks after the complete eradication so as to remove the infection forever.

medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v, Beclomethasone 0.01% w/v & Benzocaine 1% w/v.

Leezole Plus mouth paint is prescribed for fungal infections of oral cavity in newly born, children & adults. It is also prescribed in oral fungal infections in adults using dentures, mouth, gum and cheek ulcers & blistering & also in immuno-compromised conditions such as AIDS, cancer, diabetes, TB & on broad spectrum antibacterial therapy.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, mild itching or an unpleasant sensation in the mouth may occur.

medicines.name: LEEZOLE SOAP
medicines.composition: Each soap contains Clotrimazole 1% w/w.
medicines.description: Leezole soap contains Clotrimazole, a potent antifungal compound that is highly effective against various skin infections. Leezole soap is tailored to treat skin infections caused by fungi such as jock itch, athlete's foot and ringworm. This specialized soap effectively cleanses while targeting and eliminating fungal pathogens on the skin's surface. It provides relief from symptoms like itching and irritation, promoting overall skin health and comfort.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects like skin irritation, allergic reactions, burning sensation, redness or swelling & dryness may occur.
medicines.dosage: For best results, apply Leezole soap to affected skin area after wetting the skin, then lather gently & leave it on for a few minutes. Rinse off thoroughly with warm water.

medicines.name: DIPROBAY-B LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v & Beclomethasone 0.025% w/v
medicines.description: Diprobay-B lotion contains Clotrimazole, an anti-fungal drug that inhibits the growth of fungus to treat infections & Beclomethasone, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness, irritation & swelling. It is prescribed to treat skin infections such as athlete's foot, jock itch, ringworm and other fungal skin infections. Diprobay-B lotion is also prescribed to eradicate fungal infection that causes a lightening or darkening of the skin at the neck, chest, arms or legs.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning sensation, itching, irritation, redness, pimple-like bumps, tenderness, or flaking of the treated skin may occur.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT TOTAL MOUTH PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v, Beclomethasone 0.01% w/v & Benzocaine 1% w/v.
medicines.description: Ultradent Total Mouth Paint contains Beclomethasone, Clotrimazole, and Benzocaine, a combination used in treating oral infections and inflammation. Beclomethasone is a corticosteroid that reduces swelling, Clotrimazole is an antifungal that treats fungal infections, and Benzocaine is a local anaesthetic that numbs the area in order to relieve pain. Ultradent Total mouth paint helps manage conditions like oral candidiasis, ulcers, and other mouth sores.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, mild itching or an unpleasant sensation in the mouth may occur.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT MOUTH PAINT
medicines.composition: Clotrimazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Clotrimazole 1% w/w mouth paint is an antifungal medication used to treat fungal infections in the mouth and throat, specifically oral thrush, caused by Candida species. It works by inhibiting the growth of yeast-like fungi, such as candida albicans ,by damaging their cell membranes.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include skin irritation (itching, redness, burning), changes in taste, and stomach upset. Less common but serious side effects can include allergic reactions.

medicines.name: DANTOX MOUTH PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v
medicines.description: Dantox Mouth Paint contains Clotrimazole, a broad-spectrum antifungal agent effective in the treatment of oral fungal infections, particularly oral candidiasis (thrush). It works by inhibiting the growth of fungi by disrupting the fungal cell membrane. This product is suitable for patients experiencing white patches, soreness, burning sensation, or discomfort in the mouth caused by fungal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Mild irritation or burning sensation may occur in rare cases. If irritation persists, discontinue use and consult a physician.

medicines.name: DANTOX TOTAL MOUTH PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clotrimazole 1% w/v, Beclomethasone 0.01% w/v & Benzocaine 1% w/v.

Beclomethasone is a corticosteroid that reduces swelling, Clotrimazole is an antifungal that treats fungal infections, and Benzocaine is a local anaesthetic that numbs the area in order to relieve pain. Dantox Total mouth paint helps manage conditions like oral candidiasis, ulcers, and other mouth sores.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, mild itching or an unpleasant sensation in the mouth may occur.

medicines.name: EARWEL ULTRA
medicines.composition: Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/v, Neomycin 0.5% w/v & Clotrimazole 1% w/v
medicines.description: Earwel Ultra combines Beclomethasone Dipropionate, a potent corticosteroid to reduce inflammation and itching, with Neomycin, an antibiotic effective against bacterial infections, and Clotrimazole, an antifungal agent. This combination effectively treats mixed bacterial and fungal ear infections while soothing irritation and swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness. flaking of skin, stinging sensation, burning sensation. itching sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: AQUAEAR ULTRA
medicines.composition: Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/v, Neomycin 0.5% w/v & Clotrimazole 1% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Ear Ultra formulation contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate, Neomycin and Clotrimazole. Beclomethasone is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation, Neomycin is an antibiotic that treats bacterial infections, and Clotrimazole is an antifungal that targets fungal infections. This combination is used to treat mixed ear infections involving bacteria, fungi, and inflammation, such as otitis externa.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild ear irritation, burning, itching, or redness. Rarely, allergic reactions like rash, swelling, or hearing changes may occur.

medicines.name: E-WOK PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Soft gelatin capsule contains Wheat Germ oil 100 mg, Cod Liver oil 100 mg, Tocotrienols (50%) 30 mg, Vitamin B6 1.5 mg & Folic acid 117.64 mcg

Wheat germ oil is rich in vitamin E, particularly tocopherols and tocotrienols, which possess antioxidant properties. Cod liver oil provides omega-3 fatty acids EPA and DHA, which are beneficial for cardiovascular health. Tocotrienols have been studied for their potential role in reducing oxidative stress and supporting cellular health. Vitamin B6 is involved in neurotransmitter synthesis and metabolic processes, while folic acid is crucial for DNA synthesis and repair.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 Capsule daily after a meal, preferably with water.

medicines.name: SPERMRICH

medicines.sideEffects: Spermrich generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: COZYRICH-Q10

It is also used before reproductive techniques for optimizing DNA quality and testis surgery to increase sperm count, movement and quality.
medicines.sideEffects: Cozyrich Q10 tablets generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or?Pharmacist?promptly.

medicines.name: WELTIVE- Q10 FORTE

It relieves red, irritated, itchy, watery eyes, sneezing, and runny nose caused by allergies, irritants in the air, and hay fever. It may also be used to relieve the itching of allergic skin conditions, and to treat hives, including hives caused by exposure to cold temperatures and by rubbing the skin. It is off labelly used to treat loss of appetite.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, and throat, drowsiness, dizziness, nausea, chest congestion, headache, excitement (especially in children) and muscle weakness

It is often used to help individuals with poor appetite, undernutrition, or unintentional weight loss. By blocking certain serotonin and histamine receptors, Cyproheptadine enhances hunger signals and promotes healthy weight gain. Additionally, it may provide relief from allergy-related symptoms such as sneezing, itching, and watery eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, and throat, drowsiness, dizziness, nausea, chest congestion, headache, excitement (especially in children) and muscle weakness.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, and throat, drowsiness, dizziness, nausea, chest congestion, headache, excitement (especially in children) and muscle weakness.

medicines.name: GEOFIT MASS GAINER (CHOCOLATE)
medicines.composition: Weight gain protein powder
medicines.description: Geofit Mass Gainer is an ideal way to gain weight & muscle mass for a healthy build up up by an individual or a bodybuilder. Geofit Mass Gainer contains a rich blend of carbohydrates; Whey protein & BCAA for the right build-up of body. It strengthens the body & fastens the building of muscle mass and fulfils the nutritional requirement of body. Geofit Mass gainer is available in three different flavors i.e. Banana, Mango & Chocolate.
medicines.sideEffects: Excessive weight gain & Indigestion
medicines.dosage: Add 3.33 large scoops of Geofit Mass Gainer (100 g) to 500 ml of water or full fat milk & shake for 30 seconds and consume 30 minutes pre or post workout. Else can be consumed as first thing in the day on empty stomach also.

medicines.name: HAVIMOIST EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Sodium Hyaluronate 0.18% w/v
medicines.description: Havimoist eye drop contains Sodium Hyaluornate, act as eye lubricant and prevent eye dryness & irritation. Havimoist eye drop is used to relieve dry, irritated and discomforted eyes due to wind, sun, heating/air conditioning, computer use, long reading, two wheeler driving without eye protection and certain medications. It is also used as a tear substitute & to prevent above mentioned problem of eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Vision may be temporarily blurred as well as burning/stinging/irritation may temporarily occur & are the main side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wash your hands before using Havimoist eye drops. Do not touch the container tip to the eye, lid, or other parts of the body or any other surface. Put the cap back on after you are done using your dose. Tilt your head back and put drops into the eye/s as required. Keep eyes close for few moments and rotate them while close so as to lubricate the entire eye ball thoroughly. Do not use if the solution is cloudy, leaking, has particles & if solution changes colour while using. Havimoist Drops can be used as frequently as required, generally one to two drops in eye/s 4 to 6 times per day can be used or advised by ophthalmologist.

medicines.name: ACTIHAIR PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 10 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 50 mg, Calcium Pantothenate 100 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to elemental Selenium 65 mcg , Cupric Oxide eq. to elemental Copper 3 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg

It is prescribed for general growth & well-being, chronic diseases & for maintenance of healthy hair, skin and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach discomfort, pain and bloating are the few observed side effects.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-CT PLUS

medicines.description: This combination supports joint and bone health by reducing inflammation, promoting cartilage repair, and enhancing mobility. Glucosamine, chondroitin, and MSM help maintain joint structure, while cholecalciferol, calcium ascorbate, and multiminerals support bone strength, calcium absorption, and collagen synthesis for overall musculoskeletal health
medicines.sideEffects: This combination may cause mild side effects such as nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or headache. High doses can lead to allergic reactions, kidney issues, or interfere with blood sugar and mineral balance.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet per day, preferably with food to improve absorption and minimize gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE C2 PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Soft gelatin capsule contains Rosehip Oil 400 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate 250 mg, Curcuminoid 100 mg, Chondroitin Sulphate 50 mg, Boswellia Serrata 50 mg, Undenatured Type-II Collagen 40 mg & Hyaluronic Acid 20 mg
medicines.description: Glucozone C2 Plus softgel contain Undenatured Collagen Type II for reformation of cartilage with Glucosamine, Methylsuphonyl methane, Sodium hyaluronate, for the formation of cartilage & tendon as well as Curcumin & Rosehip extract for pain and inflammation. Thus Glucozone C2 Plus softgel offers a complete package for joint health. It helps in formation of tendons and cartilage in the joints. Glucozone C2 Plus softgel are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis associated with marked inflammation. Glucozone C2 Plus improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One softgel of Glucozone-C2 Plus to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. Once started it should be given for at least one month to have an effective result.

medicines.name: CARTNIREST-C2 TABLETS

medicines.description: Cartnirest C2 tablets contain UC II (Undenatured type II Collagen) which is joint specific Collagen, Rose hip extract, Vitamin D3 and Curcumin. Carnirest C2 is indicated for the treatment of Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid arthritis, Tendinopathy and Tendonitis. It helps to rebuild cartilage and reduces pain, stiffness and inflammation in joints hence increases mobility and flexibility in Arthritis
medicines.sideEffects: Cartnirest C2 tablets at normal doses usually has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.
medicines.dosage: One tablet once or twice daily.

medicines.name: CURCUFLAM TABLET

medicines.description: Curcuflam tablets contain Haldi (Curcuma longa), providing Curcumin for its strong anti-inflammatory and antioxidant benefits, and Marica (Piper nigrum), which supplies Piperine to significantly enhance curcumin's absorption. This combination synergistically supports joint health, reduces inflammation, and boosts overall well-being.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, the only reported side effects are GI discomfort.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of the Curcuflam 2 to 3 times daily for at least 15 days to months together, depending upon the treating condition. Curcuflam tablets should be used by individuals 12 year of age & above.

E, nourishes skin and revitalize it; Vit C, Papain & Liquorice extract stops melanin production, removes blemishes and brightens skin & Glycerin moisturizes it for overall glow and shine. It is used for having lighten, brighten & spotless glowing skin.

medicines.description: Acnetoin Neem & Turmeric Soap is a natural formulation enriched with Neem and Turmeric, both known for their powerful antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Neem helps fight acne-causing bacteria and soothes irritated skin, while Turmeric reduces redness, inflammation, and promotes healing. medicines.name: CATAFORD EYE DROPS

medicines.description: Cataford eye drop contains Potassium Iodide, Calcium Chloride & Sodium Chloride; all of which are electrolytes and is responsible for lens clarity & pressure within them so as to prevent Cataract. medicines.sideEffects: Mild eye irritation is the only reported side effects.

medicines.name: EYECON
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorpheniramine Maleate 0.2% w/v, Phenylephrine HCL 0.12% w/v, Methylcellulose 0.02% w/v Phenyl mercuric Nitrate 0.001 % w/v (as preservative)

medicines.sideEffects: It is very well tolerated; the only observed side effects are nasal irritation & burning sensation. On topical application for itching it might cause mild skin irritation.

At the max can use every 6 hours i.e. 4 times a day. It can be safely used by children over 3 years, use half the content of softgel for up to 6 years.

medicines.name: MELAMINE LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Calamine 8% w/v, Diphenhydramine Hydrochloride 1% w/v & Camphor 0.1% w/v
