It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effect.
medicines.dosage: Before using, shake the bottle well. Thoroughly wash the affected area with water. Gently dab Melamine on the skin using cotton or your fingers. Ensure that it dries on the skin while covering the affected area. Do not rub or massage Melamine into the skin or apply on an open wound. Melamine can be applied 3 to 4 times a day, continuously for 2 weeks or even more.

medicines.name: NOZCALM SOFT GEL
medicines.composition: Each soft gel capsule contains Camphor 25 mg, Chlorothymol 5 mg, Eucalyptol Oil 125 mg, Menthol 55 mg & Terpineol 120 mg.
medicines.description: Nozcalm inhalant soft gel is a combination medicine which contains Camphor, Chlorothymol, Eucalyptol Oil, Menthol and Terpineol Oil. Nozcalm inhalant soft gels helps relieve nasal congestion and supports respiratory health. The active ingredients offers soothing effects, helping to clear the airways and promote easier breathing. Nozcalm is ideal for cold or seasonal allergies as it provide a convenient, fast-acting way to ease discomfort and support overall respiratory well-being.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, drowsiness, running nose, watery eyes, itching are some of the side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: ETAZYME
medicines.composition: Each sugar coated tablet contains Fungal Diastase (1:800) 100 mg, Papain 60 mg & Activated Charcoal 75 mg
medicines.description: Etazyme tablets contains Fungal diastase which is a potent enzyme complex, used as effective digestive aid, and digests (or breakdown) carbohydrates, Papain helps in protein digestion by breaking larger molecules into smaller one & Activated charcoal helps to bind unwanted substances and toxins in the stomach and flush them out of the body. Etazyme tablets are used for functional dyspepsia and other gastrointestinal disorders characterized by symptoms of bloating, belching, flatulence, abdominal discomfort or feeling of abdominal fullness.
medicines.sideEffects: It is well tolerated only observed side effects are diarrhea, abdominal pain or cramps and nausea.
medicines.dosage: Two tablets to be taken together after each major meal.

medicines.name: CLINSOL ANTI ACNE FW
medicines.composition: Charcoal, Glycolic Acid, Aloevera, Vit E & Triclosan Gel Base Face Wash
medicines.description: Clinsol Anti Acne FW is a gel-based face wash formulated with charcoal, glycolic acid, aloe vera, vitamin E, and triclosan. It deeply cleanses pores, exfoliates dead skin cells, reduces acne-causing bacteria, and soothes irritation, leaving the skin clear, refreshed, and balanced without over-drying.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet face, gently massage in circular motions, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily

medicines.name: ELOSONE HT SCRUB BAR
medicines.composition: Charcoal, Mint Oil, Glycerin With Coffee Scrub Soap
medicines.description: Elosone HT Scrub Bar combines charcoal’s deep cleansing, mint oil’s refreshing coolness, glycerin’s hydration, and coffee scrub’s exfoliating properties. It effectively removes dirt, dead skin cells, and excess oil, leaving skin smooth, refreshed, and revitalized.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use daily or as directed; lather on wet skin, gently scrub, and rinse thoroughly.

medicines.name: CUREWAX
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Paradichlorobenzene 2% w/v, Benzocaine 2.7% w/v, Chlorobutol 5% w/v & Turpentine oil 15% v/v
medicines.description: Curewax ear drops contain Paradichlorobenzene, Benzocaine, Chlorobutanol & Turpentine oil which together acts synergistically in all-purpose ear drops that eliminates bacterial and fungal infections, eliminates pain & dissolves wax to remove it. It is prescribed for removal of excessive wax from ear canal, to treat milder infections and to stop pain due to any reason within the ear.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, dizziness & earache may occur while using Curewax ear drops.

medicines.name: CISOHEAL FRAC
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis 750 mg, Calcium carbonate 625 mg eq. to elemental Calcium 250 mg, Vitamin D3 400 IU & Vitamin K2 45 mcg.
medicines.description: Cisoheal Frac tablet contains Hadjor (Cissus quadrangularis), a herb proven to accelerate the fracture healing and bone strengthening which is fortified with Calcium, Vitamin D & Vitamin K2 for better healing and also provide necessary nutrients for bone health. Thus it is necessary for fracture healing & bone strength apart from other uses.
medicines.sideEffects: Few side effects are gas, diarrhea, dry mouth, headaches and insomnia.
medicines.dosage: Take one tablet daily, with or after a meal, or as directed by your physician. Swallow the tablet whole with water. Do not crush or chew.

medicines.name: CISOHEAL FRAC PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis 750 mg, Withania somnifera 100 mg, Moringa oleifera 100 mg & Rose Hip extract 50 mg
medicines.description: Cisoheal Frac Plus tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis (Hadjor), Withania somnifera (Ashwagandha), Moringa oleifera (Sehjan) & Rose Hip extract. Cisojoint Plus accelerates the fracture healing and bone strengthening. It increases bone strength & eases joint inflammation. It is also prescribed to treat Arthritis & heals damaged bones. Cisojoint Plus tablets also regulate menstrual cycle in females.
medicines.sideEffects: Few side effects are gas, diarrhoea, dry mouth, headache and insomnia.
medicines.dosage: Take one tablet daily, with or after a meal, or as directed by your physician. Swallow the tablet whole with water. Do not crush or chew.

medicines.name: CISOJOINT
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis 750 mg, Calcium carbonate 625 mg eq. to elemental Calcium 250 mg, Vitamin D3 400 IU & Vitamin K2 45 mcg.
medicines.description: Cisojoint tablet contains Hadjor (Cissus quadrangularis), a herb proven to accelerate the fracture healing and bone strengthening which is fortified with Calcium, Vitamin D & Vitamin K2 for better healing and also provide necessary nutrients for bone health. Thus it is necessary for fracture healing & bone strength apart from other uses.
medicines.sideEffects: Few side effects are gas, diarrhea, dry mouth, headache and insomnia.
medicines.dosage: Take one tablet daily after a meal.

medicines.name: CISOJOINT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis 750 mg, Withania somnifera 100 mg, Moringa oleifera 100 mg & Rose Hip extract 50 mg
medicines.description: Cisojoint Plus tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis (Hadjor), Withania somnifera (Ashwagandha), Moringa oleifera (Sehjan) & Rose Hip extract. Cisojoint Plus accelerates the fracture healing and bone strengthening. It increases bone strength & eases joint inflammation. It is also prescribed to treat Arthritis & heals damaged bones. Cisojoint Plus tablets also regulate menstrual cycle in females.
medicines.sideEffects: Few side effects are gas, diarrhoea, dry mouth, headache and insomnia.
medicines.dosage: Take one tablet daily after meal.

medicines.name: CARTNIREST-C2 PLUS CAPSULES
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatine capsule contains Boswellia Serrata Ext. 125 mg, Undenatured Type II collagen 40 mg, Hyaluronic acid 50 mg, Curcuma longa ext. 75 mg, Piperine 2.5 mg & Cissus Quadrangularis 75 mg
medicines.description: Cartnirest-C2 Plus capsules is a potent combination of Boswellia serrata ext., Cissus quadrangularis ext., Hyaluronic acid and Piperine which assists in supporting joint health and flexibility. The ingredients Boswellia serrata and Cissus quadrangularis are known for their anti-inflammatory attributes and their ability to promote joint comfort. Hyaluronic acid aids in joint lubrication, while piperine enhances nutrient absorption for maximum effectiveness. Cartnirest-C2 Plus capsules are ideal for those seeking a comprehensive approach to joint support and overall wellness.
medicines.sideEffects: Cartnirest C2 Plus capsules at recommended dose has no side effects usually. If you have any unusual effects, contact your Doctor or Pharmacist promptly.
medicines.dosage: One capsule a day after meal or as directed by the physician

medicines.name: CABERFORD-0.5
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Cabergoline 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Caberford 0.25 tablets contain Cabergoline, a Dopaminergic receptor agonist that exerts direct inhibitory effect on Prolactin secretion. Caberford inhibits excessive secretion of Prolactin and thus improves associated complications of Infertility, menstrual irregularity, breast enlargement. Caberford is indicated in the treatment of abnormal secretion of breast milk, Hyperprolactinemia and its complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, bloating, cold sweats & tingling on the hands & feet.

medicines.name: VELNOCRAN SOLUTION
medicines.composition: Each 15 ml of solution contains Cranberry extract 200 mg, D-Mannose 300 mg & Potassium Magnesium Citrate 978 mg eq. to Potassium 273.84 mg & Magnesium 41.56 mg.
medicines.description: Velnocran solution is either used alone or in combination with other medications to prevent & treat UTI, kidney stones & for urinary alkalinization. It prevents the adhesion of the disease causing bacteria in the urinary tract and lowers the raised pH of the urine to induce urinary alkalosis.
medicines.sideEffects: It is highly tolerated and at prescribed dosage side effects are rare. But occasional gastrointestinal upset like nausea, bloating or gas & Allergic reactions such as rash, itching, swelling, dizziness or difficulty breathing may occur.
medicines.dosage: 15 to 30 ml twice daily for 7 to 14 days.

medicines.name: VELNOCRAN TABLET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains D-Mannose 600 mg & Cranberry Ext. 300 mg
medicines.description: Velnocran tablets contains Cranberry along with D-Mannose that is used to support urinary tract health. Cranberry helps prevent urinary tract infections (UTIs) by preventing bacteria from adhering to the bladder walls, while D-Mannose is a natural sugar that may help flush out harmful bacteria. Together, they promote urinary tract wellness and reduce the risk of infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Occasional gastrointestinal upset like nausea, bloating or gas & allergic reactions such as rash, itching, swelling, dizziness or difficulty breathing may occur.
medicines.dosage: One (1) tablet twice a day or as directed by physician

medicines.name: PIMESPECT-1 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Cefepime 1000 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Pimespect-1 injections contains Cefepime, a broad-spectrum fourth generation (cephalosporin) antibiotic used in treating severe bacterial infections. Cefepime works by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis. Pimespect-1 injection is effective against a wide range of organisms, including Gram-positive and Gram-negative bacteria & is administered intravenously in hospitals under medical supervision to combat infections such as pneumonia, urinary tract infections, and septicemia.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea & vomiting, injection site reactions, diarrhea, headache, allergic reactions & fever are some of the side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: CILASMIN INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Imipenem 500 mg & Cilastatin 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cilasmin injection contains Imipenem and Cilastatin, a broad-spectrum antibiotics used in treating serious infections caused by susceptible bacteria. Imipenem is a carbapenem that inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis, while Cilastatin prevents the breakdown of imipenem in the kidneys thus enhancing its effectiveness. The combination is effective against a wide range of gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria, making it significant for severe infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Allergic reactions, breathing issues, dizziness, confusion, irregular heartbeat & change in blood pressure are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: VEBIOTIC PLUS CAPSULES
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Streptococcus faecalis 30 million CFU, Clostridium butyricum 2 million CFU, Bacillus mesentericus 1 million CFU & Lactic acid bacillus 50 million CFU
medicines.description: Vebiotic Capsule is a combination of Probiotics and Prebiotic. It helps to improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), prevents and treats diarrhea, helps maintain and restores the normal balance of intestinal flora thus beneficial for digestion and immunity. It is also effective to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Some people experience gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Vebiotic Plus

medicines.name: CAVMOX-CL
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Amoxycillin 250 mg & Cloxacillin 250 mg
medicines.description: CAVMOX-CL Capsule is a combination medicine containing amoxycillin and cloxacillin as active ingredients. It belongs to a class of medicines called antibiotics. It is used for the treatment of various types of bacterial infections like respiratory tract infection like asthma, COPD or sinusitis, urinary tract infection, ENT (ear, nose, throat) infection, skin infections, bone and joint infection
medicines.sideEffects: Allergic reactions like skin rash, urge to scratch, Nausea, Vomiting, Stomach pain, Diarrhoea

medicines.name: EVOXIL – CL
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Amoxycillin 250 mg & Cloxacillin 50 mg
medicines.description: Evoxil-CL contains Amoxicillin which is a broad-spectrum penicillin that inhibits bacterial cell wall synthesis & Cloxacillin, a penicillinase-resistant penicillin effective against beta-lactamase-producing staphylococci. Together, they provide enhanced coverage against a range of pathogens & used to treat various bacterial infections, including respiratory tract infections, skin infections, urinary tract infections, and osteomyelitis.
medicines.sideEffects: This combination is generally well-tolerated, but potential side effects include nausea, diarrhea, allergic reactions & abdominal discomfort

medicines.name: WALCOBAL PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Softgelatin capsule contains Benfotiamine 150 mg, Mecobalamin 1500 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 100 mg, Inositol 100 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, El. Chromium 200 mcg & El. Selenium 55 mcg
medicines.description: Walcobal Plus is a nutraceutical formulation designed to support nerve health and metabolic function. It contains Benfotiamine and Mecobalamin for nerve regeneration, Alpha Lipoic Acid as a potent antioxidant, and essential micronutrients like Inositol, Folic Acid, Chromium, and Selenium to support glucose metabolism and cellular repair. It is used as an adjunct in the management of diabetic neuropathy and related nerve disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well-tolerated. Mild gastrointestinal discomfort or allergic reactions may occur in sensitive individuals.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-CT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Hydrochloride 750 mg, Methylsufonyl Methane 250 mg, Chondroitin sulphate sodium 100 mg, Vitamin C 40 mg, Vitamin D3 200 IU, Zinc 4 mg, Manganese 3 mg, Copper 0.5 mg, Boron 0.5 mg, Selenium 40 mcg & Chromium 33 mcg
medicines.description: This combination supports joint and bone health by reducing inflammation, promoting cartilage repair, and enhancing mobility. Glucosamine, chondroitin, and MSM help maintain joint structure, while cholecalciferol, calcium ascorbate, and multiminerals support bone strength, calcium absorption, and collagen synthesis for overall musculoskeletal health
medicines.sideEffects: This combination may cause mild side effects such as nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or headache. High doses can lead to allergic reactions, kidney issues, or interfere with blood sugar and mineral balance.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet per day, preferably with food to improve absorption and minimize gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT CLOVE OIL
medicines.composition: Clove Oil
medicines.description: Ultradent Clove Oil is a pure, natural oil derived from clove buds, known for its powerful analgesic and antiseptic properties. Traditionally used in dental care, it provides rapid relief from toothache, gum irritation, and minor mouth infections. Its soothing and antimicrobial action makes it ideal for temporary dental discomfort and oral hygiene support.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated when used topically. May cause a burning sensation or irritation in sensitive individuals or if applied excessively.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount using a cotton swab directly to the affected tooth or gum area. Use with caution and avoid ingestion. Not intended for prolonged use without dental supervision.

medicines.name: LYCORIFT PLUS SG
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains Lycopene 10% 6000 mcg, Green Tea Ext. 30% 300 mg, DL- Methionine 50 mg, Vit. B6 1.9 mg, Grape Seed Ext. 90% 15 mg, Vit.C 40 mg, Cyanocobalamin 1 mcg & Vit E 10 mg
medicines.description: Lycorift Plus soft gel contains Lycopene, green tea, and grape seed extracts acting as potent antioxidants, neutralizing harmful free radicals to protect cells from oxidative stress damage. Vitamins C and E enhance this protection, while B vitamins and DL-Methionine support cellular energy production and metabolism, aiding detoxification and overall cell function. Lycorift Plus soft gel is indicated in general weakness, decreased immunity, Pre-eclampsia (high blood pressure in pregnancy), IUGR (low growth of baby in pregnancy), Premature ageing, cardiovascular diseases and male infertility and Gingivitis.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Take softgel once daily, preferably with or after a meal, to support overall health, boost immunity, and combat oxidative stress. Always follow specific instructions from healthcare provider.

medicines.name: DANTOX RESTORE MINERALS TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Calcium Sodium Phosphosilicate 5% w/w (BIOACTIVE GLASS TOOTHPASTE)
medicines.description: Dantox Restore Minerals toothpaste contains 5% Calcium Sodium Phosphosilicate, a bioactive glass that helps remineralize and repair tooth enamel, reduce sensitivity, and protect against decay. It promotes long-lasting oral health and stronger teeth.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects & safe to use.
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of product onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT RESTORE MINERALS TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Calcium Sodium Phophosilicate 5% (Bioactive Glass Toothpaste)
medicines.description: Calcium Sodium Phophosilicate helps repair enamel, reduce sensitivity, and protect against cavities by releasing calcium and phosphate ions. This toothpaste is ideal for strengthening enamel, relieving dentin hypersensitivity, and promoting long-term oral health.
medicines.sideEffects: Well tolerated. Rarely, mild gum irritation or sensitivity may occur. Discontinue use if adverse reactions develop.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount of toothpaste onto your toothbrush and brush gently for 2 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water. Use twice daily for best results. Avoid swallowing and consult a dentist if irritation occurs.

medicines.description: Dapaford-10 M and Dapaford-10 M forte tablets contain Dapagliflozin and Metformin in extended release form. Both these are anti-diabetic drugs that act synergistically to offer better diabetic control based on the requirement. It is prescribed for type II diabetes patients.

medicines.description: Dapaford-10 T tablet contains Dapagliflozin & Teneligliptin. Dapagliflozin belongs to SGLT2 class of drug that acts by removing sugar from the body via urine to lower its level in blood. Teneligliptin is a DPP4 inhibitor that works by acting on the intestinal enzyme to control Diabetes. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control, exercise & other drugs to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Low sugar levels, dizziness, headache, constipation, diarrhea, fever, painful urination, repetitive urination, inflammation of penis, urinary tract infections & allergic reactions may occur in patients.

medicines.name: DAPAFORD-LN 5
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg & Linagliptin 5 mg
medicines.description: Dapaford-LN 5 is a Type-II anti diabetic medication which contains Dapagliflozin, acts by removing sugar from the body via urine to lower its level in blood & Linagliptin, a DPP4 inhibitor that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control diabetes. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control, exercise & other drugs to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Low sugar levels, painful urination, repetitive urination, inflammation of penis, urinary tract infection & allergic reaction may occur in patients.

medicines.name: DAPZIGARD-GM 2 FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg, Glimepiride 2 mg & Metformin (ER) 1000 mg.
medicines.description: Dapzigard-GM 2 Forte tablets contains Dapagliflozin, Metformin and Glimepiride. The combination of these three medications helps in managing type 2 diabetes effectively. Dapagliflozin helps lower blood sugar by promoting glucose excretion via urine, Metformin improves insulin sensitivity and reduces glucose production in the liver & Glimepiride stimulates insulin release from the pancreas to further regulate blood sugar levels. Together, these medications provide comprehensive control over glucose levels in patients with type 2 diabetes, helping to maintain stable blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of complications associated with diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Low sugar levels, painful urination, repetitive urination, inflammation of penis, urinary tract infection & allergic reaction may occur in patients.

medicines.name: DAPAFORD-GM 2 FORTE

medicines.name: DAPAFORD-GM 2
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Dapaglifozin 10 mg , Glimepride 2mg and Metformin (ER) 500 mg
medicines.description: Dapaford-GM 2 tablets contains Dapagliflozin, Metformin and Glimepiride. The combination of these three medications helps in managing type 2 diabetes effectively. Dapagliflozin helps lower blood sugar by promoting glucose excretion via urine, Metformin improves insulin sensitivity and reduces glucose production in the liver & Glimepiride stimulates insulin release from the pancreas to further regulate blood sugar levels. Together, these medications provide comprehensive control over glucose levels in patients with type 2 diabetes, helping to maintain stable blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of complications associated with diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: May include hypoglycemia (especially due to Glimepiride), urinary tract infections, genital mycotic infections, gastrointestinal disturbances, and rarely lactic acidosis with Metformin. Always monitor renal function and blood glucose levels regularly.

medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg, Glimepiride 2 mg & Metformin (ER) 500 mg

medicines.name: DAPZIGARD-S 50
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg & Sitagliptin 50 mg
medicines.description: Dapzigard-S 50 Tablets contains Sitagliptin which is a Dipeptidyl Peptidase-4(DPP-4) inhibitor and Dapagliflozin, a new class of drug that removes sugar from the body via urine to lower its level in blood. Dapzigard-S 50 is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
medicines.sideEffects: Stuffed or runny nose, sore throat, headache, diarrhoea and nausea

medicines.name: DAPAFORD-S 50
medicines.composition: Each Film coated tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg & Sitagliptin 50 mg
medicines.description: DAPAFORD-S 50 tablets contain Dapagliflozin, a sodium-glucose co-transporter 2 (SGLT2) inhibitor, and Sitagliptin, a dipeptidyl peptidase-4 (DPP-4) inhibitor. This combination helps lower blood sugar levels in patients with type 2 diabetes by increasing glucose excretion through urine and enhancing insulin secretion. It is prescribed to improve glycemic control along with diet and exercise.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include urinary tract infections, genital infections, headache, nasopharyngitis, increased urination, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: BIGFUN-36 Gold
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tadalafil 10 mg & Dapoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Dapoxetine 30 mg
medicines.description: Bigfun 36 gold tablets contain Tadalafil a PDE inhibitor and Dapoxetine a SSRI and the combination is indicated for the treatment of erectile dysfunction and premature ejaculation in adult men.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, red or flushed face, indigestion, stuffy nose, sweating, dizziness or light headedness, confusion and muscle aches.

medicines.name: LONG DRIVE DS GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dapoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Dapoxetine 60 mg & Sildenafil Citrate eq. to Sildenafil 100 mg
medicines.description: Long drive gold tablets contain Sildenafil a PDE inhibitor and Dapoxetine a SSRI and the combination is indicated for the treatment of Erectile dysfunction and Premature ejaculation in adult men.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, abnormal vision, nasal congestion, back pain, myalgia, nausea, dizziness, rash, sweating and confusion.

medicines.description: Funtime-30/60 D tablets contain Dapoxetine, a drug that acts on the brain to stop premature ejaculation so as to increase the sexual activity duration. It is prescribed for premature ejaculation in males.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are nausea, dizziness, headache, diarrhoea, insomnia and fatigue.

medicines.description: Funtime-30/60 D tablets contain Dapoxetine, a drug that acts on the brain to stop premature ejaculation so as to increase the sexual activity duration. It is prescribed for premature ejaculation in males.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are nausea, dizziness, headache, diarrhoea, insomnia and fatigue.

medicines.description: Funtime Gold tablet contains Sildenafil, an erectile dysfunction drug that acts by increasing blood flow into penile shaft and help it remain there for a longer duration & thus helps in retaining erection & Dapoxetine, a drug that acts on the brain to stop premature ejaculation so as to increase the sexual activity duration. It is prescribed for erectile dysfunction & premature ejaculation in males.

medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, back pain and myalgia.

medicines.name: FUNTIME DS-GOLD

medicines.name: BIGFUN-50 XT GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sildenafil 50 mg & Dapoxetine 30 mg
medicines.description: Bigfun-50 XT Gold tablets is a combination of Sildenafil and Dapoxetine, two active ingredients that helps address the issue of erectile dysfunction and premature ejaculation in men. Sildenafil enhances blood flow to the penis for improved erections, while Dapoxetine delays ejaculation thus improving sexual performance. This dual-action medication is taken orally before sexual activity or as directed by a healthcare provider.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include headache, nausea, red or flushed face, indigestion, stuffy nose, sweating, dizziness or light headedness.

medicines.name: URILOSIN DF
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride (Modified Release) 0.4 mg & Deflazacort 30 mg
medicines.description: Urilosin-DF capsule is a combination of Tamsulosin & Deflazacort which is used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, depressed mood, decreased libido (sex drive), decreased amount of semen released during sex, impotence (trouble getting or keeping an erection), breast tenderness or enlargement, nipple discharge and runny nose.

medicines.name: ALIDES
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Desloratadine 5 mg
medicines.description: Alides tablets contain Desloratadine, an anti-allergic that acts by blocking the action of Histamine a chemical responsible for starting allergic reactions. It is prescribed for relief of itching, reduction in the number of skin rashes and size of rash in patients with skin allergy along with in cases of seasonal allergic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Fatigue, dry mouth and headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: MINODES
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Montelukast Sodium eq. to Montelukast 10 mg & Desloratadine 5 mg
medicines.description: Minodes tablet contains Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that relieves inflammation & Desloratadine, an anti-allergic that acts by blocking the action of Histamine for its anti-allergic action. It is prescribed for long standing asthma, allergic respiratory tract congestion & for cases of seasonal & perennial allergic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Fatigue, dry mouth, abdominal pain, nausea and headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: KOFTRODEX (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Guaiphenesin 50 mg, Desloratadine 2.5 mg, Ambroxol Hydrochloride 30 mg & Menthol 1 mg
medicines.description: Koftrodex Syrup contains Desoratadine an Anti-allergic, Ambroxol an Mucolytic and Guaiphenesin an Expectorant and Menthol a soothing agent. Koftrodex is used for the treatment of Productive cough in cases of emphysema, bronchitis, asthmatic cough, smokers cough, chronic inflammatory pulmonary conditions and to reduce chest congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, headache, drowsiness, rash, nausea, vomiting, stomach upset, dry mouth or throat, abdominal pain, bloating, heartburn and weakness.

medicines.name: LINAFORD-5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Linagliptin 5 mg
medicines.description: Linaford-5 contains Linagliptin, a new class of anti-diabetics that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control diabetes. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control, exercise & other drugs to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are hypoglycemia (in combination with other drugs), dizziness, headache, constipation, diarrhoea and fever.

medicines.name: VELNOF 50 ER
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Desvenlafaxine 50 mg in extended release form.
medicines.description: Velnof-50 ER tablet contains Desvenlafaxine in extended release form, an antidepressant that elevates dull mood to improve feelings of well-being and increases energy level by correcting the imbalance of natural chemicals in brain. It is prescribed to treat depression (low mood).
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, nausea, dry mouth, constipation, loss of appetite, weight loss, blurred vision, nervousness, trouble sleeping & excessive sweating are the main side effects.

medicines.name: CASTOR-D EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ciprofloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Ciprofloxacin 0.3% w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Castor-D Eye/Ear drops contain Ciprofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that acts as an ant allergic, decrease swelling and redness. For eyes, it is prescribed in eye ulcers & external infections of the eyes associated with marked inflammation. For ears, it is prescribed in outer and middle ear infections associated with inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Eyes ? Eye discomfort, alteration in taste and deposits in eye. Ears - Discomfort, pain & itching in the ear may occur.

medicines.name: CHLORODEX-D
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chloramphenicol 1.0% w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Chlorodex-D eye/ear drop contains Chloramphenicol, an antibiotic that acts by stopping the growth of the disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that acts by reducing redness, swelling & pain. It is prescribed for bacterial eye & ear infection with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye - Burning or stinging sensations & hypersensitivity reactions. Ear - Dizziness, headache & earache may happen.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD-D
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin HCL 0.5% w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Moxiford eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that reduces swelling, redness and allergy. It is prescribed in cases of post-surgical infections & other infections with associated redness and swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation and pain.

medicines.name: OFRON-D EYE & EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ofloxacin 0.3% w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Ofron-D eye/ear drops contain Ofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that acts by eliminating allergic reactions, decreases swelling and redness. For eye it is prescribed in cases of bacterial eye infections with inflammation & for ears it is prescribed in cases of bacterial ear infections associated with pain & inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye: Temporary stinging or burning sensation, blurred vision, eye discomfort, itching, redness, dryness, tearing, feeling as if something is in your eye & sensitivity to light. Ear: Dizziness, headache, earache & changes in taste may occur.

medicines.name: CIPCOZ-D EYE & EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ciprofloxacin Hydrochloride 0.3%w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Cipcoz-D Eye/Ear drops contain Ciprofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that acts as an antiallergic, decrease swelling and redness. For eyes, it is prescribed in eye ulcers & external infections of the eyes associated with marked inflammation. For ears, it is prescribed in outer and middle ear infections associated with inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Eyes ? Eye discomfort, alteration in taste and deposits in eye. Ears - Discomfort, pain & itching in the ear may occur.

medicines.name: FLOXIMOX-D EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin 0.5%w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Floximox-D eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that reduces swelling, redness and allergy. It is prescribed in cases of post-surgical infections & other infections with associated redness and swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation and pain.

medicines.name: OLTEF-D EYE & EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ofloxacin 0.3% w/v & Dexamethasone 0.01% w/v
medicines.description: Oltef-D eye/ear drops contain Ofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that acts by eliminating allergic reactions, decreases swelling and redness. For eye it is prescribed in cases of bacterial eye infections with inflammation & for ears it is prescribed in cases of bacterial ear infections associated with pain & inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye; Temporary stinging or burning sensation, blurred vision, eye discomfort, itching, redness, dryness, tearing, feeling as if something is in your eye & sensitivity to light. Ear; Dizziness, headache, earache & changes in taste may occur.

medicines.name: CHLORODEX-DX
medicines.composition: Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU, Chloramphenicol 4 mg & Dexamethasone 1 mg
medicines.description: Chlorodex-DX is a combination of two antibiotics (Chloramphenicol , Polymyxin B) and a steroid ( Dexamethasone ). The antibiotics work by killing the bacteria or stopping their growth. Together, they treat your infection effectively. The steroid blocks the production of certain chemical messengers (prostaglandins) that make the affected area red, swollen and itchy.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common side effects include burning sensation, irritation, itching, and redness at the application site.

medicines.name: KUFSHINA (60 ml & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg, Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 10 mg & Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Kufshina syrup contains a combination of three medicines namely Chlorpheniramine (Anti-histaminic), Dextromethorphan (Anti-tussive) and Phenylephrine (Decongestant). Kufshina is used in relief from dry cough, throat irritation, sneezing, watery eyes & stuffed nose due to an allergy or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: GALIREX (60 ml & 100 ml)

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

Galirex Junior is used in kids for relief of dry cough, sneezing, watery eyes and runny nose that is caused by certain infections of air passages (e.g. sinusitis, common cold).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: LEEKUF JUNIOR (60 ml)

medicines.description: Leekuf Junior is a combination of Dextromethorphan a antitussive, Bromhexine a mucolytic and Phenylephrine a decongestant. Leekuf Junior is used to relieve dry cough, stuffy nose, sinus congestion caused by the common cold, hay fever, flu, or other allergic conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, constipation, drowsiness, dizziness, sedation, confusion, nervousness, bloating, diarrhea, headache, indigestion, sweating and skin rashes.

medicines.name: LEEKUF-SF
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 15 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2mg (SUGAR FREE)
medicines.description: Leekuf SF Syrup is a combination of three medicine namely Chlorpheniramine (Anti-histaminic), Dextromethorphan (Anti-tussive) and Phenylephrine (Decongestant). Leekuf SF Syrup is used in relief from dry cough, throat irritation, sneezing, watery eyes & stuffed nose due to an allergy or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: LEEREX-DX SYRUP (60 ml & 100 ml)

Leerex-DX is used for relief of cough without phlegm (dry cough), sneezing, watery eyes, runny nose that is caused by certain infections of air passages (e.g. sinusitis, common cold).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: DELODRYL JUNIOR

Delodryl Junior is used in kids for relief of dry cough, sneezing, watery eyes and runny nose that is caused by certain infections of air passages (e.g. sinusitis, common cold).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 5 mg, Bromhexine Hydrochloride 4 mg & Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Kufstil kid syrup contains Dextromethorphan an anti-tussive (cough suppressant), Bromhexine an mucolytic (thins and loosens mucus) and Phenylephrine an decongestant drug. It is a combination medicine used to treat cough, runny or stuffy nose, sinus congestion, sneezing, itching and watery caused by allergies, common cold and flu.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, drowsiness, nausea, headache, constipation, upset stomach, loss of appetite, blurred vision, double vision, dry mouth, nose or throat.

medicines.name: KUFSTIL-SF
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 15 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg (Sugar Free)
medicines.description: Kufstil-SF Syrup is a sugar free formulation which contains Dextromethorphan an anti-tussive, Chlorpheniramine an antiallergic and Phenylephrine a nasal decongestant. Kufstil-SF Syrup is used to relieve cough caused by the common cold, smokers cough, Post-surgical cough and bronchitis. It is also used for chest congestion associated with Emphysema, Chronic Pulmonary obstructive disease (COPD) and other breathing illnesses.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: AMROX-SF
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml syrup contains Dextromethorphan 10 mg, Ambroxol 15 mg, Chlorpheniramine 2 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg & Menthol 1.5 mg (Sugar Free)
medicines.description: Amrox Sugar Free Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Dextromethorphan an expectorant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic, Phenylephrine an decongestant and Menthol a soothing agent. It is indicated for clinical relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhoea, indigestion, heartburn or bloating, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: DELODRYL (60 & 100 ml)

medicines.name: KUFSTIL (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 15 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg
medicines.description: Kufstil Syrup is a combination medication for the relief of dry cough, cold, and allergic symptoms. It contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide to suppress cough, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride to reduce nasal congestion, and Chlorpheniramine Maleate to alleviate allergic reactions like sneezing and runny nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: VIDADEB-100 M SR FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Vildagliptin (SR) 100 mg & Metformin (SR) 1000 mg
medicines.description: Vidadeb-100 M SR/ 100 M SR FORTE tablet contains Vildagliptin, a new class of anti-diabetics that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control diabetes & Metformin that acts by increases absorption of sugar from blood to muscles. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, tremor, rash and oedema.

medicines.name: WELBIHIST-DX
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 10 mg, Bilastine 3.3 mg and Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg. (Sugar Free)
medicines.description: Welbihist-DX Syrup (Sugar Free) is a combination medicine used to treat cold symptoms and cough. It suppresses cough, helping to reduce the urge to cough by affecting the signals in the brain. It also relieves allergy symptoms like watery eyes, sneezing, runny nose, and throat irritation associated with the common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include Dizziness, Nausea, Dryness in the mouth.

medicines.name: BILAFORD-DX SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Bilastine 3.3 mg, Dextromethorphan 10 mg and Phenylephrine 5 mg (SUGAR FREE SYRUP)
medicines.description: Bilaford-DX Syrup (Sugar Free) is a combination medicine used to treat cold symptoms and cough. It suppresses cough, helping to reduce the urge to cough by affecting the signals in the brain. It also relieves allergy symptoms like watery eyes, sneezing, runny nose, and throat irritation associated with the common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, Nausea, Dryness in the mouth

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Sulphate Potassium Chloride 750 mg eq. to Glucosamine 446 mg, Methyl Sulphonyl Methane 250 mg & Diacerein 50 mg
medicines.description: Glucozone tablet contains Glucosamine and Methylsulphonyl methane which are natural ingredients of the cartilage and helps in their formation. Diacerin in it is a joint specific pain killer. Glucozone helps to protect and rebuild cartilage in osteoarthritis and inflammatory arthritis. It reduces pain, stiffness and inflammation in joints thus improving physiological joint functioning.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, heartburn, headache, insomnia, itching or worsening of allergy symptoms.

medicines.name: LEECRIN-A
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diacerein 50 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg
medicines.description: Leecrin-A tablets contain Diacerein (Pain Killer specifically for joints) and Aceclofenac (NSAID). Leecrin-A reduces pain and inflammation in joints and improves their flexibility. Leecrin-A tablets are indicated for Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis and chronic inflammatory disorders of the joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhea, Indigestion, heartburn, abdominal pain, nausea, rash, redness, hives, headache, dizziness and drowsiness

medicines.name: DINCERIN-PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diacerein 50 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate Potassium Chloride 750 mg eq. to Glucosamine 446 mg & Methylsulfonylmethane 250 mg
medicines.description: Dincerin Plus tablet contains Glucosamine and Methylsulphonyl methane which are natural ingredients of the cartilage and helps in their formation. Diacerin in it is a joint specific pain killer. Dincerin Plus helps to protect and rebuild cartilage in osteoarthritis and inflammatory arthritis. It reduces pain, stiffness and inflammation in joints thus improving physiological joint functioning.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, heartburn, headache, insomnia, itching or worsening of allergy symptoms.

medicines.name: KUFTIVE LOZENGES (ORANGE)
medicines.composition: Each lozenges conatins 2,4-Dichlorobenzyl alcohol 1.2 mg & Amylmetacresol 0.6 mg
medicines.description: Kuftive lozenges provides fast acting relief that helps prevent sore throat pain from getting worse as it contains two effective antiseptics. Kuftive is proven to work for up to 2 hours & is indicated for sore throat to prevent pain, discomfort & infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: In adults & children over 6 years of age, one Kuftive lozenge to be dissolved in mouth slowly every 2-3 hours & not exceeding 12 lozenges per day.

medicines.name: KUFTIVE LOZENGES (HONEY-LEMON)
medicines.composition: Each lozenges conatins 2,4-Dichlorobenzyl alcohol 1.2 mg & Amylmetacresol 0.6 mg
medicines.description: Kuftive lozenges provides fast acting relief that helps prevent sore throat pain from getting worse as it contains two effective antiseptics. Kuftive is proven to work for up to 2 hours & is indicated for sore throat to prevent pain, discomfort & infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: In adults & children over 6 years of age, one Kuftive lozenge to be dissolved in mouth slowly every 2-3 hours & not exceeding 12 lozenges per day.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each g of spray contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16% eq. to Diclofenac 1% w/w, Linseed Oil 3% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w.
medicines.description: Provides instant and effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. Helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. Its microparticles allow deeper penetration and provide quick pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC MAX SPRAY

medicines.description: Provides instant and effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. Helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. Its microparticles allow deeper penetration and provide quick pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Diclofenac Sodium 75 mg in Aqueous base (Pain free Injection)
medicines.description: Vovedic injection contains Diclofenac a NSAID which is used to treat the symptoms of Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteoarthritis, Ankylosing Spondylitits, Dysmenorrhea and Mild-to-Moderate Acute Pain. Vovedic injection may be used alone or with other medications..
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, constipation, headache, injection site pain, dizziness, gas, vomiting, insomnia, itching and hypotension.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each 1 ml contains Diclofenac Sodium 75 mg in 1 ml ampoule (Pain free)
medicines.description: Zeldinac injection contains Diclofenac (NSAID) which is used to treat the symptoms of Rheumatoid Arthritis, Osteoarthritis, Ankylosing Spondylitits, Dysmenorrhea and Mild-to-Moderate Acute Pain. Zeldinac injection may be used alone or with other medications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, constipation, headache, infusion site pain, dizziness, gas, vomiting, insomnia, itching, and hypotension.

medicines.name: CHYMOMERG-D
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Trypsin 48 mg, Rutoside Trihydrate 100 mg, Bromelain 90 mg & Diclofenac 50 mg
medicines.description: Chymomerg-D Tablets contains Diclofenac, a NSAID in addition to Trypsin & Bromelain, proteolytic enzymes that clears dead cells to reduce pain and inflammation and Rutoside, a herbal analgesic for effective pain relief and is used to treat pain and inflammation related to osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and tendonitis. It is also used to treat conditions such as edema and inflammation following surgeries of cellulitis, sports injuries, tooth extractions, and sprains.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are temporary stinging sensation, nausea, hives, difficulty in breathing, burning sensations, Indigestion and loss of balance.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic Tablet contains Diclofenac a NSAID and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which is used to reduce pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and osteoarthritis. It is also used to relieve muscle pain, back pain, and toothache.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, heartburn, diarrhea and loss of appetite.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC-MRX TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Metaxalone 400 mg & Diclofenac (from Potassium salt) 50 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic-MRX Tablet is a combination medicine that contains Diclofenac a NSAID as well as Metaxalone, a muscle relaxant. Vovedic-MRX is used to relieve pain, inflammation, and swelling in conditions that affect muscles. Also, it effectively relieves muscle stiffness or spasm, thereby improving muscle movement.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, upset stomach, drowsiness, headache and nervousness.

medicines.name: TOLEXANT-D

medicines.name: ZELDINAC 100 SR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Sodium SR 100 mg
medicines.description: Zeldinac 100 SR contains Diclofenac a NSAID used for painful and inflammatory conditions. It is used to reduce pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and osteoarthritis. It is also used to relieve muscle pain, back pain, and toothache. Sustained release form provides round the clock pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, Stomach pain, heartburn, diarrhea and loss of appetite

medicines.name: ZELDINAC -MR
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Chlorzoxazone 250 mg
medicines.description: Zeldinac-MR Tablet is a combination medicine that contains Diclofenac (NSAID), Chlorzoxazone (muscle relaxant) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic). Zeldinac-MR is used to relieve pain and inflammation in conditions that affect muscles. It is effective for sprains and strains, skeletal muscle spasm, post-surgical and discomfort associated with muscle spasms.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, sleepiness, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal, bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea

medicines.name: ZELDINAC SP

medicines.description: Zeldinac-SP Tablet is a combination of Diclofenac (NSAID), Serratiopeptidase (Proteolytic enzyme) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal, bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC-P
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Zeldinac-P Tablet contains Diclofenac (NSAID) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic) which is used to reduce pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and osteoarthritis. It is also used to relieve muscle pain, back pain, and toothache.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, heartburn, nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC-S
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg & Serratiopeptidase 10 mg
medicines.description: Zeldinac-S tablet is a combination of Diclofenac (NSAID) and Serratiopeptidase (Proteolytic enzyme) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions. Zeldinac-S effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, osteoarthritis and post-operative pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal, bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC PLUS GEL (15g, 30g,50g)
medicines.composition: Each g of gel contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16% w/w eq. to Diclofenac Sodium 1% w/w, Oleum lini 3% w/w, Menthol 5% w/w & Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w (Poly tube)
medicines.description: Vovedic Plus Gel provides effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. It helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. The quick absorbing formula allows deeper penetration and provides instant pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.
medicines.dosage: Gently apply Vovedic Plus gel on the affected area 3-4 times in a day or, as directed by the physician. It should be applied only to intact skin surfaces and not to skin wounds and open injuries. Works very well if applied after hot water fomentation.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC PLUS SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each pressurized tin canister contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16% w/w, Virgin Linseed Oil 3% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w
medicines.description: Vovedic Plus Spray provides instant & effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. It helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. Its microparticles allow deeper penetration and provide quick pain relief, useful in musculoskeletal, joint, and soft tissue disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.
medicines.dosage: Shake well before each use. Spray the contents from 10 cm distance on the affected areas 3-4 times in a day or, as directed by the physician. It should be applied only to intact skin surfaces and not to skin wounds and open injuries.

medicines.name: THIOFORD PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16%w/w, Thiocolchicoside 0.125% w/w, Linseed oil 3% w/w, Methylsalicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w
medicines.description: Thioford plus gel is a pain-relieving gel useful in the treatment of muscle pain and spasms. It provides fast and lasting relief from back pain, osteoarthritis pain, rheumatologic disorders, and related conditions. It is non-greasy and non-staining formulation, which gets absorbed quickly and has fast pain-relieving action.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.
medicines.dosage: Apply to the affected area 2-3 times a day after hot water fomentation or as directed by the physician.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC MAX SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each pressurized tin canister contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 2.32% w/v eq. to Diclofenac 2% w/v, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/v, Menthol 5% w/v & Absolute Alcohol 10% v/v
medicines.description: Vovedic Max Spray provides instant & effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. Helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. Microparticles allow deeper penetration and provide quick pain relief, useful in musculoskeletal, joint, and soft tissue disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.
medicines.dosage: Shake well before each use. Spray the contents from 10 cm distance on the affected areas 3-4 times in a day or, as directed by the physician. It should be applied only to intact skin surfaces and not to skin wounds and open injuries.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC NANO GEL (15g, 30g, 50g)
medicines.composition: Each g of gel contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 10 mg, Methyl Salicylate 150 mg, Menthol 50 mg & absolute Alcohol 50 mg
medicines.description: Effective topical therapy for Localized forms of soft-tissue rheumatism, e.g. tendovaginitis, shoulder-hand syndrome, bursitis and periarthropathy. Localized rheumatic diseases, e.g. osteoarthritis of the peripheral joints and vertebral column. Post traumatic inflammation of the tendons, ligaments, muscles, and joints e.g. due to sprains, strains or bruises.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, not to be applied on open wounds & lacerations

medicines.name: ZELDINAC PATCH
medicines.composition: Each 70 cm(sq.) Transdermal Patch contains Diclofenac 200 mg in 7 cm X 10 cm plaster.
medicines.description: Zeldinac patch is trans dermal patch that provide effective relief in cases of Acute & chronic painful musculoskeletal & post-operative conditions such as dental procedures & osteoarthritis etc. Diclofenac in Zeldinac is a NSAID that has anti-inflammatory & analgesic action. As Zeldinac patch by passes gastro-intestinal tract thus is devoid of any side effects. KINDLY READ THE APPLICATION METHOD BEFORE USING IT FOR PROPER USE & BEST RESULTS.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation at the site of usage is the only side effect.

medicines.name: PREGABANYL GEL
medicines.composition: Each g gel contains Pregabalin 8% w/w, Diclofenac 5% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 5% w/w, Menthol 10% w/w & Capsaicin 0.035% w/w.
medicines.description: Pregabanyl gel is a combination of Pregabalin a centrally acting analgesic, Diclofenac a NSAID, Methyl Salicylate a rubefacient and analgesic, Menthol which acts as a counter irritant & Capsaicin which acts as an anti-inflammatory agent. This combination is specially formulated to provide relief in neuropathic pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, rashes, redness of skin, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: PEGABANYL GEL (30 g)
medicines.composition: Each g gel contains Pregabalin 8% w/w, Diclofenac 5% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w, Menthol 5% w/w & Capsaicin 0.035% w/w.
medicines.description: Pegabanyl gel is a combination of Pregabalin a centrally acting analgesic, Diclofenac a NSAID, Methyl Salicylate a rubefacient and analgesic, Menthol which acts as a counter irritant & Capsaicin which acts as an anti-inflammatory agent. This combination is specially formulated to provide relief in neuropathic pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, rashes, redness of skin, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC-100 SR
medicines.composition: Each prolonged-release film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Sodium SR 100 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic 100 SR tablet contains Diclofenac, a NSAID used for painful and inflammatory conditions. It is used to reduce pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and osteoarthritis. It is also used to relieve muscle pain, back pain, and toothache. Sustained release form provides round the clock pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, Stomach pain, heartburn, diarrhea and loss of appetite

medicines.name: VOVEDIC-MR TABLET
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Chlorzoxazone 250 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic-MR Tablet is a combination medicine that contains Diclofenac (NSAID), Chlorzoxazone (muscle relaxant) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic). Vovedic-MR is used to relieve pain and inflammation in conditions that affect muscles. It is effective for sprains and strains, skeletal muscle spasm, post-surgical and discomfort associated with muscle spasms.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, sleepiness, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea

medicines.name: VOVEDIC-S
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg & Serratiopeptidase 10 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic-S tablet is a combination of Diclofenac (NSAID) and Serratiopeptidase (Proteolytic enzyme) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions. Vovedic-S effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, osteoarthritis and post-operative pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC-SP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg, Serratiopeptidase (as enteric coated granules) 10 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic-SP Tablet is a combination of Diclofenac (NSAID), Serratiopeptidase (Proteolytic enzyme) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC GEL (15g, 30g, 50g)
medicines.composition: Each g of gel contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16% eq. to Diclofenac 1% w/w, Linseed Oil 3% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w, Capsaicin 0.025% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w.
medicines.description: Provides effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder, helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. Its quick absorbing formula allows deeper penetration and provides instant pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: THIOROK PLUS GEL
medicines.composition: Each g contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16%w/w, Thiocolchicoside 0.125% w/w, Linseed oil 3% w/w, Methylsalicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w
medicines.description: Thiorok Plus gel is a pain-relieving gel useful in the treatment of muscle pain and spasms. It provides fast and lasting relief from back pain, osteoarthritis pain, rheumatologic disorders, and related conditions. It is non-greasy and non-staining formulation, which gets absorbed quickly and has fast pain-relieving action.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: CAMYFYL-D TABLET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Camylofin 50 mg & Diclofenac 50 mg (Tablet in Tablet Formulation)
medicines.description: Camyfyl-D tablet is a combination of Camylofin and Diclofenac for effective relief from pain and spasms. Camylofin is an antispasmodic that helps relax smooth muscles, easing gastrointestinal cramps and spasms, while Diclofenac is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) that reduces inflammation, pain and swelling. Camyfyl-D tablets are typically used to treat conditions such as GI spasm, renal spasm, biliary spasm and post-operative spasm.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, drowsiness, dry mouth, giddiness, skin rash, dilated pupils and fast heartbeats are some common side effects that may occur

medicines.name: VOVEDIC RAPID ACTION SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Diclofenac 2.32% w/v, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/v, Menthol 5% w/v & Absolute Alcohol 10% w/v.
medicines.description: Vovedic Rapid Action Spray is a topical medicine combining Diclofenac, Methyl Salicylate, Menthol and Absolute Alcohol to provide fast-acting relief from muscle and joint pain. A superior non-aqueous formulation, it offers highly effective and quick transdermal absorption. Diclofenac reduces inflammation, Methyl Salicylate and Menthol offer soothing & cooling effects and Absolute Alcohol ensures quick absorption. Its direct application to the affected area ensures effective pain management.
medicines.sideEffects: Application site reactions like itching, irritation, redness, and burning sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC MAX (15 g & 30 g)
medicines.composition: Each g of gel contains Diclofenac Sodium 2% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w
medicines.description: Zeldinac Max is a topical pain relief gel used to relieve muscle pain, joint pain, sprains, strains, and inflammation. Diclofenac Sodium acts as a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory agent, Methyl Salicylate provides a warming effect to ease muscle stiffness, and Menthol gives a cooling sensation for quick relief. Zeldinac Max Gel helps reduce swelling, pain, and discomfort, promoting faster recovery.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild skin irritation or redness at the application site.

medicines.name: CEFITAXE-DX
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cefixime Trihydrate eq. to Anhydrous Cefixime 200 mg & Dicloxacillin Sodium eq. to Dicloxacillin ER 500 mg
medicines.description: Cefitaxe-DX tablet contains Cefixime, a cephalosporin antibiotic and Dicloxacillin, a penicillin antibiotic and both of them acts synergistically by disrupting the cell wall of pathogens. It is indicated for ear, nose & throat infection, respiratory tract infection, skin & soft tissue infection, bone infection, injuries and reproductive tract infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are dizziness, diarrhea, loose stools, abdominal pain, nausea, dyspepsia, flatulence, pseudomembranous colitis, genital pruritus, vaginitis & genital candidiasis.

medicines.name: JOYSPAS D DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Activated Dimethicone HCL 40 mg & Dicyclomine HCL 10 mg
medicines.description: Joyspas drops is a combination of Dicyclomine and Dimethicone. Dicyclomine is an antispasmodic which works by relaxing the muscles in your stomach and gut (intestine).Dimethicone is an antifoaming medicine which disintegrates gas bubbles and allows easy passage of gas. Spastone drops are indicated in the treatment of abdominal cramps and pain, gas, bloating and flatulence.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, dryness in mouth, dizziness, blurred vision, sleepiness & weakness

medicines.name: RANYDOL SPAS SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Domperidone Maleate eq. to Domperidone 5 mg, Activated Dimethicone 40 mg & Dicyclomine Hydrochloride 10 mg

Dimethicone is an anti-gas (anti-flatulence) medication. Ranydol spas is used to relieve abdominal cramps and pain, bloating, heartburn and flatulence.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, dryness of mouth, dizziness, blurred vision, sleepiness and weakness.

Dimethicone is an antifoaming medicine which disintegrates gas bubbles and allows easy passage of gas. Spastone drops are indicated in the treatment of abdominal cramps and pain, gas, bloating and flatulence.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, dryness in mouth, dizziness, blurred vision, sleepiness and weakness.

medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Paracetamol 125 mg & Dicyclomine Hydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Leemol-DC contains Paracetamol an analgesic and anti-pyretic and Dicyclomine an antispasmodic. It is indicated for the treatment of stomach cramps, renal and biliary colic as well as pain of surgical or gynaecological origin. Leemol-DC is also indicated for functional bowel disease and Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are hypersensitivity reactions, dry mouth, upset stomach, vomiting, constipation and gas or bloating.

medicines.description: Cromide Forte contains Clidinium, Chlordiazepoxide & Dicyclomine, an antispasmodic drug that reduces the spasm in GI tract. Cromide Forte is used in pain associated with spasm as in cases of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).It is also used in psychosomatic disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are weakness or tiredness, excitement, anger, dry mouth, blurred vision or vision changes, constipation, nausea, changes in sex drive or ability, irregular menstrual cycles, coordination problems and confusion.

medicines.name: RANYDOL SPAS

medicines.description: Ranydol spas contains Ranitidine which is a histamine-2 blocker that decreases the amount of acid created by the stomach. Dicyclomine is in a class of medications called anticholinergics and Simethicone is an anti-gas (anti-flatulence) medication. Ranydol spas is used to treat hyperacidity, abdominal pain and cramps, bloating, heartburn, flatulence and indigestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are constipation, diarrhea, headache, nausea, weakness and muscle pain.

medicines.name: SPASTONE
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Mefenamic Acid 250 mg & Dicyclomine Hydrochloride 10 mg

medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Dried Aluminium Hydroxide eq. Aluminium Hydroxide 200 mg, Magnesium Hydroxide 200 mg & Simethicone 25 mg Sugar Free (Saunf Flavour)

It is also used in patients before gastro-intestinal and radiological examination.

medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Caffeine 30 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg & Diphenhydramine 25 mg
medicines.description: Diecold tablet is a combination of medicines which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Caffeine an CNS stimulant, Phenylephrine an decongestant and Diphenhydramine an anti-allergic. It is used for the relief of cold and flu including headache, fever, nasal and sinus congestion, runny or stuffy nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping), restlessness and allergic reaction.

medicines.composition: Each ml contains Calamine 8% w/v, Diphenhydramine Hydrochloride 1% w/v & Camphor 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Melamine lotion contains Calamine, mild antibacterial and soothing agent that relieves redness & itching Diphenhydramine, an anti-allergic that stops skin itching and irritation & Camphor, has antibacterial, antifungal and anti-inflammatory benefits. It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effect.
medicines.dosage: Before using, shake the bottle well. Thoroughly wash the affected area with water. Gently dab Melamine on the skin using cotton or your fingers. Ensure that it dries on the skin while covering the affected area. Do not rub or massage Melamine into the skin or apply on an open wound. Melamine can be applied 3 to 4 times a day, continuously for 2 weeks or even more.

medicines.name: LEEFORD DIGITAL BLOOD PRESSURE MONITOR
medicines.composition: Digital Blood Pressure Monitor with Deflation Technology & Irregular Heart Beat Detection (Large Cuff Size-22-42 cm)
medicines.description: Leeford Digital Blood Pressure Monitor offers precise, easy-to-use monitoring at home or on-the-go. The irregular heartbeat detection feature alerts users to abnormal rhythms, helping with early awareness. Its large cuff ensures fit and accuracy for most adults.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Turn on Leeford Digital Blood Pressure Monitor Wrap cuff around upper arm, start the monitor, and get quick, reliable readings. Follow user manual for best results.

medicines.description: Alkazip syrup contains Disodium Hydrogen Citrate, a urinary alkalizer that helps make urine alkaline or less acidic. It is prescribed in cases of urinary infections; less acidic urine helps the kidneys to get rid of uric acid in blood & helping to prevent gout and kidney stones due to high uric acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea and stomach pain are the main observed side effects.

medicines.name: ENLIZER
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Disodium Hydrogen Citrate 1.53 g
medicines.description: Enlizer syrup contains Disodium Hydrogen Citrate, an alkalizer that is extremely effective in reducing the acidic content of urine. It is therefore used to treat infections of the urinary tract and associated symptoms. It is also often used in the treatment of Gout and kidney stones.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, Stomach pain and weakness.

medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Disulfiram 250 mg
medicines.description: Recopress-250 tablets contains Disulfiram, a medication used in the treatment of chronic alcoholism. It works by discouraging alcohol consumption. Recopress-250 works by causing unpleasant reactions such as nausea and flushing when alcohol is consumed thus helping to reinforce abstinence. This medication is part of a comprehensive treatment plan and should only be used under medical supervision.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are mild drowsiness, fatigability, impotence, headache, acne like eruptions, allergic skin reactions & a metallic or garlic-like aftertaste.

Gasowel also helps in relieving burning sensation in the stomach, burping, bloating, discomfort and pain caused by excess gas in the stomach.
medicines.sideEffects: Occasional hypersensitivity reaction, constipation and diarrhoea but generally Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects.

medicines.description: Pregabanyl-DX capsules are combination product that is used for the treatment of chronic pain in Fibromyalgia, Neuropathies of all sorts and certain other central pain syndromes.
medicines.sideEffects: The side effects observed are sedation and somnolence etc.
