medicines.sideEffects: The side effects observed are sedation and somnolence etc.

medicines.name: PREGABANYL-DXM
medicines.composition: Each capsule contains Pregabalin 75 mg, Duloxetine 20 mg & Mecobalamin 1500 mcg
medicines.description: Pregabanyl-DXM is a triple combination capsule containing Pregabalin, which reduces nerve pain by modulating calcium channels; Duloxetine, a serotonin-norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor (SNRI) effective in managing chronic pain and depression; and Mecobalamin, a neurotropic vitamin that supports nerve regeneration. This combination is prescribed for the treatment of diabetic neuropathy, fibromyalgia, and other chronic neuropathic pain conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are dizziness, nausea, drowsiness, and dry mouth.

medicines.name: PEGABANYL-DXM
medicines.composition: Each capsule contains Pregabalin 75 mg, Duloxetine (as delayed release pellets) 20 mg & Mecobalamin 1500 mcg
medicines.description: Pegabanyl-DXM contains Pregabalin that modulates calcium channels to reduce nerve excitability, Duloxetine inhibits serotonin and norepinephrine reuptake to alleviate pain and improve mood, while Mecobalamin supports nerve regeneration and myelin sheath maintenance. Together, they provide a comprehensive approach to managing conditions like diabetic neuropathy and fibromyalgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include nausea, dizziness, dry mouth, fatigue, and somnolence.

medicines.name: URILOSIN-D
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride ER 0.4 mg & Dutasteride 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Urilosin-D Tablet is a combination medicine which used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency. Tamsulosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Dutasteride prevents testosterone from converting to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, depressed mood, decreased libido (sex drive), decreased amount of semen released during sex, impotence (trouble getting or keeping an erection), breast tenderness or enlargement, nipple discharge and runny nose.

medicines.name: SILDOEASE-4D

medicines.description: Sildoease 4D/8D contains Silodosin an alpha blocker and Dutasteride, a 5-Alpha reductase that inhibits the growth of Prostate to ease symptoms of BPH. Sildoease 4D/8D capsules are indicated for the treatment of BPH when Silodosin alone is not able to provide relief in men with enlarged Prostate and surgery needs to be avoided.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are orgasm with little or no semen (fluid), Impotence, diarrhea, dizziness, low blood pressure, stuffy or runny nose

medicines.name: ALFUFAST-D
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Alfuzosin (as Sustained Release) 10 mg & Dutasteride 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Alfufast-D tablet is a combination medicine which is used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency. Alfuzosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Dutasteride prevents Testosterone from converting to Dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are tiredness, headache, runny or stuffy nose, pain, stomach pain, heartburn, constipation, nausea and decrease in sexual ability, sore throat, fever, chills, cough and other signs of infection.

medicines.name: TAMSUGARD-D
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride ER 0.4 mg & Dutasteride 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Tamsugard-D tablet is a combination medicine which used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency. Tamsulosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Dutasteride prevents testosterone from converting to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, depressed mood, decreased libido (sex drive), decreased amount of semen released during sex, impotence (trouble getting or keeping an erection), breast tenderness or enlargement, nipple discharge and runny nose.

medicines.name: WALCOBAL FORTE TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Benfotiamine 150 mg, Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg, ALA 200 mg, Inositol 100 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, Pyridoxine 3 mg, Vitamin D3 1000 IU & Calcium Carbonate 500 mg
medicines.description: Walcobal Forte contains Vitamin B Complex, Vitamin D3 & Calcium Carbonate. Alpha Lipoic acid an antioxidant along with other B vitamins. Walcobal Forte tablets are useful in the management of Diabetic neuropathy, Alcohol induced neuropathy, Vitamin B12 deficiency, Post herpetic neuropathy and drug induced neuropathy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, loss of appetite and headache

medicines.name: JOYSPAS DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml of drops contains Simethicone emulsion eq. to Simethicone 40 mg, Dill oil 0.005 ml & Fennel oil 0.0007 ml
medicines.description: Joyspas drops contain a combination of Simethicone, Dill oil and fennel oil. It is used in children and infants to treat flatulence (gas). Joyspas drops are indicated in the treatment of abdominal cramps and pain, gas, bloating and flatulence in children and infants.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Constipation, Diarrhea & Headache.

medicines.name: ALICTOZYME DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Alpha Amylase 20 mg, Papain 10 mg, Dill oil 2 mg, Anise oil 2 mg & Caraway Oil 2 mg
medicines.description: Alictozyme is a carminative mixture with digestive enzymes, primarily used to treat digestive disorders. Alpha Amylase works by digesting starch, carbohydrates, fats, and Papain is responsible for breakdown of proteins. Seed oils helps in digestion & relief from stomach pain. Alictozyme effectively treats dyspepsia (indigestion), flatulence (gas), and colic pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are acute toxicity, skin rashes, nausea, diarrhea, constipation, abdominal pain, severe dizziness and Joint pain.
medicines.dosage: 5–10 drops to infants and 10–15 drops to children after meals, 2–3 times daily. Shake well before use and administer with the provided dropper. Use only as advised by a physician.

medicines.name: AMIGEST TEST CARD
medicines.composition: Each pack contains Anti- HCG antisera Pregnancy Test Card
medicines.description: Amigest Pregnancy test card detects HCG content in a woman's urine, indicating whether a woman is pregnant or not.
medicines.sideEffects: N.A
medicines.dosage: Collect first-morning urine in a clean container. Draw some amount of specimen in the dropper provided with the pack. Keep the pregnancy test device handy. Dispense 3 drops of urine/sample into the sample well. Wait for 5 minutes for an accurate result. INTERPRETATION OF RESULTS: Positive - Two pink bands appear on the test device. Negative - One pink-coloured band appears on the test device. Invalid - If one line is dark and the other is light then that means there was not enough HCG in the urine to make a certain analysis, thus requiring the patient to repeat the test the next day.

medicines.name: PREGABLESS TEST CARD
medicines.composition: Each pack contains Anti- HCG antisera Pregnancy Test Card
medicines.description: Pregabless pregnancy test card detects HCG content in a woman's urine, indicating whether a woman is pregnant or not.
medicines.sideEffects: NA
medicines.dosage: Collect first-morning urine in a clean container. Draw some amount of specimen in the dropper provided with the pack. Keep the pregnancy test device handy. Dispense 3 drops of urine/sample into the sample well. Wait for 5 minutes for an accurate result. INTERPRETATION OF RESULTS: Positive - Two pink bands appear on the test device. Negative - One pink-coloured band appears on the test device. Invalid - If one line is dark and the other is light then that means there was not enough HCG in the urine to make a certain analysis, thus requiring the patient to repeat the test the next day.

medicines.name: DANTOX INSTA SENSITIVITY TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Insta Sensitive Repair Plus Toothpaste
medicines.description: Dantox Sensitivity tooth paste is a medicated paste to relieve dental hypersensitivity immediately after application. Dantox Sensitivity paste acts by making a neurosensory block at the nerve root of tooth & protects from cavity or prevents increase in their size. It also reduces the demineralization of enamel and dentin by decreasing the acid production by harmful bacteria.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Use Dantox Sensitivity as a regular tooth paste twice daily for increasing protection against sensitivity of teeth to cold, heat, acids, sweets or contact & also helps in the prevention of dental cavities. Apply one inch length of paste onto a soft bristle toothbrush to brush as usual, ensuring to brush all sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing. It not only provides relief in sensitive teeth, but also actually helps repair the sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not use longer than 4 weeks, without dental recommendations. Keep out of reach of children under 6 years of age.

medicines.name: 3 PLY Mask
medicines.composition: 3 Ply Face Mask With Elastic Ear Loop & Nose Pin (Single Mask In Pouch Pack)
medicines.description: This 3 Ply Face Mask offers effective filtration and breathability for everyday protection. Designed with a comfortable elastic ear loop and a flexible nose pin, it ensures a snug fit and reduces fogging for glasses wearers. Individually packed for hygiene and convenience.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Wear over nose and mouth, secure with ear loops, and adjust nose pin for proper fit. Dispose after single use.

medicines.name: FOLIGRACE-DHA
medicines.composition: Each soft gel capsule contains L-Methylfolate 1000 mcg, Mecobalamin 1500 mcg, Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate 500 mcg, DHA (40%) 200 mg & Vitamin-D3 2000 IU
medicines.description: Foligrace-DHA softgel contains bioactive forms of Folic acid, Pyridoxine & B12 along with Vit. D3 & DHA, a form of highly important Omega-3-FA component. Together as a formulation they offer better absorption, speedy action & better health maintenance than their counterparts. It is prescribed for Complications of Pregnancy (NTDs, Spontaneous miscarriage, Recurrent abortion, IUGR, Pre-eclampsia, Pre-term labour & Other diseases), Diabetes, Diabetic Retinopathy, Cardiovascular diseases, Hyperhomocysteinemia, Osteoporosis, Cognitive impairment & Depression.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated and has no known side effects

medicines.name: FEMIVIN-D
medicines.composition: Each soft gel capsule contains L-Methylfolate 1000 mcg, Mecobalamin 1500 mcg, Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate 500 mcg, DHA (40%) 200 mg & Vitamin-D3 2000 IU
medicines.description: Femivin-D softgel capsule contains bioactive forms of Folic acid, Pyridoxine & B12 along with Vit. D3 & DHA, a form of highly important Omega-3-FA component. Together as a formulation they offer better absorption, speedy action & better health maintenance than their counterparts. It is prescribed in Complications of Pregnancy (NTDs, Spontaneous miscarriage, Recurrent abortion, IUGR, Pre-eclampsia, Pre-term labour & other diseases), Diabetes, Diabetic Retinopathy, Cardiovascular diseases, Hyperhomocysteinemia, Osteoporosis, Cognitive impairment & Depression.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated and has no known side effects

medicines.name: DYDROLAST-10
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dydrogesterone 10 mg.
medicines.description: Dydrogesterone is a synthetic progesterone that acts by fulfilling the deficiency of natural progesterone in the body. It is used in females for disorders such as infertility, irregular menses, uterine bleeding & maintaining pregnancy.
medicines.sideEffects: Headaches, nauseas, menstrual disorders and weight gain are the infrequent side effects that may occur in patients.

medicines.name: DYDROLAST-20 SR
medicines.composition: Dydrogesterone SR 20 mg.
medicines.description: Dydrogesterone is a synthetic progesterone that acts by fulfilling the deficiency of natural progesterone in the body. It is used in females for disorders such as infertility, irregular menses, uterine bleeding & maintaining pregnancy.
medicines.sideEffects: Headaches, nauseas, menstrual disorders and weight gain are the infrequent side effects that may occur in patients.

medicines.name: MYOPACE PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Myo Inositol 550 mg, D-Chiro Inositol 13.8 mg, Metformin 500 mg, L-Methylfolate Calcium 0.5 mg & Mecobalamin 750 mcg.
medicines.description: Myopace Plus tablets is a combination of Myo-Inositol, D-Chiro-Inositol, Metformin, L-Methylfolate, Calcium and Mecobalamin used to support metabolic and hormonal balance. Myo-Inositol and D-Chiro-Inositol help regulate insulin sensitivity while Metformin improves glucose control, L-Methylfolate supports healthy cell function, Calcium strengthens bones, and Mecobalamin aids nerve health. Myopace Plus tablets are often used in managing conditions like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) and diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Headaches, nauseas, dizziness, tiredness & weight gain are the infrequent side effects that may occur in patients.

medicines.name: DINOTERM-ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dienogest 2 mg & Ethinylestradiol 30 mcg
medicines.description: Dinoterm-ET tablets is a combination of Dienogest & Ethinylestradiol, two drugs that are used as oral contraceptive thus helps to prevent pregnancy. Dienogest is a progestin that suppresses ovulation, while Ethinylestradiol is an estrogen that helps regulate the menstrual cycle. Together, they provide effective birth control, regulate periods, and may reduce symptoms of acne or endometriosis.
medicines.sideEffects: Breast pain, headache, nausea and vomiting, irregular periods, abdominal cramps, weight change, swelling & dizziness are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: SINARZINE PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated mouth dissolving tablet contains Cinnarizine 20 mg & Dimenhydrinate 40 mg
medicines.description: Sinarzine Plus tablet contains Cinnarizine & Dimenhydrinate; both are antihistaminic. It is used for prevention and treatment of motion sickness, nausea and vomiting, vertigo, tinnitus, associated with Meniere's disease and other middle ear disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are feeling sleepy, putting on weight and indigestion

medicines.name: SINRAWEL PLUS
medicines.composition: Each mouth dissolving tablet contains Cinnarizine 20 mg & Dimenhydrinate 40 mg
medicines.description: Sinrawel Plus tablet contains Cinnarizine & Dimenhydrinate; both are an antihistaminic. It is used for prevention and treatment of motion sickness, nausea and vomiting, vertigo, tinnitus, associated with Meniere's disease and other middle ear disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are feeling sleepy, putting on weight and indigestion

medicines.name: DONPEZEM-5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Donepezil 5 mg
medicines.description: Donpezem-5 contains Donepezil, an Acetylcholinesterase inhibitor that increases Acetylcholine availability at the synapses and enhances cholinergic transmission to improve cognition and/or behaviour in affected individuals & used in the treatment of dementia in mild, moderate and severe Alzheimer's disease.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common adverse effects of donepezil are gastrointestinal (GI), which includes Nausea, Diarrhoea & Vomiting. In addition, other common adverse effects such as Insomnia, Muscle cramps, Fatigue and Anorexia are more frequently reported with higher doses of donepezil.

medicines.name: DONPEZEM-10
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Donepezil 10 mg
medicines.description: Donpezem-10 contains Donepezil, an Acetylcholinesterase inhibitor that increases Acetylcholine availability at the synapses and enhances cholinergic transmission to improve cognition and/or behaviour in affected individuals & used in the treatment of dementia in mild, moderate and severe Alzheimer's disease.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common adverse effects of donepezil are gastrointestinal (GI), which includes Nausea, Diarrhoea & Vomiting. In addition, other common adverse effects such as Insomnia, Muscle cramps, Fatigue and Anorexia are more frequently reported with higher doses of donepezil.

medicines.name: DONPEZEM-M
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Donepezil 5 mg & Memantine 5 mg
medicines.description: Donpezem-M contains Donepezil, an Acetylcholinesterase inhibitor & Memantine regulates glutamatergic neuronal activities by blocking glutamate release in Alzheimer's disease thereby enhancing cognition, learning & memory.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common adverse effects are Headache, Dizziness, Anorexia, Nausea, Vomiting, Diarrhea & Balance Disorder

medicines.name: DROSPESURE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Drospirenone 3 mg & Ethinylestradiol 0.03 mg
medicines.description: Drospesure tablets contains Drospirenone & Ethinylestradiol, two different hormones that works by stopping a woman's egg from fully developing each month thus preventing them from accepting the sperm and thus fertilization (pregnancy) is prevented. It is used as contraceptive pill by females.
medicines.sideEffects: Spotting, Dysmenorrhea, Vomiting, Breast Tenderness, Clumsiness, Nervousness & Increased Irritability, Metrorrhagia, Headache, Nausea, Sinusitis & Vaginal Moniliasis.

medicines.name: DOPARICH INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml ampoule contains Dopamine 200 mg i.e. 40 mg/ml
medicines.description: Doparich contains Dopamine, a sympathomimetic vasopressor & is the naturally occurring immediate precursor of Norepinephrine in noradrenergic nerves and is also a neurotransmitter in certain areas of the central nervous system. Dopamine in Doparich injection increases heart rate, cardiac contractility & thus increases blood pressure.
medicines.sideEffects: Palpitation, cardiac conduction abnormalities, arrhythmias, hypertension & vasoconstriction etc. are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: DORPESERV INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Doripenem (sterile) 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Dorpeserv injection contains Doripenem, a broad-spectrum anti-biotic belonging to the carbapenem class, used in the treatment of complex bacterial infections, including those caused by multi-drug resistant organisms. Dorpeserv works by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis, effectively targeting gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria. Dorpiserv injection is commonly used in intra-abdominal infections, urinary tract infections, and pneumonia, especially in hospital settings where resistant strains may be present.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, nausea, redness, injection site pain & diarrhoea are some of the side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: VELNOCRAN TABLET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains D-Mannose 600 mg & Cranberry Ext. 300 mg
medicines.description: Velnocran tablets contains Cranberry along with D-Mannose that is used to support urinary tract health. Cranberry helps prevent urinary tract infections (UTIs) by preventing bacteria from adhering to the bladder walls, while D-Mannose is a natural sugar that may help flush out harmful bacteria. Together, they promote urinary tract wellness and reduce the risk of infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Occasional gastrointestinal upset like nausea, bloating or gas & allergic reactions such as rash, itching, swelling, dizziness or difficulty breathing may occur.
medicines.dosage: One (1) tablet twice a day or as directed by physician

medicines.name: TIMITROL-D EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Dorzolamide 2% w/v & Timolol 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Timitrol-D eye drops is a combination of Dorzolamide and Timolol, a combination medication used to treat high intraocular pressure in conditions like glaucoma or ocular hypertension. Dorzolamide is a carbonic anhydrase inhibitor, while Timolol is a beta-blocker. Together, they help reduce pressure in the eyes by decreasing fluid production, helping prevent damage to the optic nerve and thus preserving vision.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye irritation, blurred vision, swelling, eye discharge, redness, feeling of something in the eye are some side effects that may arise.

medicines.name: SIBASTIN
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ebastine 20 mg
medicines.description: Sibastin tablets contain Ebastine, an antiallergic drug that stops action of Histamine in body to exert its action. It is prescribed in cases of sneezing, itchy nose, nasal secretion, nasal congestion and red watery eyes along with itchy skin rashes.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, dry mouth, drowsiness, abdominal pain, dyspepsia, fatigue & nausea are the main side effects.

medicines.name: SIBASTIN-M
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ebastine 10 mg & Montelukast 10 mg
medicines.description: Sibastin-M tablet contains Ebastine, an antiallergic drug that stops action of Histamine in body to exert its action & Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that relieves associated inflammation. It is prescribed in cases of chronic asthma, allergic chest congestion and other allergies.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Headache, dry mouth, drowsiness, abdominal pain, dyspepsia, fatigue & nausea.

medicines.name: EBERFORD
medicines.composition: Each g contains Eberconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Eberford cream contains Eberconazole, a new antifungal drug to treat fungal infections by killing the fungus involved. It is prescribed in skin conditions such as Candidiasis (yeast infection), fungal infection of skin & skin folds, fungal infection in between fingers & fungal infection of the groin region.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation & burning or stinging sensations are the main side effects.

medicines.name: EBERFORD-M
medicines.composition: Each g contains Eberconazole 1% w/w & Mometasone 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Eberford-M cream contains Eberconazole, a new antifungal drug to treat fungal infection & Mometasone, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness, irritation & swelling. It is prescribed for treating fungal infections of the skin & skin folds in individuals with compromised immunity and in general.
medicines.sideEffects: Application site allergic reactions, dry skin & rashes may happen.

medicines.name: MIGRANECK
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Ergotamine 1 mg & Caffeine 100 mg
medicines.description: Migraneck tablet contains Ergotamine & Caffeine, a combination medication that acts variedly to relieve Migraine headache. It is prescribed to treat Migraine (a special kind of headache).
medicines.sideEffects: Cold extremities, vasospasm, ECG changes, blood pressure fluctuations, numbness, dizziness, muscle pain, irregular heartbeats, nausea, vomiting, local edema & itching are the main side effects.

medicines.name: MIGRAFEN TABLETS (10s & 15s)
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Ergotamine 1 mg & Caffeine 100 mg.
medicines.description: Migrafen tablet contains Ergotamine & Caffeine, a combination that acts variedly to relieve Migraine headache. It is prescribed to treat Migraine (a special kind of headache).
medicines.sideEffects: Cold extremities, vasospasm, ECG changes, blood pressure fluctuations, numbness, dizziness, muscle pain, irregular heartbeats, nausea, vomiting, local edema & itching are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ASICLOPAM-EC
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram Oxalate eq. to Escitalopram 10 mg & Clonazepam 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Asiclopam-EC tablets contains Escitalopram, an antidepressant & Clonazepam, an anxiolytic; both of which acts by altering brains chemicals. Asiclopam-EC tablets are prescribed for anxiety & depression that exist together and individually in other psychiatric diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Confusion, Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, memory impairment, drowsiness, tiredness, decreased orgasm & low sexual desire.

medicines.name: ESCIPIL-10
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram 10 mg
medicines.description: Escipil tablets contain Escitalopram, an antidepressant that treats low mood & feeling of well-being and decrease nervousness by stopping natural chemicals in brain. It is prescribed to treat depression and anxiety.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, dry mouth, trouble sleeping, constipation, tiredness, drowsiness, dizziness and increased sweating are the side effects.

medicines.name: ESCIPIL-20
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram 20 mg
medicines.description: Escipil tablets contain Escitalopram, an antidepressant that treats low mood & feeling of well-being and decrease nervousness by stopping natural chemicals in brain. It is prescribed to treat depression and anxiety.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, dry mouth, trouble sleeping, constipation, tiredness, drowsiness, dizziness and increased sweating are the side effects.

medicines.name: ESCIPIL-ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram 10 mg & Etizolam 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Escipil-ET tablet contains Escitalopram, an antidepressant & Etizolam, an anxiolytic; both of which acts by altering brain's chemicals. It is prescribed for co morbid anxiety & depression when manifest together and in other psychiatric diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Confusion, Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, memory impairment, drowsiness, tiredness, decreased orgasm & low sexual desire are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ASICLOPAM-ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram 10 mg & Etizolam 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Asiclopam-ET tablets contain Escitalopram, an antidepressant & Etizolam, an anxiolytic; both of which acts by altering brain's chemicals. It is prescribed for co morbid anxiety & depression when manifest together and in other psychiatric diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Confusion, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, memory impairment, drowsiness, tiredness, decreased orgasm & low sexual desire are the main side effects.

medicines.name: DELZOWEL-30
medicines.composition: Each gastro-resistant tablet contains Duloxetine Hydrochloride 30 mg
medicines.description: Delzowel tablets contain Duloxetine, an antidepressants that acts by modulating brain chemicals. It is prescribed for generalized anxiety disorder, depressive disorders, nerve pain & other pain of central origin.
medicines.sideEffects: Prominent ones are nausea, headache, dry mouth, excessive sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: ALIDES-M
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Montelukast Sodium eq. to Montelukast 10 mg & Desloratadine 5 mg
medicines.description: Alides-M tablet contains Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that relieves inflammation & Desloratadine, an anti-allergic that acts by blocking the action of Histamine for its anti-allergic action. It is prescribed for long standing Asthma, allergic respiratory tract congestion & for cases of seasonal & perennial allergic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Fatigue, dry mouth, abdominal pain, nausea and headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ASICLOPAM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram 10 mg
medicines.description: Asiclopam tablets contains Escitalopram, a medication used to treat depression, anxiety, and related disorders. Escitalopram is a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI) that works by increasing serotonin levels in the brain, helping to improve mood, reduce anxiety, and restore emotional balance. It is typically prescribed for managing generalized anxiety disorder and major depressive disorder.
medicines.sideEffects: Swelling of the face, fever, sweating, confusion, fast or irregular heartbeat, severe muscle stiffness, hallucinations, nausea, vomiting or diarrhea are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: ESCIPIL-EC
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram 10 mg & Clonazepam 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Escipil-EC tablets is a combination medicine consisting Escitalopram & Clonazepam. Escitalopram is a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI) used to treat depression and anxiety disorders while Clonazepam is a benzodiazepine that works by calming the brain and nerves, hence prescribed in the cases of anxiety and panic disorders. Together, they help manage mood and anxiety symptoms, improving overall mental health.
medicines.sideEffects: Confusion, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, memory impairment, drowsiness, decreased orgasm & low sexual desire are some common side effects.

medicines.name: ESOMEFOL-DSR
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains enteric coated Esomeprazole Magnesium Trihydrate eq. to Esomeprazole 40 mg & Domperidone SR 30 mg
medicines.description: Esomefol-DSR Capsules contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid production in the stomach & Domperidone, a prokinetic drug to increase the movement in GI tract. It is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, nausea, diarrhea, gas, constipation, dry mouth and drowsiness

medicines.name: ESOMEFOL INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Esomeprazole Sodium eq. to Esomeprazole Anhydrous 40 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Esomefol contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid production in the stomach & is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, nausea, diarrhea, gas, constipation, dry mouth & drowsiness.

medicines.name: ESOMEFOL
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Esomeprazole Magnesium Trihydrate eq. to Esomeprazole 40 mg
medicines.description: Esomefol contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid production in the stomach & is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, nausea, diarrhea, gas, constipation, dry mouth & drowsiness.

medicines.name: ESOMIFYL
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Esomeprazole Magnesium Trihydrate eq. to Esomeprazole 40 mg
medicines.description: Esomifyl contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid production in the stomach & is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, nausea, diarrhea, gas, constipation, dry mouth & drowsiness.

medicines.name: ESOMIFYL-DSR
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains enteric coated Esomeprazole Magnesium Trihydrate eq. to Esomeprazole 40 mg & Domperidone SR 30 mg
medicines.description: Esomifyl-DSR Capsules contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid production in the stomach & Domperidone, a prokinetic drug to increase the movement in GI tract. It is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, nausea, diarrhea, gas, constipation, dry mouth and drowsiness

medicines.name: ESOMIFYL-SL
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains enteric coated Esomeprazole Magnesium Trihydrate eq. to Esomeprazole 40 mg & Levosulpiride SR 75 mg
medicines.description: Esomifyl-SL Capsules contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid & Levosulpiride, a Prokinetic drug that increases the movement in GI tract. It is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD) in Patients who do not respond to monotherapy with PPI's. It is also indicated in Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, nausea, diarrhea, gas, constipation, dry mouth and drowsiness.

medicines.name: ESOMIFYL DRY INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Esomeprazole (Lyophilized) 40 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Esomifyl contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid production in the stomach & is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, nausea, diarrhea, gas, constipation, dry mouth & drowsiness.

medicines.name: ESOMIFYL-IT
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains enteric coated Esomeprazole 40 mg & Itopride SR 150 mg
medicines.description: Esomifyl-IT Capsules contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid & Itopride, a Prokinetic drug that increases the movement in GI tract. It is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD) in Patients who do not respond to monotherapy with PPI's.It is also indicated in Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, gas, joint pain, diarrhea, dizziness

medicines.name: ESOMEFOL-IT
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains enteric coated Esomeprazole 40 mg & sustained release Itopride 150 mg
medicines.description: Esomefol-IT Capsules contains Esomeprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid & Itopride, a Prokinetic drug that increases the movement in GI tract. It is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD) in Patients who do not respond to monotherapy with PPI's.It is also indicated in Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, gas, joint pain, diarrhea, dizziness

medicines.name: ESOMEFOL KID SACHET
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains Esomeprazole Magnesium Trihydrate Equivalent to Esomeprazole 10 mg (as enteric coated granules)
medicines.description: Esomefol-Kid sachet contains Esomeprazole, a medication used to treat acid reflux, heartburn, and stomach ulcers. It works by reducing stomach acid production, helping to relieve symptoms like pain and discomfort in kids. Esomefol-Kid sachet are mixed with water for easy administration and are typically prescribed for children with specific conditions, generally based on age and weight.
medicines.sideEffects: Diarrhoea, constipation, stomach pain, flatulence, headache & feeling sick are some common side effects that may occur

medicines.name: ESOMIFYL KID SACHET
medicines.composition: Esomeprazole (EC) Granules 10 mg
medicines.description: Esomifyl-Kid sachet contains Esomeprazole, a medication used to treat acid reflux, heartburn, and stomach ulcers. It works by reducing stomach acid production, helping to relieve symptoms like pain and discomfort in kids. Esomifyl-Kid sachet are mixed with water for easy administration and are typically prescribed for children with specific conditions, generally based on age and weight.
medicines.sideEffects: Diarrhoea, constipation, stomach pain, flatulence, headache & feeling sick are some common side effects that may occur

medicines.name: ESOMEFOL-SL
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains enteric coated Esomeprazole Magnesium Trihydrate eq. to Esomeprazole 40 mg & Levosulpiride SR 75 mg
medicines.description: ESOMEFOL-SL is a combination capsule containing Esomeprazole, a proton pump inhibitor (PPI), and Levosulpiride, a prokinetic agent. Esomeprazole reduces gastric acid secretion by inhibiting the H⁺/K⁺-ATPase enzyme system, providing effective relief in acid-related disorders. Levosulpiride enhances gastric motility and regulates gut-brain signaling by blocking dopamine D2 receptors. Together, they offer synergistic relief in acid reflux, GERD, functional dyspepsia, and gastric motility disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Possible side effects include headache, nausea, abdominal discomfort, dizziness, or diarrhea.

medicines.name: THEOLATE-TX
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etamsylate 250 mg & Tranexamic acid 250 mg
medicines.description: Theolate tablet contains Tranexamic acid & Etamsylate, both of which are antihaemorrhagic drugs that act by stopping bleeding. It is prescribed in case of surgeries, & other Gynaecological & medical conditions suspected to bleed or is bleeding.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, Skin rashes, Feeling sick & Diarrhoea are the main side effects of the combination.

medicines.name: ETHORED 250
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Ethamsylate 250 mg
medicines.description: Ethored tablets contain Etamsylate, an antihaemorrhagic drug that acts by stopping bleeding. It is prescribed in cases of surgery & other medical and gynaecological conditions where bleeding is occurring or is suspected.
medicines.sideEffects: The side effects are Skin rash, Vomiting, Headache, Nausea & Injection site reactions such as pain, swelling & redness etc.

medicines.name: ETHORED 500
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Ethamsylate 500 mg

medicines.description: Theolate Injection contain Etamsylate, an antihaemorrhagic drug that acts by stopping bleeding. It is prescribed in cases of surgeries & other medical and gynaecological conditions where bleeding is occurring or is suspected.
