medicines.name: NITOCALM 0.25
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etizolam 0.25 mg
medicines.description: Nitocalm tablets contain Etizolam, an anxiolytic drug that acts by altering the brain chemical levels. It is prescribed for Anxiety disorder, Panic disorder & Insomnia etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Decreased heart rate, impaired coordination, Sleepiness, yawning, decreased appetite, nausea, vomiting, dry mouth & headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: NITOCALM 0.5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etizolam 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Nitocalm tablets contain Etizolam, an anxiolytic drug that acts by altering the brain chemical levels. It is prescribed for Anxiety disorder, Panic disorder & Insomnia etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Decreased heart rate, impaired coordination, Sleepiness, yawning, decreased appetite, nausea, vomiting, dry mouth & headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: NITOCALM-P 0.25
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etizolam 0.25 mg & Propranolol 20 mg
medicines.description: Nitocalm-P tablet contains Etizolam, an anxiolytic drug that acts by altering the brain chemical levels & Propranolol, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. It is prescribed for Anxiety disorder, high BP, tremors & Migraine etc.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are decreased heart rate, impaired coordination, Sleepiness, yawning, decreased appetite, nausea, vomiting, dry mouth & headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: NITOCALM-P 0.5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etizolam 0.5 mg & Propranolol 20 mg
medicines.description: Nitocalm-P tablet contains Etizolam, an anxiolytic drug that acts by altering the brain chemical levels & Propranolol, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. It is prescribed for Anxiety disorder, high BP, tremors & Migraine etc.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are decreased heart rate, impaired coordination, Sleepiness, yawning, decreased appetite, nausea, vomiting, dry mouth & headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ESCIPIL-ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram 10 mg & Etizolam 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Escipil-ET tablet contains Escitalopram, an antidepressant & Etizolam, an anxiolytic; both of which acts by altering brain's chemicals. It is prescribed for co morbid anxiety & depression when manifest together and in other psychiatric diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Confusion, Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, memory impairment, drowsiness, tiredness, decreased orgasm & low sexual desire are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ASICLOPAM-ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Escitalopram 10 mg & Etizolam 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Asiclopam-ET tablets contain Escitalopram, an antidepressant & Etizolam, an anxiolytic; both of which acts by altering brain's chemicals. It is prescribed for co morbid anxiety & depression when manifest together and in other psychiatric diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Confusion, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, memory impairment, drowsiness, tiredness, decreased orgasm & low sexual desire are the main side effects.

medicines.name: DELZOWEL-30
medicines.composition: Each gastro-resistant tablet contains Duloxetine Hydrochloride 30 mg
medicines.description: Delzowel tablets contain Duloxetine, an antidepressants that acts by modulating brain chemicals. It is prescribed for generalized anxiety disorder, depressive disorders, nerve pain & other pain of central origin.
medicines.sideEffects: Prominent ones are nausea, headache, dry mouth, excessive sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: ALIDES-M
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Montelukast Sodium eq. to Montelukast 10 mg & Desloratadine 5 mg
medicines.description: Alides-M tablet contains Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that relieves inflammation & Desloratadine, an anti-allergic that acts by blocking the action of Histamine for its anti-allergic action. It is prescribed for long standing Asthma, allergic respiratory tract congestion & for cases of seasonal & perennial allergic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Fatigue, dry mouth, abdominal pain, nausea and headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ETOLID
medicines.composition: Each film coated extended release tablet contains Etodolac 600 mg
medicines.description: Etolid tablet contains Etodolac a NSAID which is indicated for painful conditions in Rheumatoid arthritis, Osteoarthritis, Ankylosing spondylitis & other muscuskeletal conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Vomiting, Stomach pain, Nausea, Indigestion, loss of appetite, diarrhea and heartburn

medicines.name: ETOLID-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etodolac 400 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg
medicines.description: Etolid-MR Tablet is combination of Etodolac a NSAID and Thiocolchicoside a Skeletal muscle relaxant which is indicated in Backache, Acute musculoskeletal spasms, Neuralgia, Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Ankylosing spondylitis & Sports injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, Heartburn, Stomach pain, Loss of appetite, Indigestion & Sleepiness

medicines.name: ETOLOSET-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etodolac 400 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg
medicines.description: Etoloset-MR tablets is a combination medicine which contains Etodolac and Thiocolchicoside, a medication used in the treatment of pain and inflammation associated with musculoskeletal disorders. Etodolac is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) that reduces pain and swelling, while Thiocolchicoside is a muscle relaxant that alleviates muscle spasms. Together, they provide relief from conditions such as arthritis, back pain, and other muscular or joint issues.
medicines.sideEffects: Diarrhea, headache, high or low blood pressure, abdominal pain, loss of appetite, indigestion, sleepiness, heartburn, nausea & vomiting are some of the common side effects.

medicines.name: ETOLOSET
medicines.composition: Each film coated extended-release tablet contains Etodolac 600 mg.
medicines.description: Etoloset tablet is used for short-term relief of pain, inflammation, and swelling in conditions that affect joints and muscles. It works by blocking chemical messengers in the brain that tell us we have pain. It can help relieve pain in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Vomiting, Nausea, Indigestion, Dizziness

medicines.name: ETOFORD-120
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 120 mg
medicines.description: Etoford 90/120 contains Etoricoxib a selective COX-2 inhibitor which helps to reduce the pain and swelling (inflammation) in the joints and muscles of people 16 years of age and older with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and gout. Etoford is also used for the short term treatment of moderate pain after dental surgery in people 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, stomach pain, diarrhea, Peripheral edema and flatulence.

medicines.name: ETOFORD-90
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 90 mg
medicines.description: Etoford 90/120 contains Etoricoxib a selective COX-2 inhibitor which helps to reduce the pain and swelling (inflammation) in the joints and muscles of people 16 years of age and older with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and gout. Etoford is also used for the short term treatment of moderate pain after dental surgery in people 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, stomach pain, diarrhea, Peripheral edema and flatulence.

medicines.name: ETOFORD-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 60 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg
medicines.description: Etoford-MR Tablet is combination of Etoricoxib a NSAID and Thiocolchicoside a Skeletal muscle relexant which is indicated in Backache, Acute musculoskeletal spasms, Neuralgia, Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Ankylosing spondylitis & Sports injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, stomach pain, diarrhea, Peripheral edema, flatulence, feeling sleepy (somnolence) and drowsiness.

medicines.name: ETOFORD-P
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 60 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Etoford-P is a combination of Etoricoxib a NSAID & Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which helps to reduce the pain and swelling (inflammation) in the joints and muscles of people 16 years of age and older with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and gout. It is also used for the short term treatment of moderate pain after dental surgery in people 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, Stomach pain, Diarrhea, Peripheral edema and Flatulence.

medicines.name: PREGABANYL ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Pregabalin (PR) 75 mg & Etoricoxib 60 mg
medicines.description: Pregabalin-ET Tablets is a combination of Pregabalin in sustained release form & Etoricoxib a COX 2 inhibitor used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia & fibromyalgias. Once daily dose provides day long action.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain, swelling of your hands or feet Irregular heartbeat (arrhythmia) and cold or flu-like symptoms.

medicines.name: ETOLYTE-120
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 120 mg
medicines.description: Etolyte 90/120 contains Etoricoxib (COX 2 inhibitor) which helps to reduce the pain and swelling (inflammation) in the joints and muscles of people 16 years of age and older with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and gout. Etolyte is also used for the short term treatment of moderate pain after dental surgery in people 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, stomach pain, diarrhea, peripheral edema and flatulence

medicines.name: ETOLYTE-90
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 90 mg
medicines.description: Etolyte 90/120 contains Etoricoxib (COX 2 inhibitor) which helps to reduce the pain and swelling (inflammation) in the joints and muscles of people 16 years of age and older with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and gout. Etolyte is also used for the short term treatment of moderate pain after dental surgery in people 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, stomach pain, diarrhea, peripheral edema and flatulence

medicines.name: ETOLYTE-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 60 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg
medicines.description: Etolyte-MR Tablet is combination of Etoricoxib (NSAID) and Thiocolchicoside (Skeletal muscle relaxant) which is indicated in Backache, Acute musculoskeletal spasms, Neuralgia, Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Ankylosing spondilitis & Sports injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects of are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, Stomach pain, diarrhea, Peripheral edema, flatulence, Feeling sleepy (somnolence) and drowsiness.

medicines.name: ETOLYTE-P
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 60 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Etolyte-P is a combination of Etoricoxib & Paracetamol which helps to reduce the pain and swelling (inflammation) in the joints and muscles of people 16 years of age and older with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and gout. Etolyte-P is also used for the short term treatment of moderate pain after dental surgery in people 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, stomach pain, diarrhea, peripheral edema and flatulence

medicines.name: PEGABANYL-ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Pregabalin (PR) 75 mg & Etoricoxib 60 mg
medicines.description: Pegabanyl- ET Tablet is a combination of Pregabalin in prolonged release form & Etoricoxib a COX 2 inhibitor used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia & fibromyalgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain, swelling of your hands or feet Irregular heartbeat (arrhythmia) and cold or flu-like symptoms.

medicines.name: FEMIVIN SOFT GEL
medicines.composition: Each soft gel capsule contains Evening Primrose Oil 500 mg
medicines.description: Femivin softgel contains evening primrose oil which contains Omega fatty acids along with Vitamins and minerals for general health and wellbeing in females. Femivin softgels contributes to the regulation of hormonal activity, normal function of the immune system and as a general health supplement for women.
medicines.sideEffects: Femivin softgels generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: ORALYTE SOLUTION (LEMON)
medicines.composition: Each 200 ml contains Sodium 234 mg, Potassium 158 mg, Chloride 294 mg, Dextrose 5.4 g, Vit. C 40 mg in 10 % Lemon Juice
medicines.description: Oralyte liquid is enriched with Vitamin C and Electrolytes. It restores body fluids & electrolytes, lost due to dehydration in during diarrhea, vomiting, muscle cramping, and exertional heat illness while exercising in hot or humid weather. It also helps to fulfill Vitamin C deficiency.
medicines.sideEffects: There are no observed side effects of Oralyte liquid.

medicines.name: ORALYTE SOLUTION (MANGO)
medicines.composition: Each 200 ml contains Sodium 234 mg, Potassium 158 mg, Chloride 294 mg, Dextrose 5.4 g, Vit. C 40 mg in 10 % Mango Juice
medicines.description: Oralyte liquid is enriched with Vitamin C and Electrolytes. It restores body fluids & electrolytes, lost due to dehydration in during diarrhea, vomiting, muscle cramping, and exertional heat illness while exercising in hot or humid weather. It also helps to fulfill Vitamin C deficiency.
medicines.sideEffects: There are no observed side effects of Oralyte liquid.

medicines.name: ORALYTE SOLUTION (ORANGE)
medicines.composition: Each 200 ml contains Sodium 234 mg, Potassium 158 mg, Chloride 294 mg, Dextrose 5.4 g, Vit. C 40 mg in 10 % Orange Juice
medicines.description: Oralyte liquid is enriched with Vitamin C and Electrolytes. It restores body fluids & electrolytes, lost due to dehydration in during diarrhea, vomiting, muscle cramping, and exertional heat illness while exercising in hot or humid weather. It also helps to fulfill Vitamin C deficiency.
medicines.sideEffects: There are no observed side effects of Oralyte liquid.

medicines.name: ORALYTE SOLUTION (APPLE)
medicines.composition: Each 200 ml contains Sodium 234 mg, Potassium 158 mg, Chloride 294 mg, Dextrose 5.4 g, Vit. C 40 mg in 10 % Apple Juice
medicines.description: Oralyte liquid is enriched with Vitamin C and Electrolytes. It restores body fluids & electrolytes, lost due to dehydration in during diarrhea, vomiting, muscle cramping, and exertional heat illness while exercising in hot or humid weather. It also helps to fulfill Vitamin C deficiency.
medicines.sideEffects: There are no observed side effects of Oralyte liquid.

medicines.name: ORALYTE SACHET
medicines.composition: Each sachet of 21 gm contains Sodium chloride 2.60 g, Potassium chloride 1.50 g, Sodium citrate 2.90 g, Dextrose (anhydrous) 13.50 g (Orange Flavour, ORS Powder)
medicines.description: Oralyte Powder is a WHO based ORS (Oral Rehydration Salt) formula. Oral rehydration salt is a combination of Dextrose and a number of essential electrolytes (Sodium Chloride, Potassium Chloride, Sodium Citrate). ORS Powder restores body fluids & electrolytes, lost due to dehydration in during diarrhea, vomiting, muscle cramping, and exertional heat illness while exercising in hot or humid weather.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild nausea and vomiting may occur. These effects can be decreased by taking this product slowly in small amounts with a spoon. If any of these effects persist or worsen, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.
medicines.dosage: Dissolve the contents of the packet in the amount of drinking water indicated on the packet, usually 1 litre. If drinking water is not available, or if you are not sure the water is drinkable, boil the water for at least 10 minutes and then let cool. Stir well, and give to the child or adult to drink in a cup or spoon-feed.

medicines.name: BREATH EX
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Camphor 25 mg, Chlorothymol 5 mg, Eucalyptus Oil 125 mg, Menthol 55 mg & Terpineol 125 mg
medicines.description: Breath-Ex inhalant softgel contains Camphor, Chlorothymol, Eucalyptol Oil, Menthol & Terpineol that acts synergistically to clear congestion and other cold-related symptoms. It is used for relieving nasal symptoms such as runny, itchy, stuffy nose, sneezing and post-nasal drip; besides it is also used in case of skin itching following eczema.
medicines.sideEffects: It is very well tolerated; the only observed side effects are nasal irritation & burning sensation. On topical application for itching it might cause mild skin irritation.
medicines.dosage: Cut open one softgel and pour the contents in hot water or paper to take steam or smell respectively 3 times a day for 5 to 7 days only. At the max can use every 6 hours i.e. 4 times a day. It can be safely used by children over 3 years, use half the content of softgel for up to 6 years.

medicines.name: GEOFRESH MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Thymol 0.06% w/v, Eucalyptol 0.09% w/v, Menthol 0.04% w/v & Ethanol (95%) 21.6% v/v
medicines.description: Geofresh mouthwash contains Thymol, Eucalyptol, Menthol & Ethanol. Thymol acts as antiseptic agent, Eucalyptol acts as anti-inflammatory & relieves minor pain, Menthol is a freshening agent and soother & Ethanol is antiseptic, cleanser, analgesic and soother. Geofresh Mouthwash is used for prevention of plaque in absence of brushing, prevention and treatment of swollen gums, treatment of minor oral infections, controlling secondary bacterial infections for mouth & gum ulcers besides aiding in treatment of mouth and throat infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effect observed.
medicines.dosage: Take a measure full or 15 ml of Geofresh mouthwash in your mouth & swish for one minute thoroughly. Do not rinse, eat or drink thereafter for 20 minutes. It is to be used under adult supervision for kids under 5 years of age. Do not swallow it, after swishing thoroughly spit out. Can be used twice daily once in the morning and then before retiring to bed.

medicines.name: QUIK RELIF PATCH
medicines.composition: Each rectangular patch coated with paste containing Katuvira fruit oil 0.5 %, Gandhpura leaf oil 1.0 % , kapoor leaf crystals 0.1%, nilgiri leaf oil 0.1%& Gurmar leaf oil ext. 0.1% in 10cm x 16cm plaster
medicines.description: Quik Relif patch is trans dermal patch that provide effective relief in cases of chronic painful musculoskeletal conditions. Quik Relif patch is almost devoid of any side effects being herbal & has direct action at the site of injury or inflammation. KINDLY READ THE APPLICATION METHOD BEFORE USING IT FOR PROPER USE & BEST RESULTS.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild irritation at the site of application is the only side effects.

medicines.name: NOZCALM SOFT GEL
medicines.composition: Each soft gel capsule contains Camphor 25 mg, Chlorothymol 5 mg, Eucalyptol Oil 125 mg, Menthol 55 mg & Terpineol 120 mg.
medicines.description: Nozcalm inhalant soft gel is a combination medicine which contains Camphor, Chlorothymol, Eucalyptol Oil, Menthol and Terpineol Oil. Nozcalm inhalant soft gels helps relieve nasal congestion and supports respiratory health. The active ingredients offers soothing effects, helping to clear the airways and promote easier breathing. Nozcalm is ideal for cold or seasonal allergies as it provide a convenient, fast-acting way to ease discomfort and support overall respiratory well-being.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, drowsiness, running nose, watery eyes, itching are some of the side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: ERSORYN-40 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each Pre-filled Syringe contains Enoxaparin Sodium 40 mg
medicines.description: Ersoryn contains Enoxaparin, which is a low molecular weight Heparin (4500 daltons) having clot dissolving and blood thinning properties and thus used in numerous micro & macro vascular complications. Ersoryn-40 is used in prophylaxis of venous thromboembolic diseases, treatment of deep vein thrombosis (DVT) and pulmonary embolism (PE), prevention of thrombus formation during haemodialysis & treatment of unstable Angina and Myocardial infarction.
medicines.sideEffects: Haemorrhages, Thrombocytopenia, Liver enzyme elevation and Thrombocytosis are the most commonly reported side effects.

medicines.name: ERSORYN-60 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each Pre-filled Syringe contains Enoxaparin Sodium 60 mg
medicines.description: Ersoryn contains Enoxaparin, which is a low molecular weight Heparin (4500 daltons) having clot dissolving and blood thinning properties and thus used in numerous micro & macro vascular complications. Ersoryn-40 is used in prophylaxis of venous thromboembolic diseases, treatment of deep vein thrombosis (DVT) and pulmonary embolism (PE), prevention of thrombus formation during haemodialysis & treatment of unstable Angina and Myocardial infarction.
medicines.sideEffects: Haemorrhages, Thrombocytopenia, Liver enzyme elevation and Thrombocytosis are the most commonly reported side effects.

medicines.name: LEEPILL-ET
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Levonorgestrel 0.15 mg & Ethinylestradiol 0.03 mg
medicines.description: Leepill-ET is a combination of oral contraceptives that act by stopping ovulation and thus pregnancy. Leepill-ET is used for the prevention of pregnancy in women who prefer to use oral contraceptives as a method of contraception to avoid pregnancy.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, Vomiting, Gastrointestinal symptoms (such as abdominal cramps and bloating), Breakthrough bleeding, Spotting, Change in menstrual flow & Amenorrhea may occur.

medicines.name: DROSPESURE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Drospirenone 3 mg & Ethinylestradiol 0.03 mg
medicines.description: Drospesure tablets contains Drospirenone & Ethinylestradiol, two different hormones that works by stopping a woman's egg from fully developing each month thus preventing them from accepting the sperm and thus fertilization (pregnancy) is prevented. It is used as contraceptive pill by females.
medicines.sideEffects: Spotting, Dysmenorrhea, Vomiting, Breast Tenderness, Clumsiness, Nervousness & Increased Irritability, Metrorrhagia, Headache, Nausea, Sinusitis & Vaginal Moniliasis.

medicines.name: DINOTERM-ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dienogest 2 mg & Ethinylestradiol 30 mcg
medicines.description: Dinoterm-ET tablets is a combination of Dienogest & Ethinylestradiol, two drugs that are used as oral contraceptive thus helps to prevent pregnancy. Dienogest is a progestin that suppresses ovulation, while Ethinylestradiol is an estrogen that helps regulate the menstrual cycle. Together, they provide effective birth control, regulate periods, and may reduce symptoms of acne or endometriosis.
medicines.sideEffects: Breast pain, headache, nausea and vomiting, irregular periods, abdominal cramps, weight change, swelling & dizziness are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: EMIPHIL-2
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Estradiol Valerate 2 mg
medicines.description: Emiphil-2 tablet contains Estradiol valerate, which is a substitute for female hormone (estrogen) & is used by women to help reduce symptoms of menopause (such as hot flashes, vaginal dryness etc) & certain other conditions like Osteoporosis.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, bloating, breast tenderness, headache & weight changes may occur.

medicines.name: EMPAFORD-25 L
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Empagliflozin 25 mg & Linagliptin 5 mg (Blister)
medicines.description: EMPAFORD-25 L is an anti-diabetic medication, used to treat type 2 diabetes in adults. It is a combination of two active substances- empagliflozin and linagliptin. These medicines work together to lower the raised blood sugar levels by improving insulin release. The excess sugar is excreted via urine.
medicines.sideEffects: Cough, rash, itching, frequent urination, low blood sugar levels

medicines.name: EMPAFORD-12.5 M
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Empagliflozin 12.5 mg & Metformin 500 mg IR
medicines.description: Empaford is an anti-diabetic medication. It contains a combination of empagliflozin and metformin as active substances. It is used for the management of type 2 diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, abdominal pain, loss of appetite

medicines.name: EMPAFORD-10
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Empagliflozin 10 mg
medicines.description: EMPAFORD-10 contains Empagliflozin 10 mg, a selective SGLT2 inhibitor that lowers blood glucose levels by promoting urinary glucose excretion. It is indicated for the management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus and also offers proven cardiovascular and renal benefits.
medicines.sideEffects: May include urinary tract infections, genital mycotic infections, increased urination, and mild dehydration. Rarely, ketoacidosis may occur. Monitor renal function periodically.

medicines.name: EMPAFORD-25
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Empagliflozin 25 mg
medicines.description: EMPAFORD-25 contains Empagliflozin 25 mg, a selective SGLT2 inhibitor that lowers blood glucose levels by promoting urinary glucose excretion. It is indicated for the management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus and also offers proven cardiovascular and renal benefits.
medicines.sideEffects: May include urinary tract infections, genital mycotic infections, increased urination, and mild dehydration. Rarely, ketoacidosis may occur. Monitor renal function periodically.

medicines.name: EMPAFORD 12.5 M FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Empagliflozin 12.5 mg & Metformin hydrochloride 1000 mg
medicines.description: EMPAFORD 12.5 M FORTE is a fixed-dose combination of Empagliflozin, a selective SGLT2 inhibitor, and Metformin ER, a biguanide. This dual therapy provides effective glycaemic control in Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus by reducing glucose reabsorption in the kidneys and improving insulin sensitivity. The extended-release form of Metformin ensures better gastrointestinal tolerance and sustained action.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, abdominal pain, loss of appetite

medicines.name: EMPAFORD 10 L
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Empagliflozin 10 mg & Linagliptin 5 mg
medicines.description: EMPAFORD-10 L is an anti-diabetic medication, used to treat type 2 diabetes in adults. It is a combination of two active substances- empagliflozin and linagliptin. These medicines work together to lower the raised blood sugar levels by improving insulin release. The excess sugar is excreated via urine.
medicines.sideEffects: Cough, rash, itching, frequent urination, low blood sugar levels

medicines.name: EMPAFORD S-10
medicines.composition: Empagliflozin 10 mg & Sitagliptin 100 mg
medicines.description: Empaford S-10 tablets contain Empagliflozin and Sitagliptin, two antidiabetic agents that help control blood sugar levels in type 2 diabetes. Empagliflozin, an SGLT2 inhibitor, lowers blood glucose by increasing its excretion through urine, while Sitagliptin, a DPP-4 inhibitor, enhances insulin secretion and reduces glucagon levels. Together, they improve glycemic control and help reduce the risk of diabetes-related complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects: urinary tract infections, increased urination, headache, and mild gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: EMPAFORD S- 25
medicines.composition: Empagliflozin 25 mg & Sitagliptin 100 mg
medicines.description: Empaford S- 25 tablets contain Empagliflozin and Sitagliptin, two antidiabetic agents that help control blood sugar levels in type 2 diabetes. Empagliflozin, an SGLT2 inhibitor, lowers blood glucose by increasing its excretion through urine, while Sitagliptin, a DPP-4 inhibitor, enhances insulin secretion and reduces glucagon levels. Together, they improve glycemic control and help reduce the risk of diabetes-related complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects: urinary tract infections, increased urination, headache, and mild gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: CEODERM PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g of cream contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate IP 0.25 mg, Econazole Nitrate IP 10 mg, Neomycin Sulphate IP 5 mg & Chlorocresol IP 1 mg
medicines.description: Ceoderm Plus is a topical cream that combines Beclomethasone Dipropionate, a potent corticosteroid for reducing inflammation; Econazole Nitrate, an antifungal agent for treating fungal infections; Neomycin Sulphate, an antibiotic for bacterial infections; and Chlorocresol, an antiseptic for preventing microbial growth. This combination is used to treat inflammatory skin conditions complicated by fungal and bacterial infections, such as eczema, dermatitis, and psoriasis.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects may include skin irritation, burning sensation, and allergic reactions. Prolonged use may lead to skin thinning.

medicines.name: FAROSPECT-200
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Faropenem Sodium eq. to Faropenem 200 mg
medicines.description: Farospect tablet contains Faropenem, an oral penem antibiotic that is used in cases of resistant infections & it act via inhibiting the growth of disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infection, Gynaecological infection, ear nose & throat infections & Skin infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects are Vomiting, stomach pain, diarrhoea, lack of appetite, gastritis, constipation, dizziness, drowsiness, edema, muscular pain & lethargy.

medicines.name: FAROSPECT-300 ER
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Faropenem 300 mg in extended release form
medicines.description: Farospect tablet contains Faropenem, an oral penem antibiotic in extended release form that is used in cases of resistant infections & it act via inhibiting the growth of disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infection, Gynaecological infection, ear nose & throat infections & Skin infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects are Vomiting, stomach pain, diarrhoea, lack of appetite, gastritis, constipation, dizziness, drowsiness, edema, muscular pain & lethargy.

medicines.name: FRAPETERM-300 ER
medicines.composition: Each film-coated tablet contains Faropenem 300 mg (ER)
medicines.description: FRAPETERM-300 ER contains Faropenem, a broad-spectrum oral beta-lactam antibiotic of the penem group. It is effective against gram-positive, gram-negative, and anaerobic bacteria, making it useful in treating respiratory, urinary, skin, and gynecological infections with a favorable safety and resistance profile.
medicines.sideEffects: May include diarrhea, nausea, or skin rash. Rarely, allergic reactions or liver enzyme elevation.

medicines.name: FRAPETERM-200
medicines.composition: Each film-coated tablet contains Faropenem 200 mg
medicines.description: FRAPETERM-200 contains Faropenem, a broad-spectrum oral beta-lactam antibiotic of the penem group. It is effective against gram-positive, gram-negative, and anaerobic bacteria, making it useful in treating respiratory, urinary, skin, and gynecological infections with a favorable safety and resistance profile.
medicines.sideEffects: May include diarrhea, nausea, or skin rash. Rarely, allergic reactions or liver enzyme elevation.

medicines.name: FAROSPECT-CV
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Faropenem 200 mg & Clavulanic acid 125 mg
medicines.description: Farospect-CV tablets contain Faropenem and Clavulanic acid, two antibacterial agents used to treat a variety of bacterial infections. Faropenem, a broad-spectrum beta-lactam antibiotic, works by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis, leading to the destruction of bacteria. Clavulanic acid inhibits beta-lactamase enzymes produced by resistant bacteria, thereby enhancing the effectiveness of Faropenem. Together, they provide a potent defense against resistant bacterial infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects: nausea, diarrhea, abdominal discomfort, and mild skin rash.

medicines.name: FRAPETERM-CV
medicines.composition: Each Film coated tablet contains Faropenem 200 mg & Clavulanic acid 125 mg
medicines.description: FRAPETERM-CV tablets contain Faropenem, a broad-spectrum oral beta-lactam antibiotic from the penem group, and Clavulanic Acid, a beta-lactamase inhibitor. This combination enhances antibacterial efficacy by inhibiting beta-lactamase enzymes, making it effective against a wide range of Gram-positive and Gram-negative bacteria. It is indicated for the treatment of respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and other bacterial infections resistant to conventional antibiotics.
medicines.sideEffects: FRAPETERM-CV is generally well tolerated. Common side effects may include nausea, diarrhea, abdominal pain, headache, and skin rash. In rare cases, allergic reactions or liver enzyme elevations may occur.

medicines.name: ETOFEX -120
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 120 mg
medicines.description: Etofex tablets contain Fexofenadine, an antiallergic drug that stops the action of Histamine to stop allergy. It is prescribed in cases of seasonal and perennial allergic complication of respiratory tract such as sneezing, runny nose, red & watery eyes etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, drowsiness, dizziness & nausea are the observed side effects.

medicines.name: ETOFEX -180
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 180 mg
medicines.description: Etofex tablets contain Fexofenadine, an antiallergic drug that stops the action of Histamine to stop allergy. It is prescribed in cases of seasonal and perennial allergic complication of respiratory tract such as sneezing, runny nose, red & watery eyes etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, drowsiness, dizziness & nausea are the observed side effects.

medicines.name: FEBUTAX-80
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Febuxostat 80 mg
medicines.description: Febutax tablets contain Febuxostat which is a xanthine oxidase inhibitor indicated to treat excess uric acid in the blood (hyperuricemia) in patients with gout.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are joint pain/swelling/stiffness, nausea, skin rash and dizziness.

medicines.name: FEBUVEL 40
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Febuxostat 40 mg
medicines.description: Febuvel tablets contain Febuxostat which is a xanthine oxidase inhibitor indicated to treat excess uric acid in the blood (hyperuricemia) in patients with gout.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are joint pain/swelling/stiffness, nausea, skin rash and dizziness.

medicines.name: FEBUVEL 80
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Febuxostat 80 mg
medicines.description: Febuvel tablets contain Febuxostat which is a xanthine oxidase inhibitor indicated to treat excess uric acid in the blood (hyperuricemia) in patients with gout.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are joint pain/swelling/stiffness, nausea, skin rash and dizziness.

medicines.name: FEBUTAX-40 (10's & 15's)
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Febuxostat 40 mg
medicines.description: Febutax tablets contain Febuxostat which is a xanthine oxidase inhibitor indicated to treat excess uric acid in the blood (hyperuricemia) in patients with gout.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are joint pain/swelling/stiffness, nausea, skin rash and dizziness.

medicines.name: CARDIOROSTIN-FB
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Rosuvastatin Calcium eq. to Rosuvastatin 10 mg & Fenofibrate 160 mg
medicines.description: Cardiorostin-FB tablets contains Rosuvastatin & Fenofibrate, both are lipid lowering drugs. It is prescribed to correct the imbalance of lipids (fats) in blood and to decrease the increased levels of cholesterol in blood swiftly.
medicines.sideEffects: The drug is well tolerated; however muscle & joint pain, diarrhoea, nausea, headache, dizziness & allergic reactions are main side effects.

medicines.name: CARDIOZEN-FB
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Atorvastatin Calcium eq. to Atorvastatin 10 mg & Fenofibrate 160 mg
medicines.description: Cardiozen-FB tablets contain Atorvastatin & Fenofibrate, a combination of two lipid lowering drugs for aggressive control of fats in blood. It is prescribed to correct the imbalance of fats in blood and to decrease severely increased levels of cholesterol in blood.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are muscle pain, diarrhoea, nausea, joint pain & allergic reactions.

medicines.name: ATORNIZ-FB
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Atorvastatin Calcium eq. to Atorvastatin 10 mg & Fenofibrate 160 mg
medicines.description: Atorniz-FB tablets contain Atorvastatin & Fenofibrate, a combination of two lipid lowering drugs for aggressive control of fats in blood. It is prescribed to correct the imbalance of fats in blood and to decrease severely increased levels of cholesterol in blood.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are muscle pain, diarrhoea, nausea, joint pain & allergic reactions.

medicines.name: VASOHART-FB
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Rosuvastatin Calcium eq. to Rosuvastatin 10 mg & Fenofibrate 160 mg
medicines.description: Vasohart-FB tablets contains Rosuvastatin & Fenofibrate, both lipid lowering drugs. It is prescribed to correct the imbalance of lipids (fats) in blood and to decrease the increased levels of cholesterol in blood swiftly.
medicines.sideEffects: The drug is well tolerated; however muscle & joint pain, diarrhoea, nausea, headache, dizziness & allergic reactions are main side effects.

medicines.name: FEROTIN SYRUP (100 & 200 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Ferric Ammonium Citrate 110 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, Vit. B12 15 mcg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 1.5 mg & Sorbitol solution 70% QS
medicines.description: Ferotin syrup contains Ferric ammonium citrate (form of Iron) in combination with Folic acid (Vitamin B9), Vitamin B12 and Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6). It is indicated for treatment and prevention of iron deficiency anaemia. It is also used for preventing iron, folic acid and vitamin deficiencies during pregnancy, breastfeeding, after surgery or in conditions of nutritional malabsorption.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: HB FORD SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 15 ml of syrup contains Ferric Ammonium Citrate 160 mg eq. to elemental Iron 32 mg, Cyanocobalamin 7.5 mcg, Folic acid 0.5 mg & Sorbitol solution 70% QS
medicines.description: HB ford Syrup contains Ferric Ammonium Citrate in combination with Vitamin B12 and Folic acid. HB ford Syrup is indicated in iron deficiency anaemia, malabsorption syndrome, pregnancy and lactation and in major blood loss.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: HB FORD PLUS SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Proteolyzed Liver 200 mg (derived from not less than 1.2 gm of fresh liver having Vit. B12 activity eq. to 0.8 mcg), Peptone 200 mg, Ferric Ammonium Citrate 53.4 mg eq. to elemental Iron 11.48 mg & Folic acid 0.17 mg (Natural Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: HB ford Plus Syrup contains hydrolyzed Proteins, Iron, Vitamin B12 and folic acid.HB ford Plus Syrup is indicated in Hypoproteinemia (condition in which a person has very low levels of protein in the blood) and related Iron deficiency especially in pregnancy and lactation, Iron deficiency anaemia, post-surgical cases.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: HB FORD DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ferric Ammonium Citrate 150 mg eq. to elemental Iron 30 mg, Folic acid 200 mcg, Cyanocobalamin 4 mcg & L-Lysine Hydrochloride 150 mg
medicines.description: HB ford drops contains Ferric Ammonium Citrate in combination with Vitamin B12 and Folic acid and L-lysine. HB ford drops are indicated for preventing and treating iron deficiency anaemia and blood loss in neonates and infants.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: FEMOZER SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Ferric Ammonium Citrate 110 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg,Vit.B 12 15 mcg & Pyridoxine HCl 1.5 mg
medicines.description: Femozer Syrup is indicated for treatment and prevention of iron deficiency anaemia. It is also used for preventing iron & folic acid deficiency during pregnancy, breastfeeding, after surgery or in conditions of nutritional malabsorption.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: IROFORM
medicines.composition: Each 15 ml contains Ferric Ammonium Citrate 160 mg, Cyanocobalamin 7.5 mcg, Folic Acid 0.5mg
medicines.description: Iroform Syrup is a nutritional supplement that helps manage and prevent anemia. It contains Ferric Ammonium Citrate (an iron source for red blood cell production), Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) for healthy blood and neurological function, and Folic Acid for cell growth and red blood cell formation. Iroform Syrup is indicated for iron deficiency anaemia, pregnancy and lactation and in major blood loss.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.description: Iroform Plus Syrup contains hydrolyzed Proteins, Iron, Vitamin B12 and Folic acid. Iroform Plus Syrup is indicated in Hypoproteinemia (condition in which a person has very low levels of protein in the blood) and related Iron deficiency especially in pregnancy and lactation, Iron deficiency anaemia, post-surgical cases

medicines.description: Ferivate-XT drops contains Ferrous Ascorbate a highly absorbable form of iron and folic acid, both important for formation of blood. Ferivate-XT drops are indicated for preventing and treating iron deficiency anaemia and blood loss in neonates and infants.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools and abdominal pain

medicines.name: EVOCOB SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Ferrous Ascorbate eq. to elemental Iron 30 mg, Folic acid 0.5 mg, Methylcobalamin 500 mcg
medicines.description: Evocob suspension contains Ferrous Ascorbate a highly absorbable form of iron with folic acid. Evocob suspension is indicated for preventing and treating iron deficiency anaemia, pregnancy and lactation, post-surgery and in haemodialysis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.description: Ferivate-XT Tablet contains Ferrous ascorbate in combination with Adenosylcobalamin (form of Vitamin B12), Folic acid and Zinc.Ferivate-XT is indicated in iron deficiency anaemia, megaloblastic anaemia, pregnancy and lactation and in major blood loss.

medicines.description: Evocob tablet contains Ferrous Ascorbate a highly absorbable form of iron with folic acid, Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Zinc. Ferivate tablet is indicated for preventing and treating iron deficiency anaemia, pregnancy and lactation, post-surgery and in haemodialysis.

medicines.name: FEMOZER XT TABLETS

medicines.description: Femozer-XT Tablet contains Ferrous Ascorbate, crucial for preventing and treating iron deficiency anemia. Folic Acid is included for healthy red blood cell production and cell growth, while Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate supports immune function and overall development.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools and abdominal pain

medicines.name: FEMOZER-M
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ferrous Ascorbate eq. to elemental Iron 100 mg, Folic acid 1.1 mg, Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg & Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg
medicines.description: Femozer-M tablet contains Ferrous Ascorbate a highly absorbable form of iron with folic acid, Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Zinc. Femozer tablet is indicated for preventing and treating iron deficiency anaemia, pregnancy and lactation, post-surgery and in haemodialysis.

medicines.description: Ferivate-M tablet contains Ferrous Ascorbate a highly absorbable form of iron with folic acid, Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Zinc. Ferivate tablet is indicated for preventing and treating iron deficiency anaemia, pregnancy and lactation, post-surgery and in haemodialysis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools and abdominal pain

medicines.name: FERIVATE-XT SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Ferrous Ascorbate eq. to elemental Iron 30 mg and Folic acid 550 mcg
medicines.description: Ferivate-XT Syrup contains nutritional supplements that help the body perform vital functions, like forming red blood cells, absorbing iron, strengthening the immune system, and improving the metabolism in nutrition-deficient patients. It is generally co-prescribed with other medicines for the management of various conditions like anemia, post pregnancy, bone Injury, and malnutrition.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools and abdominal pain.

medicines.name: FEMOZER-XT DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ferrous Ascorbate eq. to el. Iron 10 mg & Folic Acid 100 mcg
medicines.description: Femozer-XT drops is formulated to maintain optimal iron and folic acid levels, essential for overall health and vitality. Iron and folic acid play vital roles in supporting red blood cell production, preventing anaemia, and promoting the healthy development of tissues and cells. The syrup is useful for individuals of all ages, ensuring the body receives the iron and folic acid it needs to stay energized.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: FEMOZER-XT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ferrous Ascorbate eq. to el. Iron 100 mg, Adenosylcobalamin 500 mcg, Folic acid 1.5 mg & El. Zinc 5 mg
medicines.description: Femozer XT Plus contains Ferrous Ascorbate, Adenosylcobalamin, Folic acid & Zinc combination used to treat and prevent iron deficiency anemia, support red blood cell production, and correct deficiencies of folic acid and zinc which are essential for DNA synthesis, cell division, and immune function. This formulation is commonly prescribed during pregnancy, lactation, or periods of increased nutritional needs. It enhances iron absorption and supports overall immune and cellular health.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include nausea, vomiting, constipation, diarrhea, abdominal discomfort, and dark stools. Rarely, allergic reactions such as rash, swelling, or difficulty breathing may occur.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

Femozer-Plus drops are indicated in children (above 6 months of age) for iron deficiency anaemia, Megabolastic anaemia, anaemia related to malnutrition and in post-surgical conditions.
