medicines.description: Femozer Plus Syrup contain Ferrous bisglycinate(form of Iron) and Zin bisglycinate in amino acid chelate forms which are better absorbed.It also contains Folic acid (Vitamin B9) and Cynocobalamin (Vitamin B12).It provides complete solution for blood formation. Femozer-Plus Syrup is indicated in children (above 6 months of age) for iron deficiency anaemia, Megabolastic anaemia, anaemia related to malnutrition and in post-surgical conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: FEMOZER PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ferrous Bisglycinate eq. to elemental Iron 60 mg, Zinc Bisglycinate eq. to elemental Zinc 15 mg, Folic Acid 1 mg and Methylcobalmin 500 mcg
medicines.description: Femozer Plus Tablets contain Ferrous bisglycinate and Zinc bisglycinate in amino acid chelated forms which are better absorbed and has minimal side effect unlike other forms of Iron. It also contains Folic acid and Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12). Femozer-Plus Tablets are indicated for elderly, adults & children above 12 years of age for iron deficiency anaemia, Megabolastic anaemia, anaemia related to malnutrition, in post-surgical & other relevant medical conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, dark stools & occasional abdominal pain.

medicines.name: HB FORD CAPSULE
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Ferrous Fumarate 304 mg. eq. to elemental Iron 100 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, Vitamin B12 (in gelatin) 10 mcg & Zinc Sulphate eq. to elemental Zinc 15 mg
medicines.description: HBford Capsule contains Ferrous Fumarate in combination with folic, Vitamin B12 and Folic acid and Zinc. HBford Capsule is indicated for iron deficiency anaemia, malabsorption syndrome, pregnancy and lactation and in major blood loss.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools and abdominal pain.

medicines.name: MINOLAST-FX
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of Suspension contains Montelukast Sodium eq. to Montelukast 4 mg & Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 60 mg
medicines.description: Minolast-FX contains Montelukast, a Lukotriene inhibitor that relieves inflammation and oedema & Fexofenadine, an anti-allergic that relieves allergy. It is prescribed in cases of long standing asthma, respiratory tract congestion & all sort of allergic manifestations.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, drowsiness, dizziness, abdominal pain, dyspepsia & nausea.

medicines.name: MINOLAST-FX
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Montelukast Sodium eq. to Montelukast 10 mg & Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 120 mg
medicines.description: Minolast-FX contains Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that relieves inflammation and oedema & Fexofenadine, an anti-allergic that relieves allergy. It is prescribed in cases of long standing asthma, respiratory tract congestion & all sort of allergic manifestations.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, drowsiness, dizziness, abdominal pain, dyspepsia & nausea.

medicines.name: FEXODAT-120
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 120 mg
medicines.description: Fexodat tablets contain Fexofenadine, an antiallergic drug that stops the action of Histamine to stop allergy. It is prescribed in cases of seasonal and perennial allergic complication of respiratory tract such as sneezing, runny nose, red & watery eyes etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, drowsiness, dizziness & nausea are the observed side effects.

medicines.name: FEXODAT-180
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 180 mg
medicines.description: Fexodat tablets contain Fexofenadine, an antiallergic drug that stops the action of Histamine to stop allergy. It is prescribed in cases of seasonal and perennial allergic complication of respiratory tract such as sneezing, runny nose, red & watery eyes etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, drowsiness, dizziness & nausea are the observed side effects.

medicines.name: RELIKAST FX
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Montelukast Sodium eq. to Montelukast 10 mg & Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 120 mg
medicines.description: Relikast-FX contains Montelukast, a Lukotriene inhibitor that relieves inflammation and oedema & Fexofenadine, an anti-allergic that relieves allergy. It is prescribed in cases of long standing asthma, respiratory tract congestion & all sorts of allergic manifestations.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, drowsiness, dizziness, abdominal pain, dyspepsia & nausea.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD-MAX
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Paracetamol 325 mg, Phenylephrine 10 mg & Fexofenadine 60 mg.
medicines.description: Criticold Max is a combination of three medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Criticold Max helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: RELIKAST-FX SYRUP (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of Suspension contains Montelukast Sodium eq. to Montelukast 4 mg & Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 60 mg
medicines.description: Relikast-FX contains Montelukast, a Lukotriene inhibitor that relieves inflammation and oedema & Fexofenadine, an anti-allergic that relieves allergy. It is prescribed in cases of long standing asthma, respiratory tract congestion & all sort of allergic manifestations.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, drowsiness, dizziness, abdominal pain, dyspepsia & nausea.

medicines.name: URILOSIN-F
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride ER 0.4 mg & Finasteride 5 mg
medicines.description: Urilosin-F tablets are indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) in men with an enlarged prostate. Tamsulosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Finasteride prevents testosterone from converting to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, asthenia, back pain, chest pain, dizziness, somnolence, decreased libido runny nose, nausea, abnormal ejaculation, breast pain and blurred vision.

medicines.name: TINFAL PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Biotin 5 mg & Finasteride 1 mg
medicines.description: Tinfal Plus tablet contains Biotin, a B Vitamin that maintains healthy hair, skin & muscle tissue as well as regulate metabolism & Finasteride, stops the shortening of hair follicle and thus supports hair growth. It is prescribed to treat male pattern baldness at the crown and in the middle of the scalp in adult males.
medicines.sideEffects: Decrease in libido is the only observed side effect.

medicines.name: TINFAL-5 F SOLUTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Minoxidil 5% w/v & Finasteride 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Tinfal-5 F solution contains Minoxidil, a vasodilator that helps hair growth by increasing hair shaft diameter and by inducing its growth & Finasteride, stops the shortening of hair follicle and thus supports hair growth. It is prescribed to help hair growth in the treatment of male pattern baldness (from centre of head).
medicines.sideEffects: High BP & burning as well as stinging sensation at the application site are few side effects.

medicines.name: TINFAL-10 F SOLUTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Minoxidil 10% w/v & Finasteride 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Tinfal-10 F solution contains Minoxidil, a vasodilator that helps hair growth by increasing hair shaft diameter and by inducing its growth & Finasteride, stops the shortening of hair follicle and thus supports hair growth. It is prescribed to help hair growth in the treatment of male pattern baldness (from centre of head).
medicines.sideEffects: Minoxidil may increase BP & cause burning as well as stinging sensation at the application site are the few side effects.

medicines.name: ACTIHAIR-10 F
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Minoxidil 10% w/v & Finasteride 0.1% w/v (with spray & dropper)
medicines.description: Actihair- 10 F solution contains Minoxidil, a vasodilator that helps hair growth by increasing hair shaft diameter and by inducing its growth & Finasteride, stops the shortening of hair follicle and thus supports hair growth. It is prescribed to help hair growth in the treatment of male pattern baldness (from centre of head).
medicines.sideEffects: Minoxidil increases BP & cause burning as well as stinging sensation at the application site are few side effects.

medicines.name: ACTIHAIR-5 F
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Minoxidil 5% w/v & Finasteride 0.1% w/v (with spray & dropper)
medicines.description: Actihair- 5 F solution contains Minoxidil, a vasodilator that helps hair growth by increasing hair shaft diameter and by inducing its growth & Finasteride, stops the shortening of hair follicle and thus supports hair growth. It is prescribed to help hair growth in the treatment of male pattern baldness (from centre of head).
medicines.sideEffects: Minoxidil increases BP & cause burning as well as stinging sensation at the application site are few side effects.

medicines.name: TAMSUGARD-F
medicines.composition: Each capsule contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride ER 0.4 mg & Finasteride 5 mg
medicines.description: Tamsugard-F capsules are indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) in men with an enlarged prostate. Tamsulosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Finasteride prevents testosterone from converting to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, asthenia, back pain, chest pain, dizziness, somnolence, decreased libido, runny nose, nausea, abnormal ejaculation, breast pain and blurred vision.

medicines.name: URIVEL
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Flavoxate Hydrochloride 200 mg (Urinary Antispasmodic)
medicines.description: Urivel tablets contain Flavoxate, a urinary antispasmodic that relaxes the smooth muscles of the urinary tract to relieve spasm. It is prescribed for relief of painful urination, urgency to go to urinate, frequent urination at night, pubic pain due to UTIs & in regulating frequency and control on urination as may occur in inflammation of urinary bladder, prostate gland, urethra etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, Vomiting, dry mouth, dyspepsia & sleepiness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: VOXMOFORD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Flavoxate Hydrochloride 200 mg
medicines.description: Voxmoford tablets contain Flavoxate, a urinary antispasmodic that relaxes the smooth muscles of the urinary tract to relieve spasm. It is prescribed for relief of painful urination, urgency to go to urinate, frequent urination at night, pubic pain due to UTIs & in regulating frequency and control on urination as may occur in inflammation of urinary bladder, prostate gland, urethra etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, Vomiting, dry mouth, dyspepsia & sleepiness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: FLUMET IV
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Fluconazole 2 mg i.e. 200 mg in 100 ml FFS bottle
medicines.description: Flumet tablets & infusion contains Fluconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the brain, skin, internal organs & oral as well as vaginal fungal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, raised liver enzymes and skin rash.

medicines.name: FLUMET PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Fluconazole 150 mg & Ivermectin 6 mg
medicines.description: Flumet Plus tablet contains Fluconazole, an antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus & Ivermectin, an antihelminthic that kills worms. It is prescribed for infected scabies by fungal infections & other mixed infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are Nausea, Diarrhoea, Stomach pain, Indigestion, Taste change, Dizziness, Headache, Itching, Swelling of lymph nodes.

medicines.name: FLUMET-150
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Fluconazole 150 mg
medicines.description: Flumet tablets & infusion contains Fluconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the brain, skin, internal organs & oral as well as vaginal fungal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, raised liver enzymes and skin rash.

medicines.name: FLUMET-200
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Fluconazole 200 mg
medicines.description: Flumet tablets & infusion contains Fluconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the brain, skin, internal organs & oral as well as vaginal fungal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, raised liver enzymes and skin rash.

medicines.name: FLUMET-400
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Fluconazole 400 mg
medicines.description: Flumet tablets & infusion contains Fluconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the brain, skin, internal organs & oral as well as vaginal fungal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, raised liver enzymes and skin rash.

medicines.name: LEEZOLE 3 KIT
medicines.composition: Each combikit contains 4 tablet; One film coated tablet of Azithromycin Dihydrate eq. to Anhydrous Azithromycin 1 g , one uncoated tablet of Fluconazole 150 mg & two film coated tablet of Secnidazole 1 g
medicines.description: Leezole-3 kit contains Azithromycin to treat bacterial infections, Fluconazole to treat fungal infections & Secnidazole to treat Protozoal infections. Leezole 3 kit is indicated in the management of vaginal candidiasis, vaginal trichomoniasis and bacterial vaginosis. It is given to both the partners for oral consumption simultaneously.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Vaginal itching, taste change, vomiting, headache, dizziness, stomach pain, nausea, diarrhea and loss of appetite.

medicines.name: FUNGISET-150
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Fluconazole 150 mg
medicines.description: Fungiset tablets Fluconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the brain, skin, internal organs & oral as well as vaginal fungal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, raised liver enzymes and skin rash.

medicines.name: FUNGISET-200
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Fluconazole 200 mg
medicines.description: Fungiset tablets contains Fluconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the brain, skin, internal organs & oral as well as vaginal fungal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, raised liver enzymes and skin rash.

medicines.name: OLTEF 3 KIT
medicines.composition: Combi Kit of Azithromycin 1 g (1 Tab), Fluconazole 150 mg (1 Tab) & Secnidazole 1000 mg (2 Tab)
medicines.description: Oltef 3 kit contains Azithromycin to treat bacterial infections, Fluconazole to treat fungal infections & Secnidazole to treat Protozoal infections. Leezole 3 kit is indicated in the management of vaginal candidiasis, vaginal tichomoniasis and bacterial vaginosis. It is given to both the partners for oral consumption simultaneously.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Vaginal itching, taste change, vomiting, headache, dizziness, stomach pain, nausea, diarrhea, loss of appetite

medicines.name: FLUMET POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Fluconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Flumet dusting powder contains Fluconazole, an antifungal drug that acts by killing the fungus and thus infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections such as athlete's foot, jock itch & ringworm etc. It should be used in groin areas, between fingers, under armpit & on skin fold etc. to cure the infections. It can also be used in between the cream for better result and to completely remove the infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Application site irritation is the main side effect.

medicines.name: FLUMET GEL
medicines.composition: Each g contains Fluconazole 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Flumet gel contains Fluconazole, an antifungal drug that acts by kill the fungus to cure infection. It is prescribed for fungal infections of vagina, skin & skin folds.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin rash, irritation, dryness or cracking of the surrounding area, itchiness & burning sensation at the application site are main side effects.

medicines.name: FLUMET SOAP
medicines.composition: Each soap contains Fluconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Flumet soap contains Fluconazole, an antifungal drug that acts by killing fungus. It is prescribed for prevention of fungal infection of the entire body skin. It is used as a regular bathing soap during active treatment and thereafter for one month for prevention, after cure of infection. It should otherwise not be used as a regular bathing soap in normal conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.

medicines.name: FUNGISET POWDER
medicines.composition: Fluconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Fungiset powder contains Fluconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus. Fungiset powder is indicated for fungal infection of gland of penis, fungal infection between the fingers, fungal infections in skin folds, fungal infections of the skin etc.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are itching, irritation and rashes.

medicines.name: FUNGISET-400
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Fluconazole 400 mg
medicines.description: Fungiset-400 tablets contains Fluconazole, an azole anti-fungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the brain, skin, internal organs & oral as well as vaginal fungal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are headache, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, raised liver enzymes and skin rash.

medicines.name: FUNGISET SOAP
medicines.composition: Fluconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Fungiset soap contains Fluconazole, an antifungal drug that acts by killing fungus. It is prescribed for prevention of fungal infection of the entire body skin. It is used as a regular bathing soap during active treatment and thereafter for one month for prevention, after cure of infection. It should otherwise not be used as a regular bathing soap in normal conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wet the affected skin, apply the soap to create a lather, and leave it on for 2-3 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water afterwards. Always follow your doctor's specific instructions regarding frequency and duration of use.

medicines.name: FUNGISET PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Fluconazole 150 mg & Ivermectin 6 mg
medicines.description: Fungiset Plus tablet contains Fluconazole, an antifungal that acts by stopping the growth of the fungus & Ivermectin, an anthelmintic that kills worms. It is prescribed for infected scabies by fungal infections & other mixed infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The most frequently reported adverse reactions are nausea, diarrhea, stomach pain, indigestion, taste change, dizziness, headache, itching, swelling of lymph nodes.

medicines.name: OPTIFLEV EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Flurbiprofen Sodium 0.3 mg w/v & Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose 2.5 mg w/v
medicines.description: Optiflev eye drops contain Flurbiprofen, an anti-inflammatory drug that also prevents constriction of pupil of the eye thus making eye surgery easy. It is prescribed during Cataract surgeries for prevention of constriction of pupil and in post-surgical inflammation of the eye/s.
medicines.sideEffects: The drug is very well tolerated, transient burning and stinging upon instillation of drops are the only known side effects.

medicines.name: MIGRAFIN-10
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Flunarizine 10 mg
medicines.description: Migrafin tablet contains Flunarizine, an anti-migraine drug to relieve Migraine headache. It is prescribed to treat migraine with severe and disabling neurological symptoms (migraine with aura or one-sided weakness) with dizziness or vertigo.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are tiredness, drowsiness, weight gain and low mood.

medicines.name: MIGRAFIN-5
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Flunarizine 5 mg
medicines.description: Migrafin tablet contains Flunarizine, an anti-migraine drug to relieve Migraine headache. It is prescribed to treat migraine with severe and disabling neurological symptoms (migraine with aura or one-sided weakness) with dizziness or vertigo.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are tiredness, drowsiness, weight gain and low mood.

medicines.name: MIGRAFIN-P
medicines.composition: Flunarizine Dihydrochlorde Eq. To Flunarizine 10 mg & Propranolol HCl (SR) 40 mg (Alu Alu)
medicines.description: Migrafin-P tablet contains Flunarizine & Propranolol, both are anti-migraine drugs & relieves Migraine by synergistic action for better relief. It is prescribed to treat migraine with severe and disabling neurological symptoms (migraine with aura or one-sided weakness) with dizziness or vertigo.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are tiredness, drowsiness, weight gain, low mood & slow heart rate.

medicines.name: ENSARIN-MF
medicines.composition: Each g contains Miconazole Nitrate 2% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin base 0.5% w/w & Fluocinolone Acetonide 0.01% w/w
medicines.description: Ensarin-MF cream contains Beclomethasone, to relieve relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling; Neomycin, to relieve bacterial infections & Clotrimazole, to relieve fungal infections. It is prescribed for the topical treatment of bacterial & fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are stinging sensation, irritation, pimple-like bumps, tenderness & flaking of the treated skin.

medicines.name: TERADOX PLUS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Tobramycin 0.3 % w/v & Fluorometholone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Teradox Plus eye drops contain Tobramycin, an aminoglycoside antibiotic that acts by killing the infection causing bacteria & Fluorometholone, a corticosteroid that reduces redness, allergy & swelling in eyes. It is prescribed for general & post-surgical infections of the eye, associated with inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eyelid itching, swelling and irritation in eyes. Allergic reactions may also happen.

medicines.name: FLOMESTED EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Fluorometholone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Fluorometholone is a ophthalmic corticosteroid with anti-inflammatory and anti-allergic properties thereby providing relief from swelling & redness in the eye in various different conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Increased intraocular pressure, Eye itching, Eye discharge, Eye discomfort, Dry eye, Teary eyes & Blurry vision are few side effects.

medicines.name: FLUTAX- 20
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Fluoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Fluoxetine 20 mg
medicines.description: Flutax capsules contain Fluoxetine, an antidepressant that acts by altering brain chemicals. It is prescribed in case of low mood i.e. depression, OCDs or repetitive disorder, panic attack & other conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Most commonly reported adverse reactions are headache, nausea, insomnia, fatigue and diarrhoea.

medicines.name: FLUTAX-AL
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Fluoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Fluoxetine 20 mg & Alprazolam 0.25 mg
medicines.description: Flutax-AL tablet contains Fluoxetine, an antidepressant & Alprazolam, an anxiolytic drug; both of which acts by altering brain chemicals. It is prescribed in case of primary & secondary depression, anxiety, OCDs or repetitive disorder & mixed psychiatric conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Most commonly reported adverse reactions are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, confusion, memory impairment, headache, insomnia & fatigue.

medicines.name: FLUTADEP-M
medicines.composition: Flupentixol 0.5 mg & Melitracen 10 mg
medicines.description: Flutadep M tablets contain Flupentixol and Melitracen, two agents that help manage depression and anxiety disorders. Flupentixol, an antipsychotic, acts by balancing dopamine activity in the brain, improving mood and reducing tension. Melitracen, a tricyclic antidepressant, enhances the levels of serotonin and norepinephrine, helping relieve depressive symptoms and stabilize mood. Together, they promote emotional balance and improve mental well-being.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include dizziness, dry mouth, sleep disturbances, and mild gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: SNEPTIN PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Flupirtine 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Sneptin plus tablets contain Flupiritine, a centrally acting non opioid analgesic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is indicated in post-surgical pain, dental pain, Pain associated with muscle spasm, Cancer pain, neuropathic pain, low back pain and migraine.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, gastric and abdominal discomfort, diarrhea, constipation, heartburn, drowsiness, dizziness, headache, depression, disorientation and hallucinations.

medicines.name: SNEPTIN-100
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Flupirtine Maleate 100 mg in pellet form.
medicines.description: Sneptin contains Flupiritine a centrally acting non opioid analgesic used in post-surgical pain, dental pain, Pain associated with muscle spasm, Cancer pain, neuropathic pain, low back pain and migraine.
medicines.sideEffects: Fatigue, dizziness, heartburn, nausea/vomiting, stomach upset, constipation, sleep disturbances, sweating & lack of appetite are few side effects.

medicines.name: SNEPTIN-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Flupirtine Maleate 100 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg.
medicines.description: Sneptin-MR tablet contains Flupiritine a centrally acting non opioid analgesic & Thiocolchicoside, an antispasmodic for skeletal muscle relaxation & is used in post-surgical pain, Pain associated with muscle spasm, low back pain and other musculo-skeletal problems.
medicines.sideEffects: Heartburn, nausea/vomiting, stomach upset, diarrhoea, sleep disturbances, sweating & lack of appetite are few side effects.

medicines.name: FLUTIVIN NASAL SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each actuation delivers Fluticasone Furoate 27.5 mcg (0.05%) (Nasal Spray)
medicines.description: Flutivin nasal pump spray contains Fluticasone, a corticosteroid that acts by relieving allergy, redness, swelling & stabilizing immunity. It is prescribed to prevent & relieve the symptoms of seasonal & annual allergic complications of nose such as sneezing, runny nose & nasal drip.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, unpleasant taste, unpleasant smell, nasal dryness, nasal irritation, throat dryness, throat irritation & nasal bleeding.

medicines.name: NAZOHIST-F
medicines.composition: Each actuation delivers Azelastine Hydrochloride 140 mcg (0.14% w/v) & Fluticasone Propionate 50 mcg (0.05% w/v) (Nasal Spray)
medicines.description: Nazohist-F nasal pump spray contains Azelastine, an anti-allergic drug that acts by stopping a chemical called Histamine & Fluticasone, a corticosteroid that stops swelling, redness & pain. It is prescribed to relieve severe symptoms of seasonal & annual nasal allergies such as runny, itchy, stuffy nose, sneezing, and post-nasal drip caused by allergies or other conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Bitter taste in the mouth, drowsiness, a burning feeling inside the nose, cough, nose bleeds, nausea, dry mouth, headache, weight gain, muscle aches & red eyes may occur.

medicines.name: FLUTIVIN-S INHALER
medicines.composition: Each actuation delivers Fluticasone Propionate 125 mcg & Salmeterol Xinafoate IP Eq. to Salmeterol 25 mcg (120 metered doses)
medicines.description: Flutivin-S inhaler contains the combination medication Salmeterol and Fluticasone, used in prevention & treatment of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Salmeterol is a long-acting bronchodilator that relaxes airway muscles, while Fluticasone is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation. Together, they help prevent asthma attacks, improve lung function, and manage symptoms. This inhaler is used regularly for long-term control, but not for immediate relief of acute breathing issues.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Nasopharyngitis, Candidiasis of the mouth & or throat, headache, low Potassium levels & Hoarseness of voice.

medicines.name: FLUTIVIN-O NASAL SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each Spray delivers Fluticasone Furoate 27.5 mcg & Oxymetazoline Hydrochloride 50 mcg (Nasal Spray)
medicines.description: Flutivin-O nasal pump spray contains Fluticasone, a mild steroid with Oxymetazoline, a nasal decongestant & vasoconstrictor for the management of seasonal & perennial Allergic Rhinitis, Common Cold, Sinusitis, Viral rhinosinusitis, Hay fever & other allergic problems associated with nasal congestion & or inflammation. Flutivin-O is superior to Fluticasone or Oxymetazoline alone in relieving the nasal congestion and reduction of Total Nasal Symptom Score in allergic rhinitis.
medicines.sideEffects: Flutivin-O is very well tolerated; the main side effects are nasal dryness, irritation & sneezing etc.

medicines.name: FLUTIVIN
medicines.composition: Each g contains Fluticasone Propionate IP 0.05% w/w
medicines.description: Flutivin cream contains Fluticasone Propionate, a potent topical corticosteroid used to relieve inflammation and itching caused by various skin conditions such as eczema, psoriasis, and dermatitis. It works by suppressing the inflammatory response and reducing swelling, redness, and itching.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects may include burning, itching, dryness, or irritation at the application site. Prolonged use may lead to skin thinning or other corticosteroid-related side effects.

medicines.name: T-MUCE F
medicines.composition: Each g of ointment contains Mupirocin 2% w/w & Fluticasone Propionate 0.005% w/w
medicines.description: T-Muce F is a topical ointment that combines Mupirocin, a broad-spectrum antibiotic, with Fluticasone Propionate, a mild corticosteroid. It is used for the treatment of inflammatory skin conditions with secondary bacterial infections, such as infected eczema, dermatitis, or impetigo. Mupirocin helps eliminate infection-causing bacteria, while Fluticasone reduces inflammation, redness, and itching.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects may include local irritation, burning sensation, or allergic reactions. Prolonged use may lead to skin thinning.

medicines.name: MUPIZER-F
medicines.composition: Each g contains Mupirocin 2% w/w & Fluticasone Propionate 0.005% w/w
medicines.description: Mupizer-F contains Mupirocin and Fluticasone Propionate. Mupirocin is a topical antibiotic that kills bacteria causing skin infections, while Fluticasone is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation. It is prescribed for infected dermatitis, impetigo, folliculitis, furunculosis, and post-surgical scar infections. Mild irritation or burning may occur.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause mild burning, itching, dryness, or redness; prolonged use can lead to allergic reactions.

medicines.name: FEROTIN CAPSULE
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Carbonyl Iron eq. to elemental Iron 100 mg, Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate 61.8 mg eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg & Folic acid 1 mg
medicines.description: Ferotin capsule contains Carbonyl iron in combination with Zinc and folic acid.It is indicated for treatment and prevention of iron deficiency anaemia. It is also used for preventing iron, folic acid and zinc deficiencies during pregnancy, breastfeeding, after surgery or in conditions of nutritional malabsorption.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools and abdominal pain.

medicines.name: HB FORD CAPSULE

This formulation is particularly beneficial for individuals with chronic conditions affecting nutrient absorption or those at risk of deficiencies due to dietary limitations.
medicines.sideEffects: The combination is generally well-tolerated but may cause mild side effects like nausea, abdominal discomfort, constipation, flatulence, or headache. Rarely, hypersensitivity reactions such as rash or itching may occur. These effects are typically transient and resolve without intervention.
medicines.dosage: Taken on an empty stomach—at least 1 hour before or 2 hours after meals. Treatment duration typically spans at least 12 weeks, depending on the severity of iron deficiency, and should continue until ferritin levels return to normal.

medicines.name: FEMOZER LIPO

medicines.description: Femozer Lipo is a synergistic supplement which corrects iron deficiency anemia, enhance red blood cell production, and support overall hematological health. The liposomal form of ferric pyrophosphate ensures improved iron absorption and reduced gastrointestinal side effects compared to traditional iron salts. Vitamin C enhances iron bioavailability, while Folic acid and Cyanocobalamin are essential for DNA synthesis and red blood cell formation. This combination is particularly beneficial for pregnant women, individuals with chronic kidney disease, and those with dietary deficiencies
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include gastrointestinal discomfort such as nausea, bloating, or abdominal pain. In rare cases, allergic reactions like rash, itching, or swelling may occur.
medicines.dosage: 1 tablet per day for 8 to 12 weeks, depending on the conditions

medicines.description: Dapzigard-GM 2 Forte tablets contains Dapagliflozin, Metformin and Glimepiride. The combination of these three medications helps in managing type 2 diabetes effectively. Dapagliflozin helps lower blood sugar by promoting glucose excretion via urine, Metformin improves insulin sensitivity and reduces glucose production in the liver & Glimepiride stimulates insulin release from the pancreas to further regulate blood sugar levels. Together, these medications provide comprehensive control over glucose levels in patients with type 2 diabetes, helping to maintain stable blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of complications associated with diabetes.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE C2 PLUS

medicines.description: Glucozone C2 Plus softgel contain Undenatured Collagen Type II for reformation of cartilage with Glucosamine, Methylsuphonyl methane, Sodium hyaluronate, for the formation of cartilage & tendon as well as Curcumin & Rosehip extract for pain and inflammation. Thus Glucozone C2 Plus softgel offers a complete package for joint health. It helps in formation of tendons and cartilage in the joints. Glucozone C2 Plus softgel are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis associated with marked inflammation. Glucozone C2 Plus improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One softgel of Glucozone-C2 Plus to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. Once started it should be given for at least one month to have an effective result.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE-CT
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Sulphate Sodium (added as Glucosamine Sulphate Sodium Chloride) 500 mg & Chondroitin Sulphate Sodium 400 mg
medicines.description: Glucosamine and chondroitin in Glucozone-CT tablet helps in joint maintenance, cartilage formation and thus helps in joint rejuvenation. Glucozone-CT protects and rebuilds cartilage in case of osteoarthritis, inflammatory arthritis and cartilage damage in cases of trauma and injury.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE-CT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine sulphate potassium chloride 750 mg, Chondroitin sulphate sodium 200 mg, Methylsulfonylmethane 250 mg, Cholecalciferol 200 IU, Calcium ascorbate 50 mg, Elemental Selenium 70 mcg, Elemental Zinc 4 mg, Elemental Manganese 3 mg, Elemental Chromium 50 mcg, Elemental Copper 0.5 mg, Elemental Boron 0.5 mg & Elemental Silicon 2 mg
medicines.description: Glucozone-CT plus tablets contain Glucosamine, Chondroitin, and Methysulphonyl methane along with various minerals and Vitamin D. It helps in joint restoration, cartilage & synovial fluid formation and improves overall physiology of joints. Glucozone CT plus tablets are indicated for prevention of Rheumatoid arthritis and for cartilage damage in cases of trauma and injury. It decreases pain and inflammation associated with arthritis, improves mobility and flexibility of involved joints, helps in lubrication of stiff joints and rebuilds worn joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of Glucozone CT Plus to be taken twice or thrice daily. Maximum dose is 4 tablets per day.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diacerein 50 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate Potassium Chloride 750 mg eq. to Glucosamine 446 mg & Methylsulfonylmethane 250 mg
medicines.description: Dincerin Plus tablet contains Glucosamine and Methylsulphonyl methane which are natural ingredients of the cartilage and helps in their formation. Diacerin in it is a joint specific pain killer. Dincerin Plus helps to protect and rebuild cartilage in osteoarthritis and inflammatory arthritis. It reduces pain, stiffness and inflammation in joints thus improving physiological joint functioning.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, heartburn, headache, insomnia, itching or worsening of allergy symptoms.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-C2 PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Soft gelatin capsule contains Rosehip Oil 400 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate 250 mg, Curcuminoid 100 mg, Chondroitin Sulphate 50 mg, Boswellia Serrata 50 mg, Undenatured Type-II Collagen 40 mg & Hyaluronic Acid 20 mg
medicines.description: Dincerin C2 Plus softgel combines a powerful blend of ingredients to support joint health and mobility. It features Rosehip Oil, Glucosamine, and Chondroitin Sulphate for cartilage support, along with anti-inflammatory powerhouses like Curcuminoids and Boswellia serrata. UC Type-II collagen and Hyaluronic Acid further contribute to joint lubrication and overall connective tissue health. This formulation aims to reduce discomfort and improve joint function
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One softgel of Dincerin-C2 Plus to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. Once started it should be given for at least one month to have an effective result.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-C2
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Sulphate 750 mg, Methylsulfonylmethane 500 mg, Undenatured Collagen Peptides Type-II 40 mg, Sodium Hyaluronate 30 mg, Vitamin C 35 mg & Vitamin D3 10 mcg (400 IU)
medicines.description: Dincerin C2 tablets contain Undenatured Collagen Type II for reformation of cartilage with Glucosamine, Methylsuphonyl methane, Sodium hyaluronate, Vitamin C and Vitamin D3. It helps in formation of tendons and cartilage in the joints. Dincerin C2 tablets are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis. Dincerin C2 improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of Dincerin-C2 to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-CT
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Sulphate Sodium (added as Glucosamine Sulphate Sodium Chloride) 500 mg & Chondroitin Sulphate Sodium 400 mg
medicines.description: Glucosamine and chondroitin in Dincerin-CT tablet helps in joint maintenance, cartilage formation and thus helps in joint rejuvenation. Dincerin-CT protects and rebuilds cartilage in case of osteoarthritis, inflammatory arthritis and cartilage damage in cases of trauma and injury.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-CT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Hydrochloride 750 mg, Methylsufonyl Methane 250 mg, Chondroitin sulphate sodium 100 mg, Vitamin C 40 mg, Vitamin D3 200 IU, Zinc 4 mg, Manganese 3 mg, Copper 0.5 mg, Boron 0.5 mg, Selenium 40 mcg & Chromium 33 mcg
medicines.description: This combination supports joint and bone health by reducing inflammation, promoting cartilage repair, and enhancing mobility. Glucosamine, chondroitin, and MSM help maintain joint structure, while cholecalciferol, calcium ascorbate, and multiminerals support bone strength, calcium absorption, and collagen synthesis for overall musculoskeletal health
medicines.sideEffects: This combination may cause mild side effects such as nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or headache. High doses can lead to allergic reactions, kidney issues, or interfere with blood sugar and mineral balance.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet per day, preferably with food to improve absorption and minimize gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: OPTISOFT EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Sodium Carboxymethylcellulose 0.5% w/v, Glycerin 0.5% w/v & Stabilized Oxychloro complex 0.01% w/v
medicines.description: Optisoft eye drops contain Carboxymethylcellulose & Glycerine, an eye lubricant & nourisher that prevents and treats dry eyes. It is used for the temporary relief & treatment of burning, irritation and discomfort due to dryness of the eye or exposure to wind or sun, dry eye syndrome, provides benefit for those who wear contact lenses & dryness in eyes after Lasik or Cataracts surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: This is highly safe drug. Blurred vision, minor burning, stinging or irritation may temporarily occur.

medicines.name: OPTISOFT PLUS EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Carboxymethylcellulose Sodium 0.3% w/v, N-Acetyl Carnosine 1% w/v, Glycerin 1% w/v & Boric Acid 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Optisoft Plus eye drop contains Carboxymethylcellulose Sodium, N-Acetyl Carnosine, Glycerin & Boric Acid; together they offer lubrication & strong anti-ageing benefits to the eye/s. It is prescribed for slowing progression of Cataract, Dry eyes, Computer vision syndrome, Eye strain, Eye inflammation, Blurred vision, to have powerful antioxidant effect on eyes, to prevent complications of diabetes mellitus and other systemic diseases in eyes & provides benefit for those who wear contact lenses.
medicines.sideEffects: The drops are very well tolerated; mild irritation is the only known side effect.

medicines.name: DANTOX EXPERT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Tannic acid Glycerin 66 30% w/v, Iodine 0.3% w/v, Potassium Iodide 0.5% w/v, Thymol 0.05% w/v, Menthol 0.08% w/v & Glycerin 100% QS v/v
medicines.description: Dantox expert gum paint contains Tannic acid Glycerin, Iodine, Potassium Iodide, Thymol, Menthol & Glycerin. Tannic acid glycerin acts by healing sores and treating bleeding gums; Iodine, Potassium iodide & Thymol acts as antibacterial; Iodine & Menthol together act as counterirritant to relieve irritation and offer a soothing effect. This product is prescribed for spongy gums, bleeding gums, sores on gums & pus coming out of gums.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Clean your hands thoroughly and wipe it. Take a drop or two on your finger tips of Dantox gum paint and apply at the lesion or take a larger quantity and apply on the infected gums or as required. It can be applied two to three times a day depending upon severity of disease. You can use it for 3 to 5 days continuously or may be little longer.

medicines.name: ELOSONE-HT SOAP
medicines.composition: Each soap contains Curcumin, Aloe vera, Vit C, Vit. E, Papain, Glycerin & Liquorice extract
medicines.description: Elosone-HT soap contains Curcumin that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Aloe Vera & Vit. E, nourishes skin and revitalize it; Vit C, Papain & Liquorice extract stops melanin production, removes blemishes and brightens skin & Glycerin moisturizes it for overall glow and shine. It is used for having lighten, brighten & spotless glowing skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use it as a regular soap for washing face; use it twice a day for best result. It can be used as a regular bathing soap for nourishing, revitalising & glowing body skin that radiates. Safe for regular usage in long term, as contains all natural ingredients.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT TOOTHPASTE (50 g & 100 g)
medicines.composition: Triclosan 0.3% w/w, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w with Cooling Crystals (Gel Toothpaste)
medicines.description: Ultradent toothpaste is a total daily protection tooth paste that provides overall protection to oral cavity, teeth and gums. Ultradent toothpaste relieves mild sensitivity, removes plaque, freshens breathe and inhibits the growth of cavity causing bacteria besides being a good mouth wash for overall oral hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated without any side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of Ultradent toothpaste onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: ULTRABRITE SOAP
medicines.composition: Each Soap contains Curcumin, Aloe vera, Vit C, Papain, Vit E,Glycerin & Liquorice extract
medicines.description: Ultrabrite soap contains Curcumin, that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Aloe Vera & Vit. E, nourishes skin and revitalize it; Vit C, Papain & Liquorice extract stops melanin production, removes blemishes and brightens skin & Glycerin moisturizes it for overall glow and shine. Ultrabrite soap is used for having lighten, brighten & spotless glowing skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use Ultrabrite as a regular soap for washing face; use it twice a day for best result. It can be used as a regular bathing soap for nourishing, revitalising & glowing body skin that radiates. Safe for regular usage in long term, as contains all natural ingredients.

medicines.name: ELOWAY SOAP
medicines.composition: Aloevera extract 4% w/w, Vitamin E 0.5% w/w & Glycerin 10% w/w (Transparent Soap)
medicines.description: Eloway soap is a pure translucent soap that contains Aloevera with goodness of Vit. E & Glycerin for excellent skin soothing and moistening properties. Eloway soap can be used regularly by people of all skin types. It is also effective in cases of acne and for those people who have dry to very dry skin type.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: For acne treatment wash the face 3 to 4 times a day with the Eloway soap. For general usage, use Eloway as a routine soap for washing hands and bathing.

medicines.name: CALALAYER LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Calamine 15% w/v, Zinc Oxide 5% w/v, Bentonite 3% w/v, Sodium Citrate 0.5% w/v, Liquefied Phenol 0.5% v/v & Glycerin 5% w/v
medicines.description: Calalayer lotion contains Calamine & Zinc mild antibacterial and soothing agent that relieves redness & itching; Bentonite, Sodium Citrate & liquefied Phenol these acts by stoping skin itching, irritation & detoxifying skin; Glycerin, has skin nourishing benefits. It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effect.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT INSTA SENSITIVITY TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Insta Sensitive Repair Plus Toothpaste
medicines.description: Ultradent Sensitivity tooth paste is a medicated paste to relieve dental hypersensitivity immediately after application. Ultradent Sensitivity paste acts by making a neurosensory block at the nerve root of tooth & protects from cavity or prevents increase in their size. It also reduces the demineralization of enamel and dentin by decreasing the acid production by harmful bacteria.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Use Ultradent Sensitivity as a regular tooth paste twice daily for increasing protection against sensitivity of teeth to cold, heat, acids, sweets or contact & also helps in the prevention of dental cavities. Apply one inch length of paste onto a soft bristle toothbrush to brush as usual, ensuring to brush all sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing. It not only provides relief in sensitive teeth, but also actually helps repair the sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not use longer than 4 weeks, without dental recommendations. Keep out of reach of children under 6 years of age.

medicines.name: CLINSOL OIL CONTROL FW
medicines.composition: Glycerin 25%, Hydroxyapatite, Glutathione & Cysteine complex 0.30% & Menthol 0.10 %
medicines.description: Clinsol Oil Control FW is a gentle face wash that removes excess oil and impurities without drying the skin. Enriched with glycerin, antioxidants, and menthol, it cleanses deeply, brightens, and refreshes the skin, leaving it balanced, hydrated, and revitalized for a healthy, clear complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet face, gently massage in circular motions, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily

medicines.name: DERMIFRESH EXTRA COOL SOAP
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine, Vit.E, Glycerin, Menthol & Jojoba Ester
medicines.description: Dermifresh Extra Cool Soap combines Chlorhexidine’s antibacterial action with soothing Vitamin E, hydrating Glycerin, cooling Menthol, and nourishing Jojoba Ester. It cleanses thoroughly, refreshes skin, and helps maintain moisture balance while providing a cooling sensation.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use daily by applying to wet skin, lather, and rinse thoroughly. Suitable for all skin types.

medicines.name: ELOSONE HT SCRUB BAR
medicines.composition: Charcoal, Mint Oil, Glycerin With Coffee Scrub Soap
medicines.description: Elosone HT Scrub Bar combines charcoal’s deep cleansing, mint oil’s refreshing coolness, glycerin’s hydration, and coffee scrub’s exfoliating properties. It effectively removes dirt, dead skin cells, and excess oil, leaving skin smooth, refreshed, and revitalized.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use daily or as directed; lather on wet skin, gently scrub, and rinse thoroughly.

medicines.name: MEDISOFT MOISTURISING BAR SOAP
medicines.composition: Syndet Base contains Shea Butter, Glyerin (Cleansing & Moisturizing Bar with Skin Friendly pH 5.5)
medicines.description: Medisoft Moisturising Bar Soap is a gentle cleansing bar with a skin-friendly pH of 5.5. Enriched with Shea Butter and Glycerin, it cleanses effectively while moisturizing and nourishing the skin, leaving it soft, smooth, and hydrated without stripping natural oils.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wet skin, lather the bar, gently cleanse, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for soft, hydrated skin.

medicines.name: SPOTSRUB PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Glycolic Acid, Alpha Arbutin, Kojic Acid, Grape Seed Ext, Mulberry Leaf Ext, Licorice root ext, Magnesium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Vit. E, Betaine & Glycerin
medicines.description: Spotsrub Plus is used to brighten and even skin tone, reduce hyperpigmentation, and improve skin texture. The active ingredients help exfoliate, lighten dark spots, hydrate, and protect against environmental damage, promoting a healthy, glowing complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause skin irritation, redness, or dryness, especially in sensitive skin. Prolonged use may lead to increased sun sensitivity or allergic reactions.
medicines.dosage: Apply a thin layer to clean, dry skin, avoiding the eye area. Gently massage in circular motions until absorbed. Use once or twice daily, preferably in the evening. Follow with sunscreen during the day, as the product may increase sun sensitivity. Discontinue use if irritation occurs.

medicines.name: EMLOSOFT SOAP
medicines.composition: Syndet Base with Shea Butter & Glycerine
medicines.description: Emlosoft is a skin-friendly cleansing and moisturizing bar formulated with a gentle Syndet Base, enriched with Shea Butter and Glycerine. It is designed to maintain the natural pH of the skin (5.5), making it ideal for sensitive, dry, or irritated skin. Shea Butter provides deep moisturization and nourishment, while Glycerine helps retain skin hydration. Emlosoft bar gently cleanses without stripping natural oils, leaving the skin soft, smooth, and protected.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated. No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use daily as a regular bathing bar. Apply to wet skin, lather gently, and rinse thoroughly. Suitable for all age groups and safe for long-term use.

medicines.name: ENSHINER
medicines.composition: Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Kojic Acid, Betaine, D-Panthenol & Glycerin
medicines.description: Enshiner Cream is a skin-brightening and hydrating formulation with Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, a stable Vitamin C derivative that brightens skin and reduces pigmentation; Kojic Acid, which helps lighten dark spots by inhibiting melanin production; Betaine, a gentle hydrator that protects the skin barrier; D-Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5), known for its soothing and repairing properties; and Glycerin, a powerful humectant that maintains skin moisture.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. In rare cases, mild irritation, redness, or tingling may occur, especially on sensitive skin. Discontinue use if irritation persists.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount of Enshiner Cream to cleansed skin on the affected areas or entire face, depending on the extent of pigmentation. Use twice daily for visible results. Once improvement is noted, reduce to once daily for maintenance. Avoid using with other strong exfoliants or pigmentation treatments unless advised by a healthcare professional.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC FOAMING FACE WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Salicylic acid 2% w/v, Glycolic acid 3% w/v & Aloevera 10% w/v
medicines.description: Keracylic Foaming Facewash contains Salicylic acid & Glycolic acid which acts together to remove dead skin & Aloevera that nourishes, repairs & renews the texture of the skin. Keracylic Foaming Facewash is a pH balanced face wash for healthy skin that is used for the treatment and prevention of acne, can be used in combination with other acne treatments; for reducing the marks on face, helps to unclog and cleanse the skin pores & for lightening the complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated product, no know side effects except irritation on cracked or sensitive skin.
medicines.dosage: Take approximately 1-2 ml of Keracylic Foaming face wash and gently massage on the face avoiding eyes and surrounding areas for 20-30 seconds so as to act effectively & for a gentle wash, then rinse thoroughly and pat dry. For best results use twice daily & for oily skin leave it for 45 to 50 seconds instead of 20 - 30. For optimal results, keep Keracylic Foaming Facewash in a cool dry place away from sunlight.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC FACE WASH
medicines.composition: Each g contains Salicylic acid, Glycolic acid, Vit. E & Aloevera
medicines.description: Keracylic Facewash contains Salicylic acid & Glycolic acid which acts together to remove dead skin & Aloevera with Vitamin E nourish, repairs & renews the texture of the skin. Keracylic Facewash is used for fighting acne, facilitates lightening of skin marks, helps to counter infections and microbial attacks, helps to unclog and cleanse the skin pores & helps to maintain the moisture level of the skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated product, no know side effects except irritation on cracked or sensitive skin.
medicines.dosage: Take approximately 1-2 ml of face wash and gently massage on the face to produce foam all over avoiding eyes and surrounding areas for 20-30 seconds so as to act effectively & for a gentle wash, then rinse thoroughly and pat dry. For best results use twice daily & for oily skin leave it for 45 to 50 seconds instead of 20 - 30. For optimal results, keep Keracylic Facewash in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight.

medicines.name: ENSHINER ULTRA
medicines.composition: Glycolic acid, Kojic acid, Niacinamide, Tyrostat, Ethyl Ascorbic acid, Licorice ext. & Rumex occidentalis extract
medicines.description: Enshiner Ultra cream reduces dark spots and lightens skin shade to provide effective skin brightening with anti-aging benefits. Enshiner Ultra cream inhibits melanin synthesis for lightening complexion & to restore an even skin tone by fading skin discolorations. It has added sunscreens to protect the skin from harmful UV rays and also reduces hyper-pigmentation.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply twice daily for best results, after washing the face or use it after bathing.

medicines.name: CLINSOL ANTI ACNE FW
medicines.composition: Charcoal, Glycolic Acid, Aloevera, Vit E & Triclosan Gel Base Face Wash
medicines.description: Clinsol Anti Acne FW is a gel-based face wash formulated with charcoal, glycolic acid, aloe vera, vitamin E, and triclosan. It deeply cleanses pores, exfoliates dead skin cells, reduces acne-causing bacteria, and soothes irritation, leaving the skin clear, refreshed, and balanced without over-drying.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet face, gently massage in circular motions, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily

medicines.name: SPOTSRUB PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Glycolic Acid, Alpha Arbutin, Kojic Acid, Grape Seed Ext, Mulberry Leaf Ext, Licorice root ext, Magnesium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Vit. E, Betaine & Glycerin
medicines.description: Spotsrub Plus is used to brighten and even skin tone, reduce hyperpigmentation, and improve skin texture. The active ingredients help exfoliate, lighten dark spots, hydrate, and protect against environmental damage, promoting a healthy, glowing complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause skin irritation, redness, or dryness, especially in sensitive skin. Prolonged use may lead to increased sun sensitivity or allergic reactions.
medicines.dosage: Apply a thin layer to clean, dry skin, avoiding the eye area. Gently massage in circular motions until absorbed. Use once or twice daily, preferably in the evening. Follow with sunscreen during the day, as the product may increase sun sensitivity. Discontinue use if irritation occurs.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN ANTI ACNE FW
medicines.composition: Glycolic Acid, Aloevera, Vitamin E & Triclosan (Gel based Facewash)
medicines.description: Acnetoin Anti Acne Facewash is a gel-based formulation specially designed for oily and acne-prone skin. Glycolic Acid gently exfoliates dead skin cells and helps unclog pores, while Aloe Vera soothes and hydrates the skin. Vitamin E provides antioxidant protection and aids in skin repair. Triclosan acts as a powerful antibacterial agent to reduce acne-causing bacteria. This facewash helps clear existing acne, prevents new breakouts, and improves skin texture, leaving it fresh and healthy.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated. Mild dryness or tingling may occur initially due to exfoliating action.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount to wet face, gently massage into skin, and rinse thoroughly. Use 2 to 3 times daily for best results. Safe for regular use.

medicines.name: CONTOURED CERVICAL PILLOW
medicines.composition: N.A.
medicines.description: Contoured Cervical Pillow reduces pain & discomfort associated with cervical spondylitis, also maintains cervical spine health (SIZES AVAILABLE: Universal Size)
medicines.sideEffects: N.A.

medicines.name: GRANIVOM MD
medicines.composition: Each uncoated mouth dissolving tablet contains Granisetron 1 mg
medicines.description: Granivom-MD tablets are mouth dissolving tablets that contains Granisetron which is used to prevent and treat nausea and vomiting caused by cancer chemotherapy and radiation therapy. It works by blocking serotonin, a natural substance in the body that causes nausea and vomiting.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, stomach pain, heartburn, constipation and difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep

medicines.name: CUFLIFT LS DROPS
medicines.composition: Each 1 ml contains Ambroxol 7.5 mg, Guaiphenisin 12.5 mg, Levosalbutamol 0.25 mg
medicines.description: Cuflift-LS drops contains combination of Levosalbutamol (bronchodilator), Ambroxol (mucolytic agent) and Guaifenesin (expectorant). It is used for the treatment of productive cough associated with bronchospasm in conditions such as bronchitis and bronchial asthma, COPD, emphysema as well as all conditions associated with tenacious mucus, wheezing and chest congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, dizziness, nervousness, heartburn, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, dry mouth or throat, stomach cramps, weakness, diarrhea, muscle pain leg cramps, constipation, rash and urticaria.

medicines.name: AMROX (60 &100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Ambroxol Hydrochloride 15 mg, Terbutaline Sulphate 1.5 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Menthol 1 mg
medicines.description: Amrox Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Guaiphenesin an expectorant, Terbutaline a bronchodilator and Menthol a soothing agent. It is indicated for clinical relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, heartburn or bloating, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: AMROX JUNIOR (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Terbutaline Sulphate 1.25 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Ambroxol Hydrochloride 15 mg
medicines.description: Amrox Junior Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Guaiphenesin an expectorant, Terbutaline a bronchodilator and Menthol a soothing agent. It is indicated for clinical relief of cough in children associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, heartburn or bloating, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: AMROX-LS (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Ambroxol Hydrochloride 30 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Levosalbutamol Sulphate 1 mg
medicines.description: Amrox-LS Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Guaiphenesin an expectorant and Levosalbutamol a bronchodilator. It is indicated for relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema, COPD and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, heartburn or bloating, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: AMROX-LS DROPS

It is used for the treatment of productive cough associated with bronchospasm in conditions such as bronchitis and bronchial asthma, COPD, emphysema as well as all conditions associated with tenacious mucus, wheezing and chest congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, dizziness, nervousness, heartburn, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, dry mouth or throat, stomach cramps, weakness, diarrhea, muscle pain leg cramps, constipation, rash and urticaria.

It is indicated for relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.

medicines.description: Kufstil-SF Syrup is a sugar free formulation which contains Dextromethorphan an anti-tussive, Chlorpheniramine an antiallergic and Phenylephrine a nasal decongestant. Kufstil-SF Syrup is used to relieve cough caused by the common cold, smokers cough, Post-surgical cough and bronchitis. It is also used for chest congestion associated with Emphysema, Chronic Pulmonary obstructive disease (COPD) and other breathing illnesses.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, light headedness, drowsiness, nervousness, restlessness, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

medicines.name: COLDMINE PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 325 mg, Phenylephrine 10 mg & Fexofenadine 60 mg.
medicines.description: Coldmine Plus is a combination of three medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Coldmine plus helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.description: Cipcoz-NF cream contains Ciprofloxacin, to relieve bacterial infections; Metronidazole, to relieve bacterial & protozoal infections; Terbinafine, to relieve fungal infections & Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, irritation, redness & swelling. It is first line of drug in all kind of skin infection such as of eczema, dermatitis, fungal infections, bacterial infections & mixed infection of skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effect, the product is well tolerated.

medicines.name: NEBULIZER
medicines.composition: Premium quality low noise piston nebulizer
medicines.description: Leeford Nebulizer is formulated for delivery of medication directly to the lungs in the form of fine particles/mist. It is meant for efficient respiratory therapy, effective medication delivery. Leeford Nebulizer is low noise, durable device & a complete kit ideal for all age groups. It is used for respiratory conditions like asthma, COPD, sinus and other respiratory disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Wash your hands properly, put the medication into medication chamber of the inhalational attachment of nebulizer. Attach the mouthpiece and turn on the air compressor. Continue to inhale normally till the entire medication is consumed; this will take 5-20 minutes. After that wash the medication chamber of nebulizer.

It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, tremor, rash and oedema.

Zinc 5 mg, el. Chromium 30 mcg & el. Selenium 20 mcg
medicines.description: Cozyrich Q10 Plus softgels contain Coenzyme Q10 (energy producing natural compound), Omega 3 fatty acids and complete Vitamin B complex with Vitamin D. Cozyrich Q-10 Plus is indicated for cardiovascular, diabetics, neurovascular disorders in addition to prolonged statin therapy for more than 3 months. It is also indicated for idiopathic male infertility, Oligozoospermia (low sperm count), Asthenozoospermia (reduced sperm movement), Teratozoospermia (abnormal sperms). It is also used before reproductive techniques for optimizing DNA quality and testis surgery to increase sperm count, movement and quality.
medicines.sideEffects: Cozyrich Q10 Plus softgels generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: ROCK ON MAX SACHET
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet of Rock On Max contains Taurine 1 g, Ginseng (Panax Ginseng) Extract 90 mg, Caffeine 50 mg, Vitamin C 65 mg, Myo-Inositol 50 mg, Vit. B1 1.7 mg, Vit. B2 2.4 mg, Vit. B3 14 mg & Vit. B6 1.9 mg & Zinc 3.4 mg.
medicines.description: Leeford's Rock On Max is a sugar free energy drink that comes in effervescent powder form & gets dissolved automatically without the requirement of stirring. It can be added to simple water or Citrus juices for instant boost of energy & stamina. Rock On Max is a dietary supplement and a method for increasing energy and mental alertness of an individual. It helps to stay awake, increase energy levels, boost performance during physical exercise & helps remain concentrated while studying. Rock On Max is an ideal energy drink for young, middle aged & elderly population that has perfect balance of safe and effective ingredients that gives you a physical & psychological boost devoid of any adverse effects if consumed within the safe limits as prescribed in dosage.
medicines.sideEffects: Rock On Max is a safe energy drink when used as directed, but if it is abused alone or in combination with other substances, then it can lead to irritability, anxiety, restlessness, insomnia, gastrointestinal upsets, tremors, tachycardia & psycho-motor agitation.
medicines.dosage: One to two sachet of Rock On Max should be used 30 minutes to an hour before going to Gym or for a walk to have a burst of energy or stamina. One or two sachet of Rock On Max should be taken an hour before sitting for a long study to increase alertness and concentration. Do not take more than two sachets simultaneously regularly and should avoid using more than 4 sachets per day to avoid its adverse effects.

medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains Omega-3 fatty acid (flaxseed oil) 300 mg, Green Tea Extract 50% polyphenols 10 mg, Ginseng Extract 10% ginsenoside 42.5 mg, Ginkgo Biloba Extract 24% ginkgo flavone 10 mg, Grape Seed Extract 95% opc 15 mg, Ginger root extract 2% gingerol 5 mg, Garlic extract 1% allicin 5 mg, Guggul extract 1.5 % gugglsterone 4 mg, Green coffee bean extract 50% chlorogenic acid 5 mg, Glycyrrhiza glabra extract 5% glycyrrhizic acid 5 mg, Gulab extract 1% alkanoid 5 mg, Green chirate extract 2% bitter 5 mg, Giloy extract 2% bitter 5 mg, Lactic acid bacillus 500 lac spores, Citrus bioflavonoids extract 40% bioflavonoids 20 mg, vitamin D3 200 IU, Wheat germ oil 25 mg, Benfotiamine 1 mg, Vitamin B6 1 mg, Vitamin B12 1 mcg, Niacinamide16 mg, Vitamin C 25 mg, Folic acid 150 mcg, Biotin 30 mcg, Choline Bitartrate 15 mg, Lutein extract 10% lutein 250 mcg, Piper longum extract 95% piperine 5 mg, Dibasic calcium phosphate 67.9 mg eq. to elemental Calcium 20 mg and eq. to elemental phosphorus 15.45 mg, Ferrous fumarate 17 mg, Zinc oxide eq. to elemental zinc 10 mg, Potassium iodide eq. to elemental iodine 150 mcg, Magnesium oxide eq. to elemental magnesium 30 mg, Manganese sulphate monohydrate eq. to elemental Manganese 1.5 mg , copper sulphate pentahydrate Eq. to el. copper 0.5 mg, chromium picolinate eq. to el chromium 5 mcg, sodium molybdate dehydrate eq. to el. molybdenum 25 mcg, potassium chloride 8.41 mg eq. to el. chloride 4 mg, eq. to el. potassium 3.6 mg, sodium borate eq. to elemental Boron 150 mcg Colloidal silicon dioxide eq. to elemental silicon 2 mg, Nickel sulphate eq. to elemental nickel 5 mcg, stannous chloride dehydrate eq. to el. It offers complete package of vital nutrients for daily health, well-being, support and to prevent various diseases. Geomax-12 G is indicated for chronic diseases, heart diseases, diabetes, respiratory diseases. It reduces fatigue and also provides improvement in cerebral disorders with age induced neuro-degeneration.

medicines.name: ROCK ON (35 gm)
medicines.composition: Each Sachet contains Dextrose Anhydrous 17.5 mg, Sucrose 14.0 g & Zinc 7.5 mg Energy Drink
medicines.description: Rock-On Sachet contains Dextrose & Sucrose, carbohydrates that provide instant energy & Zinc, to boost metabolism and immunity. Rock-On instant energizer is used for the treatment, control, prevention & improvement of low sugar level in diabetics, beneficial during prolonged exercise, improves exercise performance, provides rehydration during illness & in hot environments, if repeated vomiting with diarrhea exists, helps prevent heat stroke, provides sustained energy, contributes to electrolyte balance & fights back cramping (because of lack of energy in muscles).
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Dissolve in water or juice, else consume directly with spoon in all the cases except low sugar levels where it is to be put under tongue for faster rise in sugar levels. Rock-On can be safely given in all age groups.

medicines.name: ROCK ON (105 gm)
medicines.composition: Each Sachet contains Dextrose Anhydrous 17.5 mg, Sucrose 14.0 g & Zinc 7.5 mg Energy Drink (105 g)
medicines.description: Rock-On Sachet contains Dextrose & Sucrose, carbohydrates that provide instant energy & Zinc, to boost metabolism and immunity. Rock-On instant energizer is used for the treatment, control, prevention & improvement of low sugar level in diabetics, beneficial during prolonged exercise, improves exercise performance, provides rehydration during illness & in hot environments, if repeated vomiting with diarrhea exists, helps prevent heat stroke, provides sustained energy, contributes to electrolyte balance & fights back cramping (because of lack of energy in muscles).

medicines.name: ORALYTE SACHET
medicines.composition: Each sachet of 21 gm contains Sodium chloride 2.60 g, Potassium chloride 1.50 g, Sodium citrate 2.90 g, Dextrose (anhydrous) 13.50 g (Orange Flavour, ORS Powder)
medicines.description: Oralyte Powder is a WHO based ORS (Oral Rehydration Salt) formula. Oral rehydration salt is a combination of Dextrose and a number of essential electrolytes (Sodium Chloride, Potassium Chloride, Sodium Citrate). ORS Powder restores body fluids & electrolytes, lost due to dehydration in during diarrhea, vomiting, muscle cramping, and exertional heat illness while exercising in hot or humid weather.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild nausea and vomiting may occur. These effects can be decreased by taking this product slowly in small amounts with a spoon. If any of these effects persist or worsen, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.
medicines.dosage: Dissolve the contents of the packet in the amount of drinking water indicated on the packet, usually 1 litre. If drinking water is not available, or if you are not sure the water is drinkable, boil the water for at least 10 minutes and then let cool. Stir well, and give to the child or adult to drink in a cup or spoon-feed.
