medicines.name: EARWEL
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Gentamicin 0.3% w/v, Beclomethasone 0.025% w/v, Clotrimazole 1% w/v & Lignocaine 2% w/v
medicines.description: Earwel ear drops contain Gentamicin, an antibiotic that kills bacteria, Beclomethasone, a corticosteroid that relieves allergy & inflammation; Clotrimazole, an antifungal drug & Lignocaine, an anesthetic drug. These together constitute a product which is prescribed for all round prevention and treatment of infections and inflammation of the external & middle ear.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild irritation, burning or stinging sensation & dizziness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: AQUA EAR
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Gentamicin 0.3% w/v, Beclomethasone 0.025% w/v, Clotrimazole 1% w/v & Lignocaine 2% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Ear ear drops contain Gentamicin, an antibiotic that kills bacterial; Beclomethasone, a corticosteroid that relieves allergy & inflammation; Clotrimazole, an antifungal drug & Lignocaine, an anesthetic drug. These together constitute a product which is prescribed for all round prevention and treatment of infections and inflammation of the external & middle ear.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild irritation, burning or stinging sensation & dizziness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: CLINSOL OIL CONTROL FW
medicines.composition: Glycerin 25%, Hydroxyapatite, Glutathione & Cysteine complex 0.30% & Menthol 0.10 %
medicines.description: Clinsol Oil Control FW is a gentle face wash that removes excess oil and impurities without drying the skin. Enriched with glycerin, antioxidants, and menthol, it cleanses deeply, brightens, and refreshes the skin, leaving it balanced, hydrated, and revitalized for a healthy, clear complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet face, gently massage in circular motions, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily

medicines.name: HEVOBET-S OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g contains Halobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w & Salicylic acid 3.0% w/w
medicines.description: Hevobet-S contains Halobetasol, a corticosteroid to treat redness, swelling, irritation & itching & Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for initial treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis. It is also indicated for other inflammatory thick dead skin conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning sensation, stinging sensation, itching, irritation & skin removal are the few side effects.

medicines.name: HEVOBET-S LOTION
medicines.composition: Each g contains Halobetasol 0.05% w/v & Salicylic Acid 3% w/v
medicines.description: Hevobet-S contains Halobetasol, a corticosteroid to treat redness, swelling, irritation & itching & Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for initial treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis. It is also indicated for other inflammatory thick dead skin conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning sensation, stinging sensation, itching, irritation & skin removal are the few side effects.

medicines.name: HEVOBET
medicines.composition: Each g contains Halobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w
medicines.description: Hevobet cream contains Halobetasol, a very high potency corticosteroid that acts by reducing redness, swelling, itching and constricting blood vessels. It is prescribed to reduce swelling, redness and itching in steroid responsive skin conditions with wide variety of causes.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, stinging, itching, dryness & redness may occur when first applied to the skin.

medicines.name: HEVOBET-F
medicines.composition: Each g contains Halobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w & Fusidic acid 2% w/w
medicines.description: Hevobet-F cream contains Halobetasole, a corticosteroid that relieve itching, redness & swelling as well as Fusidic acid, an antibiotic that treats skin infections by stopping the growth of bacteria. Hevobet-F is prescribed in cases of skin infections that can respond to Fusidic acid & is associated with inflammation and allergy.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, itching, rash & stinging may occur after application.

medicines.name: APARIN
medicines.composition: Each g contains Heparin Sodium 0.042% w/w & Benzyl Nicotinate 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Aparin ointment contains Heparin, an anticoagulant that dissolves subcutaneous blood clots & Benzyl Nicotinate that cause dilation of the blood vessels underneath the skin to increase microcirculation and thus helps in faster healing. It is prescribed to treat redness, swelling and blood clots that cause blockage in veins and disrupts blood circulation after using an improperly placed IV Line; subcutaneous blood deposition due to various reasons; skin ulcers & Bruising and internal clotting of blood due to an injury.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are skin rashes, redness, itching and burning sensation on the skin & rough patches on the skin.

medicines.name: MARKSRUB SUPER
medicines.composition: Allium cepa extract 0.1 g, Heparin 50 IU & Allantoin 0.01 g
medicines.description: Onion extract is an anti-scar medicine that works by suppressing the activity of a chemicals responsible for inflammation (swelling) and hypertrophic scarring process after injury or burn. Heparin is an anticoagulant that widens the blood vessels to dissolve blood clots and promote blood flow at the injured site for faster & better healing & Allantoin is a skin protectant which moisturizes the skin and relieves minor irritation. Marksrub Super is used to reduce scar marks, suture marks, cut marks, burn marks and other kind of marks that effectively heals & conceals the skin marks.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated & minor side effects are skin irritation & tenderness at the site of application.

medicines.name: GEOFIT MASS GAINER (MANGO)
medicines.composition: Weight gain protein powder
medicines.description: Geofit Mass Gainer is an ideal way to gain weight & muscle mass for a healthy build up up by an individual or a bodybuilder. Geofit Mass Gainer contains a rich blend of carbohydrates; Whey protein & BCAA for the right build-up of body. It strengthens the body & fastens the building of muscle mass and fulfils the nutritional requirement of body. Geofit Mass gainer is available in three different flavors i.e. Banana, Mango & Chocolate.
medicines.sideEffects: Excessive weight gain & Indigestion
medicines.dosage: Add 3.33 large scoops of Geofit Mass Gainer (100 g) to 500 ml of water or full fat milk & shake for 30 seconds and consume 30 minutes pre or post workout. Else can be consumed as first thing in the day on empty stomach also.

medicines.name: THROMSURE-5 k
medicines.composition: Each vial contains 5000 IU Heparin Sodium i.e.1000 IU/ml.
medicines.description: Thromsure-5 k injection contains Heparin sodium, an anticoagulant drug used in the prevention and treatment of blood clots in post-surgical settings, medical conditions such as deep vein thrombosis and pulmonary embolism. Thromsure-5 k injection works by inhibiting the formation of blood clots & is administered intravenously, intramuscularly or subcutaneously under medical supervision to patients requiring anticoagulation therapy. Thromsure-5 k injection is critical in ensuring blood flow and reducing the risk of serious complications from various clotting disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Bleeding, bruising at the injection site, pain or irritation, increased liver enzymes, allergic reactions, redness & sores at the injection site are some of the side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: THROMSURE-25 k
medicines.composition: Each vial contains 25000 IU Heparin Sodium i.e. 5000 IU/ml
medicines.description: Thromsure-25 k injection contains Heparin sodium, an anticoagulant drug used in the prevention and treatment of blood clots in post-surgical settings, medical conditions such as deep vein thrombosis and pulmonary embolism. Thromsure-25 k injection works by inhibiting the formation of blood clots & is administered intravenously, intramuscularly or subcutaneously under medical supervision to patients requiring anticoagulation therapy. Thromsure-25 k injection is critical in ensuring blood flow and reducing the risk of serious complications from various clotting disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Bleeding, bruising at the injection site, pain or irritation, increased liver enzymes, allergic reactions, redness & sores at the injection site are some of the side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE C2 PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Soft gelatin capsule contains Rosehip Oil 400 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate 250 mg, Curcuminoid 100 mg, Chondroitin Sulphate 50 mg, Boswellia Serrata 50 mg, Undenatured Type-II Collagen 40 mg & Hyaluronic Acid 20 mg
medicines.description: Glucozone C2 Plus softgel contain Undenatured Collagen Type II for reformation of cartilage with Glucosamine, Methylsuphonyl methane, Sodium hyaluronate, for the formation of cartilage & tendon as well as Curcumin & Rosehip extract for pain and inflammation. Thus Glucozone C2 Plus softgel offers a complete package for joint health. It helps in formation of tendons and cartilage in the joints. Glucozone C2 Plus softgel are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis associated with marked inflammation. Glucozone C2 Plus improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One softgel of Glucozone-C2 Plus to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. Once started it should be given for at least one month to have an effective result.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE-CG TABLET
medicines.composition: Each tablet of 1456 mg contains Chondroitin Sulphate Sodium 400 mg, Rosehip Extract 250 mg, MSM 250 mg, Vitamin C 40 mg, Undenatured Type II Collagen Peptides 40 mg & Sodium Hyaluronate 30 mg
medicines.description: MSM & Collagen helps in building the cartilage and in combination with hyaluronate it is used to build tendons & ligaments; Rosehip extract treats pain & inflammation for joint health & maintenance as well as its rejuvenation. Glucozone-CG protects and rebuilds cartilage in case of osteoarthritis, inflammatory arthritis and cartilage damage in cases of trauma and injury. Besides it is also used for tendon & ligament injuries and rupture.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of Glucozone-CG to be given 3 to 4 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. The maximum dosage is 8 tablets per day in 3 to 4 divided dosage in any combination & the minimum dosage is one tablet BD.

medicines.name: CARTNIREST-C2 PLUS CAPSULES
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatine capsule contains Boswellia Serrata Ext. 125 mg, Undenatured Type II collagen 40 mg, Hyaluronic acid 50 mg, Curcuma longa ext. 75 mg, Piperine 2.5 mg & Cissus Quadrangularis 75 mg
medicines.description: Cartnirest-C2 Plus capsules is a potent combination of Boswellia serrata ext., Cissus quadrangularis ext., Hyaluronic acid and Piperine which assists in supporting joint health and flexibility. The ingredients Boswellia serrata and Cissus quadrangularis are known for their anti-inflammatory attributes and their ability to promote joint comfort. Hyaluronic acid aids in joint lubrication, while piperine enhances nutrient absorption for maximum effectiveness. Cartnirest-C2 Plus capsules are ideal for those seeking a comprehensive approach to joint support and overall wellness.
medicines.sideEffects: Cartnirest C2 Plus capsules at recommended dose has no side effects usually. If you have any unusual effects, contact your Doctor or Pharmacist promptly.
medicines.dosage: One capsule a day after meal or as directed by the physician

medicines.name: METAPOL- H
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Metoprolol Succinate 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate (as extended release) 50 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Metapol H tablet contains extended release Metoprolol Tartrate, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate & force as well as Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that act by removing excessive water through urine. It is usually prescribed for high blood pressure.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are tiredness, inflammation of nose & throat, dizziness, depression, shortness of breath, slow heart rate and rash.

medicines.name: NEOPRESS-HS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Losartan Potassium 50 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Neopress-HS tablets contain Losartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by reducing the blood volume. It is prescribed for high blood pressure.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of the combination are abdominal pain, nausea, diarrhea, dyspepsia, muscle fatigue, dizziness & hypotension.

medicines.name: OMNIPRES-20 AMH
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Olmesartan Medoxomil 20 mg, Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Omnipres-AMH tablet contains Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart works & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high blood pressure in patients whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled by a combination of two drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, dizziness, hypotension, muscle spasm, joint swelling, fatigue, palpitation, blood urea, creatinine & uric acid increases.

medicines.name: OMNIPRES-20 H
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Olmesartan Medoxomil 20 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Omnipres-20 H tablets contain Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The side effects of the combination are nausea, dizziness, increased uric acid in blood and respiratory tract infection.

medicines.name: VENPRES-40 AMH
medicines.composition: Each bilayered uncoated tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg, Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Venpres-40 AMH tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps blood & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. This combination is prescribed when single drug or dual drug combination alone is not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, dizziness, fatigue, coughing, nausea, fatigue, weakness, edema, face edema, lower limb edema, angioneurotic oedema, urticaria & hypersensitivity.

medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Olmesartan Medoxomil 20 mg, Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Omnitrol-20 AMH tablet contains Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart works & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high blood pressure in patients whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled by a combination of two drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, dizziness, hypotension, muscle spasm, joint swelling, fatigue, palpitation, blood urea, creatinine & uric acid increases.

medicines.name: TELVILITE-80 AMH
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Telmisartan 80 mg, Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Telvilite-80 AMH tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps blood & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. This combination is prescribed when single drug or dual drug combination alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, dizziness, fatigue, coughing, nausea, fatigue, weakness, edema, face edema, lower limb edema, angioneurotic oedema, urticaria & hypersensitivity.

medicines.name: TELVILITE-40 H (15's)
medicines.composition: Each bilayered uncoated tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Telvilite-40 H tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common side effect of the combination is dizziness.

medicines.name: MAXICORT INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Hydrocortisone Sodium Succinate eq. to Hydrocortisone 100 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Maxicort injection contains Hydrocortisone, a corticosteroid used to treat severe allergic reactions & inflammation. Maxicort injection is used in the management of multiple sclerosis (a disease in which the nerves do not function properly), lupus (a disease in which the body attacks many of its own organs), gastrointestinal disease, and certain types of arthritis. Hydrocortisone injection is also used to treat certain conditions that affect the blood, skin, eyes, nervous system, thyroid, kidneys, and lungs.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, dizziness, skin depressions at the injection site, increased body fat or movement to different areas of your body, difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep, extreme changes in mood, increased sweating, muscle weakness, dizziness and increased appetite.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN-H EYE OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g of eye ointment contains Neomycin Sulphate 3400 IU, Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU, Bacitracin Zinc 400 IU & Hydrocortisone 10 mg
medicines.description: Nosramycin-H eye ointment contains Neomycin, Polymyxin & Bacitracin three antibiotics which together offers broad spectrum of anti-bacterial activity & Hydrocortisone, a mild steroid that relieves redness, allergy & swelling in the eyes. It is prescribed for almost all types of superficial infections of external eye/s, where inflammation is present markedly.
medicines.sideEffects: Allergic reactions, eye irritation, itching & swelling are the main side effects.

medicines.name: PILOGO PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Troxerutin 2% w/w, Calcium Dobesilate monohydrate eq. to Anhydrous Calcium Dobesilate 0.25% w/w, Lignocaine Hydrochloride 3% w/w, Hydrocortisone Acetate 0.25% w/w, Zinc Oxide 5% w/w & Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 0.1% w/w (with Applicator)
medicines.description: Pilogo Plus cream contains Troxerutin and Calcium Dobesilate which stabilizes the veins to reduce bleeding and swelling, Zinc Oxide an antibacterial, Phenylephrine relieve piles by shrinking swollen blood vessels in the rectal area, thereby reducing discomfort and swelling., Hydrocortisone a steroid that reduces pain, inflammation and pruritis and Lignocaine, an anesthetic that relieves pain. Pilogo plus cream is indicated for pain and bleeding associated with anal fissures, haemorrhoids, after haemorrhoids removal surgery and in prevention of recurrence of piles following surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are application site reactions which include burning, irritation, itching and redness.

medicines.name: ELOSONE-HT (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Hydroquinone 2% w/w, Tretinoin 0.025% w/w & Mometasone Furoate 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Elosone-HT cream contains Mometasone, a steroid that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Hydroquinone, a de-pigmenting agent that stops synthesis of melanin to help lighten the skin & Tretinoin, a retinoid that increases cell turnover rate & thus helps exfoliate the skin to renew it. It is prescribed to treat Melasma (dark patchy areas on the skin, at cheeks & forehead) on the face. Elosone-HT cream is used in conjunction with sun-avoidance measures, like using sunscreens and wearing protective clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild burning, stinging, redness & dryness may occur.

medicines.name: MARKSRUB ULTRA (15g/ 25g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Hydroquinone 2% w/w, Tretinoin 0.025% w/w & Mometasone Furoate 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Marksrub Ultra cream contains Hydroquinone, a de-pigmenting agent that stops synthesis of melanin to help lighten the skin; Tretinoin, a retinoid that increases cell turnover rate & thus helps exfoliate the skin to renew it & Mometasone, a steroid that reduces redness, swelling & itching. It is prescribed to treat Melasma (dark patchy areas on the skin, at cheeks & forehead) on the face. Marks Rub Ultra cream is used in conjunction with sun-avoidance measures, like using sunscreens and wearing protective clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild burning, stinging, redness & dryness may occur.

medicines.name: ULTRABRITE CREAM (15g & 25g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Hydroquinone 2% w/w, Tretinoin 0.025% w/w & Mometasone Furoate 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Ultrabrite cream contains Mometasone, a steroid that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Hydroquinone, a de-pigmenting agent that stops synthesis of melanin to help lighten the skin & Tretinoin, a retinoid that increases cell turnover rate & thus helps exfoliate the skin to renew it. It is prescribed to treat Melasma (dark patchy areas on the skin, at cheeks & forehead) on the face. Ultrabrite cream is used in conjunction with sun-avoidance measures, like using sunscreens and wearing protective clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild burning, stinging, redness & dryness may occur.

medicines.name: SPOTSRUB ULTRA (15 g/25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Hydroquinone 2% w/w, Tretinoin 0.025% w/w & Mometasone Furoate 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Spotsrub Ultra cream contains Hydroquinone, a de-pigmenting agent that stops synthesis of melanin to help lighten the skin; Tretinoin, a retinoid that increases cell turnover rate & thus helps exfoliate the skin to renew it & Mometasone, a steroid that reduces redness, swelling & itching. It is prescribed to treat Melasma (dark patchy areas on the skin, at cheeks & forehead) on the face. Spotsrub Ultra cream is used in conjunction with sun-avoidance measures, like using sunscreens and wearing protective clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild burning, stinging, redness & dryness may occur.

medicines.name: PREGNANCY BACK SUPPORT
medicines.composition: N.A.
medicines.description: Pregnancy Back Support supports back & abdomen in 3rd Trimester of Pregnancy. SIZES AVAILABLE: S, M, L & XL
medicines.sideEffects: N.A.

medicines.name: HQ-STAR 200
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Hydroxychloroquine 200 mg
medicines.description: HQ-Star contains Hydroxychloroquine, a quinolone that is a disease modifying anti-rheumatic drug and also an anti-malarial. It is Indicated for the suppressive treatment and treatment of acute attacks of malaria due to Plasmodium vivax, P. malariae, P. ovale & susceptible strains of P. falciparum but not effective against chloroquine-resistant strains of P. falciparum. It is also indicated in the treatment of discoid and systemic lupus erythematosus, and rheumatoid arthritis
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, gastrointestinal complaints , Blurring of vision, Skin rash, pruritus, Dizziness, Abnormal liver function tests, Sensory-motor disorders, cardiomyopathy, QT interval prolongation, and ventricular arrhythmias.

medicines.name: HQ-STAR 400
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Hydroxychloroquine 400 mg
medicines.description: HQ-Star contains Hydroxychloroquine, a quinolone that is a disease modifying anti-rheumatic drug and also an anti-malarial. It is Indicated for the suppressive treatment and treatment of acute attacks of malaria due to Plasmodium vivax, P. malariae, P. ovale & susceptible strains of P. falciparum but not effective against chloroquine-resistant strains of P. falciparum. It is also indicated in the treatment of discoid and systemic lupus erythematosus, and rheumatoid arthritis
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, gastrointestinal complaints , Blurring of vision, Skin rash, pruritus, Dizziness, Abnormal liver function tests, Sensory-motor disorders, cardiomyopathy, QT interval prolongation, and ventricular arrhythmias.

medicines.name: PREGPHASE 500
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Hydroxyprogesterone Caproate 250 mg i.e. 500 mg per Ampoule
medicines.description: Pregphase 500 injection contains Hydroxyprogesterone caproate (Synthetic form of progesterone hormone). Pregphase 500 is indicated to reduce the risk of preterm birth in women with a singleton pregnancy who have a history of singleton spontaneous preterm birth.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Injection site pain and swelling, Urticaria, Pruritus, nausea and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ATAZIS DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml of drops contains Hydroxyzine Hydrochloride eq. to Hydroxyzine 6 mg
medicines.description: Atazis contains Hydroxyzine, an anti-allergic drug that acts by stopping action of natural allergy causing chemical i.e. histamine in the body. It is prescribed for allergic reactions (itching, sneezing etc.), for anxiety & tension as well as for sedation i.e. for inducing sleep in medical conditions and after anesthesia.
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, blurred vision, constipation & dry mouth are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ATAZIS SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Hydroxyzine Hydrochloride eq. to Hydroxyzine 10 mg
medicines.description: Atazis contains Hydroxyzine, an anti-allergic drug that acts by stopping action of natural allergy causing chemical i.e. histamine in the body. It is prescribed to manage allergic reactions (itching, sneezing etc.) in the body.
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, blurred vision, constipation & dry mouth are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ATAZIS-10
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Hydroxyzine Hydrochloride 10 mg
medicines.description: Atazis contains Hydroxyzine, an anti-allergic drug that acts by stopping action of natural allergy causing chemical i.e. histamine in the body. It is prescribed for allergic reactions (itching, sneezing etc.), for anxiety & tension as well as for sedation i.e. for inducing sleep in medical conditions and after anesthesia.
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, blurred vision, constipation & dry mouth are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ATAZIS-25
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Hydroxyzine Hydrochloride 25 mg
medicines.description: Atazis contains Hydroxyzine, an anti-allergic drug that acts by stopping action of natural allergy causing chemical i.e. histamine in the body. It is prescribed for allergic reactions (itching, sneezing etc.), for anxiety & tension as well as for sedation i.e. for inducing sleep in medical conditions and after anesthesia.
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, blurred vision, constipation & dry mouth are the main side effects.

medicines.name: BUSCOMIDE-P
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Hysoscine Butylbromide 10 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Buscomide-P is a combination of Hyoscine Butylbromide, an antispasmodic agent, and Paracetamol, an effective analgesic and antipyretic. This dual-action formula provides rapid relief from abdominal pain, cramps, spasms, and associated fever or discomfort.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Possible side effects may include dry mouth, dizziness, nausea, or constipation. Rarely, allergic reactions or blurred vision may occur. Seek medical attention if symptoms persist.

medicines.name: IBUFYL PLUS SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Ibuprofen 100 mg & Paracetamol 162.5 mg
medicines.description: Ibufyl Plus contains Ibuprofen an NSAID and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. Ibufyl Plus is indicated for the treatment of minor aches and pains and for reduction of fever.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects hypersensitivity reactions, dizziness, bronchospasm, dysponea, aggravated asthma, various skin reactions e.g. pruritis and urtricaria.

medicines.name: IBUFYL PLUS TABLET
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablets contains Ibuprofen 400 mg and Paracetamol 325 mg.
medicines.description: Ibufyl Plus tablet contains Ibuprofen an NSAID and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. Ibufyl Plus tablets are indicated for the treatment of minor aches, pains due to any reason, for reduction of fever & post-surgical pain as well as post trauma.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects hypersensitivity reactions, dizziness, bronchospasm, dysponea, aggravated asthma, various skin reactions e.g. pruritis and urtricaria.

medicines.name: ILASET-DSR
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Ilaprazole IP (as Gastro-resistant tablet) 10 mg & Domperidone IP (as uncoated bilayered Prolonged Release tablet) 30 mg Capsules (as Tablet in Capsule formulation)
medicines.description: Ilaset-DSR capsule contains Ilaprazole a PPI and Domperidone a gastro pro-kinetic agent that improves movement of digestive system. Ilaset-DSR is indicated for the relief of dyspepsia, GERD, nausea associated with acid peptic disorders and post-operative nausea and vomiting.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, nausea, vomiting, constipation, diarrhea, gas and sore throat

medicines.name: ILASET
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Ilaprazole 10 mg
medicines.description: Ilaset tablets contains Ilaprazole, a new proton pump inhibitors i.e. acid inhibitor. Its one tablet daily provides better acid control during night time as compared to all other PPIs. Ilaset is indicated for GERD, inflammation of food pipe, dyspepsia and peptic ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, constipation, diarrhea, gas and sore throat

medicines.name: TROPIVENT-L 1.25 RESPULE
medicines.composition: Each respule contains Ipratropium bromide 500 mcg & Levosalbutamol 1.25 mg
medicines.description: Tropivent-L respule contains Ipratropium bromide & Levosalbutamol, both are bronchodilator drug that acts by dilating the airways of the respiratory tract. It is prescribed for inhalation i.e. for breathing with the help of Nebulizer to manage asthma & other chronic lung diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are allergic reaction, fast heart rate, headache, dyspepsia, leg cramps, dizziness, nervousness, tremor, anxiety & dry mouth.

medicines.name: TROPIVENT-L INHALER
medicines.composition: Each Inhaler contains pressurised inhalation suspensions, delivering 20 micrograms of Ipratropium & 50 micrograms of Levosalbutamol per actuation (pressing) in 12 g canister containing 200 metered doses.
medicines.description: Tropivent-L inhaler contains Levosalbutamol and Ipratropium, a combination medication used in treating chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) & asthma. Levosalbutamol is a bronchodilator that relaxes airway muscles while Ipratropium is an anti-cholinergic that helps open & widen the airways. Together, they provide rapid relief from bronchospasm and wheezing, improving airflow and easing breathing. Tropivent-L inhaler is commonly used for both acute and maintenance management of respiratory conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are allergic reaction, Hoarseness of voice, fast heart rate, headache, dyspepsia, dizziness, tremor & dry mouth.

medicines.name: TROPIVENT-L 0.63 RESPULE
medicines.composition: Each 2.5 ml respule contains Levosalbutamol 0.63 mg & Ipratropium Bromide 500 mcg.
medicines.description: Tropivent-L 0.63 respule is combination medicine which contains Ipratropium & Levosalbutamol. Both are bronchodilator drugs that act by dilating the airways of the respiratory tract. Tropivent-L 0.63 is prescribed for inhalation with the help of nebulizer in order to manage asthma & other chronic lung diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects may include allergic reactions, fast heart rate, headache, dyspepsia, leg cramps, dizziness, nervousness, tremor, anxiety & dry mouth.

medicines.name: HB FORD INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ferric oxide in complex with Sucrose eq. to elemental Iron 20 mg i.e. 100 mg per Ampoule
medicines.description: HBford injection is contains Iron sucrose (form of Iron) indicated for treatment of iron deficiency anemia associated with chronic kidney disease.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Hypotension, muscle cramps, headache, nausea, dizziness, Fatigue, Arthralgia, Back pain, hypertension, fluid overload, peripheral edema, cough, vomiting, diarrhea, Constipation and Pruritus.

medicines.name: FEMOZER INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ampoule contains Ferric oxide in complex with Sucrose eq. to El Iron 100 mg
medicines.description: Femozer injection is indicated for treatment of iron deficiency anaemia associated with chronic kidney disease.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are hypotension, muscle cramps, headache, nausea, dizziness, fatigue, arthralgia, back pain, hypertension, fluid overload, peripheral oedema, cough, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation and pruritus.

medicines.name: VASMOCARD 30 CR
medicines.composition: Each film coated prolonged release tablet contains Isosorbide 5 Mononitrate 30 mg
medicines.description: Vasmocard tablet contains prolonged release tablet of Isosorbide 5 Mononitrate, a Vasodilator drug that dilates blood vessels to increase blood supply in the affected area. It is prescribed for long term management of angina or heart pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, flushing, nausea, headache & rashes are the main side effects.

medicines.name: VASMOCARD 60 CR
medicines.composition: Each film coated prolonged release tablet contains Isosorbide 5 Mononitrate 60 mg
medicines.description: Vasmocard tablet contains prolonged release tablet of Isosorbide 5 Mononitrate, a Vasodilator drug that dilates blood vessels to increase blood supply in the affected area. It is prescribed for long term management of angina or heart pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, flushing, nausea, headache & rashes are the main side effects.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN- i10
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains Isotretinoin 10 mg
medicines.description: Acnetoin i10 softgels contain Isotretinoin (Retinoid derived from Vitamin A). It acts by reducing the oil produced by oil glands of facial skin. It is used for severe form of acne, resistant to standard therapy of antibacterial and topical administration.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are red, cracked, and sore lips, dry skin, eyes, mouth, or nose, nosebleeds, upset stomach, bleeding or swollen gums and thinning of hair.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN-i20
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains Isotretinoin 20 mg
medicines.description: Acnetoin i20 softgels contain Isotretinoin (Retinoid derived from Vitamin A). It acts by reducing the oil produced by oil glands of facial skin. It is used for severe form of acne, resistant to standard therapy of antibacterial and topical administration.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are red, cracked, and sore lips, dry skin, eyes, mouth, or nose, nosebleeds, upset stomach, bleeding or swollen gums and thinning of hair.

medicines.name: CLINSOL-i10
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains Isotretinoin 10 mg
medicines.description: Clinsol i10 softgels contain Isotretinoin (Retinoid derived from Vitamin A). It acts by reducing the oil produced by oil glands of facial skin. It is used for severe form of acne, resistant to standard therapy of antibacterial and topical administration.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are red, cracked and sore lips, dry skin, eyes, mouth, or nose, nosebleeds, upset stomach, bleeding or swollen gums and thinning of hair.

medicines.name: CLINSOL-i20
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains Isotretinoin 20 mg
medicines.description: Clinsol i20 softgels contain Isotretinoin (Retinoid derived from Vitamin A). It acts by reducing the oil produced by oil glands of facial skin. It is used for severe form of acne, resistant to standard therapy of antibacterial and topical administration.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are red, cracked, and sore lips, dry skin, eyes, mouth, or nose, nosebleeds, upset stomach, bleeding or swollen gums and thinning of hair.

medicines.name: KIDOGEM WIPES (80 Pcs)
medicines.composition: Baby wet wipes for smooth, clean & tender baby skin.
medicines.description: Leeford's Kidogem Baby wipes are moistened wet wipes with nourishing & cleansing solutions that gently cleanses delicate baby skin, prevents microbial growth and heals irritated & chapped skin. Also, it provides a mild fragrance to cleansed, nourished skin of the baby. Kidogem wipes also gives a subtle touch to the tender baby skin with their soft material.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Pull back the lid and take out the desired number of wipes. Close the lid tightly after using so as to avoid wipes from drying out. Keep away from direct sunlight. Discard the used wipes in the bin after use.

medicines.name: SUPRIDE
medicines.composition: Each uncoated sustained release tablet contains Isoxsuprine Hydrochloride 40 mg
medicines.description: Supride tablet contains Isoxsuprine Hydrochloride in sustain release form, a Vasodilator drug that dilates blood vessels to increase blood supply. It is prescribed for medical conditions where blood supply to a particular organ or a part of body is diminished such as in feet & during pregnancy to baby etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, flushing, stomach upset, nausea, shaking or nervousness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: DAYLITE POWDER
medicines.composition: Each 5.6 g of powder contains Ispaghula husk 3.5 g (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Daylite powder contains Ispaghula husk, peel of seeds of Psyllium called as husk that acts by absorbing water in the intestine to form bulk and thus helps relieve constipation. It is used for relief of constipation, including constipation in pregnancy and the maintenance of regularity; for the management of bowel function in patients with short intestines, haemorrhoids, anal fissure & other gastro intestinal diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated product, no observed side effects.

medicines.name: FREELAC GRANULES
medicines.composition: Each 15 g of granules contains Lactitol Monohydrate 10 g & Ispaghula husk 3.5 g (Orange Lemon Flavour)
medicines.description: Freelac granules is indicated for constipation associated with IBS, Pregnancy, Fissures, Hemorrhoids, pre and post-operative conditions and mild to moderate hypercholesterolemia. It can also be used for prevention of hepatic encephalopathy in high risk patients.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are flatulence, bloating and stomach cramps.

medicines.name: LACMOLAX GRANULES
medicines.composition: Lactitol Monohydrate 10 mg & Ispaghula husk 3.5 g granules (Orange-lemon flavor)
medicines.description: Lacmolax granules contains Lactitol which is a Osmotic laxative and Ipaghula husk a Dietry fibre. It is indicated for constipation associated with IBS, Pregnancy, Fissures, Hemorrhoids, pre and post-operative conditions and mild to moderate hypercholesterolemia. It can also be used for prevention of hepatic encephalopathy in high risk patients.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Flatulence, bloating and stomach cramps.

medicines.name: ITROSTRED-100 (10's)
medicines.composition: Each hard cellulose capsule contains Itraconazole 100 mg
medicines.description: Itrostred capsules & sustain release tablets contains Itraconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by inhibiting the growth of disease causing fungi. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the skin, internal organs and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, headache, stomach upset & dizziness.

medicines.name: ITROSTRED-200 (10's)
medicines.composition: Each hard cellulose capsule contains Itraconazole 200 mg
medicines.description: Itrostred capsules & sustain release tablets contains Itraconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by inhibiting the growth of disease causing fungi. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the skin, internal organs and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, headache, stomach upset & dizziness.

medicines.name: ITROMED 100 (10's)
medicines.composition: Each hard cellulose capsule contains Itraconazole 100 mg (as Pellets)
medicines.description: Itromed capsules contains Itraconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by inhibiting the growth of disease causing fungi. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the skin, internal organs and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, headache, stomach upset & dizziness.

medicines.name: ITROMED 200 (10's)
medicines.composition: Each hard cellulose capsule contains Itraconazole 200 mg
medicines.description: Itromed capsules contains Itraconazole, an azole antifungal that acts by inhibiting the growth of disease causing fungi. It is prescribed for fungal infections of the skin, internal organs and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, headache, stomach upset & dizziness.

medicines.name: ITROSTRED POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Itraconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itrostred dusting powder contains Itraconazole, an antifungal that kills fungi to cure infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin in groin areas, between fingers, under armpit, on skin fold & nail etc. It can also be used in between the cream for better result and to completely remove the infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild irritation at application site may happen

medicines.name: ITROSTRED GEL
medicines.composition: Each g contains Itraconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itrostred gel contains Itraconazole, an antifungal drug that acts by eliminating the fungus from site of infection by killing it. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers and other skin area of the body; fungal nail infections & for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Application site irritation, stinging sensation & skin removal may occur.

medicines.name: ITROSTRED SOAP
medicines.composition: Each soap contains Itraconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itrostred soap contains Itraconazole, an antifungal drug to eliminate fungal infections. It is prescribed for prevention of fungal infection of the entire body skin. It is used as a regular bathing soap during active treatment and thereafter for one month for prevention, after cure of infection. It should otherwise not be used as a regular bathing soap under normal circumstances.
medicines.sideEffects: Not known.

medicines.name: ITROSTRED-TF
medicines.composition: Each g contains Itraconazole 1% w/w & Terbinafine 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itrostred-TF cream contains Itraconazole & Terbinafine, two anti-fungal drug that acts synergistically to provide better and faster result. It is prescribed for fungal infections of vagina, skin, skin folds & nail.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are related to application site complaint such as irritation, stinging sensation & skin eruption.

medicines.name: ITROMED GEL
medicines.composition: Itraconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itromed gel contains Itraconazole, an antifungal drug that acts by eliminating the fungus from site of infection by killing it. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers and other skin area of the body; fungal nail infections & for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Application site irritation, stinging sensation & skin removal may occur.

medicines.name: ITROMED SOAP
medicines.composition: Itraconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itromed soap contains Itraconazole, an antifungal drug to eliminate fungal infections. It is prescribed for prevention of fungal infection of the entire body skin. It is used as a regular bathing soap during active treatment and thereafter for one month for prevention, after cure of infection. It should otherwise not be used as a regular bathing soap under normal circumstances.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally considered safe for topical use as directed.
medicines.dosage: First wet the affected skin area. Gently rub the soap to create a lather, leave it on for 2-3 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Always follow your doctor's specific instructions regarding frequency and duration of use, and avoid contact with eyes, mouth, and other mucous membranes.

medicines.name: ITROMED POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Itraconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itromed dusting powder contains Itraconazole, an antifungal that kills fungi to cure infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin in groin areas, between fingers, under armpit, on skin fold & nail etc. It can also be used in between the cream for better result and to completely remove the infection.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, abdominal pain, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, drowsiness, oedema, hypertension and GI bleed or perforation.

medicines.name: KETOFORD DT (10's & 15's)
medicines.composition: Each uncoated dispersible tablet contains Ketorolac Tromethamine 10 mg
medicines.description: Ketoford DT contains Ketorolac Tromethamine, a nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) used for short-term relief of moderate to severe pain. It works by inhibiting prostaglandin production, thus reducing pain, inflammation, and swelling. It is commonly used for post-surgical pain or injury-related discomfort.
medicines.sideEffects: May include gastrointestinal discomfort, nausea, dizziness, and headaches. Rarely, renal or cardiovascular effects may occur.

medicines.name: VEULAP-KT EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Ketorolac 0.4% w/v & Olopatadine 0.1% w/v Eye Drops
medicines.description: Veulap-KT Eye Drop is a combination of two medicines used in the treatment of allergic conjunctivitis. It relieves redness, itchiness, and swelling of the eye and provides temporary relief from burning sensation and discomfort. It is prescribed for allergic conditions of the eye/s such as conjunctivitis.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, blurred vision, burning/stinging sensation, redness, dryness of the eye, eyelid swelling & a feeling as if something is in your eye may occur.

medicines.name: ENSHINER
medicines.composition: Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Kojic Acid, Betaine, D-Panthenol & Glycerin
medicines.description: Enshiner Cream is a skin-brightening and hydrating formulation with Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, a stable Vitamin C derivative that brightens skin and reduces pigmentation; Kojic Acid, which helps lighten dark spots by inhibiting melanin production; Betaine, a gentle hydrator that protects the skin barrier; D-Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5), known for its soothing and repairing properties; and Glycerin, a powerful humectant that maintains skin moisture.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. In rare cases, mild irritation, redness, or tingling may occur, especially on sensitive skin. Discontinue use if irritation persists.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount of Enshiner Cream to cleansed skin on the affected areas or entire face, depending on the extent of pigmentation. Use twice daily for visible results. Once improvement is noted, reduce to once daily for maintenance. Avoid using with other strong exfoliants or pigmentation treatments unless advised by a healthcare professional.

medicines.name: SPOTS RUB
medicines.composition: Ethyl ascorbic acid, Kojic Acid, Betaine, D-Panthenol & Glycerin
medicines.description: Spotsrub cream is designed to give you brighter, smoother, and more hydrated skin. It uses Ethyl Ascorbic Acid (a stable form of Vitamin C) and Kojic Acid to help fade dark spots and create a more even skin tone. Additionally, Betaine, D-Panthenol, and Glycerin work together as powerful moisturizers to deeply hydrate your skin, leaving it feeling soft, plump, and healthy.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerated cream, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply small quantity of Spotsrub cream twice a day, i.e. in morning and evening before retiring to the bed after thoroughly washing and pat drying the face. Always use a sunscreen before going out in the sun.

medicines.name: ENSHINER PRO
medicines.composition: Arbutin, Grape seed ext., Kojic acid, Lecithin, Vit. E, Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Glutathione, Glycerin & Tranexamic acid
medicines.description: Enshiner Pro cream is a multifunctional cream that acts on skin lightening by reducing melanin, treats melasma & other pigmentations, reduces wrinkles and offers uniform skin tone. If applied on the body elsewhere acts as a anti-ageing & anti-wrinkle cream and thus can be used on neck & Upper chest areas as well as on arms and abdomen.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerated, mild irritation or sensation may occur.
medicines.dosage: Use Enshiner Pro Cream twice daily on the desired area after thoroughly washing and pat drying the area or after sponging the surface for other than facial application.

medicines.name: ENSHINER ULTRA
medicines.composition: Glycolic acid, Kojic acid, Niacinamide, Tyrostat, Ethyl Ascorbic acid, Licorice ext. & Rumex occidentalis extract
medicines.description: Enshiner Ultra cream reduces dark spots and lightens skin shade to provide effective skin brightening with anti-aging benefits. Enshiner Ultra cream inhibits melanin synthesis for lightening complexion & to restore an even skin tone by fading skin discolorations. It has added sunscreens to protect the skin from harmful UV rays and also reduces hyper-pigmentation.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply twice daily for best results, after washing the face or use it after bathing.

medicines.name: ENSHINER SOAP
medicines.composition: Kojic Acid, L-Glutathione & Alpha Arbutin
medicines.description: Enshiner Soap is a potent skin-brightening cleansing bar formulated with Kojic Acid, L-Glutathione, and Alpha Arbutin. It helps reduce pigmentation, uneven skin tone, and dark spots while promoting a radiant, even complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wet skin, lather Enshiner Soap, gently massage for 1-2 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily for best results.

medicines.name: SPOTSRUB PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Glycolic Acid, Alpha Arbutin, Kojic Acid, Grape Seed Ext, Mulberry Leaf Ext, Licorice root ext, Magnesium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Vit. E, Betaine & Glycerin
medicines.description: Spotsrub Plus is used to brighten and even skin tone, reduce hyperpigmentation, and improve skin texture. The active ingredients help exfoliate, lighten dark spots, hydrate, and protect against environmental damage, promoting a healthy, glowing complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause skin irritation, redness, or dryness, especially in sensitive skin. Prolonged use may lead to increased sun sensitivity or allergic reactions.
medicines.dosage: Apply a thin layer to clean, dry skin, avoiding the eye area. Gently massage in circular motions until absorbed. Use once or twice daily, preferably in the evening. Follow with sunscreen during the day, as the product may increase sun sensitivity. Discontinue use if irritation occurs.

It is used to treat constipation, sour stomach, heartburn, acidity, caused by excessive eating and also for bowel clearance before radioscopy.

It is also used before reproductive techniques for optimizing DNA quality and testis surgery to increase sperm count, movement and quality.
medicines.sideEffects: Cozyrich Q10 tablets generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or?Pharmacist?promptly.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are hot flushes, hair loss, joint/bone/muscle pain, tiredness, night sweats, nausea, diarrhoea, trouble sleeping and dizziness.

medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Levonorgestrel 1.5 mg
medicines.description: Postpone-72 tablet contains Levonorgestrel which is progestin-only emergency contraceptive indicated for prevention of pregnancy following unprotected intercourse or a known or suspected contraceptive failure. To obtain optimal efficacy, the tablet should be taken as soon as possible within 72 hours of intercourse.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, abdominal pain, fatigue, headache, heavier menstrual bleeding, lighter menstrual bleeding, dizziness, breast tenderness, vomiting and diarrhea.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, dizziness, nervousness, heartburn, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, dry mouth or throat, stomach cramps, weakness, diarrhea, muscle pain leg cramps, constipation, rash and urticaria.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, heartburn or bloating, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: TROPIVENT-L INHALER
medicines.composition: Each Inhaler contains pressurised inhalation suspensions, delivering 20 micrograms of Ipratropium & 50 micrograms of Levosalbutamol per actuation (pressing) in 12 g canister containing 200 metered doses.
medicines.description: Tropivent-L inhaler contains Levosalbutamol and Ipratropium, a combination medication used in treating chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) & asthma. Levosalbutamol is a bronchodilator that relaxes airway muscles while Ipratropium is an anti-cholinergic that helps open & widen the airways. Together, they provide rapid relief from bronchospasm and wheezing, improving airflow and easing breathing. Tropivent-L inhaler is commonly used for both acute and maintenance management of respiratory conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are allergic reaction, Hoarseness of voice, fast heart rate, headache, dyspepsia, dizziness, tremor & dry mouth.

medicines.description: Welbusol inhaler contains Levosalbutamol, a bronchodilator that is used in the management & treatment of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). It works by relaxing the muscles around the airways, helping to open them and make breathing easier. Welbusol inhaler provides quick relief from bronchospasm and wheezing. It is used as a rescue inhaler for sudden breathing difficulties, offering fast-acting relief when needed.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are allergic reaction, fast heart rate, migraine, dyspepsia, leg cramps, dizziness, tremor, anxiety & dry mouth.

medicines.description: ESOMEFOL-SL is a combination capsule containing Esomeprazole, a proton pump inhibitor (PPI), and Levosulpiride, a prokinetic agent. Esomeprazole reduces gastric acid secretion by inhibiting the H⁺/K⁺-ATPase enzyme system, providing effective relief in acid-related disorders. Levosulpiride enhances gastric motility and regulates gut-brain signaling by blocking dopamine D2 receptors. Together, they offer synergistic relief in acid reflux, GERD, functional dyspepsia, and gastric motility disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Possible side effects include headache, nausea, abdominal discomfort, dizziness, or diarrhea.

medicines.name: AQUA EAR

medicines.name: HEPALAIR INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains L-Ornithine L-Aspartate 500 mg i.e. 5 g per ampoule of 10 ml

This helps in regeneration of damaged liver cells which helps liver to carry out its functions smoothly. Hepalair is used in the treatment of diseases associated with impaired hepatic function (e.g. cirrhosis of the liver), when there are symptoms and signs of minimal or overt hepatic encephalopathy especially for the treatment of incipient loss (Pre coma) or clouding of consciousness (coma).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, cough, muscle cramping, and diarrhea.

medicines.description: Hepalair contains L-Ornithine l-Aspartate which increases the levels of ornithine and aspartic acid in the body, these amino acids help to reduce levels of ammonia in the blood. This helps in regeneration of damaged liver cells which helps liver to carry out its functions smoothly. Hepalair is used in the treatment of diseases associated with impaired hepatic function (e.g. cirrhosis of the liver), when there are symptoms and signs of minimal or overt hepatic encephalopathy especially for the treatment of incipient loss (Pre coma) or clouding of consciousness (coma).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, cough, muscle cramping, and diarrhea.

medicines.name: HEPLOFIT SACHET
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains L-Ornithine L-Aspartate 3 g
medicines.description: Heplofit contains L-Ornithine l-Aspartate which increases the levels of ornithine and aspartic acid in the body, these amino acids help to reduce levels of ammonia in the blood. This helps in regeneration of damaged liver cells which helps liver to carry out its functions smoothly. Heplofit is used in the treatment of diseases associated with impaired hepatic function (e.g. cirrhosis of the liver), when there are symptoms and signs of minimal or overt hepatic encephalopathy especially for the treatment of incipient loss (Pre coma) or clouding of consciousness (coma).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include Nausea, vomiting, cough, muscle cramping, and diarrhea

medicines.name: HEPALAIR TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains L-Ornithine L-Aspartate 150 mg & Pancreatin 100 mg
medicines.description: Hepalair tablets contains L-Ornithine l-Aspartate which increases the levels of ornithine and aspartic acid in the body, these amino acids help to reduce levels of a ammonia in the blood .This helps in regeneration of damaged liver cells which helps liver to carry out its functions smoothly. It also contains Pancreatin which is a digestive enzyme. Hepalair tablets are indicated in acute and chronic hepatitis, Cirrhosis of liver, alcoholic liver damage & adjunct to hepatotoxic drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, Stomach pain, Bloating, Diarrhea and Constipation.

medicines.name: HEPLOFIT TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains L-Ornithine L-Aspartate 150 mg & Pancreatin 100 mg
medicines.description: Heplofit tablets contains L-Ornithine L-Aspartate which increases the levels of ornithine and aspartic acid in the body, these amino acids help to reduce levels of ammonia in the blood .This helps in regeneration of damaged liver cells which helps liver to carry out its functions smoothly. It also contains Pancreatin which is a digestive enzyme. Hepalair tablets are indicated in acute and chronic hepatitis, Cirrhosis of liver, alcoholic liver damage & adjunct to hepatotoxic drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Stomach pain, Bloating, Diarrhea and Constipation.

medicines.name: HEPLOFIT FORTE TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Metadoxine 500 mg, L-Ornithine L-Aspartate 150 mg, Silymarin 140 mg, Vitamin B6 3.0 mg & Folic Acid 1.5 mg.
medicines.description: Heplofit Forte tablets is a comprehensive formulation that contains Metadoxine, L-Ornithine-L-Aspartate (LOLA), Silymarin, Vitamin B6 & Folic Acid. Heplofit Forte tablets are aimed at supporting liver health. Metadoxine aids in alcohol metabolism, while LOLA promotes ammonia detoxification. Silymarin acts as a potent antioxidant for liver protection, Vitamin B6 and Folic Acid contributes in promoting metabolic processes and liver function. Altogether, the combination helps maintain liver function, detoxify harmful substances and support overall liver health and vitality.
medicines.sideEffects: Liver function changes, headache, dizziness, gastrointestinal effects & allergic reaction are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: LEXICAM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Lornoxicam 8 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Lexicam Tablet is a combination of Lornoxicam a NSAID and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which is indicated for the treatment of mild to moderate pain and inflammation in Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Dental Pain, acute lower back pain, Sciatica Pain & Post-Surgical pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Vomiting, Nausea, Indigestion, Stomach pain and Diarrhea.

medicines.name: COXILOR P
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Lornoxicam 8 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Coxilor-P tablet contain Lornoxicam (NSAID) and Paracetamol (Analgesic and anti-pyretic).It is indicated for treatment of pain and inflammation in Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, dental pain, acute low back pain, post-surgical pain and inflammation, sciatica pain and traumatic pain and inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, constipation and stomach pain.

medicines.name: NEOPRESS-50
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Losartan Potassium 50 mg
medicines.description: Neopress tablets contain Losartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels. It is prescribed for high blood pressure & other cardiac as well as diabetic conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, increased potassium levels in blood & hypotension are the main side effects.

medicines.name: NEOPRESS-AM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Losartan Potassium 50 mg & Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg
medicines.description: Neopress-AM tablets contain Losartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart works. It is prescribed for high BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are fatigue, swelling, abdominal pain, nausea, headache, pharyngitis, diarrhea, dyspepsia, myalgia, insomnia, cough & sinus disorder.

medicines.name: NEOPRESS-HS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Losartan Potassium 50 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Neopress-HS tablets contain Losartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by reducing the blood volume. It is prescribed for high blood pressure.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of the combination are abdominal pain, nausea, diarrhea, dyspepsia, muscle fatigue, dizziness & hypotension.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD-L
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v & Loteprednol Etabonate 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Moxiford eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria & Loteprednol, a corticosteroid that has powerful effect for reducing swelling, redness and allergy. It is prescribed in cases of post-surgical infections & other infections where there is associated mild allergy, redness & swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are corneal defect, eye discharge, ocular discomfort, dry eye, foreign body sensation in eyes, severe redness in the eyes and ocular itching.

medicines.name: FLOXIMOX-L EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v & Loteprednol Etabonate 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Floximox-L Eye Drops contain Moxifloxacin and Loteprednol Etabonate as active ingredients. It is a combination ophthalmic formulation used to treat bacterial eye infections accompanied by inflammation, redness, and swelling. Moxifloxacin is a broad-spectrum antibiotic that eliminates infection-causing bacteria, while Loteprednol Etabonate is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation and allergic reactions in the eyes. Floximox-L Eye Drops provide quick relief from pain, irritation, and redness, promoting faster healing.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild eye irritation, burning sensation, or temporary blurred vision.

medicines.name: LULIFORD SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each g contains Luliconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Luliford spray contains Luliconazole, a new antifungal that cures fungal infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin in groin areas, between fingers, under armpit, on skin fold & nail etc. It can also be used in between the cream for better result and to completely remove the infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, burning sensation & allergic reactions may occur at application site.

medicines.name: LULIFORD CREAM (10g, 20g, 30g, 50g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Luliconazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Luliford cream contains Luliconazole, a new anti-fungal drug that acts by killing the fungus to treat infections. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers and other skin area of the body for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Application site irritation and allergic reactions are the noted side effects.

medicines.name: LULIFORD POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Luliconazole 1% w/w

medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, burning sensation & allergic reactions may occur at application site.

medicines.name: LULIFORD LOTION

medicines.name: LULIFORD SOAP

medicines.description: Luliford soap contains Luliconazole, a new antifungal drug to cure fungal infections of skin. It is prescribed for prevention of fungal infection of the entire body skin. It is used as a regular bathing soap during active treatment and thereafter for one month for prevention, after cure of infection. It should otherwise not be used as a regular bathing soap under normal circumstances.
medicines.sideEffects: None known, very well tolerated.

medicines.name: LULIFORD-B
medicines.composition: Each g contains Luliconazole 1% w/w & Beclomethasone 0.025% w/w
medicines.description: Luliford-B cream contains Luliconazole, an antifungal drug that act by killing the infection causing fungus on the skin & Beclomethasone, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness, irritation & swelling. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers and other skin area of the body for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc. where there is associated inflammation and itching.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated product, application site irritation is only known side effect.

medicines.name: LULIACT SOAP
medicines.composition: Luliconazole 1% w/w

It is used as a regular bathing soap during active treatment and thereafter for one month for prevention, after cure of infection. It should otherwise not be used as a regular bathing soap under normal circumstances.
medicines.sideEffects: None known, very well tolerated.
medicines.dosage: First wet the affected skin area. Gently rub the soap to create a lather, leave it on for 2-3 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Always follow your doctor's specific instructions regarding frequency and duration of use, and avoid contact with eyes, mouth, and other mucous membranes.

medicines.description: Luliford-S cream contains Luliconazole, a new anti-fungal drug that acts by killing the fungus to treat infections & Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers and other skin area of the body for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc.

medicines.description: Luliact-S combines an antifungal agent (luliconazole) with a keratolytic agent (salicylic acid) to treat hyperkeratotic tinea infections, such as athlete’s foot, jock itch, and ringworm. Luliconazole inhibits fungal cell membrane synthesis, while salicylic acid softens and removes thickened skin layers, enhancing drug penetration and efficacy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common reactions include mild skin irritation, redness, itching, or stinging at the application site. Serious side effects are rare but may involve allergic reactions such as swelling of the face, lips, or tongue.

medicines.name: ADIVIT TABLET

Vitamins C and E enhance this protection, while B vitamins and DL-Methionine support cellular energy production and metabolism, aiding detoxification and overall cell function. Lycorift Plus soft gel is indicated in general weakness, decreased immunity, Pre-eclampsia (high blood pressure in pregnancy), IUGR (low growth of baby in pregnancy), Premature ageing, cardiovascular diseases and male infertility and Gingivitis.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Take softgel once daily, preferably with or after a meal, to support overall health, boost immunity, and combat oxidative stress. Always follow specific instructions from healthcare provider.

medicines.name: GEOMAX MULTI OMEGA

D3 300 mcg, Vit.A 200 IU, Olive oil 87 mg & Pomegranate seed oil 100 mg

medicines.name: WELTIVE MULTI OMEGA
medicines.composition: Flax seed oil 150 mg (Omega 3,6,9), Fish oil 250 mg (EPA 90 mg & DHA 60 mg), Methyltetrahydrofolic acid 200 mcg, Vit.E 7.5 mg, Lycopene 10% 4000 mcg, Sea Buckthorn oil 200 mcg, Borage oil 50 mg, Vit. D3 300 mcg, Vit.A 200 IU, Olive oil 87 mg & Pomegranate seed oil 100 mg

E 10 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 12 mg, Copper Sulphate eq. to elemental Copper 1 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to el. Selenium 25 mcg & Omega 3 fatty acid eq. to EPA 180 mg & DHA 120 mg

Actiview Softgels are used to prevent Age related Macular Degeneration (AMD), many eye conditions like Cataract, Retinitis Pigmentosa, Dry eye and Glaucoma. It can also be used as general eye supplement.
medicines.sideEffects: Actiview softgels generally has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

Actisight lowers risk of Age related macular degeneration (Vision loss) & Cataract. It improves visual field, visual sharpness and reduces the rate of visual decline. medicines.description: Actisight Plus tablet contains Vaccinium myrtillus, Pinus gerardiana, Carotenoids along with multivitamins that supports eye health in all age groups above 6 years, strengthens vision & further reduces intraocular pressure. It improves visual field, visual sharpness and reduces the rate of visual decline. It helps to treat Glaucoma, treats Retinitis Pigmentosa and dry eyes besides maintain eyesight.

It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.

medicines.description: Freelex suspension treats constipation and relieves acidity. Its Liquid Paraffin softens stool by increasing water content in stool. Milk of Magnesia acts as an antacid and an osmotic laxative. Freelex is used to treat constipation, sour stomach, heartburn, acidity, caused by excessive eating and also for bowel clearance before radioscopy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, stomach pain, and even diarrhea.

Freelex Plus is used for short term treatment of constipation associated with Piles, Anal Fissure, Cardiovascular disorder, Hernia, Pre and Post- operative condition, Endoscopy, for bowel clearance before radioscopy. It also relieves sour stomach and heartburn.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, stomach pain, and even diarrhea.

Footmark cream is used to soften the stubborn dry skin of feet that is absorbed rapidly and gives instant softness & thus is recommended for the prevention and treatment of cracked heels and foot.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated cream.
medicines.dosage: Wash feet with lukewarm water and pat dry. Apply the required quantity of Footmark Cream over the affected area twice daily, once in the morning after bathing and again at bedtime. If you want can cover it or after 5 minutes can wear socks and shoes.

medicines.description: Emlosoft contains white soft paraffin & light liquid paraffin a combination of effective moisturizer & nourisher. Emlosoft soothes, smoothes and hydrates skin effective. It is effective in treating inflamed, damaged or chapped skin due to numerous reasons such as dry skin, harsh environment, diseases like psoriasis and eczema etc & for the protection of the raw skin area such as after wound healing & just after grafting.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.

medicines.name: EMLOSOFT FOOT CREAM (15 & 30 g)

The formulation works by forming a protective barrier on the skin, locking in moisture, and helping to restore the skin’s natural softness and hydration.

medicines.name: FEMOZER PLUS DROPS

Femozer-Plus drops are indicated in children (above 6 months of age) for iron deficiency anaemia, Megabolastic anaemia, anaemia related to malnutrition and in post-surgical conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: WALCOBAL PLUS INJECTION

This combination has synergistic effect on damaged nerves in diabetic neuropathy and peripheral neuropathy. It is indicated to reduce the risk of hyperhomocysteinemia and resulting risks of atherosclerosis, cardiovascular and diabetic disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: WALCOBAL FORTE INJECTION

medicines.description: Recalmin plus suspension contains Calcium Phosphate (calcium salt of phosphoric acid) which provides both Calcium and Phosphorus with Magnesium, Zinc and Vitamin D3.Recalmin Plus is used to prevent and treat low blood Calcium and Phosphorus levels in people who do not get enough from their diet. It is indicated in Osteomalacia, Pregnancy and lactation, rickets and in children to maintain healthy bones and teeth. It is an ideal Calcium and Phosphorus supplement for infants and growing children. It is also used in elderly people to keep bones healthy and strong, and is even effective in Chronic arthritis and Osteoporosis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are diarrhea, constipation, upset stomach and abdominal pain.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are diarrhea, constipation, upset stomach and abdominal pain.

medicines.name: CALZOWEL-XT

medicines.description: Calzowel-XT tablets contain combination of Calcium Citrate, Tribasic calcium Phosphate with Calcium ascorbate (a form of vitamin C) with Vitamin D3 and minerals. This medication is used to prevent or treat low blood calcium levels in people who do not get enough calcium from their diets. It may be used to treat conditions caused by low calcium levels such as bone loss (osteoporosis), weak bones (osteomalacia/rickets), decreased activity of the parathyroid gland (hypoparathyroidism), and a certain muscle disease (latent tetany). It may also be used in certain patients to make sure they are getting enough calcium (e.g., women who are pregnant, nursing, or postmenopausal, people taking certain medications such as phenytoin, phenobarbital, or prednisone).

medicines.name: DAPZIGARD-GM 2 FORTE

medicines.description: Dapzigard-GM 2 Forte tablets contains Dapagliflozin, Metformin and Glimepiride. The combination of these three medications helps in managing type 2 diabetes effectively. Dapagliflozin helps lower blood sugar by promoting glucose excretion via urine, Metformin improves insulin sensitivity and reduces glucose production in the liver & Glimepiride stimulates insulin release from the pancreas to further regulate blood sugar levels. Together, these medications provide comprehensive control over glucose levels in patients with type 2 diabetes, helping to maintain stable blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of complications associated with diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Low sugar levels, painful urination, repetitive urination, inflammation of penis, urinary tract infection & allergic reaction may occur in patients.

medicines.name: DAPZIGARD-GM 2

medicines.description: Dapzigard-GM 2 tablets contains Dapagliflozin, Metformin and Glimepiride. The combination of these three medications helps in managing type 2 diabetes effectively. Dapagliflozin helps lower blood sugar by promoting glucose excretion via urine, Metformin improves insulin sensitivity and reduces glucose production in the liver & Glimepiride stimulates insulin release from the pancreas to further regulate blood sugar levels. Together, these medications provide comprehensive control over glucose levels in patients with type 2 diabetes, helping to maintain stable blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of complications associated with diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Low sugar levels, painful urination, repetitive urination, urinary tract infection & allergic reaction may occur in patients.

Trexodat may be used alone or with other medications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are fever, chills, tiredness, mouth sores, nausea, upset stomach, dizziness, and abnormal liver function tests.

It reduces pain, stiffness and inflammation in joints thus improving physiological joint functioning.

Glucozone C2 tablets are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis.
