medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Sulphate 750 mg, Methylsulfonylmethane 500 mg, Undenatured Collagen Peptides Type-II 40 mg, Sodium Hyaluronate 30 mg, Vitamin C 35 mg & Vitamin D3 10 mcg (400 IU)
medicines.description: Dincerin C2 tablets contain Undenatured Collagen Type II for reformation of cartilage with Glucosamine, Methylsuphonyl methane, Sodium hyaluronate, Vitamin C and Vitamin D3. It helps in formation of tendons and cartilage in the joints. Dincerin C2 tablets are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis. Dincerin C2 improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of Dincerin-C2 to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-CT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Hydrochloride 750 mg, Methylsufonyl Methane 250 mg, Chondroitin sulphate sodium 100 mg, Vitamin C 40 mg, Vitamin D3 200 IU, Zinc 4 mg, Manganese 3 mg, Copper 0.5 mg, Boron 0.5 mg, Selenium 40 mcg & Chromium 33 mcg
medicines.description: This combination supports joint and bone health by reducing inflammation, promoting cartilage repair, and enhancing mobility. Glucosamine, chondroitin, and MSM help maintain joint structure, while cholecalciferol, calcium ascorbate, and multiminerals support bone strength, calcium absorption, and collagen synthesis for overall musculoskeletal health
medicines.sideEffects: This combination may cause mild side effects such as nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or headache. High doses can lead to allergic reactions, kidney issues, or interfere with blood sugar and mineral balance.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet per day, preferably with food to improve absorption and minimize gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: METAPOL 100 XL
medicines.composition: Each film coated prolonged release tablet contains Metoprolol Succinate 95 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 100 mg
medicines.description: Metapol 100 XL tablet contains extended release Metoprolol Tartrate, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate & force. It is usually prescribed for high blood pressure, heart pain, increased heart beats & many other non-cardiac conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are tiredness, dizziness, depression, diarrhoea, shortness of breath, slow heart rate and rash.

medicines.name: METAPOL- 25 AM
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Metoprolol Succinate 23.75 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate ER 25 mg & Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg
medicines.description: Metapol AM tablet contains extended release Metoprolol Tartrate, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate & Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps. It is prescribed for high blood pressure and heart pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, headache, difficulty in breathing, slow heart rate, Nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain & constipation are the main side effects of the combination.

medicines.name: METAPOL 25 XL
medicines.composition: Each film coated prolonged release tablet contains Metoprolol Succinate 23.75 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 25 mg

medicines.name: METAPOL- H
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Metoprolol Succinate 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate (as extended release) 50 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Metapol H tablet contains extended release Metoprolol Tartrate, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate & force as well as Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that act by removing excessive water through urine. It is usually prescribed for high blood pressure.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are tiredness, inflammation of nose & throat, dizziness, depression, shortness of breath, slow heart rate and rash.

medicines.name: VENPRES-M 50
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg & Metoprolol Succinate 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate ER 50 mg
medicines.description: Venpres-M tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Metoprolol in extended release form, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. This combination is prescribed when single drug alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are back pain, diarrhea, sinusitis, throat infection, respiratory tract infections, tiredness, dizziness, shortness of breath & slow heart rate.

medicines.name: METADON 100 XL
medicines.composition: Each film coated prolonged release tablet contains Metoprolol Succinate 95 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 100 mg

medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are tiredness, dizziness, depression, diarrhoea, shortness of breath, slow heart rate and rash.

medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Metoprolol Succinate 23.75 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate PR 25 mg & Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg
medicines.description: Metadon AM tablet contains extended release Metoprolol Tartrate, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate & Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps. It is prescribed for high blood pressure and heart pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, headache, difficulty in breathing, slow heart rate, Nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain & constipation are the main side effects of the combination.

medicines.composition: Each film coated prolonged release tablet contains Metoprolol Succinate 23.75 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 25 mg

medicines.name: OMNIPRES-M 50
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Olmesartan Medoxomil 20 mg & extended release Metoprolol Succinate 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 50 mg
medicines.description: Omnipres-M 50 tablets contain Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Metoprolol in extended release form, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. This combination is prescribed when single drug alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are back pain, diarrhea, sinusitis, throat infection, respiratory tract infections, tiredness, dizziness, shortness of breath & slow heart rate.

medicines.name: VENPRES-40 CHM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg, Chlorthalidone 12.5 mg & extended release Metoprolol Succinate 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 50 mg
medicines.description: Venpres-40 CHM tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Metoprolol, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate & Chlorthalidone, a diuretic that acts by reducing blood volume. This combination is used to treat high BP when single drug or dual drug combination alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are dizziness, fatigue, nausea, weakness, edema, facial oedema, lower limb oedema, angioneurotic oedema, urticaria & hypersensitivity.

medicines.name: CILNEP-TM
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg, Cilnidipine 10 mg & Metopolol succinate (as extended release) 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 50 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-TM tablet contains Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood; Telmisartan, an Angiotensin receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Metoprolol, a beta blocker that act by reducing the number of times heart beats. It is prescribed for high blood pressure when single or double combination is not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, nasal congestion, diarrhoea, throat infection, dizziness, nausea & back pain.

medicines.name: TELVILITE-M 50
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg & Metoprolol Succinate 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate (ER) 50 mg
medicines.description: Telvilite-M 50 tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Metoprolol in extended release form, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. This combination is prescribed when single drug alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are back pain, diarrhea, sinusitis, throat infection, respiratory tract infections, tiredness, dizziness, shortness of breath & slow heart rate.

medicines.name: CILNEP-M 50
medicines.composition: Each bilayered film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg & Metoprolol (ER) 50 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-M 50 tablets contains Cilnidipine and Metoprolol, which is used in managing hypertension and cardiovascular conditions. Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker helps relax blood vessels, improving blood flow while Metoprolol, a beta-blocker, reduces heart rate and lowers blood pressure. Together, they help control blood pressure and lowers the risk of heart-related complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, nausea, fatigue, dizziness, blurred vision, weakness, palpitations are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: VENPRES-40 AMT
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Amlodipine 5 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Metoprolol (ER) 50 mg
medicines.description: Venpres-40 AMT tablets is a combination medicine used to manage high blood pressure and reduce the risk of heart-related complications. Venpres-40 AMT tablets contains Amlodipine, Telmisartan and Metoprolol. Amlodipine is a calcium channel blocker that relaxes blood vessels, Telmisartan is an angiotensin receptor blocker that helps lower blood pressure, and Metoprolol is a beta-blocker that reduces heart rate. Together, they improve heart health and help maintain stable blood pressure levels.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, dizziness, nausea, weakness, stomach pain, constipation, swelling in the hands or feet, fast or pounding heartbeats, flushing are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: CILNIFORD-TM
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Metoprolol Tartrate 50 mg ER
medicines.description: CILNIFORD-TM tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker; Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB); and Metoprolol Tartrate (ER), a beta-blocker. This triple combination works synergistically to relax blood vessels, reduce heart rate, and lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the effective management of moderate to severe hypertension and to reduce the risk of cardiovascular events.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, fatigue, slow heart rate, swelling of ankles, headache, cold extremities, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: OFRON-M
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Ofloxacin 50 mg, Metronidazole 120 mg & Simethicone 10 mg
medicines.description: Ofron-M suspension contains Ofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone and Metronidazole, an nitroimidazole derivative that acts synergistically to kill bacteria and protozoa both kind of pathogens. It is prescribed by child specialist in cases of gastro-intestinal infections, chest infections and certain other specific infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are Agitation, Sleep disorder, Insomnia, muscle & joint pain, Dizziness, Headache, Eye irritation, Vertigo, Abdominal pain, Nausea, Vomiting & Unpleasant taste in the mouth.

medicines.name: OLTEF-M
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Ofloxacin 50 mg, Metronidazole benzoate eq. to Metronidazole 120 mg & Simethicone 10 mg
medicines.description: Oltef-M suspension contains Ofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone and Metronidazole, an nitroimidazole derivative that acts synergistically to kill bacteria and protozoa both kind of pathogens. It is prescribed by child specialist in cases of gastro-intestinal infections, chest infections and certain other specific infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are Agitation, Sleep disorder, Insomnia, muscle & joint pain, Dizziness, Headache, Eye irritation, Vertigo, Abdominal pain, Nausea, Vomiting & Unpleasant taste in the mouth.

medicines.name: CASTOR-NF (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Ciprofloxacin 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w, Terbinafine 1% w/w & Clobetasol 0.05% w/w
medicines.description: Castor-NF cream contains Ciprofloxacin, to relieve bacterial infections; Metronidazole, to relive bacterial & protozoal infections; Terbinafine, to relieve fungal infections & Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling. It is first line of drug in all kind of skin infection such as of eczema, dermatitis, fungal infections, bacterial infections & mixed infection of skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effect, the product is well tolerated.

medicines.name: PURADINE-M
medicines.composition: Each g contains Povidone Iodine 10% w/w & Metronidazole 2% w/w
medicines.description: Puradine-M contains Povidone Iodine, an antiseptic agent that kills bacteria and fungus to eradicate skin infections in wide variety of conditions & Metronidazole, an antiprotozoal drug that also acts on specialized group of bacteria not covered by Povidone. They act synergistically to cover wide spectrum of pathogens. It is prescribed for treatment & prevention of infections such as cuts, abrasions, post-surgical procedures dressing, burns, infected wounds & diabetic foot ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Local swelling, irritation, itching and rashes can happen.

medicines.name: METNIZID
medicines.composition: Each g contains Metronidazole 2% w/w
medicines.description: Metnizid gel contains Metronidazole, primarily used to treat inflammatory skin conditions like rosacea, reducing associated redness and pimples. It acts as both an anti-inflammatory agent and has antibacterial/antiprotozoal properties against specific microorganisms that may contribute to these skin issues. It is prescribed for acne lesion treatment of the inflammatory nature, for mild to moderate Acne vulgaris, Diabetic leg ulcers and other Ulcers & is highly useful in care of wounds with foul odor, redness of surrounding tissue or involving dead tissue in wound. It is also be prescribed for vaginal infections in female.
medicines.sideEffects: Local swelling, irritation, itching and rashes can happen.

medicines.name: METNIZID-DG
medicines.composition: Each g contains Metronidazole 1% w/w, Chlorhexidine Gluconate Sol 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Metnizid DG gel is indicated for the infectious inflammatory diseases of paradontium and mucous membrane of the mouth cavity such as Chronic gingivitis, Acute gingivitis, Acute ulcerative gingivitis, Chronic Periodontitis, to prevent post extraction infections (Dry Sockets), recurrent Aphthous Stomatitis (Ulcer) & Dental pain due to infection.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects

medicines.name: METNIZID-P
medicines.composition: Each g contains Metronidazole 2% w/w & Povidone Iodine 10% w/w eq. to Iodine 1% w/w
medicines.description: METNIZID-P ointment contains Povidone Iodine, an antiseptic agent that kills bacteria and fungus to eradicate skin infections in wide variety of conditions & Metronidazole, an antiprotozoal drug that also acts on specialized group of bacteria not covered by Povidone. They act synergistically to cover wide spectrum of pathogens. It is prescribed for treatment & prevention of infections such as cuts, abrasions, post-surgical procedures dressing, burns, infected wounds & diabetic foot ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Local swelling, irritation, itching and rashes can happen.

medicines.name: OLTEF-NF (15g & 25g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Ciprofloxacin 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w, Terbinafine 1% w/w & Clobetasol 0.05% w/w
medicines.description: Oltef-NF cream contains Ciprofloxacin, to relive bacterial infections; Metronidazole, to relive bacterial & protozoal infections; Terbinafine, to relieve fungal infections & Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling. It is first line of drug in all kind of skin infection such as of eczema, dermatitis, fungal infections, bacterial infections & mixed infection of skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effect, the product is well tolerated.

medicines.name: POVIDOT-M OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g contains Povidone Iodine 10% w/w & Metronidazole 2% w/w
medicines.description: Povidot-M contains Povidone Iodine, an antiseptic agent that kills bacteria and fungus to eradicate skin infections in wide variety of conditions & Metronidazole, an antiprotozoal drug that also acts on specialized group of bacteria not covered by Povidone. They act synergistically to cover wide spectrum of pathogens. It is prescribed for treatment & prevention of infections such as cuts, abrasions, post-surgical procedures dressing, burns, infected wounds & diabetic foot ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Local swelling, irritation, itching and rashes can happen.

medicines.name: DANTOX MOUTH ULCER GEL
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine Gluconate 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w & Lignocaine 2% w/w
medicines.description: Dantox Mouth Ulcer Gel combines Chlorhexidine for antiseptic action, Metronidazole to combat anaerobic bacteria, and Lignocaine for local pain relief. It provides effective treatment for mouth ulcers, reducing infection, inflammation, and discomfort for faster healing.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated; may cause mild local irritation.

medicines.name: ORAFAST PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Chlorhexidine gluconate Solution Eq. to Chlorhexidine Guconate 1% w/w, Metronidazole Benzoate Eq. to Metronidazole 1% w/w & Lignocaine Hydrochloride 2% w/w
medicines.description: Orafast Plus is an oral gel that combines Chlorhexidine, an antiseptic; Metronidazole, an antimicrobial agent effective against anaerobic bacteria; and Lignocaine, a local anesthetic. This triple-action formulation is used for the treatment of oral infections, gingivitis, periodontitis, mouth ulcers, and pain relief associated with inflammatory oral conditions. It helps reduce bacterial load, promotes healing, and provides fast pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects may include temporary numbness, bitter taste, and mild irritation at the application site.

medicines.name: METNIZID
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Metronidazole 40 mg
medicines.description: Metronidazole is an antibiotic used to treat various infections caused by bacteria and parasites. It is effective against conditions such as bacterial vaginosis, trichomoniasis, pelvic inflammatory disease, and certain gastrointestinal infections
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach cramps, loss of appetite, headache, dry mouth, and a metallic taste.

medicines.name: OLERGEL PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Chlorhexidine Guconate 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w & Lignocaine 2% w/w
medicines.description: Olergel Plus contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate, an antiseptic; Metronidazole, an antibacterial agent; and Lignocaine, a local anesthetic. It is prescribed for the treatment of infected oral or skin wounds, ulcers, and painful inflammatory lesions by reducing infection, inflammation, and pain.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause mild burning, irritation, dryness, or redness at the application site; rarely, allergic reactions or numbness may occur

medicines.name: ULTRADENT MOUTH ULCER GEL
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine Gluconate 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w & Lignocaine 2% w/w
medicines.description: Chlorhexidine is an antiseptic that reduces bacterial load, Metronidazole is an antibiotic effective against anaerobic bacteria, and Lignocaine is a local anesthetic that relieves pain. This combination is used to treat mouth ulcers, gingivitis, and painful oral lesions by reducing infection, inflammation, and discomfort.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include a temporary burning or tingling sensation, altered taste, dryness, or irritation at the application site. Rarely, allergic reactions such as swelling, rash, or increased sensitivity may occur.

medicines.name: DERMIFORD (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin 0.5% w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution eq. to Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiford cream contains Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness and swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic that relieves bacterial infections; Miconazole, an antifungal that treats fungal infections; and Chlorhexidine, an antiseptic that helps prevent or control skin infections caused by bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of resistant and secondary infections of skin caused by various different kinds of disease-causing germs.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effect.

medicines.name: TERABET-GM CREAM (10 g/20 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin 0.5% w/w & Miconazole 2.0% w/w
medicines.description: Terabet-GM (10 g/20 g) cream contains Clobetasol, a steroid to relieve itching, redness & swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic to cure bacterial infections & Miconazole, an antifungal to cure fungal infections. It is prescribed in cases of resistant skin infections where secondary bacterial infection and/or fungal infection are present, suspected or likely to occur.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin dryness, stinging sensation, irritation & allergic reactions may occur at the site of application.

medicines.name: ENSARIN-MF
medicines.composition: Each g contains Miconazole Nitrate 2% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin base 0.5% w/w & Fluocinolone Acetonide 0.01% w/w
medicines.description: Ensarin-MF cream contains Beclomethasone, to relieve relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling; Neomycin, to relieve bacterial infections & Clotrimazole, to relieve fungal infections. It is prescribed for the topical treatment of bacterial & fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are stinging sensation, irritation, pimple-like bumps, tenderness & flaking of the treated skin.

medicines.name: NADIMIN M2
medicines.composition: Each g contains Nadifloxacin 1% w/w, Mometasone Furoate 0.1% w/w & Miconazole Nitrate 2% w/w
medicines.description: Nadimin M2 cream contains Miconazole, to relieve fungal infections; Mometasone, to relieve relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling & Nadifloxacin, to relieve bacterial infections. It is prescribed for the topical treatment of bacterial & fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Itching & flaking of the treated skin are the main side effects.

medicines.name: TELBISOL GM
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin 0.5% w/w & Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w
medicines.description: Telbisol-GM cream contains Clobetasol, a steroid to relieve itching, redness & swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic to cure bacterial infections & Miconazole, an antifungal to cure fungal infections. It is prescribed in cases of resistant skin infections where secondary bacterial infection and/or fungal infection are present, suspected or likely to occur.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin dryness, stinging sensation, irritation & allergic reactions may occur at the site of application.

medicines.name: DERMIFLEX (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin 0.5% w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution eq. to Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiflex cream contains Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness and swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic that relieves bacterial infections; Miconazole, an antifungal that treats fungal infections; and Chlorhexidine, an antiseptic that helps prevent or control skin infections caused by bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of resistant and secondary infections of skin caused by various different kinds of disease-causing germs.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effects.

medicines.name: DERMIFLOX (15 g & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin 0.5%w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiflox cream combines Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation, redness, and itching by blocking inflammatory chemicals. Neomycin is an antibiotic that stops bacterial growth by inhibiting protein synthesis. Miconazole Nitrate is an antifungal that kills fungi by damaging their cell membranes. Chlorhexidine is an antiseptic that kills microorganisms by disrupting the cell surface. It is used in the treatment of mixed skin infections involving both bacteria and fungi, especially those accompanied by inflammation, itching, and redness, such as infected eczema, dermatitis, and ringworm.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effect.

medicines.name: FEMOZER PLUS DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ferrous Bisglycinate eq. to elemental iron 10 mg, Zinc Bisglycinate eq. to elemental Zinc 2.75 mg, Vitamin B12 3 mcg, Folic acid 100 mcg & L-Lysine 10 mg
medicines.description: Femozer-Plus drops contain Ferrous bisglycinate (form of Iron) and Zinc bisglycinate in amino acid chelate forms which are better absorbed.It also contains Folic acid (Vitamin B9) and Cynocobalamin (Vitamin B12).It provides complete solution for blood formation in children. Femozer-Plus drops are indicated in children (above 6 months of age) for iron deficiency anaemia, Megabolastic anaemia, anaemia related to malnutrition and in post-surgical conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: FREELEX SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 15 ml of suspension contains Liquid Paraffin 3.75 ml & Milk of Magnesia 11.25 ml
medicines.description: Freelex suspension treats constipation and relieves acidity. Its Liquid Paraffin softens stool by increasing water content in stool. Milk of Magnesia acts as an antacid and an osmotic laxative. Freelex is used to treat constipation, sour stomach, heartburn, acidity, caused by excessive eating and also for bowel clearance before radioscopy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, stomach pain, and even diarrhea.

medicines.description: Elosone cream contains Mometasone, a medium potency corticosteroid that acts by reducing redness, swelling, itching and constricting blood vessels. It is prescribed to reduce swelling, redness and itching of steroid responsive skin conditions with wide variety of causes such as Psoriasis, Dermatitis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, itching & stinging may occur after application.

medicines.name: ELOSONE-HT (15 & 25 g)

medicines.description: Elosone-HT cream contains Mometasone, a steroid that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Hydroquinone, a de-pigmenting agent that stops synthesis of melanin to help lighten the skin & Tretinoin, a retinoid that increases cell turnover rate & thus helps exfoliate the skin to renew it. It is prescribed to treat Melasma (dark patchy areas on the skin, at cheeks & forehead) on the face. Elosone-HT cream is used in conjunction with sun-avoidance measures, like using sunscreens and wearing protective clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild burning, stinging, redness & dryness may occur.

medicines.name: ELMOVEL LOTION

medicines.description: Welbihist-M suspension contains Bilastine, an anti-allergic drug that acts by stopping Histamine in the body thus stops allergy & Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that stops inflammation & swelling and these two salts acts synergistically to provide better results. This combination is prescribed in cases of chronic chest congestion & for better symptomatic relief of seasonal & annual allergies compare to individual drug.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, abdominal pain, excessive sleepiness, dizziness and fatigue.

medicines.name: WELBIHIST-M TABLET
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Bilastine 20 mg & Montelukast 10 mg
medicines.description: Welbihist-M tablet contains Bilastine, an anti-allergic drug that acts by stopping Histamine in the body thus stops allergy & Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that stops inflammation & swelling and these two salts acts synergistically to provide better results. This combination is prescribed in cases of chronic chest congestion & for better symptomatic relief of seasonal & annual allergies compare to individual drug.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, abdominal pain, excessive sleepiness, dizziness and fatigue.

medicines.name: WELBIHIST-M KID TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated orodispersible tablet contains Bilastine 10 mg & Montelukast 4 mg
medicines.description: Welbihist-M Kid tablets contains Bilastine and Montelukast in Orodispersible form, a combination that helps in relieving allergic symptoms. Bilastine, an antihistamine helps alleviate allergy symptoms such as sneezing and itching, while Montelukast, a leukotriene receptor helps improve respiratory functions. These easy-to-administer tablets dissolve quickly in kid’s mouth thus providing convenience and effective relief for kid’s/patients with allergic conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects including headache, abdominal pain, excessive sleepiness, dizziness and fatigue may occur.

medicines.name: BILAFORD-M KID
medicines.composition: Each uncoated orodispersible tablet contains Bilastine 10 mg & Montelukast 4 mg
medicines.description: Bilaford-M Kid tablets contains Bilastine and Montelukast in Orodispersible form, a combination that helps in relieving allergic symptoms. Bilastine, an antihistamine helps alleviate allergy symptoms such as sneezing and itching, while Montelukast, a Leukotriene receptor antagonist helps improve respiratory functions. These easy-to-administer tablets dissolve quickly in kid’s mouth thus providing convenience and effective relief for kid’s/patients with allergic conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects including headache, abdominal pain, excessive sleepiness, dizziness and fatigue may occur.

medicines.name: MINOLAST-LC TABLET (10's & 15's)
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Montelukast Sodium eq. to Montelukast 10 mg & Levocetirizine Dihydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Minolast-LC/Kid tablets & Minolast syrup contains Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that effectively treat inflammation & oedema associated with allergy and Levocetirizine, an anti-allergic drug. It is prescribed in case of long standing asthma, chest congestion, sneezing, itchy nose, nasal secretion, nasal congestion and red watery eyes along with itchy skin rashes.
medicines.sideEffects: Dry mouth, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, fever & abdominal pain are the observed side effect.

medicines.name: RELIKAST LC (10s &15's)
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Montelukast Sodium 10 mg & Levocetirizine Dihydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Relikast-LC tablets contains Montelukast, a Leukotriene inhibitor that effectively treat inflammation & oedema associated with allergy and Levoceririzine, an anti-allergic drug. It is prescribed in case of long standing asthma, chest congestion, sneezing, itchy nose, nasal secretion, nasal congestion and red watery eyes along with itchy skin rashes.
medicines.sideEffects: Dry mouth, diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, fever & abdominal pain are the observed side effect.

medicines.name: BILAFORD-M SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of Syrup contains Bilastine 10 mg & Montelukast 4 mg
medicines.description: Bilaford M is a combination of Bilastine and Montelukast used for the management of allergic conditions. Bilastine, a non-sedating H₁ antihistamine, blocks histamine receptors to relieve symptoms such as sneezing, itching, and nasal congestion. Montelukast, a leukotriene receptor antagonist, prevents leukotriene-induced airway inflammation and bronchoconstriction. This combination is indicated for the treatment of allergic rhinitis and as supportive therapy in asthma.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include headache, drowsiness, abdominal pain, and dizziness.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Moxiford eye drops contain Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of bacterial conjunctivitis & other eye infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation and eye pain.

medicines.name: KETOFORD-MX
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ketorolac Tromethamine eq. to Ketorolac 0.5% w/v & Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Ketoford-MX eye drops contain Ketorolac, a NSAID that blocks natural chemicals produced in eye to relieve redness, pain and swelling in eye & Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed for prevention and treatment of infections, pain, redness & swelling associated with eye surgeries & other infectious and non-infections conditions of the eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Hypersensitivities, headache, dry eyes, stinging and burning on putting eye drops are the main side effects.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD-B
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v & Bromfenac Sodium eq. to Bromfenac 0.09 % w/v
medicines.description: Moxiford eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria & Bromfenac, a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug that relieves redness, pain and swelling in eye. It is prescribed in cases of post-surgical infections & other infections where there is associated pain, redness & swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation, pain, severe eye redness & dry eyes.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD-D
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin HCL 0.5% w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Moxiford eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that reduces swelling, redness and allergy. It is prescribed in cases of post-surgical infections & other infections with associated redness and swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation and pain.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD-L
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v & Loteprednol Etabonate 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Moxiford eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria & Loteprednol, a corticosteroid that has powerful effect for reducing swelling, redness and allergy. It is prescribed in cases of post-surgical infections & other infections where there is associated mild allergy, redness & swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are corneal defect, eye discharge, ocular discomfort, dry eye, foreign body sensation in eyes, severe redness in the eyes and ocular itching.

medicines.name: FLOXIMOX EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Floximox eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of bacterial conjunctivitis & other eye infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation and eye pain

medicines.name: FLOXIMOX-D EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin 0.5%w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Floximox-D eye drops contain Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that reduces swelling, redness and allergy. It is prescribed in cases of post-surgical infections & other infections with associated redness and swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation and pain.

medicines.name: KEROSITE-MX EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ketorolac Tromethamine 0.5% w/v & Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Kerosite-MX eye drops contain Ketorolac, a NSAID that blocks natural chemicals produced in eye to relieve redness, pain and swelling in eye & Moxifloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed for prevention and treatment of infections, pain, redness & swelling associated with eye surgeries & other infectious and non-infections conditions of the eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Hypersensitivities, headache, dry eyes, stinging and burning on putting eye drops are the main side effects.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Moxifloxacin 400 mg
medicines.description: Moxiford tablets contain Moxifloxacin, advance fluroquinolone that acts by stopping the growth of disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of ENT infections, chest infections, skin infections & intra-abdominal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, Diarrhoea, Vomiting, Gastrointestinal and abdominal pains, Headache, Dizziness & Increase in liver enzymes are the main side effects.

medicines.name: MOXIFORD EYE OINTMENT (5 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Moxifloxacin Hydrochloride eq. to Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Moxiford eye ointment contains Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of bacterial conjunctivitis & other eye infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are eye irritation and eye pain.

medicines.name: FLOXIMOX-B EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v & Bromfenac 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Floximox-B Eye Drops is a combination ophthalmic preparation used to treat bacterial eye infections and reduce inflammation, redness, and pain associated with such infections or post-surgical conditions. Moxifloxacin is a broad-spectrum antibiotic that stops bacterial growth, while Bromfenac is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) that relieves pain and swelling. Floximox-B Eye Drops help restore eye comfort and promote faster healing
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild eye irritation, burning, or temporary blurred vision.

medicines.name: FLOXIMOX-L EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Moxifloxacin 0.5% w/v & Loteprednol Etabonate 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Floximox-L Eye Drops contain Moxifloxacin and Loteprednol Etabonate as active ingredients. It is a combination ophthalmic formulation used to treat bacterial eye infections accompanied by inflammation, redness, and swelling. Moxifloxacin is a broad-spectrum antibiotic that eliminates infection-causing bacteria, while Loteprednol Etabonate is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation and allergic reactions in the eyes. Floximox-L Eye Drops provide quick relief from pain, irritation, and redness, promoting faster healing.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild eye irritation, burning sensation, or temporary blurred vision.

medicines.name: T-MUCE (5g, 10g & 15g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Mupirocin 2.0% w/w
medicines.description: T-Muce ointment contains Mupirocin, an antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria on skin infections. It is prescribed for various kinds of skin infections such as Impetigo, folliculitis, furunculosis & in managing the post-surgical scar infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, itching & stinging may occur after application.

medicines.name: MUPIZER (5g,10g & 15g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Mupirocin 2.0% w/w
medicines.description: Mupizer ointment contains Mupirocin, an antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria responsible for skin infections. It is prescribed for various kinds of skin infections such as Impetigo, folliculitis, furunculosis & in managing the post-surgical scar infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, itching & stinging may occur after application.

medicines.name: T-MUCE F
medicines.composition: Each g of ointment contains Mupirocin 2% w/w & Fluticasone Propionate 0.005% w/w
medicines.description: T-Muce F is a topical ointment that combines Mupirocin, a broad-spectrum antibiotic, with Fluticasone Propionate, a mild corticosteroid. It is used for the treatment of inflammatory skin conditions with secondary bacterial infections, such as infected eczema, dermatitis, or impetigo. Mupirocin helps eliminate infection-causing bacteria, while Fluticasone reduces inflammation, redness, and itching.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects may include local irritation, burning sensation, or allergic reactions. Prolonged use may lead to skin thinning.

medicines.name: MUPIZER-F
medicines.composition: Each g contains Mupirocin 2% w/w & Fluticasone Propionate 0.005% w/w
medicines.description: Mupizer-F contains Mupirocin and Fluticasone Propionate. Mupirocin is a topical antibiotic that kills bacteria causing skin infections, while Fluticasone is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation. It is prescribed for infected dermatitis, impetigo, folliculitis, furunculosis, and post-surgical scar infections. Mild irritation or burning may occur.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause mild burning, itching, dryness, or redness; prolonged use can lead to allergic reactions.

medicines.name: ROCK ON MAX SACHET
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet of Rock On Max contains Taurine 1 g, Ginseng (Panax Ginseng) Extract 90 mg, Caffeine 50 mg, Vitamin C 65 mg, Myo-Inositol 50 mg, Vit. B1 1.7 mg, Vit. B2 2.4 mg, Vit. B3 14 mg & Vit. B6 1.9 mg & Zinc 3.4 mg.
medicines.description: Leeford's Rock On Max is a sugar free energy drink that comes in effervescent powder form & gets dissolved automatically without the requirement of stirring. It can be added to simple water or Citrus juices for instant boost of energy & stamina. Rock On Max is a dietary supplement and a method for increasing energy and mental alertness of an individual. It helps to stay awake, increase energy levels, boost performance during physical exercise & helps remain concentrated while studying. Rock On Max is an ideal energy drink for young, middle aged & elderly population that has perfect balance of safe and effective ingredients that gives you a physical & psychological boost devoid of any adverse effects if consumed within the safe limits as prescribed in dosage.
medicines.sideEffects: Rock On Max is a safe energy drink when used as directed, but if it is abused alone or in combination with other substances, then it can lead to irritability, anxiety, restlessness, insomnia, gastrointestinal upsets, tremors, tachycardia & psycho-motor agitation.
medicines.dosage: One to two sachet of Rock On Max should be used 30 minutes to an hour before going to Gym or for a walk to have a burst of energy or stamina. One or two sachet of Rock On Max should be taken an hour before sitting for a long study to increase alertness and concentration. Do not take more than two sachets simultaneously regularly and should avoid using more than 4 sachets per day to avoid its adverse effects.

medicines.name: MYOPACE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Myo-inositol 1 g, L-Methylfolate 100 mcg & Vitamin D3 1000 IU
medicines.description: Myopace tablets contain Myo Inositol (Vitamin B8), L-Methylfolate (form of Vitamin B9), and Vitamin D. Myopace is indicated for PCOS (Polycystic Ovary Syndrome), IVF (In vitro Fertilization), supplement in infertility treatment, Oligomennorrhoea (Irregular mensuration), Amenorrhoea (absence of mensuration) and all patients with diabetes, cardiovascular and neurovascular disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, stomach pain, tiredness, headache, and dizziness

medicines.name: MYOPACE PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Myo Inositol 550 mg, D-Chiro Inositol 13.8 mg, Metformin 500 mg, L-Methylfolate Calcium 0.5 mg & Mecobalamin 750 mcg.
medicines.description: Myopace Plus tablets is a combination of Myo-Inositol, D-Chiro-Inositol, Metformin, L-Methylfolate, Calcium and Mecobalamin used to support metabolic and hormonal balance. Myo-Inositol and D-Chiro-Inositol help regulate insulin sensitivity while Metformin improves glucose control, L-Methylfolate supports healthy cell function, Calcium strengthens bones, and Mecobalamin aids nerve health. Myopace Plus tablets are often used in managing conditions like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) and diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Headaches, nauseas, dizziness, tiredness & weight gain are the infrequent side effects that may occur in patients.

medicines.name: WELTIVE TABLET
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains L-Lysine 50 mg, inositol 25 mg, Glutathione 25 mg, Minerals, Botanical Extracts & Vitamins
medicines.description: Weltive tablets is a potent nutraceutical supplement combination which contains Botanical extracts, Inositol, Glutathione, Amino Acids, Multivitamins and Multiminerals which supports overall health and well-being. Botanical extracts provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits, while inositol supports cellular function. Glutathione aids detoxification, and amino acids contribute to muscle repair and growth. The multivitamins and multiminerals enhance energy, immune function, and metabolic processes, promoting balanced nutrition and vitality.
medicines.sideEffects: Weltive tablets generally has no side effects if consumed within prescribed limits.
medicines.dosage: One tablet daily after meal or as directed by physician

medicines.name: GEOMAX TABLET
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Asparagus racemosus (Shatavari) Ext. 50 mg, Saraca indica (Ashoka) Ext. 50 mg, Ocimum sanctum (Tulsi) Ext 50 mg, Curcuma longa (Turmeric) Ext. 25 mg, Vit.C 40 mg, Vit.B1 1 mg, Vit.B3 12 mg, Vit.E 10 mg, Vit.B5 3 mg, Vit.B6 2 mg, Vit.B2 1.1 mg, Provitamin A (as 20% beta carotene) 2100 mcg, Vit.B9 100 mcg, Biotin 30 mcg, Vit.K 25 mcg, Vit.D2 10 mcg, L-Lysine HCl 50 mg, Inositol 25 mg, Glutathione 25 mg, Ca 100 mg, Mg 50 mg, K 40 mg, Cl 36 mg, Fe 17 mg, Zn 10 mg, Mn 4 mg, Cu 1.35 mg, Iodine 110 mcg, Se 40 mcg & Cr 33 mcg
medicines.description: Geomax tablets is a potent nutraceutical supplement combination which contains Botanical extracts, Inositol, Glutathione, Amino Acids, Multivitamins and Multiminerals which supports overall health and well-being. Botanical extracts provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits, while inositol supports cellular function. Glutathione aids detoxification, and amino acids contribute to muscle repair and growth. The multivitamins and multiminerals enhance energy, immune function, and metabolic processes, promoting balanced nutrition and vitality.
medicines.sideEffects: Geomax tablets generally has no side effects if consumed within prescribed limits
medicines.dosage: One tablet daily after meal or as directed by physician

medicines.name: TRYLIV BOOST TAB
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Silymarin Ext. 140 mg, L- Carnitine 50 mg, L-Ornithine 50 mg, Choline Bitartrate 50 mg, Myoinositol 50 mg, N-Acetyl L-Cysteine 50 mg, Vit.C 40 mg, L-Glutathione 15 mg, Vit.E 10 mg, El. Zn 10 mg, Vit.B5 5 mg, El. Fe 3 mg, CoQ10 2.5 mg, Vit.B6 2 mg, Vit.B2 1.3 mg, Vit.B1 1.1 mg, Vit.B9 100 mcg, El. Se 40 mcg, Vit.D 10 mcg & Vit.B12 1 mcg
medicines.description: Tryliv Boost is a comprehensive hepatoprotective and nutritional supplement. It combines Silymarin, a liver-protecting herbal extract, with essential amino acids, antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. This formulation supports liver detoxification, improves liver function, and helps manage conditions like fatty liver disease, alcoholic liver damage, and oxidative stress.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are mild gastrointestinal discomfort or allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet daily with water, preferably before meals

medicines.name: EYECON
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorpheniramine Maleate 0.2% w/v, Phenylephrine HCL 0.12% w/v, Methylcellulose 0.02% w/v Phenyl mercuric Nitrate 0.001 % w/v (as preservative)
medicines.description: Eyecon Drops combine Chlorpheniramine Maleate, an antihistamine that relieves allergic symptoms like redness and itching; Phenylephrine HCl, a decongestant that reduces eye redness by constricting blood vessels; and Methylcellulose, a lubricant that soothes dry, irritated eyes. This formulation provides fast relief from eye irritation, itching, and redness caused by allergies, dust, smoke, and environmental factors.
medicines.sideEffects: Temporary burning or stinging, Blurred vision, Eye irritation, Rarely, increased eye pressure or allergic reaction

medicines.name: ZELDINAC SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each g of spray contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16% eq. to Diclofenac 1% w/w, Linseed Oil 3% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w.
medicines.description: Provides instant and effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. Helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. Its microparticles allow deeper penetration and provide quick pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC MAX SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each g of spray contains Diclofenac Diethlamine 2.32% w/v eq. to Diclofenac Sodium 2% w/v, Methylsalicylate 10% w/v, Menthol 5% w/v & Absolute Alcohol 10% v/v
medicines.description: Provides instant and effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. Helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. Its microparticles allow deeper penetration and provide quick pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: AMROX (60 &100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Ambroxol Hydrochloride 15 mg, Terbutaline Sulphate 1.5 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Menthol 1 mg
medicines.description: Amrox Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Guaiphenesin an expectorant, Terbutaline a bronchodilator and Menthol a soothing agent. It is indicated for clinical relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, heartburn or bloating, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: AROXYL (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Terbutaline Sulphate 1.25 mg, Bromhexine Hydrochloride 4.0 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Menthol 2.5 mg
medicines.description: Aroxyl Syrup contains Bromhexine(mucolytic), Guaifenesin(expectorant),Terbutaline (bronchodilator) and Menthol(Cooling agent). Aroxyl syrup is indicated in productive cough, bronchitis, asthma, emphysema, smoker's cough and bronchospasm.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Indigestion, Bloating, Vomiting, Diarrhea, Stomach pain, Dizziness, Headache, Sweating, Skin rash, Hives, Tremor, Increased heart rate and Palpitations.

medicines.name: CUFLIFT PLUS-SF
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Terbutaline Sulphate 2.5 mg, Ambroxol Hydrochloride 30 mg, Guaiphenesin 100 mg & Menthol 2.5 mg (Sugar free)
medicines.description: Cuflift Plus SF syrup is a sugar free formulation which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Terbutaline a bronchodilator, Guaiphenesin an expectorant and Menthol act as a soothing agent. It is indicated for relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia and palpitations.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC PLUS GEL (15g, 30g,50g)
medicines.composition: Each g of gel contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16% w/w eq. to Diclofenac Sodium 1% w/w, Oleum lini 3% w/w, Menthol 5% w/w & Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w (Poly tube)
medicines.description: Vovedic Plus Gel provides effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. It helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. The quick absorbing formula allows deeper penetration and provides instant pain relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.
medicines.dosage: Gently apply Vovedic Plus gel on the affected area 3-4 times in a day or, as directed by the physician. It should be applied only to intact skin surfaces and not to skin wounds and open injuries. Works very well if applied after hot water fomentation.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC PLUS SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each pressurized tin canister contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16% w/w, Virgin Linseed Oil 3% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w
medicines.description: Vovedic Plus Spray provides instant & effective relief from pain in Joint, knee, back, neck and shoulder. It helps in pain caused due to muscle pulls, sprain, strain and sports injuries. Its microparticles allow deeper penetration and provide quick pain relief, useful in musculoskeletal, joint, and soft tissue disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.
medicines.dosage: Shake well before each use. Spray the contents from 10 cm distance on the affected areas 3-4 times in a day or, as directed by the physician. It should be applied only to intact skin surfaces and not to skin wounds and open injuries.

medicines.name: DANTOX EXPERT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Tannic acid Glycerin 66 30% w/v, Iodine 0.3% w/v, Potassium Iodide 0.5% w/v, Thymol 0.05% w/v, Menthol 0.08% w/v & Glycerin 100% QS v/v
medicines.description: Dantox expert gum paint contains Tannic acid Glycerin, Iodine, Potassium Iodide, Thymol, Menthol & Glycerin. Tannic acid glycerin acts by healing sores and treating bleeding gums; Iodine, Potassium iodide & Thymol acts as antibacterial; Iodine & Menthol together act as counterirritant to relieve irritation and offer a soothing effect. This product is prescribed for spongy gums, bleeding gums, sores on gums & pus coming out of gums.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Clean your hands thoroughly and wipe it. Take a drop or two on your finger tips of Dantox gum paint and apply at the lesion or take a larger quantity and apply on the infected gums or as required. It can be applied two to three times a day depending upon severity of disease. You can use it for 3 to 5 days continuously or may be little longer.

medicines.name: GEOFRESH MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Thymol 0.06% w/v, Eucalyptol 0.09% w/v, Menthol 0.04% w/v & Ethanol (95%) 21.6% v/v
medicines.description: Geofresh mouthwash contains Thymol, Eucalyptol, Menthol & Ethanol. Thymol acts as antiseptic agent, Eucalyptol acts as anti-inflammatory & relieves minor pain, Menthol is a freshening agent and soother & Ethanol is antiseptic, cleanser, analgesic and soother. Geofresh Mouthwash is used for prevention of plaque in absence of brushing, prevention and treatment of swollen gums, treatment of minor oral infections, controlling secondary bacterial infections for mouth & gum ulcers besides aiding in treatment of mouth and throat infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effect observed.
medicines.dosage: Take a measure full or 15 ml of Geofresh mouthwash in your mouth & swish for one minute thoroughly. Do not rinse, eat or drink thereafter for 20 minutes. It is to be used under adult supervision for kids under 5 years of age. Do not swallow it, after swishing thoroughly spit out. Can be used twice daily once in the morning and then before retiring to bed.

medicines.name: THIOFORD PLUS

medicines.name: ULTRADENT ULTRA WHITENING TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Papain, Bromelain, Neem, Miswak, Fluoride & Xylitol
medicines.description: Papain and Bromelain are natural enzymes that help break down plaque, while Neem and Miswak have antibacterial properties to support gum health. Fluoride strengthens enamel and prevents cavities, and Xylitol helps reduce plaque buildup. This combination effectively whitens teeth, freshens breath, and promotes oral health.
medicines.sideEffects: Ultradent Ultra Whitening toothpaste is generally considered safe, some side effects may occur like mild gum irritation, tooth sensitivity, or a stinging sensation in the mouth.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount of toothpaste onto your toothbrush and brush gently for 2 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water. Use twice daily for best results. Avoid swallowing and consult a dentist if irritation occurs.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT HERBAL TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Akarkara ext. , Mulethi ext. , Babool ext., Miswak ,Apamarg, Bakul, Pudina, Haldi ext., Pillu ext., Lavang ext., Majuphal ext., Tummuru ext., Piply chhoti ext., Menthol , Black Pepper powder , Karpoor , Ajwain oil , Clove Oil & Nilgiri Oil Toothpaste
medicines.description: Ultradent Herbal Toothpaste toothpaste contains a blend of herbal extracts and essential oils. These ingredients work together to provide natural antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and soothing properties. The combination helps maintain oral hygiene, freshen breath, reduce gum inflammation, and promote overall dental health.
medicines.sideEffects: Ultradent Herbal Toothpaste is generally considered safe, if you're not allergic to essential oils like clove, menthol, or camphor.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount of toothpaste onto your toothbrush and brush gently for 2 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water. Use twice daily for best results. Avoid swallowing and consult a dentist if irritation occurs.

medicines.name: FERTIRISE
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Camellia sinensis (Green Tea) extract 10% 300 mg, L-Arginine 400 mg, Magnesium 55 mg, Vitex agnus-castus Linn extract 40 mg, Zinc 7.5 mg & Selenium 35 mcg
medicines.description: Fertirise contains Chasteberry extract, Green tea extract along with vitamins and minerals to regulate hormonal levels and oxidative stress. Fertirise softgel helps in female infertilily by correcting hormonal imbalance. It also helps to improve symptoms of Pre menstrual Syndrome (PMS).
medicines.sideEffects: Fertirise softgels generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE-CT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine sulphate potassium chloride 750 mg, Chondroitin sulphate sodium 200 mg, Methylsulfonylmethane 250 mg, Cholecalciferol 200 IU, Calcium ascorbate 50 mg, Elemental Selenium 70 mcg, Elemental Zinc 4 mg, Elemental Manganese 3 mg, Elemental Chromium 50 mcg, Elemental Copper 0.5 mg, Elemental Boron 0.5 mg & Elemental Silicon 2 mg
medicines.description: Glucozone-CT plus tablets contain Glucosamine, Chondroitin, and Methysulphonyl methane along with various minerals and Vitamin D. It helps in joint restoration, cartilage & synovial fluid formation and improves overall physiology of joints. Glucozone CT plus tablets are indicated for prevention of Rheumatoid arthritis and for cartilage damage in cases of trauma and injury. It decreases pain and inflammation associated with arthritis, improves mobility and flexibility of involved joints, helps in lubrication of stiff joints and rebuilds worn joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of Glucozone CT Plus to be taken twice or thrice daily. Maximum dose is 4 tablets per day.

medicines.name: TINFAL FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 10 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 50 mg, Calcium Pantothenate 100 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to elemental Selenium 65 mcg , Cupric Oxide eq. to elemental Copper 3 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg

It is prescribed for general growth & well-being, chronic diseases & for maintenance of healthy hair, skin and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach discomfort, pain and bloating are the few observed side effects.

medicines.name: MYOPACE PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Myo Inositol 550 mg, D-Chiro Inositol 13.8 mg, Metformin 500 mg, L-Methylfolate Calcium 0.5 mg & Mecobalamin 750 mcg.
medicines.description: Myopace Plus tablets is a combination of Myo-Inositol, D-Chiro-Inositol, Metformin, L-Methylfolate, Calcium and Mecobalamin used to support metabolic and hormonal balance. Myo-Inositol and D-Chiro-Inositol help regulate insulin sensitivity while Metformin improves glucose control, L-Methylfolate supports healthy cell function, Calcium strengthens bones, and Mecobalamin aids nerve health. Myopace Plus tablets are often used in managing conditions like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) and diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Headaches, nauseas, dizziness, tiredness & weight gain are the infrequent side effects that may occur in patients.

medicines.name: DIAPERGUARD
medicines.composition: Each g contains Aloevera 12.0% w/w, Zinc Oxide 7.0% w/w, Vitamin A 0.0118% w/w, Vitamin E 2% w/w, Nicotinamide 1% w/w, D-Panthenol 1% w/w & Magnesium Sulphate Heptahydrate 2% w/w
medicines.description: Diapergard cream contains Aloevera, a skin nourisher & soother; Zinc Oxide, an antibacterial; Vitamin A & Vitamin E, are skin nourisher; Nicotinamide, reduces redness, swelling & thus heals skin; D-Panthenol, improved hydration, elasticity and texture & Magnesium Sulphate soothes irritated skin. It is used for the treatment of all types of Rashes, Inflammation & Erythema associated with diaper use in adults, children and neonates & with tight clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Change wet and soiled diapers promptly, clean the diaper area with warm water, dry the area completely. Apply gently on the affected area as often as necessary with each diaper change especially at night time when exposure to wet diaper is prolonged. At the surfaces with marks of tight clothing, gently apply the cream and wear loose clothing.

medicines.name: ENLIZER-B6
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Potassium Citrate 1100 mg, Magnesium Citrate 375 mg & Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Enlizer-B6 is a Urinary Alkalizer that is indicated for the management of Calcium oxalate stone & uric acid stone with or without calcium stones in kidney or urinary bladder. It is also indicated for Renal tubular acidosis with calcium stones.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.name: ALKAZIP-B6 (100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Potassium Citrate 1100 mg, Magnesium Citrate 375 mg & Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Alkazip-B6 is a Urinary Alkalizer that is indicated for the management of Calcium oxalate stone & uric acid stone with or without calcium stones in kidney or urinary bladder. It is also indicated for Renal tubular acidosis with calcium stones.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.name: ENLIZER-B6 TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Potassium Magnesium Citrate 978 mg & Vitamin B6 15 mg (Dispersible Tablet)
medicines.description: Enlizer-B6 is a Urinary Alkalizer that contains Potassium Citrate, Magnesium Citrate & Pyridoxine HCl which helps in the management of Oxalate, Uric acid & Calcium stones. Enlizer-B6 tablets acts by enhancing the excretion of citrate ions via urine leading to reduced formation of stones in kidney. Enlizer-B6 tablets used as an adjunct in UTI cases, relieves burning micturition & helps in urolithiasis.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.composition: Each 15 ml of solution contains Cranberry extract 200 mg, D-Mannose 300 mg & Potassium Magnesium Citrate 978 mg eq. to Potassium 273.84 mg & Magnesium 41.56 mg.

medicines.sideEffects: It is highly tolerated and at prescribed dosage side effects are rare. But occasional gastrointestinal upset like nausea, bloating or gas & Allergic reactions such as rash, itching, swelling, dizziness or difficulty breathing may occur.

medicines.sideEffects: Peripheral oedema; ecchymosis; skin atrophy (thin fragile skin); acne; water retention; Hypertension osteoporosis & muscular weakness are few side effects.

medicines.name: BEGROEASE-25
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Mirabegron (ER) 25 mg
medicines.description: Begroease-25 contains Mirabegron which is used to treat overactive bladder (a condition in which the bladder muscles contract uncontrollably and cause frequent urination, urgent need to urinate, and inability to control urination) in adults. It is also used to treat neurogenic detrusor overactivity (a bladder control condition caused by brain, spinal cord or nerve problem) in children 3 years of age and older. Mirabegron is in a class of medications called beta-3 adrenergic agonists. It works by relaxing the bladder muscles to prevent urgent, frequent, or uncontrolled urination.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, dizziness, dry mouth, constipation, back pain & joint pain.

medicines.description: Sildoease-M 25 tablets contains Silodosin and Mirabegron. This combination is widely used in treating symptoms of an enlarged prostate (BPH) and overactive bladder. Silodosin relaxes prostate muscles to improve urine flow, while Mirabegron increases bladder muscle control to reduce urgency and frequency. Together, they help manage urinary symptoms, improving comfort and quality of life.
medicines.sideEffects: Abnormal ejaculation, increased heart rate, dizziness, nausea, constipation, urinary tract infections and runny or blocked nose are some common side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: HEPLOFIT FORTE TABLETS

Altogether, the combination helps maintain liver function, detoxify harmful substances and support overall liver health and vitality.

It contains a unique blend of Inulin, Resistant Maltodextrin, and Partially Hydrolyzed Guar Gum, which work synergistically to enhance gut health by promoting regular bowel movements and improving overall digestive function. This combination of soluble fibers aids in increasing stool bulk, improving gut motility, and fostering beneficial gut microbiota.

It is also indicated for Paracetamol toxicity due to overdose to prevent Liver damage. Mucoend injection is also used with nebulizer as respules to remove phlegm.

medicines.description: This ointment contains Nadifloxacin, an antibiotic that kills bacteria; Terbinafine, an antifungal that stops fungal growth and Mometasone Furoate, a steroid that reduces skin inflammation. It is prescribed for mixed skin infections involving bacteria and fungi, including infected eczema, tinea, and dermatitis with secondary infection.
medicines.sideEffects: It May cause mild burning, itching, dryness, redness, or skin thinning; prolonged use can lead to allergic reactions or secondary infections.

medicines.name: RAPTIC-100
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Nandrolone Decanoate 100 mg
medicines.description: Raptic injection contains Nandrolone Decanoate, an anabolic steroid used to treat osteoporosis (loss of bone tissue), certain types of anaemia, breast cancer (in women) and patients on long term corticosteroids.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are pain at the injection site, hypertension, acne, itching, nausea, abnormal liver function & increased or decreased sexual desire.

medicines.name: EYECON
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorpheniramine Maleate 0.2% w/v, Phenylephrine HCL 0.12% w/v, Methylcellulose 0.02% w/v Phenyl mercuric Nitrate 0.001 % w/v (as preservative)
medicines.description: Eyecon Drops combine Chlorpheniramine Maleate, an antihistamine that relieves allergic symptoms like redness and itching; Phenylephrine HCl, a decongestant that reduces eye redness by constricting blood vessels; and Methylcellulose, a lubricant that soothes dry, irritated eyes. This formulation provides fast relief from eye irritation, itching, and redness caused by allergies, dust, smoke, and environmental factors.
medicines.sideEffects: Temporary burning or stinging, Blurred vision, Eye irritation, Rarely, increased eye pressure or allergic reaction

medicines.name: NAPROWEL FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Naproxen 500 mg & Domperidone 10 mg
medicines.description: Naprowel Plus/Forte tablet contain Naproxen a NSAID and Domperidone an anti-emetic. It is used to treat symptoms of migraine including headache and feeling of sickness and vomiting.It is also indicated in abdominal pain with nausea as well as for post-surgical pain accompanied by nausea.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, ringing in the ears, changes in vision, tiredness, drowsiness, dizziness and rashes.

medicines.name: NAPROWEL PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Naproxen 250 mg & Domperidone 10 mg

It is used to treat symptoms of migraine including headache and feeling of sickness and vomiting.It is also indicated in abdominal pain with nausea as well as for post-surgical pain accompanied by nausea.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, ringing in the ears, changes in vision, tiredness, drowsiness, dizziness and rashes.

medicines.name: NAPROWEL-S
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Naproxen 500 mg & Sumatriptan 85 mg
medicines.description: Naprowel-S tablet contain Naproxen a NSAID and Sumatriptan a migraine specific analgesic. It is used to treat migraine and cluster headache. It is indicated for treatment of acute migraine attacks (with or without aura) in patients above 12 years of age.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are confusion, headache, ringing in the ears, changes in vision, tiredness, drowsiness, dizziness, rashes, flushing, tingling feeling, upset stomach, diarrhea, nausea and muscle cramps.

medicines.name: NAPROWEL-250
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Naproxen Sodium eq. to Naproxen 250 mg
medicines.description: Naprowel-250 contains Naproxen is a NSAID (Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug) and thus it possesses anti-inflammatory, analgesic and anti-pyretic properties. Naprowel-250 is used in Rheumatoid arthritis, osteoarthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, Acute Gout & other musculoskeletal disorders. It is to be consumed with or after meal.
medicines.sideEffects: Upset stomach, nausea, heartburn, headache, drowsiness & dizziness are the few side effects.

medicines.name: NAPROWEL-500
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Naproxen Sodium eq. to Naproxen 500 mg

medicines.name: NAXPESURE-S
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Naproxen 500 mg & Sumatriptan 85 mg
medicines.description: Naxpesure-S is a combination of two medicines that relieves the symptoms of migraines and prevents the attack from becoming worse. This medicine helps by narrowing the blood vessels, thereby relieving migraine headaches.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects associated with the use of this medicine include nausea, heartburn, chest discomfort, dry mouth, weakness, muscle stiffness, drowsiness, numbness of extremities, and irregular heartbeats.

medicines.name: DOBIMEC
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Calcium Dobesilate Monohydrate eq. to Calcium Dobesilate 500 mg
medicines.description: Dobimec contains Calcium Dobesilate, a veno-protective drug that acts by strengthening veins and capillaries & improving their functions. It is prescribed in cases of varicose vein, venous insufficiency & micro circulatory disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Calcium Dobesilate is very well tolerated, the few side effects which occurs are fever, gastrointestinal disorders, skin reactions, joint pain and increase in white blood cell count.

medicines.name: GESTOFORD 200 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Progesterone 100 mg i.e. 200 mg per Ampoule
medicines.description: Gestoford is a progestin which is indicated to help restart menstrual periods that unexpectedly stopped (amenorrhea), treat abnormal uterine bleeding associated with hormonal imbalance and to treat severe symptoms of Premenstrual syndrome (PMS). Gestoford is also used in combination with estrogen as part of hormone replacement therapy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are breakthrough bleeding, spotting, changes in menstrual flow, amenorrhea and change in weight (increase or decrease), pain, irritation, nausea, swelling and/or redness at the injection area, general swelling and vaginal discharge.

medicines.name: GESTOSERV-100
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Natural Micronised Progesterone 100 mg

Gestoserv is also used in combination with estrogen as part of hormone replacement therapy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are breakthrough bleeding, spotting, changes in menstrual flow, amenorrhea, change in weight (increase or decrease) and vaginal discharge.

medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are breakthrough bleeding, spotting, changes in menstrual flow, amenorrhea, change in weight (increase or decrease) and vaginal discharge.

medicines.name: GESTOFORD-AQ 25 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Progesterone IP 25 mg (Natural Micronised) in aqueous base
medicines.description: Gestoford-AQ 25 injection contains aqueous-based Progesterone, a medical treatment which is used replace progesterone in the body. Gestoford-AQ 25 is a pain free injection which contains progesterone dissolved in a water-based solution, thus allowing more bioavailability into the bloodstream compared to oil-based formulations. Gestoford-AQ25 are often used in hormone replacement therapy, fertility treatments &/or supporting pregnancy. Gestoford-AQ 25 injections are typically administered intramuscularly and is recommended on individual hormonal needs and medical conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Injection site reactions, nausea & vomiting, headache, fatigue, weight gain & dizziness are some side effects that may occur.
