medicines.name: NEVIBLOC-5
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Nebivolol 5 mg
medicines.description: Nevibloc-5 tablets contain Nebivolol, a beta blocker that acts by slowing the heart rate and thus reduces strain on heart. It is prescribed in case of high blood pressure & heart failure (in combination with other drugs).
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Headache, dizziness, lightheadedness, tiredness, nausea & slow heartbeat.

medicines.name: NEVIBLOC-AM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Nebivolol 5 mg & Amlodipine 5 mg
medicines.description: Nevibloc-AM tablets contain Nebivolol, a beta blocker that acts by slowing the heart rate & Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart works. It is prescribed in case of high blood pressure.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Headache, dizziness, lightheadedness, swelling in ankle, tiredness, nausea & slow heartbeat.

medicines.name: CILNEP-N5 TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Nebivolol 5 mg & Cilnidipine 10 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-N5 tablets is a combination medicine consisting Cilnidipine and Nebivolol. Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker and Nebivolol a beta-blocker helps in managing hypertension. Cilnidipine relaxes blood vessels thus reducing blood pressure while Nebivolol slows heart rate and improves cardiac efficiency. The combination is highly effective in managing blood pressure levels and protects against heart-related complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include headache, slow heart rate, constipation, cold extremities, nausea, sleepiness, tiredness & palpitations.

medicines.name: DERMIFORD (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin 0.5% w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution eq. to Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiford cream contains Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness and swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic that relieves bacterial infections; Miconazole, an antifungal that treats fungal infections; and Chlorhexidine, an antiseptic that helps prevent or control skin infections caused by bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of resistant and secondary infections of skin caused by various different kinds of disease-causing germs.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effect.

medicines.name: TERABET-GM CREAM (10 g/20 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin 0.5% w/w & Miconazole 2.0% w/w
medicines.description: Terabet-GM (10 g/20 g) cream contains Clobetasol, a steroid to relieve itching, redness & swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic to cure bacterial infections & Miconazole, an antifungal to cure fungal infections. It is prescribed in cases of resistant skin infections where secondary bacterial infection and/or fungal infection are present, suspected or likely to occur.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin dryness, stinging sensation, irritation & allergic reactions may occur at the site of application.

medicines.name: TERABET-GM POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Miconazole Nitrate 2% w/w, Chlorhexidine Gluconate (20% sol.) 0.5% w/w, Allantoin 0.5% w/w & Zinc Oxide 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Terabet-GM powder contains Miconazole, an antifungal to treat fungal infections; Chlorhexidine, an antibacterial to cure bacterial infection; Allantoin a soothing agent & Zinc Oxide, a barrier forming antibacterial & soothing agent. It is prescribed for mixed skin infection or to prevent form mixed pathogens in cases of diaper rash, bed sores and other skin irritations such as burns, cuts & scrapes etc.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is very well tolerated, no known side effects.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN EYE OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g of eye ointment contains Neomycin Sulphate 3400 IU, Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU & Bacitracin Zinc 400 IU
medicines.description: Nosramycin eye ointment contains Neomycin, Polymyxin & Bacitracin three antibiotics which together offers broad spectrum of anti-bacterial activity. It is prescribed for almost all types of superficial infections of external eye/s.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are allergic reactions, eye irritation, itching & swelling.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Neomycin Sulphate 5 g, Bacitracin 250 units & Sulphacetamide Sodium 60 mg
medicines.description: Nosramycin powder contains Neomycin, Bacitracin & Sulphacetamide, combinations of antibiotic to provide effective eradication of disease causing bacteria from skin infections. It is prescribed for wound infections, burns, corroded skin, gangrene and in dusting of wounds after ear and nose surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: It is very well tolerated the side effects are allergic reactions & rashes.

medicines.name: CEODERM CREAM (10 g/20 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate 0.5% w/w, Clotrimazole 1% w/w & Chlorocresol 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Ceoderm cream contains Beclomethasone, to relieve itching, irritation, redness & swelling; Neomycin, to relieve bacterial infections & Clotrimazole, to relieve fungal infections. It is prescribed for the topical treatment of bacterial & fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are stinging sensation, irritation, pimple-like bumps, tenderness & flaking of the treated skin.

medicines.name: DERMIFORD-BN
medicines.composition: Each g contains Ketoconazole 2% w/w, Beclomethasone 0.025% w/w & Neomycin 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiford-BN cream contains Ketoconazole, to relieve fungal infections; Beclomethasone, to relieve relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling & Neomycin, to relieve bacterial infections. It is prescribed for the topical treatment of bacterial & fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are stinging sensation, irritation, pimple-like bumps, tenderness & flaking of the treated skin.

medicines.name: DIPROLITE CREAM (15 g/25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin base 0.5% w/w & Clotrimazole 1.0% w/w
medicines.description: Diprolite cream contains Beclomethasone, a low to medium potency corticosteroid that acts by reducing redness, swelling & itching; Neomycin, an antibacterial drug that kills bacteria & Clotrimazole, an antifungal that treats fungal infection of skin. It is prescribed for the topical treatment of bacterial & fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, stinging, itching, dryness, or redness at the application site may occur.

medicines.name: ENSARIN-MF
medicines.composition: Each g contains Miconazole Nitrate 2% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin base 0.5% w/w & Fluocinolone Acetonide 0.01% w/w
medicines.description: Ensarin-MF cream contains Beclomethasone, to relieve relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling; Neomycin, to relieve bacterial infections & Clotrimazole, to relieve fungal infections. It is prescribed for the topical treatment of bacterial & fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are stinging sensation, irritation, pimple-like bumps, tenderness & flaking of the treated skin.

medicines.name: KETOFORD PLUS CREAM (15 g/25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Ketoconazole 2% w/w & Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/w & Neomycin 0.5 % w/w
medicines.description: Ketoford Plus cream contains Ketoconazole, antifungal drug that act by killing the infection causing fungus on the skin & Beclomethasone, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness, irritation & swelling & Neomycin, an antibiotic that relieves bacterial infections. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers and other skin area of the body; for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc where there is associated inflammation and itching.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are irritation, pruritus, rash and stinging sensation.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN-H EYE OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g of eye ointment contains Neomycin Sulphate 3400 IU, Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU, Bacitracin Zinc 400 IU & Hydrocortisone 10 mg
medicines.description: Nosramycin-H eye ointment contains Neomycin, Polymyxin & Bacitracin three antibiotics which together offers broad spectrum of anti-bacterial activity & Hydrocortisone, a mild steroid that relieves redness, allergy & swelling in the eyes. It is prescribed for almost all types of superficial infections of external eye/s, where inflammation is present markedly.
medicines.sideEffects: Allergic reactions, eye irritation, itching & swelling are the main side effects.

medicines.name: SOFRAMAX
medicines.composition: Each g contains Fradiomycin Sulphate 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Soframax cream contains Fradiomycin, an antibiotic that acts by killing bacteria to cure various skin infections. It is prescribed in bacterial skin infections such as eczema, dermatitis, insect bites, external injuries, thermal burns and surgical wounds.
medicines.sideEffects: Local allergic reactions are the only side effect which may appear.

medicines.name: DIPROBAY CREAM
medicines.composition: Each g contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin base 0.5% w/w & Clotrimazole 1.0% w/w
medicines.description: Diprobay cream contains Beclomethasone, to relieve relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling; Neomycin, to relieve bacterial infections & Clotrimazole, to relieve fungal infections. It is prescribed for the topical treatment of bacterial & fungal skin infections with associated inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are stinging sensation, irritation, pimple-like bumps, tenderness & flaking of the treated skin.

medicines.name: KETOSCALP PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Ketoconazole 2% w/w, Beclomethasone 0.025% w/w & Neomycin 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Ketoscalp Plus cream contains Ketoconazole, antifungal drug that act by killing the infection causing fungus on the skin. Beclomethasone, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness, irritation & swelling. Neomycin inhibits bacterial protein synthesis. It is prescribed in inflammatory skin conditions with mixed bacterial and fungal infections, such as infected eczema, dermatitis, and ringworm.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are irritation, pruritus, rash and stinging sensation.

medicines.name: TELBISOL GM
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin 0.5% w/w & Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w
medicines.description: Telbisol-GM cream contains Clobetasol, a steroid to relieve itching, redness & swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic to cure bacterial infections & Miconazole, an antifungal to cure fungal infections. It is prescribed in cases of resistant skin infections where secondary bacterial infection and/or fungal infection are present, suspected or likely to occur.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin dryness, stinging sensation, irritation & allergic reactions may occur at the site of application.

medicines.name: DERMIFLEX (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate eq. to Neomycin 0.5% w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine Gluconate Solution eq. to Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiflex cream contains Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, redness and swelling; Neomycin, an antibiotic that relieves bacterial infections; Miconazole, an antifungal that treats fungal infections; and Chlorhexidine, an antiseptic that helps prevent or control skin infections caused by bacteria. It is prescribed in cases of resistant and secondary infections of skin caused by various different kinds of disease-causing germs.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effects.

medicines.name: DERMIFLOX (15 g & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin 0.5%w/w, Miconazole Nitrate 2.0% w/w & Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Dermiflox cream combines Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation, redness, and itching by blocking inflammatory chemicals. Neomycin is an antibiotic that stops bacterial growth by inhibiting protein synthesis. Miconazole Nitrate is an antifungal that kills fungi by damaging their cell membranes. Chlorhexidine is an antiseptic that kills microorganisms by disrupting the cell surface. It is used in the treatment of mixed skin infections involving both bacteria and fungi, especially those accompanied by inflammation, itching, and redness, such as infected eczema, dermatitis, and ringworm.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, burning or stinging sensation, dry skin, skin eruptions etc. are the main side effect.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN (5g/10g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Neomycin 3400 U, Polymyxin B 5000 U & Bacitracin 400 U.
medicines.description: Nosramycin Ointment is a combination of three antibiotics: Bacitracin, Neomycin and Polymyxin B, which works by stopping the growth of infection-causing bacteria on your skin. It is used to treat various types of bacterial skin infections. It minimizes symptoms of skin infection such as redness, swelling, itching, etc., by acting against the infection-causing microorganisms.
medicines.sideEffects: The combination is safe to use with no side effects.

medicines.name: CEODERM PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g of cream contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate IP 0.25 mg, Econazole Nitrate IP 10 mg, Neomycin Sulphate IP 5 mg & Chlorocresol IP 1 mg
medicines.description: Ceoderm Plus is a topical cream that combines Beclomethasone Dipropionate, a potent corticosteroid for reducing inflammation; Econazole Nitrate, an antifungal agent for treating fungal infections; Neomycin Sulphate, an antibiotic for bacterial infections; and Chlorocresol, an antiseptic for preventing microbial growth. This combination is used to treat inflammatory skin conditions complicated by fungal and bacterial infections, such as eczema, dermatitis, and psoriasis.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects may include skin irritation, burning sensation, and allergic reactions. Prolonged use may lead to skin thinning.

medicines.name: EARWEL ULTRA
medicines.composition: Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/v, Neomycin 0.5% w/v & Clotrimazole 1% w/v
medicines.description: Earwel Ultra combines Beclomethasone Dipropionate, a potent corticosteroid to reduce inflammation and itching, with Neomycin, an antibiotic effective against bacterial infections, and Clotrimazole, an antifungal agent. This combination effectively treats mixed bacterial and fungal ear infections while soothing irritation and swelling.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness. flaking of skin, stinging sensation, burning sensation. itching sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: AQUAEAR ULTRA
medicines.composition: Beclomethasone Dipropionate 0.025% w/v, Neomycin 0.5% w/v & Clotrimazole 1% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Ear Ultra formulation contains Beclomethasone Dipropionate, Neomycin and Clotrimazole. Beclomethasone is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation, Neomycin is an antibiotic that treats bacterial infections, and Clotrimazole is an antifungal that targets fungal infections. This combination is used to treat mixed ear infections involving bacteria, fungi, and inflammation, such as otitis externa.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild ear irritation, burning, itching, or redness. Rarely, allergic reactions like rash, swelling, or hearing changes may occur.

medicines.name: ITROMED-OC (15 g & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Ketoconazole 2% w/w, Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Itromed-OC Cream is a combination medication used to treat various fungal and bacterial skin infections associated with inflammation, redness, and itching. Ketoconazole acts as an antifungal, Clobetasol Propionate reduces inflammation and itching, and Neomycin Sulphate helps prevent or control bacterial infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild skin irritation, dryness, or burning sensation at the application site.

medicines.name: ITROSTRED-OC (15 g & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Ketoconazole 2% w/w, Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Neomycin Sulphate 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Itromed-OC Cream is a combination medication used to treat various fungal and bacterial skin infections associated with inflammation, redness, and itching. Ketoconazole acts as an antifungal, Clobetasol Propionate reduces inflammation and itching, and Neomycin Sulphate helps prevent or control bacterial infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild skin irritation, dryness, or burning sensation at the application site.

medicines.name: NEPCOVEU
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Nepafenac 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Nepcoveu eye drops contain Nepafenac 0.1% w/v, a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug that relieves redness, pain and swelling in eye. It is prescribed to relieve eye pain, irritation and redness after replacing lens in cataract eye surgery, other eye surgeries & in other eye conditions such as conjunctivitis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: A sensation of foreign body in the eye, eyelid margin crusting & headache are the main side effect.

medicines.name: NEOPAR MD
medicines.composition: Each uncoated mouth dissolving tablet contains Nimesulide 100 mg
medicines.description: Neopar-MD Tablet is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) with analgesic and antipyretic properties. It is indicated for the treatment of acute pain in the symptomatic treatment of osteoarthritis and primary dysmenorrhea in adolescents and adults above 12 years old. It is also indicated in Rheumatoid Arthritis, traumatic pain and dental Pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, somnolence, gastrointestinal upset, nausea, abdominal discomfort, diarrhea, peripheral edema and hypersensitivity reactions.

medicines.name: NEOPAR MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Nimesulide 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Chlorzoxazone 250 mg
medicines.description: Neopar-MR Tablet is a combination medicine containing Nimesulide a NSAID, Chlorzoxazone a muscle relaxant and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which is used in the treatment of pain due to muscle spasm. It is effective for sprains and strains, skeletal muscle spasm, post-surgical pain and discomfort associated with muscle spasms.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, upset stomach, sleepiness, dyspepsia, dizziness, drowsiness & hypersensitivity reactions.

medicines.name: NEOPAR PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Nimesulide 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Neopar Plus tablets are combination of Nimesulide a NSAID & Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to relieve fever, muscle pain, back pain, toothache, or pain in the ear and throat it is also used to relieve pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis & osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, somnolence, gastrointestinal upset, nausea, abdominal discomfort, diarrhea, peripheral edema and hypersensitivity reactions.

medicines.name: NEDOLIDE-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Nimesulide 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Chlorzoxazone 250 mg
medicines.description: Nedolide-MR Tablet is a combination medicine containing Nimesulide (NSAID), Chlorzoxazone (muscle relaxant) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic) which is used in the treatment of pain due to muscle spasm. It is effective for sprains and strains, skeletal muscle spasm, post-surgical and discomfort associated with muscle spasms.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, Diarrhea, Upset stomach, Sleepiness. Dyspepsia, Dizziness, Drowsiness and Hypersensitivity reactions.

medicines.name: NEDOLIDE-P
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Nimesulide 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Nedolide-P Tablets are combination of Nimesulide (NSAID) & Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic). It is used to relieve fever, muscle pain, back pain, toothache, or pain in the ear and throat. It is also used to relieve pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, somnolence, gastrointestinal upset, nausea, abdominal discomfort, diarrhea, peripheral edema and hypersensitivity reactions.

medicines.name: NEDOLIDE-MD
medicines.composition: Each uncoated mouth dissolving tablet contains Nimesulide 100 mg
medicines.description: Nedolide-MD Tablet is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) with analgesic and antipyretic properties. It is indicated for the treatment of acute pain in the symptomatic treatment of osteoarthritis and primary dysmenorrhea in adolescents and adults above 12 years old. It is also indicated in Rheumatoid Arthritis, traumatic pain and dental Pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, somnolence, gastrointestinal upset, nausea, abdominal discomfort, diarrhea, peripheral oedema and hypersensitivity reactions.

medicines.name: URIVRON
medicines.composition: Each uncoated sustained release tablet contains Nitrofurantoin SR 100 mg
medicines.description: Urivron tablets contain sustain release form of Nitrofurantoin, a nitrofuran class of antibiotic that act by inhibiting the growth of pathogens. It is prescribed for prevention and treatment of recurrent urinary tract infections, even in cases of pregnant ladies and is safe to use.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Anorexia, Chills, Cough, Dizziness, Drowsiness, Flatulence, Headache, Nausea, Numbness, Rash, Weakness & Urine discoloration.

medicines.name: URIRON
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Nitrofurantoin SR 100 mg
medicines.description: Uriron tablets contain sustain release form of Nitrofurantoin, a nitrofuran class of antibiotic that act by inhibiting the growth of pathogens. It is prescribed for prevention and treatment of recurrent urinary tract infections, even in cases of pregnant ladies and is safe to use.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Anorexia, Chills, Cough, Dizziness, Drowsiness, Flatulence, Headache, Nausea, Numbness, Rash, Weakness & Urine discoloration.

medicines.name: CADITRIL-2.6
medicines.composition: Each uncoated controlled release tablet contains diluted Nitroglycerin eq. to Nitroglycerin 2.6 mg
medicines.description: Caditril tablets contain Nitroglycerin, a drug that dilates the small blood vessels supplying blood to the heart muscles. It is prescribed for Angina pectoris i.e. heart pain caused due to reduced blood supply to the heart muscles.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, dizziness, lightheadedness, nausea and flushing are the main side effects of the drug.

medicines.name: CADITRIL-6.4
medicines.composition: Each uncoated controlled release tablet contains diluted Nitroglycerin eq. to Nitroglycerin 6.4 mg
medicines.description: Caditril tablets contain Nitroglycerin, a drug that dilates the small blood vessels supplying blood to the heart muscles. It is prescribed for Angina pectoris i.e. heart pain caused due to reduced blood supply to the heart muscles.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, dizziness, lightheadedness, nausea and flushing are the main side effects of the drug.

medicines.name: RETHROWEL-5
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Norethisterone 5 mg
medicines.description: Rethrowel-5 contains Norethisterone, a synthetic progestin that acts by mimicking natural progesterone. It is indicated for Dysfuntional uterine bleeding, Polymenorrhoea, Menorrhagia, Metropathia, Haemorrhagia, Pre-menstrual syndrome, Postponement of menstruation. At high doses it is indicated for disseminated carcinoma of the breast.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are menstrual irregularities e.g. irregular bleeding, heavy menstruation, spotting between menstrual cycles, delayed or not having a menstrual cycle, Stomach discomfort, nausea, vomiting, breast tenderness, headache and dizziness.

medicines.name: RETHROWEL-10 CR
medicines.composition: Each film coated controlled release tablet contains Norethisterone acetate 10 mg
medicines.description: Rethrowel-10 CR tablet contains Norethisterone in CR form, a synthetic progestin that acts by mimicking natural progesterone. Rethrowel-10 CR is used for Dysfunctional uterine bleeding, polymenorrhoea, menorrhagia, dysmenorrhoea and metropathia haemorrhagia besides other indications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are menstrual irregularities e.g. irregular bleeding, heavy menstruation, spotting between menstrual cycles, delayed or not having a menstrual cycle, stomach discomfort, nausea, vomiting, breast tenderness, headache and dizziness.

medicines.name: NOXITEF
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Norfloxacin 400 mg
medicines.description: Noxitef tablet contains Norfloxacin, a fluoroquinolone that acts by stopping the multiplication of the disease causing bacteria. It is prescribed for complicated & uncomplicated urinary tract infections, Sexually transmitted diseases, uncomplicated urethral and cervical gonorrhoea, Prostatitis & Diarrhoea.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common adverse experiences are nausea, headache, dizziness, fatigue, rash, abdominal pain, dyspepsia, excessive sleepiness, constipation, flatulence and heartburn.

medicines.name: NOXITEF-TZ
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Norfloxacin 400 mg & Tinidazole 600 mg
medicines.description: Noxitef-TZ tablet contains Norfloxacin, a fluoroquinolone that acts by stopping the multiplication of the disease causing bacteria & Tinidazole, a nitroimidazole that acts by killing protozoa. It is prescribed for treatment of diarrhoea and dysentery of amoebic, bacterial or mixed origins.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common adverse experiences are nausea, decrease appetite, headache, dizziness, fatigue, rash, abdominal pain & dyspepsia.

medicines.name: GABANYL-NT 400
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Gabapentin 400 mg & Nortriptyline 10 mg
medicines.description: Gabanyl-NT Tablet contains Gabapentin & Nortryptylline, pain relieving medication used to treat pain of central origin. They both are centrally acting drugs with different mechanisms of action to provide better pain relief. It is used to treat nerve pain caused by shingles (herpes zoster), diabetic neuropathies & post herpetic neuralgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, drowsiness, memory loss, lack of coordination, difficulty speaking, viral infections, tremors, double vision, fever, unusual eye movements and jerky movements.

medicines.name: PREGABANYL-NT (10s & 15s)
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Pregabalin 75 mg & Nortriptyline 10 mg
medicines.description: Pregabanyl-NT is a combination of Pregabalin which is centrally acting analgesic & Nortryptylline which is a tricyclic antidepressant used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia & fibromyalgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain and swelling of your hands or feet

medicines.name: PREGABANYL-NTM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Pregabalin 75 mg (SR), Nortriptyline 10 mg & Mecobalamin 1500 mcg
medicines.description: Pregabanyl-NTM is a triple combination of Pregabalin in sustained release form, Nortryptylline & Methylcobalamin used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia & fibromyalgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain and swelling of your hands or feet

medicines.name: GABIPENTA-NT 400
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Gabapentin 400 mg & Nortriptyline 10 mg
medicines.description: Gabipenta-NT Tablet contains Gabapentin & Nortryptyline. They both are centrally acting drugs with different mechanisms of action to provide better pain relief. It is used to treat nerve pain caused by shingles (herpes zoster), diabetic neuropathies & post herpetic neuralgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, drowsiness, memory loss, lack of coordination, difficulty speaking, viral infections, tremors, double vision, fever, unusual eye movements and jerky movements.

medicines.name: PEGABANYL NT
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Pregabalin 75 mg & Nortriptyline 10 mg
medicines.description: Pegabanyl-NT is a combination of Pregabalin an Anti-convulsant & Nortryptylline which is a tricyclic antidepressant used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia, fibromyalgia, and adjunctive therapy for partial onset seizures.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are Dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain, swelling of your hands or feet.

medicines.name: PEGABANYL NTM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Pregabalin 75 mg , Nortriptyline 10 mg & Mecobalamin 1500 mcg
medicines.description: Pegabanyl-NTM is a triple combination of Pregabalin, Nortryptylline & Methylcobalamin used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia, fibromyalgia, and adjunctive therapy for partial onset seizures.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain and swelling of your hands or feet

medicines.name: GABANYL-NT 100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Gabapentin 100 mg & Nortriptyline 10 mg
medicines.description: Gabanyl-NT 100 tablet contains Gabapentin is an antiepileptic & Nortriptyline is an anti-depressant that acts synergistically at the brain so as to relieve neuropathic pain, post herpetic neuralgias & other central pain syndromes effectively and is very well tolerated.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are sedation, hypotension, blurred vision, dry mouth, constipation, urinary retention, postural hypotension, tachycardia & hypertension.

medicines.name: GABIPENTA-NT 100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Gabapentin 100 mg & Nortriptyline 10 mg
medicines.description: Gabipenta-100 NT tablets contains Gabapentin is an antiepileptic & Nortriptyline is an anti-depressant that acts synergistically at the brain so as to relieve neuropathic pain, post herpetic neuralgias & other central pain syndromes effectively and is very well tolerated.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are sedation, hypotension, blurred vision, dry mouth, constipation, urinary retention, postural hypotension, tachycardia & hypertension.

medicines.name: WALCOBAL PLUS INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Methylcobalamin 500 mcg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 50 mg & Niacinamide 50 mg i.e. each ampoule contains Methylcobalamin 1000 mcg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 100 mg & Niacinamide 100 mg
medicines.description: Walcobal plus/Forte injection contains Methylcobalamin (bioactive form of Vitamin B12), Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) and Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6). This combination has synergistic effect on damaged nerves in diabetic neuropathy and peripheral neuropathy. It is indicated to reduce the risk of hyperhomocysteinemia and resulting risks of atherosclerosis, cardiovascular and diabetic disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: WALCOBAL FORTE INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Methylcobalamin 1250 mcg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 50 mg & Niacinamide 50 mg i.e. each ampoule contains Methylcobalamin 2500 mcg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 100 mg & Niacinamide 100 mg
medicines.description: Walcobal plus/Forte injection contains Methylcobalamin (bioactive form of Vitamin B12), Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) and Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6). This combination has synergistic effect on damaged nerves in diabetic neuropathy and peripheral neuropathy. It is indicated to reduce the risk of hyperhomocysteinemia and resulting risks of atherosclerosis, cardiovascular and diabetic disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: LACMOTOP-DS DRY SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of reconstituted syrup contains Lactic acid bacillus 40 x 106 spores, Nicotinamide 15 mg, Folic Acid 100 mcg, Vitamin B6 1.5 mg & Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate eq to elemental Zinc 5 mg
medicines.description: Lacmotop-DS dry syrup contains Lactic acid bacillus, Zinc, Nicotinamide, Vitamin B6 and Folic Acid. Lacmotop Syrup is indicated for diarrhea due to various causes, Gastroenteritis, Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS), to prevent antibiotic induced GI disorders, constipation, feeling of fullness. It also improves intestinal health and immunity.
medicines.sideEffects: It can cause gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Lacmotop.

medicines.name: RETALVIT SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml syrup contains Cyanocobalamin 3 mcg, Thiamine Hydrochloride 2.5 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 1 mg, Lysine Hydrochloride 375 mg, Nicotinamide 25 mg, Riboflavin 3.5 mg & D-Panthenol 3 mg.
medicines.description: Retalvit syrup is a combination of B vitamins with Lysine. Retalvit is used to treat or prevent vitamin deficiency due to poor diet, certain illnesses, alcoholism, or during pregnancy. Vitamins are important building blocks of the body and helps to keep you in good health. Retalvit also helps in boosting immunity, body energy levels and supports normal cognitive function.
medicines.sideEffects: Retalvit syrup generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your Doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: CLINSOL GEL (15 g/25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clindamycin Phosphate eq. to Clindamycin 1 % w/w & Nicotinamide 4% w/w
medicines.description: Clinsol gel contains Clindamycin, an antibiotic that kills acne causing bacteria to cure them & Nicotinamide, a B vitamin reduces redness, swelling, itching, tightens pore to reduce acne and correct the facial skin. It is prescribed for mild to moderate acne.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are pruritus, dry skin, skin removal, burning sensation and irritation.

medicines.name: DIAPERGUARD
medicines.composition: Each g contains Aloevera 12.0% w/w, Zinc Oxide 7.0% w/w, Vitamin A 0.0118% w/w, Vitamin E 2% w/w, Nicotinamide 1% w/w, D-Panthenol 1% w/w & Magnesium Sulphate Heptahydrate 2% w/w
medicines.description: Diapergard cream contains Aloevera, a skin nourisher & soother; Zinc Oxide, an antibacterial; Vitamin A & Vitamin E, are skin nourisher; Nicotinamide, reduces redness, swelling & thus heals skin; D-Panthenol, improved hydration, elasticity and texture & Magnesium Sulphate soothes irritated skin. It is used for the treatment of all types of Rashes, Inflammation & Erythema associated with diaper use in adults, children and neonates & with tight clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Change wet and soiled diapers promptly, clean the diaper area with warm water, dry the area completely. Apply gently on the affected area as often as necessary with each diaper change especially at night time when exposure to wet diaper is prolonged. At the surfaces with marks of tight clothing, gently apply the cream and wear loose clothing.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN GEL (15 g/25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clindamycin Phosphate eq. to Clindamycin 1% w/w & Nicotinamide 4% w/w
medicines.description: Acnetoin gel contains Clindamycin, an antibiotic that kills acne causing bacteria to cure them & Nicotinamide, a B Vitamin reduces redness, swelling, itching, tightens pore to reduce acne and correct the facial skin. It is prescribed for mild to moderate acne.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are pruritus, dry skin, skin removal, burning sensation and irritation.

medicines.name: ENSHINER ULTRA
medicines.composition: Glycolic acid, Kojic acid, Niacinamide, Tyrostat, Ethyl Ascorbic acid, Licorice ext. & Rumex occidentalis extract
medicines.description: Enshiner Ultra cream reduces dark spots and lightens skin shade to provide effective skin brightening with anti-aging benefits. Enshiner Ultra cream inhibits melanin synthesis for lightening complexion & to restore an even skin tone by fading skin discolorations. It has added sunscreens to protect the skin from harmful UV rays and also reduces hyper-pigmentation.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply twice daily for best results, after washing the face or use it after bathing.

medicines.name: NUTIACTIV
medicines.composition: Each capsule contains Ascorbic Acid 40 mg, Nicotinamide 15 mg, Calcium D-Pantothenate 5 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 2 mg, Riboflavin 1.1 mg, Thiamine Mononitrate 1 mg, Folic acid 100 mcg, Cyanocobalamin 1 mcg, Elemental Zinc 12 mg, Elemental Copper 1.35 mg & Selenium 40 mcg
medicines.description: Nutiactiv capsule contains Ascorbic Acid, Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6), Selenium, Nicotinamide (Vitamin B3), Riboflavin (Vitamin B2), Zinc, Copper, Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Folic Acid (Vitamin B9). Nutiactiv helps maintain healthy nervous system, immune system, protects against oxidative damage caused due to stress and helps in maintaining healthy sugar levels in diabetes. It is also used as supplement when mineral & vitamin requirements of the body are high such as in nutrient malabsorption, after surgery, during pregnancy and lactation.
medicines.sideEffects: Nutiactiv capsule generally works well when used within recommended dose. Still, you may sometimes experience side effects such as headache, dizziness, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain or discomfort, irritation, sleepiness, skin rash and itching.
medicines.dosage: One capsule daily with food, or as directed by physician

medicines.name: NUTIACTIV-Z
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 3 mg, Nicotinamide 100 mg, Cyanocobalamin 15 mcg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, Chromium Picolinate 250 mcg eq. to elemental Chromium 31.1 mcg, Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate 61.8 mg eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg & Selenous acid eq. to elemental Selenium 100 mcg
medicines.description: Nutiactiv-Z tablet contains Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6), Selenium, Chromium, Nicotinamide (Vitamin B3), Zinc, Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Folic Acid (Vitamin B9). Nutiactiv-Z helps maintain healthy nervous system, immune system, protects against oxidative damage caused due to stress and helps in maintaining healthy sugar levels in diabetes. It is also used as supplement when mineral & vitamin requirements of the body are high such as in nutrient malabsorption, after surgery, during pregnancy and lactation.
medicines.sideEffects: Nutiactiv-Z tablets generally works well when used within recommended dose. Still, you may sometimes experience side effects such as headache, dizziness, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain or discomfort, irritation, sleepiness, skin rash and itching.

medicines.name: RETALVIT PLUS SYRUP (200 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Vitamin A Concentrate (Oily Form)(as Palmitate) 2500 IU, Vitamin E Acetate 5 IU, Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) 200 IU, Thiamine Hydrochloride 1 mg, Riboflavin Sodium Phosphate Eq. to Riboflavin 1 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 1 mg, Niacinamide 15 mg, Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) 1 mcg, D-Panthenol 2.5 mg, Zinc (as Zinc Sulphate) 3 mg, Iodine (as Potassium Iodide) 50 mcg, Manganese (as Manganese Chloride) 0.8 mg, Molybdenum (as Sodium Molybdate Dihydrate) 8 mcg, Selenium (as Sodium Selenite Pentahydrate) 10 mcg & Lysine Hydrochloride 30 mg
medicines.description: Retalvit plus syrup contains Vitamins, minerals with Beta-Carotene and L-lysine. Retalvit Plus enhance different immune functions, support normal cognitive function, defend against oxidative stress, improve body?s resistance to infections, maintains energy levels and improves appetite.
medicines.sideEffects: Retalvit Plus Syrup generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: WALCOBAL KIT
medicines.composition: Part I - Each 1.5 ml ampoule contains Ascorbic acid 150 mg & Part II - Each 1 ml ampoule contains Cyanocobalamin 2500 mcg, Folic acid 0.7 mg & Nicotinamide 12 mg
medicines.description: Walcobal Kit is a combipack in which one ampoule contains Ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) and another ampoule contains Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12), Folic acid (Vitamin B9) and Nicotinamide (Vitamin B3). It is indicated in megaloblastic anaemia, hyperhomocysteinemia, diabetic neuropathies, alcohol induced neuropathy, prevention of neural tube defect and adjunct in the management of liver disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite, headache and pain at the site of injection.

medicines.name: TRYLIV BOOST
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Silymarin 35 mg, Benfotiamine 5 mg, Vit. B6 1.5 mg, Niacinamide 20 mg, Vit. B 12 1 mcg & Lecithin 262.5 mg
medicines.description: Tryliv Boost Suspension contains Silymarin, Lecithin & Vitamin-B complex. Silymarin & Lecithin improves hepatic cell structure & function, corrects fatty liver, enhances the antioxidant capacity of the liver and maintain liver health; whereas B-Complex vitamin regulates metabolism of liver & body as a whole. It is used as an adjunctive therapy in chronic hepatitis and cirrhosis. Tryliv Boost promotes liver health, contributes to liver protection and detoxification, helps maintain liver function and digestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are abdominal bloating or pain, allergic reactions, diarrhoea, gas, indigestion, itching, loss of appetite, nausea and rash.

medicines.name: FEMIVIN-ISO

Chromium 50 mcg, El. Selenium 40 mcg, Biotin 30 mcg & Vit. D 10 mcg (400 IU) & Vit. B12 1 mcg

This blend aims to contribute to various bodily functions, from energy metabolism to immune health.

medicines.name: LEE-NEEM SOAP (neem & aloevera)
medicines.composition: Neem & Aloevera Soap for Acne And Skin Care
medicines.description: Lee-Neem Soap combines the antibacterial properties of Neem with the soothing and moisturizing benefits of Aloe Vera. It effectively combats acne-causing bacteria, helps reduce inflammation, and promotes healthy, clear skin, making it ideal for daily acne and skin care.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wet skin, lather soap, gently massage on face and body, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for best results.

medicines.name: LEE-NEEM SOAP (Neem & Turmeric)
medicines.composition: Neem & Turmeric Soap for Clear Skin
medicines.description: Lee-Neem Turmeric Soap combines the antibacterial and anti-inflammatory benefits of Neem with the natural antioxidant and brightening properties of Turmeric. It helps fight acne, reduce blemishes, and promotes clear, radiant skin suitable for daily use.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wet skin, lather soap, gently massage on face and body, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for best results.

medicines.name: LEE-NEEM FW
medicines.composition: Neem & Aloevera Facewash for Acne Prone Skin
medicines.description: Lee-Neem Facewash combines Neem’s antibacterial properties with Aloe Vera’s soothing effects to gently cleanse acne-prone skin. It helps reduce acne-causing bacteria, control oil, soothe irritation, and promote a clear, healthy complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet face, massage gently, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily for best results.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN NEEM & TURMERIC SOAP
medicines.composition: Neem & Turmeric Soap
medicines.description: Acnetoin Neem & Turmeric Soap is a natural formulation enriched with Neem and Turmeric, both known for their powerful antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Neem helps fight acne-causing bacteria and soothes irritated skin, while Turmeric reduces redness, inflammation, and promotes healing. Together, they help purify the skin, prevent pimples, and improve overall skin texture. Acnetoin Neem & Turmeric Soap is ideal for oily and acne-prone skin and is prescribed for mild to moderate acne.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wash face 2 to 3 times a day with Acnetoin Neem & Turmeric Soap and pat dry face for better result. Can be used for long time and is safe.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN NEEM & ALOEVERA SOAP
medicines.composition: Neem & Aloe Vera Soap
medicines.description: Acnetoin Neem & Aloe Vera Soap is a gentle herbal formulation designed to cleanse, soothe, and protect acne-prone skin. Neem acts as a powerful antibacterial agent that helps combat acne-causing bacteria, while Aloe Vera soothes irritated skin, provides deep hydration, and promotes healing. This soap helps reduce pimples, inflammation, and skin dryness, making it suitable for daily use. It is prescribed for mild to moderate acne and helps maintain a clear, healthy complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wash face 2 to 3 times a day with Acnetoin Neem & Aloe Vera Soap and pat dry face for better result. Can be used for long time and is safe.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN NEEM & ALOEVERA FW
medicines.composition: Neem & aloevera facewash for acne prone skin
medicines.description: Acnetoin Neem & Aloe Vera Facewash is a gentle, soap-free formula specially developed for acne-prone and oily skin. Neem provides strong antibacterial action to combat acne-causing bacteria, while Aloe Vera soothes irritated skin, reduces inflammation, and maintains moisture balance. Regular use helps cleanse impurities, unclog pores, and prevent breakouts without over-drying the skin. It is prescribed for daily use to support clear, healthy, and refreshed skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount to wet face, gently massage in a circular motion, and rinse thoroughly. Use 2 to 3 times daily for best results. Safe for long-term use.

medicines.name: SILVOWEL
medicines.composition: Each g contains Nano crystalline Silver gel 0.002% w/w
medicines.description: Silvowel gel contains Nano crystalline Silver that acts as antibacterial drugs & skin protector. Silvowel is used for the treatment of surgical cuts, leg ulcers, pressure sores, abrasions, blisters, cracked skin, minor skin cuts, wounds, burns & for prophylaxis of infection at skin graft donor site.
medicines.sideEffects: Silvowel gel is very well tolerated and no side effects are noted.

medicines.name: NICOSIP-2 GUM
medicines.composition: Each Chewing Gum contains Nicotine 2 mg (Mint Flavour)
medicines.description: Nicosip 2 mg chewing gum contains Nicotine 2 mg which is indicated in quitting Cigarette Smoking & Tobacco Chewing. Nicosip acts in the body by reducing Nicotine craving that ultimately withdraws the craving of cigarette smoking and/or tobacco chewing.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects of Nicosip Gum are fast heart rate, dizziness, insomnia, irritability, loss of appetite, increased salivation & nausea.
medicines.dosage: Nicosip 2 mg gum is recommended in individuals smoking 20 or less cigarettes in a day. During first 6 weeks, use one piece of gum every 2 hours, then through weeks 7 to 9, use one piece of gum every 3 to 4 hours & finally through weeks 10 to 12, use one gum every 6 to 8 hours. Do not use more than 24 pieces of Nicosip 2 mg in a day. Individuals smoking more than 20 cigarettes in a day must consult their physician before consumption.

medicines.name: NICOSIP-4 GUM
medicines.composition: Each Chewing Gum contains Nicotine 4 mg (Mint Flavour)
medicines.description: Nicosip 4 mg chewing gum contains Nicotine 4 mg, A plant based alkaloid found in tobacco plant and is an addictive Central Nervous System stimulant that is indicated in quitting Cigarette Smoking & Tobacco Chewing. Nicosip acts in the body by reducing Nicotine craving that ultimately withdraws the craving of cigarette smoking and/or tobacco chewing.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects of Nicosip Gum are fast heart rate, dizziness, insomnia, irritability, loss of appetite, increased salivation & nausea.

medicines.name: ADROPACE-N INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Noradrenaline 2 mg in 2 ml Ampoule
medicines.description: Adropace-N injections contains Noradrenaline, a vasoconstrictor which is used in managing severe low blood pressure by constricting or narrowing the blood vessels in order to increase the blood pressure and improve blood flow especially to vital organs. Adropace-N injection is administered intravenously & is often used in emergency situations, such as shock or severe hypotension, where rapid and effective management of blood pressure is crucial. Adropace-N injection requires close monitoring in order to adjust dosages and minimize potential side effects.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects including headache, nausea & vomiting, hypertension, arrhythmias, anxiety &/or tremors may occur.

medicines.name: ANAS DEE NF
medicines.composition: Each g of cream contains Nifedipine IP 0.3% w/w & Lidocaine IP 1.5% w/w (with Applicator)
medicines.description: Anas Dee NF is a topical ointment that combines Nifedipine, a calcium channel blocker, and Lidocaine, a local anesthetic. This formulation is designed for the treatment of conditions such as anal fissures and hemorrhoids. Nifedipine helps by reducing smooth muscle spasm and improving blood flow, while Lidocaine provides local pain relief and numbs the affected area.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are mild skin irritation, burning, or itching at the application site.

medicines.name: OFRON EYE & EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ofloxacin 0.3% w/v
medicines.description: Ofron eye/ear drops contain Ofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria. For eye it is prescribed in cases of bacterial eye infections & for ears it is prescribed in cases of bacterial ear infections such as swimmer's ear & ear canal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye- Temporary stinging or burning sensation, blurred vision, eye discomfort, itching, redness, dryness, tearing, feeling as if something is in your eye & sensitivity to light. Ear- Dizziness, headache, earache & changes in taste may occur.

medicines.name: OFRON-D EYE & EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ofloxacin 0.3% w/v & Dexamethasone 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Ofron-D eye/ear drops contain Ofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria & Dexamethasone, a corticosteroid that acts by eliminating allergic reactions, decreases swelling and redness. For eye it is prescribed in cases of bacterial eye infections with inflammation & for ears it is prescribed in cases of bacterial ear infections associated with pain & inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye: Temporary stinging or burning sensation, blurred vision, eye discomfort, itching, redness, dryness, tearing, feeling as if something is in your eye & sensitivity to light. Ear: Dizziness, headache, earache & changes in taste may occur.

medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Agitation, Sleep disorder, Insomnia, Dizziness, Headache, Eye irritation, Vertigo, Nausea, Vomiting, Pruritis & Rash.

It is prescribed to treat Typhoid, community acquired Pneumonia, fever of unknown origin, urinary tract infection & post-surgical infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, cough, eye irritation, vertigo, agitation, and Sleep disorder & skin rashes.

medicines.name: OLTEF-OZ
medicines.composition: Each film-coated tablet contains Ofloxacin 200 mg & Ornidazole 500 mg
medicines.description: Oltef-OZ tablet is a combination medicine which can be used to treat bacterial & parasitic infections. It works by killing and stopping the growth of the bacteria and parasites causing the infection. It effectively treats a wide range of bacterial infections that may occur in the teeth, lungs, gastrointestinal infections, urinary and genital tract.
medicines.sideEffects: May lead to some side effects such as nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, dizziness, and headache.

medicines.name: OLTEF-200
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ofloxacin 200 mg
medicines.description: Oltef 200 contains Ofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone that inhibits bacterial DNA replication, while ornidazole is an antiprotozoal agent effective against anaerobic bacteria. Together, they offer broad-spectrum antimicrobial activity. This combination is commonly used for conditions like mixed infections, including gastrointestinal, gynecological, and urinary tract infections, acute diarrhea, dysentery & pelvic inflammatory disease.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects include nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, headache, dizziness, or abdominal pain. Rarely, it can trigger allergic reactions, neuropathy, or drug-induced pancreatitis.

medicines.name: ZAPINOL
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Olanzapine 10 mg
medicines.description: Zapinol tablets contain Olanzapine, an antipsychotic drug that acts by altering brain chemicals. It is prescribed in cases of Schizophrenia & manic episodes (psychiatric disorders).
medicines.sideEffects: Excessive sleepiness, weight gain, increase in blood fat & sugar, increased frequency of urination, increased appetite, dizziness, elevated liver enzymes, rash, fatigue and oedema are noted.

medicines.name: OMNIPRES-20
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Olmesartan Medoxomil 20 mg
medicines.description: Omnipres tablets contain Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & is prescribed for high BP and kidney problem due to diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are headache, influenza-like symptoms and dizziness.

medicines.name: OMNIPRES-20 AMH
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Olmesartan Medoxomil 20 mg, Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Omnipres-AMH tablet contains Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart works & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high blood pressure in patients whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled by a combination of two drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, dizziness, hypotension, muscle spasm, joint swelling, fatigue, palpitation, blood urea, creatinine & uric acid increases.

medicines.sideEffects: The side effects of the combination are diarrhea, headache, increased sugar, hypertriglyceridemia, influenza-like symptoms & pharyngitis.

medicines.name: OMNIPRES-M 50
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Olmesartan Medoxomil 20 mg & extended release Metoprolol Succinate 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 50 mg
medicines.description: Omnipres-M 50 tablets contain Olmesartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Metoprolol in extended release form, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. This combination is prescribed when single drug alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are back pain, diarrhea, sinusitis, throat infection, respiratory tract infections, tiredness, dizziness, shortness of breath & slow heart rate.

It is prescribed for high blood pressure in patients whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled by either drug.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are peripheral edema, headache and dizziness.

This combination is useful in managing gastrointestinal symptoms such as acid reflux with associated nausea or vomiting.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, constipation, and dizziness.

medicines.name: MEGABURN-120
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Orlistat 120 mg
medicines.description: Megaburn contains Orlistat which is used with an individualized low-calorie, low-fat diet and exercise program to help people lose weight. Megaburn is used in overweight people who may also have high blood pressure, diabetes, high cholesterol, or heart disease. Megaburn is also used after weight-loss to help people keep from gaining back that weight. Orlistat is in a class of medications called lipase inhibitors. It works by preventing some of the fat in foods eaten from being absorbed in the intestines.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Oily spotting on underwear or on clothing, gas with oily spotting, urgent need to have a bowel movement, loose stools, oily or fatty stools, increased number of bowel movements, difficulty controlling bowel movements, pain or discomfort in the rectum (bottom) and stomach pain.

medicines.name: MEGABURN-60
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Orlistat 60 mg

Megaburn is also used after weight-loss to help people keep from gaining back that weight. Orlistat is in a class of medications called lipase inhibitors. It works by preventing some of the fat in foods eaten from being absorbed in the intestines.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Oily spotting on underwear or on clothing, gas with oily spotting, urgent need to have a bowel movement, loose stools, oily or fatty stools, increased number of bowel movements, difficulty controlling bowel movements, pain or discomfort in the rectum (bottom) and stomach pain.

medicines.name: DAIAWASH
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Levofloxacin 50 mg & Ornidazole 125 mg
medicines.description: Daiawash suspension contains Levofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone and Ornidazole, a nitroimidazole derivative that acts synergistically to kill bacteria and protozoa. It is prescribed by child specialist in cases of gastro-intestinal infections, chest infections, urinary tract infections & in various other bacterial and protozoal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of the combination are Pruritus, Skin rash, Dyspepsia, Nausea, Vomiting, Vaginitis, Candidiasis, Dizziness, Headache & Insomnia.

medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of the combination are Pruritus, Skin rash, Dyspepsia, Nausea, Vomiting, Vaginitis, Candidiasis, Dizziness, Headache & Insomnia.

It is prescribed in cases of gastro-intestinal infections, chest infections, gynaecological infections, dental infections, skin ulcers & in various other bacterial and protozoal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of this combination are Insomnia, Fungal infection, , Dizziness, Headache, Eye irritation, Vertigo, Dry mouth, Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vomiting, abnormal liver function test, loss of appetite, Pruritus & Rashes.

medicines.name: PURADINE-OZ OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g contains Povidone Iodine 5% w/w eq. to Iodine 0.5% w/w & Ornidazole 1% w/w
medicines.description: Puradine-OZ ointment contains Povidone Iodine, an antiseptic agent that kills bacteria and fungus to eradicate skin infections in wide variety of conditions & Ornidazole, an antiprotozoal drug that also acts on specialized group of bacteria not covered by Povidone. They act synergistically to cover wide spectrum of pathogens. It is prescribed for treatment & prevention of infections such as cuts, abrasions, post-surgical procedures dressing, burns, infected wounds & diabetic foot ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Local swelling, irritation, itching and rashes can happen.

medicines.name: OLTEF-OZ
medicines.composition: Each film-coated tablet contains Ofloxacin 200 mg & Ornidazole 500 mg
medicines.description: Oltef-OZ tablet is a combination medicine which can be used to treat bacterial & parasitic infections. It works by killing and stopping the growth of the bacteria and parasites causing the infection. It effectively treats a wide range of bacterial infections that may occur in the teeth, lungs, gastrointestinal infections, urinary and genital tract.
medicines.sideEffects: May lead to some side effects such as nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, dizziness, and headache.

medicines.name: OLTEF-200
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ofloxacin 200 mg
medicines.description: Oltef 200 contains Ofloxacin, a fluoroquinolone that inhibits bacterial DNA replication, while ornidazole is an antiprotozoal agent effective against anaerobic bacteria. Together, they offer broad-spectrum antimicrobial activity. This combination is commonly used for conditions like mixed infections, including gastrointestinal, gynecological, and urinary tract infections, acute diarrhea, dysentery & pelvic inflammatory disease.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects include nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, headache, dizziness, or abdominal pain. Rarely, it can trigger allergic reactions, neuropathy, or drug-induced pancreatitis.

medicines.name: OXBIZEP 150
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Oxcarbazepine 150 mg
medicines.description: Oxbizep tablets contain Oxcarbazepine, an antiepileptic drug that stops fits or epilepsy by stopping excessive firing of nerve cells. It is prescribed for partial seizures i.e. seizures originating at one half of the brain as well as for nerve pains.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, drowsiness, tiredness, nausea/vomiting, stomach/abdominal pain, headache, trouble sleeping & constipation are the main side effect.

medicines.name: OXBIZEP 300
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Oxcarbazepine 300 mg
medicines.description: Oxbizep tablets contain Oxcarbazepine, an antiepileptic drug that stops fits or epilepsy by stopping excessive firing of nerve cells. It is prescribed for partial seizures i.e. seizures originating at one half of the brain as well as for nerve pains.
medicines.sideEffects: Dizziness, drowsiness, tiredness, nausea/vomiting, stomach/abdominal pain, headache, trouble sleeping & constipation are the main side effect.

medicines.name: DYNACAINE

medicines.description: Dynacaine gel contains Antacids (Aluminium hydroxide & Magnesium hydroxide) and Oxetacaine (Analgesic & anesthetic). It relieves symptoms of Peptic ulcer, gastritis, inflammation of food pipe, hiatus hernia and other dyspeptic conditions associated with hyperacidity.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, stomach pain, constipation, drowsiness, dizziness, rash or redness of the skin, swelling on eyes, lips and tongue.

medicines.name: SUPHACID
medicines.composition: Each 10 ml of suspension contains Sucralfate 1000 mg & Oxetacaine 20 mg
medicines.description: Suphacid contains Sucralfate which forms a protective layer on the gastric mucosa & Oxetacaine relieves Pain by providing anesthetic effect. It is used in combination with antacids or alone for relief of pain in oesophagitis & acid peptic disease.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Constipation, diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, upset stomach, itching, rash, dizziness, drowsiness, sleep problems (insomnia), headache, or back pain.

medicines.name: GASOGEST

It is indicated In Peptic ulcers, food pipe ulcers, GERD and hyperacidity. Thus Gasowel Plus is an antacid, anti-gas and stomach specific analgesic.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, stomach pain, constipation, drowsiness, dizziness, rash or redness of the skin, swelling on eyes, lips and tongue.

medicines.name: OXYNASOCAN
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Oxymetazoline 0.05% w/v
medicines.description: Oxynasocan nasal drops contains Oxymetazoline, a nasal decongestant that constricts nasal blood vessels to open nasal passage by decreasing swelling and secretion. It is prescribed for the symptomatic relief of nasal congestion, seasonal & annual allergic rhinitis (including hay fever), sinusitis & common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Local irritation along with the dryness of the mouth and throat are the main side effects.

medicines.name: OXYNOZCALM NASAL SOLUTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Oxymetazoline 0.05% w/v
medicines.description: Oxynozcalm nasal drops contains Oxymetazoline, a nasal decongestant that constricts nasal blood vessels to open nasal passage by decreasing swelling and secretion. It is prescribed for the symptomatic relief of nasal congestion, seasonal & annual allergic rhinitis (including hay fever), sinusitis & common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Local irritation along with the dryness of the mouth and throat are the main side effects.

medicines.name: FLUTIVIN-O NASAL SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each Spray delivers Fluticasone Furoate 27.5 mcg & Oxymetazoline Hydrochloride 50 mcg (Nasal Spray)
medicines.description: Flutivin-O nasal pump spray contains Fluticasone, a mild steroid with Oxymetazoline, a nasal decongestant & vasoconstrictor for the management of seasonal & perennial Allergic Rhinitis, Common Cold, Sinusitis, Viral rhinosinusitis, Hay fever & other allergic problems associated with nasal congestion & or inflammation. Flutivin-O is superior to Fluticasone or Oxymetazoline alone in relieving the nasal congestion and reduction of Total Nasal Symptom Score in allergic rhinitis.
medicines.sideEffects: Flutivin-O is very well tolerated; the main side effects are nasal dryness, irritation & sneezing etc.

medicines.name: ACTIVIEW SOFT GEL
medicines.composition: Each softgels capsule contains Lycopene 10% 5 mg, Lutein 10% 10 mg, Zeaxanthin 10% 2 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg, Vit. C 40 mg, Natural Vit. E 10 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 12 mg, Copper Sulphate eq. to elemental Copper 1 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to el. Selenium 25 mcg & Omega 3 fatty acid eq. to EPA 180 mg & DHA 120 mg
medicines.description: Actiview softgels contain Lycopene, Lutein and Zeaxanthin (Carotenoids), Omega 3 fatty acids with vitamins and minerals. Actiview Softgels are used to prevent Age related Macular Degeneration (AMD), many eye conditions like Cataract, Retinitis Pigmentosa, Dry eye and Glaucoma. It can also be used as general eye supplement.
medicines.sideEffects: Actiview softgels generally has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: ENSHINE INSTA SENSITIVITY (50 g)
medicines.composition: Insta Sensitivity Repair Plus toothpaste (Quick relief formula)
medicines.description: Enshine insta-sensitivity repair plus tooth paste is a medicated paste to relieve dental hypersensitivity immediately after application. Enshine instasensitivity paste acts by making a neurosensory block at the nerve root of tooth & protects from cavity or prevent increase in their size. It also reduces the demineralization of enamel and dentin by decreasing the acid production by harmful bacteria.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Use it as a regular tooth paste twice daily for increasing protection against sensitivity of teeth to cold, heat, acids, sweets or contact & also helps in the prevention of dental cavities. Apply one inch length of paste onto a soft bristle toothbrush to brush as usual, ensuring to brush all sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing. It not only provides relief in sensitive teeth, but also actually helps repair the sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not use longer than 4 weeks, without dental?s recommendations. Keep out of reach of children under 6 years of age.

medicines.name: LIPLITE (MIXED FRUIT FLAVOUR)
medicines.composition: Lip Protection with SPF 15
medicines.description: Enriched with Vitamin E, Wheat germ oil, Almond oil & Jojoba oil with added SPF 15, Liplite is an essential first line defence for lips that hydrates, softens and keep them smooth for up to 8 hours. Liplite protects the lips from environmental onslaught such as wind, cold, sunlight & less humidity. With every application of Liplite lips are reborn and feel supple, plump, moisturized, giving intense care with the sweetness of Strawberry flavour.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply at the centre of your upper lip & then move it towards the outer edges by sliding & pressing the tube with smooth applier mouth, following the contours of your mouth. Then glide across the entire bottom lip, at last to provide even smooth finish rub both the lips together to make the application uniform.

medicines.description: Medisoft Aloevera Moisturizing Cold Cream is a non sticky formulation enriched with Aloe Vera & Cucumber extract that improves repairs & protects the skin from the onslaught of winter?s dry & rough state to provide energetic & supple skin. The healing & nourishing properties of Aloe Vera & Cucumber with ingredients provides a soothing effect to the skin, condition it from within, infuse it with moisture & make skin look fresher, healthier, and brighter so as to feel smoother & softer. Its advanced SPF-20 protection protects skin from UV rays to provide even toned & fairer skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerated, no known sideeffects
medicines.dosage: Apply the optimum amount of cream on the skin by gently rubbing all over the face regularly for best result. For skin repair, protection & rejuvenation apply at night after washing face. For effective Sun protection, use 30 minutes before going out in Sun

medicines.name: MEDISOFT LOTION
medicines.composition: Aloevera Moisturizing Body Lotion
medicines.description: Medisoft Aloe Vera Moisturizing lotion is a light, non sticky intense hydration formulation enriched with Aloe Vera, Olive oil, Cocoa butter, Vitamins & Amino acids rejuvenates skin to provide nourished & moisturized appearance. The exceptional properties of Aloe Vera & amino acids soothes skin, conditions, nourishes to make skin feel smoother, softer & younger. Its advanced SPF-20 protection protects skin from UV rays & provides even tone & fairer skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply the optimum amount of lotion on the skin by gently rubbing the lotion all over the body after bathing. Use Medisoft regularly for best result.

medicines.name: MEDISOFT PETROLEUM JELLY
medicines.composition: White Petroleum Jelly
medicines.description: Medisoft Petroleum Jelly is suitable for all skin types & leave skin extraordinarily soft and smooth by forming a barrier at the skin?s surface & preventing water loss. Medisoft Petroleum Jelly is especially beneficial for dry, ageing and delicate skin & protects skin from the effects of weather and sun exposure. The healing & nourishing properties of Medisoft Petroleum Jelly provides a soothing effect to the skin & thus is helpful to relieve dry skin, help heal injured skin, Prevent chafing (chafing is a painful skin irritation that occurs when body parts rub together or rub against clothing such as heel or thigh), treats diaper rash & treats dry nails too.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply the optimum amount of Medisoft Petroleum Jelly on the skin by gently rubbing all over the face & other body skin & nails regularly for best result. For skin repair, protection & rejuvenation apply at night. For effective Sun protection, use 30 minutes before going out in Sun.

medicines.name: BRESTO
medicines.composition: Body Toner Gel (for breast toning)
medicines.description: Bresto Body Toner Gel is packed with the nature?s wonders to provide better cleavage by just applying it. Bresto Body Toner Gel is an effective, safe & sure way to tone body with measurable results within 8 to 12 weeks. Bresto Body Toner Gel is a quick absorbing, convenient & easy to apply formula with a mild scent for boosting the looks and confidence. The Phyto-estrogens & skin toning ingredients found in the Bresto Body Toner Gel along with other herbal actives stimulates new cell growth to Bresto, tighten & reshape breast tissue for a natural & wholesome growth experience.
medicines.sideEffects: No know side effects, highly tolerated
medicines.dosage: DO NOT USE IN FEMALES LESS THAN 18 YEARS OF AGE. Apply on to your breasts twice daily in the morning and at night before retiring to bed. Apply Bresto Body Toner Gel with fingers & massage it in a circular fashion with light hands, starting with the nipple to the base of the breast and around them for 3 to 5 minutes on one side and repeat with other side. Evident result will come within 6 to 8 weeks of therapy with an increase of one cup size, and is the minimum time period to show result. In general the application must continue till 6 months for best results and to reap Bresto Body Toner Gel?s full benefit & you can expect gains of up to 2 cup sizes. After 6 month of active twice daily application if you are satisfied with Bresto Body Toner Gel and want to use it further then use it once a day at night and your breasts will still maintain their size & shape.

medicines.name: ENSHINER PLUS

Enshiner Plus cream is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

medicines.dosage: Initially use twice daily on spots as well as face or areas of faces that need improvement in colour & skin clarity & then use once daily.
