Then glide across the entire bottom lip, at last to provide even smooth finish rub both the lips together to make the application uniform.

medicines.name: ELOWAY COLD CREAM
medicines.composition: Aloevera moisturizing cold cream
medicines.description: Eloway Aloevera Moisturizing Cold Cream is a non sticky formulation enriched with Aloe Vera & Cucumber extract that improves repairs & protects the skin from the onslaught of winter?s dry & rough state to provide energetic & supple skin. The healing & nourishing properties of Aloe Vera & Cucumber with ingredients provides a soothing effect to the skin, condition it from within, infuse it with moisture & make skin look fresher, healthier, and brighter so as to feel smoother & softer. Its advanced SPF-20 protection protects skin from UV rays to provide even toned & fairer skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerated, no known sideeffects
medicines.dosage: Apply the optimum amount of cream on the skin by gently rubbing all over the face regularly for best result. For skin repair, protection & rejuvenation apply at night after washing face. For effective Sun protection, use 30 minutes before going out in Sun

medicines.name: ELOWAY LOTION
medicines.composition: Aloevera Moisturizing body lotion
medicines.description: Eloway Aloe Vera Moisturizing lotion is a light, non sticky intense hydration formulation enriched with Aloe Vera, Olive oil, Cocoa butter, Vitamins & Amino acids rejuvenates skin to provide nourished & moisturized appearance. The exceptional properties of Aloe Vera & amino acids soothes skin, conditions, nourishes to make skin feel smoother, softer & younger. Its advanced SPF-20 protection protects skin from UV rays & provides even tone & fairer skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply the optimum amount of lotion on the skin by gently rubbing the lotion all over the body after bathing. Use Eloway regularly for best result.

medicines.name: ELOWAY ALOEVERA GEL
medicines.composition: Pure Aloe Vera Moisturizing gel
medicines.description: Eloway Aloevera Gel is enriched with the goodness of Aloevera with Cucumber extracts, together they provide nourishment & hydration to skin, detoxifies skin, clears blemishes, shines skin and imparts glow that redefine your looks. Eloway is an ideal partner for round the year protection that shows itself.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply the optimum amount of Gel on the face or body skin by gently rubbing it as & when require or after bathing. Use Eloway Aloevera Gel regularly for effective benefits that last.

medicines.name: ELOWAY PETROLEUM JELLY
medicines.composition: Fortified petroleum jelly
medicines.description: Eloway Petroleum Jelly is suitable for all skin types & leave skin extraordinarily soft and smooth by forming a barrier at the skin?s surface & preventing water loss. Eloway Petroleum Jelly is especially beneficial for dry, ageing and delicate skin & protects skin from the effects of weather and sun exposure. The healing & nourishing properties of Eloway Petroleum Jelly provides a soothing effect to the skin & thus is helpful to relieve dry skin, help heal injured skin, Prevent chafing (chafing is a painful skin irritation that occurs when body parts rub together or rub against clothing such as heel or thigh), treats diaper rash & treats dry nails too.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects
medicines.dosage: Apply the optimum amount of Eloway Petroleum Jelly on the skin by gently rubbing all over the face & other body skin & nails regularly for best result. For skin repair, protection & rejuvenation apply at night. For effective Sun protection, use 30 minutes before going out in Sun.

medicines.name: FEEL BIG
medicines.composition: Body Toner Gel (Breast toning Gel)
medicines.description: Feel Big Body Toner Gel is packed with the nature?s wonders to provide better cleavage by just applying it. Feel Big Body Toner Gel is an effective, safe & sure way to tone body with measurable results within 8 to 12 weeks. Feel Big Body Toner Gel is a quick absorbing, convenient & easy to apply formula with a mild scent for boosting the looks and confidence. The Phyto-estrogens & skin toning ingredients found in the Feel Big Body Toner Gel along with other herbal actives stimulates new cell growth to Feel Big, tighten & reshape breast tissue for a natural & wholesome growth experience.
medicines.sideEffects: No know side effects, highly tolerated
medicines.dosage: DO NOT USE IN FEMALES LESS THAN 18 YEARS OF AGE. Apply on to your breasts twice daily in the morning and at night before retiring to bed. Apply Feel Big Body Toner Gel with fingers & massage it in a circular fashion with light hands, starting with the nipple to the base of the breast and around them for 3 to 5 minutes on one side and repeat with other side. Evident result will come within 6 to 8 weeks of therapy with an increase of one cup size, and is the minimum time period to show result. In general the application must continue till 6 months for best results and to reap Feel Big Body Toner Gel?s full benefit & you can expect gains of up to 2 cup sizes. After 6 month of active twice daily application if you are satisfied with Feel Big Body Toner Gel and want to use it further then use it once a day at night and your breasts will still maintain their size & shape.

medicines.name: POSTURE CORRECTOR BELT
medicines.composition: N.A.
medicines.description: Posture Corrector Belt improves posture and overall spine health in people with long sitting time, lifestyle habits, spinal disorders & trauma. AVAILABLE SIZES :- S, M, L & XL
medicines.sideEffects: N.A.

medicines.name: STRECHMIN OIL
medicines.composition: Jojoba Oil, Macadamia seed Oil, Vitamin A, Tocopherol, Sweet Almond Oil, Olive Oil & its extracts & Swertia chirata extract.
medicines.description: Strechmin Oil is an exotic oil for stretch marks & scars on the body that heals & prevents them from forming. A perfect combination of best ingredients form east and west, that acts synergistically thus providing excellent results. Strechmin Oil is ideal mix of exotic ingredients like Jojoba Oil, Macadamia seed Oil, Vitamin A, Tocopherol, Sweet Almond Oil, Olive Oil & extracts & Swertia chirata extract that heals the skin and provides it with nourishment so as to get rid of stretch marks and provide a lasting anti-ageing effect. Strechmin Oil not only removes stretch marks but it also improves the appearance of scars on the skin, whether on the face or body. It has a potential to lighten the scar marks and even fades away the minor scars from the skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Apply Strechmin Oil directly on to the skin or may even use it after hot water fomentation. Apply with light hands and rub gently to make it absorb into the skin. Massage in a circular motion on to the affected skin. Apply on the affected area 2 times a day for treatment & once daily at night time for prevention of Stretch marks & Scars or as prescribed by the physician.

medicines.name: SUNSHADE SPF-30 LOTION
medicines.composition: Ultra Block SPF-30 Sunscreen Lotion-Non Greasy Water Resistant
medicines.description: Leeford's SunShade SPF-30 Ultra Block Sunscreen Lotion offers prolonged and consistent broad spectrum sun protection against the harmful UV-A and UV-B radiations. It provides complete sun protection, offers intense hydration with its broad spectrum water resistant formulation. It helps fight skin ageing caused due to free radicals induced by sun's radiation. SunShade is a non greasy formula that leaves no white residue, spreads easily over the skin thus also offering blue light protection. SunShade SPF-30 Ultra Block Sunscreen Lotion helps avoid sun burns, sun tan & skin darkening in case of prolonged sun exposure. SunShade also provides intense moisturization, nourishment & an even, non-shiny finish.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects are observed if used within the prescribed limits.
medicines.dosage: Squeeze appropriate quantity of SunShade SPF-30 Sunscreen Lotion on fingertips and apply on freshly cleaned face, neck and arms at least 15 to 30 minutes prior to going out. Re-apply the lotion after swimming, sweating, physical activity or after a prolonged exposure of more than 4-6 hours.

medicines.name: DERMIFRESH-SANDAL
medicines.composition: Yashad Bhasma, Tankan, Pudina Satva, Fragrance (Sandal) & Talc.
medicines.description: DermiFresh prickly heat powder is specially formulated prickly heat powder with the perfect blend of ingredients that keeps your skin dry and helps you in providing instant relief from irritation, itching, burning sensation & red rashes that mainly occurs due to scorching summer heat. It also protects skin from bacterial infections, keeps skin fresh and irritation free all day
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Sprinkle DermiFresh Prickly heat powder after bathing over towel dried affected area for instant relief from prickly heat, heat rash, itching & burning sensation in summers.

medicines.name: SUNSHADE SPF-50 LOTION
medicines.composition: Ultra Block SPF-50 Sunscreen Lotion-Non Greasy Water Resistant
medicines.description: Leeford's SunShade SPF-50 Ultra Block Sunscreen Lotion offers prolonged and consistent broad spectrum sun protection against the harmful UV-A and UV-B radiations. It provides complete sun protection, offers intense hydration with its broad spectrum water resistant formulation. It helps fight skin ageing caused due to free radicals induced by sun's radiation. SunShade is a non greasy formula that leaves no white residue, spreads easily over the skin thus also offering blue light protection. SunShade SPF-50 Ultra Block Sunscreen Lotion helps avoid sun burns, sun tan & skin darkening in case of prolonged sun exposure. SunShade also provides intense moisturization, nourishment & an even, non-shiny finish.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects are observed if used within the prescribed limits.

Re-apply the lotion after swimming, sweating, physical activity or after a prolonged exposure of more than 4-6 hours.

medicines.name: ORTHO-AID BALM
medicines.composition: %w/w- Pudina, Kapur, Ajwain, Nilgiri leaves oil, Lavang, Gandhpura leaves oil & Jaiphal seeds oil.
medicines.description: Ortho-Aid Balm is a powerful topical pain reliever balm that is highly safe & effective in providing relief from long lasting pain, swelling, muscle spasm and soreness. A balanced combination of herbs such as Pudina, Kapur, Ajwain, Nilgiri leaves oil, Lavang, Gandhpura leaves oil & Jaiphal seeds oil, it helps in relieving headache, backache, muscular & lower back pains along with joint pains. Ortho-Aid Balm penetrates deep into the skin & its fast acting formula improves micro-circulation, relieves pain & helps treat affected muscles & tissues.
medicines.sideEffects: Ortho-Aid Balm must not be applied on eroded skin or open wounds. No other side effects are observed otherwise.
medicines.dosage: For best results, rub & massage as a thin layer 2-3 times a day in sufficient quantity wherever necessary. Do not apply on open wounds or cuts. Avoid application around eyes, mouth & nostrils.

medicines.name: BREATH-EX STEAMER
medicines.composition: Steam Inhalational Device
medicines.description: Breath-Ex Steamer is a multipurpose vaporizer & nasal steamer meant for cold, cough & congestion. It is made up of safe food grade plastic material with three different attachments to enhance its usage. It is used for opening of blocked nose in case of common cold, seasonal/non-seasonal allergic conditions etc. It cleanses deeply and useful for both health & beauty. Its detachable design gives ease of convenience for different uses.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects observed. (Not Applicable)
medicines.dosage: Pour 2 to 5 drops of Breath-EX Inhalational drops in a Breath-EX steamer with normal water and inhale with steam, for best results from cold & congestion inhale for at least 3 to 5 minutes at least two to three times a day. For beauty purpose can be used without Breath-EX drops.

medicines.name: DIGITAL FLEXI THERMOMETER
medicines.composition: Premium quality, highly precise & dual scale digital thermometer
medicines.description: Leeford brings Digital Flexi Thermometer that offers quick & accurate temperature readings. Flexi thermometer comes with a flexible & soft tip for comfort & is Ideal for all age groups. It features a large, easy-to-read LCD display & its waterproof design ensures easy cleaning. The flexi digital thermometer includes a beep alert when the measurement is complete & is ideal for both home and professional use.
medicines.sideEffects: N.A.
medicines.dosage: Turn on the Leeford digital flexi thermometer & place the thermometer inside your mouth or under your armpit so that it touches skin. Hold the flexi thermometer appropriately in place until you hear the thermometer beep indicating it's done. Remove the thermometer and read the temperature.

medicines.name: NOZCALM STEAMER
medicines.composition: Steam Inhalational Device
medicines.description: Nozcalm Steamer is a multipurpose vaporizer & nasal steamer meant for cold, cough & congestion. It is made up of safe food grade plastic material with three different attachments to enhance its usage. It is used for opening of blocked nose in case of common cold, seasonal/non-seasonal allergic conditions etc. It cleanses deeply and useful for both health & beauty. Its detachable design gives ease of convenience for different uses.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects observed. (Not Applicable)
medicines.dosage: Pour 2 to 5 drops of Nozcalm/Breath-Ex Inhalational drops in Nozcalm steamer with normal water and inhale with steam, for best results from cold & congestion inhale for at least 3 to 5 minutes at least two to three times a day. For beauty purpose, it can be used without any drops.

medicines.name: RIB BELT
medicines.composition: N.A.

medicines.name: DERBITOL
medicines.composition: Each gram contains Oxiconazole nitrate 10 mg or 1% w/w cream
medicines.description: Oxiconazole is an antifungal, used to treat fungal infections of the skin, and it acts by killing the fungus. Derbitol cream is used to treat ringworm infections of the body called tinea corporis; ringworm of the foot (tinea pedis or athlete's foot); ringworm of the groin (tinea cruris or jock itch) & ringworm of the trunk (tinea or pityriasis versicolor)
medicines.sideEffects: Pruritus; burning; irritation and allergic contact dermatitis & folliculitis are the few side effects.

medicines.name: OZENOACT
medicines.composition: Ozenoxacin 1% w/w
medicines.description: Ozenoact Cream contains Ozenoxacin, a topical antibiotic used for the treatment of bacterial skin infections, particularly impetigo caused by Staphylococcus aureus and Streptococcus pyogenes. Ozenoact Cream works by inhibiting bacterial DNA replication, thereby stopping the growth of infection-causing bacteria. It helps reduce redness, itching, and discomfort associated with skin infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects are rare but may include mild skin irritation or redness at the application site.

medicines.name: WELTIVE MULTI OMEGA
medicines.composition: Flax seed oil 150 mg (Omega 3,6,9), Fish oil 250 mg (EPA 90 mg & DHA 60 mg), Methyltetrahydrofolic acid 200 mcg, Vit.E 7.5 mg, Lycopene 10% 4000 mcg, Sea Buckthorn oil 200 mcg, Borage oil 50 mg, Vit. D3 300 mcg, Vit.A 200 IU, Olive oil 87 mg & Pomegranate seed oil 100 mg
medicines.description: Weltive Multiomega is rich in essential fatty acids, antioxidants, and key micronutrients, it supports cardiovascular health, reduces oxidative stress, enhances brain and eye function, and promotes skin and immune health. It is beneficial in managing chronic inflammatory conditions, age-related cognitive decline, and maintaining hormonal balance and metabolic wellness.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well-tolerated. Mild side effects may include gastrointestinal discomfort, fishy aftertaste, nausea, or allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.
medicines.dosage: Take one softgel capsule daily after a meal or as directed by a healthcare professional.

medicines.name: ACTISIGHT
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Lutein 10% 10 mg, Zeaxanthin 10% 2 mg, Lycopene 10% 5 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg, Vit. C 40 mg, Natural Vit. E 10 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 12 mg, Copper Sulphate eq. to elemental Copper 1 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to el. Selenium 25 mcg & Omega 3 fatty acid eq. to EPA 180 mg, DHA 120 mg
medicines.description: Actisight softgel contain Carotenoids (Lycopene, Lutein and Zeaxanthin), Omega 3 fatty acids, Vitamin C, Vitamin E and minerals for the maintenance of eye sight and eye health in all age groups. Actisight lowers risk of Age related macular degeneration (Vision loss) & Cataract. It improves visual field, visual sharpness and reduces the rate of visual decline. It helps to treat Glaucoma, Retinitis Pigmentosa and Dry Eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Actisight Softgels generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: HEPALAIR TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains L-Ornithine L-Aspartate 150 mg & Pancreatin 100 mg
medicines.description: Hepalair tablets contains L-Ornithine l-Aspartate which increases the levels of ornithine and aspartic acid in the body, these amino acids help to reduce levels of a ammonia in the blood .This helps in regeneration of damaged liver cells which helps liver to carry out its functions smoothly. It also contains Pancreatin which is a digestive enzyme. Hepalair tablets are indicated in acute and chronic hepatitis, Cirrhosis of liver, alcoholic liver damage & adjunct to hepatotoxic drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, Stomach pain, Bloating, Diarrhea and Constipation.

medicines.name: DYCREFLAT
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Pancreatin 170 mg & Activated Dimethicone 80 mg
medicines.description: Dycreflat tablets contain Pancreatin which helps in digestion of carbohydrates, proteins and fats whereas Dimethicone removes gas from digestive tract. It is used in relieving abdominal tightness due to excess gas, flatulence following air swallowing or in digestive disturbances, flatulence caused by pancreatic insufficiency. It is also used in patients before gastro-intestinal and radiological examination.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are diarrhea, abdominal pain or cramps, nausea, hypersensitivity reactions may happen these may include skin rashes or sneezing, hyperuricaemia have been reported with high doses.

It also contains Pancreatin which is a digestive enzyme. Hepalair tablets are indicated in acute and chronic hepatitis, Cirrhosis of liver, alcoholic liver damage & adjunct to hepatotoxic drugs.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Stomach pain, Bloating, Diarrhea and Constipation.

medicines.name: PANTAFOL-CT
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Pantoprazole (as gastro-resistant tablet) 40 mg & Cinitapride (as sustained release tablet) 3 mg (Tablet in Capsule Formulation)
medicines.description: Pantafol-CT capsule contains Pantoprazole that inhibits acid production and Cinitapride that improves movements of GI tract. They are indicated for relief from Dyspepsia, GERD, nausea associated with severe form of acid peptic disorders, Post-operative nausea and vomiting and chronic gastritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, Muscle pain, allergic reactions to skin, Headache, nausea, vomiting, gas, joint pain, diarrhea and dizziness.

medicines.name: PEZOVER-IT
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Pantoprazole (EC) 40 mg and Itopride (SR) 150 mg
medicines.description: Pezover-IT Capsules contains Pantoprazole, a PPI that inhibits acid & Itopride, a Prokinetic drug that increases the movement in GI tract. It is indicated in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD) in Patients who do not respond to monotherapy with PPI's. It is also indicated in Zollinger-Ellison syndrome, gastric and duodenal ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, gas, joint pain, diarrhea, dizziness

medicines.name: CAVMOX-HP KIT
medicines.composition: Each kit contains Amoxycillin Trihydrate eq. to Amoxycillin 750 mg (2 film coated tablets), Clarithromycin 500 mg (2 film coated tablets) & Pantoprazole Sodium eq. to Pantoprazole 40 mg (as enteric coated pellets, 2 hard gelatin capsule) [ANTIULCER KIT of 6]
medicines.description: Cavmox-HP Kit contains 2 tablets of Amoxycillin 750 mg, a Penicillin antibiotic; 2 tablets of Clarithromycin, a Macrolide antibiotic & 2 capsules of Pantoprazole, an acid inhibitor. This kit is used for the prevention & cure stomach and duodenal (small intestine) ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Cavmox-HP Kit occasionally has minor side effects such as Diarrhea, headache, nausea, vomiting and abnormal taste.

medicines.name: PANTAFOL-ON
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Pantoprazole (EC) 40 mg and ondasetron (IR) 4 mg
medicines.description: Pantafol-ON capsules combine Pantoprazole, a proton pump inhibitor that reduces gastric acid secretion, and Ondansetron, a selective serotonin 5-HT3 receptor antagonist used to prevent nausea and vomiting. This combination is useful in managing gastrointestinal symptoms such as acid reflux with associated nausea or vomiting.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, constipation, and dizziness.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD KID DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine Maleate 1 mg & Paracetamol 125 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Kid drops is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a decongestant, Chlorpheniramine a anti-allergic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness

medicines.name: LEEMOL IV
medicines.composition: Each 100 ml contains Paracetamol IP 1000 mg in 100 ml FFS bottle
medicines.description: Leemol IV Solution for Infusion is indicated for the short-term treatment of moderate pain, especially following surgery, and for the short-term treatment of fever, when administration by intravenous route is clinically justified by an urgent need to treat pain or hyperthermia and/or when other routes of administration are not possible.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, headache, Insomnia, constipation, Pruritus, Agitation, Pleural effusion, Pulmonary edema, Wheezing and Infusion site pain.

medicines.name: COLDMINE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Paracetamol 125 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 1 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine drops is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine an decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: COLDMINE SYRUP (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Paracetamol 125 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 1 mg & Sodium Citrate 60 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine an decongestant, Chlorpheniramine, Sodium Citrate and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: COLDMINE PLUS (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of Syrup contains Paracetamol 250 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine Plus syrup is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: LEEMOL DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Paracetamol 100 mg (Syrupy Base)
medicines.description: Leemol drops contain Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which is for the treatment of mild to moderate pain, for the reduction of fever and as an adjunctive treatment to relieve symptoms of cold and flu.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects of are Skin rash or itching, sometimes with breathing problems or swelling of the lips, tongue, throat or face, mouth ulcers and bruising.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD KID
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Paracetamol 125 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 1 mg & Sodium Citrate 60 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Kid syrup is a combination medicine which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Phenylephrine a decongestant and Chlorpheniramine & Sodium Citrate that effectively relieves symptoms of common cold such as blocked nose, runny nose, fever, watery eyes and sneezing, allergic rhinitis and nasal congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness

medicines.name: CRITICOLD PLUS
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorphenamine Maleate 2 mg & Paracetamol 250 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Plus syrup is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: LEEMOL-DC SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Paracetamol 125 mg & Dicyclomine Hydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Leemol-DC contains Paracetamol an analgesic and anti-pyretic and Dicyclomine an antispasmodic. It is indicated for the treatment of stomach cramps, renal and biliary colic as well as pain of surgical or gynaecological origin. Leemol-DC is also indicated for functional bowel disease and Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are hypersensitivity reactions, dry mouth, upset stomach, vomiting, constipation and gas or bloating.

medicines.name: LEEMOL-DM SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Paracetamol 125 mg & Domperidone 5 mg
medicines.description: Leemol-DM contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic and Domperidone an antiemetic to stop vomiting. Leemol-DM is indicated for the treatment of migraine, nausea and vomiting associated with fever, in chest infections to stop vomiting associated with excessive coughing and in cases of high fever in children.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Rash, itching/swelling (especially of the face/ tongue /throat), dizziness, trouble breathing, dry mouth, somnolence, headache and diarrhoea.

medicines.name: IBUFYL PLUS SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Ibuprofen 100 mg & Paracetamol 162.5 mg
medicines.description: Ibufyl Plus contains Ibuprofen an NSAID and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. Ibufyl Plus is indicated for the treatment of minor aches and pains and for reduction of fever.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects hypersensitivity reactions, dizziness, bronchospasm, dysponea, aggravated asthma, various skin reactions e.g. pruritis and urtricaria.

medicines.name: MEFNIWEL-P DS
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Mefenamic acid 100 mg & Paracetamol 250 mg
medicines.description: Mefniwel-P/Mefniwel-P DS contains Mefenamic acid a NSAID with antispasmodic properties and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is indicated for relief of fever, low back pain, Joint disorders such as Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid arthritis, headache, migraine, dental pain, Painful periods, and in acute musculoskeletal injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects hypersensitivity reactions, dizziness, diarrhea, constipation, gas or bloating, headache, dizziness, nervousness and ringing in the ears.

medicines.name: ACIMOL
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Acimol Tablet contains Aceclofenac a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) and Paracetamol a time tested analgesic and antipyretic drug. Acimol tablet is used to reduce pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and osteoarthricareitis. It is also be used to relieve back pain, toothache, or pain in the ear and throat.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ACIMOL-FORTE (10's/15's)
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Serratiopeptidase 15 mg eq. to enzyme activity 30000 Units as enteric coated granules
medicines.description: Acimol-Forte tablets is a combination of Aceclofenac a NSAID, Serratiopeptidase a proteolytic enzyme and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It also alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, Indigestion, heartburn, loss of appetite and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ACIMOL-MR
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Chlorzoxazone 250 mg
medicines.description: Acimol-MR Tablet contains Aceclofenac a NSAID, Chlorzoxazone a muscle relaxant and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic that is used to relieve pain and inflammation in conditions that affect muscles. Acimol-MR effectively relieves muscle stiffness or spasm, thereby improving muscle movement. It is indicated in Low back pain, acute muscle spasms, muscle spasms associated with spondylosis, muscular cramping & traumatic injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, heartburn, stomach pain, Diarrhea, loss of appetite, tiredness and sleepiness.

medicines.name: COLDFIZ
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Phenylephrine 10 mg & Chlorpheniramine 2 mg
medicines.description: Coldfiz tablet is a combination medicine that effectively relieves symptoms of common cold such as blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, and congestion or stuffiness, fever and headache. It reduces congestion and helps in easy breathing.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: COLDMINE
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Phenylephrine 12.5 mg , Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg & Caffeine 30 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine is a combination of four medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Coldmine helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: COLDMINE PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 325 mg, Phenylephrine 10 mg & Fexofenadine 60 mg.
medicines.description: Coldmine Plus is a combination of three medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Coldmine plus helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: DIECOLD
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Caffeine 30 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg & Diphenhydramine 25 mg
medicines.description: Diecold tablet is a combination of medicines which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Caffeine an CNS stimulant, Phenylephrine an decongestant and Diphenhydramine an anti-allergic. It is used for the relief of cold and flu including headache, fever, nasal and sinus congestion, runny or stuffy nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping), restlessness and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: DIECOLD PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg, Caffeine 25 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg & Cetirizine 10 mg
medicines.description: Diecold Plus is a combination of five medicines which effectively relieves symptoms of common cold associated with chest congestion and productive cough. It is used for the treatment of blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, sneezing, congestion, fever and headache. Diecold plus helps in the removal of mucus (phlegm) from the airways and helps in easy breathing. It also works as decongestant which narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, Bloating, Stomach pain, Indigestion, Loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping) and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: ETOFORD-P
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 60 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Etoford-P is a combination of Etoricoxib a NSAID & Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which helps to reduce the pain and swelling (inflammation) in the joints and muscles of people 16 years of age and older with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and gout. It is also used for the short term treatment of moderate pain after dental surgery in people 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, Stomach pain, Diarrhea, Peripheral edema and Flatulence.

medicines.name: LEXICAM
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Lornoxicam 8 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Lexicam Tablet is a combination of Lornoxicam a NSAID and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which is indicated for the treatment of mild to moderate pain and inflammation in Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Dental Pain, acute lower back pain, Sciatica Pain & Post-Surgical pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Vomiting, Nausea, Indigestion, Stomach pain and Diarrhea.

medicines.name: NEOPAR MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Nimesulide 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Chlorzoxazone 250 mg
medicines.description: Neopar-MR Tablet is a combination medicine containing Nimesulide a NSAID, Chlorzoxazone a muscle relaxant and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which is used in the treatment of pain due to muscle spasm. It is effective for sprains and strains, skeletal muscle spasm, post-surgical pain and discomfort associated with muscle spasms.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, upset stomach, sleepiness, dyspepsia, dizziness, drowsiness & hypersensitivity reactions.

medicines.name: NEOPAR PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Nimesulide 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Neopar Plus tablets are combination of Nimesulide a NSAID & Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to relieve fever, muscle pain, back pain, toothache, or pain in the ear and throat it is also used to relieve pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis & osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, somnolence, gastrointestinal upset, nausea, abdominal discomfort, diarrhea, peripheral edema and hypersensitivity reactions.

medicines.name: THIOFORD-AP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiocolchicoside 4 mg, Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Thioford-AP Tablet is a triple combination of skeletal muscle-relaxant drug Thiocolchicoside, Aceclofenac a NSAID & Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic used in the treatment of orthopedic, traumatic and rheumatologic disorders. It is indicated in the treatment of painful muscle spasms, Neck & Shoulder Pain, Sciatica, Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Degenerative vertebral disorders, Ankylosing spondylitis, for adults and adolescents 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Somnolence, diarrhoea, heartburn, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain and flatulence.

medicines.name: TRICARE-AP
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Tramadol Hydrochloride 37.5 mg, Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Tricare-AP Tablet contains Tramadol, an opoid analgesic without their side effect; Aceclofenac, a NSAID & Paracetamol, an analgesic & antipyretic which is indicated for short term management of moderate to severe pain in adults.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are sleepiness, headache, nervousness, heartburn, upset stomach, dry mouth and changes in mood.

medicines.name: TRICARE-MR
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Tramadol Hydrochloride 37.5 mg, Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Tricare-MR Tablet contains Tramadol, an opioid analgesic without their side effect; Aceclofenac, a NSAID & Paracetamol, an analgesic & antipyretic which is indicated for short term management of moderate to severe pain in adults.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are sleepiness, headache, nervousness, heartburn, upset stomach, dry mouth and changes in mood.

medicines.name: TRICARE-P
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Tramadol Hydrochloride 37.5 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Tricare-P is a combination of Tramadol an opioid analgesic & Paracetamol an analgesic & antipyretic and is indicated for short term management of moderate to moderately severe pain in adults.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are sleepiness, headache, nervousness, heartburn and dry mouth and changes in mood.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic Tablet contains Diclofenac a NSAID and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic which is used to reduce pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and osteoarthritis. It is also used to relieve muscle pain, back pain, and toothache.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, heartburn, diarrhea and loss of appetite.

medicines.name: ALCINAC FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Serratiopeptidase 15 mg eq. to enzyme activity 30000 Units as enteric coated granules
medicines.description: Alcinac-Forte Tablet is a combination of Aceclofenac (a NSAID), Serratiopeptidase (a proteolytic enzyme) & Paracetamol (an analgesic and antipyretic) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It also alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, Indigestion, heartburn, loss of appetite and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ALCINAC-MRX
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Tizanidine Hydrochloride eq. to Tizanidine 2 mg
medicines.description: Alcinac-MRX is a combination medicine that contains Aceclofenac (NSAID), Tizanidine (muscle relaxant) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic). Alcinac-MRX is used to relieve pain and inflammation that affect muscles. It is effective for sprains and strains, skeletal muscle spasm, post-surgical and discomfort associated with muscle spasms.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, heartburn, diarrhea, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, sleepiness and loss of appetite.

medicines.name: ALCINAC-P
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Alcinac-P Tablet contains Aceclofenac (NSAID) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic) both pain relieving drugs. Alcinac-P tablet is used to reduce pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, and osteoarthritis. It is also be used to relieve back pain, toothache, or pain in the ear and throat.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea

medicines.name: CHYMONET AP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Trypsin-Chymotrypsin 50000 armour unit (6:1) as enteric coated granules, Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Chymonet-AP tablets contain Trypsin and Chymotrypsin, proteolytic enzymes that clear dead cells, improves microcirculation and accelerate healing in combination with Aceclofenac a NSAID. Chymonet-AP is indicated in Orthopedics for post-traumatic swelling, fractures and dislocation, soft tissue injury, sports injury, traumatic injuries and post-surgical inflammation. Chymonet forte is also used to help loosen phlegm in asthma, bronchitis, lung diseases and sinus infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Itching, shortness of breath, swelling of lips or throat, shock, loss of consciousness and ocassional gastric disturbance may occur.

medicines.name: COXILOR P
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Lornoxicam 8 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Coxilor-P tablet contain Lornoxicam (NSAID) and Paracetamol (Analgesic and anti-pyretic).It is indicated for treatment of pain and inflammation in Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, dental pain, acute low back pain, post-surgical pain and inflammation, sciatica pain and traumatic pain and inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, constipation and stomach pain.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD-PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Phenylephrine 12.5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 2 mg & Caffeine 30 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Plus tablet is a combination medicine which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Phenylephrine a decongestant, Chlorpheniramine a Anti-allergic and Caffeine a CNS stimulant.It is indicated for relief of nasal and sinus congestion, allergic symptoms of the nose or throat due to upper respiratory tract allergies, sinus pain and headache, adjunct with antibacterials in sinusitis, tonsillitis and otitis media.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, headache, restlessness, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness

medicines.name: CRITICOLD TOTAL
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg, Caffeine 30 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Diphenhydramine Hydrochloride 25 mg
medicines.description: Criticold tablet is a combination of medicines which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Caffeine a CNS stimulant, Phenylephrine a decongestant and Diphenhydramine a anti-allergic. It is used for the relief of cold and flu including headache, fever, nasal and sinus congestion, runny or stuffy nose.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, diarrhea, bloating, stomach pain, Indigestion, loss of appetite, dizziness, headache, sweating, sleepiness, rash, Insomnia (difficulty in sleeping), restlessness and allergic reaction.

medicines.name: DROZIVER PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Drotaverine Hydrochloride 80 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Droziver Plus tablet contains Dotaverine an anti-spasmodic and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic drug. It is indicated in the treatment of Stomach pain, Irritable bowel syndrome, menstrual cramps, cervical spasm during labour, Chest pain, Gallstones pain and Pain in renal colic.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, dizziness, Nausea and Vomiting, Fluctuating Pulse Rate, Headache and Skin reactions.

medicines.name: ETOLYTE-P
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 60 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Etolyte-P is a combination of Etoricoxib & Paracetamol which helps to reduce the pain and swelling (inflammation) in the joints and muscles of people 16 years of age and older with osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and gout. Etolyte-P is also used for the short term treatment of moderate pain after dental surgery in people 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, stomach pain, diarrhea, peripheral edema and flatulence

medicines.name: LEEMOL 500
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 500 mg
medicines.description: Leemol 500/650 tablets contain Paracetamol an analgesic and anti-pyretic. Leemol 500/650 is recommended for the treatment of painful and febrile conditions, for example, headache including migraine, toothache, neuralgia, colds and influenza, sore throat, backache, rheumatic pain and dysmenorrhoea.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Rash, itching/swelling (especially of the face/ tongue /throat), dizziness and trouble breathing.

medicines.name: LEEMOL ACTIV
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Paracetamol 650 mg & Caffeine 50 mg
medicines.description: Leemol Activ tablets contain Paracetamol an analgesic and anti-pyretic and Caffeine a stimulant and analgesic. It is indicated in mild to modertate pain, headache, migraine, toothache, painful periods, fever, backache and rheumatic pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are hypersensitivity reactions, dizziness, restlessness, Insomnia, rapid or abnormal heart rhythm, dehydration and anxiety.

medicines.name: LEEMOL-650
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 650 mg
medicines.description: Leemol 500/650 tablets contain Paracetamol an analgesic and anti-pyretic. Leemol 500/650 is recommended for the treatment of painful and febrile conditions, for example, headache including migraine, toothache, neuralgia, colds and influenza, sore throat, backache, rheumatic pain and dysmenorrhoea.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Rash, itching/swelling (especially of the face/ tongue /throat), dizziness and trouble breathing.

medicines.name: LEEMOL-DC TABLET
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Paracetamol 325 mg & Dicylomine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Leemol-DC contains Paracetamol an analgesic and anti-pyretic and Dicyclomine an antispasmodic. It is indicated for the treatment of stomach cramps, renal and biliary colic as well as pain of surgical or gynaecological origin. Leemol-DC is also indicated for functional bowel disease and Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are hypersensitivity reactions, dry mouth, upset stomach, vomiting, constipation and gas or bloating.

medicines.name: LEEMOL-DM TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Paracetamol 325 mg & Domperidone 10 mg
medicines.description: Leemol-DM contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic and Domperidone an antiemetic to stop vomiting. Leemol-DM is indicated for the treatment of migraine, nausea and vomiting associated with fever, in chest infections to stop vomiting associated with excessive coughing and in cases of high fever in children.

Piperacillin kills bacteria by breaking their membranes and Tazobactam stops the enzymes that make bacteria resistant to the antibiotic, thus together they act synergistically. It is used in cases of serious infections of chest, urinary system & blood along with others.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vomiting, Rash, Pruritus & fungal infections on long usage.

medicines.name: TAZOPATH-2.25 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Piperacillin 2 g & Tazobactam 0.25 g with WFI
medicines.description: Tazopath-2.25 g injection is a combination of Piperacillin, a Penicillin & Tazobactam, a beta-lactam inhibitor. medicines.name: TAZOCLIN-2.25 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Piperacillin 2 g & Tazobactam 0.25 g with WFI
medicines.description: Tazoclin-2.25 g injection is a combination of Piperacillin, a Penicillin & Tazobactam, a beta-lactam inhibitor. Piperacillin kills bacteria by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis and Tazobactam stops the enzymes that make bacteria resistant to the antibiotic, thus together they act synergistically. It is used in cases of serious infections of chest, urinary system & blood along with others.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vomiting, Rash, Pruritus & fungal infections on prolonged usage.

medicines.name: MENTOPLAST SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Piracetam 500 mg
medicines.description: Mentoplast tablets & syrup contains Piracetam, a brain protector that acts by multiple mechanisms to restore circulation & brain blood vessel preservation. It is prescribed in cases of stroke, memory loss due to old age, brain function impairment & muscle jerks.
medicines.sideEffects: Weight gain, nervousness, fatigue, itching & being impatient is the main side effects.

medicines.name: MENTOPLAST
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Piracetam 800 mg
medicines.description: Mentoplast tablets & syrup contains Piracetam, a brain protector that acts by multiple mechanisms to restore circulation & brain blood vessel preservation. It is prescribed in cases of stroke, memory loss due to old age, brain function impairment & muscle jerks.

medicines.name: NUROCOT-P 400
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Citicoline Sodium eq. to Citicoline 500 mg & Piracetam 400 mg
medicines.description: Nurocot-P 400 tablet contains Citicoline & Piracetam, two different brain protectors for better protection & healing. It is prescribed in cases of head injury, stroke, memory loss, elderly brain related problems etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Nervousness, weight gain, gastrointestinal disturbances, transient headaches, low BP & heartbeat irregularities.

medicines.name: CITCOPACE-P 400

medicines.name: MIZOWEL
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Piroxicam 20 mg i.e 40 mg/Amp
medicines.description: Mizowel contains Piroxicam (NSAID) which is used to relieve pain, tenderness, swelling, and stiffness caused by osteoarthritis and rheumatoid arthritis. Mizowel is also sometimes used to treat gouty arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, menstrual pain and Post-Surgical Pain.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are diarrhea, constipation, gas, headache, dizziness, ringing in the ears

medicines.name: MIZOCAM-DT
medicines.composition: Each uncoated dispersible tablet contains Piroxicam 20 mg
medicines.description: Mizocam contains Piroxicam a NSAID which is used to relieve pain, tenderness, swelling and stiffness caused by osteoarthritis and rheumatoid arthritis. Mizocam is also sometimes used to treat gouty arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, menstrual pain and Post-Surgical Pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhea, constipation, gas, headache, dizziness and ringing in the ears.

medicines.name: MIZOWEL DT
medicines.composition: Each uncoated dispersible tablet contains Piroxicam 20 mg

medicines.name: MIZOCAM INJECTION

medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are diarrhea, constipation, gas, headache, dizziness, ringing in the ears

medicines.name: WARTSRUB-S
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Podophyllum Resin 25% w/v, Benzoin 10% w/v, Aloes 2% w/v & Salicylic acid 5% w/v
medicines.description: Wartsrub Lotion is for the removal of genital warts and common warts of the hands and feet in both men and women caused by HPV or Human Papilloma Virus, besides it is also indicated for removal of skin tags & moles.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, only observed side effect is that on wrong application it may corrode the normal skin.

medicines.name: PEGFORD
medicines.composition: Each 25 ml of solution contains:Polyethylene glycol 13.125 g, Sodium Chloride 0.3507 g, Sodium Bicarbonate 0.1785 g & Potassium Chloride 0.0466 g
medicines.description: Pegford solution contains Polyethylene glycol 3350 an osmotic laxative with electrolytes. It works by causing water to be retained with the stool. Pegford solution is indicated for clearing the colon (bowel) before medical tests such as colonoscopy, barium enema X-ray exam and colon surgery etc. & for the expulsion of toxic ingestions. It is also indicated for the treatment of occasional constipation in Patients above 2 years of age.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, bloating, cramping, gas, diarrhea and hives.

medicines.name: PEGVISITE EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each 10 ml contains Polyethylene Glycol 400 0.4% w/v & Propylene Glycol 0.3% w/v
medicines.description: Pegvisite eye drops is an eye lubricant used to relieve dry, burning & irritated eyes due to wind, sun, heating/air conditioning, computer use/reading and certain medications. It is scientifically formulated to shield eyes from dry eye discomfort so that eyes feel refreshed & provides long-lasting dry eye relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Vision may be temporarily blurred, minor burning/stinging/irritation may temporarily occur.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN EYE OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g of eye ointment contains Neomycin Sulphate 3400 IU, Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU & Bacitracin Zinc 400 IU
medicines.description: Nosramycin eye ointment contains Neomycin, Polymyxin & Bacitracin three antibiotics which together offers broad spectrum of anti-bacterial activity. It is prescribed for almost all types of superficial infections of external eye/s.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are allergic reactions, eye irritation, itching & swelling.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN-H EYE OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g of eye ointment contains Neomycin Sulphate 3400 IU, Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU, Bacitracin Zinc 400 IU & Hydrocortisone 10 mg
medicines.description: Nosramycin-H eye ointment contains Neomycin, Polymyxin & Bacitracin three antibiotics which together offers broad spectrum of anti-bacterial activity & Hydrocortisone, a mild steroid that relieves redness, allergy & swelling in the eyes. It is prescribed for almost all types of superficial infections of external eye/s, where inflammation is present markedly.
medicines.sideEffects: Allergic reactions, eye irritation, itching & swelling are the main side effects.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN (5g/10g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Neomycin 3400 U, Polymyxin B 5000 U & Bacitracin 400 U.
medicines.description: Nosramycin Ointment is a combination of three antibiotics: Bacitracin, Neomycin and Polymyxin B, which works by stopping the growth of infection-causing bacteria on your skin. It is used to treat various types of bacterial skin infections. It minimizes symptoms of skin infection such as redness, swelling, itching, etc., by acting against the infection-causing microorganisms.
medicines.sideEffects: The combination is safe to use with no side effects.

medicines.name: CHLORODEX-P
medicines.composition: Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU & Chloramphenicol 1.0% w/v, Phenylmercuric Nitrate 0.001%w/v
medicines.description: This triple combination is used in the treatment of bacterial eye infections. It works by killing the bacteria or stopping their growth in the affected area. Chloramphenicol is an antibiotic that inhibits bacterial growth by preventing the synthesis of proteins required by bacteria to carry out their vital functions. Phenyl Mercuric Nitrate is an antimicrobial preservative. Polymyxin B is an antibiotic that disrupts the outer cell membrane of certain (gram negative bacteria), and inhibits respiration of bacterial cells.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye irritation, Irritation of ear, Watery eyes, Burning sensation

medicines.name: CHLORODEX-DX
medicines.composition: Polymyxin B Sulphate 5000 IU, Chloramphenicol 4 mg & Dexamethasone 1 mg
medicines.description: Chlorodex-DX is a combination of two antibiotics (Chloramphenicol , Polymyxin B) and a steroid ( Dexamethasone ). The antibiotics work by killing the bacteria or stopping their growth. Together, they treat your infection effectively. The steroid blocks the production of certain chemical messengers (prostaglandins) that make the affected area red, swollen and itchy.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common side effects include burning sensation, irritation, itching, and redness at the application site.

medicines.name: ENLIZER 3C
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of sugar free syrup contains Potassium Citrate 550 mg, Sodium Citrate 500 mg & Citric acid 334 mg
medicines.description: Enlizer 3C syrup contains Potassium citrate, Sodium citrate and Citric acid. They act together to balance pH of urine to treat the accumulation of acid in the body caused by kidney failure. It helps in conditions when long term maintenance of alkaline urine is desirable like in treatment of patients with uric acid and cystic stones of the urinary tract along with uric acid drugs in gout therapy to prevent damage to kidneys by uric acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are chest Pain, confusion, feeling lightheaded, fast or irregular heartbeat, tingling, numbness in the hands or feet and weakness.

medicines.name: ENLIZER-B6
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Potassium Citrate 1100 mg, Magnesium Citrate 375 mg & Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Enlizer-B6 is a Urinary Alkalizer that is indicated for the management of Calcium oxalate stone & uric acid stone with or without calcium stones in kidney or urinary bladder. It is also indicated for Renal tubular acidosis with calcium stones.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.name: ALKAZIP-3C (100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Potassium Citrate 550 mg, Sodium Citrate 500 mg & Citric acid 334 mg (SUGAR FREE)
medicines.description: Alkazip-3C syrup contains Potassium citrate, Sodium citrate and Citric acid. They act together to balance pH of urine to treat the accumulation of acid in the body caused by kidney failure. It helps in conditions when long term maintenance of alkaline urine is desirable like in treatment of patients with uric acid and cystic stones of the urinary tract along with uric acid drugs in gout therapy to prevent damage to kidneys by uric acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are chest Pain, confusion, feeling lightheaded, fast or irregular heartbeat, tingling, numbness in the hands or feet and weakness.

medicines.name: ALKAZIP-B6 (100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Potassium Citrate 1100 mg, Magnesium Citrate 375 mg & Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Alkazip-B6 is a Urinary Alkalizer that is indicated for the management of Calcium oxalate stone & uric acid stone with or without calcium stones in kidney or urinary bladder. It is also indicated for Renal tubular acidosis with calcium stones.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.name: ENLIZER-B6 TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Potassium Magnesium Citrate 978 mg & Vitamin B6 15 mg (Dispersible Tablet)
medicines.description: Enlizer-B6 is a Urinary Alkalizer that contains Potassium Citrate, Magnesium Citrate & Pyridoxine HCl which helps in the management of Oxalate, Uric acid & Calcium stones. Enlizer-B6 tablets acts by enhancing the excretion of citrate ions via urine leading to reduced formation of stones in kidney. Enlizer-B6 tablets used as an adjunct in UTI cases, relieves burning micturition & helps in urolithiasis.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.name: ALKAZIP-B6 TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated dispersible tablet contains Potassium Magnesium Citrate 978 mg & Vitamin B6 15 mg

Alkazip-B6 tablets acts by enhancing the excretion of citrate ions via urine leading to reduced formation of stones in kidney. Alkazip-B6 tablets used as an adjunct in UTI cases, relieves burning micturition & helps in urolithiasis.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.name: VELNOCRAN SOLUTION
medicines.composition: Each 15 ml of solution contains Cranberry extract 200 mg, D-Mannose 300 mg & Potassium Magnesium Citrate 978 mg eq. to Potassium 273.84 mg & Magnesium 41.56 mg.
medicines.description: Velnocran solution is either used alone or in combination with other medications to prevent & treat UTI, kidney stones & for urinary alkalinization. It prevents the adhesion of the disease causing bacteria in the urinary tract and lowers the raised pH of the urine to induce urinary alkalosis.
medicines.sideEffects: It is highly tolerated and at prescribed dosage side effects are rare. But occasional gastrointestinal upset like nausea, bloating or gas & Allergic reactions such as rash, itching, swelling, dizziness or difficulty breathing may occur.
medicines.dosage: 15 to 30 ml twice daily for 7 to 14 days.

It is indicated in cases of respiratory tract infections, skin and skin structure infections
medicines.sideEffects: The most common adverse reactions with Cefuroxime & Clavulanic acid combination are fungal overgrowth, headache, dizziness, gastrointestinal disturbances and transient rise in liver enzymes.

medicines.name: CEFITAXE-CV TABLETS

It is prescribed in case of resistant respiratory tract infection, urinary tract infection and other general infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, dizziness, diarrhea, loose stools, abdominal pain, nausea, vomiting, dyspepsia & flatulence.

medicines.name: ZEFWAY-CV TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cefixime 200 mg & Potassium Clavulanate diluted eq. to Clavulanic acid 125 mg
medicines.description: Zefway-CV range contains Cefixime along with Clavulanic acid, a beta lactamase inhibitor that acts by stopping the enzymes of the resistant disease causing bacteria to break Cefixime so that it can act freely. It is prescribed in case of resistant respiratory tract infection, urinary tract infection and other general infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are headache, dizziness, diarrhea, loose stools, abdominal pain, nausea, vomiting, dyspepsia & flatulence.

medicines.name: CAVMOX-CV DROPS DRY SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 1 ml of reconstituted suspension contains Amoxycillin 80 mg & Potassium Clavulanate 11.4 mg
medicines.description: Cavmox-CV drops are combination of Amoxycillin, a Penicillin antibiotic with Clavulanic acid, a beta-lactam inhibitor. Cavmox-CV is a broad spectrum antibiotic having extensive usage, but used in cases of difficult infections of kids, adolescents & adults.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of this combination are Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain. Otherwise it is well tolerated.

medicines.name: EVOXIL-CV 1.2 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Amoxycillin Sodium eq. to Amoxycillin 1 g & sterile Potassium Clavulanate eq. to Clavulanic acid 200 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Evoxil tablet, duos tablet & syrup, dispersible tablet, injection & dry syrup are combination of Amoxycillin, a Penicillin antibiotic with Clavulanic acid, a beta-lactam inhibitor. Cavmox is a broad spectrum antibiotic having extensive usage, but used in cases of difficult infections of kids, adolescents & adults.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of this combination are Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain. Otherwise it is well tolerated.

medicines.name: EVOXIL-CV DROPS
medicines.composition: Each 1 ml of reconstituted suspension contains Amoxycillin 80 mg & Potassium Clavulanate 11.4 mg
medicines.description: Evoxil-CV drops are combination of Amoxycillin, a Penicillin antibiotic with Clavulanic acid, a beta-lactam inhibitor. Evoxil-CV is a broad spectrum antibiotic having extensive usage, but used in cases of difficult infections of kids, adolescents & adults.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of this combination are Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain. Otherwise it is well tolerated.

medicines.name: EVOXIL-CV 600 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Amoxycillin (Sterile) 500 mg & Potassium Clavulanate (Sterile) 100 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Evoxil–CV 600 Injection combines Amoxicillin, a broad-spectrum penicillin antibiotic, with Potassium Clavulanate, a β-lactamase inhibitor. Together, they treat a wide range of bacterial infections that are resistant to amoxicillin alone. This combination is effective against respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and intra-abdominal infections which are caused by β-lactamase-producing bacteria.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects of this combination are Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain that may occur, otherwise it is well tolerated.

medicines.name: CAVMOX-CV 600 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Amoxycillin (Sterile) 500 mg & Potassium Clavulanate (Sterile) 100 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cavmox–CV 600 Injection combines Amoxicillin, a broad-spectrum penicillin antibiotic, with Potassium Clavulanate, a β-lactamase inhibitor. Together, they treat a wide range of bacterial infections that are resistant to amoxicillin alone. This combination is effective against respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and intra-abdominal infections which are caused by β-lactamase-producing bacteria.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects of this combination are Diarrhea, Nausea, Vomiting & Abdominal pain that may occur, otherwise it is well tolerated.

medicines.name: CEKODA-CV DUOS DRY SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of reconstituted suspension contains Cefpodoxime 100 mg & Clavulanic Acid 62.5 mg (With WFR)
medicines.description: Cekoda-CV DUOS contains Cefpodoxime, a third generation cephalosporin & Clavulanic acid, a betalactamases inhibitor that acts synergistically to cure ear nose & throat infections, urinary tract infection, skin and soft tissue infection, respiratory tract infections & reproductive tract infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of the combination are Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vaginal fungal infections, abdominal pain & Headache.

medicines.name: LUBIVIEW EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Polyvinyl alcohol 14 mg & Povidone 6 mg
medicines.description: Lubiview eye drop contains Polyvinyl alcohol & Povidone, they act together as eye lubricant and prevent eye dryness & irritation. Lubiview eye drops are used to relieve dry, irritated and discomforted eyes due to wind, sun, heating/air conditioning, computer use, long reading, two wheeler driving without eye protection and certain medications. It is also used as a tear substitute & to prevent above mention problem of eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Vision may be temporarily blurred as well as burning/stinging/irritation may temporarily occur & are the main side effects.

medicines.name: LEEZOLE TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated vaginal tablet contains Clotrimazole 200 mg, Tinidazole 600 mg & Povidone Iodine 200 mg
medicines.description: Leezole Vaginal tablets contain Clotrimazole an antifungal, Tinidazole an anti-protozoal and Povidone iodine an antiseptic. Leezole tablet is used to treat mild to moderate infections of Vagina and Vaginal Canal such as mixed vaginal infections, Bacterial vaginosis and Vaginal candidiasis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Vaginal burning sensation, Itching and Irritation

medicines.name: PURADINE-5% OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g contains Povidone Iodine 5% w/w eq. to Iodine 0.5% w/w
medicines.description: Puradine-5% ointment contains Povidone Iodine, an antiseptic agent that kills bacteria and fungus to eradicate skin infections in wide variety of conditions. It is prescribed for treatment or prevention of infection in minor cuts, abrasions, minor surgical procedures and small areas of burns. Also used in treatment of fungal and bacterial skin infections & leg ulcers.
medicines.sideEffects: Local swelling, irritation, itching and rash is the main side effects.

medicines.name: PURADINE POWDER

medicines.description: Puradine-OZ ointment contains Povidone Iodine, an antiseptic agent that kills bacteria and fungus to eradicate skin infections in wide variety of conditions & Ornidazole, an antiprotozoal drug that also acts on specialized group of bacteria not covered by Povidone. It is prescribed for treatment & prevention of infections such as cuts, abrasions, post-surgical procedures dressing, burns, infected wounds & diabetic foot ulcers.

This combination combines anti-inflammatory, antibiotic, antiseptic, and pain-relieving properties. Prednisolone reduces inflammation, Chloramphenicol fights bacterial infections, Acetic Acid prevents fungal growth, and Benzocaine provides quick pain relief. Aqua Ear-Plus ear drops helps treat ear infections and associated symptoms effectively.
