This combination is specially formulated to provide relief in neuropathic pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation, rashes, redness of skin, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: PEGABANYL-DX CAPSULES
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Pregabalin 75 mg & Duloxetine (as delayed release pellets) 20mg.
medicines.description: Pegabanyl-DX capsules are combination product that is used for the treatment of chronic pain in Fibromyalgia, Neuropathies of all sorts and certain other central pain syndromes.
medicines.sideEffects: The side effects observed are sedation and somnolence etc.

medicines.name: PEGABANYL-ET
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Pregabalin (PR) 75 mg & Etoricoxib 60 mg
medicines.description: Pegabanyl- ET Tablet is a combination of Pregabalin in prolonged release form & Etoricoxib a COX 2 inhibitor used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia & fibromyalgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain, swelling of your hands or feet Irregular heartbeat (arrhythmia) and cold or flu-like symptoms.

medicines.name: THYROACTIV-12.5
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Thyroxine Sodium eq. to Thyroxine 12.5 mcg
medicines.description: Thyroactiv tablets contain Thyroxine sodium (synthetic form of Thyroxine hormone secreted by Thyroid gland).Thyroxine controls entire metabolic activity of the body and is very important for the proper functioning of our body. It is indicated for the treatment of hypothyroidism in adults and also in congenital hypothyroidism.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are increased appetite, weight variations, headache, vomiting, diarrhoea, changes in menstrual cycle, fever, sensitivity to heat, cramps and mood swings

medicines.name: PREGABANYL-150
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Pregabalin 150 mg
medicines.description: Pregabanyl-150 capsules contain Pregabalin, an antiepileptic and neuropathic pain agent that works by modulating calcium channel activity in the nervous system. It is prescribed for the management of neuropathic pain, fibromyalgia, generalized anxiety disorder, and as adjunctive therapy for partial seizures.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are dizziness, drowsiness, and dry mouth.

medicines.name: PREGABANYL-DXM
medicines.composition: Each capsule contains Pregabalin 75 mg, Duloxetine 20 mg & Mecobalamin 1500 mcg
medicines.description: Pregabanyl-DXM is a triple combination capsule containing Pregabalin, which reduces nerve pain by modulating calcium channels; Duloxetine, a serotonin-norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor (SNRI) effective in managing chronic pain and depression; and Mecobalamin, a neurotropic vitamin that supports nerve regeneration. This combination is prescribed for the treatment of diabetic neuropathy, fibromyalgia, and other chronic neuropathic pain conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are dizziness, nausea, drowsiness, and dry mouth.

medicines.name: PEGABANYL-DXM
medicines.composition: Each capsule contains Pregabalin 75 mg, Duloxetine (as delayed release pellets) 20 mg & Mecobalamin 1500 mcg
medicines.description: Pegabanyl-DXM contains Pregabalin that modulates calcium channels to reduce nerve excitability, Duloxetine inhibits serotonin and norepinephrine reuptake to alleviate pain and improve mood, while Mecobalamin supports nerve regeneration and myelin sheath maintenance. Together, they provide a comprehensive approach to managing conditions like diabetic neuropathy and fibromyalgia.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include nausea, dizziness, dry mouth, fatigue, and somnolence.

medicines.name: LONG DRIVE XT GEL
medicines.composition: Each g of gel contains Lidocaine 2.5% w/w & Prilocaine 2.5% w/w
medicines.description: Long Drive-XT Gel contains Lidocaine and Prilocaine, a topical anaesthetic used to numb the skin before procedures such as injections, minor surgeries, laser treatments & during sexual activities. It works by blocking nerve signals in the treated area, thus providing temporary pain relief. The gel is typically applied before the procedure to ensure effective numbing, helping reduce discomfort during medical treatments & also helps in managing premature ejaculation by temporarily desensitizing the area.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness, swelling, tingling or burning, lightening of the skin may occur apart from local allergic reactions.

medicines.name: FUNTIME-XT GEL
medicines.composition: Each g of gel contains Lidocaine 2.5% w/w & Prilocaine 2.5% w/w
medicines.description: Funtime-XT Gel contains Lidocaine and Prilocaine, a topical anaesthetic used to numb the skin before procedures such as injections, minor surgeries, laser treatments & during sexual activities. It works by blocking nerve signals in the treated area, thus providing temporary pain relief. The gel is typically applied before the procedure to ensure effective numbing, helping reduce discomfort during medical treatments & also helps in managing premature ejaculation by temporarily desensitizing the area.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness, swelling, tingling or burning, lightening of the skin may occur apart from local allergic reactions.

medicines.name: LONG DRIVE - XT SPRAY
medicines.composition: Lidocaine 7.5 mg & Prilocaine 2.5 mg/actuation (Spray)
medicines.description: Long Drive - XT spray is a local anesthetic used to temporarily numb the skin or mucous membranes. Commonly used before minor procedures like injections or laser treatments, it also plays a role in sexual health by helping manage premature ejaculation in men by reducing penile sensitivity and delaying climax.
medicines.sideEffects: May cause mild local irritation, redness, or numbness at the application site.

medicines.name: FUNTIME-XT SPRAY
medicines.composition: Lidocaine 7.5 mg & Prilocaine 2.5 mg/actuation
medicines.description: Funtime XT spray is a local anesthetic used to temporarily numb the skin or mucous membranes. Commonly used before minor procedures like injections or laser treatments, it also plays a role in sexual health by helping manage premature ejaculation in men by reducing penile sensitivity and delaying climax.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild burning, numbness, or redness at the application site. In rare cases, allergic reactions, swelling, or skin irritation may occur. Overuse or improper application on large areas can lead to systemic effects like dizziness or irregular heartbeat.

medicines.name: VOMIRAP-MD
medicines.composition: Each uncoated mouth dissolving tablet contains Prochlorperazine Maleate 5 mg
medicines.description: Vomiford contains Prochlorperazine Maleate which works by blocking D2 dopamine receptors in a specific area of the brain called the chemoreceptor trigger zone (CTZ), thus prevent nausea and vomiting caused by cancer chemotherapy, radiation therapy, and surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, constipation, weakness, tiredness, chills and drowsiness.

medicines.name: VOMIRAP
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Prochlorperazine Maleate 12.5 mg in 1 ml ampoule
medicines.description: Vomirap contains Prochlorperazine Maleate which works by blocking D2 dopamine receptors in a specific area of the brain called the chemoreceptor trigger zone (CTZ), thus prevent nausea and vomiting caused by cancer chemotherapy, radiation therapy, and surgery
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, constipation, weakness, tiredness, chills and drowsiness.

medicines.name: FUMA PLUS SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Promethazine Hydrochloride 5 mg
medicines.description: Mexiphen and Fuma Plus contains Promethazine which is a first generation anti-histaminic used to relieve the symptoms of allergic reactions such as allergic rhinitis, allergic conjunctivitis, allergic skin reactions, and allergic reactions of blood or plasma. It is also used to relax and sedate patients before and after surgery, during labor, and at other times. It is also indicated to prevent and control nausea and vomiting that may occur after surgery, and with other medications to help relieve pain after surgery. It is also used to prevent and treat motion sickness.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, drowsiness, difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep, nightmares, dizziness, ringing in ears, blurred or double vision, loss of coordination, nausea, vomiting, nervousness, restlessness and itching.

medicines.name: MEXIPHEN-MD
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Promethazine Theoclate 25 mg
medicines.description: Mexiphen and Fuma Plus contains Promethazine which is a first generation anti-histaminic used to relieve the symptoms of allergic reactions such as allergic rhinitis, allergic conjunctivitis, allergic skin reactions, and allergic reactions of blood or plasma. It is also used to relax and sedate patients before and after surgery, during labor, and at other times. It is also indicated to prevent and control nausea and vomiting that may occur after surgery, and with other medications to help relieve pain after surgery. It is also used to prevent and treat motion sickness.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, drowsiness, difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep, nightmares, dizziness, ringing in ears, blurred or double vision, loss of coordination, nausea, vomiting, nervousness, restlessness and itching.

medicines.name: NITOCALM-P 0.25
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etizolam 0.25 mg & Propranolol 20 mg
medicines.description: Nitocalm-P tablet contains Etizolam, an anxiolytic drug that acts by altering the brain chemical levels & Propranolol, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. It is prescribed for Anxiety disorder, high BP, tremors & Migraine etc.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are decreased heart rate, impaired coordination, Sleepiness, yawning, decreased appetite, nausea, vomiting, dry mouth & headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: NITOCALM-P 0.5
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etizolam 0.5 mg & Propranolol 20 mg
medicines.description: Nitocalm-P tablet contains Etizolam, an anxiolytic drug that acts by altering the brain chemical levels & Propranolol, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. It is prescribed for Anxiety disorder, high BP, tremors & Migraine etc.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are decreased heart rate, impaired coordination, Sleepiness, yawning, decreased appetite, nausea, vomiting, dry mouth & headache are the main side effects.

medicines.name: PRAZONAL
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Alprazolam 0.25 mg & Propranolol Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Prazonal tablet contains Alprazolam, an anxiolytic drug that acts by altering brain chemicals & Propranolol, a beta blocker that slows heart rate, i.e. number of times it beats. It is prescribed for Migraine, restlessness, tremors, panic attack, high BP & heart pain in anxious patient.
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, light-headedness, depression, dry mouth, nausea, vomiting, constipation, fatigue, tiredness & impaired coordination are the main side effects.

medicines.name: MIGRAFIN-P
medicines.composition: Flunarizine Dihydrochlorde Eq. To Flunarizine 10 mg & Propranolol HCl (SR) 40 mg (Alu Alu)
medicines.description: Migrafin-P tablet contains Flunarizine & Propranolol, both are anti-migraine drugs & relieves Migraine by synergistic action for better relief. It is prescribed to treat migraine with severe and disabling neurological symptoms (migraine with aura or one-sided weakness) with dizziness or vertigo.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are tiredness, drowsiness, weight gain, low mood & slow heart rate.

medicines.name: PROPIBEAT-40 SR
medicines.composition: Each uncoated sustained release tablet contains Propranolol 40 mg
medicines.description: Propibeat-40 SR is our brand of sustained release Propranolol, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the number of times the heart beats in a minute and thus reduces heart rate, blood pressure, and strain on the heart. Propibeat is used to treat high blood pressure, Arrhythmia (irregular heartbeats), shaking (tremors), migraine, angina and is used after a heart attack to improve the chance of survival from cardiovascular complication.
medicines.sideEffects: Being a sustained release formulation, it is very well tolerated, the main observed side effects are lightheadedness, tiredness, nausea, stomach pain & vision changes.

medicines.name: PROPIBEAT-20
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Propranolol 20 mg
medicines.description: Propibeat-20 is our brand of Propranolol, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the number of times the heart beats in a minute and thus reduces heart rate, blood pressure, and strain on the heart. Propibeat is used to treat high blood pressure, Arrhythmia (irregular heartbeats), shaking (tremors), migraine, angina and is used after a heart attack to improve the chance of survival from cardiovascular complication.
medicines.sideEffects: Although the drug is quite safe and very well tolerated, the main observed side effects are dizziness, lightheadedness, tiredness, nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, vision changes, trouble sleeping & unusual dreams may occur.

medicines.name: RETALVIT SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml syrup contains Cyanocobalamin 3 mcg, Thiamine Hydrochloride 2.5 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 1 mg, Lysine Hydrochloride 375 mg, Nicotinamide 25 mg, Riboflavin 3.5 mg & D-Panthenol 3 mg.
medicines.description: Retalvit syrup is a combination of B vitamins with Lysine. Retalvit is used to treat or prevent vitamin deficiency due to poor diet, certain illnesses, alcoholism, or during pregnancy. Vitamins are important building blocks of the body and helps to keep you in good health. Retalvit also helps in boosting immunity, body energy levels and supports normal cognitive function.
medicines.sideEffects: Retalvit syrup generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your Doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: TINFAL FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 10 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 50 mg, Calcium Pantothenate 100 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to elemental Selenium 65 mcg , Cupric Oxide eq. to elemental Copper 3 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg
medicines.description: Tinfal Forte tablet contains Biotin & Calcium Pantothenate, both are B group vitamins to regulate metabolism and aid in growth of hair; N-Acetyl Cysteine, an antioxidant that prevents damage to hair follicle & Selenium, Copper & Zinc, three antioxidant elements that stops free radical damage to hair and aid in their growth. It is prescribed for general growth & well-being, chronic diseases & for maintenance of healthy hair, skin and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach discomfort, pain and bloating are the few observed side effects.

medicines.name: ACTIHAIR PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 10 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 50 mg, Calcium Pantothenate 100 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to elemental Selenium 65 mcg , Cupric Oxide eq. to elemental Copper 3 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg
medicines.description: Actihair Plus tablet contains Biotin & Calcium Pantothenate, both are B group vitamins to regulate metabolism and aid in growth of hair; N-Acetyl Cysteine, an antioxidant that prevents damage to hair follicle & Selenium, Copper & Zinc, three antioxidant elements that stops free radical damage to hair and aid in their growth. It is prescribed for general growth & well-being, chronic diseases & for maintenance of healthy hair, skin and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach discomfort, pain and bloating are the few observed side effects.

medicines.name: DIAPERGUARD
medicines.composition: Each g contains Aloevera 12.0% w/w, Zinc Oxide 7.0% w/w, Vitamin A 0.0118% w/w, Vitamin E 2% w/w, Nicotinamide 1% w/w, D-Panthenol 1% w/w & Magnesium Sulphate Heptahydrate 2% w/w
medicines.description: Diapergard cream contains Aloevera, a skin nourisher & soother; Zinc Oxide, an antibacterial; Vitamin A & Vitamin E, are skin nourisher; Nicotinamide, reduces redness, swelling & thus heals skin; D-Panthenol, improved hydration, elasticity and texture & Magnesium Sulphate soothes irritated skin. It is used for the treatment of all types of Rashes, Inflammation & Erythema associated with diaper use in adults, children and neonates & with tight clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Change wet and soiled diapers promptly, clean the diaper area with warm water, dry the area completely. Apply gently on the affected area as often as necessary with each diaper change especially at night time when exposure to wet diaper is prolonged. At the surfaces with marks of tight clothing, gently apply the cream and wear loose clothing.

medicines.name: RETALVIT PLUS SYRUP (200 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Vitamin A Concentrate (Oily Form)(as Palmitate) 2500 IU, Vitamin E Acetate 5 IU, Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) 200 IU, Thiamine Hydrochloride 1 mg, Riboflavin Sodium Phosphate Eq. to Riboflavin 1 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 1 mg, Niacinamide 15 mg, Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) 1 mcg, D-Panthenol 2.5 mg, Zinc (as Zinc Sulphate) 3 mg, Iodine (as Potassium Iodide) 50 mcg, Manganese (as Manganese Chloride) 0.8 mg, Molybdenum (as Sodium Molybdate Dihydrate) 8 mcg, Selenium (as Sodium Selenite Pentahydrate) 10 mcg & Lysine Hydrochloride 30 mg
medicines.description: Retalvit plus syrup contains Vitamins, minerals with Beta-Carotene and L-lysine. Retalvit Plus enhance different immune functions, support normal cognitive function, defend against oxidative stress, improve body?s resistance to infections, maintains energy levels and improves appetite.
medicines.sideEffects: Retalvit Plus Syrup generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: CATAFORD EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Potassium Iodide 3.30% w/v, Calcium Chloride 1% w/v, Sodium Chloride 0.83% w/v
medicines.description: Cataford eye drop contains Potassium Iodide, Calcium Chloride & Sodium Chloride; all of which are electrolytes and is responsible for lens clarity & pressure within them so as to prevent Cataract. It is prescribed for clarity of lens membranes pre & postoperatively for clear vision in Cataract; in all patients where Cataract operation is postponed due to any reason & it also delays Cataract formation, maintains normal lens nutrition & prevents eye sight deterioration in Cataract.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild eye irritation is the only reported side effects.

medicines.name: DANTOX EXPERT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Tannic acid Glycerin 66 30% w/v, Iodine 0.3% w/v, Potassium Iodide 0.5% w/v, Thymol 0.05% w/v, Menthol 0.08% w/v & Glycerin 100% QS v/v
medicines.description: Dantox expert gum paint contains Tannic acid Glycerin, Iodine, Potassium Iodide, Thymol, Menthol & Glycerin. Tannic acid glycerin acts by healing sores and treating bleeding gums; Iodine, Potassium iodide & Thymol acts as antibacterial; Iodine & Menthol together act as counterirritant to relieve irritation and offer a soothing effect. This product is prescribed for spongy gums, bleeding gums, sores on gums & pus coming out of gums.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Clean your hands thoroughly and wipe it. Take a drop or two on your finger tips of Dantox gum paint and apply at the lesion or take a larger quantity and apply on the infected gums or as required. It can be applied two to three times a day depending upon severity of disease. You can use it for 3 to 5 days continuously or may be little longer.

Enzomagic capsule is used for the treatment of indigestion, flatulence, hyperacidity, bloating and stomach cramps due to indigestion. It also helps to increase appetite.

It also increases appetite and maintains the metabolic activities of body.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are acute toxicity, skin rashes, nausea, diarrhea, constipation, abdominal pain, severe dizziness, nausea and Joint pain.

It is also increases appetite of body and maintains the metabolic activities of body.
medicines.sideEffects: It is well tolerated only observed side effects are diarrhea, abdominal pain or cramps and nausea.
medicines.dosage: Take one teaspoon full after meals twice daily.

It also improves intestinal health and immunity.
medicines.sideEffects: It can cause gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Lacmotop.

medicines.name: AVINORM
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Doxylamine Succinate 10 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 10 mg & Folic acid 2.5 mg
medicines.description: Avinorm contains Doxylamine, an anti-histaminic along with Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6) & Folic acid. It is indicated for the treatment and management of nausea and vomiting during first trimester of pregnancy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, and throat, drowsiness, headache, restlessness, dizziness, muscle pain or weakness, stomach pain, constipation, diarrhea and rash.

medicines.name: MEDOC-AT TABLET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 100 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 3 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg & Vit D3 1000 IU
medicines.description: Medoc-AT Tablet contains Methylcobalamin (Vitamin B12), Alpha Lipoic acid an antioxidant along with other B vitamins. Medoc-AT tablets are useful in the management of Diabetic neuropathy, Alcohol induced neuropathy, Vitamin B12 deficiency, Postherpetic neuropathy and drug induced neuropathy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: ENLIZER-B6
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Potassium Citrate 1100 mg, Magnesium Citrate 375 mg & Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Enlizer-B6 is a Urinary Alkalizer that is indicated for the management of Calcium oxalate stone & uric acid stone with or without calcium stones in kidney or urinary bladder. It is also indicated for Renal tubular acidosis with calcium stones.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.name: NUTIACTIV
medicines.composition: Each capsule contains Ascorbic Acid 40 mg, Nicotinamide 15 mg, Calcium D-Pantothenate 5 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 2 mg, Riboflavin 1.1 mg, Thiamine Mononitrate 1 mg, Folic acid 100 mcg, Cyanocobalamin 1 mcg, Elemental Zinc 12 mg, Elemental Copper 1.35 mg & Selenium 40 mcg
medicines.description: Nutiactiv capsule contains Ascorbic Acid, Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6), Selenium, Nicotinamide (Vitamin B3), Riboflavin (Vitamin B2), Zinc, Copper, Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Folic Acid (Vitamin B9). Nutiactiv helps maintain healthy nervous system, immune system, protects against oxidative damage caused due to stress and helps in maintaining healthy sugar levels in diabetes. It is also used as supplement when mineral & vitamin requirements of the body are high such as in nutrient malabsorption, after surgery, during pregnancy and lactation.
medicines.sideEffects: Nutiactiv capsule generally works well when used within recommended dose. Still, you may sometimes experience side effects such as headache, dizziness, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain or discomfort, irritation, sleepiness, skin rash and itching.
medicines.dosage: One capsule daily with food, or as directed by physician

medicines.name: NUTIACTIV-Z
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 3 mg, Nicotinamide 100 mg, Cyanocobalamin 15 mcg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, Chromium Picolinate 250 mcg eq. to elemental Chromium 31.1 mcg, Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate 61.8 mg eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg & Selenous acid eq. to elemental Selenium 100 mcg
medicines.description: Nutiactiv-Z tablet contains Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6), Selenium, Chromium, Nicotinamide (Vitamin B3), Zinc, Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Folic Acid (Vitamin B9). Nutiactiv-Z helps maintain healthy nervous system, immune system, protects against oxidative damage caused due to stress and helps in maintaining healthy sugar levels in diabetes. It is also used as supplement when mineral & vitamin requirements of the body are high such as in nutrient malabsorption, after surgery, during pregnancy and lactation.
medicines.sideEffects: Nutiactiv-Z tablets generally works well when used within recommended dose. Still, you may sometimes experience side effects such as headache, dizziness, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain or discomfort, irritation, sleepiness, skin rash and itching.

medicines.name: ALKAZIP-B6 (100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Potassium Citrate 1100 mg, Magnesium Citrate 375 mg & Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Alkazip-B6 is a Urinary Alkalizer that is indicated for the management of Calcium oxalate stone & uric acid stone with or without calcium stones in kidney or urinary bladder. It is also indicated for Renal tubular acidosis with calcium stones.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are abdominal cramping, constipation, electrolyte imbalance, gas (flatulence) & nausea.

medicines.name: MEDOC-PLUS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated mouth dissolving tablet contains Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg, Folic acid 5 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Medoc Plus Tablet with Mecobalamin, Folic Acid & Pyridoxine Hydrochloride is a prescription medicine which has a combination of nutritional supplements that is used in the treatment of nutritional deficiencies. It contains nutritional supplements that are important for the treatment and management of anemia and helps in proper growth and development of the body.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite and headache.

medicines.name: CONTOURED LUMBO SACRAL BELT
medicines.composition: N.A.
medicines.description: Contoured Lumbo Sacral Belt with aluminium splint for firm support in cases of physical, medical & surgical rehabilitation. SIZES AVAILABLE: S, M, L & XL
medicines.sideEffects: N.A.

medicines.name: FOLIGRACE SG
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains L-Methyl Folate 1 mg, Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg & Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate 500 mcg
medicines.description: Foligrace SG softgel capsule contains bioactive forms of Vit. B6, B9 & B12 for better absorption and speedy action. It is prescribed for Diabetes, Diabetic neuropathy, Cardiovascular diseases, Hyperhomocysteinemia, Complications of Pregnancy (NTDs, Spontaneous miscarriage, Recurrent abortion, IUGR, Pre-eclampsia, Pre-term labour & Other Congenital defects), Osteoporosis, Cognitive impairment & Depression.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated and has no side effects

medicines.name: FOLIGRACE-DHA
medicines.composition: Each soft gel capsule contains L-Methylfolate 1000 mcg, Mecobalamin 1500 mcg, Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate 500 mcg, DHA (40%) 200 mg & Vitamin-D3 2000 IU
medicines.description: Foligrace-DHA softgel contains bioactive forms of Folic acid, Pyridoxine & B12 along with Vit. D3 & DHA, a form of highly important Omega-3-FA component. Together as a formulation they offer better absorption, speedy action & better health maintenance than their counterparts. It is prescribed for Complications of Pregnancy (NTDs, Spontaneous miscarriage, Recurrent abortion, IUGR, Pre-eclampsia, Pre-term labour & Other diseases), Diabetes, Diabetic Retinopathy, Cardiovascular diseases, Hyperhomocysteinemia, Osteoporosis, Cognitive impairment & Depression.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated and has no known side effects

medicines.name: FEMIVIN-D
medicines.composition: Each soft gel capsule contains L-Methylfolate 1000 mcg, Mecobalamin 1500 mcg, Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate 500 mcg, DHA (40%) 200 mg & Vitamin-D3 2000 IU
medicines.description: Femivin-D softgel capsule contains bioactive forms of Folic acid, Pyridoxine & B12 along with Vit. D3 & DHA, a form of highly important Omega-3-FA component. Together as a formulation they offer better absorption, speedy action & better health maintenance than their counterparts. It is prescribed in Complications of Pregnancy (NTDs, Spontaneous miscarriage, Recurrent abortion, IUGR, Pre-eclampsia, Pre-term labour & other diseases), Diabetes, Diabetic Retinopathy, Cardiovascular diseases, Hyperhomocysteinemia, Osteoporosis, Cognitive impairment & Depression.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated and has no known side effects

medicines.name: FEMIVIN-L
medicines.composition: Each soft gelatin capsule contains L-Methyl Folate 1 mg, Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg & Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate 500 mcg
medicines.description: Femivin-L softgel capsule contains bioactive forms of Vit. B6, B9 & B12 for better absorption and speedy action. It is prescribed for Diabetes, Diabetic neuropathy, Cardiovascular diseases, Hyperhomocysteinemia, Complications of Pregnancy (NTDs, Spontaneous miscarriage, Recurrent abortion, IUGR, Pre-eclampsia, Pre-term labour & Other Congenital defects), Osteoporosis, Cognitive impairment & Depression.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated and has no side effects

medicines.name: FEMIVIN-XT
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Calcium carbonate eq. to el. Calcium 500 mg, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg, L-Methylfolate Calcium 1 mg & Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate 20 mg
medicines.description: Femivin-XT tablet is an ideal combination to treat bone related problems and is used for bone health. Femivin-XT tablet contains Calcium, Vit. D3 along with bioactive forms of Folic acid, Vit. B12 & Vit. B6 for better efficacy & faster results. It is used for hyperhomocysteinemia induced osteoporosis, Senile osteoporosis, Bone fracture Hypocalcemia & Post-menopausal osteoporosis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated. Few side effects are constipation, dyspepsia, flatulence, nausea, abdominal pain & diarrhoea.

medicines.name: FOLIGRACE-XT TABLET
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Calcium carbonate 1250 mg eq. to el. Calcium 500 mg, Vitamin D3 2000 IU, Methylcobalamin 1500 mcg, L-Methylfolate Calcium 1 mg & Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate 20 mg
medicines.description: Foligrace-XT tablet is an ideal combination to treat bone related problems and is used for bone health. Foligrace-XT tablet contains Calcium, Vit. D3 along with bioactive forms of Folic acid, Vit. B12 & Vit. B6 for better efficacy & faster results. It is used for hyperhomocysteinemia induced osteoporosis, Senile osteoporosis, Bone fracture Hypocalcemia & Post-menopausal osteoporosis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated few side effects are constipation, dyspepsia, flatulence, nausea, abdominal pain & diarrhea.

medicines.name: ETAZYME
medicines.composition: Each sugar coated tablet contains Fungal Diastase (1:800) 100 mg, Papain 60 mg & Activated Charcoal 75 mg
medicines.description: Etazyme tablets contains Fungal diastase which is a potent enzyme complex, used as effective digestive aid, and digests (or breakdown) carbohydrates, Papain helps in protein digestion by breaking larger molecules into smaller one & Activated charcoal helps to bind unwanted substances and toxins in the stomach and flush them out of the body. Etazyme tablets are used for functional dyspepsia and other gastrointestinal disorders characterized by symptoms of bloating, belching, flatulence, abdominal discomfort or feeling of abdominal fullness.
medicines.sideEffects: It is well tolerated only observed side effects are diarrhea, abdominal pain or cramps and nausea.
medicines.dosage: Two tablets to be taken together after each major meal.

medicines.name: GASOWEL TAB
medicines.composition: Each effervescent tablet contains Papain 60 mg, Fungal Diastase (1:1200) 20 mg & Simethicone 25 mg (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Gasowel Effervescent tablet is a water dissolving formula that helps in relieving acidity, gas and indigestion. Gasowel contains natural enzymes like Papain and Fungal Diastase to cure indigestion and Simethicone which makes an easier passage for gas and hence gives relief from flatulence and fullness of stomach.
medicines.sideEffects: Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: ELOSONE-HT SOAP
medicines.composition: Each soap contains Curcumin, Aloe vera, Vit C, Vit. E, Papain, Glycerin & Liquorice extract
medicines.description: Elosone-HT soap contains Curcumin that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Aloe Vera & Vit. E, nourishes skin and revitalize it; Vit C, Papain & Liquorice extract stops melanin production, removes blemishes and brightens skin & Glycerin moisturizes it for overall glow and shine. It is used for having lighten, brighten & spotless glowing skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use it as a regular soap for washing face; use it twice a day for best result. It can be used as a regular bathing soap for nourishing, revitalising & glowing body skin that radiates. Safe for regular usage in long term, as contains all natural ingredients.

medicines.name: ULTRABRITE SOAP
medicines.composition: Each Soap contains Curcumin, Aloe vera, Vit C, Papain, Vit E,Glycerin & Liquorice extract
medicines.description: Ultrabrite soap contains Curcumin, that reduces redness, swelling & itching; Aloe Vera & Vit. E, nourishes skin and revitalize it; Vit C, Papain & Liquorice extract stops melanin production, removes blemishes and brightens skin & Glycerin moisturizes it for overall glow and shine. Ultrabrite soap is used for having lighten, brighten & spotless glowing skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use Ultrabrite as a regular soap for washing face; use it twice a day for best result. It can be used as a regular bathing soap for nourishing, revitalising & glowing body skin that radiates. Safe for regular usage in long term, as contains all natural ingredients.

medicines.name: ALICTOZYME DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Alpha Amylase 20 mg, Papain 10 mg, Dill oil 2 mg, Anise oil 2 mg & Caraway Oil 2 mg
medicines.description: Alictozyme is a carminative mixture with digestive enzymes, primarily used to treat digestive disorders. Alpha Amylase works by digesting starch, carbohydrates, fats, and Papain is responsible for breakdown of proteins. Seed oils helps in digestion & relief from stomach pain. Alictozyme effectively treats dyspepsia (indigestion), flatulence (gas), and colic pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are acute toxicity, skin rashes, nausea, diarrhea, constipation, abdominal pain, severe dizziness and Joint pain.
medicines.dosage: 5–10 drops to infants and 10–15 drops to children after meals, 2–3 times daily. Shake well before use and administer with the provided dropper. Use only as advised by a physician.

medicines.name: HB FORD PLUS SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Proteolyzed Liver 200 mg (derived from not less than 1.2 gm of fresh liver having Vit. B12 activity eq. to 0.8 mcg), Peptone 200 mg, Ferric Ammonium Citrate 53.4 mg eq. to elemental Iron 11.48 mg & Folic acid 0.17 mg (Natural Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: HB ford Plus Syrup contains hydrolyzed Proteins, Iron, Vitamin B12 and folic acid.HB ford Plus Syrup is indicated in Hypoproteinemia (condition in which a person has very low levels of protein in the blood) and related Iron deficiency especially in pregnancy and lactation, Iron deficiency anaemia, post-surgical cases.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: IROFORM PLUS
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Proteolyzed Liver 200 mg (derived from not less than 1.2 gm of fresh liver having Vit. B12 activity eq. to 0.8 mcg), Peptone 200 mg, Ferric Ammonium Citrate 53.4 mg eq. to elemental Iron 11.48 mg & Folic acid 0.17 mg ( Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Iroform Plus Syrup contains hydrolyzed Proteins, Iron, Vitamin B12 and Folic acid. Iroform Plus Syrup is indicated in Hypoproteinemia (condition in which a person has very low levels of protein in the blood) and related Iron deficiency especially in pregnancy and lactation, Iron deficiency anaemia, post-surgical cases
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: HB FORD PLUS SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Proteolyzed Liver 200 mg (derived from not less than 1.2 gm of fresh liver having Vit. B12 activity eq. to 0.8 mcg), Peptone 200 mg, Ferric Ammonium Citrate 53.4 mg eq. to elemental Iron 11.48 mg & Folic acid 0.17 mg (Natural Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: HB ford Plus Syrup contains hydrolyzed Proteins, Iron, Vitamin B12 and folic acid.HB ford Plus Syrup is indicated in Hypoproteinemia (condition in which a person has very low levels of protein in the blood) and related Iron deficiency especially in pregnancy and lactation, Iron deficiency anaemia, post-surgical cases.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: IROFORM PLUS
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Proteolyzed Liver 200 mg (derived from not less than 1.2 gm of fresh liver having Vit. B12 activity eq. to 0.8 mcg), Peptone 200 mg, Ferric Ammonium Citrate 53.4 mg eq. to elemental Iron 11.48 mg & Folic acid 0.17 mg ( Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Iroform Plus Syrup contains hydrolyzed Proteins, Iron, Vitamin B12 and Folic acid. Iroform Plus Syrup is indicated in Hypoproteinemia (condition in which a person has very low levels of protein in the blood) and related Iron deficiency especially in pregnancy and lactation, Iron deficiency anaemia, post-surgical cases
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools, abdominal pain, or temporary staining of the teeth.

medicines.name: LUBIVIEW EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Polyvinyl alcohol 14 mg & Povidone 6 mg
medicines.description: Lubiview eye drop contains Polyvinyl alcohol & Povidone, they act together as eye lubricant and prevent eye dryness & irritation. Lubiview eye drops are used to relieve dry, irritated and discomforted eyes due to wind, sun, heating/air conditioning, computer use, long reading, two wheeler driving without eye protection and certain medications. It is also used as a tear substitute & to prevent above mention problem of eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Vision may be temporarily blurred as well as burning/stinging/irritation may temporarily occur & are the main side effects.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC RAPID ACTION SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Diclofenac 2.32% w/v, Methyl Salicylate 10% w/v, Menthol 5% w/v & Absolute Alcohol 10% w/v.
medicines.description: Vovedic Rapid Action Spray is a topical medicine combining Diclofenac, Methyl Salicylate, Menthol and Absolute Alcohol to provide fast-acting relief from muscle and joint pain. A superior non-aqueous formulation, it offers highly effective and quick transdermal absorption. Diclofenac reduces inflammation, Methyl Salicylate and Menthol offer soothing & cooling effects and Absolute Alcohol ensures quick absorption. Its direct application to the affected area ensures effective pain management.
medicines.sideEffects: Application site reactions like itching, irritation, redness, and burning sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT TOOTHPASTE (50 g & 100 g)
medicines.composition: Triclosan 0.3% w/w, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w with Cooling Crystals (Gel Toothpaste)
medicines.description: Ultradent toothpaste is a total daily protection tooth paste that provides overall protection to oral cavity, teeth and gums. Ultradent toothpaste relieves mild sensitivity, removes plaque, freshens breathe and inhibits the growth of cavity causing bacteria besides being a good mouth wash for overall oral hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated without any side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of Ultradent toothpaste onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT INSTA SENSITIVITY TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Insta Sensitive Repair Plus Toothpaste
medicines.description: Ultradent Sensitivity tooth paste is a medicated paste to relieve dental hypersensitivity immediately after application. Ultradent Sensitivity paste acts by making a neurosensory block at the nerve root of tooth & protects from cavity or prevents increase in their size. It also reduces the demineralization of enamel and dentin by decreasing the acid production by harmful bacteria.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Use Ultradent Sensitivity as a regular tooth paste twice daily for increasing protection against sensitivity of teeth to cold, heat, acids, sweets or contact & also helps in the prevention of dental cavities. Apply one inch length of paste onto a soft bristle toothbrush to brush as usual, ensuring to brush all sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing. It not only provides relief in sensitive teeth, but also actually helps repair the sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not use longer than 4 weeks, without dental recommendations. Keep out of reach of children under 6 years of age.

medicines.name: ENSHINE TOOTHPASTE (50g,100g & 150g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Triclosan 0.3%, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w, with cooling crystals ( GEL TOOTHPASTE)
medicines.description: Enshine gel toothpaste is a multi-action formula for healthy teeth and gums. Enshine gel toothpaste relieves mild sensitivity, removes plaque, freshens breath and inhibits the growth of cavity causing bacteria besides providing overall oral hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects & safe to use
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of product onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: DANTOX TOOTHPASTE (50 g & 100 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Triclosan 0.3%, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w, with cooling crystals ( GEL TOOTHPASTE)
medicines.description: Dantox gel toothpaste is a multi-action formula for healthy teeth and gums. Dantox gel toothpaste relieves mild sensitivity, removes plaque, freshens breath and inhibits the growth of cavity causing bacteria besides providing overall oral hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects & safe to use.
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of product onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: DANTOX SENSITIVITY MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Potassium nitrate 3% w/v & sodium fluoride 0.2% w/v
medicines.description: Dantox Sensitivity Mouth Wash combines Potassium Nitrate to reduce tooth sensitivity with Sodium Fluoride to strengthen enamel and prevent cavities. It provides fast-acting relief from sensitivity while promoting overall oral health and freshness.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated; avoid swallowing.
medicines.dosage: Rinse mouth with 10-15 mL of Dantox Sensitivity Mouth Wash for 30 seconds once or twice daily, then spit out. Use regularly for best results.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT SENSITIVITY MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Potassium Nitrate 3% w/v & Sodium Fluoride 0.2% w/v
medicines.description: Ultradent Sensitivity Mouthwash is formulated to provide fast and long-lasting relief from tooth sensitivity. Potassium Nitrate helps soothe nerve endings in exposed dentin, while Sodium Fluoride strengthens enamel and prevents cavities. It also aids in freshening breath, reducing plaque formation, and maintaining overall oral hygiene when used as part of a daily dental care routine.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Rarely, mild irritation or allergic reaction may occur. Discontinue use if sensitivity persists.
medicines.dosage: Use 10–15 ml of Ultradent Sensitivity Mouthwash undiluted, rinse thoroughly for 30 seconds, and spit out. Use twice daily after brushing. Do not swallow.

medicines.name: ALICTOZYME
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Alpha Galactosidase 150 mg, Lipase Enzyme 3 mg, Alpha Amylase Enzyme (1:800) 50 mg, Protease Enzyme 25 mg & Lactase Enzyme 7 mg
medicines.description: Alictozyme Capsules contain a combination of digestive enzymes. It is contains Galactosidase, Lactase & Amylase (these digest carbohydrates), Protease (digests protein), and Lipase (digests fats). Alictozyme is indicated for indigestion, flatulence, bloating, burping and feeling of fullness, abdominal discomfort, heart burn and loss of appetite.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated only observed side effects are diarrhea, abdominal pain or cramps and nausea.
medicines.dosage: About 2-3 Capsules in a day after taking food.

medicines.name: CUREWAX
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Paradichlorobenzene 2% w/v, Benzocaine 2.7% w/v, Chlorobutol 5% w/v & Turpentine oil 15% v/v
medicines.description: Curewax ear drops contain Paradichlorobenzene, Benzocaine, Chlorobutanol & Turpentine oil which together acts synergistically in all-purpose ear drops that eliminates bacterial and fungal infections, eliminates pain & dissolves wax to remove it. It is prescribed for removal of excessive wax from ear canal, to treat milder infections and to stop pain due to any reason within the ear.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, dizziness & earache may occur while using Curewax ear drops.

medicines.name: PEGFORD
medicines.composition: Each 25 ml of solution contains:Polyethylene glycol 13.125 g, Sodium Chloride 0.3507 g, Sodium Bicarbonate 0.1785 g & Potassium Chloride 0.0466 g
medicines.description: Pegford solution contains Polyethylene glycol 3350 an osmotic laxative with electrolytes. It works by causing water to be retained with the stool. Pegford solution is indicated for clearing the colon (bowel) before medical tests such as colonoscopy, barium enema X-ray exam and colon surgery etc. & for the expulsion of toxic ingestions. It is also indicated for the treatment of occasional constipation in Patients above 2 years of age.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, bloating, cramping, gas, diarrhea and hives.

medicines.name: PRULOFORD-1
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Prucalopride 1 mg
medicines.description: Pruloford-1 contains Prucalopride which is a serotonin receptor agonist. It is used to treat chronic idiopathic constipation. It works by increasing the movement of waste through the bowel.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, stomach pain, nausea, diarrhoea & dizziness

medicines.name: PRULOFORD-2
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Prucalopride 2 mg
medicines.description: Pruloford-2 contains Prucalopride which is a serotonin receptor agonist. It is used to treat chronic idiopathic constipation. It works by increasing the movement of waste through the bowel.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, stomach pain, nausea, diarrhoea & dizziness

medicines.name: CALALAYER SPRAY
medicines.composition: Calamine 8% w/v, Light Liquid Paraffin 10% v/v with Pramoxine
medicines.description: Calalayer Spray combines Calamine’s soothing and anti-itch properties with Light Liquid Paraffin’s moisturizing effect. This easy-to-apply spray provides quick relief from itching, dryness, and minor skin irritations while keeping the skin hydrated and calm.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated; rare cases of mild irritation may occur.

medicines.name: ATAZIS CREAM
medicines.composition: Pramoxine HCl, Zinc Oxide & Aloevera Cream
medicines.description: Atazis is a topical formulation combining a local anesthetic (pramoxine), a skin protectant (zinc oxide), and a soothing agent (aloe vera). Pramoxine provides temporary relief from itching and pain due to minor skin irritations such as insect bites, sunburn, and rashes from poison ivy or poison oak.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include mild skin irritation, redness, or stinging at the application site. In rare cases, allergic reactions such as rash, itching, swelling, or difficulty breathing may occur.
medicines.dosage: Apply a thin layer of the cream to the affected area 3 to 4 times daily, or as directed by a healthcare provider. Avoid applying to broken or irritated skin.

medicines.name: I GAT-P EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Gatifloxacin 0.3% w/v & Prednisolone 1% w/v
medicines.description: I Gat-P eye drops contain Gatifloxacin an antibiotic that acts by killing disease causing bacteria & Prednisolone, a steroid that acts by reducing redness, irritation, swelling & allergy in eye. It is prescribed for infection & inflammation related eye conditions or its parts and during post-surgical conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, itching, headache, allergic reactions & development of resistant pathogens on prolong use are the main side effects.

medicines.name: AQUA EAR-PLUS EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Prednisolone 0.5% w/v Chloramphenicol 5% w/v, Acetic acid 2% w/v & Benzocaine 3% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Ear-Plus ear drops contains Prednisolone, Chloramphenicol, Acetic Acid, and Benzocaine. This combination combines anti-inflammatory, antibiotic, antiseptic, and pain-relieving properties. Prednisolone reduces inflammation, Chloramphenicol fights bacterial infections, Acetic Acid prevents fungal growth, and Benzocaine provides quick pain relief. Aqua Ear-Plus ear drops helps treat ear infections and associated symptoms effectively.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness. flaking of skin, stinging sensation, burning sensation. itching sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: EARWEL-PLUS EAR DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Prednisolone 0.5% w/v Chloramphenicol 5% w/v, Acetic acid 2% w/v & Benzocaine 3% w/v
medicines.description: Earwel-Plus ear drops contains Prednisolone, Chloramphenicol, Acetic Acid, and Benzocaine. This combination combines anti-inflammatory, antibiotic, antiseptic, and pain-relieving properties. Prednisolone reduces inflammation, Chloramphenicol fights bacterial infections, Acetic Acid prevents fungal growth, and Benzocaine provides quick pain relief. Earwel-Plus ear drops helps treat ear infections and associated symptoms effectively.
medicines.sideEffects: Redness. flaking of skin, stinging sensation, burning sensation. itching sensation are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: EARWEL-AC
medicines.composition: Chloramphenicol 5% w/v , Benzocaine 1% w/v & Propylene Glycol (as base)
medicines.description: Earwel-AC combines Chloramphenicol’s broad-spectrum antibacterial effect with Benzocaine’s local anesthetic action. Formulated in a propylene glycol base, it provides effective relief from ear infections and associated pain or discomfort.
medicines.sideEffects: May cause mild local irritation, itching, or allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.

medicines.name: AQUAEAR-AC
medicines.composition: Chloramphenicol 5% w/v , Benzocaine 1% w/v & Propylene Glycol (as base)
medicines.description: This ear drop formulation contains Chloramphenicol, a broad-spectrum antibiotic, and Benzocaine, a local anesthetic. It is used to treat bacterial ear infections such as otitis externa (swimmer’s ear), while Benzocaine helps relieve ear pain and discomfort. This combination reduces infection, inflammation, and pain, promoting quicker healing and symptom relief.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include mild ear irritation, burning, or stinging sensation. Rarely, allergic reactions such as itching, rash, or swelling may occur. Prolonged use can lead to fungal overgrowth or antibiotic resistance. Discontinue use if severe discomfort or allergic symptoms develop.

medicines.sideEffects: Constipation, drowsiness, stomach upset, tiredness, weight gain, blurred vision & dry mouth are few side effects.

medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of Syrup contains Ranitidine 75 mg
medicines.description: Retiva Syrup contains Ranitidine which is in a class of medications called H2 blockers, it decreases the amount of acid made in the stomach. It is used to treat gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), conditions where the stomach produces too much acid, such as Zollinger-Ellison syndrome. It is also used to prevent and treat symptoms of heartburn associated with acid indigestion and sour stomach.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, constipation, diarrhea, nausea, vomiting and stomach pain.

Dicyclomine is in a class of medications called anticholinergics and Simethicone is an anti-gas (anti-flatulence) medication. Ranydol spas is used to treat hyperacidity, abdominal pain and cramps, bloating, heartburn, flatulence and indigestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are constipation, diarrhea, headache, nausea, weakness and muscle pain.

medicines.name: RETIVA TABLET

medicines.description: Retiva is a specific, rapidly acting histamine H2-antagonist. Retiva inhibits secretion of gastric acid, reducing both the volume and the acid and pepsin content of the secretion. Retiva has a 12 hour acidity relief and is highest prescribed anti-acidity drug.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable drug, the few side effects encountered is abdominal pain, constipation & nausea (these symptoms mostly improved during continued treatment).

medicines.name: ROZBUILD
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Rosehip extract powder 750 mg
medicines.description: Rozbuild Vegetarian Capsules contains Rosehip extract, herbal extract that relieves joint pain, swelling & stiffness besides providing excellent antioxidant support. Rozbuild Vegetarian Capsules are used in arthritis or joint pain of all types to relief pain and inflammation as well as improvement in flexibility and mobility. Rozbuild Vegetarian Capsules also facilitates fat metabolism & protects tissues from free radical damage.
medicines.sideEffects: Being herbal extract it is very well tolerated; only known side effect is mild gastric acidity occasionally.
medicines.dosage: One vegetarian capsule of Rozbuild once or twice daily as a general supplement and antioxidant support. For joint pains two Capsules of Rozbuild 2 to 3 times a day for first 3 to 5 months & then 1 capsule 2 to 3 times a day till required. It should be started with one capsule twice daily and after a gap of 2 to 3 days it should be increased to 3 Capsules per day and effect is observed till next 2 to 3 days before increasing the dose. Maximum dose is 6 capsules per day to be reached slowly as described earlier.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE C2 PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Soft gelatin capsule contains Rosehip Oil 400 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate 250 mg, Curcuminoid 100 mg, Chondroitin Sulphate 50 mg, Boswellia Serrata 50 mg, Undenatured Type-II Collagen 40 mg & Hyaluronic Acid 20 mg
medicines.description: Glucozone C2 Plus softgel contain Undenatured Collagen Type II for reformation of cartilage with Glucosamine, Methylsuphonyl methane, Sodium hyaluronate, for the formation of cartilage & tendon as well as Curcumin & Rosehip extract for pain and inflammation. Thus Glucozone C2 Plus softgel offers a complete package for joint health. It helps in formation of tendons and cartilage in the joints. Glucozone C2 Plus softgel are indicated for tendonitis, promoting cartilage growth in Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid Arthritis associated with marked inflammation. Glucozone C2 Plus improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One softgel of Glucozone-C2 Plus to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. Once started it should be given for at least one month to have an effective result.

medicines.name: GLUCOZONE-CG TABLET
medicines.composition: Each tablet of 1456 mg contains Chondroitin Sulphate Sodium 400 mg, Rosehip Extract 250 mg, MSM 250 mg, Vitamin C 40 mg, Undenatured Type II Collagen Peptides 40 mg & Sodium Hyaluronate 30 mg
medicines.description: MSM & Collagen helps in building the cartilage and in combination with hyaluronate it is used to build tendons & ligaments; Rosehip extract treats pain & inflammation for joint health & maintenance as well as its rejuvenation. Glucozone-CG protects and rebuilds cartilage in case of osteoarthritis, inflammatory arthritis and cartilage damage in cases of trauma and injury. Besides it is also used for tendon & ligament injuries and rupture.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.
medicines.dosage: One tablet of Glucozone-CG to be given 3 to 4 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. The maximum dosage is 8 tablets per day in 3 to 4 divided dosage in any combination & the minimum dosage is one tablet BD.

medicines.name: CARTNIREST-C2 TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Collagen Peptides Type II 40 mg, Rose Hip Extract 275 mg, Vit. D3 400 IU & Curcumin 250 mg
medicines.description: Cartnirest C2 tablets contain UC II (Undenatured type II Collagen) which is joint specific Collagen, Rose hip extract, Vitamin D3 and Curcumin. Carnirest C2 is indicated for the treatment of Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid arthritis, Tendinopathy and Tendonitis. It helps to rebuild cartilage and reduces pain, stiffness and inflammation in joints hence increases mobility and flexibility in Arthritis
medicines.sideEffects: Cartnirest C2 tablets at normal doses usually has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.
medicines.dosage: One tablet once or twice daily.

medicines.name: CISOHEAL FRAC PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis 750 mg, Withania somnifera 100 mg, Moringa oleifera 100 mg & Rose Hip extract 50 mg
medicines.description: Cisoheal Frac Plus tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis (Hadjor), Withania somnifera (Ashwagandha), Moringa oleifera (Sehjan) & Rose Hip extract. Cisojoint Plus accelerates the fracture healing and bone strengthening. It increases bone strength & eases joint inflammation. It is also prescribed to treat Arthritis & heals damaged bones. Cisojoint Plus tablets also regulate menstrual cycle in females.
medicines.sideEffects: Few side effects are gas, diarrhoea, dry mouth, headache and insomnia.
medicines.dosage: Take one tablet daily, with or after a meal, or as directed by your physician. Swallow the tablet whole with water. Do not crush or chew.

medicines.name: CISOJOINT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis 750 mg, Withania somnifera 100 mg, Moringa oleifera 100 mg & Rose Hip extract 50 mg
medicines.description: Cisojoint Plus tablet contains Cissus quadrangularis (Hadjor), Withania somnifera (Ashwagandha), Moringa oleifera (Sehjan) & Rose Hip extract. Cisojoint Plus accelerates the fracture healing and bone strengthening. It increases bone strength & eases joint inflammation. It is also prescribed to treat Arthritis & heals damaged bones. Cisojoint Plus tablets also regulate menstrual cycle in females.
medicines.sideEffects: Few side effects are gas, diarrhoea, dry mouth, headache and insomnia.
medicines.dosage: Take one tablet daily after meal.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-C2 PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Soft gelatin capsule contains Rosehip Oil 400 mg, Glucosamine Sulphate 250 mg, Curcuminoid 100 mg, Chondroitin Sulphate 50 mg, Boswellia Serrata 50 mg, Undenatured Type-II Collagen 40 mg & Hyaluronic Acid 20 mg
medicines.description: Dincerin C2 Plus softgel combines a powerful blend of ingredients to support joint health and mobility. It features Rosehip Oil, Glucosamine, and Chondroitin Sulphate for cartilage support, along with anti-inflammatory powerhouses like Curcuminoids and Boswellia serrata. UC Type-II collagen and Hyaluronic Acid further contribute to joint lubrication and overall connective tissue health. This formulation aims to reduce discomfort and improve joint function

medicines.dosage: One softgel of Dincerin-C2 Plus to be given 2 times a day for one month to six months or may be longer depending upon the disease entity being treated. Once started it should be given for at least one month to have an effective result.

medicines.name: CHYMOMERG
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Trypsin 48 mg, Bromelain 90 mg & Rutoside Trihydrate 100 mg
medicines.description: Chymomerg Tablets contains Trypsin & Bromelain, proteolytic enzymes that clears dead cells to reduces pain and inflammation and Rutoside, a herbal analgesic for effective pain relief. Chymomerg tablets are used to treat pain and inflammation related to osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and tendonitis. It is also used to treat conditions such as edema and inflammation following surgeries of cellulitis, sports injuries, tooth extractions, and sprains.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are temporary stinging sensation, nausea, hives, difficulty in breathing, burning sensations, Indigestion and loss of balance.

medicines.name: LEEFORD CORN CAPS
medicines.composition: Each Corn Cap contains Salicylic acid 40% w/w in a protective strip with circular support pad
medicines.description: Corns & Calluses are the most common foot problems and come in various forms i.e. hard corns and soft corns. These small circles of thick skin tend to form on the tops and sides of toes or on the sole of the foot. Corns are often caused by wearing poorly fitted footwear which place excessive pressure on an area of the foot. Leeford Corn Caps are self-adhesive strips easy to apply and hold firmly in place over the corn. Leeford Corn Caps contains a measured dose of Salicyclic acid paste which loosens the skin to remove them.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, mild irritation & pain at the site of application are normal and mainly associated with misplacement of the padded well of medicine.
medicines.dosage: Soak your feet in warm water for 5-10 minutes to soften the skin of corn and enhance the absorption of drug present in the Leeford Corn Caps. You can skip soaking once you notice that skin of corn is already softened. Wash the feet after soaking & dry it thoroughly. Completely dry corn or callus. Remove the corn cap from the safety backing & place the circle directly & exactly over the corn. Press it down firmly, adhesive side facing the skin, and secure it if needed, with Leeford Microporous tape or cotton dressing so that it does not come out until next 24 hours. The pad of the Salicylic acid well protect surrounding skin damage & help preventing pain by providing cushion. Leave it in place for 2 days then remove. The area is cleaned and dried and a fresh corn cap is applied every 2 to 3 days. If the corn is not easily removed further corn caps can be applied changing every 2 days up to a maximum of 5 to 6 corn caps. Usually it takes one to two weeks to remove a corn; in certain cases it may take up to one month to get a complete removal. It is safe to be used in individuals above 12 years of age. Leeford Corn Caps is for external use only & should not be used by diabetics, if their sugar is not well controlled and in this case it is used only under medical supervision and with Doctor?s prescription. Do not apply if skin is inflamed or broken.

medicines.name: DIPLOMAX OINTMENT (20g/30g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w & Salicylic acid 3.0% w/w
medicines.description: Diplomax contains Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relieves itching, irritation, redness and swelling as well as Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed in wide variety of skin condition where gentle and soothing removal of dead skin from skin surface is required such as Plaque psoriasis, treatment of dry resistant thick skin conditions & tough to treat fungal and bacterial infections due to rough and scaly skin.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is very well tolerated; few side effects observed are burning, itching, irritation, dryness, folliculitis, increased hair on skin, hypo-pigmentation and allergic reactions.

medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Salicylic acid 3% w/w, Urea 10% w/w, Lactic acid 3% w/w & Sodium Lactate eq. to Lactic acid 2% w/w
medicines.description: Diplomax Plus cream contains Clobetasol, a steroid that relieves itching, redness & swelling; Salicylic acid & Urea, both are keratolytic drug that removes dead skin and moisturizes & Lactic acid, an alpha hydroxy acid that provides even tone to skin surface & improves skin texture. It is prescribed in wide variety of skin diseases where there is requirement of removing dead skin, providing moisturization & imparting even tone skin so as to correct it, such as Psoriasis, Contact Dermatitis, healed dry burn scars, Lichen Planus, Xerosis, Ichthyosis, Eczema & Keratosis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are burning, itching, irritation, dryness, increased hair on skin, hypo-pigmentation and allergic reactions.

medicines.name: ELOSONE-S
medicines.composition: Each g contains Mometasone 0.1% w/w & Salicylic acid 5% w/w
medicines.description: Elosone-S cream contains Mometasone, a corticosteroid to treat redness, swelling, irritation & itching & Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for initial treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis. It is also indicated for other inflammatory thick dead skin conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning sensation, stinging sensation, itching, irritation & skin removal are the few side effects.
