medicines.name: HEVOBET-S OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g contains Halobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w & Salicylic acid 3.0% w/w
medicines.description: Hevobet-S contains Halobetasol, a corticosteroid to treat redness, swelling, irritation & itching & Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for initial treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis. It is also indicated for other inflammatory thick dead skin conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning sensation, stinging sensation, itching, irritation & skin removal are the few side effects.

medicines.name: HEVOBET-S LOTION
medicines.composition: Each g contains Halobetasol 0.05% w/v & Salicylic Acid 3% w/v
medicines.description: Hevobet-S contains Halobetasol, a corticosteroid to treat redness, swelling, irritation & itching & Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for initial treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis. It is also indicated for other inflammatory thick dead skin conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning sensation, stinging sensation, itching, irritation & skin removal are the few side effects.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g contains Salicylic acid 12% w/w
medicines.description: Keracylic ointment contains Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for Psoriasis and other dry, scaly skin conditions. This medication is also used to help remove dead skin from elbow & palms of hands and soles of the feet. It is also used for topical treatment of warts, verrucas, corns and calluses.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, redness and peeling skin near the treated area are the main side effects.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC FOAMING FACE WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Salicylic acid 2% w/v, Glycolic acid 3% w/v & Aloevera 10% w/v
medicines.description: Keracylic Foaming Facewash contains Salicylic acid & Glycolic acid which acts together to remove dead skin & Aloevera that nourishes, repairs & renews the texture of the skin. Keracylic Foaming Facewash is a pH balanced face wash for healthy skin that is used for the treatment and prevention of acne, can be used in combination with other acne treatments; for reducing the marks on face, helps to unclog and cleanse the skin pores & for lightening the complexion.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated product, no know side effects except irritation on cracked or sensitive skin.
medicines.dosage: Take approximately 1-2 ml of Keracylic Foaming face wash and gently massage on the face avoiding eyes and surrounding areas for 20-30 seconds so as to act effectively & for a gentle wash, then rinse thoroughly and pat dry. For best results use twice daily & for oily skin leave it for 45 to 50 seconds instead of 20 - 30. For optimal results, keep Keracylic Foaming Facewash in a cool dry place away from sunlight.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC FACE WASH
medicines.composition: Each g contains Salicylic acid, Glycolic acid, Vit. E & Aloevera
medicines.description: Keracylic Facewash contains Salicylic acid & Glycolic acid which acts together to remove dead skin & Aloevera with Vitamin E nourish, repairs & renews the texture of the skin. Keracylic Facewash is used for fighting acne, facilitates lightening of skin marks, helps to counter infections and microbial attacks, helps to unclog and cleanse the skin pores & helps to maintain the moisture level of the skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated product, no know side effects except irritation on cracked or sensitive skin.
medicines.dosage: Take approximately 1-2 ml of face wash and gently massage on the face to produce foam all over avoiding eyes and surrounding areas for 20-30 seconds so as to act effectively & for a gentle wash, then rinse thoroughly and pat dry. For best results use twice daily & for oily skin leave it for 45 to 50 seconds instead of 20 - 30. For optimal results, keep Keracylic Facewash in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight.

medicines.name: ELMOVEL S
medicines.composition: Each g contains Mometasone Furoate 0.1% w/w & Salicylic acid 5% w/w
medicines.description: Elmovel-S cream contains Mometasone, a corticosteroid to treat redness, swelling, irritation & itching & Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for initial treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis. It is also indicated for other inflammatory thick dead skin conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning sensation, stinging sensation, itching, irritation & skin removal are the few side effects.

medicines.name: TARCILIC SOLUTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Coal Tar topical solution 4.25% w/v & Salicylic acid 2% w/v
medicines.description: Tarcilic solution contains Coal Tar solution & Salicylic acid; together they help in shedding dead cells from top layer of skin and slow down the growth of skin cells. It is prescribed for Psoriasis, Seborrheic dermatitis & Dandruff to treat the itching, scaling, and flaking skin conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Skin/scalp irritation & staining of skin/hair (especially in patients with blonde, bleached, dyed or gray hair).

medicines.name: WARTSRUB-S
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Podophyllum Resin 25% w/v, Benzoin 10% w/v, Aloes 2% w/v & Salicylic acid 5% w/v
medicines.description: Wartsrub Lotion is for the removal of genital warts and common warts of the hands and feet in both men and women caused by HPV or Human Papilloma Virus, besides it is also indicated for removal of skin tags & moles.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, only observed side effect is that on wrong application it may corrode the normal skin.

medicines.name: DIPLOMAX POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g of powder contains Salicylic acid 3%, Benzoic acid 6%, Menthol 0.08% & Starch 31% w/w
medicines.description: Diplomax Dusting Powder is an antiseptic, antifungal & keratolytic powder used in cases of skin irritation and inflammation (such as prickly heat), insect bites, fungal infections & eczema. It should not be applied on exudative lesions.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritation & redness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: LULIFORD SHAMPOO
medicines.composition: Each ml of shampoo contains Luliconazole 1%, Salicylic acid 3% & ZPTO 1% w/v
medicines.description: Luliford shampoo contains Luliconazole & Zinc Pyrithione (ZPTO) both of which are antifungal and Salicylic acid which is a keratolytic and clears the skin of dead cells and excessive growth of cells. Luliford shampoo is used to treat Dandruff or Seborrheic dermatitis. Besides it is also used as a supportive therapy in fungal infections of the scalp.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, burning sensation & allergic reactions may occur at application site.

medicines.name: DIPLOWAX PLUS CREAM
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w, Salicylic acid 3% w/w, Urea 10% w/w, Lactic acid 3% w/w & Sodium Lactate eq. to Lactic acid 2% w/w
medicines.description: Diplowax Plus cream contains Clobetasol, a steroid that relieves itching, redness & swelling; Salicylic acid & Urea, both are keratolytic drug that removes dead skin and moisturizes & Lactic acid, an alpha hydroxy acid that provides even tone to skin surface & improves skin texture. It is prescribed in wide variety of skin diseases where there is requirement of removing dead skin, providing moisturization & imparting even tone skin so as to correct it, such as Psoriasis, Contact Dermatitis, healed dry burn scars, Lichen Planus, Xerosis, Ichthyosis, Eczema & Keratosis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are burning, itching, irritation, dryness, increased hair on skin, hypo-pigmentation and allergic reactions.

medicines.name: LULIFORD-S
medicines.composition: Each g contains Luliconazole 1% w/w & Salicylic Acid 3 % w/w
medicines.description: Luliford-S cream contains Luliconazole, a new anti-fungal drug that acts by killing the fungus to treat infections & Salicylic acid, a keratolytic agent that removes unwanted dead skin from the surface in various skin conditions. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers and other skin area of the body for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Application site irritation and allergic reactions are the noted side effects.

medicines.name: KETOFLY PLUS SHAMPOO
medicines.composition: Ketoconazole 2% w/v, Salicylic Acid 2% w/v & Ichthyol
medicines.description: Ketofly Plus combines Ketoconazole, a potent antifungal, Salicylic Acid for exfoliation and removal of dead skin, and Ichthyol to soothe inflammation and promote healing. It effectively treats fungal skin infections with scaling and itching.
medicines.sideEffects: May cause mild local irritation or redness.

medicines.name: DIPLOMAX PLUS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w & Salicylic Acid 6% w/w
medicines.description: Diplomax Plus ointment is a potent combination therapy formulated with Clobetasol Propionate, a super potent corticosteroid that effectively reduces inflammation, itching, and redness, and Salicylic Acid, a keratolytic agent that softens and removes scales and thickened skin. This combination enhances the penetration of Clobetasol and is ideal for treating hyperkeratotic and inflammatory skin conditions such as psoriasis, chronic eczema, and lichen planus.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated; or excessive use may lead to local irritation.

medicines.name: KETOSCALP PLUS SHAMPOO
medicines.composition: Ketoconazole 2% w/v, Salicylic Acid 2% w/v & Ichthyol
medicines.description: Ketoscalp Plus Shampoo is a medicated Shampoo formulated to treat dandruff, seborrheic dermatitis, and scalp psoriasis. Ketoconazole is an antifungal agent that controls fungal growth, Salicylic Acid helps remove dead skin and reduce flaking, while Ichthyol offers anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. Together, they relieve itching, scaling, and irritation of the scalp.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Mild irritation, dryness, or burning sensation may occur. Discontinue if severe irritation or allergic reaction develops.

medicines.name: LULIACT-S
medicines.composition: Each g contains Luliconazole 1% w/w & Salicylic Acid 3% w/w
medicines.description: Luliact-S combines an antifungal agent (luliconazole) with a keratolytic agent (salicylic acid) to treat hyperkeratotic tinea infections, such as athlete’s foot, jock itch, and ringworm. Luliconazole inhibits fungal cell membrane synthesis, while salicylic acid softens and removes thickened skin layers, enhancing drug penetration and efficacy.
medicines.sideEffects: Common reactions include mild skin irritation, redness, itching, or stinging at the application site. Serious side effects are rare but may involve allergic reactions such as swelling of the face, lips, or tongue.

medicines.name: DIPLOWAX PLUS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% w/w & Salicylic Acid 6% w/w
medicines.description: Diplowax Plus lotion is a topical treatment combining a potent corticosteroid (Clobetasol) to reduce inflammation and a keratolytic agent (Salicylic Acid) to exfoliate and remove dead skin cells. It is used to treat conditions like psoriasis, seborrheic dermatitis, and other inflammatory skin disorders, helping to soothe irritation and promote healing.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause skin thinning, burning, stinging, redness, or irritation. Prolonged use can lead to increased risk of infection or systemic absorption.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC SOAP
medicines.composition: Salicylic Acid 3% w/w, Sulfur 10% w/w & ZPTO (Zinc Pyrithione) 1% w/w
medicines.description: Keracylic Soap is a medicated bar for oily skin, acne, dandruff, and seborrheic dermatitis. It contains Salicylic Acid for exfoliation, Sulfur for antimicrobial action, and ZPTO to control fungal growth. Ideal for acne-prone skin and scalp conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Mild dryness or peeling may occur initially. Avoid contact with eyes and mucous membranes.
medicines.dosage: Use 1–2 times daily or as directed by a healthcare professional. Apply to wet skin or scalp, lather gently, leave for a few minutes, and rinse thoroughly. For external use only.

medicines.name: LEEZOLE 3 KIT
medicines.composition: Each combikit contains 4 tablet; One film coated tablet of Azithromycin Dihydrate eq. to Anhydrous Azithromycin 1 g , one uncoated tablet of Fluconazole 150 mg & two film coated tablet of Secnidazole 1 g
medicines.description: Leezole-3 kit contains Azithromycin to treat bacterial infections, Fluconazole to treat fungal infections & Secnidazole to treat Protozoal infections. Leezole 3 kit is indicated in the management of vaginal candidiasis, vaginal trichomoniasis and bacterial vaginosis. It is given to both the partners for oral consumption simultaneously.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Vaginal itching, taste change, vomiting, headache, dizziness, stomach pain, nausea, diarrhea and loss of appetite.

medicines.name: OLTEF 3 KIT
medicines.composition: Combi Kit of Azithromycin 1 g (1 Tab), Fluconazole 150 mg (1 Tab) & Secnidazole 1000 mg (2 Tab)
medicines.description: Oltef 3 kit contains Azithromycin to treat bacterial infections, Fluconazole to treat fungal infections & Secnidazole to treat Protozoal infections. Leezole 3 kit is indicated in the management of vaginal candidiasis, vaginal tichomoniasis and bacterial vaginosis. It is given to both the partners for oral consumption simultaneously.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Vaginal itching, taste change, vomiting, headache, dizziness, stomach pain, nausea, diarrhea, loss of appetite

medicines.name: ACIMOL-FORTE (10's/15's)
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Serratiopeptidase 15 mg eq. to enzyme activity 30000 Units as enteric coated granules
medicines.description: Acimol-Forte tablets is a combination of Aceclofenac a NSAID, Serratiopeptidase a proteolytic enzyme and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It also alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, Indigestion, heartburn, loss of appetite and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ACIMOL-SP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg & Serratiopeptidase 15 mg eq. to enzyme activity 30000 Units as enteric coated granules
medicines.description: Acimol-SP Tablet is a combination of Aceclofenac a NSAID and Serratiopeptidase a Proteolytic enzyme. It is used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions. Acimol-SP effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, osteoarthritis and post-operative pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, indigestion, heartburn, loss of appetite and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ALCINAC FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg, Paracetamol 325 mg & Serratiopeptidase 15 mg eq. to enzyme activity 30000 Units as enteric coated granules
medicines.description: Alcinac-Forte Tablet is a combination of Aceclofenac (a NSAID), Serratiopeptidase (a proteolytic enzyme) & Paracetamol (an analgesic and antipyretic) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It also alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, Indigestion, heartburn, loss of appetite and diarrhea.

medicines.name: SEROWEL 10
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Serratiopeptidase (as enteric coated 20000 units) 10 mg
medicines.description: Serowel 10 contains Serratiopeptidase an proteolytic enzyme used to treat inflammatory conditions. It is indicated for painful conditions including back pain, osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, osteoporosis, fibromyalgia, carpel tunnel syndrome, migraine and tension headache. Serowel 10 is also used for conditions that involve pain and inflammation in sinusitis, laryngitis, sore throat, ear infections, post-operative inflammation, pus accumulation (emphysema), inflammation of a vein with formation of a blood clot (thrombophlebitis) and inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) including ulcerative colitis and Crohn's disease.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are skin reactions, muscle and joint pain, poor appetite, nausea, stomach pain, cough and blood clotting disturbances.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC SP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg, Serratiopeptidase (as enteric coated granules) 10 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Zeldinac-SP Tablet is a combination of Diclofenac (NSAID), Serratiopeptidase (Proteolytic enzyme) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal, bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ZELDINAC-S
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg & Serratiopeptidase 10 mg
medicines.description: Zeldinac-S tablet is a combination of Diclofenac (NSAID) and Serratiopeptidase (Proteolytic enzyme) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions. Zeldinac-S effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, osteoarthritis and post-operative pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal, bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: ALCINAC-SP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Aceclofenac 100 mg & Serratiopeptidase 15 mg eq. to enzyme activity 30000 Units as enteric coated granules
medicines.description: Alcinac-SP Tablet is a combination of Aceclofenac, a NSAID and Serratiopeptidase, a Proteolytic enzyme. It is used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions. Alcinac-SP effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, osteoarthritis and post-operative pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, indigestion, heartburn, loss of appetite and diarrhea.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC-S
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg & Serratiopeptidase 10 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic-S tablet is a combination of Diclofenac (NSAID) and Serratiopeptidase (Proteolytic enzyme) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions. Vovedic-S effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, osteoarthritis and post-operative pain.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: VOVEDIC-SP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Diclofenac Potassium 50 mg, Serratiopeptidase (as enteric coated granules) 10 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Vovedic-SP Tablet is a combination of Diclofenac (NSAID), Serratiopeptidase (Proteolytic enzyme) and Paracetamol (analgesic and antipyretic) used to relieve pain and inflammation in various conditions like muscle pain, joint pain and postoperative pain. It effectively alleviates pain and inflammation in conditions like rheumatoid arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis and osteoarthritis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, loss of appetite, gastrointestinal irritation, gastrointestinal bleeding, heartburn and diarrhea.

medicines.name: WINTY LEMON & HONEY
medicines.composition: Green Tea, Natural Lemon Flavour & Natural Honey Flavour
medicines.description: Leeford's Winty Green Tea brings you the authentic & rich charm of Kangra with the goodness of Lemon & Honey, infused in Winty Lemon & Honey Green Tea. Highly rich in anti-oxidants, Winty Green Tea detoxifies body by flushing out toxins, boosts metabolism that helps in encouraging fat loss & also helps in relaxing your body & mind. The zero calorie green tea not just intensifies metabolism but also provides energy.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects are observed if consumed within the recommended limits.
medicines.dosage: Prepare with 1 tea bag in 100 ml of freshly boiled hot water. For best results, do not add milk or sugar to it. One can safely consume up to 2 cups of Leeford Green Tea in a day.

medicines.name: CAVMOX-250
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Amoxycillin Trihydrate eq. to Amoxycillin 250 mg
medicines.description: Cavmox contains Amoxycillin, a Penicillin group antibiotic that acts by damaging the cell wall of the disease causing bacteria and hence killing them. It is mainly used in cases of Respiratory tract infections, ENT Infections, Skin & soft tissue infection, Urinary tract infection and for eradication of bacteria from stomach ulcer.
medicines.sideEffects: Cavmox Capsules & Dispersible tablets are well tolerated, however the main side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea & skin rashes.

medicines.name: THYROACTIV-150
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Thyroxine Sodium eq. to Thyroxine 150 mcg
medicines.description: Thyroactiv tablets contain Thyroxine sodium (synthetic form of Thyroxine hormone secreted by Thyroid gland).Thyroxine controls entire metabolic activity of the body and is very important for the proper functioning of our body. It is indicated for the treatment of hypothyroidism in adults and also in congenital hypothyroidism.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are increased appetite, weight variations, headache, vomiting, diarrhoea, changes in menstrual cycle, fever, sensitivity to heat, cramps and mood swings

medicines.name: SERTAFORD (10 g & 20 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Sertaconazole Nitrate 2% w/w
medicines.description: Sertaford cream contains Sertaconazole, an antifungal drug that acts by killing fungal germ. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers, skin folds and other skin area of the body; for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Contact dermatitis, dry skin, burning skin & application site skin tenderness are the few observed side effect.

medicines.name: SERTAMID (10g & 20g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Sertaconazole Nitrate 2% w/w
medicines.description: Sertamid cream contains Sertaconazole, an antifungal drug that acts by killing fungal germ. It is prescribed for Tinea (a fungus) infection of head, beard, chest and back, fingers, skin folds and other skin area of the body; for Candida (fungus) infection of skin called candidiasis etc.
medicines.sideEffects: Contact dermatitis, dry skin, burning skin & application site skin tenderness are the few observed side effect.

medicines.name: BIGFUN JELLY (Cool Mint)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet contains Sildenafil citrate eq. to Sildenafil 100 mg (Cool Mint Flavour)
medicines.description: Bigfun contains Sildenafil, a PDE inhibitor that acts by increasing blood flow to the organ. It is indicated for the treatment of erectile dysfunction in adult men. It is also sometimes used to treat pulmonary hypertension.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, abnormal vision, nasal congestion, back pain, myalgia, nausea, dizziness and rash.

medicines.name: FUNTIME JELLY (Cool Mint)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet contains Sildenafil citrate eq. to Sildenafil 100 mg (Cool Mint Flavour)
medicines.description: Funtime contains Sildenafil, an erectile dysfunction drug that acts by increasing blood flow into penile shaft and help it remain there for a longer duration & thus helps in retaining erection. It is prescribed for erectile dysfunction in males.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, nasal congestion, dizziness, nausea, hot flush, visual disturbance and blurred vision.

medicines.name: BIGFUN-100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sildenafil Citrate eq. to Sildenafil 100 mg
medicines.description: Bigfun contains Sildenafil, a PDE inhibitor that acts by increasing blood flow to the organ. It is indicated for the treatment of erectile dysfunction in adult men. It is also sometimes used to treat pulmonary hypertension.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, abnormal vision, nasal congestion, back pain, myalgia, nausea, dizziness and rash.

medicines.name: BIGFUN-50
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sildenafil Citrate eq. to Sildenafil 50 mg
medicines.description: Bigfun contains Sildenafil, a PDE inhibitor that acts by increasing blood flow to the organ. It is indicated for the treatment of erectile dysfunction in adult men. It is also sometimes used to treat pulmonary hypertension.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, abnormal vision, nasal congestion, back pain, myalgia, nausea, dizziness and rash.

medicines.name: LONG DRIVE DS GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dapoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Dapoxetine 60 mg & Sildenafil Citrate eq. to Sildenafil 100 mg
medicines.description: Long drive gold tablets contain Sildenafil a PDE inhibitor and Dapoxetine a SSRI and the combination is indicated for the treatment of Erectile dysfunction and Premature ejaculation in adult men.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, abnormal vision, nasal congestion, back pain, myalgia, nausea, dizziness, rash, sweating and confusion.

medicines.name: LONG DRIVE GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dapoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Dapoxetine 30 mg & Sildenafil Citrate eq. to Sildenafil 50 mg
medicines.description: Long drive gold tablets contain Sildenafil a PDE inhibitor and Dapoxetine a SSRI and the combination is indicated for the treatment of Erectile dysfunction and Premature ejaculation in adult men.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, abnormal vision, nasal congestion, back pain, myalgia, nausea, dizziness, rash, sweating and confusion.

medicines.name: FUNTIME-100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sildenafil Citrate eq. to Sildenafil 100 mg
medicines.description: Funtime contains Sildenafil, an erectile dysfunction drug that acts by increasing blood flow into penile shaft and help it remain there for a longer duration & thus helps in retaining erection. It is prescribed for erectile dysfunction in males.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, nasal congestion, dizziness, nausea, hot flush, visual disturbance and blurred vision.

medicines.name: FUNTIME GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sildenafil Citrate eq. to Sildenafil 50 mg & Dapoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Dapoxetine 30 mg
medicines.description: Funtime Gold tablet contains Sildenafil, an erectile dysfunction drug that acts by increasing blood flow into penile shaft and help it remain there for a longer duration & thus helps in retaining erection & Dapoxetine, a drug that acts on the brain to stop premature ejaculation so as to increase the sexual activity duration. It is prescribed for erectile dysfunction & premature ejaculation in males.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are nausea, dizziness, dry mouth, headache, diarrhoea, insomnia, hot flush, visual disturbance and fatigue.

medicines.name: FUNTIME DS-GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sildenafil 100 mg & Dapoxetine 60 mg
medicines.description: Funtime DS Gold tablets contain Sildenafil a PDE inhibitor and Dapoxetine a SSRI and the combination is indicated for the treatment of Erectile dysfunction and Premature ejaculation in adult men.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, abnormal vision, nasal congestion, back pain, myalgia, nausea, dizziness, rash, sweating and confusion.

medicines.name: BIGFUN-50 XT GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sildenafil 50 mg & Dapoxetine 30 mg
medicines.description: Bigfun-50 XT Gold tablets is a combination of Sildenafil and Dapoxetine, two active ingredients that helps address the issue of erectile dysfunction and premature ejaculation in men. Sildenafil enhances blood flow to the penis for improved erections, while Dapoxetine delays ejaculation thus improving sexual performance. This dual-action medication is taken orally before sexual activity or as directed by a healthcare provider.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include headache, nausea, red or flushed face, indigestion, stuffy nose, sweating, dizziness or light headedness.

medicines.name: BIGFUN-100 XT GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sildenafil 100 mg & Dapoxetine 60 mg
medicines.description: Bigfun-100 XT Gold tablets is a combination of Sildenafil and Dapoxetine, two active ingredients that helps address the issue of erectile dysfunction and premature ejaculation in men. Sildenafil enhances blood flow to the penis for improved erections, while Dapoxetine delays ejaculation thus improving sexual performance. This dual-action medication is taken orally before sexual activity or as directed by a healthcare provider.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include headache, nausea, red or flushed face, indigestion, stuffy nose, sweating, dizziness or light headedness.

medicines.name: BIGFUN JELLY ( Chocolate)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet contains Sildenafil citrate eq. to Sildenafil 100 mg (Chocolate Flavour)
medicines.description: BIGFUN sachet contains Sildenafil 100 mg in a convenient jelly form with a chocolate flavor. Sildenafil is a phosphodiesterase type 5 (PDE5) inhibitor used to treat erectile dysfunction by increasing blood flow to the penis during sexual stimulation, helping to achieve and maintain an erection. The jelly formulation allows for quick absorption and easy administration, making it suitable for those who have difficulty swallowing tablets.
medicines.sideEffects: BIGFUN sachet is generally well tolerated. Possible side effects include headache, flushing, dizziness, nasal congestion, upset stomach, and visual disturbances. Rare but serious side effects include prolonged erection (priapism) and sudden vision or hearing loss.

medicines.name: FUNTIME JELLY (Black Currant)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet contains Sildenafil citrate eq. to Sildenafil 100 mg (Black Currant Flavour)
medicines.description: Funtime contains Sildenafil, an erectile dysfunction drug that acts by increasing blood flow into penile shaft and help it remain there for a longer duration & thus helps in retaining erection. It is prescribed for erectile dysfunction in males.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, nasal congestion, dizziness, nausea, hot flush, visual disturbance and blurred vision.

medicines.name: SILDOEASE-4
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Silodosin 4 mg
medicines.description: Sildoease 4/8 capsule contains Silodosin which is used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia; BPH), which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency. Silodosin is in a class of medications called alpha-blockers. It relieves the symptoms of BPH by relaxing the muscles of the bladder and prostate.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are orgasm with little or no semen (fluid), diarrhea, dizziness, low blood pressure and stuffy or runny nose.

medicines.name: SILDOEASE-4D
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Silodosin 4 mg & Dutasteride 0.5 mg (Tablets in Capsules)
medicines.description: Sildoease 4D/8D contains Silodosin an alpha blocker and Dutasteride, a 5-Alpha reductase that inhibits the growth of Prostate to ease symptoms of BPH. Sildoease 4D/8D capsules are indicated for the treatment of BPH when Silodosin alone is not able to provide relief in men with enlarged Prostate and surgery needs to be avoided.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are orgasm with little or no semen (fluid), Impotence, diarrhea, dizziness, low blood pressure, stuffy or runny nose

medicines.name: SILDOEASE-M 25
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Mirabegron (ER) 25 mg & Silodosin 8 mg.
medicines.description: Sildoease-M 25 tablets contains Silodosin and Mirabegron. This combination is widely used in treating symptoms of an enlarged prostate (BPH) and overactive bladder. Silodosin relaxes prostate muscles to improve urine flow, while Mirabegron increases bladder muscle control to reduce urgency and frequency. Together, they help manage urinary symptoms, improving comfort and quality of life.
medicines.sideEffects: Abnormal ejaculation, increased heart rate, dizziness, nausea, constipation, urinary tract infections and runny or blocked nose are some common side effects that may occur.

medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Mirabegron (ER) 50 mg & Silodosin 8 mg.

medicines.name: BURNOSEPT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Silver Nitrate 0.2%, Chlorhexidine Gluconate 0.2%, Aloevera Extract 15% & Allantoin 0.1%
medicines.description: Burnosept Plus cream contains Silver nitrate & Chlorhexidine are antibacterial and antiseptic that kills germs whereas Aloevera & Allantoin are nourshing and soothing agent that heals and protects skin. Burnosept Plus cream is used for minor cuts, wounds, sores, insect bites, rashes, abrasions & first degree burns i.e. superficial burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, itching & redness are only noted side effects.

medicines.name: SILVOWEL
medicines.composition: Each g contains Nano crystalline Silver gel 0.002% w/w
medicines.description: Silvowel gel contains Nano crystalline Silver that acts as antibacterial drugs & skin protector. Silvowel is used for the treatment of surgical cuts, leg ulcers, pressure sores, abrasions, blisters, cracked skin, minor skin cuts, wounds, burns & for prophylaxis of infection at skin graft donor site.
medicines.sideEffects: Silvowel gel is very well tolerated and no side effects are noted.

medicines.name: SILLIUM CAPSULE
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Silymarin extract (80%) 250 mg, Vit B1 1 mg, Vit B2 1.1 mg, Vit B3 11mg, Vit. B5 5 mg, Vit B6 1.5 mg, Vit B12 2.20 mcg
medicines.description: Sillium Capsule is used as adjunctive therapy in chronic hepatitis and cirrhosis. It promotes liver health, contributes to liver protection and liver detoxification, helps maintain liver function, contributes to body detoxification and digestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are abdominal bloating or pain, allergic reactions, diarrhea, gas, indigestion, itching, loss of appetite, nausea and rash.

medicines.name: SILLIUM SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 15 ml of suspension contains Silymarin (silybin 35%) 250 mg, Vit. B1 1.4 mg, Vit. B2 1.9 mg, Vit. B3 11 mg, Vit. B5 5 mg, Vit. B6 1.9 mg & Vit. B12 2.2 mcg
medicines.description: Sillium Suspension is used as adjunctive therapy in chronic hepatitis and cirrhosis. It promotes liver health, contributes to liver protection and liver detoxification, helps maintain liver function, contributes to body detoxification and digestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are abdominal bloating or pain, allergic reactions, diarrhea, gas, indigestion, itching, loss of appetite, nausea and rash.

medicines.name: TRYLIV BOOST
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Silymarin 35 mg, Benfotiamine 5 mg, Vit. B6 1.5 mg, Niacinamide 20 mg, Vit. B 12 1 mcg & Lecithin 262.5 mg
medicines.description: Tryliv Boost Suspension contains Silymarin, Lecithin & Vitamin-B complex. Silymarin & Lecithin improves hepatic cell structure & function, corrects fatty liver, enhances the antioxidant capacity of the liver and maintain liver health; whereas B-Complex vitamin regulates metabolism of liver & body as a whole. It is used as an adjunctive therapy in chronic hepatitis and cirrhosis. Tryliv Boost promotes liver health, contributes to liver protection and detoxification, helps maintain liver function and digestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are abdominal bloating or pain, allergic reactions, diarrhoea, gas, indigestion, itching, loss of appetite, nausea and rash.

medicines.name: HEPLOFIT FORTE
medicines.composition: Silymarin Extract (80%) 250 mg, Coenyme Q10 60 mg, L-Carnitine Tartrate 50 mg, Choline Bitartrate 25 mg, N-Acetyl L-Cysteine 75 mg, L-Ornithine Mono HCl 75 mg, Zn 7.5 mg, Se 40 mcg, Vit. C 65 mg, D-Panthenol 5 mg, Vit. B1 1.4 mg, Vit. B2 1.9 mg, Vit. B6 4.5 mg, Vit. B12 2.2 mcg & Folic Acid 129 mcg / 15 ml
medicines.description: Heplofit Forte suspension offers a blend of liver support (Silymarin, Choline, NAC, L-Ornithine), cellular energy and antioxidant power (Coenzyme Q10, L-Carnitine, Vitamin C, Selenium), and essential B vitamins (B1, B2, B6, B12, D-Panthenol, Folic Acid) along with Zinc. It is formulated to promote overall metabolic health, support detoxification processes, and enhance energy production.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects like digestive disturbances, allergic reactions, headache or dizziness, gastrointestinal upset &/or skin reactions may occur
medicines.dosage: Take 15 ml suspension once or twice a day after meal or as directed by physician.

medicines.name: HEPLOFIT FORTE TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Metadoxine 500 mg, L-Ornithine L-Aspartate 150 mg, Silymarin 140 mg, Vitamin B6 3.0 mg & Folic Acid 1.5 mg.
medicines.description: Heplofit Forte tablets is a comprehensive formulation that contains Metadoxine, L-Ornithine-L-Aspartate (LOLA), Silymarin, Vitamin B6 & Folic Acid. Heplofit Forte tablets are aimed at supporting liver health. Metadoxine aids in alcohol metabolism, while LOLA promotes ammonia detoxification. Silymarin acts as a potent antioxidant for liver protection, Vitamin B6 and Folic Acid contributes in promoting metabolic processes and liver function. Altogether, the combination helps maintain liver function, detoxify harmful substances and support overall liver health and vitality.
medicines.sideEffects: Liver function changes, headache, dizziness, gastrointestinal effects & allergic reaction are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: TRYLIV BOOST TAB
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Silymarin Ext. 140 mg, L- Carnitine 50 mg, L-Ornithine 50 mg, Choline Bitartrate 50 mg, Myoinositol 50 mg, N-Acetyl L-Cysteine 50 mg, Vit.C 40 mg, L-Glutathione 15 mg, Vit.E 10 mg, El. Zn 10 mg, Vit.B5 5 mg, El. Fe 3 mg, CoQ10 2.5 mg, Vit.B6 2 mg, Vit.B2 1.3 mg, Vit.B1 1.1 mg, Vit.B9 100 mcg, El. Se 40 mcg, Vit.D 10 mcg & Vit.B12 1 mcg
medicines.description: Tryliv Boost is a comprehensive hepatoprotective and nutritional supplement. It combines Silymarin, a liver-protecting herbal extract, with essential amino acids, antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. This formulation supports liver detoxification, improves liver function, and helps manage conditions like fatty liver disease, alcoholic liver damage, and oxidative stress.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are mild gastrointestinal discomfort or allergic reactions in sensitive individuals.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet daily with water, preferably before meals

medicines.name: JOYSPAS DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml of drops contains Simethicone emulsion eq. to Simethicone 40 mg, Dill oil 0.005 ml & Fennel oil 0.0007 ml
medicines.description: Joyspas drops contain a combination of Simethicone, Dill oil and fennel oil. It is used in children and infants to treat flatulence (gas). Joyspas drops are indicated in the treatment of abdominal cramps and pain, gas, bloating and flatulence in children and infants.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Constipation, Diarrhea & Headache.

medicines.name: GASOWEL SUSPENSION (MINT)
medicines.composition: Each 10 ml of suspension contains Dried Aluminium Hydroxide 830 mg, Magnesium Hydroxide 185 mg, Simethicone 50 mg & Sodium Carboxymethylcellulose 100 mg (Sugar Free)
medicines.description: Gasowel suspension contains Dried Magnesium hydroxide, Magnesium hydroxide and Sodium Carboxymethylcellulose are antacids and Simethicone is a anti-flatulent. Gasowel relieves symptoms of peptic ulcer, gastritis, inflammation of food pipe, hiatus hernia and other dyspeptic conditions associated with hyperacidity. Gasowel also helps in relieving burning sensation in the stomach, burping, bloating, discomfort and pain caused by excess gas in the stomach.
medicines.sideEffects: Occasional hypersensitivity reaction, constipation and diarrhoea but generally Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects.

medicines.name: GASOWEL PLUS SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Magaldrate IP 540 mg, Simethicone IP 50 mg & Oxetacaine IP 10 mg (Mint Flavor) (SUGAR FREE)
medicines.description: Gasowel Plus suspension contains Magaldrate an antacid, Simethicone an anti-flatulent and Oxetacaine an anesthetic and analgesic. It is indicated In Peptic ulcers, food pipe ulcers, GERD and hyperacidity. Thus Gasowel Plus is an antacid, anti-gas and stomach specific analgesic.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, stomach pain, constipation, drowsiness, dizziness, rash or redness of the skin, swelling on eyes, lips and tongue.

medicines.name: DYNACID
medicines.composition: Each uncoated chewable tablet contains Dried Aluminium Hydroxide gel 300 mg, Magnesium Aluminium Silicate Hydrate 50 mg , Magnesium Hydroxide 25 mg & Simethicone 25 mg (Mint Flavour)
medicines.description: Dynacid tablet contains a balanced mix of ingredients that are widely used as an antacid, providing quick relief from acidity, heartburn and gas. Its Aluminium hydroxide is an antacid, which neutralises increased stomach acid. Dimethicone is an antiflatulent which helps in releasing the gas. Magnesium hydroxide and Magnesium Aluminium Silicate Hydrate is a laxative that increases water in the intestine and reduces stomach acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, constipation, diarrhea, or headache.

medicines.name: RANYDOL SPAS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ranitidine 150 mg, Dicyclomine Hydrochloride 10 mg & Simethicone 20 mg
medicines.description: Ranydol spas contains Ranitidine which is a histamine-2 blocker that decreases the amount of acid created by the stomach. Dicyclomine is in a class of medications called anticholinergics and Simethicone is an anti-gas (anti-flatulence) medication. Ranydol spas is used to treat hyperacidity, abdominal pain and cramps, bloating, heartburn, flatulence and indigestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are constipation, diarrhea, headache, nausea, weakness and muscle pain.

medicines.name: GASOWEL TAB
medicines.composition: Each effervescent tablet contains Papain 60 mg, Fungal Diastase (1:1200) 20 mg & Simethicone 25 mg (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Gasowel Effervescent tablet is a water dissolving formula that helps in relieving acidity, gas and indigestion. Gasowel contains natural enzymes like Papain and Fungal Diastase to cure indigestion and Simethicone which makes an easier passage for gas and hence gives relief from flatulence and fullness of stomach.
medicines.sideEffects: Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.sideEffects: Occasional hypersensitivity reaction, constipation and diarrhoea but generally Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects.

medicines.name: EYELET
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Carboxymethylcellulose Sodium 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Eyelet & Eyelet DS eye drops contain Carboxymethylcellulose, an eye lubricant that prevents and treats dry eyes. It is used for the temporary relief & treatment of burning, irritation and discomfort due to dryness of the eye or exposure to wind or sun, dry eye syndrome & dryness in eyes after Lasik or Cataracts surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: This is highly safe drug. Blurred vision, minor burning, stinging or irritation may temporarily occur.
medicines.dosage: Use one to two drops in eye/s 4 to 6 times per day or advised by ophthalmologist.

medicines.name: EYELET-DS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Carboxymethylcellulose Sodium 1% w/v
medicines.description: Eyelet & Eyelet DS eye drops contain Carboxymethylcellulose, an eye lubricant that prevents and treats dry eyes. It is used for the temporary relief & treatment of burning, irritation and discomfort due to dryness of the eye or exposure to wind or sun, dry eye syndrome & dryness in eyes after Lasik or Cataracts surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: This is highly safe drug. Blurred vision, minor burning, stinging or irritation may temporarily occur.
medicines.dosage: Use one to two drops in eye/s 4 to 6 times per day or advised by ophthalmologist.

medicines.name: NEFCOZ EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorpheniramine maleate 0.2% w/v, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 0.12% w/v & Methylcellulose 0.02% w/v
medicines.description: Nefcoz eye drops contain actives that constricts eye's blood vessels, soothes & cools eye so as to decongests them, relives pain, redness, irritation, watery eyes besides soothing and clearing them (if something gets into eyes). It is prescribed for relief of the minor eye symptoms of itching and redness caused by dust, smoke, sun glare, ragweed, pollen, grass, animal hair and dander & controlling severe redness of eyes resulting from bacterial & allergic conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, blurred vision & increase in pressure of the eyes are the few side effects observed.

medicines.name: OPTISOFT EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Sodium Carboxymethylcellulose 0.5% w/v, Glycerin 0.5% w/v & Stabilized Oxychloro complex 0.01% w/v
medicines.description: Optisoft eye drops contain Carboxymethylcellulose & Glycerine, an eye lubricant & nourisher that prevents and treats dry eyes. It is used for the temporary relief & treatment of burning, irritation and discomfort due to dryness of the eye or exposure to wind or sun, dry eye syndrome, provides benefit for those who wear contact lenses & dryness in eyes after Lasik or Cataracts surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: This is highly safe drug. Blurred vision, minor burning, stinging or irritation may temporarily occur.

medicines.name: OPTISOFT PLUS EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Carboxymethylcellulose Sodium 0.3% w/v, N-Acetyl Carnosine 1% w/v, Glycerin 1% w/v & Boric Acid 0.1% w/v
medicines.description: Optisoft Plus eye drop contains Carboxymethylcellulose Sodium, N-Acetyl Carnosine, Glycerin & Boric Acid; together they offer lubrication & strong anti-ageing benefits to the eye/s. It is prescribed for slowing progression of Cataract, Dry eyes, Computer vision syndrome, Eye strain, Eye inflammation, Blurred vision, to have powerful antioxidant effect on eyes, to prevent complications of diabetes mellitus and other systemic diseases in eyes & provides benefit for those who wear contact lenses.
medicines.sideEffects: The drops are very well tolerated; mild irritation is the only known side effect.

medicines.name: GASOWEL SUSPENSION (MINT)
medicines.composition: Each 10 ml of suspension contains Dried Aluminium Hydroxide 830 mg, Magnesium Hydroxide 185 mg, Simethicone 50 mg & Sodium Carboxymethylcellulose 100 mg (Sugar Free)
medicines.description: Gasowel suspension contains Dried Magnesium hydroxide, Magnesium hydroxide and Sodium Carboxymethylcellulose are antacids and Simethicone is a anti-flatulent. Gasowel relieves symptoms of peptic ulcer, gastritis, inflammation of food pipe, hiatus hernia and other dyspeptic conditions associated with hyperacidity. Gasowel also helps in relieving burning sensation in the stomach, burping, bloating, discomfort and pain caused by excess gas in the stomach.
