medicines.name: EYELET EYE OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Carboxymethylcellulose 0.3 % w/v & Glycerin 1% w/w.
medicines.description: Eyelet Eye Ointment is a prescription medicine used to treat symptoms of dry eyes. It lubricates the eyes and helps in maintaining the moisture of the eyes. This way it provides temporary relief from burning and discomfort caused by dry eyes. It also reduces redness and swelling of the eye.
medicines.sideEffects: It may cause irritation & pain in the eyes.

medicines.name: DANTOX ENAMEL REPAIR TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Hydroxyapatite (Calcium Phosphate), Sodium Monofluorophospate, Sodium CMC,Vitamin E Acetate,Glycerin (Cool Mint flavour)
medicines.description: Dantox Enamel Repair Toothpaste features Hydroxyapatite to rebuild and strengthen tooth enamel, combined with Sodium Monofluorophosphate for cavity protection. Enriched with Vitamin E and a refreshing cool mint flavor, it promotes strong teeth and fresh breath.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects & safe to use.
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of product onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT ENAMEL REPAIR TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Hydroxyapatite (Calcium Phosphate), Sodium Monofluorophospate, Sodium CMC, Vitamin E Acetate & Glycerin (Cool Mint flavor)
medicines.description: Hydroxyapatite helps remineralize and strengthen enamel, while Sodium Monofluorophosphate protects against cavities. Sodium CMC acts as a thickening agent, Vitamin E supports gum health with antioxidant properties, and Glycerin keeps the paste smooth and moisturizes the oral tissues. This combination promotes enamel repair, cavity prevention, and overall oral health.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects are rare but may include mild gum irritation, sensitivity, or allergic reactions such as redness or swelling.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount of toothpaste onto your toothbrush and brush gently for 2 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water. Use twice daily for best results. Avoid swallowing and consult a dentist if irritation occurs.

medicines.name: CATAFORD EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Potassium Iodide 3.30% w/v, Calcium Chloride 1% w/v, Sodium Chloride 0.83% w/v
medicines.description: Cataford eye drop contains Potassium Iodide, Calcium Chloride & Sodium Chloride; all of which are electrolytes and is responsible for lens clarity & pressure within them so as to prevent Cataract. It is prescribed for clarity of lens membranes pre & postoperatively for clear vision in Cataract; in all patients where Cataract operation is postponed due to any reason & it also delays Cataract formation, maintains normal lens nutrition & prevents eye sight deterioration in Cataract.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild eye irritation is the only reported side effects.

medicines.name: NOZCALM NASAL SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Sodium Chloride 0.65% w/v
medicines.description: Nozcalm nasal drops contains Sodium Chloride, a natural substance to sooth the daily irritations by increasing hydration. Nozcalm Nasal Drops are used to treat dryness inside the nose (nasal passages). It helps add moisture inside the nose to dissolve and soften thick or crusty mucus in babies and young children with stuffy noses who cannot blow their noses, using this product helps to make the mucus easier to remove. This helps relieve stuffiness and makes breathing easier.
medicines.sideEffects: Temporary burning & stinging sensation are the main side effects.

medicines.name: PEGFORD
medicines.composition: Each 25 ml of solution contains:Polyethylene glycol 13.125 g, Sodium Chloride 0.3507 g, Sodium Bicarbonate 0.1785 g & Potassium Chloride 0.0466 g
medicines.description: Pegford solution contains Polyethylene glycol 3350 an osmotic laxative with electrolytes. It works by causing water to be retained with the stool. Pegford solution is indicated for clearing the colon (bowel) before medical tests such as colonoscopy, barium enema X-ray exam and colon surgery etc. & for the expulsion of toxic ingestions. It is also indicated for the treatment of occasional constipation in Patients above 2 years of age.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, bloating, cramping, gas, diarrhea and hives.

medicines.name: ANAS DEE-2% INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Lignocaine Hydrochloride 21.3 mg in 30 ml vial
medicines.description: Anas-Dee 2% injection contains Lignocaine, a local anaesthetic used to numb specific areas of the body during minor surgical procedures, dental work, or diagnostic tests. It works by blocking nerve signals in the targeted area thus providing temporary relief from pain. Anas-Dee injection is effective for short-term pain management & for local and regional anaesthesia.
medicines.sideEffects: Temporary redness, stinging and swelling may occur at the site.

medicines.name: NOZCALM ISOTONIC NASAL SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each spray delivers Sodium Chloride 0.9% w/v (Isotonic nasal spray)
medicines.description: Nozcalm Isotonic Nasal Spray contains Sodium Chloride, a gentle solution designed to cleanse and moisturize nasal passages. Nozcalm helps relieve nasal congestion, dryness and irritation caused by colds, allergies or dry air. It is highly suitable for all ages & is safe for daily use.
medicines.sideEffects: Temporary burning & stinging sensation are the main side effects Allergic reactions in the nose, eyes, ears and lungs may exacerbate.

medicines.name: NOZCALM-RS
medicines.composition: Sodium Chloride 3% w/v
medicines.description: Nozcalm-RS is used for symptomatic relief of the blocked nose due to certain conditions like sinusitis, allergic rhinitis, congestion and moisturizes the nasal passage. It contains sodium chloride as its active ingredient. It should be used in cases only if prescribed by the doctor. It also helps to maintain nasal hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally no side effects

medicines.name: COLDMINE SYRUP (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Paracetamol 125 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 1 mg & Sodium Citrate 60 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine an decongestant, Chlorpheniramine, Sodium Citrate and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is used to treat fever, headache, body aches, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD KID
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Paracetamol 125 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 1 mg & Sodium Citrate 60 mg
medicines.description: Criticold Kid syrup is a combination medicine which contains Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Phenylephrine a decongestant and Chlorpheniramine & Sodium Citrate that effectively relieves symptoms of common cold such as blocked nose, runny nose, fever, watery eyes and sneezing, allergic rhinitis and nasal congestion.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, allergic reaction, sleepiness and dizziness

medicines.name: ENLIZER 3C
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of sugar free syrup contains Potassium Citrate 550 mg, Sodium Citrate 500 mg & Citric acid 334 mg
medicines.description: Enlizer 3C syrup contains Potassium citrate, Sodium citrate and Citric acid. They act together to balance pH of urine to treat the accumulation of acid in the body caused by kidney failure. It helps in conditions when long term maintenance of alkaline urine is desirable like in treatment of patients with uric acid and cystic stones of the urinary tract along with uric acid drugs in gout therapy to prevent damage to kidneys by uric acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are chest Pain, confusion, feeling lightheaded, fast or irregular heartbeat, tingling, numbness in the hands or feet and weakness.

medicines.name: ALKAZIP SODA
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains effervescent granules of Sodium Bicarbonate 44.03% w/w, Sodium Citrate 15.75% w/w, Citric acid 17.88% w/w & Tartaric acid 22.25% w/w Sugar Free, Lemon Flavour
medicines.description: Alkazip soda contains Sodium Bicarbonate, Sodium Citrate, Citric Acid & Tartaric Acid, all of these salts make up an antacid that neutralizes stomach acid & an urinary alkalizer that helps make urine alkaline or less acidic. It is prescribed in cases of temporary relief from minor gastric upsets; incombination with antibiotics, when the effectiveness of an antibiotic is increased in the presence of alkaline urine & in urinary conditions where alkaline urine will benefit & help kidneys to get rid of uric acid in blood as well as removes kidney stones due to high uric acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea and stomach pain may occur.

medicines.name: CALALAYER LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Calamine 15% w/v, Zinc Oxide 5% w/v, Bentonite 3% w/v, Sodium Citrate 0.5% w/v, Liquefied Phenol 0.5% v/v & Glycerin 5% w/v
medicines.description: Calalayer lotion contains Calamine & Zinc mild antibacterial and soothing agent that relieves redness & itching; Bentonite, Sodium Citrate & liquefied Phenol these acts by stoping skin itching, irritation & detoxifying skin; Glycerin, has skin nourishing benefits. It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effect.

medicines.name: ALKAZIP-3C (100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Potassium Citrate 550 mg, Sodium Citrate 500 mg & Citric acid 334 mg (SUGAR FREE)
medicines.description: Alkazip-3C syrup contains Potassium citrate, Sodium citrate and Citric acid. They act together to balance pH of urine to treat the accumulation of acid in the body caused by kidney failure. It helps in conditions when long term maintenance of alkaline urine is desirable like in treatment of patients with uric acid and cystic stones of the urinary tract along with uric acid drugs in gout therapy to prevent damage to kidneys by uric acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are chest Pain, confusion, feeling lightheaded, fast or irregular heartbeat, tingling, numbness in the hands or feet and weakness.

medicines.name: COLDMINE-DS SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Paracetamol 250 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5 mg & Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2 mg, Ammonium Chloride 120 mg, Sodium Citrate 60 mg & Menthol 1 mg
medicines.description: Coldmine-DS suspension is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a nasal decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic, Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Ammonium Chloride, an expectorant & Menthol for soothing properties. It is used in the treatment of common cold. It provides relief from symptoms such as fever, headache, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies, viral fevers & common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, throat, headache, loss of appetite, feeling sleepy, stomach upset and nausea.

medicines.name: CRITICOLD-DS SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Paracetamol 250 mg, Phenylephrine 5 mg, Chlorpheniramine 2 mg, Ammonium Chloride 120 mg, Sodium Citrate 60 mg & Menthol 1 mg
medicines.description: Criticold-DS suspension is a combination medicine which contains Phenylephrine a nasal decongestant, Chlorpheniramine an anti-allergic, Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic, Ammonium Chloride an expectorant & Menthol for soothing properties. It is used in the treatment of common cold. It provides relief from symptoms such as fever, headache, runny or stuffy nose, sneezing, itching, watery eyes and sinus congestion caused by allergies or common cold.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dry mouth, nose, throat, headache, loss of appetite, feeling sleepy, stomach upset and nausea.

medicines.name: OPTIFLEV EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Flurbiprofen Sodium 0.3 mg w/v & Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose 2.5 mg w/v
medicines.description: Optiflev eye drops contain Flurbiprofen, an anti-inflammatory drug that also prevents constriction of pupil of the eye thus making eye surgery easy. It is prescribed during Cataract surgeries for prevention of constriction of pupil and in post-surgical inflammation of the eye/s.
medicines.sideEffects: The drug is very well tolerated, transient burning and stinging upon instillation of drops are the only known side effects.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT TOOTHPASTE (50 g & 100 g)
medicines.composition: Triclosan 0.3% w/w, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w with Cooling Crystals (Gel Toothpaste)
medicines.description: Ultradent toothpaste is a total daily protection tooth paste that provides overall protection to oral cavity, teeth and gums. Ultradent toothpaste relieves mild sensitivity, removes plaque, freshens breathe and inhibits the growth of cavity causing bacteria besides being a good mouth wash for overall oral hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated without any side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of Ultradent toothpaste onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT INSTA SENSITIVITY TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Insta Sensitive Repair Plus Toothpaste
medicines.description: Ultradent Sensitivity tooth paste is a medicated paste to relieve dental hypersensitivity immediately after application. Ultradent Sensitivity paste acts by making a neurosensory block at the nerve root of tooth & protects from cavity or prevents increase in their size. It also reduces the demineralization of enamel and dentin by decreasing the acid production by harmful bacteria.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Use Ultradent Sensitivity as a regular tooth paste twice daily for increasing protection against sensitivity of teeth to cold, heat, acids, sweets or contact & also helps in the prevention of dental cavities. Apply one inch length of paste onto a soft bristle toothbrush to brush as usual, ensuring to brush all sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing. It not only provides relief in sensitive teeth, but also actually helps repair the sensitive areas of the teeth. Do not use longer than 4 weeks, without dental recommendations. Keep out of reach of children under 6 years of age.

medicines.name: ENSHINE TOOTHPASTE (50g,100g & 150g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Triclosan 0.3%, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w, with cooling crystals ( GEL TOOTHPASTE)
medicines.description: Enshine gel toothpaste is a multi-action formula for healthy teeth and gums. Enshine gel toothpaste relieves mild sensitivity, removes plaque, freshens breath and inhibits the growth of cavity causing bacteria besides providing overall oral hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects & safe to use
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of product onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: DANTOX TOOTHPASTE (50 g & 100 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Triclosan 0.3%, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w, with cooling crystals ( GEL TOOTHPASTE)
medicines.description: Dantox gel toothpaste is a multi-action formula for healthy teeth and gums. Dantox gel toothpaste relieves mild sensitivity, removes plaque, freshens breath and inhibits the growth of cavity causing bacteria besides providing overall oral hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects & safe to use.
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of product onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: DANTOX ENAMEL REPAIR TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Hydroxyapatite (Calcium Phosphate), Sodium Monofluorophospate, Sodium CMC,Vitamin E Acetate,Glycerin (Cool Mint flavour)
medicines.description: Dantox Enamel Repair Toothpaste features Hydroxyapatite to rebuild and strengthen tooth enamel, combined with Sodium Monofluorophosphate for cavity protection. Enriched with Vitamin E and a refreshing cool mint flavor, it promotes strong teeth and fresh breath.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects & safe to use.
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of product onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT ENAMEL REPAIR TOOTHPASTE
medicines.composition: Hydroxyapatite (Calcium Phosphate), Sodium Monofluorophospate, Sodium CMC, Vitamin E Acetate & Glycerin (Cool Mint flavor)
medicines.description: Hydroxyapatite helps remineralize and strengthen enamel, while Sodium Monofluorophosphate protects against cavities. Sodium CMC acts as a thickening agent, Vitamin E supports gum health with antioxidant properties, and Glycerin keeps the paste smooth and moisturizes the oral tissues. This combination promotes enamel repair, cavity prevention, and overall oral health.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects are rare but may include mild gum irritation, sensitivity, or allergic reactions such as redness or swelling.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount of toothpaste onto your toothbrush and brush gently for 2 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water. Use twice daily for best results. Avoid swallowing and consult a dentist if irritation occurs.

medicines.name: FREELEX PLUS SUSPENSION
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Milk of Magnesia 3.75 ml, Liquid Paraffin 1.25 ml & Sodium Picosulphate 3.33 mg
medicines.description: Freelex plus suspension relieves acidity and treats constipation. Its Milk of magnesia treats acidity whereas Liquid paraffin and Sodium Picosulphate treats constipation by two different mechanisms to provide effective relief. Freelex Plus is used for short term treatment of constipation associated with Piles, Anal Fissure, Cardiovascular disorder, Hernia, Pre and Post- operative condition, Endoscopy, for bowel clearance before radioscopy. It also relieves sour stomach and heartburn.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, stomach pain, and even diarrhea.

medicines.name: PICOLEX SYRUP (100 ml & 200 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Sodium Picosulphate 5 mg
medicines.description: Picolex Syrup/ Tablet contains Sodium Picosulfate which is used for the short-term relief of occasional constipation. Sodium Picosulfate is a stimulant laxative. It works by increasing the movement of the intestines, thereby facilitating the passage of stool.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, stomach pain and diarrhea.

medicines.name: LAXOCLEAR SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Sodium Picosulphate 5 mg (Sugar free)
medicines.description: Laxoclear contain Sodium Picosulfate which is used for the short-term relief from occasional constipation. Sodium Picosulfate is a stimulant laxative. It works by increasing the movement of the intestines, thereby facilitating the passage of stool.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, abdominal, stomach pain and diarrhea.?

medicines.name: LACMOLAX PLUS
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Milk of Magnesia 3.75 ml, Liquid Paraffin 1.25 ml & Sodium Picosulphate 3.33 mg
medicines.description: Lacmolax Plus suspension relieves acidity and treats constipation. Its Milk of magnesia treats acidity whereas Liquid paraffin and Sodium Picosulphate treats constipation by two different mechanisms to provide effective relief. Lacmolax Plus is used for short term treatment of constipation associated with Piles, Anal Fissure, Cardiovascular disorder, Hernia, Pre and Post- operative condition, Endoscopy, for bowel clearance before radioscopy. It also relieves sour stomach and heartburn.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, stomach pain, and even diarrhea.

medicines.name: PICOLEX TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Sodium Picosulphate 10 mg
medicines.description: Picolex Syrup/ Tablet contains Sodium Picosulfate which is used for the short-term relief of occasional constipation. Sodium Picosulfate is a stimulant laxative. It works by increasing the movement of the intestines, thereby facilitating the passage of stool.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, stomach pain and diarrhea.

medicines.name: LAXOCLEAR TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Sodium Picosulphate 10 mg
medicines.description: Laxoclear contain Sodium Picosulfate which is used for the short-term relief from occasional constipation. Sodium Picosulfate is a stimulant laxative. It works by increasing the movement of the intestines, thereby facilitating the passage of stool.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, abdominal, stomach pain and diarrhea.

medicines.name: PICOLEX KID SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml syrup contains Sodium Picosulphate 2.5 mg
medicines.description: Picolex Kid Syrup contains Sodium Picosulfate which is used for the short-term relief of occasional constipation. Sodium Picosulfate is a stimulant laxative. It works by increasing the movement of the intestines, thereby facilitating the passage of stool.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, vomiting, abdominal cramps, stomach pain and diarrhoea.

medicines.name: RECALMIN-D3 FEM
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Calcitriol 0.25 mcg, Calcium Carbonate 500 mg eq. to elemental Calcium 200 mg, SoyaIsoflavones (40%) 50 mg, Vit K2 7 45 mcg & Magnesium as light Magnesium Oxide 50 mg
medicines.description: Recalmin-D3 Fem softgels contain Calcitriol (A bioactive form of Vitamin D3), Calcium and Soyaisoflovones, for healthy bones in females, Vitamin K2 7 and Magnesium for overall bone health. Recalmin-D3 fem softgels are formulated specially for women and are indicated in treatment of post-menopausal Osteoporosis and to reduce the risk of Osteoporosis.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are diarrhea, constipation, upset stomach and abdominal pain.

medicines.name: TINFAL-ADVANCE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Evening Primrose Oil (GLA) 20 mg, Millet Seed Extract 100 mg, Grape Seed Extract 50 mg, Ginkgo biloba Extract 100 mg, Soy Isoflavones 50 mg, Beta-Sitosterol 100 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 100 mg, Lysine 30 mg, Methionine 50 mg, Vitamin B3 11 mg, Pantothenic Acid 5 mg, Vitamin B6 1.5 mg, Vitamin B1 1.1 mg, Folic Acid 100 mcg, Biotin 40 mcg, Vitamin D2 600 IU, Iron 29 mg, Copper 1 mg, Selenium 40 mcg, Zinc 10 mg, Choline 5 mg & Melatonin 1 mg.
medicines.description: Tinfal-Advance tablets is a potent supplement that contains multivitamins, multiminerals along with Amino Acids, Ginkgo Biloba extract, Beta-Sitosterol, Millet seed extract and grape seed extract to support hair growth and overall hair health. Ginkgo Biloba enhances circulation, while millet seed and grape seed extracts provide vital nutrients for hair strength. Beta-Sitosterol helps balance DHT levels thus promoting healthy hair growth. Together, these ingredients nourish the scalp and improve hair vitality.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally, this tablet has no side effects if used as prescribed.
medicines.dosage: One (1) tablet daily after any meal or as prescribed by physician

medicines.name: FEMIVIN-ISO
medicines.composition: Each film-coated tablet contains Soy Isoflavones 100 mg,El Magnesium 100 mg, Vit C 40 mg, Nicotinamide 14 mg, El. Iron 12 mg, Vit E 10 mg, El. Zinc 10 mg, Calcium Pantothenate 5 mg, Vit B6 2 mg, Vit. B2 1.3 mg, Vit. B1 1.1 mg, El. Copper 1 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg(2000 IU), El. Manganese 0.5 mg, El. Iodine 150 mcg, Folic Acid 100 mcg, El. Chromium 50 mcg, El. Selenium 40 mcg, Biotin 30 mcg & Vit. D 10 mcg (400 IU) & Vit. B12 1 mcg
medicines.description: Femivin-ISO is a combination of vitamins and mineral supplements prescribed to treat vitamin and other nutritional deficiencies. It ensures the proper growth and functioning of the body and strengthens immunity.
medicines.sideEffects: Usually no major side-effects are observed
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet daily with or after a meal

medicines.name: FOLIGRACE-ISO
medicines.composition: Each film-coated tablet contains Soy Isoflavones 100 mg, El. Magnesium 100 mg, Vit C 40 mg, Vit B3 14 mg, El. Iron 12 mg, Vit E 10 mg, El. Zinc 10 mg, Vit B5 5 mg, Vit B6 2 mg, Vit. B2 1.3 mg, Vit. B1 1.1 mg, El. Copper 1 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg (2000 IU), El. Manganese 0.5 mg, El. Iodine 150 mcg, Folic Acid 100 mcg, El. Chromium 50 mcg, El. Selenium 40 mcg, Biotin 30 mcg & Vit. D 10 mcg (400 IU) & Vit. B12 1 mcg
medicines.description: Foligrace-ISO combines essential vitamins and minerals with soy isoflavones, designed to support overall well-being. It includes a comprehensive range of B vitamins, antioxidants like Vitamins C and E, and key minerals such as magnesium, iron, zinc, and selenium. This blend aims to contribute to various bodily functions, from energy metabolism to immune health.
medicines.sideEffects: Usually no major side-effects are observed.
medicines.dosage: Generally taken once daily with a meal.

medicines.name: DURITE PLUS 10
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Torsemide 10 mg & Spironolactone 50 mg
medicines.description: Durite Plus tablet contains Torsemide & Spironolactone, both are diuretic which act by removing excessive water through kidney. It is prescribed in cases of increased BP & oedema due to organ failure.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are Constipation, Dizziness, Electrolyte imbalance, increased urination, Headache, heartburn, Insomnia & Nausea.

medicines.name: DURITE PLUS 20
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Torsemide 20 mg & Spironolactone 50 mg
medicines.description: Durite Plus tablet contains Torsemide & Spironolactone, both are diuretic which act by removing excessive water through kidney. It is prescribed in cases of increased BP & oedema due to organ failure.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are Constipation, Dizziness, Electrolyte imbalance, increased urination, Headache, heartburn, Insomnia & Nausea.

medicines.name: SPYVIT
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Spirulina ext. 500 mg, Calcium 75 mg, Phosphorus 58 mg, Iron 17 mg, Vit. C 15 mg, Niacin 10 mg, Zinc 7.8 mg, Vit. E 5 mg, Vit. B5 5 mg, Manganese 2 mg, Vit. B1 1.4 mg, Vit. B2 1.1 mg, Vit. B6 1 mg, Copper 1 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg, Folic acid 120 mcg, Iodine 100 mcg, Vit. B12 1 mcg & Vit. D3 200 IU
medicines.description: Spyvit softgel contains Spirulina (a proteins, rich in amino acids with Vitamins and minerals). Spyvit is indicated as a protein supplement, for allergic conditions, immune support, antibiotic associated diarrhoea, detoxification of heavy metals from the body, liver disorders and as general support in cases of weakness & during recovery from acute or chronic illness.
medicines.sideEffects: Spyvit softgels may cause gastrointestinal discomfort eg bloating, abdominal pain and rarely diarrhoea.
medicines.dosage: One to two softgels capsule to be taken twice or thrice daily from 6 years old children and above.

medicines.name: SUPHACID
medicines.composition: Each 10 ml of suspension contains Sucralfate 1000 mg & Oxetacaine 20 mg
medicines.description: Suphacid contains Sucralfate which forms a protective layer on the gastric mucosa & Oxetacaine relieves Pain by providing anesthetic effect. It is used in combination with antacids or alone for relief of pain in oesophagitis & acid peptic disease.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Constipation, diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, upset stomach, itching, rash, dizziness, drowsiness, sleep problems (insomnia), headache, or back pain.

medicines.name: PREGABANYL-M CAPSULE
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Pregabalin 75 mg & Mecobalamin 750 mcg
medicines.description: Pregabanyl-M Capsule is a combination of Pregabalin & Mecobalamin (Vitamin B12) & is used for neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy or spinal cord injury, postherpetic neuralgia, fibromyalgia and adjunctive therapy for partial onset seizures.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Dizziness, sleepiness, trouble concentrating, blurry vision, dry mouth, weight gain and swelling of hands or feet.

medicines.name: BIOCEF-S 1.5 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Ceftriaxone Sodium eq. to Ceftriaxone 1 g & sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq. to Sulbactam 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Biocef-S injection contains Ceftriaxone, a cephalosporin and Sulbactam, a beta lactamases inhibitor which acts synergistically to provide better results in difficult to treat infections. It is prescribed for respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, gynecological infections, intra-abdominal infections, for surgical prophylaxis, infections in blood as well bone and joint infections apart from others.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are pain, indurations and tenderness at the site of injection; others are rash, disturbances in white blood cell count, diarrhea & liver enzyme elevations.

medicines.name: BIOCEF-S 375
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Ceftriaxone Sodium eq. to Ceftriaxone 250 mg & sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq. to Sulbactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Biocef-S injection contains Ceftriaxone, a cephalosporin and Sulbactam, a beta lactamases inhibitor which acts synergistically to provide better results in difficult to treat infections. It is prescribed for respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, gynecological infections, intra-abdominal infections, for surgical prophylaxis, infections in blood as well bone and joint infections apart from others.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are pain, indurations and tenderness at the site of injection; others are rash, disturbances in white blood cell count, diarrhea & liver enzyme elevations.

medicines.name: CEFAPREX-S 1.5 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Cefoperazone Sodium eq. to Cefoperazone 1 g & sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq. to Sulbactam 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cefaprex-S injection contains Cefoperazone, a third generation cephalosporin with Sulbactam, a betalactamase inhibitor and together they act by inhibiting the growth of bacteria. It is prescribed for gynaecological infection, intra-abdominal infection, soft tissue infection, respiratory tract infection, blood infection & skin and soft tissue infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Cefoperazone & Sulbactam combination is generally well-tolerated; most frequent side effects are allergic skin reactions, headache, injection pain, chills and serious allergic reactions.

medicines.name: MEROPACE-S
medicines.composition: Each vial contains dry mixture of sterile Meropenem Trihydrate eq. to Anhydrous Meropenem 1 g, sterile Sodium Carbonate 90.2 mg & sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq. to Sulbactam 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Meropace-S injection contains a combination of Meropenem, a penem group antibiotic and Sulbactam, a betalactamases inhibitor that acts via stopping the growth of bacteria. A synergistic combination prescribed in cases of resistant brain infections, skin structure infections, intra-abdominal infections, blood infections and post-surgical infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Most frequently reported side effects are diarrhoea, rash, nausea/vomiting & injection site inflammation.

medicines.name: CEKOZEF-S 1.5 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Cefoperazone Sodium eq. to Cefoperazone 1 g & sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq. to Sulbactam 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cekozef-S injection contains Cefoperazone, a third generation cephalosporin with Sulbactam, a betalactamase inhibitor and together they act by inhibiting the growth of bacteria. It is prescribed for gynaecological infection, intra-abdominal infection, soft tissue infectection, respiratory tract infection, blood infection & skin and soft tissue infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Cefoperazone & Sulbactam combination is generally well-tolerated; most frequent side effects are allergic skin reactions, headache, injection pain, chills and serious allergic reactions.

medicines.name: WINTEX S 1.5 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Ceftriaxone Sodium eq. to Ceftriaxone 1 g & sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq. to Sulbactam 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Wintex-S injection contains Ceftriaxone, a cephalosporin and Sulbactam, a beta lactamases inhibitor which acts synergistically to provide better results in difficult to treat infections. It is prescribed for respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, gynecological infections, intra-abdominal infections, for surgical prophylaxis, infections in blood as well bone and joint infections apart from others.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are pain, indurations and tenderness at the site of injection; others are rash, disturbances in white blood cell count, diarrhea & liver enzyme elevations.

medicines.name: WINTEX-S 375
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Ceftriaxone Sodium eq. to Ceftriaxone 250 mg & sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq. to Sulbactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Wintex-S injection contains Ceftriaxone, a cephalosporin and Sulbactam, a beta lactamases inhibitor which acts synergistically to provide better results in difficult to treat infections. It is prescribed for respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, gynecological infections, intra-abdominal infections, for surgical prophylaxis, infections in blood as well bone and joint infections apart from others.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are pain, indurations and tenderness at the site of injection; others are rash, disturbances in white blood cell count, diarrhea & liver enzyme elevations.

medicines.name: WINTEX-S 750 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Ceftriaxone 500 mg & sterile Sulbactum 250 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Wintex-S 750 injection contains Ceftriaxone & Sulbactam. Ceftriaxone, a third-generation (cephalosporin) broad spectrum of bacteria, with Sulbactam, a β-lactamase inhibitor that enhances ceftriaxone's activity against β-lactamase-producing organisms. It is prescribed in the treatment of bacterial infections where broad-spectrum coverage is necessary which includes respiratory, urinary tract, skin, and intra-abdominal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are pain, indurations and tenderness at the site of injection; others are rash, disturbances in white blood cell count, diarrhea & liver enzyme elevations.

medicines.name: BIOCEF-S 750
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Sterile Ceftriaxone Sodium eq to Ceftriaxone 500 mg & Sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq to Sulbactam 250 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Biocef-S 750 is a combination of Ceftriaxone, a third-generation cephalosporin antibiotic, and Sulbactam, a beta-lactamase inhibitor. It offers broad-spectrum antibacterial activity, effective against both gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria, including resistant strains.
medicines.sideEffects: May include local injection site reactions, gastrointestinal upset, or allergic responses.

medicines.name: CEFAPREX-S 375
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Sterile Cefoperazone Sodium eq to Cefoperazone 250 mg & Sterile Sulbactam Sodium eq to Sulbactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cefaprex-S 375 combines Cefoperazone, a broad-spectrum third-generation cephalosporin, with Sulbactam, a beta-lactamase inhibitor. This synergistic formulation enhances bacterial coverage, especially against beta-lactamase producing organisms. Effective in treating respiratory, urinary, intra-abdominal, and skin infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Possible side effects include pain at the injection site, diarrhea, rash, or allergic reactions.

medicines.name: CEFAPREX-S 1 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Sterile Cefoperazone Sodium Eq. to Cefoperazone 500 mg & Sulbactam Sodium 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cefaprex-S 1 g is a powerful combination of Cefoperazone, a third-generation cephalosporin, and Sulbactam, a beta-lactamase inhibitor. This dual-action antibiotic is effective against a wide range of gram-positive and gram-negative bacterial infections, including resistant strains.
medicines.sideEffects: May cause mild injection site pain, nausea, diarrhea, or allergic reactions.

medicines.name: CEKOZEF-S 1g
medicines.composition: Cefoperazone 500 mg & Sulbactam 500 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cekozef-S 1 g is a potent combination of Cefoperazone, a third-generation cephalosporin antibiotic, and Sulbactam, a β-lactamase inhibitor. This formulation offers enhanced efficacy against β-lactamase-producing organisms and provides a broad-spectrum antibacterial effect. It is used in the treatment of serious bacterial infections, including respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, intra-abdominal infections, skin and soft tissue infections, gynecological infections, and septicemia.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Possible adverse effects include gastrointestinal disturbances, hypersensitivity reactions, rash, or local injection site discomfort. Rarely, hepatic enzyme alterations may occur.

medicines.name: CEKOZEF-S 375
medicines.composition: Cefoperazone 250 mg & Sulbactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Cekozef-S 375 is a broad-spectrum antibiotic composed of Cefoperazone and Sulbactam. Cefoperazone is a third-generation cephalosporin effective against a wide range of Gram-positive and Gram-negative organisms, while Sulbactam is a β-lactamase inhibitor that enhances the efficacy of Cefoperazone by inhibiting bacterial resistance mechanisms. This combination is used in the treatment of moderate to severe infections including respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, intra-abdominal infections, skin and soft tissue infections, and septicemia.
medicines.sideEffects: Well tolerated in most patients. May cause gastrointestinal disturbances, mild skin rash, or local reactions at the injection site. Hypersensitivity reactions are rare but possible.

medicines.name: NOSRAMYCIN POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Neomycin Sulphate 5 g, Bacitracin 250 units & Sulphacetamide Sodium 60 mg
medicines.description: Nosramycin powder contains Neomycin, Bacitracin & Sulphacetamide, combinations of antibiotic to provide effective eradication of disease causing bacteria from skin infections. It is prescribed for wound infections, burns, corroded skin, gangrene and in dusting of wounds after ear and nose surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: It is very well tolerated the side effects are allergic reactions & rashes.

medicines.name: NAPROWEL-S
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Naproxen 500 mg & Sumatriptan 85 mg
medicines.description: Naprowel-S tablet contain Naproxen a NSAID and Sumatriptan a migraine specific analgesic. It is used to treat migraine and cluster headache. It is indicated for treatment of acute migraine attacks (with or without aura) in patients above 12 years of age.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are confusion, headache, ringing in the ears, changes in vision, tiredness, drowsiness, dizziness, rashes, flushing, tingling feeling, upset stomach, diarrhea, nausea and muscle cramps.

medicines.name: NAXPESURE-S
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Naproxen 500 mg & Sumatriptan 85 mg
medicines.description: Naxpesure-S is a combination of two medicines that relieves the symptoms of migraines and prevents the attack from becoming worse. This medicine helps by narrowing the blood vessels, thereby relieving migraine headaches.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects associated with the use of this medicine include nausea, heartburn, chest discomfort, dry mouth, weakness, muscle stiffness, drowsiness, numbness of extremities, and irregular heartbeats.

medicines.name: LYCOZON-SG
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Lycopene 10% 4000 mcg, Lutein 10% 4000 mcg, Beta carotene 30% 5.17 mg, Black Grape seed extract 10 mg, Selenium dioxide monohydrate 25 mcg & Zinc sulphate monohydrate 10 mg
medicines.description: Lycozon softgels contain Lycopene (Antioxidant), Grape seed extract, betacarotene (also an Antioxidant) in combination with minerals for good health and well-being. Lycozon softgel is used in anti-ageing, cardiovascular diseases, general weakness, boosting immunity, male infertility, Pre-eclampsia (high Blood pressure) in Pregnancy, IUGR (low growth of baby in pregnancy) and Gingivitis.
medicines.sideEffects: Lycozon-SG softgels generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: ACTIHAIR PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Biotin 10 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 50 mg, Calcium Pantothenate 100 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to elemental Selenium 65 mcg , Cupric Oxide eq. to elemental Copper 3 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 22.5 mg
medicines.description: Actihair Plus tablet contains Biotin & Calcium Pantothenate, both are B group vitamins to regulate metabolism and aid in growth of hair; N-Acetyl Cysteine, an antioxidant that prevents damage to hair follicle & Selenium, Copper & Zinc, three antioxidant elements that stops free radical damage to hair and aid in their growth. It is prescribed for general growth & well-being, chronic diseases & for maintenance of healthy hair, skin and nails.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach discomfort, pain and bloating are the few observed side effects.

medicines.name: ACTISIGHT PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Vaccinium myrtillus (Bilberry ext.) 40 mg, Pinus gerardiana (Pine bark ext.) 25 mg, Lutein (40%) 10 mg, Astaxanthin (10%) 4 mg, Zeaxanthin (5%) 2 mg, Vit. C 40 mg, Vit. E 5 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg, Zinc 10 mg, Copper 1 mg & Selenium 40 mcg
medicines.description: Actisight Plus tablet contains Vaccinium myrtillus, Pinus gerardiana, Carotenoids along with multivitamins that supports eye health in all age groups above 6 years, strengthens vision & further reduces intraocular pressure. It improves visual field, visual sharpness and reduces the rate of visual decline. It helps to treat Glaucoma, treats Retinitis Pigmentosa and dry eyes besides maintain eyesight.
medicines.sideEffects: Actisight Plus tablet generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist.
medicines.dosage: One Tablet once or twice daily.

medicines.name: HEPLOFIT FORTE
medicines.composition: Silymarin Extract (80%) 250 mg, Coenyme Q10 60 mg, L-Carnitine Tartrate 50 mg, Choline Bitartrate 25 mg, N-Acetyl L-Cysteine 75 mg, L-Ornithine Mono HCl 75 mg, Zn 7.5 mg, Se 40 mcg, Vit. C 65 mg, D-Panthenol 5 mg, Vit. B1 1.4 mg, Vit. B2 1.9 mg, Vit. B6 4.5 mg, Vit. B12 2.2 mcg & Folic Acid 129 mcg / 15 ml
medicines.description: Heplofit Forte suspension offers a blend of liver support (Silymarin, Choline, NAC, L-Ornithine), cellular energy and antioxidant power (Coenzyme Q10, L-Carnitine, Vitamin C, Selenium), and essential B vitamins (B1, B2, B6, B12, D-Panthenol, Folic Acid) along with Zinc. It is formulated to promote overall metabolic health, support detoxification processes, and enhance energy production.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects like digestive disturbances, allergic reactions, headache or dizziness, gastrointestinal upset &/or skin reactions may occur
medicines.dosage: Take 15 ml suspension once or twice a day after meal or as directed by physician.

medicines.name: WALCOBAL PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Softgelatin capsule contains Benfotiamine 150 mg, Mecobalamin 1500 mcg, Alpha Lipoic acid 100 mg, Inositol 100 mg, Folic acid 1.5 mg, El. Chromium 200 mcg & El. Selenium 55 mcg
medicines.description: Walcobal Plus is a nutraceutical formulation designed to support nerve health and metabolic function. It contains Benfotiamine and Mecobalamin for nerve regeneration, Alpha Lipoic Acid as a potent antioxidant, and essential micronutrients like Inositol, Folic Acid, Chromium, and Selenium to support glucose metabolism and cellular repair. It is used as an adjunct in the management of diabetic neuropathy and related nerve disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well-tolerated. Mild gastrointestinal discomfort or allergic reactions may occur in sensitive individuals.

medicines.name: DINCERIN-CT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Hydrochloride 750 mg, Methylsufonyl Methane 250 mg, Chondroitin sulphate sodium 100 mg, Vitamin C 40 mg, Vitamin D3 200 IU, Zinc 4 mg, Manganese 3 mg, Copper 0.5 mg, Boron 0.5 mg, Selenium 40 mcg & Chromium 33 mcg
medicines.description: This combination supports joint and bone health by reducing inflammation, promoting cartilage repair, and enhancing mobility. Glucosamine, chondroitin, and MSM help maintain joint structure, while cholecalciferol, calcium ascorbate, and multiminerals support bone strength, calcium absorption, and collagen synthesis for overall musculoskeletal health
medicines.sideEffects: This combination may cause mild side effects such as nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or headache. High doses can lead to allergic reactions, kidney issues, or interfere with blood sugar and mineral balance.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet per day, preferably with food to improve absorption and minimize gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: AQUA JOY MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate solution eq. to Chlorhexidine Gluconate 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc Chloride 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Joy mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate, an antibacterial agent; Sodium Fluoride, an anti-cavity agent & Zinc Chloride, to stop odour in mouth. Aqua Joy mouthwash is used for prevention of plaque in absence of brushing, prevention and treatment of swollen gums, treatment of minor oral infections, controlling secondary bacterial infections for mouth & gum ulcers besides aiding in treatment of mouth and throat infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effect observed.
medicines.dosage: Take a measure full or 15 ml of Aqua Joy mouthwash in your mouth & swish for one minute thoroughly. Do not rinse, eat or drink thereafter for 20 minutes. It is to be used under adult supervision for kids under 5 years of age. Do not swallow it, after swishing thoroughly spit out. Can be used twice daily once in the morning and then before retiring to bed.

medicines.name: DANTOX MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Dantox Mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine, Sodium Fluoride, and Zinc, used to promote oral hygiene. Chlorhexidine helps reduce bacteria, while Sodium Fluoride strengthens tooth enamel and prevents cavities. Zinc helps reduce bad breath and plaque buildup. Together, they support healthy gums, freshen breath, and protect teeth from decay and gum disease, providing an effective addition to daily oral care.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects are tooth staining, change in taste, and hard dental plaque.
medicines.dosage: 10 ml twice a day after equally mixing with water or as prescribed by physician

medicines.name: ULTRADENT MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Ultradent Mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine, Sodium Fluoride, and Zinc, used to promote oral hygiene. Chlorhexidine helps reduce bacteria, while Sodium Fluoride strengthens tooth enamel and prevents cavities. Zinc helps reduce bad breath and plaque buildup. Together, they support healthy gums, freshen breath, and protect teeth from decay and gum disease, providing an effective addition to daily oral care.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects are tooth staining, change in taste, and hard dental plaque.
medicines.dosage: 10 ml twice a day after equally mixing with water or as prescribed by physician

medicines.name: ULTRADENT SENSITIVITY MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Potassium Nitrate 3% w/v & Sodium Fluoride 0.2% w/v
medicines.description: Ultradent Sensitivity Mouthwash is formulated to provide fast and long-lasting relief from tooth sensitivity. Potassium Nitrate helps soothe nerve endings in exposed dentin, while Sodium Fluoride strengthens enamel and prevents cavities. It also aids in freshening breath, reducing plaque formation, and maintaining overall oral hygiene when used as part of a daily dental care routine.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Rarely, mild irritation or allergic reaction may occur. Discontinue use if sensitivity persists.
medicines.dosage: Use 10–15 ml of Ultradent Sensitivity Mouthwash undiluted, rinse thoroughly for 30 seconds, and spit out. Use twice daily after brushing. Do not swallow.

medicines.name: PEGFORD
medicines.composition: Each 25 ml of solution contains:Polyethylene glycol 13.125 g, Sodium Chloride 0.3507 g, Sodium Bicarbonate 0.1785 g & Potassium Chloride 0.0466 g
medicines.description: Pegford solution contains Polyethylene glycol 3350 an osmotic laxative with electrolytes. It works by causing water to be retained with the stool. Pegford solution is indicated for clearing the colon (bowel) before medical tests such as colonoscopy, barium enema X-ray exam and colon surgery etc. & for the expulsion of toxic ingestions. It is also indicated for the treatment of occasional constipation in Patients above 2 years of age.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, bloating, cramping, gas, diarrhea and hives.

medicines.name: DYNACID SACHET (LEMON)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g contains Svarjiksara (Shudh) 2.63g, Nimbukamlam (Shushkam) 1.91 g (Lemon Flavour)
medicines.description: Dynacid Sachets contains a balanced mix of Svarjiksara (Sudh) & Nimbu Satva (Nimbukamlam) which is widely used as an antacid, providing quick relief from acidity, heartburn and gas. Its actives neutralizes increased stomach acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Dynacid sachets are very well tolerated & common side effects are diarrhea, on over use.

medicines.name: ALKAZIP SODA
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains effervescent granules of Sodium Bicarbonate 44.03% w/w, Sodium Citrate 15.75% w/w, Citric acid 17.88% w/w & Tartaric acid 22.25% w/w Sugar Free, Lemon Flavour
medicines.description: Alkazip soda contains Sodium Bicarbonate, Sodium Citrate, Citric Acid & Tartaric Acid, all of these salts make up an antacid that neutralizes stomach acid & an urinary alkalizer that helps make urine alkaline or less acidic. It is prescribed in cases of temporary relief from minor gastric upsets; incombination with antibiotics, when the effectiveness of an antibiotic is increased in the presence of alkaline urine & in urinary conditions where alkaline urine will benefit & help kidneys to get rid of uric acid in blood as well as removes kidney stones due to high uric acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea and stomach pain may occur.

medicines.name: GASOWEL SACHET (ORANGE)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet contains Svarjiksara (Shudh) 2.85 g & Nimbukamlam (Shushkam) 1.95 g & Pippermint 0.111 gm (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Gasowel sachet contains acidity fighting ingredients namely Swvarjiksara, Nimbukamlam & Pippermint. It is indicated for the symptomatic relief from acidity, heartburn, acid indigestion and sour stomach.
medicines.sideEffects: Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects.

medicines.name: GASOWEL SACHET (COLA)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet contains Svarjiksara (Shudh) 2.63 g & Nimbukamlam (Shushlkam) 1.91 g

medicines.sideEffects: Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects.

medicines.name: GASOWEL SACHET (JEERA)

medicines.description: Gasowel sachet contains acidity fighting ingredients namely Svarjiksara and Nimbukamlam & Jeera. It is indicated for the symptomatic relief from acidity, heartburn, acid indigestion and sour stomach.
medicines.sideEffects: Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects.

medicines.name: DYNACID ADVANCE SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Sodium Alginate 250 mg, Sodium Bicarbonate 133.5 mg & Calcium Carbonate 80 mg (SUGAR FREE)
medicines.description: Dynacid Advance Suspension contains a balanced mix of ingredients that are widely used as an antacid, providing quick relief from acidity, heartburn and gas. Sodium bicarbonate and Calcium Carbonate is used to relieve heartburn, sour stomach, or acid indigestion by neutralizing excess stomach acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, constipation, diarrhea, or headache.

medicines.name: DOSMIFORD-1000
medicines.composition: Each Enteric Coated tablet contains Sodium Bicarbonate 1000 mg
medicines.description: Dosmiford-1000 contains Sodium Bicarbonate, an alkalizer which acts as a buffer against metabolic acidosis in renal failure patients or acute kidney injury patients & acts by raising decreased blood pH to normalize it.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are increased sodium level in blood, metabolic alkalosis, Headache, Muscle pain and twitching, Nausea or vomiting, Nervousness or restlessness, Unpleasant taste & increased frequency in urination.

medicines.name: DOSMIFORD-500
medicines.composition: Each Enteric Coated tablet contains Sodium Bicarbonate 500 mg
medicines.description: Dosmiford-500 contains Sodium Bicarbonate, an alkalizer which acts as a buffer against metabolic acidosis in renal failure patients or acute kidney injury patients & acts by raising decreased blood pH to normalize it.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Increased sodium level in blood, Metabolic alkalosis, Headache, Muscle pain and twitching, Nausea or vomiting, Nervousness or restlessness, Unpleasant taste & Increased frequency in urination.

medicines.name: DYNACID ADVANCE TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated chewable tablet contains Sodium Alginate 250 mg, Sodium Bicarbonate 106.5 mg & Calcium Carbonate 187.5 mg.
medicines.description: Dynacid Advance tablets contain a balanced mix of powerful ingredients that are widely used as an antacid, providing quick relief from acidity, heartburn and gas. Sodium bicarbonate and Calcium Carbonate is used to relieve heartburn, sour stomach or acid indigestion by neutralizing excess stomach acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, constipation, diarrhea, or headache.

medicines.name: DYNACID SACHET (AJWAIN)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g contains Svarjiksara (Shudh) 2.72 g, Nimbukamlam (Shushkam) 1.97 g (Ajwain Flavour)
medicines.description: Dynacid Sachets contains a balanced mix of Svarjiksara (Sudh) & Nimbu Satva (Nimbukamlam) which is widely used as an antacid, providing quick relief from acidity, heartburn and gas. Its actives neutralizes increased stomach acid. (AJWAIN)
medicines.sideEffects: Dynacid sachets are very well tolerated & common side effects are diarrhea, on over use.

medicines.name: GASOWEL SACHET (IMLI)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet contains Svarjiksara (Shudh) 2.71 g & Nimbusatva (Citrus medica) 1.96 g (Imli Flavour)
medicines.description: Gasowel Sachet contains Svarjiksara (Shudh) and Nimbusatva (Citrus medica) as its key ingredients. It is an Ayurvedic formulation that helps relieve acidity, gas, indigestion, and heartburn by neutralizing excess stomach acid and supporting healthy digestion. With its pleasant imli flavour, Gasowel Sachet provides quick and soothing relief from acidity and bloating.
medicines.sideEffects: Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects.

medicines.name: GASOWEL SACHET (HING)
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet contains Svarjiksara (Shudh) 2.43 g & Nimbusatva (Citrus medica) 1.84 g (Hing Flavour)
medicines.description: Gasowel Sachet contains Svarjiksara (Shudh) and Nimbusatva (Citrus medica) as its key ingredients. It is an Ayurvedic formulation that helps relieve acidity, gas, indigestion, and heartburn by neutralizing excess stomach acid and supporting healthy digestion. With its pleasant imli flavour, Gasowel Sachet provides quick and soothing relief from acidity and bloating.
medicines.sideEffects: Gasowel at normal doses usually has no side effects.

medicines.name: LEE-BIOTIC CAPSULE (10's/15's)
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Lactobacillus acidophilus 0.75 billion, Lactobacillus rhamnosus 0.75 billion, Bifidobacterium longum 0.75 billion, Bifidobacterium bifidum 0.5 billion, Saccharomyces boulardii 0.1 billion & Fructooligo saccharide 100 mg
medicines.description: Lee-Biotic Capsule is a combination of Probiotics and Prebiotic. It helps to improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), prevents and treats diarrhea, helps maintain and restores the normal balance of intestinal flora thus beneficial for digestion and immunity. It is also effective to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Some people experience gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Lee Biotic.

medicines.name: VEBIOTIC CAPSULES

It is also effective to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Some people experience gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Vebiotic.

medicines.description: Lee-Biotic mouth melt granules is a combination of Probiotics and Prebiotic. It helps to improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), prevents and treats diarrhea, helps maintain and restores the normal balance of intestinal flora thus beneficial for digestion and immunity. It is also effective to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Some people experience gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Leebiotic.

medicines.name: ALIBAC
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains Saccharomyces boulardii (Lyophilized) 2.5 Billion spores eq. to 125 mg of Yeast, Lactic Acid Bacillus 100 million spores & Racecadotril 10 mg (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Alibac sachet contains two probiotics (Saccharomyces boulardii and Lactic Acid Bacillus) and Racecadotril (non anti-infective anti-diarrheal). It is indicated for diarrhea due to various causes, Gastroenteritis, Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) associated with watery stool.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, rashes, hives, itching, shortness of breath, wheezing and cough.

medicines.name: ALIBAC-Z
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains Saccharomyces boulardii (Lyophilized) 2.5 Billion spores eq. to 125 mg of Yeast, Lactic Acid Bacillus 150 million spores & Elemental Zn 7.5 mg as Zinc Lactate (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Alibac-Z sachet contains two probiotics(Saccharomyces boulardii and Lactic Acid Bacillus) and Zinc. It helps to maintain health and well-being and strengthens immunity in all age groups.It is indicated for diarrhea due to various causes, Gastroenteritis, Irritable Bowel Syndrome(IBS), Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) and to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, rashes, hives, itching, shortness of breath, wheezing and cough

medicines.name: VEBIOTIC SACHET
medicines.composition: Each 1 g of sachet contains:Lactobacillus acidophilus 0.24 Billion, Lactobcillus rhamnosus 0.24 Billion, Bifidobacterium longum 0.24 Billion , Bifidobacterium bifidum 0.24, Billion,Streptococcus thermophilus 0.24 Billion, Saccharomyces boulardii 0.05 Billion & Fructooligo Saccharide 100 mg (orange flavour) (Mouth Melt Granules)
medicines.description: Vebiotic Mouth Melt Granules is a combination of Probiotics and Prebiotic. It helps to improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), prevents and treats diarrhea, helps maintain and restores the normal balance of intestinal flora thus beneficial for digestion and immunity. It is also effective to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Some people experience gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Vebiotic.

medicines.name: SACMIGUT SACHET
medicines.composition: Each 1 g of sachet contains Saccharomyces boulardii 282.5 mg (corresponding to 250 mg of yeast) (Mouth Melt Granules)
medicines.description: Sacmigut mouth melt sachet contains Saccharomyces Boulardii, a probiotic that helps to increase good bacteria in our intestines. It is used to treat infective diarrhea, antibiotic associated diarrhea, for improvement of immunity and also for recurrent respiratory tract infections.

medicines.name: SEPTIPLAST CREPE BANDAGE (6cmx4m), (8cmx4m) & (10cmx4m)
medicines.composition: Premium quality crepe bandage (6cmx4m), (8cmx4m) & (10cmx4m)
medicines.description: Septiplast Crepe Bandage is elastic, provides good control & uniform smooth pressure and facilitates normal skin breathing. Septiplast Crepe Bandage is a lightweight bandage that is normally used to offer heat, insulation and support in many medical situations. It is made up of superior quality pharmacopoeia grade fabric. Leeford Crepe Bandage does not obstruct muscular or joint flexibility & conform easily to all body parts, even at difficult areas.
medicines.sideEffects: Swelling may come if wrapped tightly. In summer some prickly heat may develop at the site of usage
medicines.dosage: Make sure the person is comfortable & keep the injured part of the body supported, in the position as it will be in, when the bandage is on. Make sure to use the right size bandage; different parts of the body need different widths of bandage. Start working from the side of the injury and do not apply directly at the injury site, work up the limb or injury site by winding the bandage in limb areas such as forearm or calf in spiralling turns, making sure that each new layer covers one-third to two-thirds of the previous one. Finish by wrapping the bandage around the injury site once more and securing the end. When applying bandages to elbows and knees (to hold dressings in place or support sprains or strains) flex the joint slightly, apply the bandage in a figure of eight and extend the bandage far on each side of the joint. Ensure that the areas above and below the injury are covered. Septiplast Crepe Bandage is rolled up with one or two elasticized claw grips (depending on the width) for securing, without the need for sticky tape & pins. The bandage layers must permit for easy movement of limbs and should be able to expand in case of swelling and inflammation.

medicines.name: MICROPOROUS TAPE (1.25 cm)
medicines.composition: Hypoallergenic microporous paper tape (12.5 mm x 9.1 m)
medicines.description: Leeford Microporous Surgical Tape is an easy tear first-aid tape that is ideal for securing small to medium dressings, ostomy appliances, dressings, gauzes, medical tubes, electrodes & their wires as well as wound pads easily. Leeford Microporous Surgical Tape is a quick option for reliable bandaging with hypoallergenic strong adhesive with extra adhesion power. Made of 100% cotton material, it is comfortable for long-term use. Leeford Microporous Surgical Tape gently sticks to the skin and facilitates easy removal at the same time without any pain or irritation & is breathable thus skin friendly to preserve skin?s integrity.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerated, no side effects
medicines.dosage: Clean and dry wound and surrounding area of the skin surface (for attaching device). Cut or tear tape to desired length. Apply to dressing or device & gently press to secure with skin. Change as frequently as required & can be re tapped as many time as required.

medicines.name: EPIFORD 200 CR
medicines.composition: Each film coated controlled release tablet contains Sodium Valproate 133.5 mg & Valproic Acid 58 mg both eq. to Sodium Valproate 200 mg
medicines.description: Epiford tablet contains Sodium Valproate & Valproic Acid both eq. to Sodium Valproate, an anti-epileptic drug that acts by stopping the excessive firing or working of neurons to control seizures. It is prescribed in all forms of Epilepsy or seizures.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are nausea, weight gain, raised liver enzymes, confusion state, disturbance in attention, tremors, hair loss, hypersensitivity and skin reactions.

medicines.name: EPIFORD 500 CR
medicines.composition: Each film coated controlled release tablet contains Sodium Valproate 333 mg & Valproic Acid 145 mg both eq. to Sodium Valproate 500 mg
medicines.description: Epiford tablet contains Sodium Valproate & Valproic Acid both eq. to Sodium Valproate, an anti-epileptic drug that acts by stopping the excessive firing or working of neurons to control seizures. It is prescribed in all forms of Epilepsy or seizures.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are nausea, weight gain, raised liver enzymes, confusion state, disturbance in attention, tremors, hair loss, hypersensitivity and skin reactions.

medicines.name: EPIFORD SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Sodium Valproate 200 mg or 40mg/ml
medicines.description: Epiford syrup or solution contains Sodium Valproate & is an anti-epileptic drug i.e. it prevent fits or seizures in children, adults & elderly. Epiford acts by increasing the concentration of gamma aminobutyric acid or GABA (a neurotransmitter in brain) thereby stopping excessive firing of neuron in the brain that is causing fits.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects are nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, liver injury, tremor & weight increase.

medicines.name: EPIFORD INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Sodium Valproate Eq. to Valproic Acid 100 mg in 5 ml Ampoule i.e. 500 mg per Ampoule
medicines.description: Epiford injection contains Sodium Valproate, an anti-convulsant used to treat seizures and epilepsy, particularly in emergency situations when oral medications are not possible. It works by stabilizing electrical activity in the brain. Epiford injection is typically administered in hospitals for acute seizure management, bipolar mania management or to control status epilepticus. The dosage is tailored to the patient's condition, with careful monitoring required to avoid potential side effects.
medicines.sideEffects: Stomach pain, diarrhoea, headache, weight gain, shakes/tremors, swollen gums & dry or sore mouth are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: FERETATE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sodium Feredetate 231 mg eq. to elemental Iron 33 mg, Folic Acid 1.5 mg & Vitamin B12 15 mcg
medicines.description: Feretate tablet is used for treatment and prevention of different forms of anaemia, for preventing iron, folic acid and Vitamin B12 deficiency during pregnancy, breastfeeding, after surgery or in conditions of nutritional malabsorption.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, constipation, dark stools and abdominal pain

medicines.name: TRYLIV
medicines.composition: Each 10 ml contains Tricholine Citrate 0.55 g & Sorbitol solution 70% 7.15 g
medicines.description: Tryliv solution contains Tricholine citrate which is bile acid binding agent and Sorbitol is a sugar alcohol found in plants and fruits. Tryliv solution is used in the treatment of fatty liver by lowering cholesterol levels. It also helps in treating alimentary tract functional disturbances and as a laxative to treat occasional episodes of constipation.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dryness of mouth and Drowsiness.

medicines.name: FLUTIVIN-S INHALER
medicines.composition: Each actuation delivers Fluticasone Propionate 125 mcg & Salmeterol Xinafoate IP Eq. to Salmeterol 25 mcg (120 metered doses)
medicines.description: Flutivin-S inhaler contains the combination medication Salmeterol and Fluticasone, used in prevention & treatment of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Salmeterol is a long-acting bronchodilator that relaxes airway muscles, while Fluticasone is a corticosteroid that reduces inflammation. Together, they help prevent asthma attacks, improve lung function, and manage symptoms. This inhaler is used regularly for long-term control, but not for immediate relief of acute breathing issues.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are Nasopharyngitis, Candidiasis of the mouth & or throat, headache, low Potassium levels & Hoarseness of voice.

medicines.name: BEGROEASE-S 25
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Mirabegron (ER) 25 mg & Solifenacin 5 mg
medicines.description: Begroease-S 25 contains combination of Mirabegron a Beta 3 adrenergic agonist and Solifenacin a anti-muscaranic drug. This combination used to treat overactive bladder (a condition in which the bladder muscles contract uncontrollably and cause frequent urination, urgent need to urinate, and inability to control urination) in adults. It is also used to treat neurogenic detrusor overactivity (a bladder control condition caused by brain, spinal cord or nerve problem) in children 3 years of age and older.This combination works by relaxing the bladder muscles to prevent urgent, frequent, or uncontrolled urination.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, Dry mouth, dizziness, constipation, stomach pain, upset stomach, vomiting, heartburn, dry eyes, blurred vision & dry skin.

medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Mirabegron (ER) 50 mg & Solifenacin 5 mg
