medicines.description: Sitaford-50 M Forte SR is a combination which contains Sitagliptin a dipeptidyl peptidase-4(DPP-4) inhibitor and Metformin a biguanide. This combination acts synergistically to offer better diabetic control. It is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
medicines.sideEffects: Stuffed or runny nose, sore throat, headache, diarrhoea and nausea

medicines.name: DAPAFORD-S 100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sitagliptin 100 mg & Dapagliflozin 10 mg
medicines.description: Dapaford-S 100 Tablets contains Sitagliptin which is a Dipeptidyl Peptidase-4(DPP-4) inhibitor and Dapagliflozin, a new class of drug that removes sugar from the body via urine to lower its level in blood. Dapaford-10 S 100 is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
medicines.sideEffects: Stuffed or runny nose, sore throat, headache, diarrhoea and nausea

medicines.name: DAPZIGARD-S 100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Sitagliptin 100 mg & Dapagliflozin 10 mg
medicines.description: Dapzigard-S 100 Tablets contains Sitagliptin which is a Dipeptidyl Peptidase-4(DPP-4) inhibitor and Dapagliflozin, a new class of drug that removes sugar from the body via urine to lower its level in blood. Dapzigard-S 100 is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
medicines.sideEffects: Stuffed or runny nose, sore throat, headache, diarrhoea and nausea

medicines.name: DAPZIGARD-S 50
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg & Sitagliptin 50 mg
medicines.description: Dapzigard-S 50 Tablets contains Sitagliptin which is a Dipeptidyl Peptidase-4(DPP-4) inhibitor and Dapagliflozin, a new class of drug that removes sugar from the body via urine to lower its level in blood. Dapzigard-S 50 is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
medicines.sideEffects: Stuffed or runny nose, sore throat, headache, diarrhoea and nausea

medicines.name: EMPAFORD S-10
medicines.composition: Empagliflozin 10 mg & Sitagliptin 100 mg
medicines.description: Empaford S-10 tablets contain Empagliflozin and Sitagliptin, two antidiabetic agents that help control blood sugar levels in type 2 diabetes. Empagliflozin, an SGLT2 inhibitor, lowers blood glucose by increasing its excretion through urine, while Sitagliptin, a DPP-4 inhibitor, enhances insulin secretion and reduces glucagon levels. Together, they improve glycemic control and help reduce the risk of diabetes-related complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects: urinary tract infections, increased urination, headache, and mild gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: EMPAFORD S- 25
medicines.composition: Empagliflozin 25 mg & Sitagliptin 100 mg
medicines.description: Empaford S- 25 tablets contain Empagliflozin and Sitagliptin, two antidiabetic agents that help control blood sugar levels in type 2 diabetes. Empagliflozin, an SGLT2 inhibitor, lowers blood glucose by increasing its excretion through urine, while Sitagliptin, a DPP-4 inhibitor, enhances insulin secretion and reduces glucagon levels. Together, they improve glycemic control and help reduce the risk of diabetes-related complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects: urinary tract infections, increased urination, headache, and mild gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: DAPAFORD-S 50
medicines.composition: Each Film coated tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg & Sitagliptin 50 mg
medicines.description: DAPAFORD-S 50 tablets contain Dapagliflozin, a sodium-glucose co-transporter 2 (SGLT2) inhibitor, and Sitagliptin, a dipeptidyl peptidase-4 (DPP-4) inhibitor. This combination helps lower blood sugar levels in patients with type 2 diabetes by increasing glucose excretion through urine and enhancing insulin secretion. It is prescribed to improve glycemic control along with diet and exercise.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include urinary tract infections, genital infections, headache, nasopharyngitis, increased urination, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: DYNACID ADVANCE SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of suspension contains Sodium Alginate 250 mg, Sodium Bicarbonate 133.5 mg & Calcium Carbonate 80 mg (SUGAR FREE)
medicines.description: Dynacid Advance Suspension contains a balanced mix of ingredients that are widely used as an antacid, providing quick relief from acidity, heartburn and gas. Sodium bicarbonate and Calcium Carbonate is used to relieve heartburn, sour stomach, or acid indigestion by neutralizing excess stomach acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, constipation, diarrhea, or headache.

medicines.name: DYNACID ADVANCE TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each uncoated chewable tablet contains Sodium Alginate 250 mg, Sodium Bicarbonate 106.5 mg & Calcium Carbonate 187.5 mg.
medicines.description: Dynacid Advance tablets contain a balanced mix of powerful ingredients that are widely used as an antacid, providing quick relief from acidity, heartburn and gas. Sodium bicarbonate and Calcium Carbonate is used to relieve heartburn, sour stomach or acid indigestion by neutralizing excess stomach acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are nausea, constipation, diarrhea, or headache.

medicines.name: HYROSITE EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Sodium Hyaluronate 0.18% w/v
medicines.description: Hyrosite eye drop contains Sodium Hyaluronate, act as eye lubricant and prevent eye dryness & irritation. Hyrosite eye drop is used to relieve dry, irritated and discomforted eyes due to wind, sun, heating/air conditioning, computer use, long reading, two wheeler driving without eye protection and certain medications. It is also used as a tear substitute & to prevent above mentioned problem of eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Vision may be temporarily blurred as well as burning/stinging/irritation may temporarily occur & are the main side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wash your hands before using Hyrosite eye drops. Do not touch the container tip to the eye, lid, or other parts of the body or any other surface. Put the cap back on after you are done using your dose. Tilt your head back and put drops into the eye/s as required. Keep eyes close for few moments and rotate them while close so as to lubricate the entire eye ball thoroughly. Do not use if the solution is cloudy, leaking, has particles & if solution changes colour while using. Hyrosite Drops can be used as frequently as required, generally one to two drops in eye/s 4 to 6 times per day can be used or advised by ophthalmologist.

medicines.name: DUTEX-20
medicines.composition: Each Gastro-resistant tablet contains Duloxetine Hydrochloride 20 mg
medicines.description: Dutex-20 tablets contain Duloxetine, an antidepressants that acts by modulating brain chemicals. It is prescribed for generalized anxiety disorder, depressive disorders, nerve pain & other pain of central origin.
medicines.sideEffects: Prominent ones are nausea, headache, dry mouth, excessive sleepiness and dizziness.

medicines.name: VEBIOTIC PLUS CAPSULES
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Streptococcus faecalis 30 million CFU, Clostridium butyricum 2 million CFU, Bacillus mesentericus 1 million CFU & Lactic acid bacillus 50 million CFU
medicines.description: Vebiotic Capsule is a combination of Probiotics and Prebiotic. It helps to improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), prevents and treats diarrhea, helps maintain and restores the normal balance of intestinal flora thus beneficial for digestion and immunity. It is also effective to maintain intestinal health after surgery and in chronic diseases.
medicines.sideEffects: Some people experience gas, bloating, or diarrhea. However, these side effects usually clear up within a few days or weeks of taking Vebiotic Plus

medicines.name: VALSAHART-50
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Valsartan 26 mg & Sacubitril 24 mg
medicines.description: Valsahart-50 tablets contain a fixed-dose combination of Valsartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB), and Sacubitril, a neprilysin inhibitor. This combination improves cardiac efficiency by reducing strain on the heart and promoting vasodilation. It is indicated for the treatment of chronic heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) to reduce the risk of cardiovascular death and hospitalization.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are hypotension, hyperkalemia, dizziness, and renal impairment.

medicines.name: VALSAHART-100
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Valsartan 51 mg & Sacubitril 49 mg
medicines.description: Valsahart-100 tablets contain a fixed-dose combination of Valsartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB), and Sacubitril, a neprilysin inhibitor. This combination improves cardiac efficiency by reducing strain on the heart and promoting vasodilation. It is indicated for the treatment of chronic heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) to reduce the risk of cardiovascular death and hospitalization.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are hypotension, hyperkalemia, dizziness, and renal impairment.

medicines.name: MEDISOFT MOISTURISING BAR SOAP
medicines.composition: Syndet Base contains Shea Butter, Glyerin (Cleansing & Moisturizing Bar with Skin Friendly pH 5.5)
medicines.description: Medisoft Moisturising Bar Soap is a gentle cleansing bar with a skin-friendly pH of 5.5. Enriched with Shea Butter and Glycerin, it cleanses effectively while moisturizing and nourishing the skin, leaving it soft, smooth, and hydrated without stripping natural oils.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wet skin, lather the bar, gently cleanse, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for soft, hydrated skin.

medicines.name: EMLOSOFT SOAP
medicines.composition: Syndet Base with Shea Butter & Glycerine
medicines.description: Emlosoft is a skin-friendly cleansing and moisturizing bar formulated with a gentle Syndet Base, enriched with Shea Butter and Glycerine. It is designed to maintain the natural pH of the skin (5.5), making it ideal for sensitive, dry, or irritated skin. Shea Butter provides deep moisturization and nourishment, while Glycerine helps retain skin hydration. Emlosoft bar gently cleanses without stripping natural oils, leaving the skin soft, smooth, and protected.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated. No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Use daily as a regular bathing bar. Apply to wet skin, lather gently, and rinse thoroughly. Suitable for all age groups and safe for long-term use.

medicines.name: TACMOTOP
medicines.composition: Each g contains Tacrolimus 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: Tacmotop ointment contains Tacrolimus, a drug that suppresses immunity & acts by suppressing the hyper immunity that is causing skin problems. It is prescribed for skin diseases such eczema (red, irritated and itchy skin) and Psoriasis (a skin peeling disease).
medicines.sideEffects: Stinging, burning, soreness or itching in the treated area of skin during the first few days of treatment are the main side effects.

medicines.name: BIGFUN-36
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tadalafil 20 mg
medicines.description: Bigfun-36 tablet contains Tadalafil, a PDE inhibitor that acts by increasing blood flow to the organ. Bigfun-36 tablets are indicated for erectile dysfunction and pulmonary arterial hypertension.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, red or flushed face, indigestion, stuffy nose, sweating, dizziness or light headedness, confusion and muscle aches.

medicines.name: BIGFUN-36 Gold
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tadalafil 10 mg & Dapoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Dapoxetine 30 mg
medicines.description: Bigfun 36 gold tablets contain Tadalafil a PDE inhibitor and Dapoxetine a SSRI and the combination is indicated for the treatment of erectile dysfunction and premature ejaculation in adult men.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, nausea, red or flushed face, indigestion, stuffy nose, sweating, dizziness or light headedness, confusion and muscle aches.

medicines.name: FUNTIME XT
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tadalafil 20 mg
medicines.description: Funtime-XT contains Tadalafil, an erectile dysfunction drug that acts by increasing blood flow into penile shaft and help it remain there for a longer duration & thus helps in retaining erection. It is prescribed for erectile dysfunction in males besides it is also advocated for pulmonary arterial hypertension (a lung related disease).
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, dyspepsia, back pain and myalgia

medicines.name: FUNTIME XT GOLD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tadalafil 10 mg & Dapoxetine Hydrochloride eq. to Dapoxetine 30 mg
medicines.description: Funtime-XT Gold tablet contains Tadalafil, an erectile dysfunction drug that acts by increasing blood flow into penile shaft and help it remain there for a longer duration & thus helps in retaining erection & Dapoxetine, a drug the stops premature ejaculation and increases the sexual activity duration. It is prescribed for erectile dysfunction & premature ejaculation in males.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, dyspepsia, back pain and myalgia.

medicines.name: URILOSIN 0.4
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride prolonged release 0.4 mg
medicines.description: Urilosin 0.4 capsule contains Tamsulosin which is used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency. Tamsulosin is in a class of medications called alpha blockers. It works by relaxing the muscles in the prostate and bladder so that urine can flow easily.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are sleepiness, difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep, weakness, back pain, diarrhea, runny or stuffy nose, pain or pressure in the face, sore throat, cough, fever, chills, or other signs of infection, blurred vision and difficulty ejaculating.

medicines.name: URILOSIN-D
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride ER 0.4 mg & Dutasteride 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Urilosin-D Tablet is a combination medicine which used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency. Tamsulosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Dutasteride prevents testosterone from converting to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, depressed mood, decreased libido (sex drive), decreased amount of semen released during sex, impotence (trouble getting or keeping an erection), breast tenderness or enlargement, nipple discharge and runny nose.

medicines.name: URILOSIN-F
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride ER 0.4 mg & Finasteride 5 mg
medicines.description: Urilosin-F tablets are indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) in men with an enlarged prostate. Tamsulosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Finasteride prevents testosterone from converting to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, asthenia, back pain, chest pain, dizziness, somnolence, decreased libido runny nose, nausea, abnormal ejaculation, breast pain and blurred vision.

medicines.name: TAMSUGARD-0.4
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride prolonged release 0.4 mg
medicines.description: Tamsugard 0.4 capsule contains Tamsulosin which is used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency. Tamsulosin is in a class of medications called alpha blockers. It works by relaxing the muscles in the prostate and bladder so that urine can flow easily.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are sleepiness, difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep, weakness, back pain, diarrhea, runny or stuffy nose, pain or pressure in the face, sore throat, cough, fever, chills, or other signs of infection, blurred vision and difficulty ejaculating.

medicines.name: TAMSUGARD-D
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride ER 0.4 mg & Dutasteride 0.5 mg
medicines.description: Tamsugard-D tablet is a combination medicine which used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency. Tamsulosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Dutasteride prevents testosterone from converting to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, depressed mood, decreased libido (sex drive), decreased amount of semen released during sex, impotence (trouble getting or keeping an erection), breast tenderness or enlargement, nipple discharge and runny nose.

medicines.name: TAMSUGARD-F
medicines.composition: Each capsule contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride ER 0.4 mg & Finasteride 5 mg
medicines.description: Tamsugard-F capsules are indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) in men with an enlarged prostate. Tamsulosin relaxes the muscles in the prostate and bladder neck, making it easier to urinate and Finasteride prevents testosterone from converting to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) in the body. DHT is involved in the development of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are headache, asthenia, back pain, chest pain, dizziness, somnolence, decreased libido, runny nose, nausea, abnormal ejaculation, breast pain and blurred vision.

medicines.name: URILOSIN DF
medicines.composition: Each hard gelatin capsule contains Tamsulosin Hydrochloride (Modified Release) 0.4 mg & Deflazacort 30 mg
medicines.description: Urilosin-DF capsule is a combination of Tamsulosin & Deflazacort which is used in men to treat the symptoms of an enlarged prostate (benign prostatic hyperplasia or BPH) which include difficulty urinating (hesitation, dribbling, weak stream, and incomplete bladder emptying), painful urination, and urinary frequency and urgency.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are dizziness, depressed mood, decreased libido (sex drive), decreased amount of semen released during sex, impotence (trouble getting or keeping an erection), breast tenderness or enlargement, nipple discharge and runny nose.

medicines.name: DANTOX EXPERT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Tannic acid Glycerin 66 30% w/v, Iodine 0.3% w/v, Potassium Iodide 0.5% w/v, Thymol 0.05% w/v, Menthol 0.08% w/v & Glycerin 100% QS v/v
medicines.description: Dantox expert gum paint contains Tannic acid Glycerin, Iodine, Potassium Iodide, Thymol, Menthol & Glycerin. Tannic acid glycerin acts by healing sores and treating bleeding gums; Iodine, Potassium iodide & Thymol acts as antibacterial; Iodine & Menthol together act as counterirritant to relieve irritation and offer a soothing effect. This product is prescribed for spongy gums, bleeding gums, sores on gums & pus coming out of gums.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Clean your hands thoroughly and wipe it. Take a drop or two on your finger tips of Dantox gum paint and apply at the lesion or take a larger quantity and apply on the infected gums or as required. It can be applied two to three times a day depending upon severity of disease. You can use it for 3 to 5 days continuously or may be little longer.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT EXPERT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Tannic Acid Glycerin 66 30% w/v, Iodine 0.3% w/v, Potassium Iodide 0.5% w/v, Thymol 0.05% w/v, Menthol 0.08% w/v & Glycerin 100% Qs v/v
medicines.description: Ultradent expert gum paint contains Tannic acid Glycerin, Iodine, Potassium Iodide, Thymol, Menthol & Glycerin. Tannic acid glycerin acts by healing sores and treating bleeding gums; Iodine, Potassium iodide & Thymol acts as antibacterial; Iodine & Menthol together act as counterirritant to relieve irritation and offer a soothing effect. This product is prescribed for spongy gums, bleeding gums, sores on gums & pus coming out of gums.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Tannic Acid 2% w/v, Zinc Chloride 1% w/v & Cetrimide 0.1 % w/v
medicines.description: Tannic Acid acts as an astringent to tighten gums and reduce bleeding, Zinc Chloride promotes healing and reduces inflammation, while Cetrimide serves as an antiseptic to prevent bacterial growth. It is used for managing gingivitis, bleeding gums, and oral inflammation, helping to maintain overall gum health.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include a temporary burning sensation, irritation, or dryness of the gums. Rarely, allergic reactions like swelling, redness, or rash may occur. Discontinue use if severe irritation or sensitivity develops.

medicines.name: TRENTADOL-100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tapentadol Hydrochloride eq. to Tapentadol 100 mg
medicines.description: Trentadol contains Tapentadol which is a centrally acting analgesic. It is used to treat moderate to severe pain in surgery, trauma, sports injuries & musculoskeletal pain. It is also used to treat severe neuropathic pain caused due to diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, heartburn, stomach pain, dry mouth, seizure (convulsions) excessive tiredness, anxiety, drowsiness, difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep & irritability.

medicines.name: TRENTADOL-50
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Tapentadol Hydrochloride eq. to Tapentadol 50 mg
medicines.description: Trentadol contains Tapentadol which is a centrally acting analgesic. It is used to treat moderate to severe pain in surgery, trauma, sports injuries & musculoskeletal pain. It is also used to treat severe neuropathic pain caused due to diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Headache, heartburn, stomach pain, dry mouth, seizure (convulsions) excessive tiredness, anxiety, drowsiness, difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep & irritability.

medicines.name: ROCK ON MAX SACHET
medicines.composition: Each 5 g sachet of Rock On Max contains Taurine 1 g, Ginseng (Panax Ginseng) Extract 90 mg, Caffeine 50 mg, Vitamin C 65 mg, Myo-Inositol 50 mg, Vit. B1 1.7 mg, Vit. B2 2.4 mg, Vit. B3 14 mg & Vit. B6 1.9 mg & Zinc 3.4 mg.
medicines.description: Leeford's Rock On Max is a sugar free energy drink that comes in effervescent powder form & gets dissolved automatically without the requirement of stirring. It can be added to simple water or Citrus juices for instant boost of energy & stamina. Rock On Max is a dietary supplement and a method for increasing energy and mental alertness of an individual. It helps to stay awake, increase energy levels, boost performance during physical exercise & helps remain concentrated while studying. Rock On Max is an ideal energy drink for young, middle aged & elderly population that has perfect balance of safe and effective ingredients that gives you a physical & psychological boost devoid of any adverse effects if consumed within the safe limits as prescribed in dosage.
medicines.sideEffects: Rock On Max is a safe energy drink when used as directed, but if it is abused alone or in combination with other substances, then it can lead to irritability, anxiety, restlessness, insomnia, gastrointestinal upsets, tremors, tachycardia & psycho-motor agitation.
medicines.dosage: One to two sachet of Rock On Max should be used 30 minutes to an hour before going to Gym or for a walk to have a burst of energy or stamina. One or two sachet of Rock On Max should be taken an hour before sitting for a long study to increase alertness and concentration. Do not take more than two sachets simultaneously regularly and should avoid using more than 4 sachets per day to avoid its adverse effects.

medicines.name: TAZOCLIN 4.5 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Piperacillin Sodium eq. to Piperacillin 4 g & sterile Tazobactam Sodium eq. to Tazobactam 0.5 g with WFI
medicines.description: Tazoclin injection is a combination of Piperacillin, a Penicillin & Tazobactam, a beta-lactam inhibitor. Piperacillin kills bacteria by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis and Tazobactam stops the enzymes that make bacteria resistant to the antibiotic, thus together they act synergistically. It is used in cases of serious infections of chest, urinary system & blood along with others.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vomiting, Rash, Pruritus & fungal infections on long usage.

medicines.name: TAZORAX 1.125
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Ceftriaxone Sodium eq. to Ceftriaxone 1 g & sterile Tazobactam Sodium eq. to Tazobactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Tazorax injection contains Tazobactam, a beta lactamases inhibitor & Ceftriaxone, a cephalosporin which acts synergistically to provide better results in resistant infections. It is prescribed for respiratory tract infections, urinary tract infections, gynecological infections, intra-abdominal infections, for surgical prophylaxis, infections in blood as well bone and joint infections apart from others.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects of combination are pain, indurations and tenderness, warmth, tightness at the site of injection; allergic reactions such as rash along with disturbances in white blood cell count, diarrhea & liver enzyme elevations.

medicines.name: TAZOPATH 4.5 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Piperacillin Sodium eq. to Piperacillin 4 g & sterile Tazobactam Sodium eq. to Tazobactam 0.5 g with WFI
medicines.description: Tazopath injection is a combination of Piperacillin, a Penicillin & Tazobactam, a beta-lactam inhibitor. Piperacillin kills bacteria by breaking their membranes and Tazobactam stops the enzymes that make bacteria resistant to the antibiotic, thus together they act synergistically. It is used in cases of serious infections of chest, urinary system & blood along with others.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vomiting, Rash, Pruritus & fungal infections on long usage.

medicines.name: RISRIDE-1
medicines.composition: Each uncoated mouth dissolving tablet contains Risperidone 1 mg
medicines.description: Risride tablets contain mouth dissolving form of Risperidone, an anti-psychotic drug that helps you think clearly and leave a normal life by altering levels of natural chemicals in brain. It is prescribed in psychiatric disorders such as Schizophrenia, Bipolar disorder & Irritability associated with autistic disorder.
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, lightheadedness, drooling, nausea, weight gain & tiredness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: RISRIDE-2
medicines.composition: Each uncoated mouth dissolving tablet contains Risperidone 2 mg
medicines.description: Risride tablets contain mouth dissolving form of Risperidone, an anti-psychotic drug that helps you think clearly and leave a normal life by altering levels of natural chemicals in brain. It is prescribed in psychiatric disorders such as Schizophrenia, Bipolar disorder & Irritability associated with autistic disorder.
medicines.sideEffects: Drowsiness, dizziness, lightheadedness, drooling, nausea, weight gain & tiredness are the main side effects.

medicines.name: TAZOPATH-2.25 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Piperacillin 2 g & Tazobactam 0.25 g with WFI
medicines.description: Tazopath-2.25 g injection is a combination of Piperacillin, a Penicillin & Tazobactam, a beta-lactam inhibitor. Piperacillin kills bacteria by breaking their membranes and Tazobactam stops the enzymes that make bacteria resistant to the antibiotic, thus together they act synergistically. It is used in cases of serious infections of chest, urinary system & blood along with others.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vomiting, Rash, Pruritus & fungal infections on prolonged usage.

medicines.name: TAZOCLIN-2.25 g
medicines.composition: Each vial contains sterile Piperacillin 2 g & Tazobactam 0.25 g with WFI
medicines.description: Tazoclin-2.25 g injection is a combination of Piperacillin, a Penicillin & Tazobactam, a beta-lactam inhibitor. Piperacillin kills bacteria by inhibiting bacterial cell wall synthesis and Tazobactam stops the enzymes that make bacteria resistant to the antibiotic, thus together they act synergistically. It is used in cases of serious infections of chest, urinary system & blood along with others.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Diarrhoea, Nausea, Vomiting, Rash, Pruritus & fungal infections on prolonged usage.

medicines.name: UNICEF-T 1.125 INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Ceftazidime 1000 mg & Tazobactam 125 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Unicef-T 1.125 injection contains Ceftazidime and Tazobactam, a broad-spectrum antibiotic used in the treatment of various bacterial infections, particularly those caused by Gram-negative bacteria. Ceftazidime, a cephalosporin, targets bacterial cell wall synthesis, while Tazobactam, a β-lactamase inhibitor, enhances the effectiveness of Ceftazidime by preventing the breakdown of the drug. This combination is effective in treating severe infections, including pneumonia, urinary tract infections and intra-abdominal infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Common adverse reactions may include inflammation of vein, diarrhoea, transient increases in hepatic enzymes & rash.

medicines.name: VENPRES-20
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Telmisartan 20 mg
medicines.description: Venpres tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels. It is prescribed for high blood pressure & for kidney protection in diabetics.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are back pain, diarrhea, sinusitis, throat infection & respiratory tract infections.

medicines.name: VENPRES-40 AM (10/15 Tabs)

medicines.description: Venpres-40 AM tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps blood. This combination is prescribed when single drug alone is not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Pedal oedema, headache and dizziness.

medicines.description: Venpres-40 AMH tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps blood & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. This combination is prescribed when single drug or dual drug combination alone is not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, dizziness, fatigue, coughing, nausea, fatigue, weakness, edema, face edema, lower limb edema, angioneurotic oedema, urticaria & hypersensitivity.

This combination is prescribed when single drug alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are back pain, diarrhea, sinusitis, throat infection, respiratory tract infections, tiredness, dizziness, shortness of breath & slow heart rate.

medicines.name: VENPRES-40 AMC
medicines.composition: Each bilayered uncoated tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg, Amlodipine Besylate eq. to Amlodipine 5 mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Venpres-40 AMC tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels; Amlodipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps blood & Chlorthalidone, a diuretic that acts by reducing blood volume. This combination is prescribed when single drug or dual drug combination alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are increased uric acid and fat in blood, dizziness, fatigue, coughing, nausea, fatigue, weakness, edema, face edema, lower limb edema, angioneurotic oedema, urticaria & hypersensitivity.

medicines.name: CILNEP TRIO
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Cilnep-Trio tablet contains Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood; Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Chlorthalidone, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high blood pressure, when two drug combinations fail to exert its effect or are not adequate as in cases of refractory blood pressure.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are headache, flushing, nasal congestion, flu, diarrhoea, throat infection, dizziness, nausea, electrolyte imbalance & back pain.

medicines.description: Cilnep-T tablet contains Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker that acts by reducing the force with which heart pumps the blood & Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels. It is prescribed for high blood pressure.

medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg, Cilnidipine 10 mg & Metopolol succinate (as extended release) 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate 50 mg

medicines.name: TELVILITE-M 50
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg & Metoprolol Succinate 47.5 mg eq. to Metoprolol Tartrate (ER) 50 mg
medicines.description: Telvilite-M 50 tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Metoprolol in extended release form, a beta blocker that acts by reducing the heart rate. This combination is prescribed when single drug alone in not able to control the BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are back pain, diarrhea, sinusitis, throat infection, respiratory tract infections, tiredness, dizziness, shortness of breath & slow heart rate.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL-5 T TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 5 mg & Telmisartan 40 mg
medicines.description: Bisotril-5 T tablets contains Bisoprolol & Telmisartan, two antihypertensive agents. Bisoprolol, a beta-blocker helps in reducing the heart rate and Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker helps relax blood vessels. The combination is effective in managing high blood pressure and reducing the risk of cardiovascular events. Bisotril-5 T is commonly prescribed in patients with hypertension or certain heart conditions to improve overall heart health and prevent complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Tiredness, slow heartbeat, diarrhea and dizziness are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: BISOTRIL-2.5 T TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Bisoprolol 2.5 mg & Telmisartan 40 mg.
medicines.description: Bisotril-2.5 T tablets contains Bisoprolol & Telmisartan, two antihypertensive agents. Bisoprolol, a beta-blocker helps in reducing the heart rate and Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker helps relax blood vessels. The combination is effective in managing high blood pressure and reducing the risk of cardiovascular events. Bisotril-2.5 T is commonly prescribed in patients with hypertension or certain heart conditions to improve overall heart health and prevent complications.
medicines.sideEffects: Tiredness, slow heartbeat, diarrhea and dizziness are some side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: VENPRES-40 AMT
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Amlodipine 5 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Metoprolol (ER) 50 mg
medicines.description: Venpres-40 AMT tablets is a combination medicine used to manage high blood pressure and reduce the risk of heart-related complications. Venpres-40 AMT tablets contains Amlodipine, Telmisartan and Metoprolol. Amlodipine is a calcium channel blocker that relaxes blood vessels, Telmisartan is an angiotensin receptor blocker that helps lower blood pressure, and Metoprolol is a beta-blocker that reduces heart rate. Together, they improve heart health and help maintain stable blood pressure levels.
medicines.sideEffects: Headache, dizziness, nausea, weakness, stomach pain, constipation, swelling in the hands or feet, fast or pounding heartbeats, flushing are some side effects that may occur

medicines.name: TELVILITE-40 H (15's)
medicines.composition: Each bilayered uncoated tablet contains Telmisartan 40 mg & Hydrochlorothiazide 12.5 mg
medicines.description: Telvilite-40 H tablets contain Telmisartan, an angiotensin Receptor blocker that acts by dilating blood vessels & Hydrochlorothiazide, a diuretic that acts by removing excessive water from body. It is prescribed for high BP.
medicines.sideEffects: The most common side effect of the combination is dizziness.

medicines.name: CILNIFORD-T
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg & Telmisartan 40 mg
medicines.description: CILNIFORD-T tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker, and Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB). This combination works by relaxing blood vessels to lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the effective management of hypertension and to reduce the risk of heart attack, stroke, and other cardiovascular complications.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, headache, fatigue, swelling of ankles, back pain, hypotension, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: CILNIFORD-TM
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Metoprolol Tartrate 50 mg ER
medicines.description: CILNIFORD-TM tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker; Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB); and Metoprolol Tartrate (ER), a beta-blocker. This triple combination works synergistically to relax blood vessels, reduce heart rate, and lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the effective management of moderate to severe hypertension and to reduce the risk of cardiovascular events.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, fatigue, slow heart rate, swelling of ankles, headache, cold extremities, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: CILNIFORD TRIO
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Cilnidipine 10 mg, Telmisartan 40 mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5 mg
medicines.description: CILNIFORD TRIO tablets contain Cilnidipine, a calcium channel blocker; Telmisartan, an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB); and Chlorthalidone, a thiazide-like diuretic. This combination works by relaxing blood vessels and removing excess fluid from the body to effectively lower blood pressure. It is prescribed for the treatment of hypertension, especially in patients requiring combination therapy for better blood pressure control.
medicines.sideEffects: It is generally well tolerated. The main side effects may include dizziness, headache, fatigue, increased urination, electrolyte imbalance, muscle cramps, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: DEBILIPTIN
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Teneligliptin Hydrobromide Hydrate eq. to Teneligliptin 20 mg
medicines.description: Debiliptin contains Teneligliptin, a new class of anti-diabetics that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control diabetes. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control, exercise & other drugs to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are hypoglycemia (in combination with other drugs), dizziness, headache, constipation, diarrhoea and fever.

medicines.name: DEBILIPTIN-M
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Teneligliptin Hydrobromide Hydrate eq. to Teneligliptin 20 mg & Metformin Hydrochloride (SR) 500 mg
medicines.description: Debiliptin-M contains Teneligliptin & Metformin, two anti-diabetics that control diabetes. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, rash and oedema.

medicines.name: DEBILIPTIN-M FORTE
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Teneligliptin Hydrobromide Hydrate eq. to Teneligliptin 20 mg & Metformin Hydrochloride (SR) 1000 mg
medicines.description: Debiliptin-M Forte contains Teneligliptin & Metformin, two anti-diabetics that control diabetes. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, rash and oedema.

medicines.name: GLYCELIPTIN
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Teneligliptin Hydrobromide Hydrate eq. to Teneligliptin 20 mg

medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are hypoglycemia (in combination with other drugs), dizziness, headache, constipation, diarrhoea and fever.

medicines.name: GLYCELIPTIN-M
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Teneligliptin Hydrobromide Hydrate eq. to Teneligliptin 20 mg & Metformin Hydrochloride SR 500 mg
medicines.description: Glyceliptin-M tablet contains Teneligliptin, a new class of anti-diabetics that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control diabetes & Metformin that acts by increases absorption of sugar from blood to muscles. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, rash and oedema.

medicines.name: GLYCELIPTIN-M FORTE
medicines.composition: Each uncoated bilayered tablet contains Teneligliptin 20 mg and Metformin (SR) 1000 mg
medicines.description: Glyceliptin-M Forte tablet contains Teneligliptin, a new class of anti-diabetics that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control diabetes & Metformin that acts by increases absorption of sugar from blood to muscles. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, rash and oedema.

medicines.name: DAPAFORD-10 T
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg & Teneligliptin Hydrobromide Hydrate eq. to Teneligliptin 20 mg
medicines.description: Dapaford-10 T tablet contains Dapagliflozin & Teneligliptin. Dapagliflozin belongs to SGLT2 class of drug that acts by removing sugar from the body via urine to lower its level in blood. Teneligliptin is a DPP4 inhibitor that works by acting on the intestinal enzyme to control Diabetes. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control, exercise & other drugs to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Low sugar levels, dizziness, headache, constipation, diarrhea, fever, painful urination, repetitive urination, inflammation of penis, urinary tract infections & allergic reactions may occur in patients.

medicines.name: DAPZIGARD-10 T
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Dapagliflozin 10 mg & Teneligliptin Hydrobromide Hydrate eq. to Teneligliptin 20 mg
medicines.description: Dapzigard-10 T tablet contains Dapagliflozin & Teneligliptin. Dapagliflozin belongs to SGLT2 class of drug that acts by removing sugar from the body via urine to lower its level in blood. Teneligliptin is a DPP4 inhibitor that works by acting on the intestinal enzyme to control Diabetes. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control, exercise & other drugs to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: Low sugar levels, dizziness, headache, constipation, diarrhea, fever painful urination, repetitive urination, inflammation of penis, urinary tract infection & allergic reaction may occur in patients.

medicines.name: TEXIFEN SPRAY
medicines.composition: Each g contains Terbinafine 1% w/w
medicines.description: Texifen contains Terbinafine, an antifungal drug that act by stopping growth of the fungus and thus curing infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin in groin areas, between fingers, under armpit, on skin fold & nail etc. It can also be used in between the cream for better result and to completely remove the infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effect is irritation at application site.

medicines.name: TEXIFORD SPRAY

medicines.description: Texiford contains Terbinafine, an antifungal drug that act by stopping growth of the fungus and thus curing infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin in groin areas, between fingers, under armpit, on skin fold & nail etc. It can also be used in between the cream for better result and to completely remove the infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effect is irritation at application site.

medicines.name: TEXIFORD-250
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Terbinafine Hydrochloride eq. to Terbinafine 250 mg
medicines.description: Texiford tablets contain Terbinafine, an allylamine antifungal drug, mainly prescribed for the fungal infections of hand and toe nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are skin rash, headache, diarrhea, feeling or being sick (nausea or vomiting), loss of appetite than usual & muscle or joint pain.

medicines.name: TEXIFORD-500
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Terbinafine Hydrochloride eq. to Terbinafine 500 mg
medicines.description: Texiford tablets contain Terbinafine, an allylamine antifungal drug, mainly prescribed for the fungal infections of hand and toe nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are skin rash, headache, diarrhea, feeling or being sick (nausea or vomiting), loss of appetite than usual & muscle or joint pain.

medicines.name: CASTOR-NF (15 & 25 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Ciprofloxacin 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w, Terbinafine 1% w/w & Clobetasol 0.05% w/w
medicines.description: Castor-NF cream contains Ciprofloxacin, to relieve bacterial infections; Metronidazole, to relive bacterial & protozoal infections; Terbinafine, to relieve fungal infections & Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling. It is first line of drug in all kind of skin infection such as of eczema, dermatitis, fungal infections, bacterial infections & mixed infection of skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effect, the product is well tolerated.

medicines.name: TEXIFEN CREAM (10 g/20 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Terbinafine Hydrochloride 1% w/w
medicines.description: Texifen contains Terbinafine, an antifungal drug that act by stopping growth of the fungus and thus curing infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin, skin folds & nails. It is also prescribed for fungal infection of skin that causes a lightening or darkening of the skin of the neck, chest, arms or legs.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, irritation & itching at the application site may occur.

It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin in groin areas, between fingers, under armpit, on skin fold & nail etc. It can also be used in between the cream for better result and to completely remove the infection.

medicines.description: Texifen contains Terbinafine, an antifungal drug that act by stopping growth of the fungus and thus curing infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin, skin folds & nails. It is also prescribed for fungal infection of skin that causes a lightening or darkening of the skin of the neck, chest, arms or legs.
