medicines.name: ELOSONE-TF
medicines.composition: Each g contains Mometasone 0.1% w/w & Terbinafine 1% w/w
medicines.description: Elosone-TF cream contains Mometasone, a medium potency corticosteroid that acts by reducing redness, swelling, itching and constricting blood vessels & Terbinafine, an antifungal drug that act by stopping growth of the fungus and thus curing infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin & skin folds where there is marked inflammation is associated.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, irritation, dry skin & itching at the application site may occur.

medicines.name: ITROSTRED-TF
medicines.composition: Each g contains Itraconazole 1% w/w & Terbinafine 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itrostred-TF cream contains Itraconazole & Terbinafine, two anti-fungal drug that acts synergistically to provide better and faster result. It is prescribed for fungal infections of vagina, skin, skin folds & nail.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are related to application site complaint such as irritation, stinging sensation & skin eruption.

medicines.name: TEXIFORD OINTMENT
medicines.composition: Each g contains Terbinafine Hydrochloride 1% w/w
medicines.description: Texiford contains Terbinafine, an antifungal drug that act by stopping growth of the fungus and thus curing infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin, skin folds & nails. It is also prescribed for fungal infection of skin that causes a lightening or darkening of the skin of the neck, chest, arms or legs.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, irritation & itching at the application site may occur.

medicines.name: TEXIFORD POWDER
medicines.composition: Each g contains Terbinafine 1% w/w
medicines.description: Texiford contains Terbinafine, an antifungal drug that act by stopping growth of the fungus and thus curing infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin in groin areas, between fingers, under armpit, on skin fold & nail etc. It can also be used in between the cream for better result and to completely remove the infection.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effect is irritation at application site.

medicines.name: ELMOVEL TF
medicines.composition: Each g contains Mometasone Furoate 0.1% w/w & Terbinafine Hydrochloride 1.0% w/w
medicines.description: Elmovel-TF cream contains Mometasone, a medium potency corticosteroid that acts by reducing redness, swelling, itching and constricting blood vessels & Terbinafine, an antifungal drug that act by stopping growth of the fungus and thus curing infection. It is prescribed to treat fungal infections of skin & skin folds where there is marked inflammation is associated.
medicines.sideEffects: Burning, irritation, dry skin & itching at the application site may occur.

medicines.name: ITROMED-TF
medicines.composition: Each g contains Itraconazole 1% w/w & Terbinafine 1% w/w
medicines.description: Itromed-TF cream contains Itraconazole & Terbinafine, two anti-fungal drugs that acts synergistically to provide better and faster result. It is prescribed for fungal infections of vagina, skin, skin folds & nail.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are related to application site complaint such as irritation, stinging sensation & skin eruption.

medicines.name: OLTEF-NF (15g & 25g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Ciprofloxacin 1% w/w, Metronidazole 1% w/w, Terbinafine 1% w/w & Clobetasol 0.05% w/w
medicines.description: Oltef-NF cream contains Ciprofloxacin, to relive bacterial infections; Metronidazole, to relive bacterial & protozoal infections; Terbinafine, to relieve fungal infections & Clobetasol, a corticosteroid that relives itching, irritation, redness & swelling. It is first line of drug in all kind of skin infection such as of eczema, dermatitis, fungal infections, bacterial infections & mixed infection of skin.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effect, the product is well tolerated.

medicines.name: TEXIFORD-250
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Terbinafine Hydrochloride eq. to Terbinafine 250 mg
medicines.description: Texiford tablets contain Terbinafine, an allylamine antifungal drug, mainly prescribed for the fungal infections of hand and toe nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are skin rash, headache, diarrhea, feeling or being sick (nausea or vomiting), loss of appetite than usual & muscle or joint pain.

medicines.name: TEXIFORD-500
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Terbinafine Hydrochloride eq. to Terbinafine 500 mg
medicines.description: Texiford tablets contain Terbinafine, an allylamine antifungal drug, mainly prescribed for the fungal infections of hand and toe nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are skin rash, headache, diarrhea, feeling or being sick (nausea or vomiting), loss of appetite than usual & muscle or joint pain.

medicines.name: TEXIFEN-500 (7's/10's)
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Terbinafine Hydrochloride eq. to Terbinafine 500 mg
medicines.description: Texifen tablets contain Terbinafine, an allylamine antifungal drug, mainly prescribed for the fungal infections of hand and toe nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are skin rash, headache, diarrhea, feeling or being sick (nausea or vomiting), loss of appetite than usual & muscle or joint pain.

medicines.name: TEXIFEN-250 (7's/10's)
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Terbinafine Hydrochloride eq. to Terbinafine 250 mg
medicines.description: Texifen tablets contain Terbinafine, an allylamine antifungal drug, mainly prescribed for the fungal infections of hand and toe nails.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are skin rash, headache, diarrhea, feeling or being sick (nausea or vomiting), loss of appetite than usual & muscle or joint pain.

medicines.name: NADIMIN-MT
medicines.composition: Each g contains Nadifloxacin 1% w/w, Terbinafine 1% w/w & Mometosone Furoate 0.1% w/w
medicines.description: This ointment contains Nadifloxacin, an antibiotic that kills bacteria; Terbinafine, an antifungal that stops fungal growth and Mometasone Furoate, a steroid that reduces skin inflammation. It is prescribed for mixed skin infections involving bacteria and fungi, including infected eczema, tinea, and dermatitis with secondary infection.
medicines.sideEffects: It May cause mild burning, itching, dryness, redness, or skin thinning; prolonged use can lead to allergic reactions or secondary infections.

medicines.name: AMROX (60 &100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Ambroxol Hydrochloride 15 mg, Terbutaline Sulphate 1.5 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Menthol 1 mg
medicines.description: Amrox Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Guaiphenesin an expectorant, Terbutaline a bronchodilator and Menthol a soothing agent. It is indicated for clinical relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, heartburn or bloating, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: AMROX JUNIOR (60 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Terbutaline Sulphate 1.25 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Ambroxol Hydrochloride 15 mg
medicines.description: Amrox Junior Syrup is a combination medicine which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Guaiphenesin an expectorant, Terbutaline a bronchodilator and Menthol a soothing agent. It is indicated for clinical relief of cough in children associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, heartburn or bloating, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: AROXYL (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Terbutaline Sulphate 1.25 mg, Bromhexine Hydrochloride 4.0 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg & Menthol 2.5 mg
medicines.description: Aroxyl Syrup contains Bromhexine(mucolytic), Guaifenesin(expectorant),Terbutaline (bronchodilator) and Menthol(Cooling agent). Aroxyl syrup is indicated in productive cough, bronchitis, asthma, emphysema, smoker's cough and bronchospasm.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Indigestion, Bloating, Vomiting, Diarrhea, Stomach pain, Dizziness, Headache, Sweating, Skin rash, Hives, Tremor, Increased heart rate and Palpitations.

medicines.name: CUFLIFT JUNIOR
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Ambroxol 15 mg, Terbutaline 1.25 mg & Guaiphenesin 50 mg
medicines.description: Cuflift Junior syrup contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Terbutaline a bronchodilator, Guaiphenesin an expectorant. It is indicated for relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: CUFLIFT PLUS-SF
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Terbutaline Sulphate 2.5 mg, Ambroxol Hydrochloride 30 mg, Guaiphenesin 100 mg & Menthol 2.5 mg (Sugar free)
medicines.description: Cuflift Plus SF syrup is a sugar free formulation which contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Terbutaline a bronchodilator, Guaiphenesin an expectorant and Menthol act as a soothing agent. It is indicated for relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia and palpitations.

medicines.name: CUFLIFT PLUS SYRUP (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Ambroxol Hydrochloride 30 mg, Guaiphenesin 100 mg , Terbutaline Sulphate 2.5 mg & Menthol 2.5 mg
medicines.description: Cuflift Plus syrup contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Terbutaline a bronchodilator, Guaiphenesin an expectorant and Menthol act as a soothing agent. It is indicated for relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: CUFLIFT SYRUP (60 & 100 ml)
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml of syrup contains Ambroxol Hydrochloride 15 mg, Terbutaline Sulphate 1.5 mg, Guaiphenesin 50 mg in mentholated syrupy base
medicines.description: Cuflift syrup contains Ambroxol a mucolytic, Terbutaline a bronchodilator, Guaiphenesin an expectorant and Menthol act as a soothing agent. It is indicated for relief of cough associated with bronchitis, bronchial asthma, emphysema and other bronchopulmonary disorders where bronchospasm, mucous plugging and problems of expectoration co-exist.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea or vomiting, diarrhea, indigestion, abdominal pain, dry mouth or dry throat, tremor, headache, tachycardia, palpitations and muscle spasms.

medicines.name: NEBULIZER
medicines.composition: Premium quality low noise piston nebulizer
medicines.description: Leeford Nebulizer is formulated for delivery of medication directly to the lungs in the form of fine particles/mist. It is meant for efficient respiratory therapy, effective medication delivery. Leeford Nebulizer is low noise, durable device & a complete kit ideal for all age groups. It is used for respiratory conditions like asthma, COPD, sinus and other respiratory disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects
medicines.dosage: Wash your hands properly, put the medication into medication chamber of the inhalational attachment of nebulizer. Attach the mouthpiece and turn on the air compressor. Continue to inhale normally till the entire medication is consumed; this will take 5-20 minutes. After that wash the medication chamber of nebulizer.

medicines.name: VIDADEB-100 M SR
medicines.composition: Each film coated bilayered tablet contains Vildagliptin (SR) 100 mg & Metformin (SR) 500 mg
medicines.description: Vidadeb-100 M SR/ 100 M SR FORTE tablet contains Vildagliptin, a new class of anti-diabetics that acts on the intestinal enzyme to control diabetes & Metformin that acts by increases absorption of sugar from blood to muscles. It is prescribed in adjunct to diet control & exercise to control type II diabetes.
medicines.sideEffects: The main side effects are diarrhoea, abdominal pain, fatty liver, tremor, rash and oedema.

medicines.name: RETESTO INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ampoule contains Testosterone Propionate 30 mg, Testosterone Phenylpropionate 60 mg, Testosterone Isocaproate 60 mg & Testosterone Decanoate 100 mg (Testosterone 250 mg)
medicines.description: Retesto injection contains four types of Testosterone hormones.They mimic the activity of the natural Testosterone to deliver desired results. It should be used as Testosterone replacement in primary and secondary male hypogonadism.(Diminished functional activity of the gonads). Retesto is also used to treat the symptoms of impotence and delayed puberty in males.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Chest pain or pressure, swelling in your ankles or feet, rapid weight gain, sudden cough, wheezing, rapid breathing, coughing up blood, nausea or vomiting, increased or ongoing erection of the penis.

medicines.name: RETESTO FORTE INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each ml of injection contains Testosterone Undecanoate 250 mg in 4 ml Ampoule
medicines.description: Retesto Forte injection contains Testosterone Undecanoate, a long-acting form of testosterone that is used in the treatment of low testosterone levels in men. Retesto Forte injection helps in restoring normal hormone levels, improve symptoms such as fatigue and low libido and support overall well-being. Retesto Forte injection is administered intra-muscularly & is usually given every 10 to 14 weeks, as it provides a steady release of testosterone thus enhancing patient compliance and effectiveness compared to shorter-acting forms.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include chest pain or pressure, swelling in your ankles, weight gain, cough, wheezing, rapid breathing, nausea or vomiting & increased or ongoing erection of the penis.

medicines.name: RETALVIT SYRUP
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml syrup contains Cyanocobalamin 3 mcg, Thiamine Hydrochloride 2.5 mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 1 mg, Lysine Hydrochloride 375 mg, Nicotinamide 25 mg, Riboflavin 3.5 mg & D-Panthenol 3 mg.
medicines.description: Retalvit syrup is a combination of B vitamins with Lysine. Retalvit is used to treat or prevent vitamin deficiency due to poor diet, certain illnesses, alcoholism, or during pregnancy. Vitamins are important building blocks of the body and helps to keep you in good health. Retalvit also helps in boosting immunity, body energy levels and supports normal cognitive function.
medicines.sideEffects: Retalvit syrup generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your Doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: THIAPLEX-100
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiamine Hydrochloride 100 mg
medicines.description: Thiaplex 100 tablets contain Thiamine (Vitamin B1).It is necessary for energy production and regulating metabolism in the body. Thiaplex 100 is indicated for treatment treatment of thiamine deficiencies due to increased dietary requirements, reduced intakes, reduced absorption or increased excretion. Also for treatment of Wernicke-Korsakoff syndrome, beriberi and thiamine deficiency related to chronic alcoholism. It is also used in is situations often accompanied by marginal thiamine deficiency and requires supplementation are regular heavy drinking / chronic alcohol consumption, high carbohydrate intakes, heavy physical exertion, compromised nutritional status, high dose diuretics and Type I and Type II diabetes mellitus.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhoea, and abdominal pain.

medicines.name: THIAPLEX INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each 1 ml ampoule contains Thiamine Hydrochloride 100 mg
medicines.description: Thiaplex Inj. contains Thiamine Hydrochloride, a water soluble form of Vitamin B1 for IM or IV (Infusion or slow direct injection) use. Thiamine hydrochloride injection is used for thiamine deficiency or beriberi, Wernicke's encephalopathy, infantile beriberi with acute collapse, cardiovascular disease due to thiamine deficiency & neuritis of pregnancy if vomiting is severe. Thiaplex is also indicated when giving IV dextrose to individuals with marginal thiamine status to avoid precipitation of heart failure.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are feeling of warmth, pruritus, urticaria, weakness, sweating, nausea, restlessness, tightness of the throat & angioneurotic edema.

medicines.name: ETOFORD-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 60 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg
medicines.description: Etoford-MR Tablet is combination of Etoricoxib a NSAID and Thiocolchicoside a Skeletal muscle relexant which is indicated in Backache, Acute musculoskeletal spasms, Neuralgia, Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Ankylosing spondylitis & Sports injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, stomach pain, diarrhea, Peripheral edema, flatulence, feeling sleepy (somnolence) and drowsiness.

medicines.name: ETOLID-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etodolac 400 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg
medicines.description: Etolid-MR Tablet is combination of Etodolac a NSAID and Thiocolchicoside a Skeletal muscle relaxant which is indicated in Backache, Acute musculoskeletal spasms, Neuralgia, Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Ankylosing spondylitis & Sports injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Vomiting, Heartburn, Stomach pain, Loss of appetite, Indigestion & Sleepiness

medicines.name: THIOFORD
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiocolchicoside 4 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg
medicines.description: Thioford Tablet is a combination of skeletal muscle-relaxant drug Thiocolchicoside & NSAID Aceclofenac used in the treatment of orthopedic, traumatic and rheumatologic disorders. It is indicated for painful muscle spasms, Neck & Shoulder Pain, Sciatica, Degenerative vertebral disorders, Ankylosing spondylitis for adults and adolescents 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects of are Somnolence, diarrhoea, heartburn, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain and flatulence.

medicines.name: THIOFORD-AP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiocolchicoside 4 mg, Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Thioford-AP Tablet is a triple combination of skeletal muscle-relaxant drug Thiocolchicoside, Aceclofenac a NSAID & Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic used in the treatment of orthopedic, traumatic and rheumatologic disorders. It is indicated in the treatment of painful muscle spasms, Neck & Shoulder Pain, Sciatica, Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Degenerative vertebral disorders, Ankylosing spondylitis, for adults and adolescents 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Somnolence, diarrhoea, heartburn, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain and flatulence.

medicines.name: ETOLYTE-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etoricoxib 60 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg
medicines.description: Etolyte-MR Tablet is combination of Etoricoxib (NSAID) and Thiocolchicoside (Skeletal muscle relaxant) which is indicated in Backache, Acute musculoskeletal spasms, Neuralgia, Osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Ankylosing spondilitis & Sports injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: The common side effects of are Flu-like symptoms, Indigestion, Stomach pain, diarrhea, Peripheral edema, flatulence, Feeling sleepy (somnolence) and drowsiness.

medicines.name: THIOROK
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiocolchicoside 4 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg
medicines.description: Thiorok Tablet is a combination of skeletal muscle-relaxant drug Thiocolchicoside & NSAID Acecloclofenac used in the treatment of orthopedic, traumatic and rheumatologic disorders. It is indicated for painful muscle spasms, neck & shoulder Pain, sciatica, degenerative vertebral disorders, ankylosing spondylitis, for adults and adolescents 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Somnolence, diarrhoea, heartburn, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain and flatulence.

medicines.name: THIOROK AP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiocolchicoside 4 mg, Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Thiorok-AP Tablet is a triple combination of skeletal muscle-relaxant drug Thiocolchicoside, Acecloclofenac a NSAID & Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic used in the treatment of orthopedic, traumatic and rheumatologic disorders. It is indicated in the treatment of painful muscle spasms, neck & shoulder Pain, sciatica, osteoarthritis, Rheumatoid Arthritis, degenerative vertebral disorders, ankylosing spondylitis, for adults and adolescents 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Somnolence, diarrhoea, heartburn, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain and flatulence.

medicines.name: THIOFORD PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16%w/w, Thiocolchicoside 0.125% w/w, Linseed oil 3% w/w, Methylsalicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w
medicines.description: Thioford plus gel is a pain-relieving gel useful in the treatment of muscle pain and spasms. It provides fast and lasting relief from back pain, osteoarthritis pain, rheumatologic disorders, and related conditions. It is non-greasy and non-staining formulation, which gets absorbed quickly and has fast pain-relieving action.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.
medicines.dosage: Apply to the affected area 2-3 times a day after hot water fomentation or as directed by the physician.

medicines.name: SNEPTIN-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Flupirtine Maleate 100 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg.
medicines.description: Sneptin-MR tablet contains Flupiritine a centrally acting non opioid analgesic & Thiocolchicoside, an antispasmodic for skeletal muscle relaxation & is used in post-surgical pain, Pain associated with muscle spasm, low back pain and other musculo-skeletal problems.
medicines.sideEffects: Heartburn, nausea/vomiting, stomach upset, diarrhoea, sleep disturbances, sweating & lack of appetite are few side effects.

medicines.name: THIOFORD FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiocolchicoside 8 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg.
medicines.description: Thioford Forte Tablet is a combination of skeletal muscle-relaxant drug Thiocolchicoside & NSAID Aceclofenac used in the treatment of orthopedic, traumatic and rheumatologic disorders. It is indicated for painful muscle spasms, Neck & Shoulder Pain, Sciatica, Degenerative vertebral disorders, Ankylosing spondylitis for adults and adolescents 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects of are Somnolence, diarrhoea, heartburn, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain and flatulence.

medicines.name: THIOROK-FORTE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Thiocolchicoside 8 mg & Aceclofenac 100 mg
medicines.description: Thiorok Forte Tablet is a combination of skeletal muscle-relaxant drug Thiocolchicoside & NSAID Acecloclofenac used in the treatment of orthopedic, traumatic and rheumatologic disorders. It is indicated for painful muscle spasms, neck & shoulder Pain, sciatica, degenerative vertebral disorders, ankylosing spondylitis, for adults and adolescents 16 years of age and older.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Somnolence, diarrhoea, heartburn, dyspepsia, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain and flatulence.

medicines.name: THIOROK PLUS GEL
medicines.composition: Each g contains Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16%w/w, Thiocolchicoside 0.125% w/w, Linseed oil 3% w/w, Methylsalicylate 10% w/w & Menthol 5% w/w
medicines.description: Thiorok Plus gel is a pain-relieving gel useful in the treatment of muscle pain and spasms. It provides fast and lasting relief from back pain, osteoarthritis pain, rheumatologic disorders, and related conditions. It is non-greasy and non-staining formulation, which gets absorbed quickly and has fast pain-relieving action.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Skin irritation, rashes, and redness of the skin, dermatitis on repeated use, burning or stinging feeling on site of application.

medicines.name: ETOLOSET-MR
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Etodolac 400 mg & Thiocolchicoside 4 mg
medicines.description: Etoloset-MR tablets is a combination medicine which contains Etodolac and Thiocolchicoside, a medication used in the treatment of pain and inflammation associated with musculoskeletal disorders. Etodolac is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) that reduces pain and swelling, while Thiocolchicoside is a muscle relaxant that alleviates muscle spasms. Together, they provide relief from conditions such as arthritis, back pain, and other muscular or joint issues.
medicines.sideEffects: Diarrhea, headache, high or low blood pressure, abdominal pain, loss of appetite, indigestion, sleepiness, heartburn, nausea & vomiting are some of the common side effects.

medicines.name: THYROACTIV 100
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Thyroxine Sodium eq. to Thyroxine 100 mcg
medicines.description: Thyroactiv tablets contain Thyroxine sodium (synthetic form of Thyroxine hormone secreted by Thyroid gland).Thrroxine controls entire metabolic activity of the body and is very important for the proper functioning of our body. It is indicated for the treatment of hypothyroidism in adults and also in congenital hypothyroidism.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are increased appetite, weight variations, headache, vomiting, diarrhoea, changes in menstrual cycle, fever, sensitivity to heat, cramps and mood swings

medicines.name: THYROACTIV 25
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Thyroxine Sodium eq. to Thyroxine 25 mcg
medicines.description: Thyroactiv tablets contain Thyroxine sodium (synthetic form of Thyroxine hormone secreted by Thyroid gland).Thrroxine controls entire metabolic activity of the body and is very important for the proper functioning of our body. It is indicated for the treatment of hypothyroidism in adults and also in congenital hypothyroidism.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are increased appetite, weight variations, headache, vomiting, diarrhoea, changes in menstrual cycle, fever, sensitivity to heat, cramps and mood swings

medicines.name: THYROACTIV 50
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Thyroxine Sodium eq. to Thyroxine 50 mcg
medicines.description: Thyroactiv tablets contain Thyroxine sodium (synthetic form of Thyroxine hormone secreted by Thyroid gland).Thrroxine controls entire metabolic activity of the body and is very important for the proper functioning of our body. It is indicated for the treatment of hypothyroidism in adults and also in congenital hypothyroidism.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are increased appetite, weight variations, headache, vomiting, diarrhoea, changes in menstrual cycle, fever, sensitivity to heat, cramps and mood swings

medicines.name: THYROACTIV 75
medicines.composition: Each uncoated tablet contains Thyroxine Sodium eq. to Thyroxine 75 mcg
medicines.description: Thyroactiv tablets contain Thyroxine sodium (synthetic form of Thyroxine hormone secreted by Thyroid gland).Thrroxine controls entire metabolic activity of the body and is very important for the proper functioning of our body. It is indicated for the treatment of hypothyroidism in adults and also in congenital hypothyroidism.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are increased appetite, weight variations, headache, vomiting, diarrhoea, changes in menstrual cycle, fever, sensitivity to heat, cramps and mood swings

medicines.name: TICAFORD-90
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ticagrelor 90 mg
medicines.description: Ticagrelor is an antiplatelet medicine that prevents clumping of blood platelets and thus acts as blood thinner. It makes your blood flow through your arteries more easily & will be less likely to make dangerous blood clots. Taking Ticaford can help prevent blood clots if you have an increased risk of having them.
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are difficulty in breathing, headache, dizziness, nausea, bleeding and nosebleed may occur.

medicines.name: TIMITROL EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Timolol Maleate eq. to Timolol 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Timitrol eye drops contain Timolol, a beta blocker that reduces the increased pressure into the eyes. It is prescribed for Glaucoma (increased pressure within the eye) & for within eyes blood pressure. Increased pressure within the eye is the largest cause of blindness known.
medicines.sideEffects: Temporary blurred vision, temporary burning or stinging or itching or redness of the eye, watery eyes, dry eyes, feeling as if something is in the eye & headache may occur.

medicines.name: TIMITROL-D EYE DROPS
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Dorzolamide 2% w/v & Timolol 0.5% w/v
medicines.description: Timitrol-D eye drops is a combination of Dorzolamide and Timolol, a combination medication used to treat high intraocular pressure in conditions like glaucoma or ocular hypertension. Dorzolamide is a carbonic anhydrase inhibitor, while Timolol is a beta-blocker. Together, they help reduce pressure in the eyes by decreasing fluid production, helping prevent damage to the optic nerve and thus preserving vision.
medicines.sideEffects: Eye irritation, blurred vision, swelling, eye discharge, redness, feeling of something in the eye are some side effects that may arise.

medicines.name: CALCIJOINT-XT
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Calcium Citrate 1000 mg, Tribasic Calcium Phosphate 150 mg, Calcium Ascorbate 75 mg, Vit. D3 400 IU, Magnesium Hydroxide 100 mg & Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate eq. to elemental Zinc 4 mg
medicines.description: Calcijoint-XT tablets contain combination of Calcium Citrate, Tribasic calcium Phosphate with Calcium ascorbate (a form of vitamin C) with Vitamin D3 and minerals. This medication is used to prevent or treat low blood calcium levels in people who do not get enough calcium from their diets. It may be used to treat conditions caused by low calcium levels such as bone loss (osteoporosis), weak bones (osteomalacia/rickets), decreased activity of the parathyroid gland (hypoparathyroidism), and a certain muscle disease (latent tetany). It may also be used in certain patients to make sure they are getting enough calcium (e.g., women who are pregnant, nursing, or postmenopausal, people taking certain medications such as phenytoin, phenobarbital, or prednisone).
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are diarrhea, constipation, upset stomach and abdominal pain.

medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Wet the face or body and apply Clinsol soap liberally to raise good lather and leave it there for a minute or so before rinsing thoroughly. For anti-acne applications wash your face 2 to 4 times depending upon season and skin type. Do not use it for bathing regularly being an antiseptic soap, it has specific usage.

medicines.name: ENSHINE TOOTHPASTE (50g,100g & 150g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Triclosan 0.3%, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w, with cooling crystals ( GEL TOOTHPASTE)
medicines.description: Enshine gel toothpaste is a multi-action formula for healthy teeth and gums. Enshine gel toothpaste relieves mild sensitivity, removes plaque, freshens breath and inhibits the growth of cavity causing bacteria besides providing overall oral hygiene.
medicines.sideEffects: No side effects & safe to use
medicines.dosage: Apply half to one inch length of product onto a soft bristle toothbrush and brush twice daily regularly for best care. Do not swallow the foaming paste; spit it out after one minute of brushing.

medicines.name: DANTOX TOOTHPASTE (50 g & 100 g)
medicines.composition: Each g contains Triclosan 0.3%, Potassium Nitrate 5% w/w & Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w, with cooling crystals ( GEL TOOTHPASTE)

medicines.name: CLINSOL PLUS SOAP
medicines.composition: Triclosan, Ethyl Lactate, Zinc PCA, Salicylic Acid, Manuka Concentrate, Willow Extract, Tea Tree Oil, Olive Extract, Aloe Vera Extract & Glycerin
medicines.description: Clinsol Plus Soap is a dermatologically formulated cleansing bar enriched with Triclosan and Ethyl Lactate provide broad-spectrum antimicrobial action, while Salicylic Acid and Willow Extract help exfoliate and unclog pores. Zinc PCA controls excess oil and sebum production. Manuka Concentrate, Tea Tree Oil, Olive Extract, Aloe Vera, and Glycerin offer moisturization, anti-inflammatory action, and skin barrier support. Ideal for oily, acne-prone, and sensitive skin, it helps prevent breakouts while maintaining skin hydration and balance.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet skin, lather gently, and rinse thoroughly. Suitable for daily use.

medicines.name: CLINSOL ANTI ACNE FW

medicines.description: Clinsol Anti Acne FW is a gel-based face wash formulated with charcoal, glycolic acid, aloe vera, vitamin E, and triclosan. It deeply cleanses pores, exfoliates dead skin cells, reduces acne-causing bacteria, and soothes irritation, leaving the skin clear, refreshed, and balanced without over-drying.
medicines.sideEffects: No known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Apply to wet face, gently massage in circular motions, then rinse thoroughly. Use twice daily

medicines.name: ACNETOIN ANTI ACNE FW
medicines.composition: Glycolic Acid, Aloevera, Vitamin E & Triclosan (Gel based Facewash)
medicines.description: Acnetoin Anti Acne Facewash is a gel-based formulation specially designed for oily and acne-prone skin. Glycolic Acid gently exfoliates dead skin cells and helps unclog pores, while Aloe Vera soothes and hydrates the skin. Vitamin E provides antioxidant protection and aids in skin repair. Triclosan acts as a powerful antibacterial agent to reduce acne-causing bacteria. This facewash helps clear existing acne, prevents new breakouts, and improves skin texture, leaving it fresh and healthy.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated. Mild dryness or tingling may occur initially due to exfoliating action.
medicines.dosage: Apply a small amount to wet face, gently massage into skin, and rinse thoroughly. Use 2 to 3 times daily for best results. Safe for regular use.

medicines.name: PILOGO PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Troxerutin 2% w/w, Calcium Dobesilate monohydrate eq. to Anhydrous Calcium Dobesilate 0.25% w/w, Lignocaine Hydrochloride 3% w/w, Hydrocortisone Acetate 0.25% w/w, Zinc Oxide 5% w/w & Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 0.1% w/w (with Applicator)
medicines.description: Pilogo Plus cream contains Troxerutin and Calcium Dobesilate which stabilizes the veins to reduce bleeding and swelling, Zinc Oxide an antibacterial, Phenylephrine relieve piles by shrinking swollen blood vessels in the rectal area, thereby reducing discomfort and swelling., Hydrocortisone a steroid that reduces pain, inflammation and pruritis and Lignocaine, an anesthetic that relieves pain. Pilogo plus cream is indicated for pain and bleeding associated with anal fissures, haemorrhoids, after haemorrhoids removal surgery and in prevention of recurrence of piles following surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are application site reactions which include burning, irritation, itching and redness.

medicines.name: CHYMONET AP
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Trypsin-Chymotrypsin 50000 armour unit (6:1) as enteric coated granules, Aceclofenac 100 mg & Paracetamol 325 mg
medicines.description: Chymonet-AP tablets contain Trypsin and Chymotrypsin, proteolytic enzymes that clear dead cells, improves microcirculation and accelerate healing in combination with Aceclofenac a NSAID. Chymonet-AP is indicated in Orthopedics for post-traumatic swelling, fractures and dislocation, soft tissue injury, sports injury, traumatic injuries and post-surgical inflammation. Chymonet forte is also used to help loosen phlegm in asthma, bronchitis, lung diseases and sinus infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Itching, shortness of breath, swelling of lips or throat, shock, loss of consciousness and ocassional gastric disturbance may occur.

medicines.name: CHYMONET FORTE

medicines.name: ALKAZIP SODA
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains effervescent granules of Sodium Bicarbonate 44.03% w/w, Sodium Citrate 15.75% w/w, Citric acid 17.88% w/w & Tartaric acid 22.25% w/w Sugar Free, Lemon Flavour
medicines.description: Alkazip soda contains Sodium Bicarbonate, Sodium Citrate, Citric Acid & Tartaric Acid, all of these salts make up an antacid that neutralizes stomach acid & an urinary alkalizer that helps make urine alkaline or less acidic. It is prescribed in cases of temporary relief from minor gastric upsets; incombination with antibiotics, when the effectiveness of an antibiotic is increased in the presence of alkaline urine & in urinary conditions where alkaline urine will benefit & help kidneys to get rid of uric acid in blood as well as removes kidney stones due to high uric acid.
medicines.sideEffects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea and stomach pain may occur.

medicines.name: ACNETOIN SOAP
medicines.composition: Allantoin 1 % w/w, Triclosan 1% w/w, Vit E 0.25% w/w & Tea Tree oil 0.2% w/w
medicines.description: Acnetoin soap contains Allantoin & Vit E that soothes the skin and heals by providing nourishment; whereas Triclosan & Tea Tree oil acts as antibacterial & antiseptic to kill disease and acne causing bacteria to give infection free skin to avoid pimples. Acnetoin soap reduces redness, swelling, itching, tightens pore to reduce acne and correct the facial skin. It is prescribed for mild to moderate acne.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Wash face 2 to 3 times a day with the Acnetoin soap and pat dry face for better result. Can be used for long time and is safe.

medicines.name: ELOWAY SOAP
medicines.composition: Aloevera extract 4% w/w, Vitamin E 0.5% w/w & Glycerin 10% w/w (Transparent Soap)
medicines.description: Eloway soap is a pure translucent soap that contains Aloevera with goodness of Vit. E & Glycerin for excellent skin soothing and moistening properties. Eloway soap can be used regularly by people of all skin types. It is also effective in cases of acne and for those people who have dry to very dry skin type.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: For acne treatment wash the face 3 to 4 times a day with the Eloway soap. For general usage, use Eloway as a routine soap for washing hands and bathing.

medicines.name: BREATH EX
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Camphor 25 mg, Chlorothymol 5 mg, Eucalyptus Oil 125 mg, Menthol 55 mg & Terpineol 125 mg
medicines.description: Breath-Ex inhalant softgel contains Camphor, Chlorothymol, Eucalyptol Oil, Menthol & Terpineol that acts synergistically to clear congestion and other cold-related symptoms. It is used for relieving nasal symptoms such as runny, itchy, stuffy nose, sneezing and post-nasal drip; besides it is also used in case of skin itching following eczema.
medicines.sideEffects: It is very well tolerated; the only observed side effects are nasal irritation & burning sensation. On topical application for itching it might cause mild skin irritation.
medicines.dosage: Cut open one softgel and pour the contents in hot water or paper to take steam or smell respectively 3 times a day for 5 to 7 days only. At the max can use every 6 hours i.e. 4 times a day. It can be safely used by children over 3 years, use half the content of softgel for up to 6 years.

medicines.name: DANTOX EXPERT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Tannic acid Glycerin 66 30% w/v, Iodine 0.3% w/v, Potassium Iodide 0.5% w/v, Thymol 0.05% w/v, Menthol 0.08% w/v & Glycerin 100% QS v/v
medicines.description: Dantox expert gum paint contains Tannic acid Glycerin, Iodine, Potassium Iodide, Thymol, Menthol & Glycerin. Tannic acid glycerin acts by healing sores and treating bleeding gums; Iodine, Potassium iodide & Thymol acts as antibacterial; Iodine & Menthol together act as counterirritant to relieve irritation and offer a soothing effect. This product is prescribed for spongy gums, bleeding gums, sores on gums & pus coming out of gums.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.
medicines.dosage: Clean your hands thoroughly and wipe it. Take a drop or two on your finger tips of Dantox gum paint and apply at the lesion or take a larger quantity and apply on the infected gums or as required. It can be applied two to three times a day depending upon severity of disease. You can use it for 3 to 5 days continuously or may be little longer.

medicines.name: GEOFRESH MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Thymol 0.06% w/v, Eucalyptol 0.09% w/v, Menthol 0.04% w/v & Ethanol (95%) 21.6% v/v
medicines.description: Geofresh mouthwash contains Thymol, Eucalyptol, Menthol & Ethanol. Thymol acts as antiseptic agent, Eucalyptol acts as anti-inflammatory & relieves minor pain, Menthol is a freshening agent and soother & Ethanol is antiseptic, cleanser, analgesic and soother. Geofresh Mouthwash is used for prevention of plaque in absence of brushing, prevention and treatment of swollen gums, treatment of minor oral infections, controlling secondary bacterial infections for mouth & gum ulcers besides aiding in treatment of mouth and throat infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effect observed.
medicines.dosage: Take a measure full or 15 ml of Geofresh mouthwash in your mouth & swish for one minute thoroughly. Do not rinse, eat or drink thereafter for 20 minutes. It is to be used under adult supervision for kids under 5 years of age. Do not swallow it, after swishing thoroughly spit out. Can be used twice daily once in the morning and then before retiring to bed.

medicines.name: QUIK RELIF PATCH
medicines.composition: Each rectangular patch coated with paste containing Katuvira fruit oil 0.5 %, Gandhpura leaf oil 1.0 % , kapoor leaf crystals 0.1%, nilgiri leaf oil 0.1%& Gurmar leaf oil ext. 0.1% in 10cm x 16cm plaster
medicines.description: Quik Relif patch is trans dermal patch that provide effective relief in cases of chronic painful musculoskeletal conditions. Quik Relif patch is almost devoid of any side effects being herbal & has direct action at the site of injury or inflammation. KINDLY READ THE APPLICATION METHOD BEFORE USING IT FOR PROPER USE & BEST RESULTS.
medicines.sideEffects: Mild irritation at the site of application is the only side effects.

It is prescribed for removal of excessive wax from ear canal, to treat milder infections and to stop pain due to any reason within the ear.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, dizziness & earache may occur while using Curewax ear drops.

medicines.dosage: Cut open one softgel and pour the contents in hot water or paper to take steam or smell respectively 3 times a day for 5 to 7 days only. At the max can use every 6 hours i.e. 4 times a day. It can be safely used by children over 3 years, use half the content of softgel for up to 6 years.

medicines.name: NOZCALM SOFT GEL
medicines.composition: Each soft gel capsule contains Camphor 25 mg, Chlorothymol 5 mg, Eucalyptol Oil 125 mg, Menthol 55 mg & Terpineol 120 mg.

Nozcalm is ideal for cold or seasonal allergies as it provide a convenient, fast-acting way to ease discomfort and support overall respiratory well-being.

medicines.name: CHYMOMERG
medicines.composition: Each enteric coated tablet contains Trypsin 48 mg, Bromelain 90 mg & Rutoside Trihydrate 100 mg
medicines.description: Chymomerg Tablets contains Trypsin & Bromelain, proteolytic enzymes that clears dead cells to reduces pain and inflammation and Rutoside, a herbal analgesic for effective pain relief. Chymomerg tablets are used to treat pain and inflammation related to osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and tendonitis. It is also used to treat conditions such as edema and inflammation following surgeries of cellulitis, sports injuries, tooth extractions, and sprains.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are temporary stinging sensation, nausea, hives, difficulty in breathing, burning sensations, Indigestion and loss of balance.

medicines.description: Retesto Softgels contains Testosterone Undecanoate that mimics the activity of natural testosterone to help restore normal hormonal balance and deliver the desired physiological effects. It is used as testosterone replacement therapy in conditions associated with primary and secondary male hypogonadism (reduced functional activity of the gonads leading to testosterone deficiency). Retesto softgel is also indicated for the management of symptoms related to impotence and delayed puberty in males, helping to improve sexual function, energy levels, muscle mass, and overall well-being.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include acne, hair loss, mood changes, and fluid retention.

medicines.description: Tofsiford-50 tablets contain Tofisopam, an anxiolytic medication used to manage anxiety, stress-related disorders, and depression. Tofisopam belongs to the benzodiazepine group but acts differently by modulating GABAergic activity without causing significant sedation or dependence. It helps reduce anxiety, improve mood, and enhance cognitive function without impairing alertness.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include mild headache, nausea, dizziness, and gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.dosage: Wash feet with lukewarm water and pat dry. Apply the required quantity of Footmark Cream over the affected area twice daily, once in the morning after bathing and again at bedtime. If you want can cover it or after 5 minutes can wear socks and shoes.

It is prescribed in wide variety of skin diseases where there is requirement of removing dead skin, providing moisturization & imparting even tone skin so as to correct it, such as Psoriasis, Contact Dermatitis, healed dry burn scars, Lichen Planus, Xerosis, Ichthyosis, Eczema & Keratosis etc.

medicines.name: VORISURE INJECTION
medicines.composition: Each vial contains Voriconazole Lyophilized Powder 200 mg with WFI
medicines.description: Vorisure injection contains Voriconazole, an antifungal medication used to treat serious fungal infections, particularly those caused by Aspergillus species and other susceptible fungi. Vorisure works by inhibiting the synthesis of ergosterol, a key component of fungal cell membranes thereby disrupting their growth. Vorisure is commonly used for invasive aspergillosis and esophageal candidiasis, especially in immuno-compromised patients.
medicines.sideEffects: Blurred vision, hives, fever, chills, shortness of breath, vomiting & chest pain are some of the side effects that may occur.

medicines.name: VORISURE-200
medicines.composition: Voriconazole 200 mg
medicines.description: Vorisure-200 Tablet contains Voriconazole as its active ingredient. Voriconazole is a broad-spectrum antifungal medication that works by inhibiting fungal cell membrane formation, thereby preventing the growth and spread of fungal infections. It is used in the treatment of serious fungal infections such as aspergillosis, candidemia, and other infections caused by Candida and Scedosporium species. Vorisure-200 helps in effectively controlling fungal infections in patients with weakened immune systems or those unresponsive to other antifungal treatments.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include headache, nausea, visual disturbances.

It is indicated in megabolastic anaemia, hyperhomocystenemia, diabetic neuropathies, alcohol induced neuropathy, prevention of neural tube defect and adjunct in the management of liver disorders.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, loss of appetite, headache and pain at the site of injection.

Dincerin C2 improves joint health, increases mobility and flexibility of involved joints.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are Nausea, Diarrhea, constipation, heartburn and increased intestinal gas.

medicines.description: Nutiactiv capsule contains Ascorbic Acid, Pyridoxine (Vitamin B6), Selenium, Nicotinamide (Vitamin B3), Riboflavin (Vitamin B2), Zinc, Copper, Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) and Folic Acid (Vitamin B9). Nutiactiv helps maintain healthy nervous system, immune system, protects against oxidative damage caused due to stress and helps in maintaining healthy sugar levels in diabetes. It is also used as supplement when mineral & vitamin requirements of the body are high such as in nutrient malabsorption, after surgery, during pregnancy and lactation.
medicines.sideEffects: Nutiactiv capsule generally works well when used within recommended dose. Still, you may sometimes experience side effects such as headache, dizziness, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain or discomfort, irritation, sleepiness, skin rash and itching.
medicines.dosage: One capsule daily with food, or as directed by physician

This combination improves cardiac efficiency by reducing strain on the heart and promoting vasodilation. It is indicated for the treatment of chronic heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) to reduce the risk of cardiovascular death and hospitalization.

medicines.name: E-WOK PLUS

medicines.description: E-WOK PLUS combines essential nutrients to support overall health. Wheat germ oil is rich in vitamin E, particularly tocopherols and tocotrienols, which possess antioxidant properties. Cod liver oil provides omega-3 fatty acids EPA and DHA, which are beneficial for cardiovascular health. Tocotrienols have been studied for their potential role in reducing oxidative stress and supporting cellular health. Vitamin B6 is involved in neurotransmitter synthesis and metabolic processes, while folic acid is crucial for DNA synthesis and repair.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 Capsule daily after a meal, preferably with water.

medicines.description: Nasocan nasal drops contains Xylometazoline, a nasal decongestant that constricts nasal blood vessels to open nasal passage by decreasing swelling and secretion. It is prescribed for the symptomatic relief of nasal congestion, seasonal & annual allergic rhinitis (including hay fever) and sinusitis.
medicines.sideEffects: Temporary burning, stinging & dryness in the nose & runny nose are the main side effects.

medicines.name: NOZCALM-XL NASAL DROPS ADULTS
medicines.composition: Xylometazoline Hydrochloride 0.1% w/v

medicines.sideEffects: Temporary burning, stinging & dryness in the nose & runny nose are the main side effects.

medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are Headache, Nausea, Application site burning, Sneezing, Nasal discomfort & Nasal dryness

medicines.name: NOZCALM-XL PAEDIATRIC DROPS
medicines.composition: Xylometazoline HCl 0.05% w/v
medicines.description: Xylometazoline, a decongestant that provides quick relief from nasal congestion due to colds, allergies, or sinusitis. It works by constricting the blood vessels in the nasal passages, reducing swelling and making breathing easier. Commonly used for short-term relief in adults and children above 6 years.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include nasal dryness, burning, stinging, sneezing, or irritation. Prolonged use can cause rebound congestion or nasal mucosa damage. Rarely, headache, dizziness, or increased heart rate may occur.

medicines.dosage: Dissolve in water or juice, else consume directly with spoon in all the cases except low sugar levels where it is to be put under tongue for faster rise in sugar levels. Rock-On can be safely given in all age groups.

This medication is used to prevent or treat low blood calcium levels in people who do not get enough calcium from their diets. It may be used to treat conditions caused by low calcium levels such as bone loss (osteoporosis), weak bones (osteomalacia/rickets), decreased activity of the parathyroid gland (hypoparathyroidism), and a certain muscle disease (latent tetany). It may also be used in certain patients to make sure they are getting enough calcium (e.g., women who are pregnant, nursing, or postmenopausal, people taking certain medications such as phenytoin, phenobarbital, or prednisone).

medicines.sideEffects: Nutiactiv-Z tablets generally works well when used within recommended dose. Still, you may sometimes experience side effects such as headache, dizziness, nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain or discomfort, irritation, sleepiness, skin rash and itching.

medicines.name: MEFNIWEL-P
medicines.composition: Each 5 ml contains Mefenamic acid 50 mg & Paracetamol 125 mg
medicines.description: Mefniwel-P contains Mefenamic acid a NSAID with antispasmodic properties and Paracetamol an analgesic and antipyretic. It is indicated for relief of fever, low back pain and Joint disorders such as Osteoarthritis and Rheumatoid arthritis, headache, migraine, dental pain, Painful periods and in acute musculoskeletal injuries.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects hypersensitivity reactions, dizziness, diarrhea, constipation, gas or bloating, headache, dizziness, nervousness and ringing in the ears.

medicines.name: ACTISIGHT PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Vaccinium myrtillus (Bilberry ext.) 40 mg, Pinus gerardiana (Pine bark ext.) 25 mg, Lutein (40%) 10 mg, Astaxanthin (10%) 4 mg, Zeaxanthin (5%) 2 mg, Vit. C 40 mg, Vit. E 5 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg, Zinc 10 mg, Copper 1 mg & Selenium 40 mcg
medicines.description: Actisight Plus tablet contains Vaccinium myrtillus, Pinus gerardiana, Carotenoids along with multivitamins that supports eye health in all age groups above 6 years, strengthens vision & further reduces intraocular pressure. It improves visual field, visual sharpness and reduces the rate of visual decline. It helps to treat Glaucoma, treats Retinitis Pigmentosa and dry eyes besides maintain eyesight.
medicines.sideEffects: Actisight Plus tablet generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist.
medicines.dosage: One Tablet once or twice daily.

medicines.name: KETOFLY PLUS SOAP
medicines.composition: Each soap bar contains Ketoconazole 2% w/w, Glycerine 4% w/w & ZPTO 1 %w/w
medicines.description: Ketofly Plus soap contains Ketoconazole & Zinc Pyrithione, a potent combination of anti-fungal ketoconazole and anti-bacterial zinc pyrithione that aids in treatment & prevention of fungal infections like dandruff and dermatitis. It helps soothe itching, reduces scaling, and restores scalp health by targeting fungi and bacteria responsible for these conditions. Ketofly Plus soap offers relief with regular use hence promoting healthier hair and skin.
medicines.sideEffects: Skin irritations, dryness, eye irritation, allergic reactions and hair & scalp changes may occur.

medicines.name: FEMOZER-MD
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains Iron 29 mg, Folic Acid 129.41 mcg, Vitamin B12 2 mcg & Zinc 13.2 mg (Mouth melt micro iron granules) (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Femozer MD contains novel gut friendly Iron, Folic acid, Vitamin B12 & Zinc, a convenient dietary supplement designed to support overall health. The blend promotes red blood cell production, boosts immunity, fulfils deficiencies of nutrients it contains and enhances energy levels. The easy-to-use mouth melt granules easily melts into the mouth, ensuring quick absorption and optimal bioavailability. Femozer granules are Ideal for individuals who require improvement in their nutrient intake.
medicines.sideEffects: Gastrointestinal upsets, stomach cramps, nausea, mild diarrhoea, headache, metallic taste are some common side effects that may occur.
medicines.dosage: One sachet (1g) in a day or as prescribed by physician.

medicines.name: FERIVATE MD
medicines.composition: Each sachet contains Microencapsulated Iron eq. to el. Iron 29 mg, Vit. B9 129.41 mcg, Vit. B12 2 mcg & Zn 13.2 mg (Orange Flavour) (Mouth Dissolving micro iron granules)
medicines.description: Ferivate MD contains novel gut friendly Iron, Folic acid, Vitamin B12 & Zinc, a convenient dietary supplement designed to support overall health. The blend promotes red blood cell production, boosts immunity, fulfils deficiencies of nutrients it contains and enhances energy levels. The easy-to-use mouth melt granules easily melts into the mouth, ensuring quick absorption and optimal bioavailability. Ferivate granules are Ideal for individuals who require improvement in their nutrient intake.
medicines.sideEffects: Gastrointestinal upsets, stomach cramps, nausea, mild diarrhoea, headache, metallic taste are some common side effects that may occur.
medicines.dosage: One sachet (1g) in a day or as prescribed by physician.

medicines.name: TINFAL-ADVANCE
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Evening Primrose Oil (GLA) 20 mg, Millet Seed Extract 100 mg, Grape Seed Extract 50 mg, Ginkgo biloba Extract 100 mg, Soy Isoflavones 50 mg, Beta-Sitosterol 100 mg, N-Acetyl Cysteine 100 mg, Lysine 30 mg, Methionine 50 mg, Vitamin B3 11 mg, Pantothenic Acid 5 mg, Vitamin B6 1.5 mg, Vitamin B1 1.1 mg, Folic Acid 100 mcg, Biotin 40 mcg, Vitamin D2 600 IU, Iron 29 mg, Copper 1 mg, Selenium 40 mcg, Zinc 10 mg, Choline 5 mg & Melatonin 1 mg.
medicines.description: Tinfal-Advance tablets is a potent supplement that contains multivitamins, multiminerals along with Amino Acids, Ginkgo Biloba extract, Beta-Sitosterol, Millet seed extract and grape seed extract to support hair growth and overall hair health. Ginkgo Biloba enhances circulation, while millet seed and grape seed extracts provide vital nutrients for hair strength. Beta-Sitosterol helps balance DHT levels thus promoting healthy hair growth. Together, these ingredients nourish the scalp and improve hair vitality.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally, this tablet has no side effects if used as prescribed.
medicines.dosage: One (1) tablet daily after any meal or as prescribed by physician

medicines.name: DANTOX MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Dantox Mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine, Sodium Fluoride, and Zinc, used to promote oral hygiene. Chlorhexidine helps reduce bacteria, while Sodium Fluoride strengthens tooth enamel and prevents cavities. Zinc helps reduce bad breath and plaque buildup. Together, they support healthy gums, freshen breath, and protect teeth from decay and gum disease, providing an effective addition to daily oral care.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects are tooth staining, change in taste, and hard dental plaque.
medicines.dosage: 10 ml twice a day after equally mixing with water or as prescribed by physician

medicines.name: ULTRADENT MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Chlorhexidine 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Ultradent Mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine, Sodium Fluoride, and Zinc, used to promote oral hygiene. Chlorhexidine helps reduce bacteria, while Sodium Fluoride strengthens tooth enamel and prevents cavities. Zinc helps reduce bad breath and plaque buildup. Together, they support healthy gums, freshen breath, and protect teeth from decay and gum disease, providing an effective addition to daily oral care.
medicines.sideEffects: Most common side effects are tooth staining, change in taste, and hard dental plaque.
medicines.dosage: 10 ml twice a day after equally mixing with water or as prescribed by physician

medicines.name: DINCERIN-CT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Glucosamine Hydrochloride 750 mg, Methylsufonyl Methane 250 mg, Chondroitin sulphate sodium 100 mg, Vitamin C 40 mg, Vitamin D3 200 IU, Zinc 4 mg, Manganese 3 mg, Copper 0.5 mg, Boron 0.5 mg, Selenium 40 mcg & Chromium 33 mcg
medicines.description: This combination supports joint and bone health by reducing inflammation, promoting cartilage repair, and enhancing mobility. Glucosamine, chondroitin, and MSM help maintain joint structure, while cholecalciferol, calcium ascorbate, and multiminerals support bone strength, calcium absorption, and collagen synthesis for overall musculoskeletal health
medicines.sideEffects: This combination may cause mild side effects such as nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or headache. High doses can lead to allergic reactions, kidney issues, or interfere with blood sugar and mineral balance.
medicines.dosage: Take 1 tablet per day, preferably with food to improve absorption and minimize gastrointestinal discomfort.

medicines.name: FEMOZER-XT PLUS
medicines.composition: Each film coated tablet contains Ferrous Ascorbate eq. to el. Iron 100 mg, Adenosylcobalamin 500 mcg, Folic acid 1.5 mg & El. Zinc 5 mg
medicines.description: Femozer XT Plus contains Ferrous Ascorbate, Adenosylcobalamin, Folic acid & Zinc combination used to treat and prevent iron deficiency anemia, support red blood cell production, and correct deficiencies of folic acid and zinc which are essential for DNA synthesis, cell division, and immune function. This formulation is commonly prescribed during pregnancy, lactation, or periods of increased nutritional needs. It enhances iron absorption and supports overall immune and cellular health.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects include nausea, vomiting, constipation, diarrhea, abdominal discomfort, and dark stools. Rarely, allergic reactions such as rash, swelling, or difficulty breathing may occur.

medicines.name: ACTIVIEW SOFT GEL
medicines.composition: Each softgels capsule contains Lycopene 10% 5 mg, Lutein 10% 10 mg, Zeaxanthin 10% 2 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg, Vit. C 40 mg, Natural Vit. E 10 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 12 mg, Copper Sulphate eq. to elemental Copper 1 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to el. Selenium 25 mcg & Omega 3 fatty acid eq. to EPA 180 mg & DHA 120 mg
medicines.description: Actiview softgels contain Lycopene, Lutein and Zeaxanthin (Carotenoids), Omega 3 fatty acids with vitamins and minerals. Actiview Softgels are used to prevent Age related Macular Degeneration (AMD), many eye conditions like Cataract, Retinitis Pigmentosa, Dry eye and Glaucoma. It can also be used as general eye supplement.
medicines.sideEffects: Actiview softgels generally has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: ACTISIGHT
medicines.composition: Each softgel contains Lutein 10% 10 mg, Zeaxanthin 10% 2 mg, Lycopene 10% 5 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg, Vit. C 40 mg, Natural Vit. E 10 mg, Zinc Oxide eq. to elemental Zinc 12 mg, Copper Sulphate eq. to elemental Copper 1 mg, Sodium Selenite eq. to el. Selenium 25 mcg & Omega 3 fatty acid eq. to EPA 180 mg, DHA 120 mg
medicines.description: Actisight softgel contain Carotenoids (Lycopene, Lutein and Zeaxanthin), Omega 3 fatty acids, Vitamin C, Vitamin E and minerals for the maintenance of eye sight and eye health in all age groups. Actisight lowers risk of Age related macular degeneration (Vision loss) & Cataract. It improves visual field, visual sharpness and reduces the rate of visual decline. It helps to treat Glaucoma, Retinitis Pigmentosa and Dry Eyes.
medicines.sideEffects: Actisight Softgels generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: ACTISIGHT PLUS TABLETS
medicines.composition: Each tablet contains Vaccinium myrtillus (Bilberry ext.) 40 mg, Pinus gerardiana (Pine bark ext.) 25 mg, Lutein (40%) 10 mg, Astaxanthin (10%) 4 mg, Zeaxanthin (5%) 2 mg, Vit. C 40 mg, Vit. E 5 mg, Vit. A 600 mcg, Zinc 10 mg, Copper 1 mg & Selenium 40 mcg
medicines.description: Actisight Plus tablet contains Vaccinium myrtillus, Pinus gerardiana, Carotenoids along with multivitamins that supports eye health in all age groups above 6 years, strengthens vision & further reduces intraocular pressure. It improves visual field, visual sharpness and reduces the rate of visual decline. It helps to treat Glaucoma, treats Retinitis Pigmentosa and dry eyes besides maintain eyesight.
medicines.sideEffects: Actisight Plus tablet generally has no side effects when used within recommended dose. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist.
medicines.dosage: One Tablet once or twice daily.

medicines.name: AQUA JOY MOUTH WASH
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate solution eq. to Chlorhexidine Gluconate 0.2% w/v, Sodium Fluoride 0.05% w/v & Zinc Chloride 0.09% w/v
medicines.description: Aqua Joy mouthwash contains Chlorhexidine Gluconate, an antibacterial agent; Sodium Fluoride, an anti-cavity agent & Zinc Chloride, to stop odour in mouth. Aqua Joy mouthwash is used for prevention of plaque in absence of brushing, prevention and treatment of swollen gums, treatment of minor oral infections, controlling secondary bacterial infections for mouth & gum ulcers besides aiding in treatment of mouth and throat infections.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effect observed.
medicines.dosage: Take a measure full or 15 ml of Aqua Joy mouthwash in your mouth & swish for one minute thoroughly. Do not rinse, eat or drink thereafter for 20 minutes. It is to be used under adult supervision for kids under 5 years of age. Do not swallow it, after swishing thoroughly spit out. Can be used twice daily once in the morning and then before retiring to bed.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT EXPERT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Tannic Acid Glycerin 66 30% w/v, Iodine 0.3% w/v, Potassium Iodide 0.5% w/v, Thymol 0.05% w/v, Menthol 0.08% w/v & Glycerin 100% Qs v/v
medicines.description: Ultradent expert gum paint contains Tannic acid Glycerin, Iodine, Potassium Iodide, Thymol, Menthol & Glycerin. Tannic acid glycerin acts by healing sores and treating bleeding gums; Iodine, Potassium iodide & Thymol acts as antibacterial; Iodine & Menthol together act as counterirritant to relieve irritation and offer a soothing effect. This product is prescribed for spongy gums, bleeding gums, sores on gums & pus coming out of gums.
medicines.sideEffects: Very well tolerated, no side effects observed.

medicines.name: ULTRADENT GUM PAINT
medicines.composition: Tannic Acid 2% w/v, Zinc Chloride 1% w/v & Cetrimide 0.1 % w/v
medicines.description: Tannic Acid acts as an astringent to tighten gums and reduce bleeding, Zinc Chloride promotes healing and reduces inflammation, while Cetrimide serves as an antiseptic to prevent bacterial growth. It is used for managing gingivitis, bleeding gums, and oral inflammation, helping to maintain overall gum health.
medicines.sideEffects: Side effects may include a temporary burning sensation, irritation, or dryness of the gums. Rarely, allergic reactions like swelling, redness, or rash may occur. Discontinue use if severe irritation or sensitivity develops.

medicines.name: DIAPERGUARD
medicines.composition: Each g contains Aloevera 12.0% w/w, Zinc Oxide 7.0% w/w, Vitamin A 0.0118% w/w, Vitamin E 2% w/w, Nicotinamide 1% w/w, D-Panthenol 1% w/w & Magnesium Sulphate Heptahydrate 2% w/w
medicines.description: Diapergard cream contains Aloevera, a skin nourisher & soother; Zinc Oxide, an antibacterial; Vitamin A & Vitamin E, are skin nourisher; Nicotinamide, reduces redness, swelling & thus heals skin; D-Panthenol, improved hydration, elasticity and texture & Magnesium Sulphate soothes irritated skin. It is used for the treatment of all types of Rashes, Inflammation & Erythema associated with diaper use in adults, children and neonates & with tight clothing.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Change wet and soiled diapers promptly, clean the diaper area with warm water, dry the area completely. Apply gently on the affected area as often as necessary with each diaper change especially at night time when exposure to wet diaper is prolonged. At the surfaces with marks of tight clothing, gently apply the cream and wear loose clothing.

medicines.name: PILOGO PLUS
medicines.composition: Each g contains Troxerutin 2% w/w, Calcium Dobesilate monohydrate eq. to Anhydrous Calcium Dobesilate 0.25% w/w, Lignocaine Hydrochloride 3% w/w, Hydrocortisone Acetate 0.25% w/w, Zinc Oxide 5% w/w & Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 0.1% w/w (with Applicator)
medicines.description: Pilogo Plus cream contains Troxerutin and Calcium Dobesilate which stabilizes the veins to reduce bleeding and swelling, Zinc Oxide an antibacterial, Phenylephrine relieve piles by shrinking swollen blood vessels in the rectal area, thereby reducing discomfort and swelling., Hydrocortisone a steroid that reduces pain, inflammation and pruritis and Lignocaine, an anesthetic that relieves pain. Pilogo plus cream is indicated for pain and bleeding associated with anal fissures, haemorrhoids, after haemorrhoids removal surgery and in prevention of recurrence of piles following surgery.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects are application site reactions which include burning, irritation, itching and redness.

medicines.name: CALALAYER LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Calamine 15% w/v, Zinc Oxide 5% w/v, Bentonite 3% w/v, Sodium Citrate 0.5% w/v, Liquefied Phenol 0.5% v/v & Glycerin 5% w/v
medicines.description: Calalayer lotion contains Calamine & Zinc mild antibacterial and soothing agent that relieves redness & itching; Bentonite, Sodium Citrate & liquefied Phenol these acts by stoping skin itching, irritation & detoxifying skin; Glycerin, has skin nourishing benefits. It is used to soothe skin conditions such as reactions due to poisonous plants, such as poison oak, poison ivy and poison sumac; insect bites, chickenpox, shingles (Cold sores), swimmer's itch, Scabies, Chigger bites, Minor burns & Prickly heat. Besides it is also useful in cases of skin allergy, irritation, nappy rash & sun burns.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable with no known side effect.

medicines.name: ITCHGEAR
medicines.composition: Each g contains Clotrimazole 1% w/w, Menthol 1% w/w, Boric acid 1% w/w, Ichthammol 0.2% w/w & Zinc Oxide 5% w/w.
medicines.description: Itchgear cream contains time tested ingredients that?s offer anti-inflammatory (reduces swelling, redness, pain etc.), has prompt anti itching effect, bactericidal and fungicidal properties; making it all round product that can be used in any kind of infection, itching or inflammation. It is all in one solution for daily household usage.
medicines.sideEffects: Highly tolerable, no known side effects.

medicines.name: RASHCARE
medicines.composition: Aloevera 12% w/w, Zinc oxide 7% w/w, Vitamin A 0.0118% w/w, Vitamin E 2% w/w, Vitamin B3 1% w/w, D-Panthenol 1% w/w & Magnesium Sulphate heptahydrate 2% w/w (Anti-Rash cream for babies)
medicines.description: This anti-rash cream for babies is formulated with multiple ingredients to soothe and protect delicate skin. Zinc Oxide acts as a protective barrier and mild astringent, while Aloevera provides soothing and moisturizing properties. Vitamins A, E, and B3 (Niacinamide) support skin health and repair, with Vitamin B3 also helping to reduce redness and inflammation. D-Panthenol aids in skin hydration and healing, and Magnesium Sulphate heptahydrate further contributes to soothing irritated skin, making it effective against various types of rashes and inflammation.
medicines.sideEffects: The product is well tolerated, no known side effects.
medicines.dosage: Change wet and soiled diapers promptly, clean the diaper area with warm water, dry the area completely. Apply gently & liberally on the affected area as often as necessary with each diaper change especially at night time when exposure to wet diaper is prolonged. At the surfaces with marks of tight clothing, gently apply the cream and wear loose clothing.

medicines.name: DUALCARE-CZ PLUS
medicines.composition: Each Chewable Tablet contains Vitamin C 500 mg, El. Zinc 40 mg, Vitamin D3 1000 IU & Vitamin A 600 mcg (Orange Flavour)
medicines.description: Dualcare-CZ Plus chewable tablets combines essential vitamins and minerals crucial for immune function and overall well-being. It provides a high dose of Vitamin C and Vitamin D3, both vital for a healthy immune system, alongside Elemental Zinc, known for its role in immune response and cellular repair. Vitamin A is also included for its benefits to vision and immune health.
medicines.sideEffects: Dualcare-CZ PLus chewable tablets at normal doses usually has no side effects. If you have any unusual effects, contact your doctor or Pharmacist promptly.

medicines.name: RASHCARE SPRAY
medicines.composition: Zinc Oxide 20 % w/v
medicines.description: Zinc Oxide is a skin protectant that forms a barrier to shield irritated or damaged skin. It is used to treat and prevent conditions like diaper rash, minor burns, chafing, and skin irritation. In spray form, it offers easy, mess-free application, especially for sensitive or hard-to-reach areas.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated; rare mild irritation possible.

medicines.name: ATAZIS CREAM
medicines.composition: Pramoxine HCl, Zinc Oxide & Aloevera Cream
medicines.description: Atazis is a topical formulation combining a local anesthetic (pramoxine), a skin protectant (zinc oxide), and a soothing agent (aloe vera). Pramoxine provides temporary relief from itching and pain due to minor skin irritations such as insect bites, sunburn, and rashes from poison ivy or poison oak.
medicines.sideEffects: Common side effects may include mild skin irritation, redness, or stinging at the application site. In rare cases, allergic reactions such as rash, itching, swelling, or difficulty breathing may occur.
medicines.dosage: Apply a thin layer of the cream to the affected area 3 to 4 times daily, or as directed by a healthcare provider. Avoid applying to broken or irritated skin.

medicines.name: KETOSCALP LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ketoconazole 2% w/v & Zinc Pyrithione (ZPTO) 1% w/v
medicines.description: Ketoscalp Lotion contains Ketoconazole, an antifungal that acts by killing the fungus & Zinc Pyrithione, an antifungal & antibacterial drug that stops their growth. It is prescribed to prevent and treat dandruff & seborrhoeic dermatitis of scalp (a fungal infection of scalp).
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are irritation, itching and skin removal.

medicines.name: KETOSCALP SHAMPOO
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ketoconazole 2% w/v & Zinc Pyrithione (ZPTO) 1% w/v
medicines.description: Ketoscalp shampoo is a conditioner enriched shampoo that contains Ketoconazole, an antifungal that acts by kill the fungus & Zinc Pyrithione, an antifungal & antibacterial drug that stops their growth. It is prescribed to prevent and treat dandruff & seborrhoeic dermatitis of scalp (a fungal infection of scalp).
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are irritation, itching and skin removal.

medicines.name: LULIFORD SHAMPOO
medicines.composition: Each ml of shampoo contains Luliconazole 1%, Salicylic acid 3% & ZPTO 1% w/v
medicines.description: Luliford shampoo contains Luliconazole & Zinc Pyrithione (ZPTO) both of which are antifungal and Salicylic acid which is a keratolytic and clears the skin of dead cells and excessive growth of cells. Luliford shampoo is used to treat Dandruff or Seborrheic dermatitis. Besides it is also used as a supportive therapy in fungal infections of the scalp.
medicines.sideEffects: Irritation, burning sensation & allergic reactions may occur at application site.

medicines.name: KETOFLY LOTION
medicines.composition: Each ml contains Ketoconazole 2% w/v & Zinc Pyrithione (ZPTO) 1% w/v
medicines.description: Ketofly Lotion contains Ketoconazole, an antifungal that acts by kill the fungus & Zinc Pyrithione, an antifungal & antibacterial drug that stops their growth. It is prescribed to prevent and treat dandruff & seborrhoeic dermatitis of scalp (a fungal infection of scalp).
medicines.sideEffects: Main side effects are irritation, itching and skin removal.

medicines.name: KERACYLIC SOAP
medicines.composition: Salicylic Acid 3% w/w, Sulfur 10% w/w & ZPTO (Zinc Pyrithione) 1% w/w
medicines.description: Keracylic Soap is a medicated bar for oily skin, acne, dandruff, and seborrheic dermatitis. It contains Salicylic Acid for exfoliation, Sulfur for antimicrobial action, and ZPTO to control fungal growth. Ideal for acne-prone skin and scalp conditions.
medicines.sideEffects: Generally well tolerated. Mild dryness or peeling may occur initially. Avoid contact with eyes and mucous membranes.
medicines.dosage: Use 1–2 times daily or as directed by a healthcare professional. Apply to wet skin or scalp, lather gently, leave for a few minutes, and rinse thoroughly. For external use only.
